1.1: Mu kutandika, Ruhanga yaahangi̱ri̱ iguru na nsi.
1.2: Nsi gyali gitali na kugikwisana kandi gitalimwo kantu, nti̱ti̱ gyali gi̱bbu̱mbi̱ri̱ itaka, Mwozo wa Ruhanga naakulibatira hakyendi̱ wa meezi̱.
1.3: Mwomwo Ruhanga yaabaza naakoba yati, “Leka habbeho kyererezi̱,” kyererezi̱ kyabbaho.
1.4: Ruhanga yaaweeni̱ kyererezi̱ nikili kirungi, yaahu̱kani̱a kyererezi̱ na nti̱ti̱.
1.5: Kyererezi̱, yaakyeta “mwinsi” kandi nti̱ti̱, yaagyeta “i̱jolo.” B̯wi̱re b̯wasweki̱ri̱ b̯wei̱ra b̯wakya, kyabba kiro kyakubanza.
1.6: Mwomwo Ruhanga yaabaza naakoba yati, “Leka habbeho mwanya hakati̱ wa meezi̱ ga hansi na hakyendi̱.”
1.7: Kandi Ruhanga yaahangi̱ri̱ mwanya, yaahu̱kani̱a meezi̱ gaanyakubba hansi wa mwanya gu̱gwo, yaagabagani̱amwo ga hakyendi̱ na ga hansi. Kandi kwokwo kyabbeeri̱.
1.8: Kandi mwanya gu̱gwo Ruhanga yaagweti̱ri̱ iguru. B̯wi̱re b̯wasweki̱ri̱ b̯wi̱ra b̯wakya, kyabba kiro kyakabiri.
1.9: Mwomwo Ruhanga yaabaza naakoba yati, “Leka meezi̱ gali hansi weiguru geecooke hamwei̱, leka itehe lizooke.” Kandi kwokwo kyabbeeri̱.
1.10: Itehe, Ruhanga yaalyeti̱ri̱ nsi kandi meezi̱ gaanyakwecooka hamwei̱ yaageeta itaka. Kandi Ruhanga yaawona nikili kirungi.
1.11: Ruhanga yaabaza naakoba yati, “Leka nsi gi̱merye bimera bikwana nsigo na misaali mikwana byana bilimwo nsigo, b̯uli kintu mu mu̱li̱ngo gwakyo nka kukili.” Kandi kwokwo kyabbeeri̱.
1.12: Nsi gyamereerye bimera bili na nsigo mu mi̱li̱ngo myazo, na misaali mikwana byana bilimwo nsigo, b̯uli gu̱mwei̱ mu mu̱li̱ngo gwagwo nka kuguli. Kandi Ruhanga yaawona nikili kirungi.
1.13: B̯wi̱re b̯wasweki̱ri̱ b̯wei̱ra b̯wakya, kyabba kiro kyakasatu.
1.14: Mwomwo Ruhanga yaabaza naakoba yati, “Leka habbeho byererezi̱ mu mwanya heiguru, byahu̱kani̱e mwinsi nei̱jolo, byolokyenge bantu b̯usumi, biro na myaka,
1.15: byakirenge mu mwanya heiguru nibimulikira nsi.” Kandi kwokwo kyabbeeri̱.
1.16: Kasi mwomwo Ruhanga yaahanga byererezi̱ bikooto bibiri, kikooto kyakenge b̯wi̱re b̯wa mwinsi, kandi ki̱dooli̱ kyakenge i̱jolo kandi yaakora na nzota.
1.17: Byererezi̱ bi̱byo Ruhanga yaabi̱teeri̱ mu mwanya heiguru bimulikire nsi,
1.18: lyoba lyakenge b̯wi̱re b̯wa mwinsi, mweri̱ gwakenge i̱jolo, kandi byahu̱kani̱a kyererezi̱ na nti̱ti̱. Kandi Ruhanga yaawona nikili kirungi.
1.19: B̯wi̱re b̯wasweki̱ri̱ b̯wei̱ra b̯wakya, kyabba kiro kyakanei.
1.20: Mwomwo Ruhanga yaabaza naakoba yati, “Leka meezi̱ gabbemwo myalu mya bihangwa byomi bya b̯uli mu̱li̱ngo kandi leka bi̱nyoni̱ bibbeho, bi̱du̱ndu̱u̱ke mu mwanya hakyendi̱ wa nsi.”
1.21: Kasi mwomwo Ruhanga yaahanga bisolo bikooto bya mwitaka na bihangwa byensei̱ byomi bilibata, b̯uli ki̱mwei̱ mu mu̱li̱ngo gwakyo, na bi̱nyoni̱ byensei̱ bili na bimpaha b̯uli ki̱mwei̱ mu mu̱li̱ngo gwakyo. Kandi Ruhanga yaawona nikili kirungi.
1.22: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, Ruhanga yaabiha mu̱gi̱sa naakoba yati, “Mu̱byale mukanye, mwizuule mu meezi̱ ga mu mataka, kandi leka bi̱nyoni̱ bikanye mu nsi.”
1.23: B̯wi̱re b̯wasweki̱ri̱ b̯wei̱ra b̯wakya, kyabba kiro kyakataanu.
1.24: Mwomwo Ruhanga yaabaza naakoba yati, “Leka nsi gibyale bihangwa byomi mu mu̱li̱ngo gwabyo: bisolo byensei̱ bikooto na bi̱dooli̱, byakwamu̱gi̱ na byamwirungu.” Kandi kwokwo kyabbeeri̱.
1.25: Kwokwo yatyo Ruhanga yaahangi̱ri̱ bisolo byensei̱ mu mu̱li̱ngo gwabyo. Kandi Ruhanga yaawona nikili kirungi.
1.26: Mwomwo Ruhanga yaabaza naakoba yati, “Leka tukore muntu mu kwisana kwetu̱, abbe naakutwisana afugenge nsu̱, bi̱nyoni̱, bisolo byensei̱ bikooto na bi̱dooli̱, byakwamu̱gi̱ na byamwirungu.”
1.27: Ruhanga kwokwo yaahangi̱ri̱ yati muntu mu kwisana kwamwe, mu kwisana kwa Ruhanga, yaamu̱hangi̱ri̱. Yaabahangi̱ri̱ mudulu na mu̱kali̱.
1.28: Kandi Ruhanga yaabaha mu̱gi̱sa. Yaabaza naakoba yati, “Mu̱byale mukanye, mwi̱zu̱u̱lye nsi, mugifuge, mufuge nsu̱ za mwitaka, bi̱nyoni̱ bya mu mwanya, na bihangwa byensei̱ bili mu nsi bikalibata.”
1.29: Mwomwo Ruhanga yaabaza naakoba yati, “Wona, mbaheeri̱ bimera byensei̱ bili mu nsi bikwana nsigo na misaali myensei̱ mikwana byana, bi̱byo byensei̱ mubidyenge.
1.30: Bisolo byensei̱ bya mu nsi, bi̱nyoni̱ byensei̱ bya mu mwanya na bintu byensei̱ bikwesikiira heitehe na byensei̱ bili byomi, mbaheeri̱ bimera byensei̱ bya kisubi kibisi, byobyo mudyenge.” Kandi kwokwo kyabbeeri̱.
1.31: Kandi Ruhanga yaawona byensei̱ bi̱yaakoori̱ nibili birungi, kandi birungi kwo. B̯wi̱re b̯wasweki̱ri̱ b̯wei̱ra b̯wakya, kyabba kiro kyamukaaga.

2.1: Iguru na nsi na byensei̱ bigilimwo kwokwo yatyo byahangi̱i̱rwe.
2.2: Ha kiro kyamusanju, Ruhanga yaali amaari̱ milimo myamwe, yaahumula milimo myamwe myensei̱ mi̱yaakoori̱ ha kiro kyamusanju.
2.3: Kiro ki̱kyo kyamusanju Ruhanga yaaki̱heeri̱ mu̱gi̱sa, yaaki̱syani̱a hab̯wakubba kyokyo kiro ki̱yaahu̱mwi̱ri̱ milimo myamwe mi̱yaakoori̱.
2.4: Gugu gwogwo mu̱li̱ngo gweiguru na nsi ku̱byahangi̱i̱rwemwo. Kuhanga kwa Mudulu na Mu̱kali̱ Mukama Ruhanga b̯u̱yaahangi̱ri̱ iguru na nsi,
2.5: hatakabbeho kimera kyensei̱ mu nsi, libbe isubi lyali li̱takameeri̱ hab̯wakubba Mukama Ruhanga yaali atakagu̱mi̱ri̱ ndagali̱ mu nsi, kandi haali hatakabbeeri̱ho muntu akugilima,
2.6: bei̱tu̱ kiho kyabyokengi̱ nikitemba hakyendi̱, b̯utuntu ni̱b̯u̱lu̱bya nsi gyensei̱,
2.7: kasi mwomwo Mukama Ruhanga yaakora muntu kuruga mwitehe lya mu nsi, yaamuhuuha rwoya lwa b̯womi mu nni̱ndo, muntu yaabba kihangwa kyomi.
2.8: Hei̱nyu̱ma, Mukama Ruhanga yaasi̱mbi̱ri̱ musiri mu nsi gyʼEdeni̱, ha rubaju lwa b̯uhulukalyoba, ku̱kwo hooho yaateeri̱ muntu gi̱yaahangi̱ri̱.
2.9: Mukama Ruhanga yaamereerye misaali mya b̯uli mi̱li̱ngo myensei̱ mikusemeera mei̱so ga bantu, mibakusemeera kudya, kandi hakati̱ wa gu̱gwo musiri, yaateeri̱yo musaali gwa b̯womi, na musaali gukuha kwetegereza kirungi na kibiibi.
2.10: Haalingiho mugira gunyakuhetanga nigurugira Edeni̱, niguleeta meezi̱ mu musiri, kuruga hahwo ni̱gwezahu̱kani̱amwo migira minei.
2.11: Ibara lya mugira gukubanza bagweta Pi̱soni̱, gwogwo gunyakuhetanga ni̱gwelogoleerya nsi gyensei̱ gya Havi̱la, hooho heicala zaabbu.
2.12: Zaabbu gya mu nsi gi̱gyo gibba girungi, kandi hali̱yo mahi̱ga gabakweta bedoli̱u̱mu̱ na oni̱ki̱si̱.
2.13: Mugira gwakabiri gwogwo Gi̱hooni̱, gwogwo gunyakuhetanga ni̱gwelogoleerya nsi gyensei̱ gyʼI̱syopi̱ya.
2.14: Mugira gwakasatu gwogwo Ti̱gi̱ri̱i̱si̱, guheta nigugyenda b̯uhulukalyoba b̯wʼAsi̱ri̱ya. Kandi mugira gwakanei gwogwo Efu̱raati̱.
2.15: Mukama Ruhanga yaasengi̱ri̱ muntu, yaamuta mu musiri gwʼEdeni̱ agulime kandi agulinde.
2.16: Mukama Ruhanga yaamuragira naakoba yati, “Misaali myensei̱ mya mu musiri gugu okwikirizib̯wa kumidyaho byana nka kwokwendya.
2.17: Bei̱tu̱ ha musaali gukukuha kwetegereza kirungi na kibiibi, otalidya byana byagwo, kubba kiro olibidya, oli̱kwa.”
2.18: Mwomwo Mukama Ruhanga yaabaza naakoba yati, “Tikili kirungi muntu kwicala yankei, kammukoore mu̱mu̱sagi̱ki̱ amu̱semereeri̱.”
2.19: Kuruga mwitehe Mukama Ruhanga yaali amaari̱ kuhanga bisolo byensei̱ bya mu mwirungu na bi̱nyoni̱ byensei̱ bya mu mwanya, yaabileetera muntu awone nka kuyabiha mabara. Ibara lyensei̱ muntu li̱i̱yaaheeri̱ b̯uli ki̱mwei̱, lyolyo lyabbeeri̱ ibara lyakyo.
2.20: Muntu yaaha mabara bisolo byensei̱ bitungwa, bi̱nyoni̱ byensei̱ bya mu mwanya na bisolo byensei̱ bya mwirungu, bei̱tu̱ mu bi̱byo byensei̱, muntu atakabbe na mu̱mu̱sagi̱ki̱ amu̱semereeri̱.
2.21: Kasi mwomwo Mukama Ruhanga yaaleetera muntu b̯ulo, yeebbaka, yaamutoolamwo rubaju lu̱mwei̱ ha mbaju zaamwe, mu kiikaru kyalwo yaameryamwo nyama gyebbumba,
2.22: lu̱lwo rubaju lwa Mukama Ruhanga lu̱yaatoori̱ mu muntu, lwolwo yaakoori̱mwo mu̱kali̱, yaamuleetera mudulu, yooyo Adamu.
2.23: Kasi mudulu yaakoba yati, “Lili lyolyo i̱ku̱ha li̱ru̱gi̱ri̱ mu maku̱ha gange, kandi gyogyo nyama gi̱ru̱gi̱ri̱ mu nyama gyange, bamwetanga mu̱kali̱, hab̯wakubba yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ mu mudulu.”
2.24: Nahab̯waki̱kyo mudulu yaalekanga bbaawe na mmaawe niyeekwata na mu̱kali̱ waamwe, bab̯wo bantu babiri nibafooka mubiri gu̱mwei̱.
2.25: Mudulu na mu̱kali̱ waamwe baalingi b̯usa, kandi ki̱kyo ki̱takabakwati̱sye nsoni̱.

3.1: Mu bisolo byensei̱ byamwirungu Mukama Ruhanga bi̱yaahangi̱ri̱, mpiri gyali gi̱gezi̱gezi̱ hoi̱. Kandi mpiri gyab̯u̱u̱li̱i̱rye mu̱kali̱ nigikoba yati, “Mu mananu Ruhanga yaabageeni̱ kudya byana bya misaali myensei̱ mya mu musiri gugu?”
3.2: Mu̱kali̱ yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo mpiri naakoba yati, “Tukwikirizib̯wa kudya byana bya misaali mya mu musiri gugu,
3.3: bei̱tu̱ Ruhanga yaakobi̱ri̱ yati, ‘Mutalidya byana bya musaali guli hakati̱ wa musiri, nab̯ukilibba kubikwataho b̯u̱kwati̱, ki̱tali̱ki̱kyo mu̱li̱kwa.’ ”
3.4: Mpiri gyaweereeri̱ mu̱kali̱ nigikoba yati, “Haahi, mu mananu ti̱mu̱li̱kwa.
3.5: Bei̱tu̱ Ruhanga akyegi̱ri̱, b̯umulidyaho byana byagwo mei̱so geenyu̱ gaalib̯uluka, mwisane Ruhanga, mwege b̯urungi na b̯ubiibi!”
3.6: Mu̱kali̱ b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ byana bya musaali nibili birungi kubidya, byasemeera mei̱so gaamwe kandi musaali gu̱gwo gukugyenda kwi̱rya muntu wamagezi̱, yaanokola byana byagwo, yaadya. Bindi yaabihaho i̱baawe gibaalinayo, yoodede yaadyaho.
3.7: Hei̱nyu̱ma gya kudya, mei̱so gaab̯u gaab̯u̱lu̱ki̱ri̱, beetegereza nka kubaalingi b̯usa. Baasu̱ngi̱ri̱ nkaahi kuruga ha musaali mu̱ti̱i̱ni̱ beekoora byakulwala.
3.8: Adamu na mu̱kali̱ waamwe b̯u̱beegwi̱ri̱ iraka lya Mukama Ruhanga naakulibata mu musiri na mahehu ga joojolo, beebi̱sa mu misaali mya mu musiri gu̱gwo, aleke Mukama Ruhanga atabawona.
3.9: Mukama Ruhanga yeeta Adamu, yaamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya naakoba yati, “Oli hanya?”
3.10: Adamu yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “B̯u̱nyeegwi̱ri̱ nookulibata mu musiri nyaati̱i̱ni̱ri̱, nyeebi̱sa, hab̯wakubba ndi b̯usa.”
3.11: Ruhanga yaamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya naakoba yati, “Naani yaaku̱weereeri̱ nka kwoli b̯usa? Odi̱i̱ri̱ ku byana bya musaali gu̱nyaku̱geeni̱ otadya?”
3.12: Mudulu yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “Mu̱kali̱ gi̱i̱wampeeri̱ kwicala nagya, yooyo yampeeri̱ kyana kya musaali gu̱gwo, gyedede nyadyaho.”
3.13: Hei̱nyu̱ma, Mukama Ruhanga yaab̯u̱u̱li̱i̱rye mu̱kali̱ naakoba yati, “Kyani ki̱kyo kyokoori̱?” Mu̱kali̱ yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo yati, “Mpiri gyogyo gyangobeerye, nyaadya.”
3.14: Hei̱nyu̱ma Mukama Ruhanga yaaweereeri̱ mpiri naakoba yati, “Ofu̱bi̱i̱rwe hab̯wa ki̱kyo kyokoori̱, mu bisolo byensei̱ weewe okyeneerwe kukiraho. Mu kulibata kwamu okwi̱za ku̱li̱bati̱syanga nda, kandi cuucu gyogyo waadyanga biro bya b̯womi b̯wamu b̯wensei̱!
3.15: Kandi nteeri̱ho b̯unyanzigwa hakati̱ gyamu na mu̱kali̱, hakati̱ wa beizukulu baamu na beizukulu baamwe, mwizukulu waamwe, alikukuuta mu̱twe, kandi we olimuluma kigulu ku nkolokoojo.”
3.16: Kandi Ruhanga yaaweera mu̱kali̱ naakoba yati, “Mu kubyala baana wababyaliranga mu b̯u̱ru̱mi̱ b̯unene, oliicalanga ni̱wendya hoi̱ i̱baawu̱ kandi yooyo yakufuganga.”
3.17: Kandi Ruhanga yaaweereeri̱ Adamu naakoba yati, “Hab̯wakubba weegwi̱ri̱ bigambu bya mu̱kali̱ waamu, waadya byana bya musaali bi̱nyaku̱geeni̱ kudya, nsi gi̱kyeneerwe hab̯wamu, biro bya b̯womi b̯wamu byensei̱, olidyanga bikuruga mu kwekamba kwamu.
3.18: Itehe lyaku̱mereeryanga mahwa na mutala, kandi olidyanga bimera bya mwirungu.
3.19: Olidyanga bidyo bya mu ntu̱u̱yo zaamu ku̱doosya b̯woliku̱bayo mwitehe hab̯wakubba lyolyo li̱waru̱gi̱ri̱mwo, oli itehe kandi mwitehe lyolyo olikubamwo.”
3.20: Mudulu yaaheeri̱ mu̱kali̱ waamwe ibara Haawa hab̯wakubba yooyo maa bantu bensei̱.
3.21: Mukama Ruhanga yaakoleeri̱ Adamu na Haawa bilwalu kuruga mu bikuta, yaabalwalya. Adamu na Haawa Nibabingwa Mu Musiri
3.22: Mwomwo Mukama Ruhanga yaakoba yati, “Hab̯wakubba muntu abbeeri̱ nkoomwei̱ hali twe, yeegi̱ri̱ kirungi na kibiibi, leka tumugaane atanokola ha byana bya musaali gwa b̯womi akabidya akoomeera biro byensei̱.”
3.23: Nahab̯waki̱kyo Mukama Ruhanga yaamu̱bi̱ngi̱ri̱ mu musiri gwʼEdeni̱ agyende alime nsi gi̱bamu̱toori̱mwo.
3.24: Yaabi̱ngi̱ri̱mwo mudulu yogwo, ha b̯uhulukalyoba b̯wa musiri gwʼEdeni̱, yaatayo bakeru̱u̱bbi̱ na mpirima gi̱kwakab̯waki̱ ginyaakwicalanga nigyelogoolya hensei̱ kulinda muhanda gukugyenda ha musaali gwa b̯womi.

4.1: Adamu yaateerei̱ni̱ na mu̱kali̱ waamwe Haawa, yeemeta yaabyala Kai̱ni̱. Haawa yaabazi̱ri̱ naakoba yati, “ Mukama ampeeri̱ kubyala mwana wa b̯udulu.”
4.2: Hei̱nyu̱ma yaamu̱honderyeho mwana wa b̯udulu wondi yaamweta Abberi̱. Abberi̱ yaali mu̱li̱i̱sya wa ntaama kandi Kai̱ni̱ yaabba mu̱li̱mi̱.
4.3: Kasu̱mi̱ b̯u̱karabi̱ri̱ho, Kai̱ni̱ yaaleeteeri̱ Mukama kihongwa kya makesa kuruga mwitehe li̱yaali̱mengi̱,
4.4: na Abberi̱ yaaleeta mi̱zegei̱zo myeigana lyamwe na bisajwa byazo. Mukama yaasi̱i̱mi̱ri̱ Abberi̱ na kihongwa kyamwe,
4.5: bei̱tu̱ atakasi̱i̱me Kai̱ni̱ na kihongwa kyamwe. Kai̱ni̱ yaasali̱i̱rwe hoi̱ yaazingalira ki̱mwei̱, yaazu̱bya b̯u̱syo.
4.6: Mukama yaab̯u̱u̱lya Kai̱ni̱ naakoba yati, “Hab̯waki osali̱i̱rwe kandi hab̯waki ozi̱ngeeri̱ yatyo waazu̱bya na b̯u̱syo?
4.7: Obbenge okoori̱ kurungi, ti̱wakasi̱i̱mwa? Bei̱tu̱ okoori̱ kibii, kibii ki̱ku̱li̱ndi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ ha mulyangu ku̱ku̱si̱ngu̱ra, bei̱tu̱ osemereeri̱ okifuge.”
4.8: Hei̱nyu̱ma, Kai̱ni̱ yaaweereeri̱ waab̯u Abberi̱ naakoba yati, “I̱za tugyende mwirungu tulibatelibate.” B̯ubaalingi ku̱kwo, Kai̱ni̱ yaagwera waab̯u, yaamwi̱ta.
4.9: Kasi Mukama yaab̯u̱u̱lya Kai̱ni̱ naakoba yati, “Weenyu̱, Abberi̱, ali hanya?” Kai̱ni̱ yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “Tinyegi̱ri̱, gyagya ncala mu̱li̱ndi̱ wa weetu̱?”
4.10: Mukama amu̱b̯u̱u̱lya naakoba yati, “Kikyani kyokoori̱? Weegwa! Ibbanga lya weenyu̱ li̱bbwomoki̱ri̱ likundiriira hansi.
4.11: Nahab̯waki̱kyo okyeneerwe kandi obi̱ngi̱i̱rwe, tokwi̱za kwicala mu nsi gi̱nyweri̱ ibbanga lya weenyu̱ gi̱wei̱ti̱ri̱.
4.12: B̯wolilimanga musiri, ti̱gu̱li̱kwereerya bidyo, oliicala noozengeera kandi nooli mu̱goonyi̱.”
4.13: Kai̱ni̱ yei̱ramwo Mukama naakoba yati, “Kifubiro kyompeeri̱ kili kikooto maani, tinkusobora kukilindira.
4.14: Wona, hataati̱ ombi̱ngi̱ri̱ ndugeho mu mei̱so gaamu na mu gigi nsi. Nyabbanga mu̱zengeeri̱, yogwo yensei̱ alimbona ali̱nzi̱ta.”
4.15: Bei̱tu̱ Mukama yaaweera Kai̱ni̱ naakoba yati, “Kwahi, tikili yatyo, yogwo yensei̱ ali̱i̱ta Kai̱ni̱, ali̱hoorwa nzi̱go mirundi musanju.” Mukama yaateeri̱ho Kai̱ni̱ kawoneru kakwolokya nti, yensei̱ yaamu̱rombanga atali̱mwi̱ta.
4.16: Kasi Kai̱ni̱ yaaruga mu mei̱so ga Mukama , yaagyenda yeicala mu nsi gibakweta Noodi̱, b̯uhulukalyoba b̯wʼEdeni̱.
4.17: Kai̱ni̱ yaateerei̱ni̱ na mu̱kali̱ waamwe, mu̱kali̱ yeemeta yaabyala Enoka. Kasi Kai̱ni̱ yaabi̱mba rub̯uga, rub̯uga yaaluha ibara lya mu̱tabani̱ waamwe Enoka.
4.18: Enoka yaabyeri̱ I̱radi̱, I̱radi̱ yooyo Bba Meku̱yai̱ri̱, Meku̱yai̱ri̱ yooyo bba Metu̱saheeri̱, Metu̱saheeri̱ yaabyeri̱ Lameki̱.
4.19: Lameki̱ yaatu̱ngi̱ri̱ bakali̱ babiri, ibara lya mu̱kali̱ omwei̱ yooyo Aada, lya wondi yooyo Zi̱i̱la.
4.20: Aada yaabyeri̱ Yabbaali̱, yooyo haaha bab̯wo balaala mu heema kandi bali̱i̱sya.
4.21: Ibara lya waab̯u yooyo Yu̱bali̱, yogwo yooyo haaha bab̯wo bakuuta ndi̱ngi̱di̱ na ndere.
4.22: Zi̱i̱la yaabyeri̱ Tu̱bali̱-kai̱ni̱, yogwo yooyo yaali mu̱heesi̱ wa byoma bya mi̱li̱nga. Nyaakaab̯u Tu̱bali̱-kai̱ni̱, ibara lyamwe baamwetengi̱ Naama.
4.23: Lameki̱ yaaweereeri̱ bakali̱ baamwe naakoba yati, “Nywe bakali̱ bange, Aada na Zi̱i̱la, mu̱nzegwe, mwetegeerye kinkukoba, Nzi̱ti̱ri̱ muntu hab̯wa kumputaaza, musigazi muto hab̯wa kunkuuta.
4.24: Kai̱ni̱ b̯uyaakabba naakuhoorwa nzi̱go mirundi musanju, Lameki̱ asemereeri̱ ahoorwe mirundi nsanju na musanju.”
4.25: Adamu yei̱ra yaatunga mu̱kali̱ waamwe, mu̱kali̱ yaabyala mwana wa b̯udulu, yaamweta ibara Seezi̱, yaakoba yati, “Ruhanga ampeeri̱ mwana wondi mu kiikaru kyʼAbberi̱, Kai̱ni̱ gi̱yei̱ti̱ri̱.”
4.26: Seezi̱ nayo yaabyeri̱ mwana wa b̯udulu yaamweta Enosi̱. Mu kasu̱mi̱ kakwo, bantu hooho baatandi̱ki̱i̱ri̱ ku̱ramya Mukama .

5.1: Kiki kyokyo kitabbu ki̱kwolokya beizukulu bʼAdamu. Ruhanga b̯u̱yaahangi̱ri̱ muntu, yaamu̱hangi̱ri̱ nakumwisana.
5.2: Yaabahangi̱ri̱ mudulu na mu̱kali̱, b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubahanga, yaabaha mu̱gi̱sa, yaabeeta bantu.
5.3: Adamu b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka ki̱ku̱mi̱ na maku̱mi̱ gasatu (130), yaabyeri̱ mwana wa b̯udulu akumwisanira ki̱mwei̱, wa ki̱si̱sani̱ kyamwe kyonyi̱ni̱, yaamweta Seezi̱.
5.4: Myaka myʼAdamu mi̱yamaari̱ hei̱nyu̱ma gya kubyala Seezi̱ myadoori̱ runaanei (800), yaabyala baana bandi, ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
5.5: Myaka myensei̱ Adamu mi̱yaamaari̱ myali rwenda na maku̱mi̱ gasatu (930), yaakwa.
5.6: Seezi̱ b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka ki̱ku̱mi̱ na mitaanu (105), yaabyala Enosi̱.
5.7: Seezi̱ b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubyala Enosi̱, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi runaanei na musanju (807), yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
5.8: Myaka myensei̱ Seezi̱ mi̱yaamaari̱ myali rwenda nei̱ku̱mi̱ na mibiri (912), yaakwa.
5.9: Enosi̱ b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka kyenda (90), yaabyala Kenani.
5.10: Enosi̱ b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubyala Kenani, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi runaanei nei̱ku̱mi̱ na mitaanu (815), yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
5.11: Myaka myensei̱ Enosi̱ mi̱yaamaari̱ myali rwenda na mitaanu (905), yaakwa.
5.12: Kenani b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka nsanju (70), yaabyala Maharaleeri̱.
5.13: Kenani b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubyala Maharaleeri̱, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi runaanei na maku̱mi̱ ganei (840), yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
5.14: Myaka myensei̱ Kenani mi̱yaamaari̱ myali rwenda nei̱ku̱mi̱ (910), yaakwa.
5.15: Maharaleeri̱ b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka nkaaga na mitaanu (65), yaabyala Yaleedi̱.
5.16: Maharaleeri̱ b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubyala Yaleedi̱, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi runaanei na maku̱mi̱ gasatu (830), yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na bahala.
5.17: Myaka myensei̱ Maharaleeri̱ mi̱yaamaari̱ myali runaanei na kyenda na mitaanu (895), yaakwa.
5.18: Yaleedi̱ b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka ki̱ku̱mi̱ na nkaaga na mibiri (162), yaabyala Enoka.
5.19: Yaleedi̱ b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubyala Enoka, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi runaanei (800), yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
5.20: Myaka myensei̱ Yaleedi̱ mi̱yaamaari̱ myali rwenda mu nkaaga na mibiri (962), yaakwa.
5.21: Enoka b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka nkaaga na mitaanu (65), yaabyala Metu̱seera.
5.22: Enoka b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubyala Metu̱seera, yaahereeze Ruhanga kumala myaka bi̱ku̱mi̱ bisatu (300), yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
5.23: Myaka myensei̱ Enoka mi̱yamaari̱ mu nsi myali bi̱ku̱mi̱ bisatu na nkaaga na mitaanu (365).
5.24: Enoka yaahereeze Ruhanga, kandi Ruhanga yaamu̱tweri̱ atakei̱re kuzooka.
5.25: Metu̱seera b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka ki̱ku̱mi̱ na kinaanei na musanju (187), yaabyala Lameki̱.
5.26: Metu̱seera b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubyala Lameki̱, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi rusanju na kinaanei na mibiri (782), yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
5.27: Myaka myensei̱ Metu̱seera mi̱yaamaari̱ myali rwenda mu nkaaga na mwenda (969), yaakwa.
5.28: Lameki̱ b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka ki̱ku̱mi̱ na kinaanei na mibiri (182), yaabyala mwana wa b̯udulu,
5.29: yaamweta Nu̱u̱ha yaakoba yati, “Kuruga mwitehe lya Mukama li̱yaakyeni̱ri̱, mwana yogo ali̱tu̱hu̱mu̱u̱lya kutalibana kwa mikono myetu̱ mu nsi.”
5.30: Lameki̱ b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubyala Nu̱u̱ha, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi bi̱ku̱mi̱ bitaanu mu kyenda na mitaanu (595), yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
5.31: Myaka myensei̱ Lameki̱ mi̱yaamaari̱ myali rusanju mu nsanju na musanju (777), yaakwa.
5.32: Nu̱u̱ha b̯u̱yaamaari̱ myaka bi̱ku̱mi̱ bitaanu (500), yaabyala Seemu̱, Haamu na Yafeesi̱.

6.1: Bantu b̯u̱bakatandi̱ki̱ri̱ kukanya mu nsi, baabyala baana ba b̯uhala,
6.2: baana ba Ruhanga baawona bab̯wo bahala nibali barungi, baaswera bamwe hali bahala babaakomi̱ri̱mwo.
6.3: Mwomwo Mukama yaakoba yati, “Mwozo gwange tiguliicala mu muntu biro byensei̱, kubba muntu ali mubiri b̯ubiri, biro byamwe bilibba myaka ki̱ku̱mi̱ na maku̱mi̱ gabiri (120).”
6.4: Mu biro bi̱byo na mu biro byenyu̱ma, Banefu̱li̱i̱mu̱ baaloho. Baana ba Ruhanga b̯u̱bateerei̱ni̱ na bahara ba bantu, baabyala na bo baana mu nsi baabba bantu banyamaani hoi̱. Bab̯wo boobo bantu ba kadei banyaku̱ku̱ma hoi̱.
6.5: Mukama b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ b̯ubiibi b̯wa muntu nib̯uli b̯unene mu nsi, na biteekerezu bya muntu nibili ha b̯ubiibi b̯usa,
6.6: Kandi Mukama yaasali̱i̱rwe hoi̱, yeezi̱zu̱kya hab̯waki yaahangi̱ri̱ muntu mu nsi.
6.7: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, Mukama yaabaza naakoba yati, “Nkugyenda ku̱hwerekereerya muntu gi̱nyahangi̱ri̱ mutoole mu nsi, bisolo, bi̱nyoni̱, na bi̱nyoni̱ bi̱du̱ndu̱u̱ka, hab̯wakubba nsali̱i̱rwe hab̯wa kubihanga.”
6.8: Bei̱tu̱ Mukama yaakwati̱i̱rwe Nu̱u̱ha mbabazi̱. Nu̱u̱ha na Mwizulo gwa Meezi̱
6.9: Baba boobo beizukulu ba Nu̱u̱ha. Nu̱u̱ha yaali muntu wa mananu, mu̱terekereru̱ mu bantu ba mu̱hi̱hi̱ gwamwe, kandi yaaheerezengi̱ Ruhanga.
6.10: Yaali na batabani̱ baamwe basatu, Seemu̱, Haamu na Yafeesi̱. Nu̱u̱ha Naakora B̯wati̱
6.11: Mu kasu̱mi̱ kakwo, Ruhanga yaaweeni̱ nsi gyensei̱ nka kugyali gi̱tab̯u̱ku̱ kandi gi̱i̱zwi̱ri̱ b̯ubiibi.
6.12: Nsi nka kugyali gi̱heneki̱ri̱ mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga, bantu bensei̱ baali baheneeri̱.
6.13: Ruhanga yaaweereeri̱ Nu̱u̱ha naakoba yati, “Mmali̱ri̱i̱ri̱ ku̱zi̱kya bantu bensei̱, hab̯wakubba nsi gyensei̱ gili gi̱tab̯u̱ku̱, nkwi̱za ku̱gi̱hwerekereerya hamwei̱ na bintu byensei̱.
6.14: Kora b̯wati̱ b̯ukooto b̯wa mbaahu zirungi zitatiro. B̯wati̱ b̯u̱b̯wo, ob̯usalemwo bi̱si̱i̱ka, ob̯u̱si̱i̱ge, ob̯ususuhe mu nda na hanzei.
6.15: Ob̯ukore yati, b̯ulei b̯wab̯wo b̯ubbe mita ki̱ku̱mi̱ na maku̱mi̱ gasatu neisatu (133), b̯ugali b̯wab̯wo mita maku̱mi̱ gabiri neibiri (22), hakyendi̱ zibbe mita i̱ku̱mi̱ neisatu (13).
6.16: B̯wati̱ b̯u̱b̯wo, ob̯uteho kasolya ketu̱lu̱ke senti̱mi̱ta maku̱mi̱ ganei neine (44), mulyangu gwa b̯wati̱, ogute ha rubaju lwa b̯wati̱ ob̯usalemwo mwaliiro gu̱ku̱tandi̱ki̱sya, mwaliiro gwakabiri na mwaliiro gwakasatu.
6.17: Hab̯wakubba nkwi̱za kuleeta mwizulo gwa meezi̱ mu nsi ku̱hwerekereerya bantu bensei̱, bintu byomi byensei̱ mbimale hansi weiguru, kintu kyensei̱ kili mu nsi ki̱li̱kwa.
6.18: Bei̱tu̱ nkwi̱za kukora nawe ndagaanu, olingira mu b̯wati̱, we na batabani̱ baamu, mu̱kali̱ waamu, na bamukaabaana baamu.
6.19: Kandi oli̱ngi̱i̱rya mu b̯wati̱ ha b̯uli kintu kyensei̱ kyomi, bibiri bibiri bya b̯uli mu̱li̱ngo kidulu na ki̱kali̱, biicale hamwei̱ nawe nibili byomi.
6.20: Bi̱nyoni̱ mu mu̱li̱ngo myensei̱ myabyo, na bisolo mu nganda zaabyo, byensei̱ bikwesikiira hansi mu mu̱li̱ngo gwabyo, bibiri bibiri bya b̯uli mu̱li̱ngo bilingira mu b̯wati̱ cali oli, obilinde bi̱tali̱kwa.
6.21: Kandi olitwala bidyo bya b̯uli mu̱li̱ngo obibiike, nywe na byomi byensei̱ byobyo mulidyangaho.”
6.22: Nu̱u̱ha kwokwo yaakoori̱, yaakora byensei̱ Ruhanga bi̱yaamu̱ragi̱i̱ri̱.

7.1: Hei̱nyu̱ma, Mukama yaaweera Nu̱u̱ha naakoba yati, “Ingira mu b̯wati̱, we na makaa gaamu, hab̯wakubba weewe wankei ginkuwona oli wamananu mu bantu ba mu̱hi̱hi̱ gugu.
7.2: Otwale ha b̯uli bisolo bidiib̯wa musanju bidulu na musanju bi̱kali̱ kandi otwale kidulu na ki̱kali̱ ha b̯uli bisolo bitadiib̯wa.
7.3: Kandi otwale hali b̯uli bi̱nyoni̱ bya mu mwanya musanju bidulu na musanju bi̱kali̱. Kwokwo luganda lwabyo lutahwerekeera ki̱mwei̱ mu nsi.
7.4: Hab̯wakubba hei̱nyu̱ma gya biro musanju, nkwi̱za kuguma ndagali̱ mu nsi, gi̱gwe kumala biro maku̱mi̱ ganei, mwinsi nei̱jolo, b̯uli kihangwa kyensei̱ ki̱nyahangi̱ri̱ nkwi̱za ku̱ki̱hwerekereerya nkimaleho mu nsi.”
7.5: Nu̱u̱ha yaakoori̱ bintu byensei̱ Mukama bi̱yaamu̱ragi̱i̱ri̱.
7.6: Mwizulo hagwezi̱i̱ri̱ mu nsi, Nu̱u̱ha yaali na myaka rukaaga.
7.7: Ndagali̱ b̯ugyali nicaali kutandika, yo na batabani̱ baamwe, na mu̱kali̱ waamwe, na bamukabaana baamwe, bengi̱i̱ri̱ mu b̯wati̱, aleke meezi̱ ga mwizulo gatabei̱ta.
7.8: Ha bisolo bidiib̯wa na ha bisolo bitadiib̯wa, ha bi̱nyoni̱ na ha b̯uli kintu kyesikiira ha nsi,
7.9: bibiri bibiri kidulu na ki̱kali̱ byengi̱i̱ri̱ mu b̯wati̱ hamwei̱ na Nu̱u̱ha nka Ruhanga ku̱yamu̱weereeri̱.
7.10: Hei̱nyu̱ma wa biro musanju meezi̱ ga mwizulo gei̱za ha nsi. Nu̱u̱ha na Bantu Baamwe Nibengira mu B̯wati̱
7.11: Mu mwaka gwa rukaaga (600) gwa b̯u̱handu̱ b̯wa Nu̱u̱ha, ha kiro kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na musanju kya mweri̱ gwakabiri, misu myensei̱ mya hansi myaki̱ngu̱ki̱ri̱, nzi̱je za mwizulo za mwiguru zeijuluka.
7.12: Ndagali̱ gyagwi̱ri̱ mu nsi kumala biro maku̱mi̱ ganei, mwinsi nei̱jolo.
7.13: Ha kiro ki̱kyo kyonyi̱ni̱, Nu̱u̱ha na batabani̱ baamwe: Seemu̱, Haamu na Yafeesi̱, mukaa Nu̱u̱ha na bamukaabaana baamwe, bengi̱i̱ri̱ mu b̯wati̱.
7.14: Bei̱ngi̱i̱ri̱ na bisolo bya b̯uli mu̱li̱ngo, nte, bi̱nyoni̱, na bisolo bikwesikiira hansi bya b̯uli mu̱li̱ngo, bi̱nyoni̱ bya b̯uli mu̱li̱ngo nabyo byengi̱i̱ri̱.
7.15: Bintu byensei̱ byomi bikuhumula byengi̱i̱ri̱ mu b̯wati̱ bibiri bibiri hamwei̱ na Nu̱u̱ha.
7.16: Ha bi̱byo byensei̱ bili na mubiri binyakwingira mu b̯wati̱ kidulu na ki̱kali̱, byengi̱i̱ri̱ nka Ruhanga ku̱yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ Nu̱u̱ha. Kasi Mukama yaamukingirana mu b̯wati̱.
7.17: Mwizulo gwei̱ceeri̱ho mu nsi kumala biro maku̱mi̱ ganei. Meezi̱ gaakanyi̱ri̱ b̯wati̱ b̯wabyoka hakyendi̱ b̯wadengeeta.
7.18: Meezi̱ gagyendengi̱ nigahuuka gaabbeera ki̱mwei̱ galei, b̯wati̱ b̯wadengeeta hakyendi̱.
7.19: Meezi̱ gaaleeheeri̱ ki̱mwei̱, gaamera nsahu zensei̱ zilei.
7.20: Gei̱ceeri̱ nigeyongeranga kuleeha gaamera nsahu mita nka musanju kwakyendi̱ waazo.
7.21: Bintu byensei̱ byomi binyaakulibatanga mu nsi byakwi̱ri̱, nnyoni̱ zensei̱, bisolo byensei̱, bihangwa bya mu meezi̱ na bantu bensei̱.
7.22: Bintu byensei̱ binyakubba ku nsi gyomu bili na rwoya lwa b̯womi, bi̱ku̱hu̱u̱mu̱li̱sya nni̱ndo byakwi̱ri̱.
7.23: Ruhanga yaahwerekereerya b̯uli kintu kyensei̱ kyomi kinyakubba nikili mu nsi, bantu, bisolo na bi̱nyoni̱ bya mu mwanya byahwerekeera, byamalika mu nsi. Nu̱u̱ha yooyo yaasi̱geeri̱ho na bab̯wo baayaali nabo mu b̯wati̱.
7.24: Meezi̱ gaatakakeehe mu nsi mpaka biro ki̱ku̱mi̱ na maku̱mi̱ gataanu (150).

8.1: Kandi Ruhanga atakeeb̯we Nu̱u̱ha na bisolo byensei̱ biyaali nabyo mu b̯wati̱. Ruhanga yaaleeti̱ri̱ mpehu gyahunga ku nsi, meezi̱ gaakeeha,
8.2: misu mya hansi na nzi̱je za mwizulo za mwiguru zeekinga, ndagali̱ gi̱nyaku̱gwanga gyamuka.
8.3: Meezi̱ gaagyendi̱ri̱ nigakeeha ku nsi mpula mpula hab̯wa biro ki̱ku̱mi̱ na maku̱mi̱ gataanu (150).
8.4: Ha kiro kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na musanju kya mweri̱ gwamusanju, b̯wati̱ b̯wajami̱ri̱ ha nsahu zʼArarati̱.
8.5: Meezi̱ gaagyendengi̱ nigakeeha mpula mpula ku̱doosya kiro kyakubanza kya mweri̱ gwei̱ku̱mi̱, nsahu zaahu̱lu̱kya mi̱twe.
8.6: Biro maku̱mi̱ ganei b̯u̱byamaki̱ri̱ho, Nu̱u̱ha yeijula di̱ri̱sa gya b̯wati̱ b̯u̱yaakoori̱.
8.7: Yaatuma nnyoni̱. Nnyoni̱ gyei̱ceeri̱ ni̱gi̱du̱ndu̱u̱kanga kandi ni̱gi̱ranga ha b̯wati̱ ku̱doosya meezi̱ b̯u̱goomeeri̱ ki̱mwei̱ mu nsi.
8.8: Hei̱nyu̱ma, yaatu̱mi̱ri̱ kolome gi̱yaali nayo mu b̯wati̱, kwetegereza meezi̱ b̯u̱gakabba gakeehi̱ri̱ mu nsi.
8.9: Bei̱tu̱ kolome b̯u̱yaalemeerwe ha kwemeera, yei̱rayo, hab̯wakubba meezi̱ gaali niigacaali mu nsi gyensei̱. Nu̱u̱ha yaahu̱lu̱ki̱i̱rye mukono hanzei yaamukwata, yaamwi̱ngi̱i̱rya mu b̯wati̱ cali yaali.
8.10: Yaali̱ndi̱ri̱ biro bindi musanju, yaab̯u̱ni̱a yaatuma kolome,
8.11: kolome yei̱ri̱ri̱ joojolo naali na kikoora kya kasonga ka musaali mu̱zayi̱tu̱u̱ni̱ mu mu̱nwa. Nu̱u̱ha yeega meezi̱ nka ku̱gakeehi̱ri̱ mu nsi.
8.12: Yaali̱ndi̱ri̱ biro bindi musanju, yaab̯u̱ni̱a yaatuma kolome, ha murundi gugu kolome atakei̱reyo hali yo.
8.13: Ha kiro kyakubanza kya mweri̱ gwakubanza, Nu̱u̱ha ha yaadooseerye myaka rukaaga na gu̱mwei̱, meezi̱ gaali goomi̱ri̱ ku nsi. Nu̱u̱ha yaaku̱u̱nyu̱u̱kwi̱ri̱ b̯wati̱ hakyendi̱, yaawona hanzei, yaawona nsi gyensei̱ gyomi̱ri̱
8.14: Kiro kya maku̱mi̱ gabiri na musanju kya mweri̱ gwakabiri nsi gyali gyomi̱ri̱.
8.15: Mwomwo Ruhanga yaaweera Nu̱u̱ha naakoba yati,
8.16: “Huluka mu b̯wati̱, we, mu̱kali̱ waamu, batabani̱ baamu na bamukaabaana baamu.
8.17: Hu̱lu̱kya b̯uli kihangwa kyomi kili na mubiri kyoli nakyo, bi̱nyoni̱, bisolo na bihangwa byensei̱ bilibatira hansi kandi bi̱byale bikanye mu nsi.”
8.18: Nu̱u̱ha yaahu̱lu̱ki̱ri̱ mu b̯wati̱ na batabani̱ baamwe, na mu̱kali̱ waamwe, na bamukaabaana baamwe.
8.19: Bisolo byensei̱ na bihangwa byensei̱ bilibatira heitehe kandi na bi̱nyoni̱ byensei̱, na b̯uli kintu kyensei̱ kilibata, byahu̱lu̱ki̱ri̱ mu b̯wati̱, b̯uli ki̱mwei̱ mu luganda lwakyo. Nu̱u̱ha Naahayo Kihongwa
8.20: Nu̱u̱ha yaabi̱mbi̱i̱ri̱ Mukama kyoto kyeihongo, yaakwata ha bisolo bidiib̯wa, na ha bi̱nyoni̱ bidiib̯wa yaabihonga, yaabyokeerya ha kyoto kyeihongo.
8.21: Mukama b̯u̱yeegwi̱ri̱ kawu̱nyo karungi ka kihongwa yaakoba yati, “Ti̱ndi̱i̱ri̱ra kukyena nsi hab̯wa muntu, mutima gwamwe nab̯ugwabba gwicala gubiibi kuruga mu b̯uto b̯wamwe. Ti̱ndi̱i̱ra ku̱hwerekereerya bihangwa byensei̱ byomi nka ku̱nyaakoori̱.
8.22: Nsi b̯ugilibba nigicaaliho, kusiga na kukesa, b̯wi̱nyamu̱ na b̯uhyo, kyanda na kibbaga, mwinsi nei̱jolo, tibilimalikaho.”

9.1: Kandi Ruhanga yaaha Nu̱u̱ha na baana baamwe mu̱gi̱sa naakoba yati, “Mu̱byale, mukanye, mwi̱zu̱u̱lye nsi.
9.2: Bisolo byensei̱ bya mu nsi, bi̱nyoni̱ byensei̱ bya mu mwanya, b̯uli kintu kyensei̱ kyesikiira heitehe, na nsu̱ zensei̱ za mwitaka, b̯yabati̱i̱nanga kandi byabekenganga, mu̱bi̱lemenge.
9.3: Kintu kyensei̱ kyomi kandi kilibata mwakidyanga. Nka ku̱nyaabaheeri̱ bimera bya kisubi kibisi bibbenge byakudya byenyu̱, mbaheeri̱ bintu byensei̱ bibbe byakudya byenyu̱.
9.4: Kyonkei mutalidya nyama na b̯womi b̯wagyo, lyolyo ibbanga.
9.5: Kandi mu mananu, alibbwoma ibbanga lya muntu yensei̱ ndimufubira. Kakubba kisolo kya mwirungu ki̱i̱ta muntu ki̱semereeri̱ nakyo ki̱kwe.
9.6: “Yogwo yensei̱ abbwomi̱ri̱ ibbanga lya muntu, na lyamwe lilibbwomoka hab̯wakubba Ruhanga yaahangi̱ri̱ muntu mu kusisana kwamwe.
9.7: Bei̱tu̱ nywe, mu̱byale, mukanye, mwi̱zu̱u̱lye nsi kandi mugileme.”
9.8: Mwomwo Ruhanga yaaweera Nu̱u̱ha na batabani̱ baamwe naakoba yati,
9.9: “Hataati̱ mwegwenu, ndimu kukora ndagaanu na nywe kandi na beizukulu beenyu̱ gilibakwataho,
9.10: kandi na b̯uli kihangwa kyensei̱ kyoli nakyo, bi̱nyoni̱, bisolo bya bitungwa na bya mwirungu na bintu byensei̱ binyakuruga mu b̯wati̱.
9.11: Nkoori̱ ndagaanu gyange nanywe gikukoba nti, bintu byensei̱ byomi ti̱ndi̱i̱ra ku̱bi̱zi̱kya na mwizulo gwa meezi̱, kandi mwizulo ti̱gu̱li̱i̱ra ku̱zi̱kya nsi.”
9.12: Mwomwo Ruhanga yaakoba yati, “Kaka kooko kawoneru ka ndagaanu gya biro na biro ginkukora na nywe na b̯uli kihangwa kyensei̱ kimuli nakyo, kandi kalibba kawonero na ku bantu ba mu kasu̱mi̱ ka mu mei̱so.
9.13: Nteeri̱ mu bikaka mu̱hengezi̱ma gwange, gu̱kwi̱za kubbanga kawoneru ka ndagaanu gi̱nkoori̱ nanywe na nsi gyensei̱.
9.14: B̯unyakabbumbanga iguru na bikaka kandi mu̱hengezi̱ma ni̱gu̱kezoolokyaho,
9.15: nyei̱zu̱kanga ndagaanu gyange nawe na bihangwa byensei̱ byomi, meezi̱ ti̱gali̱i̱ra kwizula ku̱hwerekereerya nywe na bihangwa byensei̱ byomi.
9.16: Mu̱hengezi̱ma b̯u̱gwakezoolokyanga mu bikaka, nyakaguwonaga ni̱nyi̱zu̱ka ndagaanu gya biro na biro gi̱nyarageeni̱ hakati̱ waagya na bintu byensei̱ byomi bili mu nsi.”
9.17: Ruhanga yaab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye yaaweera Nu̱u̱ha naakoba yati, “Gugu mu̱hengei̱zi̱ma kooko kawoneru ka ndagaanu gyange nawe na bihangwa byensei̱ bili mu nsi.” Nu̱u̱ha na Batabani̱ Baamwe
9.18: Batabani̱ ba Nu̱u̱ha banyakuruga mu b̯wati̱ baali, Seemu̱, Haamu na Yafeesi̱. Haamu yooyo munyakubyala Kanani̱.
9.19: Mu batabani̱ ba Nu̱u̱ha bab̯wo basatu, hooho bantu bensei̱ ba mu nsi baaru̱gi̱i̱ri̱.
9.20: Nu̱u̱ha yaatandi̱ki̱ri̱ kulima, yaasimba musiri gwa mi̱zabbi̱bbu̱.
9.21: B̯u̱yaakanyweri̱ho gi̱gyo vi̱i̱no, yaataamiira yaalaala mu heema gyamwei munyinghinyi, yeebbaka.
9.22: Haamu Bba Kanani̱ b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ bbaawe naali munyinyi, yaagyendi̱ri̱ hanzei yaaweera baab̯u babiri.
9.23: Seemu̱ na Yafeesi̱ baakwata kilwalu, bakita ha mabega, baagyenda ki̱nyenyu̱ma, babbumba Bbaawaab̯u batakamuwone b̯unyinghinyi.
9.24: Nu̱u̱ha maaci ga vi̱i̱no b̯u̱gakamu̱mali̱ki̱ri̱mwo, yaakenga mu̱tabani̱ waamwe muto ki̱yaamu̱koori̱,
9.25: yaamukyena naakoba yati, “Kanani̱ akyeneerwe! Yaabbanga mwiru akusembayo ki̱mwei̱ muli beiru bensei̱, kwokwo yatyo alibba mu baana bei̱ra baamwe.”
9.26: Nu̱u̱ha yaab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye yaakoba yati, “ahaariizwe Mukama Ruhanga wa Seemu̱, Kanani̱ yaabbanga mwiru hali Seemu̱.
9.27: Ruhanga akanyi̱sye Yafeesi̱, leka Yafeesi̱ ei̱calenge mu heema za Seemu̱, Kanani̱ yaabbanga mwiru hali Yafeesi̱.”
9.28: Hei̱nyu̱ma gya mwizulo, Nu̱u̱ha yaamaari̱ myaka mindi bi̱ku̱mi̱ bisatu na maku̱mi̱ gataanu.
9.29: Myaka myensei̱ Nu̱u̱ha mi̱yaamaari̱ myali rwenda na mitaanu (905), yaakwa.

10.1: Baba boobo beizukulu ba Nu̱u̱ha ba batabani̱ baamwe, Seemu̱, Haamu na Yafeesi̱, baababyeri̱ hei̱nyu̱ma gya mwizulo gwa meezi̱. Beizukulu ba Yafeesi̱
10.2: Gaga googo mabara ga batabani̱ ba Yafeesi̱: Gomeri̱, Magogi̱, Madaayi̱, Yavaani̱, Tu̱bali̱, Meseki̱ na Ti̱raasi̱.
10.3: Gaga googo mabara ga batabani̱ ba Gomeri̱: Asekenazi̱, Ri̱i̱faati̱ na Togarama.
10.4: Batabani̱ ba Yavaani̱: Eri̱sa, Tarasi̱i̱si̱, bantu ba Ki̱ti̱mo na bantu ba Dodani̱.
10.5: Muli bab̯wo hooho haaru̱gi̱ri̱ bantu banyakusaasaana mu nsi b̯uli luganda na lukobo lwaho, mahanga gaab̯u. Beizukulu ba Haamu
10.6: Gaga googo mabara ga batabani̱ ba Haamu: Ku̱u̱si̱, Mi̱si̱ri̱, Pu̱u̱ti̱ na Kanani̱.
10.7: Gaga googo mabara ga batabani̱ ba Ku̱u̱si̱: Sebba, Havi̱la, Sabi̱ta, Raama na Sabi̱teka. Mabara ga batabani̱ ba Raama googo gaga: Sebba na Dedani̱.
10.8: Ku̱u̱si̱ yooyo munyakubyala Ni̱mu̱rodi̱, Ni̱mu̱rodi̱ yogwo yooyo yaali mu̱lwani̱ wa maani wakubanza mu nsi.
10.9: Mukama yaamu̱wonengi̱ nali mu̱hi̱i̱gi̱ wamaani, hooho baatooleeri̱ kukoba nti, “Nka Ni̱mu̱rodi̱ Mukama yakufoora mu̱hi̱i̱gi̱ wamaani.”
10.10: Mbuga zi̱i̱yalemi̱ri̱ kubanza zaali, Bbabbeeri̱, Ereki̱ Akadi̱ na Kalu̱ne, mbuga zi̱zo zensei̱ zili mu nsi gya Si̱naara.
10.11: Ni̱mu̱rodi̱ b̯u̱yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ Si̱naara, yaagyenda Asi̱ri̱ya, yaabi̱mba mbuga zizi: Ni̱neeva, Rehobboosi̱, Kala,
10.12: na Reseni̱ luli hakati̱ gya Ni̱neeva na Kala. Reseni̱ lwolwo lwali rub̯uga lu̱handu̱.
10.13: Mi̱si̱ri̱ yaabyeri̱, bantu ba Lu̱u̱di̱mu̱, Anami̱mu̱, Lehabi̱mu̱, Nafu̱tu̱mu̱,
10.14: Pasi̱ru̱si̱mu̱, Kasi̱ru̱hi̱mu̱, (yogo yooyo yaaru̱gi̱rwemwo Bafi̱ri̱si̱i̱ti̱) na Kafu̱toli̱mu̱.
10.15: Kanani̱ yaabyeri̱ Si̱dooni̱, yooyo mwana waamwe mu̱zegei̱zo, yaateeryaho Heeti̱,
10.18: Bali̱vaadi̱, Bazeemali̱ na Bahamaati̱. Nganda za Bakanani̱ zasaaseeni̱ zaadwa hadei.
10.19: Nsi ginyaakulemwanga Bakanani̱, gyatandi̱ki̱i̱rengi̱ Si̱dooni̱ mu matemba, kudwa masi̱ri̱mu̱ka ga Geraali̱, ku̱doosya Gaza, nigikwata b̯uhulukalyoba b̯wa Sodomu̱, Gomora, Adama na Zebboyi̱i̱mu̱, kudwa Laasa.
10.20: Bab̯wo boobo beizukulu ba Haamu mu nganda zaab̯u, nkobo zaab̯u, nsi gyab̯u na mahanga gaab̯u. Beizukulu ba Seemu̱
10.21: Seemu̱ yaali waab̯u Yafeesi̱ mu̱handu̱, kandi nayo Seemu̱ yaali na baana. Baana bensei̱ bʼEbberi̱ baali beizukulu ba Seemu̱.
10.22: Batabani̱ ba Seemu̱, boobo: Eramu, Asu̱li̱, Ari̱paki̱saadi̱, Lu̱u̱di̱ nʼAramu.
10.23: Batabani̱ bʼAramu boobo: U̱zi̱, Hu̱u̱li̱, Geteeri̱ na Maasi̱.
10.24: Ari̱paki̱saadi̱, yooyo munyakubyala Seera, kandi Seeri̱ yaabyeri̱ Ebberi̱.
10.25: Ebberi̱ yogwo yaabyeri̱ batabani̱ babiri, ibara lyomwei̱ yooyo Peregi̱, hab̯wakubba mu biro byamwe nganda hooho zebagani̱i̱ryemwo. Kandi ibara lya waab̯u lyolyo Yoki̱taani̱.
10.26: Yoki̱taani̱ yogwo yaabyeri̱ Ali̱modaadi̱, Serefu̱, Hazali̱maveeti̱, Yeera,
10.29: Ofi̱ri̱, Havi̱la na Yobbabbu̱, bab̯wo bensei̱ baalingi nibali batabani̱ ba Yoki̱taani̱.
10.30: Nsi gibaalingimwo gyatandi̱ki̱i̱rengi̱ Meesa kudwa kwansi b̯wa Sefara, na kwansi wa nsahu za b̯uhulukalyoba.
10.31: Baba boobo beizukulu ba Seemu̱, nka ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra mu nganda zaab̯u, nkobo zaab̯u, mu mahanga gaab̯u na nsi zaab̯u.
10.32: Zi̱zo zoozo nganda za beizukulu ba Nu̱u̱ha, ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra mu b̯ubyalisanwa waab̯u, mu mahanga gaab̯u na mu̱li̱ngo gaasaaseeni̱ mu nsi gyensei̱ hei̱nyu̱ma gya mwizulo gwa meezi̱.

11.1: Mu biro bi̱byo, nsi gyensei̱ gyali na lukobo lu̱mwei̱ na bigambu bikwisana.
11.2: Bantu b̯u̱baafu̱ru̱ki̱ri̱ kuruga b̯uhulukalyoba, baagya kyeya kinyakubba mu nsi gya Si̱naara.
11.3: Baaweeragana nibakoba yati, “Mwi̱ze tub̯umbe matafaali tu̱gookye kurungi.” Mu kiikaru kya mahi̱ga, baakoreseerye matafaali; kandi mu kiikaru kya b̯u̱dongo, baakoresya kolasi̱.
11.4: Hei̱nyu̱ma, baakoba yati, “Tu̱bi̱mbe rub̯uga lulimwo munaara gukudwa mwiguru, aleke tu̱ku̱me, tutasaasaana mu nsi gyensei̱.”
11.5: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, Mukama yaasi̱ri̱mu̱ki̱ri̱, yei̱za kuwona rub̯uga na munaara gwa baana ba bantu gu̱baku̱bi̱mba.
11.6: Mukama yaabazi̱ri̱ naakoba yati, “Muwone baba bantu bali bamwei̱, kandi bensei̱ bakubaza lukobo lu̱mwei̱, kandi kiki kyokyo kya ha ntandiko ha bintu bi̱bakwi̱za kukora, kandi tihaloho kibaliteekereza kukora nikikabalema.
11.7: Mwi̱ze tu̱si̱ri̱mu̱ke, tutabatab̯ure lukobo lwab̯u, aleke bategwagana.”
11.8: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, Mukama yaabasaasaani̱a mu nsi gyensei̱, beemeera ku̱bi̱mba lu̱lwo rub̯uga.
11.9: Kyokyo rub̯uga lu̱lwo baalweti̱ri̱ Bbabbeeri̱, hab̯wakubba hahwo, hooho Mukama yaatab̯u̱tab̯u̱li̱i̱ri̱ lukobo lunyaakubazwanga mu nsi gyensei̱, kuruga hahwo Ruhanga yaabasasaasaani̱a mu nsi gyensei̱. Beizukulu ba Seemu̱
11.10: Baba boobo beizukulu ba Seemu̱: Seemu̱ b̯uyaali na myaka ki̱ku̱mi̱ (100) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyeri̱ Ari̱paki̱saadi̱, b̯u̱b̯wo haali harabi̱ri̱ho myaka mibiri mwizulo gwa meezi̱ gu̱mali̱ki̱ri̱ mu nsi.
11.11: Hei̱nyu̱ma gya Seemu̱ kubyala Ari̱paki̱saadi̱, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi bi̱ku̱mi̱ bitaanu (500) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
11.12: Ari̱paki̱saadi̱ b̯uyaali na myaka maku̱mi̱ gasatu na mitaanu (35) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala Seera.
11.13: Hei̱nyu̱ma gya Ari̱paki̱saadi̱ kubyala Seera, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi bi̱ku̱mi̱ binei na misatu (403) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
11.14: Seera b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka maku̱mi̱ gasatu (30) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala Ebberi̱.
11.15: Seera b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubyala Ebberi̱, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi bi̱ku̱mi̱ binei na misatu (403) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala baana bandi, ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
11.16: Ebberi̱ b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka maku̱mi̱ gasatu na minei (34) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala Peregi̱.
11.17: Ebberi̱ b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubyala Peregi̱, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi bi̱ku̱mi̱ binei na maku̱mi̱ gasatu (430) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
11.18: Peregi̱ b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka maku̱mi̱ gasatu (30) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala Lehu̱.
11.19: Peregi̱ b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubyala Lehu̱, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi bi̱ku̱mi̱ bibiri na mwenda (209) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
11.20: Lehu̱ b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka maku̱mi̱ gasatu na mibiri (32) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala Seru̱gi̱,
11.21: Lehu̱ b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubyala Seru̱gi̱, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi bi̱ku̱mi̱ bibiri na musanju (207) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
11.22: Seru̱gi̱ b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka maku̱mi̱ gasatu (30) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala Nahoori̱.
11.23: Seru̱gi̱ b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubyala Nahoori̱, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi bi̱ku̱mi̱ bibiri (200) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
11.24: Nahoori̱ b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka maku̱mi̱ gabiri na mwenda (29) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala Teera,
11.25: hei̱nyu̱ma gya Nahoori̱ kubyala Teera, yaamaari̱ myaka mindi ki̱ku̱mi̱ nei̱ku̱mi̱ na mwenda (119) mya b̯u̱handu̱,, yaabyala baana bandi ba b̯udulu na ba b̯uhala.
11.26: Teera b̯u̱yaadooseerye myaka nsanju (70) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaabyala I̱bbu̱ramu̱, Nahoori̱ na Harani̱. Beizukulu ba Teera
11.27: Baba boobo beizukulu ba Teera. Teera yaabyeri̱ I̱bbu̱ramu̱, Nahoori̱ na Harani̱. Harani̱ yaabyeri̱ Looti̱.
11.28: Harani̱ yaakwi̱ri̱ bbaawe Teera atakakwi̱ri̱. Yaakwereeri̱ mu rub̯uga lwa U̱la mu nsi gya Bakalidaaya hali yaabyali̱i̱rwe.
11.29: I̱bbu̱ramu̱ na Nahoori̱, baatu̱ngi̱ri̱ bakali̱. Ibara lya mukaa I̱bbu̱ramu̱ lyali Saraayi̱, kandi lya mukaa Nahoori̱, lyali Mi̱ri̱ka. Mi̱ri̱ka yaali muhara wa Harani̱ munyakubba de bbaa I̱si̱ka.
11.30: Saraayi̱ yaali ngumba, atakabbe na mwana.
11.31: Teera yaasengi̱ri̱ mu̱tabani̱ I̱bbu̱ramu̱ na mwizukulu Looti̱, mwana wa Harani̱, na Saraayi̱ mukaamwana, mukaa I̱bbu̱ramu̱, baagyenda hamwei̱, baaruga mu nsi U̱la gya Bakalidaaya, baagyenda mu nsi gya Kanani̱, bei̱tu̱ b̯u̱baadoori̱ Harani̱, babi̱mba beicala.
11.32: Teera yaamaari̱ myaka bi̱ku̱mi̱ bibiri na mitaanu (205) mya b̯u̱handu̱, yaakwera mu nsi gya Harani̱.

12.1: Kasi Mukama yaaweera I̱bbu̱ramu̱ naakoba yati, “Demuka oruge mu nsi gyamu, oruge hali bantu baamu, oruge mu nnyu̱mba gya Bbaawu, ogyende mu nsi gi̱nkwi̱za ku̱kwolokya.
12.2: Ndikufoora ihanga likooto, ndikuha mu̱gi̱sa, ibara lyamu ndilifoora lya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa aleke obbe mu̱gi̱sa hali bandi.
12.3: Bab̯wo baakusabiranga mu̱gi̱sa, nyaabahanga mu̱gi̱sa, kandi yogwo yaakukyenanga nagya nyaamukyenanga, mahanga gensei̱ galitunga mu̱gi̱sa kuraba muli we.”
12.4: Nahab̯waki̱kyo I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaagyendi̱ri̱ nka Mukama ku̱yaamu̱ragi̱i̱ri̱, yaatwalegeeni̱ Looti̱. I̱bbu̱ramu̱ kuruga Harani̱ yaali adooseerye myaka nsanju na mitaanu mya b̯u̱handu̱.
12.5: Yaatweri̱ Saraayi̱ mu̱kali̱ waamwe, Looti̱ mwana wa waab̯u, bintu byab̯u byensei̱ bibaalingi batu̱ngi̱ri̱, na bantu babaalingi baatu̱ngi̱ri̱ mu nsi gya Harani̱, baasetuka baagyenda Kanani̱.
12.6: Yaadoori̱ mu kiikaru kibakweta Sekemu̱, cali haali musaali mu̱si̱sye mu nsi gya Moore. Mu kasu̱mi̱ kakwo, Bakanani̱ boobo baalingi nibali mu nsi gi̱gyo.
12.7: Mwomwo, Mukama yaawonekeera I̱bbu̱ramu̱, yaamuweera naakoba yati, “Gigi nsi gyogyo nkwi̱za kuha beizukulu baamu.” Nahab̯waki̱kyo, I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaabi̱mbi̱ri̱ kyoto kyeihongo hahwo, yaaki̱bi̱mbi̱i̱ri̱ Mukama munyakumuwonekera.
12.8: B̯u̱yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ hahwo yaagyendi̱ri̱ ha nsahu zinyakubba b̯uhulukalyoba b̯wa Bbeseeri̱, yaabamba heema gyamwe, Bbeseeri̱ gyabba b̯ugwalyoba kandi Ai̱ gyabba b̯uhulukalyoba. Mu ki̱kyo kiikaru yaabi̱mbi̱ri̱ho kyoto kyeihongo yaaramya Mukama .
12.9: I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaagyendi̱ri̱ mu mei̱so na lugyendu lwamwe, yaakwata muhanda gukugyenda Negeb̯u̱. I̱bbu̱ramu̱ Naali Mi̱si̱ri̱
12.10: Mu kasu̱mi̱ kakwo, nzala gyagwi̱ri̱ mu ki̱kyo kicweka, I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaafuruka yaagyenda kwicala Mi̱si̱ri̱, hab̯wa nzala ginene.
12.11: Bei̱tu̱ b̯uyaali heehi̱ kwingira Mi̱si̱ri̱, yaaweera Saraayi̱ mu̱kali̱ waamwe naakoba yati, “Nkyegi̱ri̱ nka kwoli mu̱kali̱ nyarurungi,
12.12: Banyami̱si̱ri̱ b̯ubakakuwona bakwi̱za kukoba yati, ‘Yogo ali mu̱kali̱ waamwe.’ Hei̱nyu̱ma bakwi̱za ku̱nzi̱ta, bei̱tu̱ we bakwi̱za kukuleka obbe mwomi.
12.13: Nahab̯waki̱kyo we obaweere yati oli nyakeetu̱ aleke bankwate kurungi hab̯wamu.”
12.14: I̱bbu̱ramu̱ b̯u̱yaadoori̱ Mi̱si̱ri̱, Banyami̱si̱ri̱ baaweeni̱ mu̱kali̱ waamwe naali nyab̯urungi kwo.
12.15: Kandi bayolo ba Faraaho nabo baamu̱haari̱i̱ze hali Faraaho, Saraayi̱ baamutwala mu kikaali kya Faraaho.
12.16: Faraaho yaaheeri̱ I̱bbu̱ramu̱ ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa hab̯wa Saraayi̱, yaaha I̱bbu̱ramu̱ ntaama na nte, ndogoyi̱ zidulu, baheereza badulu, baheereza bakali̱, ndogoyi̱ gi̱kali̱ na ngamira.
12.17: Bei̱tu̱ Mukama yaasi̱ndi̱ki̱i̱ri̱ Faraaho na ba makaa gaamwe ki̱i̱zo kya nseeri̱ ginyamaani hab̯wa Saraayi̱ mukaa I̱bbu̱ramu̱.
12.18: Faraaho yeeti̱ri̱ I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya naakoba yati, “Kikyani kiki kyonkoori̱? Hab̯waki otambwereeri̱ Saraayi̱ nka kwali mu̱kali̱ waamu?
12.19: Hab̯waki waabazi̱ri̱ nookoba yati, ‘Yogwo ali nyaakeetu̱?’ Ki̱kyo kyokyo kinyakumpa kumutwala kubba mu̱kali̱ wange. Hataati̱ mu̱kali̱ waamu ngogo yo mukwate Weegyendera!”
12.20: Mwomwo Faraaho yaaragira badulu baamwe baherekeere I̱bbu̱ramu̱ hamwei̱ na mu̱kali̱ waamwe na bintu byab̯u baamutwala ha mutaanu.

13.1: Nahab̯waki̱kyo I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ Mi̱si̱ri̱, yo I̱bbu̱ramu̱ na mu̱kali̱ waamwe na byensei̱ biyaali nabyo, na Looti̱ yaagyendi̱ri̱ nayo, baadwa Negeb̯u̱.
13.2: Ha kasu̱mi̱ kaka I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaali atu̱ngi̱ri̱ itungu linene hoi̱, nte, feeza na zaabbu.
13.3: Yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ Negeb̯u̱ yaakuba yeicala hakati̱ wa Bbeseeri̱ na Ai̱ hali yaabanzi̱ri̱ kwicala.
13.4: Mu kiikaru ha yaabanzi̱ri̱ ku̱bi̱mba kyoto kyeihongo hooho de yaarami̱i̱rye Mukama .
13.5: Looti̱ yogwo munyakugyenda nʼI̱bbu̱ramu̱, nayo yaali na magana ga ntaama, mbu̱li̱, magana ga nte, na heema zinene.
13.6: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, itehe lyali litakubamala babiri kwicala hamwei̱, hab̯wakubba itungu lyab̯u lyali linene hoi̱, batakusobora kwicala hamwei̱.
13.7: Kandi bali̱i̱sya ba nte zʼI̱bbu̱ramu̱ na ba za Looti̱, bei̱calengi̱ nibazongoba. Mu kasu̱mi̱ kakwo, Bakanani̱ nʼAbaperezi̱ boobo baali mu nsi gi̱gyo.
13.8: I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaaweera Looti̱ naakoba yati, “Tikili kirungi gya nawe kwicala nitusikagana kandi tikili kirungi bali̱i̱sya bange na baamu kwicala nibakuuta mpaka kubba tuli baluganda lu̱mwei̱.
13.9: Nsi gi̱gyo gili mu mei̱so gaamu ogi̱weeni̱? Twahukane, wakabba nookwendya ogyende ha mukono gwab̯umoso, gya ngyende ha mukono gwab̯udyo, rundi we okwate ha mukono gwab̯udyo, gya nkwate ha mukono gwab̯umoso.”
13.10: Looti̱ yaabyokeerye mei̱so yaawona kyeya kya Yorodaani nka ku̱kyazokengi̱ kurungi. Meezi̱ gaali hensei̱ nka musiri gwa Mukama na nsi gya Mi̱si̱ri̱ kugyali, magyenda ga Zowali̱. (Kiki kyabbeeri̱ho Mukama atakahwerekereerye Sodomu̱ na Gomora.)
13.11: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, Looti̱ yeekomeeri̱ kyeya kyensei̱ kya Yorodaani, yaakwata gwa b̯uhulukalyoba, kwokwo baahu̱keeni̱ yati.
13.12: I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yei̱ceeri̱ mu nsi gya Kanani̱ kandi Looti̱ yeicala hakati̱ wa mbuga za mu kyeya, yaabambi̱ri̱ heema gyamwe, heehi̱ na Sodomu̱.
13.13: Mu kasu̱mi̱ kakwo bantu ba Sodomu̱ baalingi babiibi, baheneeri̱ hoi̱ hali Mukama . I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ Naagyenda Hebbu̱rooni̱
13.14: Looti̱ b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kwahukana nʼI̱bbu̱ramu̱, Mukama yaaweera I̱bbu̱ramu̱ naakoba yati, “Byokya mei̱so gaamu owone hooli ha matemba na masi̱ri̱mu̱ka, mukono gwa b̯uhulukalyoba na b̯ugwalyoba,
13.15: hab̯wakubba nsi gi̱gyo gyensei̱ gyokuwona, ndigikuha, ngihe na beizukulu baamu biro byensei̱.
13.16: Ndi̱kanyi̱sya beizukulu baamu nkeicuucu lya mu nsi. B̯ukyakabba nikikusoboka kubala cuucu lya mu nsi. B̯u̱di̱ na beizukulu baamu balisobora kubabala.
13.17: Byoka olibate orabe mu gigi nsi, weetegereza b̯ulei na b̯ugali waagyo, hab̯wakubba ndigikuha.”
13.18: Nahab̯waki̱kyo I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yei̱hi̱ri̱ heema gyamwe, yaagyenda yeicala heehi̱ na misaali mi̱si̱sye mya Mamu̱le mu Hebbu̱rooni̱ ku̱kwo hooho yaabi̱mbi̱i̱ri̱ Mukama kyoto kyeihongo.

14.1: Mu biro bya Amu̱rafeeri̱ mukama wa Si̱naara, nʼAlyoki̱ mukama wʼErasaali̱, Kedolahomeeri̱ mukama wʼEremu̱, na Ti̱dali̱ mukama wa Goi̱mi̱,
14.2: bakama bab̯wo baalwani̱si̱i̱rye Bbeera mukama wa Sodomu̱, Bbi̱ri̱i̱sa mukama wa Gomora, Si̱nabi̱ mukama wʼAdama, Semeeberi̱ mukama wa Zebboyi̱i̱mu̱, na mukama wa Bbela (hataati̱ gyegebeerwe nka Zowali̱).
14.3: Bakama bab̯wo bensei̱ bababazi̱ri̱ho baacooki̱ri̱ mahe gaab̯u mu kihanga kya Si̱di̱mi̱ (hataati̱ kyegebeerwe nka kihanga kyʼItaka lya Mu̱kwa).
14.4: Baalingi bamaari̱ myaka i̱ku̱mi̱ na mibiri nibakufugwa Kedolahomeeri̱, bei̱tu̱ mu mwaka gwei̱ku̱mi̱ na misatu, baamu̱jeemera.
14.5: Mu mwaka gwei̱ku̱mi̱ na minei, Kedolahomeeri̱ na bakama bandi banyakubba nibali nayo, bei̱zi̱ri̱ baalwani̱sya baasi̱ngu̱ra Balefai̱mu̱ banyakwicalanga mu nsi gyʼAsi̱tarooti̱-karu̱nayi̱mu̱, na Bazu̱u̱zi̱ mu Haamu̱, Bami̱i̱mu̱ mu nsi gya Saave-ki̱ri̱yati̱mu̱,
14.6: baasi̱ngu̱ra na Bahooli̱ banyakubba nibali mu nsi gya mu nsahu za Sei̱ri̱, kudwera ki̱mwei̱ Eri̱parani̱ ha mitaanu mya irungu.
14.7: Nahahwo, baali̱beeti̱ baadwa Eni̱mi̱si̱pate (hataati̱ gyegebeerwe nka Kadesi̱) baalwani̱sya nsi gyensei̱ gya Bamaleki̱, na Bamooli̱, banyakwicalanga Haazazoni̱-tamara, baasi̱ngu̱ra.
14.8: Hei̱nyu̱ma, mukama wa Sodomu̱, mukama wa Gomora, mukama wʼAdama, mukama wa Zebboyi̱i̱mu̱ na mukama wa Bbela (hataati̱ gyegebeerwe nka Zowali̱) baaru̱mbi̱ri̱, baagyenda kulwana mu kyeya kya Si̱di̱i̱mu̱.
14.9: Baalweni̱ na Kedolahomeeri̱ mukama wʼEremu̱, Ti̱dali̱ mukama wa Goyi̱mu̱, Amu̱rafeeri̱ mukama wa Si̱naara, nʼAlyoki̱ mukama wʼErasaali̱, baali bakama banei ni̱baku̱lwani̱sya bakama bataanu.
14.10: Mu kasu̱mi̱ kakwo, kihanga kya Si̱di̱i̱mu̱ kyalingimwo bi̱i̱na binene. Mukama wa Sodomu̱ na wa Gomora b̯ubaalingi ni̱bakwi̱ru̱ka na mahe gaab̯u, bamwei̱ baagwi̱ri̱ mu bi̱byo bi̱i̱na, bandi bei̱ru̱ka mu nsahu.
14.11: Kasi banyanzigwa baatwala bintu byensei̱ bya Sodomu̱ na Gomora na bidyo beegyendera.
14.12: Baanyagi̱ri̱ Looti̱ mu̱tabani̱ wa waab̯u I̱bbu̱ramu̱, munyakwicalanga Sodomu̱, baanyaga na bintu byamwe, baagyenda.
14.13: Muntu omwei̱ munyakukena mu b̯ulemu yei̱zi̱ri̱ yaaweera I̱bbu̱ramu̱ Muhebburaniya munyakwicalanga heehi̱ na misaali mi̱si̱sye mya muntu gibakweta Mamu̱le Mu̱mooli̱, waab̯u Esi̱kooli̱ nʼAneri̱, baba baalingi barageeni̱ nʼI̱bbu̱ramu̱.
14.14: I̱bbu̱ramu̱ b̯u̱yeegwi̱ri̱ munyaruganda waamwe bamu̱nyagi̱ri̱, yaaramaga hamwei̱ na badulu baamwe balwani̱ kuruga mu nnyu̱mba gyamwe bakudwa bi̱ku̱mi̱ bisatu nei̱ku̱mi̱ na munaanei (318), baamuhondeera kudwa mpaka Daani̱.
14.15: Yaabagani̱i̱ryemwo i̱he lyamwe yaabatwala kulwana mu b̯wi̱re b̯wei̱jolo, yo na baheereza baamwe baakweti̱ bamwei̱, bandi baababinga baabadoosya Hoba, matemba ga rub̯uga lwa Damasi̱ko.
14.16: Hahwo yei̱ri̱i̱rye Looti̱ munyakubba wa luganda lwamwe na bintu byamwe, bakali̱ na bantu banyakubba baanyaagi̱i̱rwe. Meleki̱zedeki̱ Naaha I̱bbu̱ramu̱ Mu̱gi̱sa
14.17: I̱bbu̱ramu̱ b̯u̱yei̱ri̱ri̱, amaari̱ ku̱si̱ngu̱ra Kedolahomeeri̱ na bakama bandi banyakubba nibali nayo, mukama wa Sodomu̱ yaagyenda ku̱mu̱romba mu kihanga kya Saave (hataati̱ kyegebeerwe nka kihanga kya Mukama).
14.18: Meleki̱zedeki̱ mukama wa Salemu̱, yaaleeti̱ri̱ mugaati na vi̱i̱no, Meleki̱zedeki̱ yogwo, yaali mu̱laami̱ wa Ruhanga Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱.
14.19: Yaasabi̱i̱ri̱ I̱bbu̱ramu̱ mu̱gi̱sa naakoba yati, “Ruhanga Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱, mu̱hangi̱ weiguru na nsi, ahe I̱bbu̱ramu̱ mu̱gi̱sa.
14.20: Ruhanga Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱, aku̱si̱ngu̱ri̱i̱si̱i̱rye banyanzigwa baamu ahaariizwe!” I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaaha Meleki̱zedeki̱ ki̱mwei̱ kyei̱ku̱mi̱ kya byensei̱ bi̱yaagu̱mi̱si̱i̱rye
14.21: Mukama wa Sodomu̱ yaaweereeri̱ I̱bbu̱ramu̱ naakoba yati, “Gya mpa bantu, bei̱tu̱ we, otwale bintu.”
14.22: Bei̱tu̱ I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo mukama wa Sodomu̱ naakoba yati, “Ndahi̱i̱ri̱ Mukama Ruhanga Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱, mu̱hangi̱ weiguru na nsi,
14.23: tinsobora kutwala kahu̱u̱zi̱ rundi lukobba lwa nkei̱to, rundi kintu kyamu kwokwo oteicalanga nookoba yati, ‘Gyagya nyaatu̱ngi̱si̱i̱rye I̱bbu̱ramu̱ itungu.’
14.24: Ti̱nkwi̱za kutwala kintu kyensei̱, bibalimbalira byobyo bidyo binyakudiiwa basigazi, na mugab̯u gwa bantu banyakugyenda nagya. Leka Aneri̱, Esi̱kooli̱ na Mamu̱le batwale mugab̯u gwab̯u.”

15.1: Bi̱byo b̯u̱byamali̱ki̱ri̱, Mukama yaabazi̱ri̱ nʼI̱bbu̱ramu̱ na mu kilooto yaamuweera naakoba yati, “I̱bbu̱ramu̱ leka ku̱ti̱i̱na, nyakulindanga, mpeera gyamu gilibba gikooto hoi̱.”
15.2: I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaakoba yati, “Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga, olimpa kyani? Wona tinkabyalanga mwana. Mu̱damasi̱ko Eryeza yooyo mugwete wange.
15.3: Gya otakampe lubyalu, nahab̯waki̱kyo muheereza munyakubyalwa mu makaa gange yooyo alibba mugwete wange.”
15.4: Nahahwo yeegwi̱ri̱ Mukama naakukoba yati, “Mudulu yogwo talibba mugwete waamu, mwana gi̱webyali̱i̱ri̱ yooyo alibba mugwete waamu.”
15.5: Ruhanga yaahu̱lu̱kya I̱bbu̱ramu̱ hanzei, yaamuweera naakoba yati, “Lingiira heiguru owone nzota zi̱zo wakabba nokusobora kuzibala.” Yaab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye yaakoba yati, “Beizukulu baamu kwokwo balibba banene yatyo!”
15.6: I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yei̱ki̱ri̱ri̱i̱ze mu Mukama , Mukama yaamutwala kubba asemeeri̱.
15.7: Mukama yaaweereeri̱ I̱bbu̱ramu̱ naakoba yati, “Gyagya Mukama munyakukutoola mu nsi gya U̱la gya Bakalidaaya, nkuhe gigi nsi ogitwale.”
15.8: Bei̱tu̱ I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaamwi̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga, nyeega teetei̱ nka kunditunga gigi nsi?”
15.9: Mukama yaamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “Ndetera nyana gi̱dooseerye myaka misatu, b̯uguma gya mbu̱li̱ gya myaka misatu, na mpaya gya ntaama gya myaka misatu, kolome wa mwirungu na kolome muto wa kwamu̱gi̱.”
15.10: I̱bbu̱ramu̱ bi̱byo byensei̱ yaabi̱leteeri̱ Mukama , yaabyatyamwo hakati̱ b̯uli kipacu yaakita ha rubaju lundi, bei̱tu̱ makolome atakagaatyemwo.
15.11: Masega b̯u̱gei̱ci̱i̱rye ha nnyama zi̱zo, I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaagabinga.
15.12: Lyoba b̯ulyali nilikugwa, I̱bbu̱ramu̱ b̯ulo waamaani waamukwata, nti̱ti̱ gya zigizigi gi̱ku̱ti̱ni̱i̱sya gyamubbumba.
15.13: Mwomwo Mukama Ruhanga yaakoba yati, “Nyegeeri̱ ki̱mwei̱ beizukulu baamu nka kubalibba banyamahanga mu nsi gitali gya kwamwab̯u, balibba beiru mu gi̱gyo nsi, balibakora kubiibi kumala myaka bi̱ku̱mi̱ binei.
15.14: Bei̱tu̱ ihanga likubafuga ndilifubira, hei̱nyu̱ma baruge mu gi̱gyo nsi nibali na bintu binene.
15.15: Bei̱tu̱ we oli̱kwa ogu̱lu̱u̱si̱ri̱ hoi̱, oli̱zi̱i̱kwa mu b̯u̱si̱nge.
15.16: Beizukulu baamu baali̱i̱ra mu gigi nsi ha mu̱hi̱hi̱ gwakanei. Ha kasu̱mi̱ kakwo hooho ndifubira Bamooli̱ hab̯wa bibiibi byab̯u. Bei̱tu̱ hataati̱ kasu̱mi̱ kakubafubira kacaali kudwa.”
15.17: Lyoba b̯u̱lyamaari̱ ku̱gwa nti̱ti̱, gi̱kweti̱ haazooki̱ri̱ bintu bibiri, si̱gi̱ri̱ ni̱ki̱ku̱tu̱u̱ka mwi̱ca, na lumule lukwaka, byarabi̱ri̱ hakati̱ wa bicweka bya nnyama zi̱zo.
15.18: Kiro ki̱kyo, Mukama yaakoori̱ ndagaanu nʼI̱bbu̱ramu̱ naakoba yati, “Nsi gigi ndigiha beizukulu baamu, kuruga ha mugira gwa Mi̱si̱ri̱ ku̱doosya ha mugira gukooto Efu̱raati̱,

16.1: Saraayi̱ mukaa I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaali atamu̱byali̱i̱ri̱ baana. Saraayi̱ yaali na muzaana Mu̱nyami̱si̱ri̱, gibakweta Hagara,
16.2: Saraayi̱ yaaweereeri̱ I̱bbu̱ramu̱ naakoba yati, “Gya Mukama yantangi̱ri̱ kubyala baana, temba ntabbu gya muzaana wange, ambyalireyo baana.” I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yeegwi̱ri̱ Saraayi̱ ki̱yaamu̱weereeri̱.
16.3: I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yogwo, yaali amaari̱ myaka i̱ku̱mi̱ naali mu nsi gya Kanani̱, Saraayi̱ mu̱kali̱ waamwe kumuha Hagara Mu̱nyami̱si̱ri̱ muzaana waamwe amutunge.
16.4: I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaagyendi̱ri̱ hali Hagara, Hagara yeemeti̱ri̱. Kandi b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ atweri̱ nda, yaatandika kugaya mu̱go waamwe.
16.5: Saraayi̱ yaaweereeri̱ I̱bbu̱ramu̱ naakoba yati, “Nsobi̱ gili gyamu! Nyaaku̱heeri̱ muzaana wange omuswere, b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ yeemeti̱ri̱, yaatandika kungaya. Onkoori̱ kubii, Mukama ali̱ku̱tongonesya hab̯wa ki̱kyo kyokoori̱.”
16.6: Bei̱tu̱ I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “Nkoba muzaana yogwo abba waamu, weewe omulema, mukore kyokwendya.” Nahaahwo Saraayi̱ yaatandika kumutuntuza, kasi Hagara yaamwi̱ru̱ka.
16.7: Malayika wa Mukama yaagi̱i̱rye Hagara hei̱zu̱ba linyakubba mwirungu, ha muhanda gunyakutwalanga Su̱u̱ru̱.
16.8: Malayika yaamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya naakoba yati, “Hagara muzaana wa Saraayi̱, okuruga hanya kandi okugyenda hanya?” Hagara yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “Ndimu kwi̱ru̱ka Saraayi̱ mu̱go wange.”
16.9: Mwomwo malayika wa Mukama yaamuweera naakoba yati, “I̱rayo hali mugole waamu omub̯undalire.”
16.10: Yaab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye yaakoba yati, “Beizukulu baamu ndi̱bakanyi̱sya balibba banene hoi̱, tibalisobora kubabala.”
16.11: Malayika yaakoba yati, “Wone oli na nda, okwi̱za kubyala mwana wa b̯udulu, olimweta I̱si̱mai̱ri̱, hab̯wakubba Mukama aweeni̱ b̯ujune waamu.
16.12: Alibba nka kisolo kya mwirungu ali̱lwani̱syanga b̯uli muntu, kandi b̯uli muntu ali̱mu̱lwani̱syanga, aliicala mu b̯wemi̱ na baluganda lwamwe bensei̱.”
16.13: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, Hagara yeeti̱ri̱ Mukama munyakubaza nayo, “Ruhanga awona.” Kandi yaakoba yati, “Mu mananu mbweni̱ yogwo andinda.”
16.14: Nahab̯waki̱kyo kyokyo i̱zu̱ba baalyeti̱ri̱, “Bbeeri̱-lahayi̱-rohi̱” ki̱ku̱manyi̱sya i̱zu̱ba lya yogwo mwomi ambona. Kandi liicala hakati̱ wa Kadesi̱ na Beredi̱.
16.15: Hagara yaabyali̱i̱ri̱ I̱bbu̱ramu̱ mwana wa b̯udulu kandi mwana wa Hagare yaabyeri̱, I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaamweti̱ri̱ I̱si̱mai̱ri̱.
16.16: I̱bbu̱ramu̱ kubyala hali Hagara mwana, yaali adooseerye myaka kinaanei na mukaaga (86) mya b̯u̱handu̱.

17.1: I̱bbu̱ramu̱ b̯uyaali adooseerye myaka kyenda na mwenda mya b̯u̱handu̱, Mukama yaamu̱wonekeeri̱ yaakoba yati, “Gyagya Ruhanga Waamaani Gensei̱, okorenge bi̱byo bi̱nkwendya kwokwo obbe wamananu.
17.2: Nsobore kukora ndagaanu hakati̱ waamu nagya, kandi nku̱kanyei̱ hoi̱.”
17.3: Kasi I̱bbu̱ramu̱ yaaku̱nda b̯u̱syo hansi, Ruhanga yaakoba yati,
17.4: “Hataati̱ weega ndageeni̱ nawe, olibba bba mahanga ganene.
17.5: Kuruga hataati̱ tibakyakakweta I̱bbu̱ramu̱, bei̱tu̱ baakwetanga I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱, hab̯wakubba nku̱foori̱ri̱ bba mahanga ganene.
17.6: Ndi̱kanyi̱sya hoi̱ beizukulu baamu, nkutoolemwo mahanga ganene, kandi olibyala bakama.
17.7: Ndilinda ndagaanu gyange gi̱ndageeni̱ nawe, kandi ngilinde na hali beizukulu baamu biro byensei̱, gibbe ndagaanu gya biro na biro, aleke mbe Ruhanga waamu kandi wa beizukulu baamu.
17.8: Gigi nsi gyensei̱ Kanani̱ gyokwicalamwo nka munyamahanga, ndigikuha kandi ndigiha na beizukulu baamu gibbe nsi gyenyu̱ gya biro na biro, kandi nagya nyabbanga Ruhanga waab̯u.”
17.9: Ruhanga yaaweereeri̱ I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ naakoba yati, “Walindanga ndagaanu gyange kandi na beizukulu baamu bagilindenge biro byab̯u byensei̱,
17.10: Gigi gyogyo ndagaanu gyange ginkuragana nawe na beizukulu baamu, gimwadosereeryanga. B̯uli mudulu yensei̱ muli nywe asalwenge.
17.11: Mwasalwanga kapapa ka mibiri myenyu̱, kakwo kooko kalibba kawoneru ka ndagaanu gyange gi̱ndageeni̱ na nywe.
17.12: Mu biro byenyu̱ byensei̱ mwana wa b̯udulu yensei̱ gimwabyalanga, asalwenge kapapa ka mubiri gwamwe amaari̱ ku̱doosya biro munaanei. B̯uli mudulu yensei̱ asalwenge b̯u̱yaabbanga naali wa mu luganda lwenyu̱, rundi gi̱mu̱gu̱u̱ri̱ na sente zeenyu̱ hali munyamahanga atali wa luganda lwenyu̱, yogwo abyali̱i̱rwe mu nnyu̱mba gyenyu̱,
17.13: banyakubyalirwa mu nnyu̱mba gyamu na bawagu̱u̱ri̱ na sente bali na kusalwa kapapa kaab̯u. Ndagaanu gyange kwokwo yatyo gilibba gya biro na biro ha mibiri myenyu̱.
17.14: Mudulu yensei̱ atasali̱i̱rweho kapapa ka mubiri gwamwe, alitoolwanga mu bantu ba luganda lwamwe, hab̯wakubba abi̱nyi̱ri̱ ndagaanu gyange.”
17.15: Kandi Ruhanga yaaweereeri̱ I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ naakoba yati, “Mu̱kali̱ waamu otali̱i̱ra kumweta Saraayi̱ bei̱tu̱ omwetenge Saara.
17.16: Ndimuha mu̱gi̱sa, kandi, kindi alikubyalira mwana wa b̯udulu. Ndimuha mu̱gi̱sa alibba maa mahanga ganene, kandi bakama baliruga muli yo.”
17.17: Hahwo I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaaku̱nda b̯u̱syo hansi, yaaseka yankei naakoba yati, “B̯u̱b̯wo, gya mudulu ndooseerye myaka ki̱ku̱mi̱, na Saara mu̱kali̱ wange wa myaka kyenda, twetwe tukubyala mwana?”
17.18: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaaweereeri̱ Ruhanga naakoba yati, “Ndisemererwa kakubba oha mwana wanga I̱si̱mai̱ri̱ mu̱gi̱sa.”
17.19: Ruhanga yaakoba yati, “Kwahi Saara mu̱kali̱ waamu akwi̱za kukubyalira mwana wa b̯udulu, olimweta ibara I̱saka. Ndiragana nayo ndagaanu gya biro na biro, gilikwata na beizukulu baamwe.
17.20: Kandi I̱si̱mai̱ri̱ gyokumbwera, kyokumubazaho nkyegwi̱ri̱, nkumuha mu̱gi̱sa abyale, beizukulu baamwe bakanye, alibba bba balemi̱ i̱ku̱mi̱ na babiri, ndimutolamwo ihanga likooto.
17.21: Kandi ndilinda ndagaanu gyange nʼI̱saka. Saara yogwo alikubyalira mwaka gu̱kwi̱za mu kasu̱mi̱ nka kaka.”
17.22: Ruhanga b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubaza nʼI̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱, yaamurugaho yaagyenda.
17.23: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaatweri̱ I̱si̱mai̱ri̱ mu̱tabani̱ waamwe na bensei̱ banyakubyalwa mu makaa gaamwe, nabayaagu̱u̱ri̱ na sente zaamwe yaabasala kapapa ka mibiri myab̯u kiro kyonyi̱ni̱, nka Ruhanga ku̱yamu̱weereeri̱.
17.24: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ kusalwa kapapa ka mubiri gwamwe, yaali adooseerye myaka kyenda na mwenda mya b̯u̱handu̱.
17.25: Kandi mu̱tabani̱ waamwe I̱si̱mai̱ri̱ kusalwa kapapa ka mubiri gwamwe yaali adooseerye myaka i̱ku̱mi̱ na misatu.
17.26: Kiro ki̱kyo kyonyi̱ni̱, I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ na mu̱tabani̱ I̱si̱mai̱ri̱ mwomwo baasali̱i̱rwe.
17.27: Badulu bensei̱ ba mu makaa gaamwe banyakubyalwa mu luganda lwamwe na bab̯wo baanyaakugulwab̯ugulwa na sente hali munyamahanga yensei̱, bensei̱ baabasaari kapapa ka mibiri myab̯u hamwei̱ nayo.

18.1: Mukama yeezolokeerye hali I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ naali heehi̱ na misaali mi̱si̱sye mya Mamu̱le, b̯uyaali ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ heehi̱ na mulyangu gwa heema gyamwe mwihangwe.
18.2: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaabyokeerye mei̱so yaawona badulu basatu, bamwemereeri̱ mu mei̱so. Yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ ha mulyangu gwa heema na mbiro yaagyenda kubatangiira, yaaku̱nda b̯u̱syo hansi,
18.3: yaabaza naakoba yati, “Mukama wange nka kwoi̱zi̱ri̱ hali gya muheereza waamu, b̯uwakabba nookunkwatirwa mbabazi̱, otandabaho otadoori̱ kwamwange.
18.4: Leka baaleete meezi̱ munaabe magulu, mubanze muhumuleho ha mu̱tu̱ntu̱u̱lu̱ gwa musaali gugu,
18.5: gya kandeete kyakudya, mudye mutunge maani, b̯umwakamala kudya kasi mugyende lugyendu lwenyu̱.” Badulu bab̯wo bei̱ri̱ri̱mwo nibakoba yati, “Kora nka kwokobi̱ri̱.”
18.6: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaagyendi̱ri̱ yeingira mu heema gyamwe yaaweera Saara naakoba yati, “Pi̱ma b̯wangu debe isatu za b̯u̱kooro b̯urungi, ob̯ukande oti̱mbe migaati.”
18.7: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yei̱ru̱ki̱ri̱ yaagyenda mwigana, yaatoolayo nyana girungi gi̱heheeru̱ yaagiha muheereza, muheereza yaagisala b̯wangu.
18.8: Yaakwata maku̱ta, mate na nnyama bibaali bategeki̱ri̱ yaabasegeerya. B̯ubaalingi nibakudya I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yei̱ceeri̱ heehi̱ nabo ha musaali.
18.9: Baamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya nibakoba yati, “Saara mu̱kali̱ waamu ali hanya?” I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “Ali mu heema.”
18.10: Mukama yaakoba yati, “Ndi̱i̱ra haha ha b̯wi̱re nka b̯ub̯u, mu̱kali̱ waamu Saara alibba akubyali̱i̱ri̱ mwana wa b̯udulu.” Mu b̯wi̱re b̯u̱b̯wo, Saara yaali naakwetegeerya yeemereeri̱ i̱nyu̱ma lyʼI̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ heehi̱ na mulyangu gwa heema.
18.11: Mu kasu̱mi̱ kakwo, I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ na Saara baali bagu̱lu̱u̱si̱ri̱, b̯u̱b̯wo Saara yaali aleki̱ri̱ kugyenda mu nsonga za bakali̱.
18.12: Saara yaaseki̱ri̱ naakoba yati, “Hataati̱ nka ku̱ngu̱lu̱u̱si̱ri̱ na mukama wange agu̱lu̱u̱si̱ri̱, ntakegonzambe?”
18.13: Mukama yaab̯u̱u̱li̱i̱rye I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ naakoba yati, “Saara akuseka ki, akadwa ha kukoba nti, ‘Mwana ndibba nimubyala mu b̯u̱gu̱lu̱u̱su̱?’
18.14: Haloho kilema Mukama ? Mu kasu̱mi̱ kangu̱mi̱i̱rye ha b̯wi̱re nka b̯ub̯u, mwaka gu̱kwi̱za ndi̱i̱ra haha, kandi b̯u̱b̯wo Saara alibba abyeri̱ mwana wa b̯udulu.”
18.15: Bei̱tu̱ Saara yaageene naakoba yati, “Ti̱nseki̱ri̱.” Hab̯wakubba yaali naaku̱ti̱i̱na Mukama kyokyo kyamu̱bazi̱si̱i̱rye yati. Mukama yaakoba yati, “Kwahi oseki̱ri̱.” Kuhwerekeera kwa Mbuga za mu Kyeya
18.16: Mwomwo badulu babyokeerye, baagyenda. Baabyokya mei̱so baawona kwansi b̯wa Sodomu̱, I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaagyenda nabo kuboolokya muhanda.
18.17: Mukama yaakoba yati, “Ncale mbi̱si̱ri̱i̱ri̱ I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ ki̱nkwendya kukora,
18.18: kandi naali yooyo alifooka ihanga likooto lya b̯u̱sobozi̱, kandi mahanga gensei̱ galitunga mu̱gi̱sa kuraba mu yo?
18.19: Kubba nyamu̱komi̱ri̱ aragire baana baamwe na beizukulu baamwe kulibatiranga mu muhanda gwa Mukama beicalenge nibakora birungi kandi byab̯winganiza, aleke Mukama adoosereerye ki̱iyaaragani̱si̱i̱rye I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱.”
18.20: Kasi Mukama yaaweera I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ naakoba yati, “Nyegwi̱ri̱ kujumiira kwa Sodomu̱ na Gomora kuli kunene hab̯wa bibii byab̯u binene bi̱bakoori̱.
18.21: Kangyende mbone b̯ubaakabba bakoori̱ bi̱leti̱ri̱ho kujumiira ku̱nyeegwi̱ri̱, b̯ubaakabba batabi̱koori̱ nab̯wo nkwi̱za kukyega.” I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ Naatongoneera Rub̯uga Lwa Sodomu̱
18.22: Kasi badulu baaruga mu makaa, baakwata gwa b̯u̱ki̱i̱zi̱ b̯wa Sodomu̱, bei̱tu̱ I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yei̱ceeri̱ yeemereeri̱ mu mei̱so ga Mukama .
18.23: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yei̱su̱ma hali Mukama yaakoba yati, “Mu mananu, barungi wabahwerekereerya hamwei̱ na babiibi?
18.24: Kakubba mu rub̯uga habbamwo barungi maku̱mi̱ gataanu nab̯wo rub̯uga okwi̱za ku̱lu̱zi̱kya?
18.25: Ki̱kyo kya kwi̱ta barungi na babiibi aleke barungi beijanjane na babiibi, kitabba yatyo! Mu̱cwi̱ wa misangu wa mu nsi gyensei̱ ti̱yakwendeerye kukukora b̯winganiza?”
18.26: Mukama yaakoba yati, “B̯u̱ndyagya mu Sodomu̱ barungi maku̱mi̱ gataanu nibali mu rub̯uga, kicweka kyensei̱ ndikiganyira hab̯wab̯u.”
18.27: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “Nyeheeri̱yo kubaza na Mukama gya ndi cuucu kandi i̱syanu̱.
18.28: Kandi barungi b̯ubaabba nibali nka maku̱mi̱ ganei na bataanu? Rub̯uga oli̱lu̱zi̱kya hab̯wakulemwaho bataanu?” Mukama yei̱ramwo naakoba yati, “Ti̱ndi̱lu̱zi̱kya b̯undyagyayo maku̱mi̱ ganei na bataanu.”
18.29: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye yaab̯u̱u̱lya Mukama naakoba yati, “Kandi kakubba habbamwo maku̱mi̱ ganei?” Mukama yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “Hab̯wa maku̱mi̱ ganei gagwo, rub̯uga ti̱ndu̱lu̱hwerekereerya.”
18.30: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaakoba yati, “ Mukama otambihiriirwa, nzikiriza mbaze. Kandi Kakubba habbayo maku̱mi̱ gasatu?” Mukama yaakoba yati, “Ti̱ndu̱lu̱hwerekereerya b̯undyagyamwo maku̱mi̱ gasatu.”
18.31: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaakoba yati, “Ncwi̱ri̱mwo kubaza na Mukama , Kakubba waagyayo maku̱mi̱ gabiri?” Mukama yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo yati, “Hab̯wa maku̱mi̱ gabiri, rub̯uga ti̱ndu̱lu̱hwerekereerya.”
18.32: Kasi I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaakoba yati, “ Mukama otambihirwa, kambaze murundi gu̱mwei̱ gusa, kakubba waagyayo barungi i̱ku̱mi̱ basa?” Mukama yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo yati, “Hab̯wei̱ku̱mi̱ bab̯wo rub̯uga ti̱ndu̱lu̱hwerekereerya.”
18.33: Mukama b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubaza nʼI̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱, yaagyenda kandi nʼI̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yeemuka kwamwab̯u.

19.1: Bamalayika babiri baadoori̱ joojolo mu Sodomu̱, Looti̱ yaali ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ heirembu lya rub̯uga. B̯u̱yaabaweeni̱, yaabyoki̱ri̱ yaagyenda kubatangiira yaaku̱nda b̯u̱syo hansi,
19.2: yaakoba yati, “Bakama bange, mwi̱ze mu nnyu̱mba gya muheereza weenyu̱ munaabe magulu mulaale. Mwakya mwakeera nimugyenda lugyenda lwenyu̱.” Bamalayika baamwi̱ri̱mwo nibakoba yati, “Kwahi tukulaala mu rub̯uga hakati̱.”
19.3: Bei̱tu̱ yo yaabesengereerye hoi̱, kasi bahunguuka kwamwamwe bengi̱i̱ri̱ mu nnyu̱mba gyamwe, yaabakolera B̯u̱genyi̱ kandi yaati̱mba migaati mitalimwo b̯u̱mya baadya.
19.4: Bei̱tu̱ b̯ubaalingi batakaleeri̱, bantu bamu rub̯uga lu̱lwo, badulu, bahandu̱ na bato, bantu bensei̱ kudwera ki̱mwei̱ ku mudulu akusembayo, baagoti̱ri̱ nnyu̱mba.
19.5: Beeta Looti̱, baamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya nibakoba yati, “Badulu bei̱zi̱ri̱ haha b̯wi̱re b̯wa joojolo bali hanya? Bahu̱lu̱kye obatuletere tulaale nabo.”
19.6: Looti̱ yaahuluka yaakinga mulyangu, yaagyenda cali baalingi,
19.7: yaakoba yati, “Baana beetu̱ nku̱besengereerya mutakora kintu kyensei̱ kibiibi.
19.8: Mu̱kyegi̱ri̱ nka kundi na bahara bange babiri batakendyanga badulu, kambahu̱lu̱kye mbabaleetere, mubakore kyensei̱ ki̱mu̱kwendya kisa badulu baba mutabakora kintu kyensei̱, hab̯wakubba bagenyi̱ bange.”
19.9: Bo baakoba yati, “Rugaho ku̱di̱!” Bei̱ri̱ri̱ baakoba yati, “Muntu yogo yei̱zi̱ri̱ haha naali munyamahanga, hataati̱ akwendya kwefoora mu̱cwi̱ wa misangu! Hataati̱ tukugyenda kukukora kubiibi kukira nka kutwakali nitubakora.” Hahwo baasi̱ndi̱ki̱ri̱ ku̱di̱ na maani Looti̱, kadooli̱ babi̱nye mulyangu.
19.10: Bei̱tu̱ badulu banyakubba mu nnyu̱mba baahu̱lu̱ki̱i̱rye mikono baasika Looti̱ baamwi̱ngi̱i̱rya mu nnyu̱mba bakinga mulyangu.
19.11: Bamalayika bei̱jeeri̱ mei̱so ga badulu na basigazi banyakubba ha mulyangu, bei̱ceeri̱ ni̱bapu̱mpu̱u̱ta ha mulyangu mpaka b̯u̱bajwahi̱ri̱.
19.12: Mwomwo bamalayika baab̯u̱u̱lya Looti̱ nibakoba yati, “Mu kiki kiikaru olinamwo bantu baamu bandi: bageni̱, batabani̱ baamu, bahara baamu rundi muntu waamu yensei̱ ali mu rub̯uga? Batoole mu kiki kiikaru,
19.13: hab̯wakubba kujumiira kuli ha kiki kiikaru kuli kunene mu mei̱so ga Mukama kandi Mukama atu̱tu̱mi̱ri̱ ku̱ki̱hwerekereerya.”
19.14: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, Looti̱ yaabyoki̱ri̱ yaagyenda hali bageni̱ baamwe banyakubba berangi̱i̱ri̱ bahara baamwe yaabaweera naakoba yati, “Mu̱byoke, mu̱ru̱ge mu kiki kiikaru, hab̯wakubba Mukama ali heehi̱ ku̱zi̱kya rub̯uga lulu.” Bei̱tu̱ bageni̱ baamwe baatekerezengi̱ akusandaara.
19.15: B̯wi̱re b̯ub̯wali heehi̱ kukya, bamalayika baaweereeri̱ Looti̱ nibakoba yati, “Byoka otwale mu̱kali̱ waamu na bahara baamu babiri bali haha, mutahwerekeera mu rub̯uga lulu b̯ulwakabba nilukufubirwa.”
19.16: Looti̱ yaalikwesitasita, kasi bab̯wo bamalayika baamukwata ha mukono, baakwata na mukono gwa mu̱kali̱ waamwe, na mya bahara baamwe babiri. Hab̯wakubba Mukama yaali na mbabazi̱ nabo, bamalayika baatoori̱ Looti̱ na bantu baamwe mu nnyu̱mba, baabahu̱lu̱kya mu rub̯uga.
19.17: B̯u̱baamaari̱ ku̱bahu̱lu̱kya, babaweera nibakoba yati, “Mwi̱ru̱ke, mu̱takwa. Mutawona i̱nyu̱ma, kandi mutemeera mu kyeya. Mwi̱ru̱ke mwebi̱se mu nsahu mutahwerekeera.”
19.19: muheereza waamu mbweni̱ kwongonzi̱ri̱, wankwatirwa mbabazi̱ zinene ku̱honi̱a b̯womi b̯wange, bei̱tu̱ tinsobora kwi̱ru̱ka nkadwa ha nsahu zi̱di̱ kabii katakandoori̱ho nkakwa.
19.20: Wona, rub̯uga lwa ntadiiko, luli heehi̱ kandi lu̱dooli̱. Leka hooho nyi̱ru̱ki̱re aleke mpone.”
19.21: Malayika yaamuweera naakoba yati, “Kiki kyosabi̱ri̱ nkyegwi̱ri̱ na rub̯uga lwobazi̱ri̱ho ti̱ndu̱lu̱hwerekereerya.
19.22: Wanguha b̯wangu oi̱ru̱ke, ti̱nkwi̱za kukora kintu kyensei̱ otakadoori̱yo.” (Kyokyo rub̯uga lu̱lwo baalweti̱ri̱ Zowali̱, makuru gaakyo nti, “kiikaru ki̱dooli̱.”)
19.23: Looti̱ kudwa Zowali̱ lyoba lyali li̱hu̱lu̱ki̱ri̱.
19.24: Kasi Mukama yaasi̱ndi̱ka na mwiguru b̯uganga b̯wa mworo gukwaka nka ndagali̱ hali mbuga za Sodomu̱ na Gomora.
19.25: Yaahwerekereerya mbuga zi̱zo na kyeya kyensei̱, bantu banyakwicalanga mu mbuga zi̱zo, na b̯uli kintu kyensei̱ kinyakubba ki̱meeri̱ heitehe.
19.26: Bei̱tu̱ mukaa Looti̱ yaali naakumuhondeeranga, yaamagi̱ri̱ i̱nyu̱ma, yaafooka nkondo gya mu̱kwa.
19.27: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaabyoki̱ri̱ mwakya karei, yaagyenda yaadwa ha kiikaru ki̱kyo kiyaali arombeeri̱ho na Mukama ,
19.28: yaabyokya mei̱so yaalingiira Sodomu̱ na Gomora na nsi gyensei̱ gya kyeya, yaawona mwi̱ca mu nsi gi̱gyo ni̱gu̱ku̱tu̱u̱ka nka mwi̱ca gwa kikoomi.
19.29: Bi̱byo byobyo byabbeeri̱ho Ruhanga b̯u̱yaahwerekereerye mbuga za mu kyeya, yei̱zu̱ki̱ri̱ ki̱yaaragani̱si̱i̱rye I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱, yaatoola Looti̱ mu kabii ka kuhwerekeera, b̯u̱yaahwerekereerye mbuga Looti̱ zi̱i̱yei̱calengi̱mwo.
19.30: Looti̱ yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ Zohara yeicala mu nsi gya nsahu hamwei̱ na bahara baamwe babiri hab̯wakubba yaati̱i̱nengi̱ kwicala Zowali̱. Nahab̯waki̱kyo yei̱calengi̱ mu b̯wingira na bahara baamwe babiri.
19.31: Muhara waamwe mu̱zegei̱zo yaaweereeri̱ nyakaab̯u muto naakoba yati, “Bbaaweetu̱ agu̱lu̱u̱si̱ri̱, kandi tihaloho mudulu mu nsi gigi akwi̱za kutuswera nka bantu bensei̱ kubakora.
19.32: Hati̱, tu̱he Bbaaweetu̱ maaci anywe atamiire, tulaale nayo, aleke tubyale baana beetu̱ kurugira hali bbaaweetu̱.”
19.33: Nahab̯waki̱kyo kiro ki̱kyo baatami̱i̱rya bbaawaab̯u, muhara mu̱zegei̱zo yaagyenda yaalaala nayo, Looti̱ atekeege muhara waamwe haayaaleeri̱ rundi ha yaabyokeeri̱.
19.34: Kiro kinyakuhonderaho muhara mu̱handu̱ yaaweereeri̱ nyaakaab̯u muto naakoba yati, “I̱jolo nyaaleeri̱ na bbaaweetu̱ kyadeeru twongere tu̱mu̱tami̱i̱rye, nawe ogyende olaale nayo aleke tulinde lubyalu lwetu̱ nitulutolira hali bbaaweetu̱.”
19.35: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, i̱jolo li̱lyo baataami̱i̱rye bbaawaab̯u muhara muto yaagyenda yaalaala nayo, bbaawaab̯u atakeege muhara waamwe haayaaleeri̱ rundi ha yaabyokeeri̱.
19.36: Bahara ba Looti̱ kwokwo beemeti̱ri̱ nibaatwekwa bbaawaab̯u.
19.37: Muhara mu̱zegei̱zo yaabyeri̱ mwana wa b̯udulu, yaamweta Mowaabbu. Yooyo bba Bamowaabbu na hataati̱.
19.38: Muhara muto nayo yaabyala mwana wa b̯udulu, yaamweta ibara Benami̱. Yooyo bba Bamooni̱ na hataati̱.

20.1: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ b̯u̱yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ ku̱kwo, yaakwata muhanda gukugyenda mu nsi gya Negeb̯u̱ yeicala hakati̱ wa Kadesi̱ na Su̱u̱ru̱ kandi yeicala mu Geraali̱ hab̯wa kasu̱mi̱ kadooli̱.
20.2: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaaweereeri̱ bantu nti, mu̱kali̱ waamwe Saara, ali nyaakaab̯u. Nahab̯waki̱kyo, Abbi̱mereki̱ mukama wa Geraali̱ yaatu̱mi̱ri̱ baamutwalire Saara.
20.3: Bei̱tu̱ i̱jolo, Ruhanga yei̱zi̱i̱ri̱ Abbi̱mereki̱ mu kilooto, yaamuweera naakoba yati, “Weegi̱ri̱ nka kwoli mu̱ku̱u̱, mu̱kali̱ gyotweri̱ okugyenda ku̱mu̱gwaho, hab̯wakubba mukaa mudulu.”
20.4: Abbi̱mereki̱ yaali atakesu̱mi̱i̱ranga Saara. Nahab̯waki̱kyo, yaabazi̱ri̱ naakoba yati, “ Mukama okwi̱za kwi̱ta ihanga litali na musangu?
20.5: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yooyo yambwereeri̱ nti, ‘Mu̱kali̱ yogo ali nyakeetu̱.’ Kandi na mu̱kali̱ yankei yambwereeri̱ naakoba nti, ‘Ali weetu̱.’ Kiki nyaaki̱koori̱ nyetegeri̱i̱ze ki̱mwei̱ kandi ntali na kabii kankwendya kukora mudulu yogwo.”
20.6: Hei̱nyu̱ma Ruhanga yaaweereeri̱ Abbi̱mereki̱ na mu kilooto naakoba yati, “Nkyegeeri̱ ki̱mwei̱ nka kuwaali mu̱nanu̱ku̱ toli na nsobi̱. Nahab̯waki̱kyo, nyaaku̱geeni̱ kukora kibii, kyokyo ntakwi̱ki̱ri̱i̱ze kumukwataho.
20.7: Hataati̱ nu mu̱kali̱ mu̱ku̱bi̱i̱rye mudulu waamwe, hab̯wakubba ali mu̱ragu̱ri̱ wa Ruhanga kandi akwi̱za kukusabira womeere. Bei̱tu̱ Kakubba otamwi̱ri̱ri̱i̱rya mu̱kali̱ waamwe, weege nka kwokwi̱za ku̱kwa na bantu baamu bensei̱.”
20.8: Abbi̱mereki̱ yaabyoki̱ri̱ mwakya karei, yeeta baheereza baamwe bensei̱, yaabasoboora bintu byensei̱. Badulu baba b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱ b̯wabakweti̱ hoi̱
20.9: Kasi Abbi̱mereki̱ yeeta I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya naakoba yati, “Kyani ki̱waatu̱koori̱? Nyaaku̱sobeereerye kyani ki̱kyo kinyakukuha kundeetera kibii kikwijana hahwo hamwei̱ na b̯ukama b̯wange? Onkoori̱ bintu bi̱tasemereeri̱ kunkora.”
20.10: Abbi̱mereki̱ yaab̯u̱u̱lya I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ naakoba yati, “Waagyendereeri̱ kyani kukora kintu nka ki̱kyo?”
20.11: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “Ki̱nyaaku̱nkoserya ki̱kyo nyaateekerezengi̱ nti, ‘Bantu bamu kiikaru kiki ti̱bati̱i̱na Ruhanga na kadooli̱ kandi nti bakwi̱za ku̱nzi̱ta ni̱banzi̱ndi̱ra mu̱kali̱ wange.’
20.12: Kwongera ha ki̱kyo mu̱kali̱ yogwo ali nyaakeetu̱ kwo, tubyalwa bbaaweetu̱ omwei̱, twahukanwa bamaaweetu̱, yooyo gi̱nyaatu̱ngi̱ri̱.
20.13: Kandi Ruhanga b̯u̱yandagi̱i̱ri̱ kuruga mu makaa ga bbaabba, nyawereeri̱ mu̱kali̱ yogwo ninkoba yati, ‘Kiki kyokyo kikorwa kya mbabazi̱ kyosemereeri̱ kunkoora: hensei̱ ha twakadwanga okobenge yati, “Mudulu yogwo weetu̱.” ’ ”
20.14: Hei̱nyu̱ma Abbi̱mereki̱ yaakweti̱ ntaama, nte, baheereza na bazaana yaabiha I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ kandi yaamwi̱ri̱ri̱i̱rya mu̱kali̱ waamwe Saara.
20.15: Abbi̱mereki̱ yaakoba yati, “Wona itehe lyange, ndi̱lyo, gyenda oicale cali hookwendya.”
20.16: Yaaweera na Saara naakoba yati, “Weenyu̱ mu̱heeri̱ bicweka bya feeza ru̱ku̱mi̱, ku̱kwo kwokwo kukutoolaho kihemu mu mei̱so ga bantu bensei̱ boicala nabo kandi b̯u̱kei̱so mu mei̱so ga bensei̱ nka kwotali na kabii.”
20.17: Kasi I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaasaba Ruhanga, Ruhanga yajumuura Abbi̱mereki̱ kandi yajumuura na mu̱kali̱ waamwe na bazaana baamwe, aleke babyale baana.
20.18: Hab̯wakubba nnyu̱mba gya Abbi̱mereki̱ gyensei̱ Mukama yaali agi̱i̱mi̱ri̱ lubyalu hab̯wa Saara mukaa I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱.

21.1: Mukama yaaheeri̱ Saara mu̱gi̱sa nka kuyaali yeeragi̱ri̱.
21.2: Saara yeemeti̱ri̱ yaabyalira I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ mwana wa b̯udulu. I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaali agu̱lu̱u̱si̱ri̱. Kiki kyabbeeri̱ho mu kasu̱mi̱ ka Ruhanga yaabazi̱ri̱.
21.3: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yeeti̱ri̱ mwana wa Saara gi̱yamu̱byali̱i̱ri̱ I̱saka.
21.4: I̱saka b̯u̱yaadooseerye biro munaanei, bbaawe I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaamusala kapapa nka Ruhanga kuyaali amu̱ragi̱i̱ri̱.
21.5: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaali adooseerye myaka ki̱ku̱mi̱, I̱saka hayaabyali̱i̱rwe.
21.6: Saara yaakoba yati, “Ruhanga andeeteeri̱ nseku. Muntu yensei̱ yaakeegwa nti mbyeri̱ mwana akwi̱za kuseka.”
21.7: Kandi yei̱ra yaakoba yati, “Atali Ruhanga naani wondi yaaku̱weereeri̱ I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ Saara alyonkya baana? Bei̱tu̱ nyamubyalira mwana wa b̯udulu naali agu̱lu̱u̱si̱ri̱.”
21.8: Mwana yaahandi̱ri̱ yaacuuka. Kandi I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaakoori̱ B̯u̱genyi̱ b̯ukooto ha ki̱kyo kiro.
21.9: Bei̱tu̱ Saara b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ mwana wa Hagara Mu̱nyami̱si̱ri̱ gi̱yaali abyali̱i̱ri̱ I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱, naaku̱jooga mwana waamwe I̱saka,
21.10: Saara yaaweera I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ naakoba yati, “Binga muzaana yogo aruge haha na mwana waamwe hab̯wakubba mwana wa muzaana taligwetwa hamwei̱ na mwana wange I̱saka.”
21.11: Ki̱kyo kyabi̱hi̱i̱ze I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ hab̯wa kumuragira kubinga mwana waamwe.
21.12: Bei̱tu̱ Ruhanga yaaweereeri̱ I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ naakoba yati, “Ki̱kyo kitakubihiiza kubinga mwana waamu na mu̱kali̱ waamu muzaana. Kyensei̱ Saara kiyaakakuragira okikore nka kwaku̱ragi̱i̱ri̱ hab̯wakubba I̱saka yooyo alikubyalira beizukulu banyaaku̱ragani̱si̱i̱rye.
21.13: Kandi mwana wa muzaana nayo ndimutolamwo ihanga hab̯wakubba waamu̱byeri̱.”
21.14: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaabyoki̱ri̱ mwakya karei, yaatwala mugaati na kisahu kya meezi̱, yaakiha Hagara yaaki̱mu̱tweka. Yaamuweera agyende na mwana waamwe. Hagara yaagyendi̱ri̱ yeicala naazengeera mwirungu lya Bbeeri̱-sebba.
21.15: Meezi̱ gayaali nago mu kisahu b̯u̱gaamali̱ki̱ri̱, yei̱ci̱ya mwana hansi ha kisaka.
21.16: Kasi yaagyenda hadeiho yeicaara mwanya gwa mita ki̱ku̱mi̱ yaakoba yati, “Ti̱nkwendya kuwona mwana wange naalimwo ku̱kwa.” Hagara yei̱caali̱i̱ri̱ yaatandika kulira.
21.17: Ruhanga yeegwi̱ri̱ mwana naakulira, malayika wa Ruhanga yeeta Hagara na mwiguru yaamuweera naakoba yati, “Kyani kotu̱ntwi̱ri̱? Leka ku̱ti̱i̱na, Ruhanga yeegwi̱ri̱ kulira kwa mwana waamu cali ali.
21.18: Byoka osenge mwana waamu omukwate omu̱tati̱i̱rye, hab̯wakubba ndimutolamwo ihanga likooto.”
21.19: Kasi Ruhanga yeijula mei̱so ga Hagara yaawona i̱zu̱ba lya meezi̱, yaagyenda yaataha meezi̱ yei̱zu̱u̱lya kisahu kyamwe, yaaha mwana waamwe yaanywa.
21.20: Ruhanga yaali̱ndi̱ri̱ mwana yogwo, yaahanda. Mwana yei̱ceeri̱ mwirungu yeega hoi̱ kulasa b̯uta.
21.21: Yei̱calengi̱ mwirungu lya Parani̱. Mmaawe yaamutungira mu̱kali̱ Mu̱nyami̱si̱ri̱.
21.22: Mu kasu̱mi̱ kakwo Abbi̱mereki̱ na Fi̱koli̱ mu̱handu̱ wei̱he lyamwe baaweereeri̱ I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ nibakoba yati, “Ruhanga eicale nawe mu byensei̱ byokora.
21.23: Hataati̱ nu, rahira mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga nka kwotalinkora kubiibi, nka kwotalikora kubiibi beizukulu bange, gya nka ku̱nku̱gi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ mbabazi̱ nawe kwokwo olinkoora kandi kwokwo olikoora gigi nsi gyokwicalamwo.”
21.25: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ b̯u̱yeeŋu̱ru̱ŋu̱u̱ti̱i̱rye hab̯wei̱zu̱ba lya meezi̱ lya baheereza ba Abbi̱mereki̱ libaalingi banyagi̱ri̱,
21.26: Abbi̱mereki̱ yaakoba yati, “Ti̱nyeegi̱ri̱ munyakukora ki̱kyo atambwereeri̱, ki̱kyo tinkakyegwanga, mwomwo gwakubanza ku̱kyegwa.”
21.27: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaakwata ntaama na nnumi yabiha Abbi̱mereki̱, bantu bab̯wo babiri baakora ndagaanu.
21.28: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaahu̱kani̱i̱ryemwo mwigana lyamwe ruusi musanju za ntaama.
21.29: Abbi̱mereki̱ yaab̯u̱u̱lya I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ naakoba yati, “B̯uguma za ntaama musanju zosooroozi̱ri̱ zi̱ku̱manyi̱sya kyani?”
21.30: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “B̯uguma za ntaama zizi musanju zitwale noozitoolera mu ngalu zange aleke obbe kei̱so aku̱gu̱mya nka kundi gyagya munyakulima i̱zu̱ba lili.”
21.31: Kicweka ki̱kyo kyokyo baakyeti̱ri̱ Bbeeri̱-sebba hab̯wakubba haha hooho babiri baarahi̱ri̱i̱ri̱.
21.32: Kwokwo baakoori̱ yati ndagaanu nibali Bbeeri̱-sebba. Hei̱nyu̱ma, Abbi̱mereki̱ na Fi̱koli̱ mu̱handu̱ wei̱he lyamwe, baasetu̱ki̱ri̱ beemuka mu nsi gya Bafi̱ri̱si̱i̱ti̱.
21.33: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaasi̱mbi̱ri̱ musaali mu̱nonde mu nsi gya Bbeeri̱-sebba kandi yaaramya Mukama Ruhanga wa biro byensei̱.
21.34: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaamaari̱ biro binene mu nsi gya Bafi̱ri̱si̱i̱ti̱.

22.1: Bi̱byo b̯u̱byamali̱ki̱ri̱, Ruhanga yaapi̱mi̱ri̱ I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaamweta naakoba yati, “I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱.” I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱, yeetab̯uka yati, “Ndi haha.”
22.2: Ruhanga yaamuweera naakoba yati, “Twala I̱saka mu̱tabani̱ waamu musa, mu̱tabani̱ waamu gi̱wendya, ogyende mu nsi Mori̱ya omumpongire, nka kihongwa kyokye ha lusahu lunyakuweera.”
22.3: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaabyoki̱ri̱ mwakya karei, yaani̱i̱na ndogoyi̱, yaatwalegeeni̱ badulu babiri na mu̱tabani̱ waamwe I̱saka. Yaateenyi̱ri̱ nkwi̱ za kwokya kihongwa. Yaabyoki̱ri̱ yaagyenda mu kicweka kya Ruhanga ki̱yamu̱weereeri̱.
22.4: Kiro kyakasatu, I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaabyokeerye mei̱so yaawona kiikaru ki̱kyo nikili hadeiho.
22.5: Nahab̯waki̱kyo I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaaweereeri̱ badulu baamwe naakoba yati, “Nywe mwi̱calenge haha na ndogoyi̱, gya na musigazi yogo, katugyende ntadiiko ku̱di̱ tu̱ramye tu̱kwi̱ra tu̱baagye haha.”
22.6: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaasengi̱ri̱ nkwi̱ za kwokya kihongwa, yaazi̱tweka I̱saka mu̱tabani̱ waamwe. Yo I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaakweti̱ mworo na nsone, baagyenda.
22.7: I̱saka yeeti̱ri̱ bbaawe I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱, yaamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya naakoba yati, “Bbaabba!,” Bbaawe yeeteb̯uka naakoba yati, “Ee, kyani mwana wange?” I̱saka yaab̯u̱u̱lya bbaawe naakoba yati, “Mworo na nkwi̱ mbibibyo, bei̱tu̱ mwana gwa ntaama gya kihongwa kya kwokya gili hanya?”
22.8: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “Mwana wange, Ruhanga yankei yooyo yewonira mwana gwa ntaama gya kihongwa kya kwokya.” Babiri baba beeyongeeri̱ na lugyendu lwab̯u.
22.9: B̯u̱baadoori̱ ha kiikaru kya Ruhanga ki̱yaaweereeri̱ I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaatara kyoto, yaapanga nkwi̱, yaabboha I̱saka mu̱tabani̱ waamwe, yaamu̱garami̱ri̱i̱rya ha kyoto ha nkwi̱.
22.10: Kasi, I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaasenga nsone kusala mwana waamwe nka kihongwa.
22.11: Bei̱tu̱ malayika wa Mukama yaamweti̱ri̱ na mwiguru naakoba yati, “I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱, I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱.” I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yeeteb̯uka yati, “Ndi haha.”
22.12: Yamuweera naakoba yati, “Otahutaaza mwana waamu, nyetegeri̱i̱ze nka kwoku̱ti̱i̱na Ruhanga, ti̱wanzi̱ma mwana waamu omwei̱ musa.”
22.13: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaabyokeerye mei̱so yaamagamaga, i̱nyu̱ma lyamwe, yaaweeni̱ mpaya gya ntaama, mahembe gaayo gakwati̱i̱rwe mu kisaka. Yaagyendi̱ri̱ yaagitolayo, gyogyo yaahonga. Kyabba kihongwa kyokye mu kiikaru kya mwana waamwe.
22.14: Kiikaru ki̱kyo, I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaakyeti̱ri̱, “ Mukama yooyo agaba.” Na hataati̱ kwokwo bakoba yati, “Ha lusahu lwa Mukama yooyo akwi̱za kugaba.”
22.15: Malayika wa Mukama yeezolokeerye mwiguru yeeta I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ gwakabiri,
22.16: yaamuweera yati, “ Mukama akukoba yati, ‘Gya nyankei ndahi̱i̱ri̱ hab̯wakubba okoori̱ kintu kiki, ti̱wanzi̱ma mwana waamu omwei̱ yankei,
22.17: mananu kwo ndikuha mu̱gi̱sa, ndi̱kanyi̱sya beizukulu baamu beijane nzota za mu mwanya kandi beijane musinyi gwa ha mutanda. Beizukulu baamu balitwala mbuga za banyanzigwa baab̯u,
22.18: kandi mu beizukulu baamu mahanga gensei̱ ga hansi hooho galitungira mu̱gi̱sa, hab̯wakubba waab̯u̱ndali̱i̱ri̱ iraka lyange.’ ”
22.19: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yei̱ri̱ri̱ hayaati̱gi̱ri̱ badulu baamwe beemuka Bbeeri̱-sebba, hooho I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yeicala. Beizukulu ba Nahoori̱
