4.7: (Mu b̯u̱su̱mi̱ b̯wa kadei mu ngesu za Bei̱saleeri̱, muntu yaakacunguranga rundi yaakagulanga kintu, haabbengi̱ho kaboneru ka b̯u̱gu̱li̱ kakwolokya ki̱kyo kintu nka ku̱ki̱hi̱ngi̱ri̱ mikono. Omwei̱ mu bab̯wo bantu yaaku̱su̱lengi̱ nkei̱to gyamwe naagiha wondi. Gi̱gyo gyogyo gyali nkora ginyakwikirizib̯wanga mu b̯utongole mu nsi gyʼI̱saleeri̱.)
4.8: Nahab̯waki̱kyo yogwo munyaruganda wʼEri̱meri̱ki̱ yaaweereeri̱ Bbowaazi naakoba, “Okusobora kugwegulira.” Kasi mwomwo yaakusula nkei̱to gyamwe.
4.9: Mwomwo Bbowaazi yaaweera bab̯wo bahandu̱ na bantu bensei̱ banyakubbaho naakoba, “Kiro kiki muli bakei̱so bange ba byenseenya bi̱ngu̱u̱ri̱ hali Nahu̱me bya muziro Eri̱mereki̱, na batabani̱ Ki̱ryoni̱ na Mahalooni̱.
4.10: Kandi na Ru̱u̱si̱ Nyakamowaabbu mukaa munyaruganda weetu̱, Mahalooni̱, mu̱twali̱reeni̱mwo nka mu̱kali̱ wange, aleke ibara lya Mahalooni̱ li̱tasyera kuruga mu mu̱gi̱ gwab̯u, rundi mu bitabbu bya rub̯uga. Kiro kiki muli bakei̱so bange.”
4.11: Kasi mwomwo bahandu̱ na bantu bensei̱ banyakubbaho hahwo mwirembu lya rub̯uga babaza nibakoba, “Kwokwo, tuli bakei̱so baamu. Yogwo mu̱kali̱, Mukama amuhe kubba nka Lakeeri̱ na Leeya mu maka gaamu, bakali̱ babiri bab̯wo banyaku̱bi̱mba nnyu̱mba gyʼI̱saleeri̱. Mukama akuhe kubba wa maani mu nsi gyʼEfu̱raati̱ na Bbeterehemu̱.
4.12: Kuruga mu lula lwa yogwo muhala wa Mukama aku̱heeri̱, mu̱gi̱ gwamu gwabbanga nka gwa Pereezi̱, mu̱tabani̱ wa Yu̱da gi̱yaabyeri̱ na Tamali̱.” Ru̱u̱si̱ Naabyala Mwana wa B̯udulu
4.13: Kuruga na b̯u̱b̯wo Bbowaazi yaaswera Ru̱u̱si̱ nka mu̱kali̱ waamwe. Bbowaazi b̯u̱yaakatu̱ngi̱ri̱ Ru̱u̱si̱, Mukama yaamuha mu̱gi̱sa yaatwala nda yaabyala mwana wa b̯udulu.
4.14: Mwomwo bakali̱ ba mu lu̱lwo rub̯uga baaweera Nahu̱me nibakoba, “ Mukama ahaariizib̯we kiro kiki hab̯wa kukuha mwizukulu yogwo alikulinda. Mukama amuhe kubba wa maani mu nsi gigi gyensei̱ gyʼI̱saleeri̱!
4.15: Yogwo mwizukulu waamu yooyo alikuha kubba na ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kandi alikulinda, hab̯wakubba mukaamwana waamu Ru̱u̱si̱, yogwo akwendya kandi akukira kadi baana ba b̯udulu musanju, amu̱byeri̱ mwizukulu waamu.”
4.16: Mwomwo Nahu̱me yaasenga mwana, yaamukiika kandi yei̱ceeri̱ naamuwoneera.
4.17: Haaloho bakali̱ bataahi̱ banyakubaza nibakoba, “Nahu̱me atu̱ngi̱ri̱ mwizukulu.” Baamu̱heeri̱ ibara Obbeedi̱. Yooyo munyakubba bba Yese, Yese bba Dau̱di̱. B̯ubyalwa b̯wa Dau̱di̱
4.18: Gugu gwogwo mu̱gi̱ gwa lula lwa Pereezi̱: Pereezi̱ yaabyeri̱ Hezi̱rooni̱,
4.19: Hezi̱rooni̱ yaabyala Raamu̱, Raamu̱ yaabyala Aminadaabbu,
4.20: Aminadaabbu yaabyala Nasooni̱, Nasooni̱ yaabyala Salu̱mooni̱,
4.21: Salu̱mooni̱ yaabyala Bbowaazi, Bbowaazi yaabyala Obbeedi̱,
4.22: Obbeedi̱ yaabyala Yese, kandi Yese yaabyala Dau̱di̱.

1.1: -2 Mu biro byei̱nyu̱ma, haloho binyakubbaho Mukama Ahaswero naakwicala mu rub̯uga lu̱handu̱ lwa Su̱u̱sa, naakulema masaza ki̱ku̱mi̱ mu gabiri na musanju, kuruga B̯u̱hi̱ndi̱ kudwera ki̱mwei̱ I̱syopi̱ya.
1.3: Mu mwaka gwakasatu gwa b̯u̱lemi̱ b̯wamwe, Mukama Ahaswero yaati̱mbi̱i̱ri̱ bayolo baamwe bensei̱ na baheereza B̯u̱genyi̱. B̯u̱b̯wo B̯u̱genyi̱ b̯waleeti̱ri̱ bahandu̱ ba mahe na bamasaza ga Paasa na Medi̱ya, bakungu na bantu ba bi̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa ba mu masaza.
1.4: Ha b̯wi̱re b̯u̱b̯wo, mukama yaakoori̱ mwolokyo gwa byab̯u̱gu̱u̱da na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya b̯ukama b̯wamwe gunyakumala biro ki̱ku̱mi̱ na kinaanei.
1.5: Hei̱nyu̱ma gyaho, mukama yei̱ri̱ri̱ yaasegeerya bagenyi̱ baamwe bensei̱ banyakubbaho mu rub̯uga lu̱handu̱ lwa Su̱u̱sa, babi̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa na batali mu zi̱gati̱ gya kikaali kumala biro musanju.
1.6: Zi̱gati̱ gya mukama gyati̱mbati̱mbi̱rwe mu nti̱mbe za rangi̱ gya kitaani na gya bbu̱ru̱ru̱ zinyakubba zi̱bboheerwe miguha mya rangi̱ gya bbafuta, byoma bya feeza bi̱zi̱ngi̱i̱rwe ku nkondo za mahi̱ga ga muhendu. Kandi de, haalimwo bisagu bya zaabbu na feeza binyakubba ha kikungu ki̱doli̱ge na mahi̱ga ga ku̱seraserya ga muhendu.
1.7: Byakunywa bi̱baaheeri̱ bagenyi̱, baabi̱basegereerye mu bi̱kopo bikwahukana bya zaabbu. Maaci ga muhendu gaali mu b̯unene, nka ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya b̯u̱b̯wo b̯ukama kukyali.
1.8: Hatakabbeho ki̱pi̱myo kya byakunywa, hab̯wakubba mukama yaalingi aragi̱i̱ri̱ baheereza baamwe bagabe byakunywa ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha kwendya kwa b̯uli omwei̱.
1.9: Mu kasu̱mi̱ kakwo koonyi̱ni̱, Mu̱go Vasi̱ti̱ nayo yaali asegereerye bakali̱ kiihuru mu kikaali kya Mukama Ahaswero. Mu̱go Vasi̱ti̱ Naajeemera Mukama
1.10: Ha kiro kyamusanju kya B̯u̱genyi̱, Mukama Ahaswero b̯u̱yaakanywi̱ri̱ maaci ganene acamuka, aragira baheereza baamwe musanju, Mehumaani, Bi̱zu̱sa, Harabona, Bbi̱gaasa, Abbagu̱ta, Zetaari̱ na Karu̱kasi̱,
1.11: bamwetere Mu̱go Vasi̱ti̱. Mukama yendeerye mu̱kali̱ waamwe ei̱ze alweri̱ kondo gya b̯u̱go aleke yoolokye bagenyi̱ baamwe na bayolo bawone Vasi̱ti̱ nka kuyaali nyarurungi.
1.12: Bei̱tu̱ baheereza b̯u̱baadooseerye b̯u̱b̯wo b̯ukwenda, Mu̱go Vasi̱ti̱ asuula kwi̱za. Nahab̯waki̱kyo, mukama yaasali̱i̱rwe hoi̱, yaakwatwa ki̱ni̱ga.
1.13: Kasi mwomwo mukama yeeta baku̱gu̱ ku bya biragiro nab̯winganiza ku̱beeb̯u̱u̱lyaho, nka kugyalingi ngesu gya mukama, yaabaza nabo ku bintu binyakubba bi̱bbeeri̱ho mu b̯u̱su̱mi̱ b̯wei̱nyu̱ma.
1.14: Bab̯wo bayeesi̱gengi̱ hoi̱ baali: Kari̱seena, Sesaali̱, Adimaasa, Taru̱si̱i̱si̱, Meresi̱, Mari̱seena na Memu̱kaani̱, bayolo musanju ba mu masaza ga Paasa na Medi̱ya, nibali na biikaru bya maani hoi̱ mu b̯ukama kandi nibakwikirizib̯wa kuwona mukama b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱ ku nsonga za maani.
1.15: Mwomwo mukama yaabaweera yati, “Mu̱go Vasi̱ti̱ aswi̱ri̱ kwi̱za hali gya b̯u̱mu̱tu̱mi̱i̱ri̱ beiru bange. Ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha biragiro, kikyani kindinakukora mu mbeera nka gigi? Aswi̱ri̱ bigambu bya mukama aragi̱i̱ri̱ beiru bamuweere.”
1.16: Mwomwo Memu̱kaani̱ yaabaza mu mei̱so ga mukama na bayolo baamwe yati, “Ajeemeeri̱ kwahi mukama musa, bei̱tu̱ Mu̱go Vasi̱ti̱ ajeemeeri̱ bayolo na bantu bensei̱ ba mu masaza gensei̱ ga b̯ukama b̯wa Mukama Ahaswero.
1.17: Bakali̱ bensei̱ bakwi̱za kutandika kugaya bei̱ba baab̯u b̯ubaketegereza Mu̱go Vasi̱ti̱ kyakoori̱. Bakwi̱za kubazanga nibakoba yati, ‘Mukama Ahaswero yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ bamwetere Vasi̱ti̱, Vasi̱ti̱ yaamusulukiira.’
1.18: Kiro kyadeeru ki̱takamali̱ki̱ri̱, bamukaa bayolo bensei̱ ba b̯ukama mu Paasa na Medi̱ya baakeegwa bi̱byo bigambu bikukwatagana na kiki kikorwa kya Mu̱go Vasi̱ti̱, bakwi̱za kukora bei̱ba baab̯u bintu byobyo bi̱mwei̱, bibatab̯ure.
1.19: “Nahab̯waki̱kyo kwakabba nikuli ku̱si̱i̱ma kwamwe, mukama atehoona kiragiro, kihandiikwe mu biragiro bya Paasa na Medi̱ya, kandi kitalihindulwa. Kiragiro ki̱kyo ki̱kwi̱za kubba nikikugaana Vasi̱ti̱ kwi̱ra kuwonaho Mukama Ahaswero. Na kindi ki̱kyo kiikaru kya Mu̱go Vasi̱ti̱ kiheeb̯we mu̱kali̱ wondi akumukira.
1.20: Ki̱kyo kiragiro kihyaka b̯ukyakarangiirwa mu b̯ukama b̯wamu b̯wensei̱ nka kub̯wicala, bakali̱ bensei̱ bakwi̱za kugonderanga bei̱ba baab̯u, kababbe banaku rundi bagu̱u̱da.”
1.21: Mukama na bayolo baamwe baasi̱i̱mi̱ri̱ ki̱kyo kiteekerezu, kandi mukama yaakora nka Memu̱kaani̱ ku̱yaahanwi̱ri̱.
1.22: Mukama yaasi̱ndi̱ki̱ri̱ mu b̯uli isaza lya b̯ukama b̯wamwe kihandiiko, kinyakuhandiikwa mu ndimi za b̯uli luganda nikikukoba nti, b̯uli nyineeka akusemeeranga kufuga maka gaamwe kandi na kubazanga na b̯u̱sobozi̱.

2.1: Hei̱nyu̱ma gya bi̱byo byenseenya, ki̱ni̱ga kya Mukama Ahaswero b̯u̱kyakagwi̱ri̱, yei̱zu̱ki̱ri̱ bintu bya Vasi̱ti̱ biyaali akoori̱ na kiragiro kibaali bamu̱teeri̱ho.
2.2: Mwomwo baheereza ba mukama baamuhanulira yati, “Ai̱ mukama, leka baku̱tooleerye mu b̯utaka b̯wamu b̯wensei̱ bahala bato banyarurungi batakawonangaho badulu.
2.3: Tuma bayolo baamu mu b̯uli isaza batoolye ndengeeti̱ zinyab̯urungi zitakawonangaho badulu babate mu nnyu̱mba gya bakali̱ baamu mu rub̯uga lu̱handu̱ lwa Su̱u̱sa. Hegaayi̱ muheereza waamu aheeb̯we b̯ujunaanizib̯wa b̯wa kubawoneera, babasi̱i̱ge maku̱ta gaku̱banyi̱ri̱i̱rya hoi̱.
2.4: Kasi mwomwo nu, oliwonamwo muhala alibba aku̱semereeri̱ hoi̱, bamuteho kubba mu̱go mu kiikaru kya Vasi̱ti̱.” Ki̱kyo kiteekerezu kyasemereeri̱ mukama hoi̱, yaakita mu nkora.
2.5: B̯u̱b̯wo nu haalingiho Muyudaaya omwei̱ mu rub̯uga lu̱handu̱ lwa Su̱u̱sa gi̱beetengi̱ Morodokaayi̱. Morodokaayi̱ yaali mu̱tabani̱ wa Yayi̱ri̱, Yayi̱ri̱ mu̱tabani̱ wa Si̱meeyi̱, Si̱meeyi̱ mu̱tabani̱ wa Ki̱i̱si̱, Ki̱i̱si̱ wa mu luganda lwa Bbenyami̱i̱ni̱,
2.6: munyakubba mu banyagwa hamwei̱ na mukama wa Yu̱da, Yekoni̱ya, kuruga Yeru̱salemu̱, banyakuhambwa Neb̯u̱kadeneeza mukama wa Bbabbu̱looni̱.
2.7: Morodokaayi̱ yaali na mwa mwijwabbaawe gi̱beetengi̱ Hadaasa, giyaali ahandi̱i̱rye hab̯wakubba atakabbe na mmaawe na bbaawe. Yogwo muhala yaali de yeegebeerwe nkʼEsi̱teeri̱. Esi̱teeri̱ yaali muhala nyarurungi atali na kamogo. Mmaawe na bbaawe b̯u̱baakwi̱ri̱, Morodokaayi̱ yaamu̱tweri̱ yaamu̱handya nka muhara waamwe kwebyalira.
2.8: Hei̱nyu̱ma gya kiragiro kya mukama kurangwa, baaleeti̱ri̱ bahala banene mu rub̯uga lu̱handu̱ lwa Su̱u̱sa, babakwatya Hegaayi̱, mu̱handu̱ wa nnyu̱mba gya bakali̱. Mu bab̯wo bahala hooho nʼEsi̱teeri̱ yaaleeteerwe mu kikaali, baamuta mu nnyu̱mba gya bakali̱ mu ngalu za Hegaayi̱.
2.9: Esi̱teeri̱ yaasi̱i̱mi̱i̱rwe Hegaayi̱. Hegaayi̱ yaamwolokeerye mbabazi̱, yaamuheeraho maku̱ta ga kwesi̱i̱ga na bidyo birungi bya ku̱mu̱nyi̱ri̱i̱rya. Kindi yaamu̱teereeri̱ho bazaana musanju kuruga mu kikaali, yaamutwala na bab̯wo bazaana mu kiikaru ki̱ku̱ki̱i̱rayo ki̱mwei̱ mu nnyu̱mba gya bakali̱.
2.10: B̯u̱b̯wo Esi̱teeri̱ yaali ataatwi̱ri̱ b̯ubyalisanwa b̯wamwe, hab̯wakubba Morodokaayi̱ yaali amu̱geeni̱ kweranga.
2.11: Hab̯wa kwendya kwetegereza nkʼEsi̱teeri̱ kuyaali kandi na kwendya kwega bikumubbaho, Morodokaayi̱ yei̱calengi̱ ni̱yeeli̱bali̱bati̱sya mu zi̱gati̱ gya nnyu̱mba gya bakali̱.
2.12: Kiro ki̱takadoori̱ kya b̯uli muhala kugyenda mu mei̱so ga Mukama Ahaswero, b̯uli muhala yaali waakumala myeri̱ i̱ku̱mi̱ na mibiri ni̱baku̱mu̱nyi̱ri̱i̱rya ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha mikoore mya bakali̱. Myeri̱ mukaaga mya kubanza baami̱malengi̱ ni̱baku̱mu̱si̱i̱ga maku̱ta ga mugaaju, na mindi mukaaga ni̱baku̱mu̱si̱i̱ga maku̱ta gaku̱wu̱nya ku̱ni̱hi̱ na byakwesi̱i̱ga bindi bya bakali̱.
2.13: Kandi b̯uli muhala wa kiro kyamwe kyakabbanga ki̱doori̱ kya kugyenda mu kikaali hali mukama, baamu̱hengi̱ b̯uli ki̱mwei̱ kyensei̱ kiyaakasabanga kugyenda nakyo kuruga mu nnyu̱mba gya bakali̱.
2.14: Yaagyendengi̱ joojolo hali mukama, naarugayo mwakya nei̱ra mu nnyu̱mba gindi gyakabiri gya bakali̱ ginyakujunaanwanga Saasi̱gazi̱, mu̱handu̱ wa bazaana ba mukama munyakulindanga bab̯wo bakali̱. Muhala aru̱gi̱ri̱ hali mukama atakakubengeyo hali mukama, kutoolahoona wa mukama giyaakabbanga asi̱i̱mi̱ri̱, naamweta neibara bamu̱ku̱byeyo.
2.15: Kiro kyʼEsi̱teeri̱ (muhara wʼAbi̱hai̱ri̱ mwijwabba Morodokaayi̱, wa Morodokaayi̱ gi̱yaatwalengi̱ nka mwana waamwe) b̯u̱kyadoori̱, atakasabe kintu kyensei̱ kutoolahoona bi̱byo bya Hegaayi̱ muheereza wa mukama munyakulindanga nnyu̱mba gya bakali̱ biyaali amu̱ragi̱i̱ri̱. B̯uli muntu yensei̱ munyakuwonahoona Esi̱teeri̱, yaamwegombi̱ri̱.
2.16: Esi̱teeri̱ b̯u̱bakamu̱tweri̱ mu kikaali hali Mukama Ahaswero, mu mweri̱ gwei̱ku̱mi̱, mweri̱ gwa Tebi̱sa, mu mwaka gwamusanju gwa b̯u̱lemi̱ b̯wamwe,
2.17: mukama yendeerye hoi̱ Esi̱teeri̱ kukira bakali̱ bensei̱, yaamwolokeerye maku̱ne yaamu̱si̱i̱ma kukira bab̯wo bakali̱ bensei̱. Nahab̯waki̱kyo mukama yaamu̱teeri̱ho kondo ku mu̱twe, yaamufoora mu̱go yaatoolaho Vasi̱ti̱.
2.18: Mwomwo mukama yaati̱mbi̱ra bayolo na baheereza baamwe bensei̱ kiihuru kikooto, ki̱kyo kiihuru kyali kya B̯u̱genyi̱ b̯wʼEsi̱teeri̱. Kindi mukama yaatoori̱ho misolo mu masaza gensei̱, yaagabira bantu bisembu ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamwe nka mukama. Morodokaayi̱ Naaranga Kihwe kya Kwi̱ta Mukama
2.19: B̯u̱bakacooki̱ri̱ bab̯wo bahala gwakabiri, Morodokaayi̱ yaalingi ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ heirembu lya mukama.
2.20: Bei̱tu̱ Esi̱teeri̱ yaali abi̱si̱ri̱ nsita gya b̯ubyalwa b̯wamwe nka Morodokaayi̱ kuyaalingi amu̱weereeri̱.
2.21: Mu biro bi̱byo, Morodokaayi̱ b̯uyaali ha mulimo heirembu lya mukama, haloho badulu babiri Bbi̱gi̱saani̱ na Teresi̱, banyakulindanga b̯ulaalu b̯wa mukama, bei̱tu̱ bab̯wo badulu baakwati̱i̱rwe ki̱ni̱ga bacwamwo kwi̱ta Mukama Ahaswero.
2.22: Morodokaayi̱ b̯u̱yaakeetegeri̱i̱ze rukwe lwab̯u, yaahwi̱tu̱li̱raho Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱, aweere mukama ku lu̱lwo rukwe.
2.23: B̯u̱baatoolereerye ku lu̱lwo rukwe, baagi̱i̱rye bi̱byo bigambu nibili bya mananu, bab̯wo badulu babiri baabei̱ti̱ri̱ na kubabbanika ha madaara. Bi̱byo bintu byahandi̱i̱ki̱i̱rwe mu mei̱so ga mukama, mu kitabbu kya bintu bi̱handu̱ bibbaho mu b̯ukama.

3.1: Hei̱nyu̱ma gya bi̱byo binyakubbaho, Mukama Ahaswero yaahandi̱i̱rye muheereza waamwe, Hamani wa mu luganda lwa Bagagi̱, mu̱tabani̱ wa Hamadasa, ha kiikaru kikooto kukira bayolo bei̱ra bensei̱.
3.2: Baheereza ba mukama bensei̱ ba heirembu lya mukama baaku̱ndi̱rengi̱ Hamani malu̱, kubba kwokwo mukama yaali aragi̱i̱ri̱ bamutengemwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa. Bei̱tu̱ Morodokaayi̱ atakagamu̱ku̱ndi̱renge.
3.3: Mwomwo baheereza ba mukama ba heirembu lya mukama baab̯u̱u̱lya Morodokaayi̱, “Hab̯waki otakuhondera kiragiro kya mukama?”
3.4: Nab̯u̱bamu̱weerenge b̯ukyeb̯ukye ha kintu kya kutamwo Hamani ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, atakabeegwe. Nahab̯waki̱kyo baamu̱legi̱ri̱ hali Hamani, mwa kuwona bigambu bya Morodokaayi̱ byabba nibili na mugasu. Hab̯wakubba Morodokaayi̱ yaali abaweereeri̱ yo kwali Muyudaaya.
3.5: Hamani b̯u̱yaakyetegereze nti, Morodokaayi̱ yaali atakumutamwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa rundi ku̱mu̱ku̱ndi̱ra malu̱, yaakwati̱i̱rwe b̯usungu.
3.6: Ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha bigambu bya Hamani yaalingi yeegi̱ri̱ ha bantu beihanga lya Morodokaayi̱, atakajwahukire kiteekerezu kya kwi̱ta Morodokaayi̱ yankei. Hamani yaacwi̱ri̱ magezi̱ ga ku̱zi̱ki̱i̱rya ki̱mwei̱ Bayudaaya bensei̱, bantu ba Morodokaayi̱, mu b̯ukama b̯wʼAhaswero b̯wensei̱.
3.7: Ha mwaka gwei̱ku̱mi̱ na mibiri gwa b̯u̱lemi̱ b̯wa Mukama Ahaswero, mu mweri̱ gukubanza gwegebeerwe nka Nisani, Hamani yaateeri̱ho kukoma kwa karu̱ru̱, karu̱ru̱ kabeetengi̱ Pu̱ri̱. Karu̱ru̱ kakwo kaakomwenge b̯uli kiro, na mweri̱ ha mweri̱ kudwereera ki̱mwei̱ ha mweri̱ gwei̱ku̱mi̱ na mibiri, gwegebeerwe nka Adaari̱.
3.8: Mwomwo Hamani yaaweera Mukama Ahaswero yati, “Haloho bantu basaaseeni̱ hensei̱ mu masaza gensei̱ mu b̯ukama b̯wamu, baali na ngesu zitakwisana za bantu bandi bensei̱, basuula kuhondera biragiro bya mukama. Nahab̯waki̱kyo ti̱basemereeri̱ kuganyirwa.
3.9: B̯ukyabba ki̱ku̱semereeri̱ mukama, ikiriza kiragiro kiteeb̯weho kyaku̱bazi̱kya, nkwi̱za kuta talanta 10,000 za feeza mwibiikiro lya sente lya b̯ukama hab̯wa kusasula bantu baakora gu̱gwo mulimo.”
3.10: Nahab̯waki̱kyo mukama yaasomoori̱mwo mpi̱ta gyamwe mu ngalu, yaagiha Hamani wa mu luganda lwa Bagagi̱, mu̱tabani̱ wa Hamadasa, munywanzigwa wa Bayudaaya.
3.11: Mukama yaaweera Hamani yati, “Sente zaamu weebikira, kandi na bab̯wo bantu obakore nka ku̱waakendya.”
3.12: Kasi mwomwo beeta bahandi̱i̱ki̱ bensei̱ ba mukama ha kiro kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na bisatu kya mweri̱ gwakubanza. Baahandi̱i̱ki̱ri̱ kihandiiko nibahondera bigambu bya Hamani bi̱yaaragi̱i̱ri̱, baaki̱si̱ndi̱ki̱ra banyamasaza ba mukama, bamasaza bensei̱ na bayolo ba bantu bensei̱ mu ndimi za nganda zensei̱ za b̯uli masaza. Kihandiiko ki̱kyo kyahandi̱i̱ki̱i̱rwe mwibara lya Mukama Ahaswero bakitaho kilengeeru kya mpi̱ta.
3.13: Kihandiiko ki̱kyo kyatwali̱i̱rwe batumwa mu masaza ga b̯u̱b̯wo b̯ukama b̯wensei̱, nikikuragira nti Bayudaaya bensei̱, bato na bahandu̱, bakali̱ na baana, bakusemeera kwi̱twa, babasale kandi babazi̱kye mu kiro ki̱mwei̱. Mu kiro kyokyo ki̱mwei̱, kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na bisatu mweri̱ gwei̱ku̱mi̱ na mibiri gwʼAdaara, banyagwe neitungu lyab̯u.
3.14: Kihandiiko ki̱kyo baali baakukirangiira nikili nka kiragiro mu masaza gensei̱, bantu bensei̱ ba mahanga gensei̱ bakyege mwa kwetegekera ki̱kyo kiro.
3.15: Batumwa bab̯wo baarangu̱hi̱ri̱ baatwala ki̱kyo kihandiiko nka mukama kuyaali aragi̱i̱ri̱, kyadumirwa mu rub̯uga lu̱handu̱ lwa Su̱u̱sa. Hei̱nyu̱ma Hamani na mukama b̯ubaali bei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ nibakunywa, rub̯uga lwa Su̱u̱sa lwagu̱gu̱mu̱ka.

4.1: Morodokaayi̱ b̯u̱yaakeetegeri̱i̱ze byensei̱ binyakubba bi̱koleerwe, yaatemu̱u̱ri̱ ngoye ziyaali alweri̱, yaalwala nsensede kandi yeesi̱i̱ga i̱syanu̱, yaagyenda hakati̱ wa rub̯uga na kizabiro kinyamaani.
4.2: Yaagyendi̱ri̱ ha mulyangu gwa irembu gwa kikaali kya mukama bei̱tu̱ atakeingire mu̱kati̱, kubba batakeikirizenge muntu yensei̱ alweri̱ nsensede kwingira mwirembu lya mukama.
4.3: Kandi mu b̯uli isaza cali kihandiiko na kiragiro kya mukama kyali ki̱doori̱, Bayudaaya bensei̱ baali mu nganye, nibakusiiba kandi nibakulira kizabiro kinyamaani. Bayudaaya banene baali mu nsensede kandi baaleeri̱ mwi̱syanu̱.
4.4: Bazaana na baheereza bʼEsi̱teeri̱ bei̱zi̱ri̱ baamuweera Morodokaayi̱ nka kuyaalingi, Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱ yaasaalirwa hoi̱. Yaatwekeeri̱ Morodokaayi̱ ngoye za kulwala, ni̱yendya Morodokaayi̱ akusulemwo nsensede, bei̱tu̱ Morodokaayi̱ yaaswi̱ri̱ kukusulamwo nsensede.
4.5: Kasi mwomwo Esi̱teeri̱ yaatuma baamwetere muheereza waamwe, Hasaki̱, omwei̱ ha baheereza ba mukama bayaali ateeri̱hoona kumuwoneera. Yaamutuma yati, “Gyenda hali Morodokaayi̱ weetegereze kintu kiloho, na hab̯waki ki̱bbeeri̱ho.”
4.6: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, Hasaki̱ yaagyendi̱ri̱ hanzei hali Morodokaayi̱ hakati̱ wa rub̯uga mu zi̱gati̱ gyeirembu lya mukama.
4.7: Morodokaayi̱ yaaweereeri̱ Hasaki̱ bintu byensei̱ binyakubba bi̱bbeeri̱ho, oteeri̱hoona na kya muhendu gwa sente Hamani ziyaali yeeragi̱ri̱ kuta mu nsahu gya b̯ukama hab̯wa ku̱zi̱kya Bayudaaya.
4.8: Morodokaayi̱ yaaheeri̱ Hasaki̱ na kihandiiko kinyakuhandiikwa kya ku̱bazi̱kya, kinyakubba ki̱ti̱mbi̱rwe mu rub̯uga Su̱u̱sa, akyolokye Esi̱teeri̱ kandi amusoboore. Kindi, Morodokaayi̱ yaaweereeri̱ Hasaki̱ asabe Esi̱teeri̱ arombe na mukama, atongoneere bantu baamwe bayudaaya aleke mukama abaganyire.
4.9: Hasaki̱ yaaku̱bi̱ri̱yo yaasoboora Esi̱teeri̱ bya Morodokaayi̱ yaabazi̱ri̱.
4.10: Mwomwo Esi̱teeri̱ yaatuma Hasaki̱ naamuragira aweere Morodokaayi̱ yati,
4.11: “Heicalaho kiragiro kikukwatagana na ku̱romba mukama, babbe bakungu na bantu ba b̯ukama bensei̱ na ba mu masaza bakyegi̱ri̱. Muntu yensei̱ akagyendanga kuwona mukama, kutoolahoona mukama yooyo nali amweti̱ri̱, yogwo muntu akwi̱zanga kwi̱twa. Kintu ki̱mwei̱ kisa kikusobora kujuna yogwo muntu kili kakubba mukama amwolokeerya mubbeere gwamwe gwa zaabbu. Harabi̱ri̱ho biro maku̱mi̱ gasatu kuruga mukama nanzeta kumuwona.”
4.12: Morodokaayi̱ b̯u̱baamu̱weereeri̱ bigambu byʼEsi̱teeri̱ bi̱yaabazi̱ri̱,
4.13: yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo Esi̱teeri̱ naamuweera yati, “Otateekereza nti, mu Bayudaaya bensei̱ weewe okwi̱za kukena, hab̯wakubba oli mu nnyu̱mba gya mukama.
4.14: Kakubba weeteekeera hataati̱, kucungurwa kwa Bayudaaya ku̱kwi̱za kurugira handi, bei̱tu̱ we na mu̱gi̱ gwa bbaawu gulihwerekeera. Naani akyegi̱ri̱, b̯undi hab̯wa mbeera giloho hataati̱, kyokyo waateebeerweho kubba mu̱go?”
4.15: Mwomwo Esi̱teeri̱ yaatumira Morodokaayi̱ naakoba yati,
4.16: “Gyenda ocooke Bayudaaya bensei̱ ba mu Su̱u̱sa, musiibe hab̯wange. Mutadya kandi mutanywa kumala biro bisatu, i̱jolo na mwinsi. Kandi gya hamwei̱ na bazaana bange nkwi̱za kusiiba nka nywe. Hei̱nyu̱ma gya kusiiba nkwi̱za kugyenda hali mukama nab̯ukyakabba nikikubinya kiragiro, nyakakwa hab̯wa kukikora nkankwe.”
4.17: Nahab̯waki̱kyo Morodokaayi̱ yaagyendi̱ri̱ yaakora nkʼEsi̱teeri̱ kuyaali amu̱ragi̱i̱ri̱.

5.1: Ha kiro kya kasatu kya kisiibo, Esi̱teeri̱ yaalweri̱ kilwalu kya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamwe kya b̯u̱go, kwokwo agyende kuzookera mu mei̱so ga mukama. Yei̱ngi̱i̱ri̱ mu kikaali, yeemeera ha mulyangu gwa ki̱si̱i̱ka kya mukama kiyaalingimwo. Ha b̯wi̱re b̯u̱b̯wo, mukama yaali ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ ha kitebe kyamwe kya b̯ukama.
5.2: Mukama b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱ yeemereeri̱ hahwo ha mulyangu, yaamu̱sanyu̱ki̱i̱ri̱, yaamwolokeerya mubbeere gwa zaabbu guyaali akweti̱. Kasi mwomwo Esi̱teeri̱ yei̱za hali yo, yaakwata ha mu̱twe gwa mubbeere gwa zaabbu gwa mukama.
5.3: Mwomwo mukama amu̱b̯u̱u̱lya, “Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱, kikyani ki̱bbeeri̱ho? Kyani kyokwendya? Mbwera nkikuhe, nab̯ukyabba ki̱mwei̱ kya kabiri kya b̯ukama b̯wange.”
5.4: Esi̱teeri̱ yaamwi̱ri̱mwo yati, “Mukama wange, waabba oki̱si̱i̱mi̱ri̱, nkukusaba, we na Hamani, mwi̱ze mubbe bagenyi̱ bange ha B̯u̱genyi̱ b̯u̱nku̱kooleeri̱.”
5.5: Mwomwo mukama yaaragira, “Mu̱nzetere Hamani b̯wangu, aleke tukore kyʼEsi̱teeri̱ kyakwendya.” Nahab̯waki̱kyo mukama na Hamani baagyendi̱ri̱ ha B̯u̱genyi̱ b̯wʼEsi̱teeri̱ b̯uyaalingi akoori̱.
5.6: B̯ubaali nibakunywa vi̱i̱no, mukama yaab̯u̱u̱lya Esi̱teeri̱ murundi gundi, “Kikyani kyokwendya hataati̱? Nkwi̱za kukikuha. Kikyani kili mu kusaba kwamu? Nab̯ukyabba nikili ki̱mwei̱ kya kabiri kya b̯ukama, nkwi̱za kukikuha.”
5.7: Esi̱teeri̱ yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo yati, “Ki̱nkwendya kandi kinkusaba kyokyo kiki:
5.8: Mukama b̯uyaakabba aweeni̱ mu mbabazi̱ zaamwe kandi akasi̱i̱ma kwendya kwange na kusaba kwange, leka mukama wange na Hamani bei̱ze mwakya ha B̯u̱genyi̱ b̯u̱nkwi̱za kubakoora. B̯u̱b̯wo mwomwo nkwi̱za kwi̱ramwona bi̱b̯u̱u̱lyo bya mukama wange.” Hamani Naakora Ntegeka za Kwi̱ta Morodokaayi̱
5.9: Kiro ki̱kyo Hamani yeemu̱ki̱ri̱ asemereerwe hoi̱, bei̱tu̱ mwirembu lya mukama, Hamani yaali aweeni̱yoona Morodokaayi̱. Morodokaayi̱ atakemeere rundi atakatemwo Hamani ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa. Ki̱kyo kikorwa kyasaali̱i̱ze hoi̱ Hamani.
5.10: Bei̱tu̱ atakabaze kigambu kyensei̱, yeemuka mu maka gaamwe. Hei̱nyu̱ma, Hamani yeeti̱ri̱ banywani baamwe na mu̱kali̱ waamwe Zeresi̱,
5.11: yeehaariiza mu mei̱so gaab̯u nka kwali na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa na b̯u̱gu̱u̱da b̯unene, batabani̱ banene, kandi nka mukama kwamu̱handi̱i̱rye. Kindi nka mukama kwamu̱handi̱i̱ryemwo kukira bayolo na baheereza bandi.
5.12: Hamani ab̯u̱ni̱a akoba yati, “Ndi gyagya musa wa Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱ asi̱i̱mi̱ri̱ kubba na mukama mu B̯u̱genyi̱ b̯watu̱kooleeri̱. Kandi anzeti̱ri̱ hamwei̱ na mukama mwakya.
5.13: Bei̱tu̱ kandi, bi̱byo byensei̱ tibikungasa, nyaabba nincakawona yogwo Muyudaaya Morodokaayi̱ naacakeicaara heirembu lya mukama.”
5.14: Mu̱kali̱ waamwe Zeresi̱ na banywanwe baamu̱weereeri̱ yati, “Leka bakore madaara gababbanikaho bantu ga b̯ulei b̯wa ngarama i̱ku̱mi̱ neibiri, hei̱nyu̱ma osabe mukama babbanikeho Morodokaayi̱ akwe. B̯u̱b̯wo mwomwo okwi̱za kugyenda ha B̯u̱genyi̱ na mukama osemereerwe.” Ki̱kyo kiteekerezu kyamu̱semereeri̱ hoi̱, Hamani yaaragira bakore madaara.

6.1: I̱jolo li̱lyo mukama atakebbake, kasi yaaragira baaleeta mu mei̱so gaamwe kitabbu kya byei̱nyu̱ma, ki̱kwolokya miremere myamwe, bakimusomere.
6.2: Mu ki̱kyo kitabbu haazooki̱ri̱mwo bi̱kwolokya nka Morodokaayi̱ ku̱yaahwi̱tu̱u̱ri̱ rukwe lwa kwi̱ta mukama Ahaswero, rukwe lu̱lwo lwakoleerwe baheereza ba mukama babiri, Bbi̱gi̱saani̱ na Teresi̱, banyakulindanga irembu lya kikaali.
6.3: Mwomwo mukama yaab̯u̱u̱lya, “Kikyani kya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kandi kyakwi̱zu̱ki̱raho ki̱baaheeri̱ Morodokaayi̱ hab̯wa ki̱kyo kintu?” Baheereza ba mukama bei̱ramwo, “Tihaloho ki̱baamu̱heeri̱.”
6.4: Mukama ab̯u̱ni̱a ab̯u̱u̱lya, “Naani ali mu zi̱gati̱?” Ha b̯wi̱re b̯wob̯wo Hamani yaali naacakengira b̯wi̱ngi̱ri̱ mu zi̱gati̱ gya kikaali kya mukama, mwa kubaza nayo ha kyakwi̱ta Morodokaayi̱ na kumubbanika ha madaara gayaali akoori̱.
6.5: Baheereza baamwe baamuweera, “Hamani yo ngodi̱ yeemereeri̱ mu zi̱gati̱ akwendya kukuwonaho.” Mukama yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ naakoba, “Mu̱mwete ei̱ze.”
6.6: Hamani b̯u̱yaadoori̱ mukama amu̱b̯u̱u̱lya, “Kyani ki̱nyaku̱soboori̱ kukora na kutamu ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa ku yogwo muntu akweti̱ ku mutima gwange?” Hamani yeeb̯u̱u̱li̱i̱rye mu mutima gwamwe naakoba, “Naani yogwo hatali gya, wa mukama gyakwendya ku̱si̱i̱ma?”
6.7: Nahab̯waki̱kyo Hamani yaamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Yogwo wa mukama akwendeerya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa,
6.8: leka bamuhe kilwalu kya mukama ki̱yaalweri̱ho na mbaraasi gya mukama gi̱yaani̱i̱ni̱ri̱ho, giwa kondo gya b̯ukama ha mu̱twe gwagyo.
6.9: Kandi leka ki̱kyo kilwalu na mbaraasi babi̱kwatye muheereza omwei̱ mwesigwa hoi̱ mu bayolo ba mukama, alwalye yogwo muntu wa mukama akwendeerya ki̱kyo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa ki̱kyo kilwalu, kandi amwekulembere amu̱rabye mu rub̯uga ha mbaraasi, naamuragiiranga naakoba, ‘Mukama waasi̱i̱ma muntu kwokwo amukora yatyo!’ ”
6.10: Mukama yaadu̱u̱mi̱i̱ri̱ Hamani naakoba, “Gyenda b̯wanguha oleete kilwalu na mbaraasi, okore nka kwokobi̱ri̱, obihe Morodokaayi̱ Muyudaaya yogwo eicaara heirembu lya mukama. Otati̱gayo na ki̱mwei̱ ha bintu bi̱waakakobi̱ri̱.”
6.11: Nahab̯waki̱kyo Hamani yaakweti̱ bilwalu, yaabi̱lwalya Morodokaayi̱ kandi yaamwekulembera ha mbaraasi, yaamu̱rabya mu rub̯uga naarangiiranga naakoba, “Mukama waasi̱i̱ma muntu kwokwo amukora yatyo.”
6.12: Hei̱nyu̱ma Morodokaayi̱ yaaku̱bi̱ri̱yo heirembu. Bei̱tu̱ Hamani yangu̱hi̱ri̱ yeemuka kwamu̱gi̱ atu̱li̱ki̱ri̱ mu̱twe naakuswara,
6.13: yaaweera banywanwe na mu̱kalwe Zeresi̱ bintu byensei̱ binyakumubbaho. Balambi̱ baamwe na mu̱kali̱ waamwe Zeresi̱ baamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo nibakoba, “Morodokaayi̱ nka kwali Muyudaaya, b̯u̱b̯wo ku̱gwa kwamu ku̱tandi̱ki̱ri̱, tosobora ku̱mu̱si̱ngu̱ra, mu mananu akwi̱za ku̱ku̱si̱ngu̱ra!”
6.14: B̯ubaali nibacakabaza nayo, hei̱za baheereza ba mukama baatwala Hamani b̯wangu ha B̯u̱genyi̱ wʼEsi̱teeri̱ yaali akoori̱.

7.1: Nahab̯waki̱kyo mukama na Hamani baagyendi̱ri̱ mu B̯u̱genyi̱ na Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱.
7.2: Bei̱tu̱ b̯ubaali nibakunywa vi̱i̱no ha kiro kya kabiri kya B̯u̱genyi̱ mukama ab̯u̱ni̱a ab̯u̱u̱lya, “Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱, kikyani kyokwendya nkukolere? Nkwi̱za kukikuha. Kikyani kili ha mutima gwamu? Nab̯ukyakabba ki̱mwei̱ kya kabiri kya b̯ukama b̯ub̯u, nkwi̱za kukikuha.”
7.3: Mwomwo Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱ yaamwi̱ramwo naakoba yati, “Mukama wange, b̯uwaabba oki̱si̱i̱mi̱ri̱ kandi nikikakusemeera, ndekera b̯womi b̯wange, na bantu bange de, obalekere b̯womi b̯wab̯u, ki̱kyo kyokyo nkukusaba kandi nkwendya hoi̱.
7.4: Hab̯wakubba gya na bantu bange tu̱gu̱li̱i̱rwe kwi̱twa, kusalwa na kumalwaho ki̱mwei̱. Hakiri kibbenge kyakutundwa mu b̯wiru nyakali ninyeetekeera, hab̯wakubba b̯ujune b̯wakyo b̯wali b̯utakusobora kumpa ku̱gadya mukama.”
7.5: Mukama Ahaswero ab̯u̱u̱lya Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱, “Naani yogwo? Ali hanya akwendya kukora kintu ki̱kyo?”
7.6: Esi̱teeri̱ yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “Munyanzigwa kandi mwi̱ti̱ yooyo yogwo mudulu mubiibi, Hamani.” Hamani yaakankei̱ni̱ na b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱ mu mei̱so ga mukama na ga mu̱go.
7.7: Mukama yaabyoki̱ri̱ na ki̱ni̱ga kinene hoi̱, yaati̱ga maaci gaamwe, yaalibata yaagyenda mu zi̱gati̱ gya kikaali. Hamani b̯u̱yaakaweeni̱ mukama asaari̱mwona ku̱mwi̱ta, yaasi̱geeri̱ hahwo yeesengereerya Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱ amujune.
7.8: Mukama b̯uyaali nacakarugayo mu zi̱gati̱ gya kikaali naakwi̱ra cali yaanywerengi̱ maaci, yaagi̱i̱rye Hamani naakugwagwa mu magulu gʼEsi̱teeri̱ cali Esi̱teeri̱ yaali ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱. Mukama amuweera yati, “We, okwendya na kuhamba mu̱go mu mei̱so gange, mu kikaali kyange!” Mukama b̯uyaali naacakakibaza b̯u̱bazi̱, baheereza ba mukama nibabbumba Hamani mu̱twe.
7.9: Mwomwo Harabona, omwei̱ hali baheereza munyakubba naakuheereza mukama, yaabaza naakoba yati, “Haloho madaara gemereeri̱ ha nnyu̱mba gya Hamani ga b̯ulei, ngarama i̱ku̱mi̱ neibiri. Hamani yaagabi̱mbi̱si̱i̱rye kubbanika kwi̱ti̱raho Morodokaayi̱, Morodokaayi̱ munyakuranga rukwe lwa ku̱kwi̱ta we mukama.” Mukama yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ naakoba yati, “Mu̱bbani̱keho Hamani, akwe!”
7.10: Kwokwo yatyo bei̱ti̱ri̱ Hamani ha madaara gayaali akoori̱ kubbanikaho Morodokaayi̱. Mwomwo ki̱ni̱ga kya mukama kyagwa.

8.1: Ha kiro ki̱kyo kyonyi̱ni̱ Mukama Ahaswero yaaheeri̱ Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱ itungu lyensei̱ lya Hamani, munyanzigwa wa Bayudaaya. Morodokaayi̱ yei̱zi̱ri̱ mu mei̱so ga mukama, hab̯wakubba Esi̱teeri̱ yaali aweereeri̱ mukama nka Morodokaayi̱ kuyaali mwijwe.
8.2: Mukama yaasomoori̱ mpi̱ta gyamwe gya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya b̯ukama giyaali aheeri̱ Hamani, agiha Morodokaayi̱. Kandi Esi̱teeri̱ ataho Morodokaayi̱ abbe naawoneera itungu lyensei̱ lya Hamani.
8.3: Esi̱teeri̱ ab̯u̱ni̱a aweera mukama amu̱gwi̱ri̱ mu magulu naakulira b̯u̱li̱ri̱, amwesengereerya kusalamwona ntegeka gya Hamani Mu̱gagi̱ giyaali akoori̱ ku̱zi̱kya Bayudaaya.
8.4: Mwomwo mukama yoolokya Esi̱teeri̱ mubbeere gwamwe gwa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa gwa zaabbu, Esi̱teeri̱ abyoka yeemeera mu mei̱so gaamwe.
8.5: Esi̱teeri̱ yaabazi̱ri̱ naakoba yati, “Waki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa mukama wange, waabba oki̱si̱i̱mi̱ri̱ kandi waabba noli na mbabazi̱ kandi nikikudwa b̯u̱dwi̱ mukuteekereza kwamu, nkukusaba ohandiike kihandiiko kikusalamwona bi̱byo bya Hamani, mu̱tabani̱ wa Hamadasa Mu̱gagi̱, bi̱yaakoori̱ mu kihandiiko kya ku̱zi̱kya Bayudaaya mu masaza gensei̱.
8.6: Nsobora teetei̱ kulingira b̯u̱li̱ngi̱i̱ri̱ kabii ni̱kakwi̱zi̱ra bantu bange? Rundi nsobora teetei̱ kulingira b̯u̱li̱ngi̱i̱ri̱ beiju bange ni̱baku̱zi̱ka?”
8.7: Mukama Ahaswero yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱ na Morodokaayi̱ Muyudaaya yati, “Bamaari kadei kubbanika Hamani ha madaara, akwi̱ri̱, neitungu lwamwe ndi̱heeri̱ Esi̱teeri̱ hab̯wa rukwe lwa Hamani lwa ku̱hwerekereerya Bayudaaya.
8.8: Hati̱ nu handiika kiragiro kindi mwibara lya mukama hab̯wa Bayudaaya nka kwokwendya okiteho kalengeeru ka mpi̱ta gya mukama. Hab̯wakubba tibasobora ku̱di̱bya kihandiiko kyensei̱ ki̱teebeerweho kalengeeru ka mpi̱ta gya mukama.”
8.9: Nahaahwo b̯ulob̯ulo beeti̱ri̱ bahandi̱i̱ki̱ ba mukama ha kiro ki̱kyo kyagabiri na bisatu, mweri̱ gwakasatu gwegebeerwe nka Si̱vaani̱. Bahandi̱i̱ki̱ bab̯wo baahandi̱i̱ki̱ri̱ b̯utumwa b̯wa Morodokaayi̱ hali Bayudaaya, banyamasaza, bamasaza na bayolo ba mukama mu masaza ki̱ku̱mi̱ mu gabiri na musanju (127), kurugira ki̱mwei̱ B̯u̱hi̱ndi̱ kudwa mwʼI̱syopi̱ya. B̯u̱b̯wo b̯utumwa b̯wahandi̱ki̱i̱rwe mu ndimi zikwahukana nka nganda kuzaali mu b̯uli isaza, na b̯utumwa b̯wa Bayudaaya b̯wahandi̱ki̱i̱rwe mu lulimi lwab̯u.
8.10: Bbaruha zi̱zo zaahandi̱ki̱i̱rwe Morodokaayi̱ mwibara lya Mukama Ahaswero, zaateeb̯waho kilengeeru kya mpi̱ta gya mukama. Bbaruha zi̱zo zaatwali̱i̱rwe batumwa banyakuvuga mbaraasi, mbaraasi za mu kikaali kya mukama zi̱kwi̱ru̱ki̱ra ki̱mwei̱ na maani.
8.11: Kihandiiko kya mukama ki̱kyo kyaheeri̱ Bayudaaya ba mu mbuga zensei̱ b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wa kwecooka na kwelwanaho hali banyanzigwa baab̯u, kwi̱ta na ku̱zi̱kya i̱he lyeihanga lwensei̱ rundi isaza lyensei̱ likusobora ku̱baru̱mba bo na bakali̱ na baana baab̯u. Kindi kyabei̱ki̱ri̱i̱ze kunyaga itungu lya banyanzigwa baab̯u.
8.12: Kiro ki̱mwei̱ kinyakuteeb̯waho mu masaza gensei̱ ga Mukama Ahaswero kyali kiro kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na bisatu mu mweri̱ gwa i̱ku̱mi̱ na mibiri niguli mweri̱ gwʼAdara.
8.13: Kihandiiko kya b̯u̱b̯wo b̯utumwa kyali kyakurangwa nka kiragiro mu masaza gensei̱ na bantu ba b̯uli ihanga bakyege, mwa kuha Bayudaaya kwelwanaho bakabba baru̱mbi̱i̱rwe banyanzigwa baab̯u.
8.14: Nahab̯waki̱kyo batumwa ba ki̱kyo kiragiro baakoleeri̱ho, baagu̱su̱ki̱i̱ri̱ mbaraasi za mukama bei̱ru̱ka na maani hoi̱, kandi kiragiro kyarangiirwa mu rub̯uga lu̱handu̱ lwa Su̱u̱sa.
8.15: Kasi mwomwo Morodokaayi̱ yaaruga mu mei̱so ga mukama alweri̱ bilwalu bya bbu̱ru̱ru̱, bi̱syanu̱, na kondo gya zaabbu kandi yeegu̱mi̱i̱ri̱ lu̱goye lu̱heheeru̱ lwa rangi̱ gya papo. Rub̯uga lwa Su̱u̱sa lwali mu kujaagaana na kusemererwa hoi̱.
8.16: B̯wi̱re b̯u̱b̯wo hali Bayudaaya kaali kasu̱mi̱ ka kusemererwa, kusanyuka, na kubba na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
8.17: B̯uli isaza na rub̯uga cali kiragiro kya mukama kyagyendi̱ri̱, haali̱yo kusemererwa na masanyu mu Bayudaaya, bateeri̱ho kudya na kunywa na kujaagaana. Bantu banene ba mahanga gandi beefoori̱ri̱ kubba Bayudaaya hab̯wakubba baati̱i̱nenge Bayudaaya.

9.1: Ha kiro kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na bisatu, mweri̱ gwei̱ku̱mi̱ na mibiri (gu̱beetengi̱ mweri̱ gwʼAdara), ki̱kyo kiragiro kya mukama kyali kyakuteeb̯wa mu nkora. Banyanzigwa ba Bayudaaya baani̱hi̱rengi̱ ha kiro kyokyo kubba nibamalaho Bayudaaya. Bei̱tu̱ bintu byahi̱ndu̱ki̱ri̱ Bayudaaya baasi̱ngu̱ra banyanzigwa baab̯u.
9.2: Bayudaaya ba mu masaza gensei̱ ga mu b̯ukama wʼAhaswero, beecookeeri̱ mu mbuga zaab̯u mwa ku̱ru̱mba bantu banyakubba ni̱bakwenda ku̱bei̱ta. Hatakabbeho muntu yensei̱ munyakubyoka ku̱balwani̱sya, hab̯wakubba bantu bensei̱ b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱ b̯wabakweti̱.
9.3: Bayolo bensei̱ ba masaza, banyamasaza na bamasaza, na batumwa ba mu kikaali baacwi̱ri̱mwo kusagika Bayudaaya, hab̯wakubba baati̱nengi̱ Morodokaayi̱.
9.4: Bantu ba mu masaza gensei̱ baali bakyegi̱ri̱ nka mukama kuyaali aheeri̱ Morodokaayi̱ b̯u̱handu̱ kandi yaali wa maani. B̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wamwe b̯wagyendengi̱ ni̱b̯weteerya.
9.5: Bayudaaya baatemi̱temi̱ri̱ banyanzigwa baab̯u na mpirima baabei̱ta, baabazi̱ki̱i̱rya ki̱mwei̱. Baakoori̱ho bab̯wo banyakubba babanobi̱ri̱ nka kubendyengi̱.
9.6: Mu rub̯uga lu̱handu̱ lwa Su̱u̱sa, Bayudaaya bei̱ti̱ri̱ bantu bi̱ku̱mi̱ bitaanu (500).
9.7: Mu bab̯wo bantu bei̱ti̱i̱ri̱mwo de, Pari̱sani̱daasa, Dali̱fooni̱, Asi̱paata,
9.10: batabani̱ ba Hamani i̱ku̱mi̱, mu̱tabani̱ wa Hamadasa munyanzigwa wa Bayudaaya, bei̱tu̱ baatakakwateho itungu lyab̯u.
9.11: Muhendu gwa bantu banyakwi̱ti̱b̯wa mu rub̯uga lu̱handu̱ lwa Su̱u̱sa baagu̱rangi̱i̱ri̱ mukama ha kiro kyokyo kyonyi̱ni̱.
9.12: Mukama yaaweera Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱ yati, “Bayudaaya bei̱ti̱ri̱, baazi̱kya bantu bi̱ku̱mi̱ bitaanu, na batabani̱ ba Hamani i̱ku̱mi̱ mu rub̯uga lu̱handu̱ lwa Su̱u̱sa. Baabba bei̱ti̱ri̱ haha bab̯wo bensei̱, bengahi bakoolerweho mu masaza ga b̯ukama b̯wensei̱? Oli na kyokusaba hataati̱? Ki̱kwi̱za kukuheeb̯wa. Kyani kyokwendya? Nakyo okwi̱za kukitunga.”
9.13: Esi̱teeri̱ yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba yati, “Mukama waabba oki̱si̱i̱mi̱ri̱, ikiriza Bayudaaya baamu Su̱u̱sa baru̱mbe banyanzigwa baab̯u mwakya mwa kwelwanaho, nka kukyakali kiro kya deeru. Kandi leka babbanike mitumbi i̱ku̱mi̱ mya batabani̱ ba Hamani midengeete ha madaara.”
9.14: Nahab̯waki̱kyo mukama yaakoori̱ kyʼEsi̱teeri̱ ki̱yaasabi̱ri̱. Baahu̱lu̱kya kihandiiko mu Su̱u̱sa, na mitumbi i̱ku̱mu̱ mya batabani̱ ba Hamani baamibbanika.
9.15: Ha kiro kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na binei bya mweri̱ gwʼAdara, Bayudaaya beecooki̱ri̱ murundi gundi, bei̱ta bantu bandi bi̱ku̱mi̱ bisatu (300) mu Su̱u̱sa, bei̱tu̱ baatakabatooleho itungu lyab̯u lyensei̱.
9.16: Ha b̯wi̱re b̯u̱b̯wo Bayudaaya banyakubba nibali mu masaza gandi ga b̯ukama beecooki̱ri̱ nibakugyendeera kwelwanaho. Bei̱ti̱ri̱ banyanzigwa baab̯u mitwaru musanju na nku̱mi̱ itaanu (75,000), bei̱tu̱ Bayudaaya baatakakwateho kintu kyensei̱ kya banyanzigwa baab̯u.
9.17: Bi̱byo byensei̱ byabbeeri̱ho ha kiro kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na bisatu kya mweri̱ gwʼAdara, kasi baahuumulaho ha kiro kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na binei, baki̱foora kiro kya B̯u̱genyi̱ na kusemererwa.
9.18: Bei̱tu̱ kandi, Bayudaaya banyakubba nibali mu rub̯uga Su̱u̱sa beecooki̱ri̱ ku̱lwani̱sya banyanzigwa baab̯u ha kiro kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na bisatu na kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na binei. Baahuumula ha kiro kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na bitaanu. Ki̱kyo kiro baakifoora kiro kya B̯u̱genyi̱ na kusemererwa.
9.19: Kyokyo b̯uli kiro kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na binei kya mweri̱ gwʼAdara, Bayudaaya banyakwicalanga mu byaru baaki̱twalengi̱ kubba kiro ki̱handu̱ kya kusemererwa na kujaguza. Baahenganengi̱ bisembu bya bidyo.
9.20: Morodokaayi̱ yaahandi̱i̱ki̱ri̱ ha b̯uli kyensei̱ kinyakubbaho, yaabi̱si̱ndi̱ki̱ra Bayudaaya bensei̱ ba mu masaza gensei̱ ga hadei na heehi̱ mu b̯ukama b̯wʼAhaswero,
9.21: naakubaweera batengemwona ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kiro kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na binei kya mweri̱ gwʼAdara na kyei̱ku̱mi̱ na bitaanu kya mweri̱ gwogwo gu̱mwei̱, b̯uli mwaka.
9.22: Hab̯wakubba bi̱byo byobyo biro na mweri̱ gwa Bayudaaya baakeni̱ri̱ banyanzigwa baab̯u b̯u̱byafooki̱ri̱ biro bya kujaguza na kusemererwa kuruga mu b̯ujune. Morodokaayi̱ yaabaragi̱i̱ri̱ kujaguzanga bi̱byo biro na kusemererwa, babaganenge bidyo kandi bahenge baseege bisembu.
9.23: Nahab̯waki̱kyo Bayudaaya baasembi̱ri̱ ki̱kyo kikorwa kya kujaguza kibaali batandi̱ki̱ri̱, na bi̱byo bya Morodokaayi̱ yaahandi̱i̱ki̱ri̱ naabaragira.
9.24: Hab̯wakubba Hamani mu̱tabani̱ wa Hamadasa, Mu̱gagi̱, munyanzigwa wa Bayudaaya benseenya yaali na rukwe lwa ku̱bazi̱kya, naaku̱toolya nka kuyaakikora kurungi, yaaki̱rabi̱i̱rye mu karu̱ru̱.
9.25: Bei̱tu̱ Esi̱teeri̱ b̯u̱yaadoori̱ mu mei̱so ga mukama, mukama yaahandi̱i̱ki̱ri̱ kihandiiko naakoba nti, kibii kya Hamani kwi̱ta Bayudaaya kibbe ha mu̱twe gwamwe. Yo na batabani̱ baamwe boobo babaabbani̱ki̱ri̱ ha madaara.
9.26: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, Bayudaaya beetengi̱ bi̱byo biro Pu̱li̱mu̱, kuruga mu kigambu Pu̱ri̱ kya Luhebburaniya kya kadei ki̱ku̱manyi̱sya ku̱cu̱hya. Nahab̯waki̱kyo, hab̯wa bintu binyakubba bi̱handi̱i̱ki̱i̱rwe mu gi̱gyo bbaruha, na hab̯wa b̯ujune b̯ubaali barabi̱ri̱mwo na bi̱byo binyakubagwaho,
9.27: baasembi̱ri̱ na maani kintu kya kujaguzanga bi̱byo biro bibiri b̯uli mwaka hamwei̱ na baana baab̯u na bab̯wo baku̱beju̱byamwo nka bbaruha ku̱gyakobengi̱.
9.28: Kyateebeerweho nti, bi̱byo biro bi̱zu̱kwenge kandi Bayudaaya babitengemwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa myaka myensei̱, nganda zensei̱ mu masaza na mu rub̯uga, kandi nti, bi̱byo biro bya Pu̱li̱mu̱ bitalirugaho, habbe beizukulu baab̯u batalilekaho kubijaguza.
9.29: Mwomwo Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱, muhara wʼAbi̱hai̱ri̱, na Morodokaayi̱ Muyudaaya, baakora kihandiiko kindi ki̱ku̱gu̱mya bbaruha gya Morodokaayi̱ ha bi̱byo biro bya Pu̱li̱mu̱.
9.30: Bbaruha baazi̱handi̱i̱ki̱i̱ri̱ Bayudaaya bensei̱, bazi̱sasaani̱a mu masaza ki̱ku̱mi̱ gabiri na musanju (127) mu b̯ukama wʼAhaswero, hab̯wa kwerinda na b̯u̱si̱nge,
9.31: nizikukoba nti, bi̱byo biro bya Pu̱li̱mu̱ bakusemeera ku̱bi̱zu̱kanga b̯uli mwaka, nka Morodokaayi̱ Muyudaaya na Mu̱go Esi̱teeri̱ kubaali babaragi̱i̱ri̱, na bantu banyakubba beeheeri̱yo na baana baab̯u, hab̯wa kusibanga na kwesengereeryanga.
9.32: Ki̱kyo kiragiro kyʼEsi̱teeri̱ kyateeri̱ho maani hoi̱ ha kujaguzanga bi̱byo biro bya Pu̱li̱mu̱, kyahandiikwa mu kitabbu mu b̯utongole.

10.1: Mukama Ahaswero yaahu̱lu̱ki̱i̱rye kiragiro kinyakutaho musolo ha bantu bensei̱ mu b̯ukama, na bab̯wo ba ha mitanda mya b̯ukama.
10.2: Bikorwa byensei̱ bya maani na b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wa Morodokaayi̱ na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyensei̱ kya mukama yaamu̱heeri̱, byahandi̱i̱ki̱i̱rwe mu bitabbu byakwi̱zu̱ka bya bakama ba Medi̱ya na Paasa.
10.3: Hab̯wakubba Morodokaayi̱ Muyudaaya yooyo yaali wa kabiri mu b̯u̱sobozi̱ hali Mukama Ahaswero na mu ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, naali wa maani hoi̱ mu Bayudaaya. Kandi Bayudaaya bakukira b̯unene baamu̱tengemwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, hab̯wakubba yaakorengi̱ hab̯wa kuheereza bantu baamwe na hab̯wa kutonganira b̯urungi wa Bayudaaya bensei̱.

1.1: Kaali na mu̱gi̱sa ateegwa kulamba kwa nkori̱ za bibii, habbe kukwata muhanda gwa babiibi, habbe ku̱di̱da na bagayi̱,
1.2: bei̱tu̱ asanyurikira mu biragiro bya Mukama , abiteekerezaho i̱jolo na mwinsi.
1.3: Eisana musaali gusimbe heehi̱ na meezi̱, gwana byana mu b̯u̱su̱mi̱ b̯wagwo, bikoora byagwo tibihotoka. Mu bintu byensei̱ byakora abba na mu̱gi̱sa.
1.4: Bei̱tu̱ babiibi tibabba yatyo, beisana bisusunga bitwalwa mpehu.
1.5: Kyokyo babiibi batalyemeera kutongana musangu, habbe kwicaara hamwei̱ na barungi,
1.6: hab̯wakubba barungi beebembeerya Mukama , bei̱tu̱ mihanda mya babiibi mibatwala mu ku̱zi̱ka.

2.1: Hab̯waki mahanga geegu̱ngwi̱ze na bantu bategeki̱ri̱ kukora bintu bitalimwo?
2.2: Bakama ba mu nsi beekobi̱ri̱, beetara hamwei̱ na balemi̱ ku̱lwani̱sya Mukama na Mutongoole waamwe.
2.3: Babaza nibakoba, “Tu̱kadu̱le njegere zaab̯u, tukasuke na mpi̱ngo zaab̯u.”
2.4: Yogwo ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ mwiguru abaseka b̯u̱seki̱, Mukama agaya b̯u̱gayi̱ ntegeka zaab̯u.
2.5: Mwomwo mu ki̱ni̱ga kinene alibacoomera, atab̯u̱ki̱ri̱ kandi bati̱i̱ni̱re ki̱mwei̱ naabaweera yati,
2.6: “Ku lusahu lwange lutongoole, Sayu̱u̱ni̱, nteeri̱hoona mukama wange.”
2.7: Mukama yaabazi̱ri̱ naakoba yati, “Nkwi̱za kuranga kiragiro kya Mukama. Mukama ki̱yambwereeri̱ nti, ‘Oli mwana wange, nku̱byeri̱, ndi bbaawu na deeru lili.
2.8: Nsaba, nkwi̱za kukuha mahanga ogagweterwe, nsi gyensei̱ ndigikuha nka itungu lyamu.
2.9: Oligalema na mubbeere gwa kyoma, oligacwacwana nka byese byeib̯umba!’ ”
2.10: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, nywe bakama, mu̱bbe na magezi̱, nywe balemi̱ ba mu nsi, mwegyendereze.
2.11: Mu̱heerezenge Mukama na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, mu̱semererwe mu̱ki̱ti̱ke.
2.12: Mu̱mu̱ramye aleke atasaalirwa, akabagu̱mi̱ri̱i̱rya mu muhanda, hab̯wakubba akwatwa ki̱ni̱ga b̯wangu. Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bensei̱ bamwesiga

3.1: Banyanzigwa bange, ai̱ Mukama , kabakanyi̱ri̱? Bantu bakumparana kabanene!
3.2: Banene bakumbazaho nibakoba yati, “Ruhanga takwi̱za kumujuna.”
3.3: Bei̱tu̱, ai̱ Mukama, weewe ngab̯u gyange gindinda, weewe ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyange, ompa ku̱byokya mu̱twe gwange.
3.4: Nnyaku̱ngi̱ri̱ Mukama, yanzi̱ramwo yeeraga kuruga ha lusahu lwamwe lurungi.
3.5: Nndaala ninyeebbaka, ni̱nzi̱ra ni̱nsi̱si̱mu̱ka hab̯wakubba ondi̱ndi̱ri̱, Mukama .
3.6: Nku̱mi̱ na nku̱mi̱ za bantu b̯uzingota, ti̱ndi̱zi̱ti̱i̱na.
3.7: Ai̱ Mukama , byoka! Njuna, Ruhanga wange! Kuuta ndahi matama ga banyanzigwa bange bensei̱, ocwacwana meino ga babiibi.
3.8: Mukama , weewe ojuna, nooha bantu baamu mu̱gi̱sa.

4.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga wange antonganiira, wanyeetegeryanga b̯unyakakwetanga. Onjunenge mu b̯ujune b̯wange, mu mbabazi̱ zaamu weegwanga kusaba kwange.
4.2: Nywe bantu, muliicala nimumpemura kudwa di̱i̱? Mu̱li̱doosya hanya kwicala ni̱mwendya bintu bitalimwo naakuhondera byab̯u̱gobya?
4.3: Bei̱tu̱ mukyege nti, Mukama ba mananu abasorooramwo babbe baamwe, Mukama anzi̱ramwona b̯umukunga.
4.4: B̯umwakabbanga na ki̱ni̱ga, mutakoranga kibii, mwetekerenge nimubiteekerezaho mu̱leeri̱ mu bitabbu byenyu̱.
4.5: Mu̱henge Mukama , bihongwa birungi, kandi mu̱mwesi̱genge.
4.6: Banene bakoba, “Naani alituha birungi? Ai̱ Mukama , leka kyererezi̱ kya mei̱so gaamu kitumulukire!”
4.7: Ompeeri̱ kusemererwa kunene mu mutima, kukukira kwa bab̯wo bereerye nganu na bahi̱i̱si̱i̱rye maaci.
4.8: Hati̱ nu, kandaale mu b̯u̱si̱nge nyeebbake, kubba, ai̱ Mukama , weewe wankei ompa kwicala kurungi.

5.1: Ai̱ Mukama, weetegeeryanga bigambu byange, oteekerezenge ha kuwonawona kwange.
5.2: Weegwanga iraka lya b̯ujune b̯wange, Mukama kandi Ruhanga wange, hab̯wakubba ndiriira weewe.
5.3: B̯uli mwakya, ai̱ Mukama , weegwa iraka lyange, b̯uli mwakya nndeeta kihongwa, nindindiira onzi̱remwo.
5.4: Kubba oli Ruhanga atasi̱i̱ma bikorwa bibiibi, nkori̱ za bibii tiziicala nawe.
5.5: Banyamyehembu tibalyemeera mu mei̱so gaamu, onoba nkori̱ za bibii zensei̱.
5.6: Ohwerekererya bab̯wo babaza b̯u̱gobya, Mukama anoba bantu batu̱u̱bi̱ri̱ kubbwoma ibbanga na ku̱gobya.
5.7: Bei̱tu̱ hab̯wa ngonzi zaamu zinene, nyei̱zanga mu nnyu̱mba gyamu gi̱syanu̱, nyaaku̱ndanga malu̱ ni̱nku̱ramya mu ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kinene.
5.8: Ai̱ Mukama , nyeebemberanga mu mananu gaamu hab̯wa banyanzigwa bange, onterekereeryenge mu muhanda gwamu.
5.9: Hab̯wakubba tibabaza mananu, bateekerereza mu kukora bibiibi. Mimiro myab̯u mili nka bituuru bib̯uule, mi̱nwa myab̯u mibaza b̯u̱gobya.
5.10: Ai̱ Ruhanga, bahe kifubiro, leka bagwenge mu mitegu myab̯u bankei. Babinge mu mei̱so gaamu hab̯wa bibii byab̯u binene, hab̯wakubba baku̱jeemeeri̱.
5.11: Bei̱tu̱ bensei̱ bakwesiga leka basemererwe, leka baku̱hi̱i̱mi̱re mu kusemererwa kunene biro byensei̱. Obatengeho b̯u̱li̱ndi̱ b̯wamu, aleke bab̯wo bendya ibara lyamu bakutendenge.
5.12: Kubba weewe, ai̱ Mukama , oha muntu mwesigwa mu̱gi̱sa, mbabazi̱ zaamu nizimubbumba nka ngab̯u.

6.1: Ai̱ Mukama , otampab̯uranga na ki̱ni̱ga, habbe kunfubira na b̯usungu.
6.2: Nsaasira ai̱ Mukama , kubba ndimuceke, mmponia ai̱ Mukama , kubba maku̱ha gange gakunseenya.
6.3: Na kindi ntu̱ntwi̱ri̱ hoi̱. Bei̱tu̱ ai̱ Mukama , oli̱doosya di̱i̱?
6.4: Ai̱ Mukama , ncungura, onjune hab̯wa ngonzi zaamu zinene.
6.5: Hab̯wakubba tihaloho akwi̱zu̱ka mu nsi gya baku̱u̱, naani yaakuhaariiza kuzumu?
6.6: Njwahi̱ri̱ kulira, mali̱ga ga b̯uli kiro galu̱bi̱i̱rye kitabbu kyange, musagu gwange gu̱tobi̱ri̱ na mali̱ga.
6.7: Mei̱so gange tigacahweza hab̯wa b̯ujune, gakwi̱ri̱ hab̯wa banyanzigwa bange.
6.8: Mu̱ndu̱gehoona, nywe nkori̱ za bibii, hab̯wakubba Mukama yeegwi̱ri̱ kizabiro kyange.
6.9: Mukama yeegwi̱ri̱ kwesengereerya kwange, Mukama ei̱ki̱ri̱i̱ze kusaba kwange.
6.10: Banyanzigwa bange bensei̱ baakwatwanga nsoni̱, nibakankanira ki̱mwei̱, mu kuswaraswara baajumbutukanga ni̱bei̱ru̱ka.

7.1: Ai̱ Mukama , Ruhanga wange, weewe gi̱nyeru̱ki̱i̱ranga, njuna hali banyanzigwa bange bensei̱, oncungure.
7.2: Kitali ki̱kyo bei̱za kuntaagura nka ntali, bancenkencenke, ndemwe muntu yanjuna.
7.3: Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga wange, nyaabba nyaakoori̱ kintu nka kiki, ngalu zange zaabba zaaheneeri̱,
7.4: nyaabba nyaadi̱i̱ri̱mwo rukwe munywani wange, kadi habbe kunyaga banyanzigwa bange hataloho nsonga,
7.5: ikiriza munyanzigwa wange andonze ankwate, mu̱leke angume hansi anjurunge mu cuucu.
7.6: Ai̱ Mukama , mu ki̱ni̱ga kyamu ru̱mba, byokira b̯ubiibi b̯wa banyanzigwa bange, si̱si̱mu̱ka onjune, weewe ocwa gwab̯ulyo.
7.7: Leka mahanga geecooke mu mei̱so gaamu, ogafugire hakyendi̱ mwiguru.
7.8: Mukama yooyo acwere bantu misangu, ai̱ Mukama ncwera ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha b̯urungi b̯wange, na mananu gange.
7.9: Leka bibii bya babiibi bibbe na ha bikusambiira, kandi olindenge bab̯wo bakora bya mananu, weewe ai̱ Ruhanga wa mananu, olenga biteekerezu bya mitima myetu̱.
7.10: Ruhanga Aki̱i̱rayo Ki̱mwei̱, weewe ngab̯u gyange, mu̱li̱ndi̱ wa bab̯wo barungi mitima.
7.11: Ruhanga acwa misangu mya b̯ulyo, afubira babiibi b̯uli kiro.
7.12: Kakubba muntu ateezi̱ramwo, Ruhanga ahyolya nsone gyamwe, naakora b̯uta na mbasi ze naazitegeka.
7.13: Ategeka byaku̱lwani̱sya binyamaani, naataho mbasi zikwaka mworo.
7.14: Wona, mubiibi b̯uyeemeta kibii, akabba na nda gya b̯ubiibi, abyala b̯u̱gobya.
7.15: Atega bandi b̯u̱hya, bei̱tu̱ yooyo ab̯ugwamwo.
7.16: Itima lye li̱i̱ra ha mu̱twe gwamwe, ki̱ni̱ga kye ki̱ru̱mya yooyo yankei.
7.17: Nyaaku̱si̱i̱manga Mukama, hab̯wa mananu gaamwe, nyaahi̱i̱manga bikuhaariiza ibara lya Mukama , Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱.

8.1: Ai̱ Mukama , Mukama weetu̱, ibara lyamu kali̱ti̱i̱nwa mu nsi gyensei̱! Ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamu kibba hakyendi̱ weiguru.
8.2: Mu mi̱nwa mya baana bato na nkerembe oteeri̱mwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, oteeri̱ho ki̱si̱i̱ka kyamaani ku banyanzigwa baamu, naakumaliraho ki̱mwei̱ bahoora nzi̱go.
8.3: B̯undingiira iguru li̱waahangi̱ri̱ na ngalu zaamu, nkawona mweri̱ na nzota bi̱waarambi̱ki̱ri̱ mu mwanya,
8.4: nnyeeb̯u̱u̱lya, “Muntu yooyo naani, we, kumuteekerezaho, na mwana wa muntu hab̯waki omufaaho?”
8.5: Kandi b̯u̱b̯wo, waamu̱hangi̱ri̱ yaabba hansiho kadooli̱ hali bamalayika, waamutaho ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa nka kondo.
8.6: Waamu̱heeri̱ b̯u̱sobozi̱ hali bintu bi̱waakoori̱ na ngalu zaamu, waata bintu byensei̱ hansi wa magulu gaamwe:
8.7: ntaama na nte zensei̱, na bisolo bya mwirungu,
8.8: bi̱nyoni̱ bya mu mwanya, na nsu̱ za mu mataka gakooto, na bihangwa byensei̱ bya mu meezi̱.
8.9: Ai̱ Mukama , Mukama weetu̱, ibara lyamu kali̱ti̱i̱nwa mu nsi gyensei̱!

9.1: Ai̱ Mukama , nyaaku̱si̱i̱manga na mutima gwange gwensei̱, nyaatebyanga byamahanu byamu byensei̱ bi̱waakoori̱.
9.2: Nyaasemererwanga ni̱nku̱ramya, nyaaku̱hi̱i̱mi̱ranga ninkuhaariiza we Ruhanga, Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱.
9.3: Banyanzigwa bange b̯ubaakuwona bakubayo i̱nyu̱ma, nibagwa ni̱bakwa.
9.4: Hab̯wakubba weewe ondwaniira kandi ontonganiira, oi̱cali̱i̱ri̱ kitebe kyamu kya b̯ukama kucwa gwab̯ulyo.
9.5: Waamira mahanga, noozi̱kya bantu babiibi, obasusura ni̱basyera biro na biro.
9.6: Ki̱kazi̱kya banyanzigwa beetu̱ cekeceke tikili na ki̱ki̱ti̱gi̱ri̱, oku̱pwi̱ri̱ mbuga zaab̯u, titucakabateekerezaho.
9.7: Bei̱tu̱ Mukama alema biro byensei̱, ha kitebe kya b̯ukama b̯wamwe akora byab̯winganiza,
9.8: acwera nsi gyensei̱ ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha mananu, naacwera bantu mu b̯winganiza.
9.9: Mukama abba mpagi̱ gya banaku, yooyo b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wab̯u mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa b̯ujune.
9.10: Bab̯wo bakutamwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa baakwesiganga, hab̯wakubba we, ai̱ Mukama , bab̯wo baakwesengereerya tobaleeka.
9.11: Mu̱hi̱i̱me muhaariiza Mukama , yogwo alema Sayu̱u̱ni̱! Mu̱tebye bikorwa byamwe hali bantu.
9.12: Kubba yogwo muhoora nzi̱go abeegi̱ri̱ bakuwonawona, ti̱yeebeera kizabiro kya bakuwonawona.
9.13: Ai̱ Mukama , nngiira mbabazi̱! Lingiira bab̯wo banyakunnoba nka ku̱baku̱mbonawonesya, ai̱ Mukama , njuna hali maani ga lu̱ku̱u̱,
9.14: aleke nsobore kukuhaariiza, hahwo mwirembu lya bantu ba Sayu̱u̱ni̱ nsobore kusemererwa hab̯wa kujunwa kwamu.
9.15: Mahanga kagagwi̱ri̱ mu b̯u̱hya b̯u̱baali̱mi̱ri̱, mu kitimba ki̱baategi̱ri̱ kabakwatu̱rwemwo.
9.16: Mukama yeegebeerwe hab̯wa misangu myamwe mya b̯ulyo myasala, babiibi bakwatwa bikorwa bya ngalu zaab̯u.
9.17: Babiibi basi̱ri̱mu̱ka kuzumu, na bab̯wo bensei̱ beeb̯wa Ruhanga.
9.18: Bei̱tu̱ baseege, Ruhanga talibebeera, kandi ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwa banaku tikulimalikaho.
9.19: Weemeera, ai̱ Mukama ! Hatabbaho muntu aku̱si̱ngu̱ra, ocwere mahanga musangu.
9.20: Ai̱ Mukama , baru̱mbe baku̱ti̱i̱nenge aleke beege bali bantu b̯untu.

10.1: Ai̱ Mukama , hab̯waki ondahi̱i̱ri̱ho? Hab̯waki onyeebi̱si̱ri̱ho mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa b̯ujune?
10.2: Mu kwetembatembya babiibi bawonawonesya banaku, nikileetera banaku ku̱gwa mu mitegu mya babiibi.
10.3: Kwegomba kubiibi kubaha kwehaariiza, batu̱mbya byab̯u̱nyagi̱ naaku̱lu̱ma Mukama .
10.4: Myehembu myab̯u mibaha kugaya Ruhanga, bateekereza yati, “Ruhanga takabbangaho.”
10.5: B̯uli kibakakora kitunga mu̱gi̱sa, beetegereza kwahi micwere mya Ruhanga, bagaya b̯u̱gayi̱ banyanzigwa baab̯u.
10.6: Mu mitima myab̯u bateekereza nibakoba yati, “Tihaloho kikusobora kungwaho! Biro byensei̱ ndibbanga mu kusemererwa, nntali na b̯ujune.”
10.7: Babiibi beicala mu kukyena, kubaza b̯u̱gobya na ku̱zi̱ndi̱ri̱za bandi, mi̱nwa myab̯u mibaza bigambu bi̱ku̱habya na kunyaga.
10.8: Balindiira nibatega bantu mu byaru, nibalaliira kwi̱ta batali na musangu, naakutata batali na maani babakwate.
10.9: Nka mutali alaali̱ri̱i̱ri̱, batega nibalindiira mu bisaka, beebi̱sa aleke bagwere batali na maani, babakwatire mu mitegu myab̯u.
10.10: Bacwacwana batali na maani ni̱badi̱ki̱ra hansi, nibagundamira baceke hansi na maani gaab̯u gensei̱.
10.11: Babiibi baateekereza nibakoba yati, “Ruhanga tabafaaho, abaru̱gi̱ri̱ho, takwi̱za kutuwona.”
10.12: Ai̱ Mukama , ai̱ Ruhanga, weemeera na banaku, otabeebeera mu b̯ujune b̯wab̯u.
10.13: Hab̯waki mubiibi agayanga Ruhanga naakoba na mu mitima gwamwe yati, “Ruhanga takwi̱za kunjunaana!”
10.14: Bei̱tu̱ we, Ruhanga, b̯ujune na kuwonawona ku̱koleerwe, okwegi̱ri̱, bikwate, obajune, bakwesi̱gi̱ri̱, bajune, weewe ojuna nfu̱u̱zi̱.
10.15: Ocwacwana mikono mya babiibi, obajunaane bibiibi bibakora, hatasigalaho noomwei̱.
10.16: Mukama yooyo mu̱lemi̱ wa biro byensei̱, mahanga ga mu nsi gyamwe gali̱zi̱ka.
10.17: Ai̱ Mukama, weegwanga kulira kwa banaku, obatati̱i̱ryenge mitima myab̯u,
10.18: olwaniirenge nfu̱u̱zi̱ na baceke, aleke hatalibbaho mubiibi ku nsi aku̱bati̱i̱ni̱si̱ri̱i̱rya.

11.1: Mukama, yooyo nyeesiga, musobora teetei̱ kumbwera, “I̱ru̱ka nka nnyoni̱ ha lusahu,
11.2: kubba na mu kyebi̱si̱i̱re babiibi bakweti̱ b̯uta na mbasi, zakulasa ba mitima mirungi,
11.3: Tihalohoona kya murungi akusobora akore, biragiro b̯ubilemereerwa.”
11.4: Mukama abba mu Yeekaru gyamwe gi̱syanu̱, kitebe kya Mukama kibba mwiguru, awona bali hansi na mei̱so gaamwe, naalenga bya baana ba bantu bibakora.
11.5: Mukama yooyo alenga barungi, bei̱tu̱ mutima gwamwe gunoba babiibi na bazongobi̱.
11.6: Leka mworo gu̱talu̱ma gu̱tokomokye babiibi, leka mworo guwa b̯uganga, ki̱bbi̱ri̱i̱ti̱ na mpehu kajuguta kingeere kibbenge kifubiro kyab̯u.
11.7: Kubba Mukama abba wa mananu, yendya bikorwa byamananu, barungi balimuwona.

12.1: Ai̱ Mukama, tu̱ju̱ne, hab̯wakubba tihaloho noomwei̱ akutamwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, munanu waahimwo mu bantu.
12.2: Bagobyangana bankei na bankei, nibehaariizangana na bigambu bitalimwo.
12.3: Ai̱ Mukama , ijala mi̱nwa mikwehaariiza, weetekereerye bensei̱ bakwepankapanka,
12.4: nibakoba, “Tu̱kwi̱za ku̱bagobya ni̱tu̱basi̱ngu̱ra, byakubaza tuli nabyo, naani akusobora kuturagira?”
12.5: Mukama akoba yati, “Hab̯wa kuwonawona kwa museege, na b̯ujune b̯wa munaku, nkwi̱za kwi̱za mujune. Nkwi̱za kumuta mu kiikaru kya b̯u̱si̱nge ki̱yendyenge.”
12.6: Mukama b̯uyeeraga, yeeraga byabiribiri, kiragaanu kye kiisana feeza gi̱sengeeje ha kyoto mirundi musanju.
12.7: Ai̱ Mukama , otulindenge biro byensei̱, otujune bantu ba mu̱hi̱hi̱ gugu.
12.8: Babiibi basaaseeni̱ hensei̱, ki̱heeri̱ bantu kuhaariiza b̯ubiibi.

13.1: Ai̱ Mukama , olinzebeera ku̱doosya di̱i̱? Oli̱nyeebi̱saho kudwa di̱i̱?
13.2: Ndi̱doosya di̱i̱ kwicala ni̱mpu̱mpu̱u̱ta naakwicala na b̯ujune mu mutima gwange? Munyanzigwa wange ali̱doosya di̱i̱ kwicala naanyeb̯ugiraho?
13.3: Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga wange, nteekerezaho onjune, omulikire aleke ntalaaliranga ki̱mwei̱ nkakwa,
13.4: nikikaha munyanzigwa wange kukoba, “Mmu̱si̱ngwi̱ri̱,” na banyakunnoba nibakasemererwa hab̯wa kulemererwa kwange.
13.5: Bei̱tu̱ nyeesiga mbabazi̱ zaamu, ncala nsemereerwe mu mutima hab̯wakubba wanju̱ni̱ri̱.
13.6: Nkwi̱za ku̱hi̱i̱mi̱ra Mukama , hab̯wakubba onkoleeri̱ birungi binene.

14.1: Mudoma ateekereza naakoba yati, “Ruhanga eicala waahi.” Bantu ba yatyo babba bagwagwa, bakora bikorwa bibiibi, tihalohoona noomwei̱ akora birungi.
14.2: Mukama wa mwiguru waalingiira bantu ba mu nsi, kuwona b̯uhakabbahoona akwetegereza, b̯uhakabbahoona aramya Ruhanga.
14.3: Bensei̱ bahabi̱ri̱, baabba bensei̱ hamwei̱ bagwagwa, tihalohoona noomwei̱ akora kirungi, waahi kadi noomwei̱.
14.4: Zi̱zo nkori̱ za bibii tizigira kwetegereza, bamalaho bantu bange nka bakudya bidyo, tibafaaho kusaba Mukama .
14.5: Bakukankana na b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱, kubba Ruhanga atonganiira mu̱hi̱hi̱ gwa beesigwa.
14.6: Musobora ku̱b̯u̱ru̱ngu̱tani̱a ntegeka za banaku, bei̱tu̱ Mukama abba kujunwa kwab̯u.
14.7: Ee, nyaakwendeerye kujunwa kwʼI̱saleeri̱ kuruge mu Sayu̱u̱ni̱! Mukama aha bantu baamwe mu̱gi̱sa, leka Yakobbo asemererwe, leka I̱saleeri̱ gijaguze.

15.1: Ai̱ Mukama , naani yogwo ali̱goonya mu heema gyamu? Naani aliicala ha lusahu lwamu lu̱syanu̱?
15.2: Yooyo yogwo akora birungi, atali na kakuu, abaza mananu ga ha mutima gwamwe,
15.3: atasi̱i̱ga bei̱ra nzi̱ro kandi atakora bataahi̱ baamwe kubiibi, habbe kuhesa banywani baamwe,
15.4: yooyo yogwo agaya nkori̱ za bibii kandi atamwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa bab̯wo baramya Mukama, yeemeera ku kigambu kyamwe, nab̯ukyabba ni̱ki̱ku̱ru̱mya.
15.5: Yooyo ahora sente zitaloho magoba, atagulwa ku̱zi̱ndi̱ri̱za atali na musangu. Yogwo akora bi̱byo tali na kyati̱i̱na.

16.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, ondinde, hab̯wakubba nyeesiga weewe.
16.2: Nyaaku̱ngi̱ri̱ Mukama ninkoba yati, “Weewe Mukama wange, hali otali tindi na karungi kensei̱.”
16.3: Hab̯wa bantu ba Ruhanga ba mu nsi bali na bi̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, ndi̱basi̱i̱ma,
16.4: bei̱tu̱ b̯ujune ku b̯ujune b̯ulibba hali bakuramya ruhanga wondi, kyonzira kyeibbanga kyab̯u tindi kihonga, habbe kwatula mabara gaab̯u na kanwa kange, tindigeeta.
16.5: Ai̱ Mukama, weewe mutongoole wange, ampa byensei̱ binkwetaaga, weewe oli na byensei̱.
16.6: Nsaru gyeitehe lyange gi̱ndeetera kusemererwa, mu mananu mugab̯u gwange gurungi.
16.7: Nku̱ku̱si̱i̱ma Mukama hab̯wa ku̱zeegesya, kadi habbe i̱jolo mutima gwange gumpa magezi̱.
16.8: Nkyegi̱ri̱, Mukama abba na gya biro byenseenya, hab̯wakubba amba ha mukono gwange gwab̯udyo, ti̱ndi̱ti̱i̱na.
16.9: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, mutima gwange gu̱semereerwe hoi̱ kandi nyaaku̱hi̱i̱mi̱ranga, na mubiri gwange gweicalanga mu b̯u̱si̱nge,
16.10: hab̯wakubba tolindeka kwicala kuzumu, habbe kuleka mutongoole waamu kubbola.
16.11: Ompeeri̱ kwega muhanda gwa b̯womi, kyandeetera kusemererwa mu mei̱so gaamu, na kwesi̱i̱ma biro byensei̱.

17.1: Ai̱ Mukama , weegwa kusaba kwange kwa mananu, otege ipokopo weetegeerye kukunga kwange, kutalimwo b̯u̱gobya.
17.2: Oncweremwona, aleke mei̱so gaamu gaawone mananu!
17.3: Mutima gwange ogwegi̱ri̱, nab̯u̱wei̱zanga i̱jolo, okandenga, tolinzagya na nsobi̱, nyeeheeri̱yo b̯utabaza b̯u̱gobya.
17.4: Nka ngesu za bantu kuzibba, ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha bigambu byamu, tinkanyaganga muntu wondi.
17.5: Biro byenseenya mpondera biragiro byamu, tinkahugukanga.
17.6: Nkunga weewe, ai̱ Ruhanga, hab̯wakubba weewe onzi̱ramwo, tega ipokopo weegwe bigambu byange.
17.7: Ndagiira mahanu ga mbabazi̱ zaamu, we ajuna bei̱ru̱ka hali we kwejuna banyanzigwa baab̯u.
17.8: Ondindenge nka mboni̱ gya li̱i̱so lyamu, ombumbenge mu ki̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ kya bimpaha byo,
17.9: onjune babiibi bandu̱mba, hali banyanzigwa bangoti̱ri̱ ku̱nzi̱ta.
17.10: Tibagira kisa mu mitima myab̯u, babaza bigambu bya kwehemba.
17.11: Baronzi̱ri̱ lugere lwange, hataati̱ bangoti̱ri̱, mei̱so gaab̯u gali ha kunguma hansi.
17.12: Akwisana ntali gikuraka b̯u̱raki̱ kutaagura, nka mwana gwa ntali gu̱laali̱ri̱i̱ri̱ mu kisaka.
17.13: Ai̱ Mukama , byoka! Omu̱ru̱mbe, omukwate! Oncungure na mpirima gyamu hali mubiibi,
17.14: ai̱ Mukama, onjune na ngalu gyamu hali babiibi, hali babiibi ba mu nsi bateekerereza mu b̯womi b̯wa gigi nsi. Nda zaab̯u zaahukanga na mukyenu gu̱bababi̱ki̱i̱ri̱, baana baab̯u baazi̱mbanga nda, kifubiro ki̱kyo baakilekeranga beezukulu baab̯u.
17.15: Bei̱tu̱ gya, atali na musangu mu mei̱so gaamu, ndikuwonaho, b̯u̱ndi̱kasi̱si̱mu̱ka nkakuwonaho ndisemererwa.

18.1: Ai̱ Mukama , ka nnkwendya! Weewe maani gange.
18.2: Mukama weewe lubbaali lwange, lugo lwange, kandi Mu̱ju̱ni̱ wange, Ruhanga wange yooyo b̯wingira b̯wange hali nzi̱ru̱ki̱ra, ngab̯u gyange kandi b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wange, andwaniira.
18.3: Nkunga weewe Mukama, asemereeri̱ kuhaariizwa, anjuna banyanzigwa bange.
18.4: Nyaali mbohaboheerye miguha mya lu̱ku̱u̱, nku̱taku̱ti̱i̱rwe bijanga byaku̱nzi̱kya b̯u̱zi̱kya,
18.5: miguha mya kuzumu mi̱nzi̱ngazi̱ngi̱ri̱, mitegu mya lu̱ku̱u̱ mi̱nkweti̱.
18.6: Mu kuwonawona kwange, nyaaku̱ngi̱ri̱ Mukama, nyeesengereerya Ruhanga wange anjuna. Yeegwi̱ri̱ iraka lyange mu Yeekaru gyamwe, yeegwa kusaba kwange.
18.7: Mwomwo nsi gyakankana kandi gyazi̱ngi̱zi̱ka, na mi̱si̱nge mya nsahu myakaruka kandi myatengeeta hab̯wa ki̱ni̱ga kyamwe.
18.8: Mwi̱ca gwatu̱u̱ki̱ri̱ kuruga mu nni̱ndo gyamwe, na mworo gu̱kwokya gwaruga mu mu̱nwa gwamwe, makala gagegeeri̱ b̯u̱gegeeri̱ gaacuumuuka kuruga hali yo.
18.9: Yaani̱i̱nu̱ki̱ri̱ iguru yei̱za hansi, nti̱ti̱ gi̱kwati̱i̱ri̱ ki̱mwei̱ hansi wa magulu gaamwe.
18.10: Yaani̱i̱ni̱ri̱ malayika keru̱bbi̱ yaadu̱du̱u̱ka, yei̱za b̯wangu ha bimpaha bya mpehu.
18.11: Yaakora nti̱ti̱ gyamubbumba, yeeweeka hensei̱ bikaka biguma ndagali̱.
18.12: Kuruga mu kyererezi̱ kinyakubba mu mei̱so gaamwe, hei̱zi̱ri̱ho bikaka byamwe biwa makala ga mworo na ndagali̱ giwa mahi̱ga.
18.13: Mukama yaabbwatu̱ki̱ri̱ mwiguru, Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱ yaahu̱lu̱kya iraka lye, lyaguma ndagali̱ giwa mahi̱ga na makala ga mworo.
18.14: Yaalasa mbasi zaamwe, yaasaasaani̱a banyanzigwa baamwe, yaabbwatula nkuba gyabasaraani̱a.
18.15: Mwomwo bi̱longi̱ro byeitaka byab̯u̱ku̱li̱i̱rwe, na mi̱si̱nge mya nsi myasigala hasyanu̱, ai̱ Mukama hab̯wa rwami̱ryo lwamu, na hab̯wa ki̱ni̱ga kya rwoya lwamu.
18.16: Mukama, wa heiguru, yei̱zi̱ri̱ hansi yanjuna, yansika mu meezi̱ galei.
18.17: Yanju̱ni̱ri̱ munyanzigwa wange munyamaani na bab̯wo banyakunnoba, hab̯wakubba baali nibakunkira maani.
18.18: Bandu̱mbi̱ri̱ mu kasu̱mi̱ ka b̯ujune, bei̱tu̱ Mukama yandwani̱ri̱i̱ri̱.
18.19: Yanju̱ni̱ri̱ yantwala hagali, yaancungura nikuli ku̱nsi̱i̱ma.
18.20: Mukama yampeeri̱ mpeera gya mananu gange, yampa mu̱gi̱sa hab̯wa b̯utabba na musangu.
18.21: Hab̯wakubba mpondera mihanda mya Mukama , timpuguka kuruga hali Ruhanga wange.
18.22: Hab̯wakubba biragiro byamwe byensei̱ mbyegi̱ri̱, na mateeka gaamwe tinkagasuulanga.
18.23: Tingira kakuu kensei̱ mu mei̱so gaamwe, nyeerinda kubba na musangu mu mutima gwange.
18.24: Nahab̯waki̱kyo Mukama ampeeri̱ mpeera hab̯wa mananu gange, hab̯wakubba ngalu zange zi̱syanu̱ mu mei̱so gaamwe.
18.25: Obba wambabazi̱ hali ali na mbabazi̱, obba mu̱terekereru̱ hali ali mu̱terekereru̱,
18.26: hali ali na mitima gu̱syanu̱, b̯wolokya mutima gu̱syanu̱, bei̱tu̱ obba munyanzigwa wa nkori̱ gya bibii.
18.27: Hab̯wakubba ojuna batali na myehembu, bei̱tu̱ banyamyepanku obeerya hansi.
18.28: Hab̯wakubba weewe kyererezi̱ kya taara kyange, Mukama Ruhanga wange oleeta kyererezi̱ kumalaho nti̱ti̱.
18.29: Hab̯wa maani gaamu nkusobora ku̱ru̱mba i̱he, na hab̯wa Ruhanga wange nkusobora ku̱gu̱su̱ka ki̱si̱i̱ka kya banyanzigwa.
18.30: Bei̱tu̱ yo Ruhanga, abba wa mihanda mi̱terekereru̱, kigambu kya Mukama kiicala kyesigwa. Yooyo ngab̯u gya bab̯wo bensei̱ bamwesiga.
18.31: Mukama yooyo Ruhanga yankei, kandi Ruhanga yankei, yooyo atulwaniira.
18.32: Yooyo Ruhanga antamwo maani, aterekereerya mihanda myange.
18.33: Yaahangi̱ri̱ magulu gange nka ga mparaaki, yampa kwemeera hakyendi̱ wa lusahu.
18.34: Atendeka ngalu zange kulwana, na mikono myange kureega b̯uta b̯wa kyoma.
18.35: Ompa ngab̯u gya kujunwa kwamu, onsagika na mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo, nompa kubba wa maani.
18.36: Ongali̱hi̱ri̱i̱rye muhanda hanyaaraba, aleke magulu gange gatatereb̯uka.
18.37: Nzi̱ru̱u̱kya banyanzigwa bange nimbakwata, ti̱nzi̱ra i̱nyu̱ma ku̱doosya b̯umbamaliraho ki̱mwei̱.
18.38: Mbakuutira ki̱mwei̱ aleke batabyoka, bagwa nibalaala hansi mu magulu gange.
18.39: Ompa maani ga kulwana, okuutira ki̱mwei̱ bandu̱mba noobamalaho.
18.40: Oha banyanzigwa bange ku̱nzi̱ru̱ka, na bannoba mbakuuta ni̱mbazi̱kya.
18.41: Beesengereerye babajune, bei̱tu̱ hatakabbeho aku̱bei̱ramwo, baateeri̱ho na kusaba Mukama abacungure, bei̱tu̱ atakabajune.
18.42: Mbakuuta nimbafoora icuucu litwalwa mpehu, nimbazigazigina nka bitogodo mu muhanda.
18.43: Oncu̱ngwi̱ri̱ hali bantu bandu̱mba, wanfoora mwebemberi̱ wa mahanga, bantu banteegi̱ri̱ bampeerezanga.
18.44: B̯u̱baakanzegwanga baaku̱ndanga malu̱ nibantamwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, Banyamahanga bangonderanga.
18.45: Bakwatwa b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱, nibaruga mu bigo byab̯u nibakukankana.
18.46: Mukama mwomi! Asi̱i̱mwe lubbaali lwange! Ahaariizwe Ruhanga Mu̱ju̱ni̱ wange!
18.47: Yooyo Ruhanga ahoora nzi̱go hab̯wange, ampa kufuga mahanga,
18.48: anjuna hali banyanzigwa bange. Kwokwo ontu̱mbwi̱ri̱ hali banyaku̱ndwani̱sya, oju̱ni̱ri̱ kuruga hali bantu beetagu̱.
18.49: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, ai̱ Mukama , nyaaku̱si̱i̱manga mu mahanga, nyaahi̱i̱manga nimpaariiza ibara lyamu.
18.50: Ruhanga aha mukama mutongoole waamwe ku̱si̱ngu̱ra ntaru zinene, abba wa ngonzi zinene hali yo, hali Dau̱di̱, na ba mu lula lwamwe, biro na biro.

19.1: Iguru kalitenda ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya Ruhanga! Bya mu mwanya kabi̱tebya byakora.
19.2: B̯uli kiro ki̱tebeerya kiro ki̱i̱ra ha ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya Ruhanga, kandi i̱jolo li̱mwei̱ lyegesya i̱jolo lindi kubba na magezi̱.
19.3: Tihaloho lubazu habbe lulimi, hali iraka lyab̯u li̱tadoori̱.
19.4: Iraka lyab̯u li̱rarangi̱ri̱ hensei̱, bigambu byab̯u bi̱doori̱ ha nsaru za nsi. Heema gya lyoba Ruhanga yaagi̱teeri̱ mwiguru,
19.5: nka mugole kwahuluka mu ki̱si̱i̱ka kyamwe, nka mu̱ku̱gu̱ wa mbiro akugyenda ha mpaka.
19.6: Lyoba lihuluka mwiguru ha rubaju lu̱mwei̱ nilirabayo niligwa ha rubaju lundi. Tihaloho kitadweb̯wa kingeere kya lyo.
19.7: Biragiro bya Mukama biicala bi̱terekereru̱, bi̱hu̱u̱mu̱u̱lya mutima, bigambu bya Mukama bibba bya mananu, bileetera mpwi̱se magezi̱,
19.8: ndagiiro za Mukama zibba zirungi, zileetera mutima kusemererwa, biragiro bya Mukama byabiribiri, bimulikira mei̱so,
19.9: ku̱ti̱i̱na Mukama ki̱doori̱, kyakwicalaho biro na biro, micwere mya Mukama mibba mya mananu, kandi myenseenya myab̯winganiza.
19.10: Byakwegomba kukira na zaabbu, na kukira zaabbu gi̱sengeeje ginene, binuliira kukira na b̯uhooki na kukiraho manyondo gaab̯wo.
19.11: Kukira maani byobyo bihab̯ura muheereza waamu, mu kubihondera halimwo mpeera ginyamaani.
19.12: Naani yaakusobora kwetegereza nsobi̱ za mutima gwamwe? Nganyira bibii bi̱nyaakoori̱ mub̯uteega.
19.13: Otandeka, gya muheereza waamu kukora bibii mbi̱gyendereeri̱. Oteikiriza nibikanfuga. B̯u̱b̯wo mwomwo ndibba ntakujunaanwa kandi ntali na musangu gunyamaani hoi̱.
19.14: Ikirizanga bigambu byange na biteekerezu byange, ai̱ Mukama, Lubbaali lwange kandi Mu̱cu̱ngu̱ri̱ wange.

20.1: Mukama yei̱rangamwo kusaba kwamu mu biro bya b̯ujune! Ibara lya Ruhanga wa Yakobbo likulindenge!
20.2: Yaakutumiranga kujunwa kuruga mu kiikaru kyamwe ki̱syanu̱ na b̯u̱sagi̱ki̱ kuruga Sayu̱u̱ni̱.
20.3: Yei̱zu̱kanga bisembu byamu byensei̱ byomuhongera kandi yeikirizanga byonzira byamu byokye.
20.4: Yaakuhanga bya mutima gwamu gu̱byendya naakuteeraho ku̱si̱ngu̱ra mu ntegeka zaamu zensei̱.
20.5: B̯u̱wakasi̱ngu̱ranga twasemererwanga nitubyokya bbendera zikuhaariiza ibara lya Ruhanga weetu̱. Mukama yei̱rangamwo kusaba kwamu kwensei̱.
20.6: Hataati̱ nkyegi̱ri̱ nti Mukama ajuna mutongoole waamwe, ei̱ramwo kusaba kwamwe na mwiguru lyamwe li̱syanu̱, naamujuna na mukono gwamwe gwab̯udyo gwa maani.
20.7: Bamwei̱ beesiga ku̱lwani̱sya bigaali na bandi beesiga mbaraasi, bei̱tu̱ twe twesiga ibara lya Mukama Ruhanga weetu̱.
20.8: Baagwanga nibahwerekeera, bei̱tu̱ twe twasi̱ngu̱ranga nitwemeera nituli beesi̱mbu̱.
20.9: Ai̱ Mukama, ikiriza mukama asi̱nge! B̯utwakakusabanga otwi̱rengemwo.

21.1: Ai̱ Mukama , mu maani gaamu hooho mu̱lemi̱ yeegondezeeremwo kandi asi̱i̱mi̱ra ki̱mwei̱ kujunwa kwamu!
21.2: Omu̱heeri̱ kya mutima gwamwe gwendya na kusaba kwamwe okwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo.
21.3: Omutangiira na mi̱gi̱sa minene noomutaho kondo girungi gya zaabbu ha mu̱twe.
21.4: Yaaku̱sabi̱ri̱ b̯womi, waab̯umuha, waataho yoomeere biro binene.
21.5: Hab̯wa ku̱si̱ngu̱ra kwamu, abbeeri̱ na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kinene hoi̱, omu̱heeri̱ kutumbuka na b̯u̱handu̱.
21.6: Mu mananu omu̱heeri̱ mi̱gi̱sa mitamalika na kusemererwa mu mei̱so gaamu.
21.7: Hab̯wakubba yogwo mu̱lemi̱ yeesiga Mukama , kandi ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha mbabazi̱ zinene za yogwo Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱ talibba na kyali̱ti̱i̱na.
21.8: Ohamba banyanzigwa baamu bensei̱, mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo gukwata bab̯wo bakunoba.
21.9: Mu kwi̱za kwamu, balihya nibagegeera nka kikoomi. Mu ki̱ni̱ga kyamwe Mukama akwi̱za ku̱bazi̱kya, kandi mworo gwamwe gu̱kwi̱za ku̱basi̱dya.
21.10: Okwi̱za kumalaho mu̱gi̱ gwab̯u gwensei̱ ku nsi, na beizukulu bazi̱ki̱re ki̱mwei̱ mu bantu.
21.11: Nab̯u̱baku̱zi̱di̱ri̱zanga na kukutega mitegu, tibali ku̱si̱ngu̱ra,
21.12: hab̯wakubba balihinduka ni̱bei̱ru̱ka b̯woli̱kabali̱ngi̱ri̱i̱rya mbasi zaamu.
21.13: Ohaariizib̯wenge, ai̱ Mukama, hab̯wa maani gaamu, twaku̱hi̱i̱mi̱ranga nitutenda b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wamu.

22.1: Ruhanga wange, Ruhanga wange, hab̯waki ondekereeri̱? Hab̯waki ondi hadei mwa kunjuna, hadei kwo hali kulira kwange?
22.2: Ai̱ Ruhanga wange, ka nnkusaba mwihangwe, bei̱tu̱ tonzi̱ramwo, nei̱jolo, bei̱tu̱ nyeezegwa ntali na b̯u̱si̱nge.
22.3: Bei̱tu̱ nab̯wo oicala mu̱syanu̱ mutima, oi̱cali̱i̱ri̱ mu ntebe gyamu I̱saleeri̱ nigikukutenda.
22.4: Weewe bahaaha beetu̱ gi̱beesi̱gengi̱, baakwesi̱gengi̱, kandi noobacungura.
22.5: Baakwesengereryenge kandi noobajuna, weewe gi̱beesi̱gengi̱ batakuswara.
22.6: Nagya ndi muntu kyani? Ndi nka muniongooro! Gyagya alu̱mwa b̯uli muntu kandi agaywa bantu bensei̱.
22.7: Bantu bensei̱ bambona, bansekereerya b̯u̱sekereerya, banuga b̯u̱nu̱gi̱, ni̱bazi̱gi̱i̱zya mi̱twe myab̯u nibakoba yati,
22.8: “Yeesiga Mukama, kale nu Mukama ei̱ze amucungure, ei̱ze amujune, hab̯wakubba yooyo giyeegondezeeramwo.”
22.9: B̯u̱b̯wo nu wantoori̱ mu nda gya mmaama, wandinda na heibiiri lya mmaama.
22.10: Nyeesiga weewe kuruga nimbyalwa, kuruga ninduga mu nda gya mmaama weewe oli Ruhanga wange.
22.11: Otandugaho, hab̯wakubba hali̱yo b̯ujune b̯u̱kwi̱za, kandi tihalohoona alib̯unjuna.
22.12: Banyanzigwa bange banene banyeelogoleerye, nka nnumi zinyamaani za Bbasaani̱ bangoti̱ri̱ hensei̱,
22.13: bab̯u̱u̱li̱ri̱ mi̱nwa, nka ntali zikuruutaruuta kandi zikuhuruguma.
22.14: Nnekaneki̱ri̱ nkaaku̱u̱ti̱rwe, na maku̱ha gange gateesu̱ki̱ri̱, mutima gwange nka bisasala, nkwegwa nigukwaga mu salaka,
22.15: mimiro myange myomi̱ri̱ nka lutaana, kandi lulimi lwange lwomi̱ri̱ mu b̯unkudankuda, ondeki̱ri̱ nkwere mu cuucu.
22.16: Kubba kitebe kya nkori̱ za bibii ki̱ngoti̱ri̱, nka mbwene zi̱nyeelogoleerye, bantu̱u̱ti̱ri̱ magulu na ngalu.
22.17: Maku̱ha gange gensei̱ gakwebala, bakumbona nibeeb̯uga.
22.18: Babageeni̱ bilwalu byange na ngoye zange bazikuutira karu̱ru̱.
22.19: Bei̱tu̱ we, ai̱ Mukama, otandugahoona! Ai̱ weewe onjuna, i̱za b̯wangu onjune!
22.20: Njuna hali mpirima, ocungure b̯womi b̯wange hali maani ga zi̱zo mbwene!
22.21: Njuna ontoole mu mu̱nwa gwa ntali! Kwokwo onsi̱ki̱ri̱ kuruga mu mahembe ga mpeta!
22.22: Nyaaweeranga bei̱ra bange byeibara lyamu, nyaakuhaariizanga mu bab̯wo beecooki̱ri̱.
22.23: Nywe batamwo Mukama ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze! Nywe baana bensei̱ ba Yakobbo mu̱mu̱tende, mu̱mu̱ti̱i̱ne, baana Bei̱saleeri̱ nywensei̱!
22.24: Hab̯wakubba Mukama tagaya kandi tanuga b̯ujune b̯wa yogwo akuwonawona, kandi tamuhemukira, bei̱tu̱ ei̱ramwona kusaba kwamwe.
22.25: Nyaakuhaariizanga Mukama, mu kitebe kya banene, mu mei̱so ga bab̯wo baku̱ti̱i̱na nyaadoosereeryanga kwehayo kwange.
22.26: Banaku baadyanga nibeicuta, bab̯wo bamu̱toolya baahaariizanga Mukama! Mitima myenyu̱ myasemererwanga biro na biro.
22.27: Bantu ba nsonda zensei̱ za nsi bei̱zu̱kanga nibahondera Mukama, na maka gensei̱ mu mahanga gaali̱i̱za mu mei̱so gaamu ku̱ramya.
22.28: Hab̯wakubba Mukama yooyo alema, kandi yooyo afuga mahanga gensei̱.
22.29: Bagu̱u̱da bensei̱ ba mu nsi badyenge kandi baramyenge Mukama, bensei̱ ba hansi baliinama, bensei̱ batakusobora kwejuna ku̱kwa mmaliiro gyab̯u gilibba nka cuucu.
22.30: Baana balikabyalwa balimuheereza, baliguweera mu̱hi̱hi̱ gwa mei̱so bya Mukama.
22.31: Mananu gaamwe bali̱gatebereerya bab̯wo batakabyali̱i̱rwe, nti “ Mukama yooyo yaaju̱ni̱ri̱ bantu baamwe.”

23.2: Antwala mwi̱li̱si̱i̱ryo lirungi, anyeebembera ha meezi̱ gateeku̱.
23.3: Ampu̱mu̱u̱lya mutima, anterekereerya mu mihanda mya mananu, hab̯wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyeibara lyamwe.
23.4: Nab̯undiraba mu kihanga kya lu̱ku̱u̱, ti̱ndi̱ti̱i̱na kabii kensei̱, hab̯wakubba oli hamwei̱ nagya, mubbeere gwamu na mpalu gyamu, byobyo bi̱mpu̱mu̱u̱lya.
23.5: Onsegeerya kiihuru mu mei̱so ga banyanzigwa bange, onsi̱i̱ga maku̱ta ku mu̱twe, ki̱kopo kyange tikikalemwanga kyakunywa.
23.6: Mu mananu b̯urungi na mbabazi̱ zaamu byamponderanga biro byange byensei̱, kandi nyeicalanga mu nnyu̱mba gya Mukama biro na biro.

24.1: Nsi na bilimwo byensei̱ bya Mukama, nsi na bantu bensei̱ bagicalamwo byamwe,
24.2: hab̯wakubba yaagi̱teeri̱ ku meezi̱ yaagi̱bi̱mba ha mi̱si̱nge mya mataka gakooto.
24.3: Naani alitemba hakyendi̱ ku lusahu lwa Mukama? Kandi naani alyemeera mu kiikaru kyamwe ki̱syanu̱?
24.4: Yooyo yogwo ali na ngalu zi̱syanu̱ na mutima gu̱syanu̱, wa mutima gutalimwo b̯u̱gobya kandi atarahira bitalimwo.
24.5: Yooyo wa Mukama aliha mu̱gi̱sa kandi atalijunaanwa Ruhanga Mu̱ju̱ni̱ waamwe.
24.6: Kwokwo balibba ba mu̱hi̱hi̱ gu̱gwo bamu̱toolya, bendya kuwona ku Ruhanga wa Yakobbo.
24.7: Nywe malembo, mu̱ki̱ngu̱ke! Kandi nywe nzi̱je za kadei i̱ju̱lu̱ke, aleke mukama wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa eingire.
24.8: Naani yogo ali mukama wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa? Yooyo Mukama ali na maani na b̯u̱sobozi̱, Mukama wa b̯u̱sobozi̱ mu kulwana ntaru.
24.9: Nywe malembo, mu̱ki̱ngu̱ke! Kandi nywe nzi̱je za kadei i̱ju̱lu̱ke, aleke mukama wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa eingire.
24.10: Mukama wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa yogwo yooyo naani? Mukama wa mahe, yooyo Mukama wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.

25.1: Hali weewe, Ai̱ Mukama , nku̱hayo mutima gwange.
25.2: Ai̱ Ruhanga wange, weewe ginyeesiga, otandekanga kubba kyamuswaru, oteikiriza banyanzigwa bange kunyeeb̯ugiraho.
25.3: Mu mananu tihaloho akwesiga alikwatwa nsoni̱, bei̱tu̱ baliswara bab̯wo bendya kukora bibiibi.
25.4: Ai̱ Mukama , ndagiira makuute gaamu, onzegesya kwetegereza mihanda myamu.
25.5: Nzegesye, onyeetegeresesye mananu gaamu, hab̯wakubba weewe Ruhanga anjuna, weewe ginyeesiga biro byensei̱.
25.6: Ai̱ Mukama , i̱zu̱ka kisa kyamu na ngonzi zaamu zinene, hab̯wakubba za biro bya kadei.
25.7: B̯webeera bibii bya b̯usigazi b̯wange na ngesu zange za b̯u̱jeemu̱, onzi̱zu̱kenge, ai̱ Mukama, hab̯wa ngonzi zaamu zinene na b̯urungi b̯wamu!
25.8: Mukama murungi kandi wa mananu, kyokyo yeebembera babiibi mu muhanda gwamwe.
25.9: Aterekereerya bakweb̯undaza mu kukora birungi, naabeegesya kuhondera mihanda myamwe.
25.10: Mihanda myensei̱ mya Mukama mibbamwona ngonzi zinene na mananu, hali bab̯wo bahondere ndagaanu gyamwe na bigambu byamwe.
25.11: Ai̱ Mukama, ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra heibara lyamu, nganyira bibii byange, hab̯wakubba binene.
25.12: Yogwo atamwona Mukama ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa yo alahi yo? Yooyo wa Mukama giyaahab̯uranga muhanda gwakuhondera.
25.13: Yooyo wa mwozo gwamwe guliicala mu b̯u̱si̱nge, kandi baana baamwe baligweterwa nsi.
25.14: Mukama anywana bab̯wo bamutamwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, kandi abaha kwega bya mu ndagaanu gyamwe.
25.15: Mei̱so gange geicalanga hali Mukama, hab̯wakubba anjuna ku̱gwa mu mutegu.
25.16: Nnzi̱raho, ai̱ Mukama, ongiire mbabazi̱, hab̯wakubba ndi mu b̯u̱ru̱mi̱ kandi ndi hahwo nyankei.
25.17: Bizib̯u byange bi̱kanyi̱ri̱, njuna bi̱byo bintuntwi̱ze mutima.
25.18: Taho mutima ku b̯u̱ru̱mi̱ b̯wange na bizib̯u byange, onganyire bibii byange byensei̱.
25.19: Wona banyanzigwa bange nka kubali banene, kandi nka ku̱bannobi̱ri̱ hoi̱.
25.20: Ndinda kandi oncungure, otampa kuswara, hab̯wakubba nyeesiga weewe.
25.21: Leka b̯urungi na mananu bindindenge, hab̯wakubba nyeesiga weewe.
25.22: Ai̱ Ruhanga, cungura I̱saleeri̱ hali bizib̯u byamwe byensei̱!

26.1: Ai̱ Mukama , ntonganiira, hab̯wakubba nkora bi̱doori̱, nnyeesiga Mukama , ntali na bicwocwo.
26.2: Ai̱ Mukama , mbona, ondenge, ogezesye mutima na biteekerezu byange.
26.3: Hab̯wakubba ngonzi zaamu zinene ziicala na gya, kandi ndibatira mu b̯wesigwa b̯wamu.
26.4: Ncaara kwahi na bantu ba nkwe, rundi kukoragana na ngobya.
26.5: Nnoba byecooka bya nkori̱ za bibii, kandi tindicaara na babiibi.
26.6: Ai̱ Mukama , nnaaba ngalu zange kwolokya kuntali na musangu, kandi ndami̱i̱rya heihongo lyamu,
26.7: mpi̱i̱ma na maani kyembu kyaku̱ku̱si̱i̱ma, ninyaatula byamahanu byokoori̱.
26.8: Ai̱ Mukama, nyeegomba nnyu̱mba gyoicalamu, cali ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamu kiicalira.
26.9: Otampwerekereerya na babiibi, b̯womi b̯wange okab̯utwalirana na badulu bali na nnyoota gyeibbanga,
26.10: bantu beicala nibakora bibii kandi bakwata bya ngu̱zi̱.
26.11: Bei̱tu̱ gya, nnkora bi̱nyeegi̱ri̱ kubba birungi, oncungure kandi onkwatirwa kisa.
26.12: Magulu gange gemereeri̱ heetendeku̱, mu kitebe kya bantu baamu nyaahaariizanga Mukama.

27.1: Mukama yooyo kyererezi̱ na kujunwa kwange, naani yogwo gi̱ndi̱ti̱i̱na? Mukama yooyo maani ga b̯womi b̯wange, naani ali̱nkankani̱a?
27.2: Babiibi b̯u̱bali̱ndu̱mba, kuntaagura, banyanzigwa bange na bannoba, balikibbala nibagwa.
27.3: Kadi i̱he b̯ulilingota, mutima gwange ti̱gu̱li̱ti̱i̱na, kadi b̯ulibba b̯wemi̱, nab̯wo ndibba mutatiro.
27.4: Kintu ki̱mwei̱ kinsaba Mukama, kinyaatoolyanga, ncaare mu nnyu̱mba gya Mukama, biro bya b̯womi b̯wange b̯wensei̱, mbone b̯urungi b̯wamwe, mpumulire mu Yeekaru nnyu̱mba gyamwe.
27.5: Mu biro bya b̯ujune, alimbumba na mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ gwa heema gyamwe, ali̱mbi̱sa mu heema gyamwe, kandi antembye ha lubbaali.
27.6: Mwomwo ndyeb̯ugira banyanzigwa bangoti̱ri̱, kandi mu heema gyamwe nyaahongangamwo kihongwa na kusemererwa kunene, nkwi̱za ku̱hi̱i̱ma nimpaariiza Mukama.
27.7: Nzegwa, ai̱ Mukama b̯unkukunga na maani, Mmbeera wa kisa, onzi̱remwo.
27.8: Okobi̱ri̱ yati, “Toolya mei̱so gange.” Mutima gwange gukuteekereza yati, “Mei̱so gaamu, Mukama, googo nyatoolyanga.”
27.9: Otambumbira mei̱so gaamu, otabinga muheereza waamu hab̯wa ki̱ni̱ga, oi̱ceeri̱ nonjuna. Otansuula, otandekeera, Ruhanga Mu̱ju̱ni̱ wange.
27.10: Bbaabba na mmaama nab̯ubakabbanga bandeki̱ri̱, Mukama akwi̱za kuntangiira.
27.11: Ai̱ Mukama, Nzegesya mihanda myamu, ai̱ Mukama , ondi̱batyenge nterekereeri̱ hab̯wa bampi̱gani̱a.
27.12: Otaleka banyanzigwa bange kunkora ku̱bakwendya, kubba bakei̱so ba b̯u̱gobya bambyokeeri̱, bali na b̯wemi̱ b̯unene.
27.13: Nkwikiriza nti nkwi̱za kuwona b̯urungi b̯wa Mukama mu nsi gya boomi.
27.14: Lindiira Mukama, bba wa maani otatiire, olindiire Mukama .

28.1: Ai̱ Mukama , weewe ginkunga, lubbaali lwange nzengwa! Waketeekeera, nkubba nka bab̯wo bagwi̱ri̱ mu b̯u̱hya.
28.2: Weegwa, nkukusaba na mbabazi̱, nkukweta onjune, mbyokeerye mikono myange mu Kiikaru kyamu ki̱syanu̱.
28.3: Otancwera musangu hamwei̱ na babiibi, na nkori̱ za bibii, babaza kurungi na bataahi̱ baab̯u bei̱tu̱ mu mitima myab̯u nibabatekerezaho b̯ubiibi.
28.4: Bahe mpeera gya bikorwa byab̯u, obahe na mpeera gya bibii byab̯u, obahe bya mikono myab̯u mi̱koori̱ obasasule bi̱basemereeri̱.
28.5: Hab̯wakubba tibatamwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa milimo mya Mukama na bya mikono myamwe mi̱koori̱, akwi̱za kubaswaswana, kandi abamalireho ki̱mwei̱.
28.6: Mukama ahaariizwe, kubba yeegwa kusaba kwange kwa mbabazi̱.
28.7: Mukama googo maani na ngab̯u gyange, mutima gwange gwesiga yooyo, kandi anju̱ni̱ri̱, mutima gwange gu̱semereerwe, nkwi̱za ku̱mu̱si̱i̱ma kandi mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re kyembu.
28.8: Mukama yooyo maani ga bantu baamwe, b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wa kujuna mutongoole waamwe.
28.9: Ai̱ Mukama , juna bantu baamu kandi obahe mu̱gi̱sa, bba mu̱li̱i̱sya waab̯u obawoneere biro byensei̱.

29.1: Mu̱haari̱i̱ze Mukama bihangwa bili mwiguru, mu̱haari̱i̱ze Mukama hab̯wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa na b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wamwe.
29.2: Mu̱haari̱i̱ze ibara lya Mukama lya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, mu̱ramye Mukama mu kiikaru kyamwe ki̱syanu̱.
29.3: Iraka lya Mukama likwatukira mwitaka, Ruhanga wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa abbwatu̱ki̱ri̱, Mukama , yooyo afuga mataka ganene.
29.4: Iraka lya Mukama lya maani, iraka lya Mukama lya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kinene.
29.5: Iraka lya Mukama , libinya mi̱poi̱, Mukama abinya misaali mya Lebbanooni̱.
29.6: Aragira nsahu za Lebbanooni̱ ni̱zi̱gu̱su̱ka nka kusemererwa kwa nnyana na lusahu lwa Si̱ryoni̱ ku̱gu̱su̱ka nka nnumi gito.
29.8: Iraka lya, Mukama li̱zi̱ngi̱i̱zya ihamba, Mukama azi̱ngi̱i̱zya nsi gya ihamba lya Kadesi̱.
29.9: Iraka lya Mukama li̱byali̱sya bbwoya, li̱halangu̱li̱i̱rya bibira, kandi mu Yeekaaru̱ gyamwe bintu byensei̱ bilira yati, “Ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kibbe hali Mukama !”
29.10: Mukama eicaara ha kitebe kyamwe hakyendi̱ kulema meezi̱ ga mwizulo, Mukama ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ ha kitebe kyamwe kulema biro na biro.
29.11: Mukama yaahanga bantu baamwe maani, Mukama yaabahanga mu̱gi̱sa na b̯u̱si̱nge!

30.1: Ai̱ Mukama , nkwi̱za kukuhaariiza kubba wantoori̱ mu ki̱i̱na kilei, otakeikirize banyanzigwa bange kunyeeb̯ugiraho.
30.2: Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga wange, nyaaku̱li̱ri̱i̱ri̱ onjune kandi wamponeerye.
30.3: Ai̱ Mukama , wantoori̱ kuzumu, wanjuna ku̱gwa mu ki̱i̱na.
30.4: Mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Mukama nywe bantu ba Ruhanga, mu̱si̱i̱me ibara lyamwe li̱syanu̱.
30.5: Kubba akwatwa ki̱ni̱ga hab̯wa b̯wi̱re b̯u̱dooli̱, kisa kyamwe kiicalaho biro byensei̱, kulira b̯u̱kwi̱za i̱jolo, mwakya ni̱hei̱zaho kusemererwa.
30.6: B̯u̱nyeezegwi̱ri̱ nindi na b̯u̱li̱ndi̱, nyaakoba yati, “Ti̱nkwi̱za kutengeeta.”
30.7: Ai̱ Mukama, hab̯wa kisa kyamu, wantati̱i̱rye nka lusahu lunyamaani, hei̱nyu̱ma weebi̱sa, nyaatuntura.
30.8: Weewe Mukama, gi̱nyaali̱ri̱ri̱i̱ri̱, kandi hali Mukama nyaasabi̱ri̱ kisa,
30.9: “Kyamugasu ki b̯u̱ndi̱kakwa nkagyenda kuzumu? Icuucu lyakusobora kukuhaariiza? Lyakusobora kurangiira b̯wesigwa b̯wamu?
30.10: Ai̱ Mukama , weegwa kandi ongiire kisa! Ai̱ Mukama , bbanga Mu̱ju̱ni̱ wange!”
30.11: Kizabiro kyange waaki̱fori̱ri̱ mbi̱nya, wankusula bisensede, wandwalya kusemererwa,
30.12: aleke mutima gwange gukuhaariizenge, gu̱talyeti̱keera, ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga wange, nyaku̱si̱i̱manga biro byensei̱.

31.1: Ai̱ Mukama mu weewe, hooho nzi̱ru̱ki̱i̱ri̱, otandeka nkaswara, onjune hab̯wa mananu gaamu.
31.2: Ntegera mapokopo gaamu, onjune b̯wangu! Mbeera lubbaali lwa kwebi̱si̱ramwo, obbe lugo lunyamaani lwa kunjuna.
31.3: Bba lubbaali lwange kandi lugo lwange, kandi hab̯wa ibara lyamu onyeebembera nonterekereerya.
31.4: Nzahuura mitegu mi̱bantegi̱ri̱, kubba weewe b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wange.
31.5: Mwozo gwange ngu̱teeri̱ mu ngalu gyamu, ai̱ Mukama , Ruhanga mwesigwa, oncu̱ngwi̱ri̱.
31.6: Nnoba baramya bi̱si̱sani̱ bitali na mugasu, bei̱tu̱ nyeesiga Mukama.
31.7: Nkwi̱za kusemererwa kandi nyeesi̱i̱mi̱re mu ngonzi zaamu zinene, hab̯wakubba oweeni̱ kuwonawona kwange, weeteegereza b̯u̱ru̱mi̱ b̯wa mutima gwange.
31.8: Ompeeri̱yo kwahi mu mikono mya banyanzigwa bange, bei̱tu̱ oteeri̱ magulu gange mu kiikaru kigali.
31.9: Ai̱ Mukama , nkwatira kisa, hab̯wakubba ndi mu b̯u̱ru̱mi̱ b̯unene, mei̱so gange gampohi̱ri̱ hab̯wa b̯ujune, mutima gwange na mubiri gwange bili na b̯u̱ru̱mi̱.
31.10: B̯womi b̯wange b̯wicala mu b̯ujune, myaka myange mya kuwonawona, maani gammali̱ki̱i̱ri̱ hab̯wa kibii kyange, na maku̱ha gange gaceki̱ri̱.
31.11: Mbeeri̱ kya kugaywa hali bataahi̱ bange, hab̯wa banyanzigwa bange bensei̱, hali banywani bange nyaabba kihemu, bambona mu ngu̱u̱do banzi̱ru̱ka b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱.
31.12: Banzebereeri̱ nka muntu nyaakwi̱ri̱, ndi nka lutaana.
31.13: Nkwegwa banene bakumpangiira, nihaloho ntaru b̯uli nsonda, zi̱bategeki̱ri̱ kunkoraho na rukwe lwa ku̱nzi̱ta.
31.14: Bei̱tu̱ gya nkwesi̱gi̱ri̱ ai̱ Mukama, ndimu kukoba, “Weewe Ruhanga wange.”
31.15: B̯womi wange b̯uli mu mikono myamu, njuna banyanzigwa bange na bab̯wo baku̱mpi̱i̱ga.
31.16: Ngiira kisa gya muheereza waamu, onjune hab̯wa ngonzi zaamu zinene!
31.17: Ai̱ Mukama, otandeka nkaswara, kubba nkukunga weewe, leka babiibi boobo basware, bagoromoke kuzumu mu nsita.
31.18: Leka mi̱nwa mi̱gobya mijale, mikabaza b̯ubiibi hali bamananu, mu̱kwetembya na nkwe.
31.19: Ee, b̯urungi b̯wamu ka b̯unene, b̯wobi̱ki̱i̱ri̱ baku̱ti̱i̱na, kandi bei̱ru̱ki̱ra muli we, baana ba bantu bakyegi̱ri̱ nka kwolinda bab̯wo bakwesiga!
31.20: Weewe mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ gu̱babi̱sa, baataru̱mbwa nkwe za bantu noobeecaalya mu nnyu̱mba gyamu aleke bataterana na ba ngambu.
31.21: Mukama ahaariizwe hab̯wakubba yanzolokeerye mu ngonzi zaamwe zinene bya mahanu b̯u̱nyaaru̱mbi̱i̱rwe mu rub̯uga.
31.22: Nyaaku̱u̱ti̱ri̱ nduulu nyakoba yati, “Ndi hadei nawe ndu̱gi̱ri̱ mu̱mei̱so gaamu.” Bei̱tu̱ weegweri̱ iraka lya kutaaga kwange kwa kisa, b̯u̱nyaku̱li̱ri̱i̱ri̱ ni̱nkwendya onjune.
