31.23: Mwendye Mukama , nywensei̱ bantu baamwe! Mukama alinda beesigwa, bei̱tu̱ naahoora bab̯wo beetembya.
31.24: Mu̱bbe bamaani, mu̱tati̱i̱re mitima, nywensei̱ bali̱ndi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ Mukama !

32.1: Ali na mu̱gi̱sa aganyirwa nsobi̱ zaamwe, wa Ruhanga asu̱swi̱ri̱ bibii byamwe.
32.2: Ali na mu̱gi̱sa yogwo wa Mukama atajunaana kibii, wa mwozo gwamwe gutali na b̯u̱gobya.
32.3: Kubba b̯u̱nyaswi̱ri̱ kwatula bibii byange, mubiri gwange gwensei̱ gwamali̱ki̱ri̱mwo maani, hab̯wa kwicala nindira kiro kyensei̱.
32.4: Wanfu̱bi̱renge i̱jolo na mwinsi, maani gammali̱ki̱ri̱i̱ri̱ nka lu̱me lwomi̱ri̱ na kyanda.
32.5: Nyaaku̱wereeri̱ kibii kyange, ntakaku̱bi̱se b̯ubiibi b̯wange, nyaakoba nti, “Nkwatu̱li̱i̱ri̱ nsobi̱ zange, Mukama ,” kandi wanganyira musangu gwa kibii kyange.
32.6: Nahab̯waki̱kyo b̯uli ali na b̯waruhanga, akusabenge nookyakazooka, mananu nab̯uhalibbaho mwizulo gunene, tigulimudwereera.
32.7: Kubba weewe b̯webi̱si̱ro b̯wange, ondinda mu bizub̯u, nonyelogoolya na byembu bya b̯u̱si̱ngu̱zi̱.
32.8: Nkwi̱za kukuragiira na kukwegesya mu̱li̱ngo gwokusemeera kwicaliramwo, nkulambe kandi nkuwoneere.
32.9: Otabba nka mbaraasi rundi ndogoyi̱, tibibba na kwetegereza, zivugwa zi̱bboheerwe byoma na miguha ku mi̱nwa kitali ki̱kyo tizisobora kuhondera kuragira kwamu.
32.10: Babiibi bali na kuwonawona hoi̱, bei̱tu̱ bab̯wo beesiga Mukama , abalinda na ngonzi zinene.
32.11: Nahab̯waki̱kyo mwegonze mu Mukama kandi mu̱semererwe, nywe bamananu! Toke na kusemererwa nywensei̱ ba mitima mi̱syanu̱.

33.1: Mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Mukama mu̱semererwe, nywe bamananu! Bantu barungi basemereeri̱ kumuhaariiza.
33.2: Mu̱si̱i̱me Mukama na ndi̱ngi̱di̱, mu̱mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re byembu na ki̱dongo kya mahu̱u̱zi̱ i̱ku̱mi̱!
33.3: Mu̱mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re kyembu kihyaka, ku̱u̱te ki̱dongo nab̯wegyendereza, ki̱hu̱lu̱kye iraka likooto.
33.4: Kubba kigambu kya Mukama kiicala kyamananu, kandi na milimo myamwe myensei̱ mikorwa mu b̯wesigwa.
33.5: Yeegomba mananu na b̯winganiza, nsi gi̱i̱zwi̱ri̱ ngonzi za Mukama zinene.
33.6: Iguru yaali̱hangi̱ri̱ na kigambu kyamwe, rwoya lwamwe lwahanga byenseenya bilimwo
33.7: Yooyo acooka meezi̱ ga mwitaka nka mutuumo, ga mu ndi̱ha nagabikira mu bideeru.
33.8: Nsi gyensei̱ gi̱ti̱i̱nenge Mukama , bantu bensei̱ ba mu nsi bamutemwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
33.9: Kubba yaabazi̱ri̱, kandi kwokwo kyabba, yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ kyemeera kiterekereeri̱.
33.10: Mukama amalaho rukwe lwa mahanga, alemesya bigyendeerwa bya bantu.
33.11: Bei̱tu̱ ntegeka za Mukama zemeeraho biro byensei̱, bigyendeerwa bya mutima gwamwe nibidwereera mi̱hi̱hi̱ myensei̱.
33.12: Lili na mu̱gi̱sa ihanga lya Mukama Ruhanga afuga, na bantu bayaakomi̱ri̱ nka b̯ugwetwa b̯wamwe.
33.13: Mukama eicala mwiguru naawona hansi, alingiira bantu bensei̱,
33.14: ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ ha kitebe kya b̯u̱lemi̱ b̯wamwe, awona bensei̱ beicala ha nsi,
33.15: yogwo ahanga mitima mya bensei̱, kandi ali̱ngani̱a byensei̱ bibakora.
33.16: Tihaloho mukama ajunwa b̯unene wei̱he lyamwe, na mu̱lwani̱ akusobora kukena hab̯wa maani gaamwe.
33.17: Mbaraasi gya b̯ulemu tigisobora kuleeta ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwa b̯u̱si̱ngu̱zi̱, kandi de tigikusobora kujuna hab̯wa maani gaagyo gadi̱ ganene.
33.18: Bei̱tu̱ mei̱so ga Mukama geicala hali bab̯wo bamu̱ti̱i̱na, hali bab̯wo bani̱hi̱ra mu ngonzi zaamwe zinene,
33.19: kwokwo asobore kubacungura mu lu̱ku̱u̱, na kubalinda mu nzala.
33.20: Tuli na ku̱ni̱hi̱ra mu Mukama , Mu̱ju̱ni̱ weetu̱ kandi ngab̯u gyei̱tu̱.
33.21: Mitima myetu̱ misemererwa mu yooyo, kubba twesiga ibara lyamwe li̱ti̱i̱nwa.
33.22: Ai̱ Mukama , leka ngonzi zaamu zinene zitwicaleho, tulimwo ku̱ni̱hi̱ra muli weewe.

34.1: Nyasi̱i̱manga Mukama b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱, kanwa kange keicalanga nikamuhaariiza.
34.2: Nyehaariizanga mu Mukama , leka bab̯u̱ndaaru̱ beegwe kandi basemererwe.
34.3: Haari̱i̱ze Mukama nagya, twensei̱ hamwei̱ tutende ibara lyamwe!
34.4: Nyaatooleerye Mukama yanzi̱ramwo, yanjuna b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱ b̯wensei̱.
34.5: Bensei̱ bamulingiira beicala basemereerwe, b̯u̱syo b̯wab̯u tib̯ulibba na nsoni̱.
34.6: Yogo mudulu munaku yaali̱i̱ri̱, Mukama yaamwegwa, kandi yaamujuna yaamutoolaho kabii kensei̱.
34.7: Malayika wa Mukama yeelogooleerya bati̱i̱na Mukama naabajuna.
34.8: Mu̱bbi̱leho muwone Mukama nka kwali murungi, ali na mu̱gi̱sa ei̱ru̱ki̱ra muli yo.
34.9: Mu̱ti̱i̱ne Mukama nywe bantu ba Ruhanga, bamu̱ti̱i̱na abagabirira byensei̱ bibetaaga.
34.10: Ntali zisobora kwegama, bei̱tu̱ batoolya Mukama tibeetaaga kintu kyensei̱.
34.11: Mwi̱ze nywe baana bange, mu̱nzegwe, nkugyenda ku̱beegesya ku̱ti̱i̱na Mukama.
34.12: Naani ali hahwo akwendya b̯womi, kandi akwendya biro binene, aleke awone birungi?
34.13: Otangenge kalimi kaamu kubaza kubiibi, na mu̱nwa gwamu kuhanuura byab̯u̱gobya.
34.14: Olekenge kukora bibii, okore birungi, otoolyenge b̯u̱si̱nge kandi ob̯ulindenge.
34.15: Mei̱so ga Mukama geicala hali bamananu, mapokopo gaamwe geetegeerya kukunga kwab̯u.
34.16: Mukama asuula bakora bibiibi, ali̱bahwerekereerya bensei̱ ku nsi bantu babeebeere ki̱mwei̱.
34.17: Bantu baamwe b̯ubaakamweta abajune, Mukama yeegwa naabajuna bizub̯u byab̯u byensei̱.
34.18: Mukama ali heehi̱ na ba mitima mi̱b̯u̱ndeeri̱, kandi ajuna ba myozo mitali na ku̱ni̱hi̱ra.
34.19: Wamananu abba na bizub̯u binene, bei̱tu̱ Mukama byensei̱ abimujunambe.
34.20: Mukama amulinda nab̯wegyendereza, nagaana kabii kensei̱ kumudwereera.
34.21: Babiibi baalyeletera kuhwerekeera, bab̯wo banoba bantu bamananu balijunaanwa.
34.22: Mukama acungura b̯womi b̯wa bantu baamwe, tihaloho ei̱ru̱ki̱ra muli yo alijunaanwa.

35.1: Ai̱ Mukama , kuutangana na bakukuutangana nagya, Lwana na bandwani̱sya.
35.2: Kwata kilwalu na ngab̯u gyamu, obyoke onjune!
35.3: Kwata isumu na mpasa gya b̯ulemu, lwani̱sya baku̱mpi̱i̱gani̱a! Weera mwozo gwange, “Ndi gyagya kujunwa kwamu!”
35.4: Leka bab̯wo bakwendya ku̱nzi̱ta basware kandi batabba na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa. Babinge kandi ohu̱gu̱tani̱e bab̯wo bensei̱ bendya kumputaaza.
35.5: Bafoore nka bisusunga mu mpehu, malayika wa Mukama naalimwo ku̱beru̱kya
35.6: Leka muhanda gwab̯u gwi̱zwemwo nti̱ti̱ na b̯unterente, malayika wa Mukama naalimwo ku̱beru̱kya!
35.7: Kubba bantega batali na kigyendeerwa, b̯womi b̯wange nibab̯ulimira b̯u̱hya batali na nsonga.
35.8: Leka azi̱ke atakwega, mutegu gwabbanga antegi̱ri̱ gumwekwatire, agu̱gwemwo mpaka ha kuhwerekeera kwamwe!
35.9: Kasi mwomwo mwozo gwange gulisemererwa mu Mukama , ni̱gu̱nyu̱mi̱rwa mu kujuna kwamwe.
35.10: Maku̱ha gange gensei̱ gakwi̱za kukoba yati, “Ai̱ Mukama, naani akukwisana, akucungura banaku, hali akubakira maani, baseege na bali mu b̯wetaagu hali akubanyaga?”
35.11: Babiibi babyoka kundumiriza, ni̱bambu̱u̱lya bintu bi̱nteegi̱ri̱.
35.12: Mu kiikaru kya birungi, bansasulamwo bibiibi, nibammalamwo maani.
35.13: Bei̱tu̱ bo b̯u̱baahi̱mbi̱ri̱, nyaalweri̱ nsensede, nyeeru̱mya na kusaba na kusiiba, nyaasabenge ntu̱lu̱ki̱ri̱ mu̱twe.
35.14: Nyei̱seeni̱ nka akulira munywani wange rundi weetu̱, nka muntu akulira mmaawe, nyeetu̱lu̱ki̱ri̱ nindi mu maaru.
35.15: Bei̱tu̱ gya b̯unyaali mu kabii baasemereerwe beesorooza, bei̱sorooze ku̱nsekereerya, ndu̱mbi̱i̱rwe bantu banteegi̱ri̱, banku̱u̱ti̱ri̱ batakulekeera.
35.16: Nka bagwagwa bali ha ki̱genyi̱, bantegeeri̱ meino.
35.17: Ai̱ Mukama, oli̱doosya di̱i̱ kubalingiira b̯u̱li̱ngi̱i̱ri̱? Nnjuna bibakumpoora nabyo, ojune b̯womi b̯wange b̯wa muhendu kuruga mu zizi ntali.
35.18: Nyaaku̱si̱i̱manga mu lwecooko lwa bantu, mu bantu banene nyaakuhaariizanga.
35.19: Banyanzigwa bange baleke kunyeb̯ugira bannobira b̯usa baleke kwesi̱i̱ma,
35.20: Tibambaza kurungi, bei̱tu̱ bacwa makuru bantu batali na kabii, bab̯wo beicala bei̱tekereeri̱.
35.21: Bangu̱hi̱ri̱i̱rya kunnyegeera, nibakoba, “Otyo, Otyo! Kasita mei̱so gaaki̱weeni̱!”
35.22: Ai̱ Mukama , oweeni̱ byensei̱ leka kwetekeera, ai̱ Mukama, otamba hadei.
35.23: Ruhanga wange kandi Mukama wange, nsagika, byoka ondwaniire.
35.24: Ai̱ Mukama , Ruhanga wange, ntonganiira nka mananu gaamu kugali, otaleka nibakanyeb̯ugira.
35.25: Otabaleka kuteekereza nti, “Tu̱tu̱ngi̱ri̱ kitubbanga ni̱tu̱toolya! Tukugyenda kumudya yemereeri̱!”
35.26: Bensei̱ beb̯uga hab̯wa b̯uceke b̯wange, baswaze kandi obasi̱ngu̱re, beetembya hab̯wange, obalwalye muswaru.
35.27: Banzendeerya b̯u̱si̱ngu̱zi̱, batoke hab̯wa kusemererwa na ngonzi, babaze yati, “ Mukama ahaariizwe, anyu̱mi̱rwa mu kubba kurungi kwa muheereza waamwe.”
35.28: Kalimi kange kaabazanga ha b̯winganiza b̯wamu, kandi nkwi̱za kukuhaariiza biro byensei̱.

36.1: Kibii kihwehwetira mubiibi, mu mutima gwamwe, nikimugaana ku̱ti̱i̱na Ruhanga.
36.2: Yeetembya yankei, naateekereza Ruhanga talyega bibii byamwe akamujunaana.
36.3: Bigambu bya kanwa kaamwe bibba kabii na b̯u̱gobya, aleki̱ri̱ho kwetegereza na kukora birungi.
36.4: Ateekereza b̯ubiibi naali mu ntabbu gyamwe, yeeteereeri̱ho mihanda mitali mirungi, tasuula kibii.
36.5: Ngonzi zaamu zinene, ai̱ Mukama , zidwa mwiguru, b̯wesigwa b̯wamu mu byalu.
36.6: Mananu gaamu gali nka nsahu za maani, b̯winganiza b̯wamu nka ndi̱ha gilei. Ai̱ Mukama , ojuna bantu na bisolo.
36.7: Ai̱ Ruhanga, ngonzi zaamu zinene zili za muhendu! Nahab̯waki̱kyo baana ba bantu b̯wesigwa b̯wab̯u baab̯uta mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ gwa bimpaha byamu.
36.8: Nibadya ha binene bya mu nnyu̱mba gyamu, obaha kyakunywa kuruga ha mugira gwa kusemererwa kwamwo.
36.9: Kubba muli we hooho hali musu gwa b̯womi, mu kyererezi̱ kyamu tuwonamwo kyererezi̱.
36.10: Oteeryeho ngonzi zinene hali bab̯wo bakukwega, obahe b̯winganiza baterekereru̱ mitima.
36.11: Kitasoboka magulu ga bamyehembu kumpondeera, nab̯ugwakabba mukono gwa mubiibi kumbinga.
36.12: Wona bankora bibii ku̱bagwi̱ri̱, babatitiniri̱ tibakusobora kubyoka!

37.1: Leka kwetuntuza hab̯wa babiibi rundi okakwatirwa i̱hali̱ bakukora kubii,
37.2: Bakwi̱za ku̱syeraho nkeisubi kulyoma, bakwe nka bimera bi̱hotoku̱.
37.3: Weesiga Mukama kandi okore birungi, mwomwo oicale munsi kurungi.
37.4: Semererwa mu Mukama , kandi alikuha bya mutima gwamu gu̱kwendya.
37.5: Ngesu zaamu zoolokye Mukama , mumwesige yooyo akwi̱za kukoora.
37.6: Aliha b̯urungi b̯wamu kwaka nka kyererezi̱, b̯winganiza b̯wamu b̯umuluke nka lyoba lya mwinsi.
37.7: Gumisiriza kandi wesige Mukama , Leka kutuntuura babiibi hab̯wa ku̱gu̱du̱hara, na ku̱si̱ngu̱ra mu ntegeka zaab̯u zibiibi.
37.8: Weehala ki̱ni̱ga kandi oleke b̯u̱kabbu̱ru̱. Leka kutuntura, kileeta kibii.
37.9: Kubba babiibi bakwi̱za kuhwerekeera, bei̱tu̱ balindiira Mukama baligweterwa nsi.
37.10: Mu kasu̱mi̱ katali ka hadei, mubiibi talizookaho, nab̯wolilingiira ha kiikaru kyamwe nab̯wegyendereza talibbaho
37.11: Bei̱tu̱ banaku baligweterwa nsi nibeicala na b̯u̱si̱nge b̯unene.
37.12: Babiibi bahi̱gani̱za barungi, nibabanenera na magegu,
37.13: Mukama abaseka b̯u̱seki̱, kubba awona kabii ni̱kaku̱bei̱zi̱ra.
37.14: Babiibi basomolayo mpirima nibareega b̯uta, mwaku̱hwerekereerya banaku na bali mu b̯wetaagu, na kusala balibatira mu mihanda mi̱terekereru̱.
37.15: Bei̱tu̱ byogi byab̯u bi̱kwi̱za kubeteemuura mitima, b̯uta b̯wab̯u b̯ubinyeke.
37.16: Hakiri oicala nooli murungi kandi munaku, kukira kubba mubiibi kandi mu̱gu̱u̱da,
37.17: kubba mikono mya babiibi mi̱kwi̱za kubinyeka, bei̱tu̱ Mukama asagika barungi.
37.18: Mukama yeegi̱ri̱ biro bya bab̯wo batagira kakuu, kandi b̯ugwetwa b̯wab̯u b̯ulibbaho biro na biro.
37.19: Mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa kabii tibalitalibana, balibba na binene mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa nzala.
37.20: Bei̱tu̱ babiibi bakwi̱za kuhwerekeera, banyanzigwa ba Mukama beisana nka ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyeisubi bakwi̱za ku̱tu̱u̱ka nka mwi̱ca, batu̱u̱ke bamalikeho.
37.21: Mubiibi yeehora tasasula ibanza, bei̱tu̱ murungi abba mwenda eicala naagaba,
37.22: kubba ba Mukama aheeri̱ mu̱gi̱sa bakwi̱za kugweterwa nsi, bei̱tu̱ baakyeni̱ri̱ baalimalikaho.
37.23: Mukama yooyo yoolokya muntu muhanda gwa akusemeera kukweta, kandi alinda bab̯wo bamusemeza,
37.24: nab̯walikibbala, tali̱gwa, kubba Mukama amukwatiira na mukono gwamwe.
37.25: Nyaali muto hataati̱ mpandi̱ri̱, tinkawonanga muntu murungi wa Mukama ahemu̱ki̱i̱ri̱, rundi kuwona baana baamwe ni̱baku̱sabi̱ri̱i̱rya bidyo.
37.26: Beicala benda kandi bahora bataku̱bali̱ri̱i̱rya, baana baab̯u baliheeb̯wa mu̱gi̱sa.
37.27: Leka bibiibi okore birungi, mwomwo oliicala mu nsi biro na biro.
37.28: Kubba Mukama yendya b̯winganiza, kandi talilekeera beesigwa be. Bakwi̱za kulindwa biro na biro, bei̱tu̱ beizukulu ba babiibi bakwi̱za kuhwerekeera,
37.29: Bamananu baligweterwa nsi, kandi beicalemwo biro byensei̱.
37.30: Kanwa ka wa mananu kaatula magezi̱, kalimi kaamwe kabaza bya b̯winganiza.
37.31: Mutima gwamwe gwi̱zwi̱ri̱ biragiro bya Mukama , magulu gaamwe tigasoba.
37.32: Babiibi beicala bali̱ndi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ bamananu, ni̱batoolereerya kumalaho b̯womi b̯wab̯u,
37.33: bei̱tu̱ Mukama talibaleka kubba mu mikono myab̯u, rundi akabaleka babacwere musangu nibali babaju̱neeni̱.
37.34: Lindiira Mukama weekwate mihanda myamwe, akwi̱za ku̱ku̱byokya ogweterwe nsi, babiibi b̯ubalimalwaho, okwi̱za kukyewonira.
37.35: Mbweni̱ muntu mubiibi kandi atagira kisa, naakunyengetera nka musaali guli heitehe lirungi,
37.36: bei̱tu̱ b̯wangu b̯wangu naasyeraho atakei̱re kuzookaho, nab̯u̱nyalwani̱si̱i̱rye ku̱mu̱toolya gwakabiri atakazookeho.
37.37: Lingiira bantu bamananu kandi barungi, muntu b̯wa b̯u̱si̱nge abba na beizukulu.
37.38: Bei̱tu̱ babiibi bensei̱ balihwerekeera, bya mu̱mei̱so bya babiibi byensei̱ bilihwerekeera.
37.39: Kujunwa kwa bamananu kuruga hali Mukama yooyo b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wab̯u mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa kabii.
37.40: Mukama abajuna naabacungura kuruga mu mikono mya babiibi, naabajuna, kubba bei̱ru̱ki̱ra muli yooyo.

38.1: Ai̱ Mukama , otanfubira nooli na ki̱ni̱ga rundi kundamba nooli na b̯usungu.
38.2: Kubba mbasi zaamu zi̱njagareeri̱ mu mubiri, kandi mukono gwamu gu̱mmi̱gi̱ri̱ hansi.
38.3: Hab̯wa b̯usungu b̯wamu mpi̱mbi̱ri̱. Hab̯wa kibii kyange, maku̱ha gange gaceki̱ri̱.
38.4: Kuhenera kwange ku̱nsagi̱ri̱, nka mugugu guntakusobora kwetweka.
38.5: Bihote byange bi̱tamu̱ki̱ri̱ bi̱ku̱nu̱nka, hab̯wa b̯udoma b̯wange.
38.6: Nnyeehi̱nyi̱ri̱ ndi hansi, kiro kyensei̱ nkimalira mu maaru.
38.7: Mu̱twe gwange gu̱hyohi̱ri̱ hab̯wa mu̱swi̱ja gwamaani, ndi heehi̱ ku̱kwa.
38.8: Njwahi̱ri̱ ntematemeerwe ki̱mwei̱, nkulira hab̯wa nganye za mu mutima gwange.
38.9: Mukama bi̱nku̱rombya byensei̱, na kutaaga kwange obyegi̱ri̱.
38.10: Mutima gulimu kunkuuta, maani gammali̱ki̱ri̱i̱ri̱, Mei̱so gange gebbu̱mbi̱ri̱.
38.11: Banywani na banywi̱ bamukagu bali mu kunyehala hab̯wa bihote, banyaruganda nabo bandahi̱ri̱ho.
38.12: Bendya ku̱nzi̱ta bantega mitegu, bampu̱tei̱ze nibandyamwo rukwe lwa ku̱mpwerekereerya.
38.13: Ndi nka mwi̱jalu̱ mapokopo, atakwegwa, nka kibbubbu atakubaza,
38.14: Ndi nka atakwegwa, wa mu̱nwa gutakusobora kwi̱ramwo.
38.15: Ai̱ Mukama , nku̱ni̱hi̱ra muli we, okwi̱za ku̱nzi̱ramwo, ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga wange.
38.17: Hab̯wakubba ndi heehi̱ ku̱gwa, ncala na b̯u̱ru̱mi̱ b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱.
38.18: Nkwatula bibiibi byange, mb̯i̱hi̱ri̱i̱rwe hab̯wa kuhenera kwange.
38.19: Banyanzigwa bange banku̱mpi̱gi̱ra b̯usa bannobi̱ri̱ batali na nsonga bali banene.
38.20: Bansasula bibiibi hab̯wa birungi binkora, boobo bampi̱i̱gani̱sya kubba nkwendya kukora birungi.
38.21: Ai̱ Mukama , otandekeera, ai̱ Ruhanga wange, otamba hadei.
38.22: Ranguha onjune, Ai̱ Mukama Mu̱ju̱ni̱ wange.

39.1: Nyaakobi̱ri̱, “Nkwi̱za kwegyendereza ntakora kibii mu bintu bimbaza, nyaakoba tindizootera kintu kyensei̱, babiibi nibaloho baatanzegwa.”
39.2: Nyaali nka kibbubbu ntakubaza, kitakangasire, hab̯wakubba kyateereerye b̯u̱teerya kuwonawona kwange.
39.3: Mutima gwasali̱ki̱ri̱, b̯u̱nyatekeri̱i̱ze hoi̱ gwahyengi̱ nka mworo, mwomwo nyabazi̱ri̱ na kalimi kange nti,
39.4: “Ai̱ Mukama , leka nyeetegereze nkangu gyange, na ndengu gya biro byange, ommanyi̱sye b̯womi b̯wange nka kub̯uli mu kumalikaho.”
39.5: Biro byange waabi̱fori̱ri̱ nka ntambu b̯utambu, b̯womi b̯wange ob̯uwona nka kitali kintu. B̯womi b̯wa b̯uli muntu b̯wicala rwoya lusa.
39.6: Mananakwo muntu ali nka mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ eicala nalibatalibata, atalibanira b̯usa, asoroza itungu ateegi̱ri̱ akulitwala,
39.7: “Hataati̱ Mukama kyani ki̱nku̱toolya? Ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwange kuli muli weewe.
39.8: Njuna byakuhenara byange byensei̱, ntafooka kyakusungwa badoma.
39.9: Nyaali nyetekereeri̱, ntakub̯uula mu̱nwa, kubba weewe waaki̱koori̱.
39.10: Tokulekaho kunfubira, njwahi̱ri̱ kukuutwa kwa mukono gwamu.
39.11: Owonawonesya bantu hab̯wa bibii byab̯u, itungu lyab̯u olidya nka nnyenze, mananu b̯uli muntu abba rwoya lusa!
39.12: “Ai̱ Mukama, weegwa kusaba kwange otegere mapokopo kizabiro kyange onkonyere, kubba ndi mu̱genyi̱, mu̱goonyi̱ nka bahaaha bensei̱ kubaali.
39.13: Leka kumbihiriirwa kwokwo nsemererweho, ntakabbeeri̱ ku̱kwa nkei̱ra kintu kwankei.”

40.1: Nyaali̱ndi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ Mukama na kugumisiriza yeetegereza yeegwa kukunga kwange.
40.2: Yantoori̱ mu ki̱i̱na kilei baku̱u̱ ha bagyenda, mu bicokodo bya lu̱ku̱u̱, magulu gange yaagei̱cya ha lubbaali, yansoboresya kulibata ntanti̱i̱ri̱.
40.3: Mu kanwa kange yaahangi̱ri̱mwo kyembu kihyaka, kyembu kya kuhaariiza Ruhanga weetu̱. Banene b̯ubalibiwona bali̱ti̱i̱na, kandi ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwab̯u bakute hali Mukama .
40.4: Ali na mu̱gi̱sa muntu, yeesiga Mukama , ateekwata na bamyehembu, na kweju̱u̱bya na baramya baruhanga bandi.
40.5: Onzongeeri̱ binene ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga wange, gaga gali mahanu gookoori̱. Bintu bi̱watu̱tegekeeri̱, tihaloho akusobora kubikubalira, kadi gya nkakoba kubibaza, tosobora kubibala okabimalayo.
40.6: Bihongwa na byonzira tobyendya, wampeeri̱ mapokopo nkwetegeerye, bihongwa bya kwokya na bya kuganyira bibii tobyetaaga.
40.7: Mwomwo nyaabazi̱ri̱ ninkoba yati, “Wona ndi haha, nzi̱ri̱, bibampandi̱ki̱ri̱ho mu binyakuhandiikwa bikoba:
40.8: Nyendya kukora bi̱wendya, ai̱ Ruhanga wange, biragiro byamu bili mu mutima gwange.”
40.9: Ntebeerye mananu gaamu mu kitebe kya bantu banene, okyegi̱ri̱ nka ku̱nteteekeera kubaza, ai̱ Mukama .
40.10: Kujuna kwamu ti̱nku̱bi̱si̱ri̱ mu mutima gwange, ntebeerye b̯wesigwa na kujunwa kwamu, ngonzi zaamu zinene na b̯unanu mbibbumbiira kwahi mu kitebe kya bantu banene.
40.11: Hab̯wamu, ai̱ Mukama , otalemwa kungirira kisa, ngonzi zaamu zinene na b̯wesigwa b̯wamu bindindenge.
40.12: Kubba bizub̯u bi̱nyelogoleerye, bibii byange byakaleseeni̱ tinkusobora kuwona, binene na kukira ntumbu za ha mu̱twe gwange, mutima gwicala ni̱gu̱gwa.
40.13: Ai̱ Mukama, bba na mbabazi̱, oncungure, ai̱ Mukama, wanguha onjune.
40.14: Leka bakwatwe nsoni̱ kandi basware, bab̯wo baku̱toolereerya ku̱nzi̱ta, bakwendya mpwerekeere bemuke na muswaru.
40.15: Leka beicala nibamponereerya nibambweranga nti, “Ee, koowonewone,” bemuke na muswaru!
40.16: Bensei̱ baku̱toolya, bajaguze kandi basemererwe muli weewe, leka bab̯wo bendya kujunwa kwamu, beicalenge nibakoba yati, “ Mukama wamaani!”
40.17: Gya ndi munaku kandi mu b̯wetaagu, Mukama ancweramwo. Weewe Mu̱ju̱ni̱ kandi mu̱cu̱ngu̱ri̱ wange, ai̱ Ruhanga wange, otakereerwa.

41.1: Ali na mu̱gi̱sa abba mwenda hali baseege, Mukama amujuna mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa bizub̯u.
41.2: Mukama alimulinda kandi amwi̱caalye naali mwomi, Mukama alimuha mu̱gi̱sa mu nsi kandi talimuleka akakwatwa kwetaaga kwa banyanzigwa baamwe.
41.3: Mukama alimukwatiira ha ntabbu gyamwe amu̱honi̱e nseeri̱ zaamwe
41.4: Nyakobi̱ri̱ yati, “Ai̱ Mukama , ngiira mbabazi̱, mponi̱a, kubba nkoori̱ kibii mu mei̱so gaamu.”
41.5: Banyanzigwa bambazaho nei̱hali̱ nibakoba yati, “Ali̱kwa di, yogwo ibara lyamwe ni̱li̱kasyeraho?”
41.6: Bab̯wo bambungira nka banywani, bei̱tu̱ nibasorooza rugambu, b̯ubabba nibakwemuka, nibalurarangya hensei̱.
41.7: Banyanzigwa bange bensei̱ bahwehwetira hamwei̱ nibakumbazaho, banzendeerya bibiibi bisa.
41.8: Baakobenge “Akwati̱i̱rwe nseeri̱ gibiibi, tasobora kubyoka ha aleeri̱.”
41.9: Na munywani wange gi̱i̱nyesi̱gengi̱, adyanga hamwei̱ nagya, yoodede anfookeeri̱ munyanzigwa.
41.10: Ai̱ Mukama , ngiira mbabazi̱, mbyokya, aleke mbahoore.
41.11: Nkyegi̱ri̱ nka kwoku̱nzendya, kubba oleki̱ri̱ kwahi banyanzigwa ku̱nsi̱ngu̱ra.
41.12: Wankwati̱ri̱i̱ri̱ hab̯wa mananu gange, wanzi̱cya mu̱mei̱so gaamu biro na biro.
41.13: Mukama ahaariizwe, Ruhanga wʼI̱saleeri̱, biro na biro. Ami̱i̱na kandi Ami̱i̱na.

42.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, nka mparaaki kuhyahyanira meezi̱ ga kunywa, kwokwo na mwozo gwange gukukuhyahyanira.
42.2: Mwozo gwange gukukuhyahyanira Ruhanga mwomi. Ndigyenda di̱i̱ mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga?
42.3: Mali̱ga gange googo geicala bidyo byange, mwinsi nei̱jolo, bantu b̯ubabba ni̱baku̱mbu̱u̱lya b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱, “Ruhanga waamu ali hanya?”
42.4: Nki̱zi̱ gindabamwo b̯u̱nyi̱zu̱ka byenyu̱ma, nka ku̱nyebemberengi̱ bantu banene, nitukumba kugyenda mu nnyu̱mba gya Ruhanga, ni̱tu̱kwami̱i̱rya byembu bya kuhaariiza na kusemererwa kunene, bantu banene ni̱bei̱za kujaguza.
42.5: Ai̱ mwozo gwange, hab̯waki otu̱ntwi̱ri̱, kandi hab̯waki otateekeeni̱? Weesiganga Ruhanga, hab̯wakubba ndimuhaariiza gwakandi, Mu̱ju̱ni̱ wange kandi Ruhanga wange.
42.6: Nsali̱i̱rwe nu mu mutima gwange, bei̱tu̱ ndi̱kwi̱zu̱ka, nab̯undibba nindi hadei na Yorodaani, na nsi gya lusahu Hamoni̱ kandi na lwa Mi̱zi̱ra.
42.7: Nkwegwa ndi̱ha nigyeta gi̱i̱ra gyagyo nka meezi̱ gakuhuura kugagwa hansi, gei̱zwi̱ri̱ gaammeeri̱.
42.8: Mukama yolokyanga ngonzi zaamwe zinene b̯wi̱re b̯wa mwinsi, kandi kyembu kyamwe kyokyo nyahi̱i̱manga i̱jolo, ninkusaba Ruhanga yogwo ampa b̯womi.
42.9: Ndiriira Ruhanga, lubbaali lwange nimuweera, “Hab̯waki onzebereeri̱? Hab̯waki ncala nimbonawona hab̯wa ku̱wonawonesya kwa banyanzigwa bange?”
42.10: Banyanzigwa bange beicala nibanjooga nibakobanga yati, “Ruhanga waamu ali hanya?” Baheeri̱ b̯womi b̯wanga kubba nka muntu ali na kihote kinyamapo.
42.11: Ai̱ mwozo gwange, hab̯waki otu̱ntwi̱ri̱, kandi hab̯waki otateekeeni̱? Weesiganga Ruhanga, hab̯wakubba ndimuhaariiza gwakandi, Mu̱ju̱ni̱ wange kandi Ruhanga wange.

43.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, ntoolaho musangu kandi ontonganiire hali bantu babiibi, onjune hali yogwo mudulu mu̱gobya kandi atagira b̯winganiza.
43.2: Kubba weewe Ruhanga ginyeesiga hab̯waki ondekereeri̱? Hab̯waki ncala nimbonawona, hab̯wa ku̱wonawonesya kwa banyanzigwa bange?
43.3: Ntumira kyererezi̱ na mananu gaamu bimulukire binyebembere bindeete ha lusahu lwamu lu̱syanu̱ hali oicala.
43.4: B̯u̱b̯wo mwomwo ndigyenda ha kyoto kyeihongo lya Ruhanga, hali we Ruhanga ampa kusemererwa kunene, aleke nkuhaariize na ndi̱ngi̱di̱, ai̱ Ruhanga, we Ruhanga wange.
43.5: Ai̱ mwozo gwange, hab̯waki otu̱ntwi̱ri̱, kandi hab̯waki otateekeeni̱? Weesiganga Ruhanga, hab̯wakubba ndimuhaariiza gwakandi, Mu̱ju̱ni̱ wange kandi Ruhanga wange!

44.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, twegwi̱ri̱ na mapokopo geetu̱, bya bahaaha beetu̱ bi̱batu̱weereeri̱, bi̱waakoori̱ mu biro byab̯u bya kadei.
44.2: Weewe wankei na mukono gwamu waabi̱ngi̱ri̱ waasi̱gu̱ra banyamahanga, waatamwo babbaabeetu̱, waabonawonesya banyamahanga, bei̱tu̱ babbaabeetu̱ waabacungura.
44.3: Babbaabeetu̱ batakasi̱ngu̱re gi̱gyo nsi hab̯wa mpirima zaab̯u, rundi hab̯wa maani gaab̯u, bei̱tu̱ basi̱ngwi̱ri̱ hab̯wa mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo na maani gaamu, na kyererezi̱ kya mei̱so gaamu, hab̯wakubba waabendeerye.
44.4: Ai̱ Ruhanga, weewe oli mukama wange, oha Yakobbo b̯u̱si̱ngu̱zi̱.
44.5: Banyanzigwa beetu̱ tu̱basi̱ngu̱ra hab̯wa b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wamu, batu̱ru̱mba nitubaziginiira.
44.6: Tinsobora kwesiga b̯uta b̯wange, kadi gibbe mpirima gyange, tigisobora kunjuna.
44.7: Bei̱tu̱ weewe otujuna hali banyanzigwa beetu̱, batunoba noobaswaza.
44.8: Twesu̱gu̱syanga weewe Ruhanga, kandi weewe twahaariizanga biro byensei̱.
44.9: Bei̱tu̱ hataati̱ otu̱swi̱ri̱ kandi watub̯undaaza, tokyakebembera mahe geetu̱.
44.10: Oleki̱ri̱ banyanzigwa batwi̱ru̱kya, kandi bintu byetu̱ bab̯wo banyagi̱ babitwala.
44.11: Otu̱heeri̱yo batwi̱te nka ntaama gibakugyenda kusala, otu̱sarani̱i̱rye mu mahanga.
44.12: Waatu̱ndi̱ri̱ bantu baamu b̯usa, nka rundi si batakabbe na mugasu.
44.13: Otu̱heeri̱ kubba ki̱joogo mu bataahi̱, twei̱ra kyaku̱lu̱mwa kandi kyakugaywa mu batu̱heereeri̱.
44.14: Otu̱leeteeri̱ kubba binugwa mu mahanga, otwi̱ri̱i̱rye kyaku̱joogwa.
44.15: Biro byense ndibata ninswaraswara, nindi na nsoni̱ mu mei̱so gange,
44.16: hab̯wa bigambu bya bab̯wo banjooga, kandi bansekereerya mu mei̱so ga banyanzigwa na bendya kuhoora nzi̱go.
44.17: Bibi byensei̱ bi̱twi̱zi̱ri̱ho, nab̯utwakabba tu̱takwebereeri̱, rundi tu̱tabi̱nyi̱ri̱ ndagaanu gyamu.
44.18: Mitima myetu̱ timikakurugangaho, magulu geetu̱ tigakahugukanga kuruga mu muhanda gwamu.
44.19: Bei̱tu̱ nab̯wo otu̱tweri̱ watuguma mu misege, watubbutukira na nti̱ti̱ gya zigizigi.
44.20: Kakubba twali twebeereeri̱ Ruhanga weetu̱, rundi twalingi tweheeri̱yo ku̱ramya ruhanga wondi,
44.21: Ruhanga yaaku̱lemeerwe kwahi kukyega? Hab̯wakubba eicala yeegi̱ri̱ nsita zeetu̱ za ha mutima?
44.22: Bei̱tu̱ hab̯wamu, biro byensei̱ twicala ni̱twi̱twa, batutwala kubiibi nka ntaama gibakugyenda kusala.
44.23: Ai̱ Mukama, byoka! Hab̯waki otu̱lekereeri̱? Byokiramwo otatubingira ki̱mwei̱.
44.24: Hab̯waki otwebi̱si̱ri̱ho? Oteebeera kuwonawona na b̯ujune b̯wetu̱!
44.25: Kubba myozo myetu̱ myehi̱nyi̱ri̱ hansi mwicuucu, nda zeetu̱ zeekweti̱ kwitehe.
44.26: Byoka oi̱ze otujune, otucungure hab̯wa ngonzi zaamu zinene.

45.1: Mutima gwange gwi̱zwi̱ri̱ bigambu birungi binene byakutonda, nkaara zange nkwi̱za kuziweera mukama nzimuganire b̯u̱gani̱ mu kyembu, nka mu̱handi̱i̱ki̱ mutendeke kwakoresya kalaamu.
45.2: Weewe njuruute gi̱caasi̱ngi̱ri̱ mu badulu bensei̱! Bigambu byamu byabbanga bya mbabazi̱, hab̯wakubba Ruhanga aku̱heeri̱ mu̱gi̱sa gwa biro na biro.
45.3: We wa maani, lwala kirooyo kyamu kiloho mpirima, obba wa b̯u̱sobozi̱ kandi wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa!
45.4: Ai̱ mukama, mu ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamu gyendanga noosi̱ngu̱ra! Osi̱ngu̱renge hab̯wa kwemeera ha mananu naakulwaniira b̯winganiza, mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo gwakoranga bintu bya b̯uzira.
45.5: Leka mbasi zaamu zoobi, zi̱tu̱u̱te ha mitima mya banyanzigwa ba mukama, mahanga gagwa hansi mu magulu gaamu.
45.6: Ai̱ Ruhanga, kitebe kyamu kiliicalaho biro na biro, b̯ukama b̯wamu ob̯ulemenge na b̯winganiza,
45.7: Wendya kukora bintu bya b̯winganiza, noonoba kukora bintu bibiibi, kyokyo Ruhanga, Ruhanga waamu aku̱teeri̱ho maku̱ta ga kusemererwa, kukiraho bandi bensei̱.
45.8: Bilwalu byamu bi̱b̯u̱nya kurungi hab̯wa maku̱ta ga migaaju, alosi̱ na kasi̱ya. Mu kikaali kya masyange, mabbwa ga bikwatu bi̱hi̱i̱mi̱sya mahu̱u̱zi̱ gaku̱nyu̱mi̱ra hoi̱.
45.9: Bahara ba bakama boobo bakali̱ baamu ba ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, ha mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo heemereeri̱ho mukaa mukama alweri̱ bilwalu bya zaabbu gya mwʼOfi̱ri̱.
45.10: Ai̱ muhara, weetegeerya kandi weegwe, webeera nsi gyamu na banyaruganda baamu.
45.11: Mukama akusemererwa mu b̯urungi b̯wamu, mwegwe kubba ali mukama waamu.
45.12: Bantu ba mu rub̯uga lwa Ti̱i̱ro balikuletera bisembu, bagu̱u̱da bakwesengereerye.
45.13: Mu̱kali̱ wa mukama aliswera, mu ki̱si̱i̱ka kyamwe alilwala bilwalu bikore na zaabbu.
45.14: Ndengeeti̱ ngogwo alimu kugab̯uka wu mukama, ndengeeti̱ zi̱i̱ra zikumuhondeera bazi̱ku̱leteeri̱.
45.15: Bali mu kuziherekeera na kusemererwa na masanyu, nizingira kikaali kya mukama.
45.16: Batabani̱ beenyu̱ balibbanga bagwete ba bahaaha baab̯u, mulibafoora bayolo mu nsi gyensei̱.
45.17: Ibara lyamu lyabbanga kyakwi̱zu̱ka ha mi̱hi̱hi̱ myensei̱, nahab̯waki̱kyo mahanga gaaliicala nigakuhaariiza biro na biro.

46.1: Ruhanga yooyo b̯webi̱si̱ro na maani geetu̱, eicalaho kutujuna mu b̯uzub̯u.
46.2: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, nsi nab̯ugyahinduka ti̱tu̱li̱ti̱i̱na, nsahu nab̯uzagwa mwitaka,
46.3: kubbe kwetyobbolya na kuhuuka kwa meezi̱, nsahu nab̯uzajegeja hab̯wa kuhuuka kwago.
46.4: Haloho mugira gukasemeza rub̯uga lwa Ruhanga, kiikaru kitongoole kya Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱ eicaliremwo.
46.5: Ruhanga eicala hakati̱ mulilwo tululitengeeta, Ruhanga alilujuna na kamambya.
46.6: Mahanga gatab̯u̱ki̱ri̱, makama gagwi̱ri̱, iraka lya Ruhanga libbwatuka, nsi niginyelela,
46.7: Mukama wa mahe eicala natwe, Ruhanga wa Yakobbo yooyo b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wetu̱.
46.8: Mwi̱ze muwone mulimo gwa Mukama , muwone nka kwaku̱hwerekereerya nsi.
46.9: Amalaho malemu kudwa ku nkangu gya nsi, abinya b̯uta, masumu nagacwacwana, bigaali nabi̱kolereeryaho mworo.
46.10: “Mwetegeerye kandi mwege gyagya ndi Ruhanga. Mahanga gakwi̱za kumpariiza, nsi gyensei̱ ginyumize.”
46.11: Mukama wa mahe eicala natwe, Ruhanga wa Yakobbo yooyo b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wetu̱.

47.1: Bantu nywensei̱ mu̱ku̱u̱te mu ngalu, Muhaariize Ruhanga na byembu byeiraka likooto byakusemererwa.
47.2: Kubba Mukama , Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱, asemereeri̱ ku̱ti̱i̱nwa, yooyo mukama wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa alema nsi gyensei̱.
47.3: Yaatu̱heeri̱ ku̱si̱ngu̱ra banyanzigwa beetu̱, mahanga gaab̯u gaabba hansi wa magulu geetu̱.
47.4: Yaatukomeramwo b̯ugwete b̯wetu̱, kyokyo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya Yakobbo gi̱yendya gyanyu̱mi̱rwa.
47.5: Ruhanga atembi̱ri̱ kwakyendi̱ bantu nibakuhaariiza, na maraka ga ngwara zikutoma.
47.6: Mu̱hi̱i̱me muhaariize Ruhanga! Mu̱hi̱i̱me nimumutenda mukama weetu̱!
47.7: Kubba Ruhanga eicala Mukama wa nsi gyensei̱, mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze na zabbu̱li̱.
47.8: Ruhanga alema mahanga gensei̱, Ruhanga eicaara ha kitebe kyamwe ki̱syanu̱.
47.9: Balemi̱ beecooka hamwei̱ na bantu ba Ruhanga wa I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ kubba ngab̯u za nsi zili na Ruhanga, yooyo gibahaariiza hoi̱.

48.1: Mukama ali wa maani, asemereeri̱ kuhaariizwa hoi̱, mu rub̯uga lwa Ruhanga weetu̱, na ha lusahu lwamwe lu̱syanu̱.
48.2: Lusahu lwamwe kandi lwa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, kwokwo kweb̯uga kwa nsi gyensei̱. Lusahu Sayu̱u̱ni̱ hadei mu matemba, rub̯uga lwa Mukama wamaani.
48.3: Ruhanga eicala mu lu̱lwo rub̯uga, yeezolokeerye nka kwali lugo.
48.4: Muwone bakama nka ku̱beesoroozi̱ri̱, hamwei̱ ku̱ru̱mba rub̯uga.
48.6: Baakankeeni̱ nka mu̱kali̱ akwati̱i̱rwe bisa bya kubyala,
48.7: hab̯wa bbuukuulu kuruga b̯uhulukalyoba waati̱ri̱ maati̱ ga Tarasi̱i̱si̱ mwitaka.
48.8: Twegwi̱ri̱, kandi hataati̱ tu̱ki̱weeni̱, mu rub̯uga lwa Ruhanga weetu̱, Mukama wa mahe, lulu lwolwo rub̯uga lwa Ruhanga, ali̱caalyaho biro byensei̱.
48.9: Ai̱ Ruhanga, b̯utubba mu nnyu̱mba gyamu ni̱tu̱ku̱ku̱ramya, tuteekereza ha ngonzi zaamu zinene.
48.10: Ibara lyamu li̱ku̱mi̱ri̱ kandi bakukuhaariiza mu nsi gyensei̱, mukono gwamu gwa b̯ulyo guli gu̱si̱ngu̱zi̱.
48.11: Lusahu lwa Sayu̱u̱ni̱ lu̱kwi̱za kweb̯uga, Yu̱da gyensei̱ gisemererwe kubba oleti̱ri̱ho b̯winganiza.
48.12: Twali̱bati̱ri̱ mu Sayu̱u̱ni̱ twelogoolya, twabala minaara myaho.
48.13: Twawona bi̱si̱i̱ka byalwo byamaani, b̯uli lugo tuludweho. Mwomwo oliweera, mi̱hi̱hi̱ mi̱kwi̱za nti,
48.14: “Kwokwo Ruhanga weetu̱ eicala biro byensei̱, aliicala na twebembera.”

49.1: Bantu nywensei̱ mwetegeerye, mwegwe kinkukoba nywensei̱ bali hansi,
49.2: wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa na wa hansi, mu̱gu̱u̱da rundi museege.
49.3: Bimbaza bibba bya magezi̱, kandi biteekerezu byange bibba na makuru.
49.4: Mapokopo gange nyaagei̱calyanga ku ngeera, bi̱koi̱kyo byange ni̱mbi̱ti̱ra mu kukuuta ndi̱ngi̱di̱.
49.5: B̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱ b̯unkwatira ki mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa b̯ujune, banyanzigwa b̯ubabba banyeelogoleerye.
49.6: Bab̯wo beesiga b̯u̱gu̱u̱da b̯wab̯u, nibehaariizisya b̯unene b̯weitungu lyab̯u.
49.7: Mu mananu tihaloho muntu akusobora kujuna wondi, rundi kusasulira muhendu gwa b̯womi b̯wamu hali Ruhanga.
49.8: Kili kya muhendu gunene, kwi̱ryaho b̯womi b̯wamu, tooli na kyokusobora kusasula Ruhanga akadweb̯wa,
49.9: we kwicala nooli mwomi biro byensei̱, kandi okakena lu̱ku̱u̱.
49.10: Kubba tuwona ba magezi̱ ni̱bakwa, mpwi̱se na batakukenga de ni̱bakwa, kasi nsimbi zaab̯u nizisigala kudi̱b̯wa bandi.
49.11: Nyanga zoozo zi̱i̱ra kubba maka gaab̯u ga biro na biro, nab̯ubakabba baali na matehe gaab̯u hab̯wab̯u.
49.12: Muntu mu ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamwe kya b̯untu talisigalaho, eisana nka bisolo bihwerekeera.
49.13: Bibi byobyo bikora mpwi̱se, na beesiga bigambu bya badoma,
49.14: nka ntaama zi̱li̱ndi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ ku̱kwa, lu̱ku̱u̱ lu̱kwi̱za ku̱bali̱i̱sya, lubagoromore mu nyanga. Kasu̱mi̱ b̯ukalidwa, bantu ba Ruhanga balibafuga, babahwerekereerye balemwe kwicala mu makaa gaab̯u garungi.
49.15: Bei̱tu̱ Ruhanga alincungura, anjune maani ga lu̱ku̱u̱.
49.16: Mitima myenyu̱ mitalyalyatiranga itungu lya muntu wondi rundi ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya makaa gaamwe kweyongera.
49.17: Kubba handaki bakwe itungu lyab̯u lyensei̱ bali̱ti̱ge i̱nyu̱ma lilemwe kumuhondira.
49.18: Twe bantu tu̱si̱i̱mwa b̯utubba tu̱koori̱ birungi, twensei̱ tusemererwa kubba boomi.
49.19: Bei̱tu̱ tu̱kwi̱za kugyenda kuzumu, hali bahaaha beetu̱, nitub̯ula kwi̱ra kuwonaho, kyererezi̱.
49.20: Ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyetu̱ kya b̯untu ni̱ki̱syeraho, tuli nka bisolo bi̱kwa.

50.1: Yooyo Waamaani̱, Mukama Ruhanga abaza niyeeta bantu ba nsi gyensei̱, kuruga b̯uhulukalyoba kudwa b̯ugwalyoba.
50.2: Ruhanga amuluka mu Sayu̱u̱ni̱, rub̯uga lukukirayo mu b̯urungi.
50.3: Ruhanga weetu̱ wabba nakwi̱za, ti̱yeti̱keera, yebemberwa kingeere kya mworo gu̱kwokya, yeelogoleerwe bbuukuulu.
50.4: Yeeta iguru na nsi kugaba b̯wakei̱so, muwone alimukucwera bantu baamwe musangu.
50.5: Akukoba yati, “Mwesu̱me hali gi̱ya nywe beesigwa bange, banyakukora na gya ndagaanu gya kihongwa.”
50.6: Iguru lirangiira mananu gaamwe, Ruhanga yankei ali mu̱cwi̱ wa musangu!
50.7: Bantu bange ndi Ruhanga! I̱saleeri̱ ndi Ruhanga waamu, weegwa binkukuweera uwe.
50.8: Ti̱nku̱ku̱zi̱nda hab̯wa bihongwa byamu, rundi bihongwa byokye byompongera,
50.9: ti̱ki̱kwetagi̱sya gya kutwala nnumi rundi mbu̱li̱ za mu mali̱i̱si̱i̱ryo gaamu.
50.10: Kubba b̯uli kisolo kyensei̱ kya mwihamba kili kyange, na magana ga nte ha nsahu nku̱mi̱ na nku̱mi̱.
50.11: Nkyegi̱ri̱ bi̱nyoni̱ byensei̱ bya ha nsahu, na byensei̱ bilibatira mwihamba bili byange,
50.12: kakubba nyali nzala, nyakaku̱weereeri̱ kwahi, hab̯wakubba nsi na bigilimwo byensei̱ byange.
50.13: Okutekereza ndya nyama gya nnumi zi̱mu̱hongi̱ri̱, rundi nnywe ibbanga lya mbu̱li̱?
50.14: Gabi̱ranga Ruhanga kihongwa kya ku̱si̱i̱ma, kandi noodosereerya biragaanu byamu na yogwo Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱,
50.15: kasi onkunge nooli mu kizub̯u, nkwi̱za kukujuna kandi olimpariiza.
50.16: Bei̱tu̱ hali nkori̱ za bibii Ruhanga akukoba yati, “Oli kwahi na b̯ugabe b̯wa ku̱hi̱i̱ma biragiro byange, rundi kubaza ha ndagaanu gyange!
50.17: Hab̯wakubba onoba kulamba kwange kandi bigambu byange obikasuka ku̱di̱.
50.18: Woowona mwi̱bi̱ yooyo noonywana nayo. Kandi oicala weekweti̱ na benzi̱.
50.19: “Kanwa kaamu okakoresya bibiibi, kandi kalimi kaamu nikatara b̯u̱gobya.
50.20: Weheeri̱yo kunyegeera banyaruganda baamu, noosensegula mwana wa maawu.
50.21: Bibi bintu byokoori̱, gya nceeri̱ mbyetekereeri̱, waatekerezengi̱ naagya nyaali nka we. Bei̱tu̱ hataati̱ gya ndimu kukulamba nsobi̱ zaamu ni̱nzi̱kwolokya.
50.22: “Mwezi̱remwo nywensei̱ bakwebeera Ruhanga, kitali ki̱kyo nkwi̱za kubahwerekereerya mulemwe na yaabacungura.
50.23: Muntu agaba kihongwa kya ku̱nsi̱i̱ma abba anteri̱mwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, yogwo akora birungi, nyaamwolokyanga kujuna kwa Ruhanga”

51.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, ngiira kisa, hab̯wa ngonzi zaamu zinene, na hab̯wa kuganyira kwamu kwa maani ntoolaho b̯ubiibi b̯wange.
51.2: Onaabi̱i̱rye ki̱mwei̱ nduge mu b̯ubiibi b̯wange, kandi onsyani̱e kuruga mu kibii kyange!
51.3: Kubba nyeetegeri̱i̱ze b̯ubiibi b̯wange, kandi kibii kyange kiicala nikimpondeera.
51.4: Hali we, weewe musa gi̱nsobereerye, kandi nyakora bibii mu mei̱so gaamu, aleke oicale nooli wa mananu wakabazanga, bigambu byamu byolokye nka kwoli wa mananu, aleke osi̱nge bab̯wo bokucwera musangu.
51.5: Wona nyaabyali̱i̱rwe mu kuhenera, kandi nda ginyakumbyala, mmaama yaagyemeti̱ri̱ mu kibii.
51.6: Wona, weegondezera mu mananu gabba mu mutima gwa muntu, kandi onzegesya magezi̱ ga nsita za mutima gwange.
51.7: Ntoolaho kibii kyange aleke nsemere, onaabye nsyane kukiraho pamba.
51.8: Leka nyegwe kusemererwa na masanyu, aleke maku̱ha gobi̱nyi̱ri̱ gasemererwe.
51.9: Bi̱sa mei̱so gaamu galeke kuwona bibii byange, kandi ontooleho ki̱mwei̱ b̯ubiibi b̯wange.
51.10: Ai̱ Ruhanga ompangemwo mutima gukwegwa, kandi onteekemwo mwozo guhyaka.
51.11: Otambinga kuruga mu mei̱so gaamu, otantoolaho mwozo gwamu gu̱syanu̱.
51.12: Nzi̱ri̱i̱rya kusemererwa kwa kujunwa kwamu, kandi ompe mutima gu̱ku̱kwegwa.
51.13: Mwomwo ndyegesya babiibi mihanda myamu, aleke batandike kukuhondera.
51.14: Ai̱ Ruhanga, oncungure kuruga mu kibii kya b̯wi̱ti̱, ai̱ Ruhanga wa kujunwa kwange, kandi kalimi kange kali̱hi̱i̱ma na maani ha mananu gaamu.
51.15: Ai̱ Mukama mbuula mu̱nwa, gusobore kukuhaariiza.
51.16: Kubba tosemererwa mu kihongwa, rundi nyaku̱bbeeri̱ nki̱ku̱heeri̱. Bihongwa byokye tibilikusemeera.
51.17: Bihongwa bya Ruhanga gwogwo mutima gu̱kwezi̱ramwo ai̱ Ruhanga mutima gu̱kwezi̱ramwo kandi gweb̯u̱ndaazi̱ toligugaya.
51.18: Ai̱ Ruhanga bba na kisa na rub̯uga Sayu̱u̱ni̱, bimba b̯uhyaka bi̱si̱i̱ka bya Yeru̱salemu̱.
51.19: Mwomwo olisemererwa mu bihongwa bya mananu, kihongwa kyensei̱ kyokye kikusemeze, kasi nnumi bazihonge ha kyoto kyamu.

52.1: Ai̱ we muntu wa maani, hab̯waki okwempankisya bibii? Ngonzi za Ruhanga zinene ziicalaho biro byensei̱.
52.2: Okutegeka ku̱hwerekereerya bantu banene, Kalimi kaamu kabaza b̯u̱gobya nka nsone gyobi.
52.3: Wendya b̯ubiibi kukira b̯urungi, na kubaza bya b̯u̱gobya kukira mananu.
52.4: Wendya bigambu bikuhuutaaza, ai̱ kalimi kagobya!
52.5: Bei̱tu̱ Ruhanga alikucwacwana akugume hansi hooho oicale biro byensei̱, alikusab̯ula kandi aku̱tooleho b̯wicalu b̯wamu, kandi aku̱ku̱pu̱le kuruga mu nsi gya boomi.
52.6: Bantu barungi baliwona ki̱kyo bati̱i̱ne, kandi bali̱mu̱sekereerya nibakoba.
52.7: “Wona yogo, munyakusuula Ruhanga akabba b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wamwe, kyonkei akacwamwo kwesiga b̯unene b̯weitungu lye, akasigala mu̱si̱gi̱ku̱ kuraba mu ku̱zi̱ndi̱ri̱za bei̱ra.”
52.8: Bei̱tu̱ ndi nka musaali mu̱zayi̱tu̱u̱ni̱ gubisi, gukunyengetera mu nnyu̱mba gya Ruhanga. Nyesiga ngonzi zinene za Ruhanga biro byensei̱.
52.9: Nkwi̱za ku̱ku̱si̱i̱manga Ruhanga biro byensei̱, hab̯wa ki̱kyo kyokoori̱, nyaatanga ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwange muli we hab̯wa ibara lyamu lirungi, nyaakuhariizanga mu mei̱so ga bantu beesigwa.

53.1: Mudoma ateekereza naakoba yati, “Ruhanga eicala waahi.” Bantu ba yatyo babba bagwagwa, bakora bikorwa bibiibi, tihalohoona noomwei̱ akora birungi.
53.2: Ruhanga wa mwiguru waalingiira bantu ba mu nsi, kuwona b̯uhakabbahoona akwetegereza, b̯uhakabbahoona aramya Ruhanga.
53.3: Bensei̱ bahabi̱ri̱, baabba bensei̱ hamwei̱ bagwagwa, tihalohoona noomwei̱ akora kirungi, waahi kadi noomwei̱.
53.4: Zi̱zo nkori̱ za bibii tizigira kwetegereza, bamalaho bantu bange nka bakudya bidyo, tibafaaho kusaba Ruhanga.
53.5: Bakukankana na b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱, hatalohoona kyaku̱ti̱i̱na, kubba Ruhanga acwacwana maku̱ha ga yogwo aku̱ru̱mba, obaswazi̱ri̱, kubba Ruhanga abanu̱gi̱ri̱.
53.6: Ee, nyaakwendeerye kujunwa kwʼI̱saleeri̱ kuruge mu Sayu̱u̱ni̱! Ruhanga aha bantu baamwe mu̱gi̱sa, leka Yakobbo asemererwe, leka I̱saleeri̱ gijaguze.

54.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, njuna hab̯wa ibara lyamu, kandi ontooleho musangu hab̯wa maani gaamu.
54.2: Ai̱ Ruhanga, weegwa kusaba kwange, tegera mapokopo bigambu bya kanwa kange.
54.3: Hab̯wakubba bamyehaariizo bambyokereeri̱, batemu bakwendya ku̱nzi̱ta, kubba ti̱bati̱i̱na Ruhanga.
54.4: Wona, Ruhanga yooyo Mu̱ju̱ni̱ wange, Mukama ali mpagi̱ gya b̯womi b̯wange.
54.5: Banyanzigwa bange ali̱bei̱ri̱i̱rya b̯ubiibi b̯wab̯u, hab̯wa b̯wesigwa b̯wamwo bahwerekeereerya.
54.6: Ai̱ Mukama nyaakuhongiranga kihongwa nsemereerwe, nyaasi̱i̱manga ibara lyamu kubba lili lirungi.
54.7: Hab̯wakubba wancu̱ngu̱u̱ri̱ kuruga mu b̯ujune b̯wensei̱, mei̱so gange gaweeni̱ banyanzigwa bange basi̱ngi̱i̱rwe.

55.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, weegwa kusaba kwange, kandi otanyebi̱si̱i̱ra ninkukusaba kisa!
55.2: Nzegwa, kandi onzi̱remwo, b̯ujune b̯wange b̯u̱nki̱i̱ri̱, mpu̱mwi̱ri̱ kwahi kandi nkulira,
55.3: hab̯wa rugambu lwa banyanzigwa, na ku̱wonawonesya kwa babiibi. Kubba bandeteeri̱ kuwonawona, kandi mu ki̱ni̱ga batara ntaru nagya.
55.4: Mutima gwange guli na b̯ujune, b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱ b̯wa lu̱ku̱u̱ b̯u̱ndoori̱ho.
55.5: B̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱ na kukankana bi̱nzi̱zi̱i̱ri̱, ndimu kujegemeera.
55.6: Kwokwo kukoba yati, “Haa! Kabbengi̱ nyaalingi na bimpaha nka kolomi̱, nyaku̱du̱ndu̱u̱ki̱ri̱ aleke ntunge b̯uhuumuuro.
55.8: Nyakwangu̱hi̱ri̱ ku̱toolya b̯wicalu b̯urungi, nsobore kukena bihehu bya nnobi̱.”
55.9: Ai̱ Mukama bazi̱kye obahu̱kani̱e b̯ulimi b̯wab̯u batakoragana, kubba nkuwona b̯wemi̱ na kuzongoba nikuli mu rub̯uga.
55.10: Bagyenda ni̱belogoleerya bi̱si̱i̱ka byalwo mwinsi nei̱jolo, mu rub̯uga lu̱lwo heicalamwo b̯ubiibi na kabii.
55.11: Hakati̱ mu rub̯uga gafooki̱ri̱ makandi, kumigiriza na nkora za b̯u̱gobya tibiruga mu b̯utali b̯walwo.
55.12: Kabbengi̱ baali banyanzigwa boobo nibaku̱mparaarya, ki̱kyo nyaku̱ki̱gu̱mi̱i̱ri̱, kabbengi̱ baali bampi̱i̱gani̱sya boobo bambyokereeri̱, rundi nyaku̱bebi̱si̱ri̱ho.
55.13: Bei̱tu̱ oli weewe muntu mwi̱ra wange, munywani wange wa kulusegere.
55.14: Yogwo gi̱twanyu̱myengi̱ nayo ki̱mwei̱, nitukukumba hamwei̱ na bantu banene kugyenda mu nnyu̱mba gya Ruhanga.
55.15: Leka lu̱ku̱u̱ lwi̱be b̯wi̱bi̱ banyanzigwa bange batakwega, bagoromorwe kuzumu mu nyanga nibali boomi, kubba bibii bi̱tu̱ngi̱ri̱ b̯uhuumuuro mu bo.
55.16: Bei̱tu̱ gya, nsaba Ruhanga, kandi Mukama alinjuna.
55.17: Nsaba nintaaga, mwakya karei, mwinsi na joojolo, kandi yeegwambe iraka lyange.
55.18: Ancungura ntahu̱teeri̱ na kuhutaara kuruga mu ntaru zibba zi̱mbyokereeri̱, nab̯uhakabbaho banene baku̱ndwani̱sya.
55.19: Ruhanga yogwo mukama wa biro byensei̱, Ruhanga alinzegwa kandi abab̯u̱ndaaze, hab̯wa bikorwa byab̯u bya b̯u̱jeemu̱.
55.20: Mwi̱ra wange yaaru̱mbi̱ri̱ banywanwe yaabinya ndagaanu gye.
55.21: Rubazu lwamwe lwalingi lu̱heheeru̱ nka maku̱ta, bei̱tu̱ mutima gwamwe gwi̱zwi̱ri̱ b̯ulemu, bigambu byamwe byalingi byorob̯u̱ kukira maku̱ta, bei̱tu̱ kandi nibikusala nka nsone mpirima.
55.22: Bizib̯u byamu obikwatyenge Mukama yooyo alikulinda, talikiriza bamananu baamwe kutengeeta.
55.23: Bei̱tu̱ we, ai̱ Ruhanga, waabagoromoranga hansi mu ki̱i̱na kya kuhwerekeera, badulu batemu na bagobya, tibalihangaara kadi na kicweka kya kiro, bei̱tu̱ gya ndikwesiga.

56.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga nkwatirwa kisa, kubba banyanzigwa bange bandu̱mba b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱.
56.2: Nkuharanwa i̱jolo na mwinsi, banene baku̱ndwani̱sya na myehaariizo.
56.3: B̯umba nti̱ni̱ri̱, kwikiriza nkuta muli weewe.
56.4: Mu Ruhanga, wakigambu kimpaariiza, Ruhanga yooyo ginyeesiga, ti̱ndi̱ti̱i̱na. Muntu akusobora kunkora ki?
56.5: Badi̱bya bigyendeerwa byange biro byensei̱, beicala nibantekerezaho b̯ubiibi b̯usa.
56.6: Beicala nibantata ni̱bantolereerya b̯uli hankagyendi̱ri̱, beetegeki̱ri̱ ku̱nzi̱ta b̯wi̱ti̱.
56.7: Ai̱ Ruhanga obafubire hab̯wa bibii byab̯u, hab̯wa ki̱ni̱ga kyamu balemwe kukena.
56.8: Weegi̱ri̱ nka kunkuwonawona, mali̱ga gange waagasoroozi̱ri̱ mu cupa gyamu. Toli weewe waagahandi̱i̱ki̱ri̱ mu kitabbu kyamu?
56.9: Kiro kindikwetiramwo, banyanzigwa bange bali̱singu̱rwa, hooho ndyetegereza nti Ruhanga ali na gya.
56.10: Ruhanga, nkuhaariiza hab̯wa miragu myamu, Mukama , nkuhaariiza hab̯wa miragu myamu.
56.11: Ruhanga yooyo ginyeesiga, ti̱nkwi̱za ku̱ti̱i̱na. Muntu akusobora kunkora kyani?
56.12: Ai̱ Ruhanga, nyaarahi̱i̱ri̱ mu mei̱so gaamu, nkwi̱za kukuha kihongwa kya ku̱ku̱si̱i̱ma.
56.13: Kubba oncu̱ngu̱u̱ri̱ kuruga mu lu̱ku̱u̱, na magulu gange b̯utagwa, kwokwo nsobore kulibatira mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga, mu kyererezi̱ kya b̯womi.

57.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga ngiira kisa, ngiira kisa, kubba muli we hooho b̯womi wange b̯webi̱si̱ra, mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ gwa bimpaha byamu gwogwo gukundinda, ku̱doosya kumalika kwa ki̱heb̯u̱ kya kuhwerekeera.
57.2: Nsaba Ruhanga, Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱, Ruhanga yogwo adoosereerya byabba antegekeeri̱.
57.3: Asi̱ri̱mu̱ka kuruga mwiguru kandi nanjuna, ali̱kwati̱sya nsoni̱ yogwo akunyeb̯ugira. Ruhanga ali̱si̱ndi̱ka ngonzi zaamwe zinene na mananu gaamwe!
57.4: Ndi hakati̱ mu ntali, ndeeri̱ hakati̱ wa misege, badulu bali na meino gakwisana nka masumu na mbasi, banyab̯ulimi b̯wab̯u b̯uli nka mpirima gyobi.
57.5: Ai̱ Ruhanga, ohaariizwe hakyendi̱ weiguru! Leka ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamu kibbe mu nsi gyensei̱.
57.6: Bantegi̱ri̱ mutegu kunkwata, mutima gwange gwehi̱nya, muhanda gwange bali̱mi̱ri̱mwo b̯u̱hya, bei̱tu̱ bab̯u̱gwi̱ri̱mwo bankei.
57.7: Ai̱ Ruhanga, mutima gwange guli gu̱si̱gi̱ku̱ kandi tiguhinduhinduka! Nku̱hi̱i̱ma byembu birungi bya kukuhaariiza!
57.8: Si̱si̱mu̱ka, ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyange! Ai̱ ki̱dongo na ndi̱ngi̱di̱ mu̱byoke, nku̱si̱si̱mu̱ka na mambya.
57.9: Ai̱ Mukama, nku̱ku̱si̱i̱ma mu bantu, nku̱ku̱hi̱i̱mi̱ra kukuhaariiza mu mahanga,
57.10: kubba ngonzi zaamu zinene kukiraho neiguru, b̯wesigwa b̯wamu b̯udwa mpaka mu bikaka.
57.11: Ai̱ Ruhanga ohaariizwe hakyendi̱ weiguru! Leka ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamu kibbe mu nsi gyensei̱.

58.1: Nywe balemi̱ mali̱ biragiro bimutaho bi̱doori̱? Bantu mubacwera misangu na b̯winganiza?
58.2: Kwahi mu mitima myenyu̱ mubahab̯ura bi̱gu̱u̱, mikono myenyu̱ mikora byab̯wemi̱ mu nsi.
58.3: Babiibi bahaba nibakyaruga b̯u̱ru̱gi̱ mu nda, nibatandika ku̱sobya kuruga mu b̯uto b̯wab̯u na mukubaza b̯u̱gobya.
58.4: Bali na b̯umala nka b̯wa mpiri, nka b̯wa mpiri ncwera, zi̱bbu̱mbi̱ri̱ mapokopo.
58.6: Ai̱ Ruhanga, batoole meino mu mi̱nwa myab̯u, ai̱ Mukama binyabinya meino ga ntali zibii!
58.7: Leka basyere nka meezi̱ gakuheta b̯u̱heti̱, bahotoke nka b̯usubi b̯u̱kandagire.
58.8: Boome nka ki̱tani̱i̱na ki̱kwereeri̱ mu lusonko lwakyo, nka mwana nzomoki̱ ataliwonahoona kalyoba.
58.9: Ruhanga ali̱zi̱ki̱i̱rya ki̱mwei̱ bato na bahandu̱, b̯wangu hoi̱ kukira nka kyese ki̱bei̱ci̱i̱rye ha mworo gwa makala.
58.10: Muntu munanu alisemererwa kuwona mubiibi naafubirwa, magulu gaamwei aliganabira mwibbanga lya nkori̱ za bibii.
58.11: Bantu balikoba yati, “Mananu kwo heicalaho mpeera gya beesigwa, mananu kwo heicalaho Ruhanga mu̱cwi̱ wa musangu ku nsi.”

59.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, ncungura kuruga mu banyanzigwa bange, ondinde hali bab̯wo baku̱mbyokeera.
59.2: Njuna kuruga mu nkori̱ za bibii, kandi onsi̱ngu̱ri̱sye kuruga mu batemu.
59.3: Kubba bandali̱ri̱i̱ri̱ ku̱nzi̱ta, badulu bakabi bambyokeeryeho ntaru. Ai̱ Mukama , ntali na nsobi̱ rundi kabii kensei̱,
59.4: nab̯untali nabo musangu, bei̱tu̱ bo beicala banyeci̱i̱ki̱i̱ri̱. Si̱si̱mu̱ka, oi̱ze ondombe, kandi owone.
59.5: We Mukama Ruhanga wa mahe, oli Ruhanga wʼI̱saleeri̱. Byokiramwo kufubira, mahanga gensei̱, otakeni̱a noomwei̱ mu batab̯ura nkwe za b̯ubii.
59.6: B̯uli joojolo bei̱ra, nibaturuuma nka mbwene, nibalibatalibata mu rub̯uga.
59.7: Babaza bigambo bya kuntinisiriirya ku̱nzi̱ta na mpirima mu mi̱nwa myab̯u, nibaniihira tihaloho aku̱beegwa.
59.8: Ai̱ Mukama , oseke b̯u̱seki̱, mahanga gensei̱ gaku̱jeemera.
59.9: Ai̱ Ruhanga, weewe maani gange, na b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wange b̯unyesiga.
59.10: Ruhanga wange, mu ngonzi zaamu zinene, olinyebembera kandi nsi̱ngu̱re banyanzigwa bange.
59.11: Otabei̱ta bensei̱ kubba bantu bange handaki bebeere b̯wangu bi̱waakoori̱, basasaani̱e habwa maani gaamu kandi obasi̱ngu̱re, ai̱ Mukama , ngab̯u gyetu̱!
59.12: Hab̯wa kibii kya mi̱nwa myab̯u, bigambu bya ndimi zaab̯u, leka bakwatwe mu marara gaab̯u, hab̯wa kukyena na b̯u̱gobya b̯ubabaza.
59.13: Bahwerekereerye mu ki̱ni̱ga, mpaka bamali̱ki̱ri̱ho, kwokwo beege nti Ruhanga alema Yakobbo, kumaaliiro gya nsi.
59.14: B̯uli joojolo bei̱ra, nibaturuuma nka mbwene, nibalibatalibata mu rub̯uga.
59.15: Bandaara ni̱baku̱toolereerya bidyo benghurunghuutya b̯u̱balemwa kubyagya.
59.16: Bei̱tu̱ nku̱hi̱i̱ma kuhaariiza maani gaamu, b̯uli mwakya karei, mmpi̱i̱ma na maani hab̯wa ngonzi zaamu zinene, kubba oicala b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wange na mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ gwange mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa kizib̯u.
59.17: Ai̱ Ruhanga, weewe maani gange, nku̱ku̱hi̱i̱mi̱ra nkuhaariize, kubba weewe oicala b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wange, Ruhanga anzolokya ngonzi zinene.

60.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, otu̱nu̱gi̱ri̱, watubinya ntege, oi̱ceeri̱ na ki̱ni̱ga, caali tu̱ganyi̱re.
60.2: Oheeri̱ nsi kutengeeta wagibinyabinyamwo, su̱ngi̱i̱ra mi̱nyangaara byagyo kubba gikudengeeta.
60.3: Oheeri̱ bantu baamu kuwonawona bintu byakalaseeni̱, otu̱heeri̱ vi̱i̱no gi̱ku̱tu̱tami̱i̱rya.
60.4: Woolokeerye b̯u̱bonero b̯wamu hali bab̯wo baku̱ti̱i̱na, aleke basobore kukena kabii.
60.5: Cungura bawendya, obajune na mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo, kandi otwi̱remwo!
60.6: Ruhanga abazi̱ri̱ nali mu kiikaru kyamwe ki̱syanu̱, naakoba yati, “Mu kusemererwa kunene ndi̱bagaani̱amwo Sekemu̱, kandi ngabire bantu bange kihanga kya Su̱koosi̱.
60.7: Gi̱ryadi̱, nsi gyange, Manaase de gyange, Efu̱rayi̱mu̱, kyoma kilinda mu̱twe gwange, Yu̱da, mubbeere gwa b̯ukama b̯wange.
60.8: Mowaabbu gyogyo kalaaya gyange haanabi̱ra, Edomu̱ hooho nzi̱ca nkei̱to zange, mu Fi̱ri̱si̱ti̱ hooho nyeb̯uga hab̯wa b̯u̱si̱ngu̱zi̱.”
60.9: Naani alintwala mu rub̯uga lunyamaani? Akanyebembera kugyenda mu Edomu̱?
60.10: Ai̱ Mukama , mali̱ otu̱nu̱gi̱ri̱ kwahi? Kotakwebembera mahe geetu̱?
60.11: Beiraba tu̱ju̱ne hali banyanzigwa beetu̱, kubba kujuna kwa bantu tikugasa!
60.12: Ruhanga nka kwali ha rubaju lwetu̱ tu̱ku̱si̱ngu̱ra, yooyo akuziginiira banyanzigwa beetu̱.

61.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, weegwa kukunga kwange, weetegeerye kusaba kwange.
61.2: Kuruga ha mmaliiro gya nsi nyeeta weewe, mutima gwange b̯ugubba gumaalikiirwemwona maani, onyebembere hali mwandaara, gukukirahoona b̯ule b̯wange.
61.3: Kubba weewe oi̱ceeri̱ lukomera lwange, mu̱longooti̱ gwa maani hali banyanzigwa.
61.4: Leka ncalire mu heema gyamu biro byensei̱! Leka nyebi̱si̱re mu bimpaha byamu.
61.5: Kubba weewe ai̱ Ruhanga, weegwi̱ri̱ kurahira kwange, wampa b̯ugwetwa b̯wa bab̯wo bati̱i̱na ibara lyamu.
61.6: Wongere biro bya b̯womi b̯wa mukama, leka myaka myamwe myeyongere ku̱doosya mi̱hi̱hi̱ minene.
61.7: Kwokwo eicarenge ha kitebe kyamwe mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga biro byensei̱, aragire ngonzi zinene na b̯wesigwa bimulindenge.
61.8: Nahab̯waki̱kyo ndiicala ni̱nku̱hi̱mi̱ra kukuhariiza, ni̱nku̱dooseereerya miragu myange biro byensei̱.

62.1: Mwozo gwange guhuumulira mu Ruhanga musa, kujunwa kwange kuruga hali yo.
62.2: Yooyo musa ali lubbaali lwange na kujunwa kwange, lugo lwange lunyamaani, tinditengeeta.
62.3: Nywe nywensei̱ mu̱li̱doosya di̱i̱ ku̱ndu̱mba, gya akwisana ki̱si̱i̱ka ki̱gogomi̱ri̱ kandi lugo lu̱swaswani̱ki̱ri̱?
62.4: Bategeka ku̱nzi̱rya hansi kuntoola mu kiikaru kyange kya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa. Benyumiza mu kubazaho b̯u̱gobya. Mi̱nwa myab̯u mibaza bigambo bya kuha mu̱gi̱sa, bei̱tu̱ mitima myab̯u mibba nimikukyena b̯u̱kyeni̱.
62.5: Ai̱ Mwozo gwange, gu̱li̱ndi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ Ruhanga musa, kubba ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwange kuruga hali yooyo.
62.6: Yooyo musa ali lubbaali lwange na kujunwa kwange, lugo lwange lunyamaani, tinditengeeta.
62.7: Mu Ruhanga hooho kujunwa kwange na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyange biruga, ali yooyo cali nyi̱ru̱ki̱ra.
62.8: Nywe bantu, mu̱mwesi̱genge b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱, mitima myenyu̱ mu̱mi̱mu̱he, yooyo b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wetu̱.
62.9: Bantu beicala rwoya lusa, kadi babbe na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa teetei̱, nob̯wobata ha ndengu, tibagira raati̱ri̱.
62.10: Otalyesiga nsimbi zootu̱ngi̱ri̱ mu b̯u̱nyagi̱, rundi kwetembya hab̯wa bintu bi̱i̱be, itungu lyamu nab̯ubilikanya, otalilitaho mutima gwamu.
62.11: Kintu kya Ruhanga abazi̱ri̱ gu̱mwei̱, nkyegwi̱ri̱ mirundi mibiri nti b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wensei̱, b̯uruga hali yo.
62.12: Muli we Mukama hooho ngonzi zinene zibba, kubba olisasula b̯uli muntu nka mulimo gwamwe ku guli.

63.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, oli weewe Ruhanga wange gintoolya, na mutima gwange gwensei̱, mwozo gwange gukukuhyahyanira, mubiri gwange gu̱ku̱ku̱toolya, mu nsi gyomu gi̱nu̱u̱gi̱i̱rwe, gitalimwo meezi̱.
63.2: Kyokyo ndimu kukuwona mu nnyu̱mba gyamu, mbona b̯u̱sobozi̱ na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamu.
63.3: Hab̯wa ngonzi zaamu zinene, zitahinduka zikiraho na b̯womi, nahahwo nkwi̱za kukuhaariizanga.
63.4: Nyaakuhaariizanga nincaali mwomi, nyaaku̱byokeeryanga mikono ninkukusaba.
63.5: Mwozo gwange gwecu̱tanga nka ndi̱i̱ri̱ masaju, kandi kanwa kange kahi̱i̱manga kusemererwa kwa kukuhaariiza,
63.6: nkwi̱zu̱ka nindi ha ntabbu, nku̱tekerezaho i̱jolo lyensei̱.
63.7: Hab̯wakubba weewe oli mu̱ju̱ni̱ b̯wange, mu mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ gwa bimpaha byamu, hooho nyaahi̱i̱mi̱ranga.
63.8: Mwozo gwange gu̱kwekweti̱ mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo gwogwo gundinda.
63.9: Bei̱tu̱ bab̯wo batoolya ku̱nzi̱ta, baligyenda hansi kuzumu.
63.10: Bei̱twanga mpirima kandi babbanga bidyo bya mahi̱mbe.
63.11: Mukama yaasemererwanga hab̯wa b̯u̱si̱ngu̱zi̱ b̯wa Ruhanga amuha, bab̯wo bensei̱ baragani̱sya nibarahira mwibara lya Ruhanga balitunga ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, hab̯wakubba mi̱nwa mya bagobya milijalwa.

64.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, nzegwa, ninkukuweera byetaagu byange, b̯womi b̯wange ob̯ulindenga ntati̱i̱na banyanzigwa.
64.2: Ntegura kuruga mu nkwe za babiibi, na kuruga hakati̱ wa nkori̱ za bibii,
64.3: bab̯wo bobohya ndimi zaab̯u nka mpirima, nibategeka bigambu bikululuha nka mbasi zi̱i̱ti̱.
64.4: Zibakulasa mu nsita zi̱pi̱mi̱ri̱ muntu atali na musangu, nibazilasa mbura kulekeera kandi batali na b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱.
64.5: Ni̱basi̱gi̱ki̱ra ha bigyendeerwa byab̯u bibiibi, bategeka kutega mitegu nibateekereza nti, “Naani akusobora kumiwona?”
64.6: Bategeka kukora b̯utali b̯winganiza, nibakobanga, “Tu̱tegeki̱ri̱ kurungi.” Kitekerezo na mutima bya muntu tosobora kubyetegereza.
64.7: Bei̱tu̱ Ruhanga ali̱balasa na mbasi zaamwe, bahutaare b̯ulohob̯uloho.
64.8: Ali̱bahwerekereerya hab̯wa bigambu byab̯u bankei bibabaza, bantu bensei̱ balibawona bakwi̱za ku̱zi̱ngi̱i̱zya mi̱twe.
64.9: Kasi bantu bensei̱ bati̱i̱ne, batebye mulimo gwa Ruhanga, bateekereza ha bi̱yaakoori̱.
64.10: Leka munanu asemererwe mu Mukama , kandi ei̱ru̱ki̱re muli yo. Leka bananu mu mutima bensei̱ bamuhaariize.

65.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, weewe osemereeri̱ kuhaariizib̯wa mu Sayu̱u̱ni̱, hali we miragu myetu̱ mi̱kwi̱za kudwereera.
65.2: Ai̱ Ruhanga, weewe oi̱ramu kusaba, bantu bensei̱ bali̱i̱za hali weewe.
65.3: Bibii byetu̱ nab̯ubyabba byali byakalaseeni̱, waatu̱ganyi̱i̱ri̱ b̯ubiibi b̯wetu̱.
65.4: Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bab̯wo bookomi̱ri̱, okabaleeta kwicala kwamwamu! Tuheeb̯wa binene bya mu nnyu̱mba gyamu Yeekaru gi̱syanu̱.
65.5: Ai̱ Ruhanga Mu̱ju̱ni̱ weetu̱, otwi̱remwo na bi̱ku̱ti̱i̱ni̱sya byokora bya mananu, ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwa nsi gyensei̱, na kwa mataka ga hadei.
65.6: Munyakuhanga nsahu hab̯wa maani, na b̯u̱sobozi̱ waamu!
65.7: Weemereerya kuhuura kwamataka, kukuuta kwa bijanga na b̯u̱gu̱gu̱mu̱ko mu mahanga.
65.8: Nsi gyensei̱ gi̱ti̱i̱na byokora, weewe okesya b̯wi̱re noob̯uha na kusweka, oragira bantu bahi̱i̱me hab̯wa kusemererwa.
65.9: Weewe olinda nsi kandi noguma ndagali̱, aleke bilimwa bikwahukana byere, mugira gwamu tigwoma kandi nsi ogi̱tegeka kubba na bidyo bya mpuule binene.
65.10: Weewe oguma ndagali̱ mu ndimiro, nosi̱ndi̱ka b̯utuntu kwi̱nyamya nsi, bilimwa noobiha mu̱gi̱sa.
65.11: Mwaka ogukingaho na birungi binene, b̯uli hokagyendi̱ri̱ habbaho magesa ganene.
65.12: Isubi linene lyeri̱ri̱ mwihamba, nsahu zi̱zwi̱ri̱ kusemererwa.
65.13: Mali̱i̱si̱i̱ryo gei̱zwi̱ri̱ magana, mpuule zinene zeri̱ri̱ mu bihanga, bantu baku̱hi̱i̱ma kandi bakukuuta mi̱zi̱ra hab̯wa kusemererwa!

66.1: Muhaariize Ruhanga na kusemererwa, bantu nywensei̱ ba mu nsi.
66.2: Hi̱i̱me ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyeibara lyamwe, mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa!
66.3: Muweere Ruhanga yati, “Bintu byakora kwo bya b̯uzira, maani gaamu gali ganene, gaha banyanzigwa baamu kwi̱za hali we nibagula b̯wagu̱li̱.
66.4: Bantu ba mu nsi gyensei̱ baku̱ramye, kandi baku̱hi̱i̱mi̱ra kuhaariiza ibara lyamu.”
66.5: Mwi̱ze muwone Ruhanga byakoori̱ mu bantu, byamaani kandi bi̱ku̱ti̱i̱ni̱sya!
66.6: Yaahi̱ndu̱u̱ri̱ itaka lyei̱ra nsi gyomu, bali̱bati̱ri̱ na magulu hakati̱ wa meezi̱, i̱ze aleke tujaguze muli yo.
66.7: Alema biro byensei̱ na b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wamwe, mei̱so gaamwe gali̱ngi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ mahanga gensei̱, bajeemu̱ baleke kumubyokeera.
66.8: Muhaariize Ruhanga weetu̱ nywe bantu, leke iraka lya kumuhaariiza kwenyu̱ balyegwe,
66.9: atu̱li̱ndi̱ri̱ nituli boomi, yaagaana magulu geetu̱ kukiibbala.
66.10: Ruhanga waatu̱lengi̱ri̱, nka feeza kugiraba mu mworo.
66.12: Waaleki̱ri̱ bantu batwicaara ha mi̱twe, twarabi̱ri̱ mu mworo na mu meezi̱, bei̱tu̱ mu byensei̱ waatu̱hu̱u̱mu̱u̱li̱i̱rye.
66.13: Nyei̱zanga mu yeekaru gyamu na bihongwa byokye, ndosereerye kweraga kwange,
66.14: ku̱nyeeragi̱ri̱ na mu̱nwa gwange, b̯unyaali nindi mu b̯ujune.
66.15: Nyaakuhongiranga bihongwa byokye bya bisolo bya masaju, na mwi̱ca gwa kihongwa kya ntaama, nyaakuhongiranga kisembu kya mbu̱li̱ na nte.
66.16: I̱ze mwetegeerye, nywe bati̱i̱na Ruhanga, mbaweere byankoleeri̱.
66.17: Nyaamu̱ku̱ngi̱ri̱ na mu̱nwa gwange, kalimi kange kalimi kumuhaariiza.
66.18: Kakubba bibii nyaalingi mbi̱bi̱si̱i̱ri̱ mu mutima gwange, Mukama yaaku̱bbeeri̱ atanzegwi̱ri̱.
66.19: Bei̱tu̱ Ruhanga yeetegeerye kandi yeegwi̱ri̱ iraka lyange ninkusaba.
66.20: Ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kibbe hali Ruhanga, atanu̱gi̱ri̱ kusaba kwange, rundi kuntoolaho ngonzi zaamwe zinene.

67.1: Leka Ruhanga atugiire mbabazi̱, atuhe mu̱gi̱sa gwamu, kandi mei̱so gaamwe gatumulukire,
67.2: aleke muhanda gwamu bagwege mu nsi, mahanga gensei̱ gatunge maani ga kujuna kwamu.
67.3: Ai̱ Ruhanga, leka bantu bakuhaariize, leka bantu bensei̱ bakuhaariize!
67.4: Leka mahanga gasemererwe kandi gahi̱i̱me hab̯wa kwegonza, kubba weewe ocwa musangu na b̯winganiza, kandi mahanga gensei̱ ga mu nsi weewe ogalema.
67.5: Ai̱ Ruhanga, leka bantu bakuhaariize, leka bantu bensei̱ bakuhaariize!
67.6: Nsi gyereerye binene, Ruhanga, Ruhanga weetu̱ atu̱heeri̱ mu̱gi̱sa.
67.7: Ruhanga atu̱heeri̱ mu̱gi̱sa, leka bantu bensei̱ ba mu nsi bamuhe ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.

68.1: Ruhanga wange byoka, aleke banyanzigwa baamu, basasaane, kandi bab̯wo bamunoba bali̱mwi̱ru̱ke!
68.2: Nka mwi̱ca ku̱gu̱tu̱u̱ka, kwokwo nawe oli̱beeru̱kya, nka b̯ubbaani kuhunyelela mu mworo, kwokwo nkori̱ za bibii zilihwerekeera mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga!
68.3: Bei̱tu̱ bananu basemererwe, kandi bajaguze mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga, bajaguze na kusemererwa hoi̱!
68.4: Mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Ruhanga nimumuhariiza, yooyo Mukama ali, hakyendi̱ wa b̯uli kintu mwi̱ze mu mei̱so gaamwe na kusemererwa.
68.5: Yooyo bba nfu̱u̱zi̱ kandi awooneera na bamukaabakwere, ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ mu kiikaru kyamwe kitongoole.
68.6: Aha bantu bakulungwa lungwa b̯wicalu, banyankomo naabatesu̱la bei̱tu̱ bajeemu̱ baliwonawona mu nsi gya ndala.
68.7: Ai̱ Ruhanga weebembeeri̱ bantu baamu kuruga mu nsi gya b̯wiru, waalibata nabo kuraba mwihamba.
68.8: Nsi giitengeeta iguru niliguma ndagali̱, mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga wa Sinaayi, mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga wʼI̱saleeri̱.
68.9: Ai̱ Ruhanga waagu̱mi̱ri̱ ndagali̱ ginene, nsi gyamu ginyaakubba gyomi̱ri̱ gyeinyama.
68.10: Ai̱ Ruhanga, bantu baamu baatu̱ngi̱ri̱ yo b̯wicalu, mu b̯urungi b̯wamu, waagabiira bali mu b̯wetaagu.
68.11: Ruhanga agabi̱ri̱ kigambu, mahe ga bakali̱ galimwo kwami̱i̱rya makuru garungi.
68.12: “Bakama na mahe gaab̯u beeru̱ki̱ri̱, bakali̱ bʼI̱saleeri̱ baru̱gi̱ri̱ mu maka gaab̯u bali mu kubagana bintu byei̱he lyab̯u lyanyagi̱ri̱.
68.13: B̯uli muntu yaatu̱ngi̱ri̱ mugab̯u na banyakubba mu mali̱i̱si̱i̱ryo ga ntaama, baasengi̱ri̱yo bi̱si̱sani̱ bya makolome ga wa bimpaha b̯i̱doli̱ge na zaabbu na byoza b̯i̱doli̱ge na feeza.”
68.14: Ruhanga Wab̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wensei̱ yei̱ru̱ki̱i̱rye bakama banyanzigwa, nka mahi̱ga ga ndagali̱ gagwi̱ri̱ ha lusahu lwa zaali̱mooni̱.
68.15: Bbasaani̱, oli lusahu lwa maani. Oli lusahu lu̱wa mi̱twe minene!
68.16: Hab̯waki oli nei̱hali̱ na lusahu Sayu̱u̱ni̱ lwa Ruhanga yeegombi̱ri̱, cali Mukama eicala biro byensei̱.
68.17: Mukama yei̱zi̱ri̱ kuruga Sinaayi, yengira mu kiikaru kyamwe ki̱syanu̱ na mahe ga bavu̱gi̱ batembi̱ri̱ bigaali nku̱mi̱ na nku̱mi̱.
68.18: Waatembi̱ri̱ hakyendi̱, weebembeeri̱ bantu banene bab̯wo baawaatoori̱ mu b̯unyagwa, bantu nibakuha bisembu, na kuruga mu bajeemu̱, Mukama Ruhanga aliicalayo.
68.19: Tu̱haari̱i̱ze Mukama, yogwo atwetwekera migugu myetu̱ b̯uli kiro, Ruhanga yooyo kujunwa kwetu̱.
68.20: Ruhanga weetu̱ ali Ruhanga wa kujuna, kandi hali Mukama Ruhanga hooho tuhonera lu̱ku̱u̱.
68.21: Ruhanga ali̱tema mi̱twe mya banyanzigwa, anyongotolere ki̱mwei̱ b̯uhanga b̯wa balibatira mu kuhenera.
68.22: Mukama yaakoba yati, “Nkwi̱za kubatoolayo kuruga Bbasaani̱, mbatoole na mu ndi̱ha gyeitaka,
68.23: aleke nywe bantu bange magulu geenyu̱ muganaabe neibbanga lyab̯u, na mbwene zaamu zitungeho kya kudya ha mibiri myab̯u.”
68.24: Ai̱ Ruhanga kukumba kwamu baku̱weeni̱, kukumba kwa Ruhanga wange, kandi mukama wange mu nnyu̱mba gyamwei.
68.25: Bahi̱i̱mi̱ bebembeeri̱, baku̱u̱ti̱ ba bikwatu bilira nibabahondeeranga, hakati̱ waab̯u nihaloho bahalaba baku̱u̱ti̱ ba bi̱cekere.
68.26: “Muhaariize Ruhanga mu bantu banene, na nywe muli baalula lwʼI̱saleeri̱.”
68.27: Haloho Bbenyami̱i̱ni̱, muto b̯wab̯u akusembayo, kasi bahandu̱ ba Yu̱da hamwei̱ na kitebe kyab̯u, ahonderweho bahandu̱ ba Zabbu̱looni̱ na Nafutaali.
68.28: Ai̱ Ruhanga twolokye maani gaamu nka ku̱waakoori̱ woodi̱, ai̱ Ruhanga maani gokoresya muli twe.
68.29: Bakama bali̱i̱za na bisembu ku̱ku̱si̱i̱ma, hab̯wa yeekaru gyamu mu Yeru̱salemu̱.
68.30: Fubira ki̱kyo kisolo kiicalira mu kikemu, fubira ihanga li̱lyo lya bali̱mi̱ baalyo na bantu bali nka nnumi za mu kisaka, bakwagulire nibakukuletera bisembu, obi̱nge bantu basemererwa mu kubba na b̯ulemu.
68.31: Bakama baliruga Mi̱si̱ri̱ na I̱syopi̱ya, balibyokya mikono myab̯u baramye Ruhanga.
68.32: Mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Ruhanga nywe bantu ba nsi gyensei̱, mu̱hi̱i̱me muhaariize Mukama.
68.33: Yogwo eicala mwiguru, iguru lya kadei, wona asi̱ndi̱ka iraka, iraka lyamwei lya hakyendi̱.
68.34: Mu̱rangi̱i̱re b̯u̱sobozi̱ waamwe, waki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa alema I̱saleeri̱, maani gaamwei gali mwiguru.
68.35: Oli Ruhanga oti̱i̱ni̱sya nooli mu kiikaru kyamu ki̱syanu̱, Ruhanga wʼI̱saleeri̱, ogaba maani na b̯u̱sobozi̱ mu bantu baamu, Ruhanga osemereeri̱ kuhaariizwa.

69.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, njuna! Hab̯wakubba meezi̱ gandoori̱ mwi̱coti̱.
69.2: Ndi̱ki̱i̱ri̱ mu cokodo mulei, tihaloho na ha kwi̱cya kigulu, ndi mu meezi̱ galei bijanga bili heehi̱ ku̱mbu̱tya.
69.3: Njwahi̱ri̱ hab̯wa kukunga kwange kwa kucungurwa, mimiro myange myomi̱ri̱ mei̱so ganzi̱mbi̱ri̱, hab̯wa kulindiira Ruhanga wange.
69.4: Bannobira b̯usa, bali banene kukira ntumbu za mu̱twe gwange, bamaani boobo bakwendya ku̱nzi̱kya, bakumpangiira, bakumpambiriza kusasula bintu bi̱ntatweri̱.
69.5: Ruhanga, weewe weegi̱ri̱ b̯udoma b̯wange nsobi̱ zi̱nkoori̱ ti̱zebi̱si̱ri̱ hali we.
69.6: Ai̱ Mukama , Ruhanga wa mahe, leka baku̱ni̱hi̱ra muli we, bataswara hab̯wange, ai̱ Ruhanga wʼI̱saleeri̱, otaleka bakwesiga nibakasekwa.
69.7: Hab̯wamu, ntu̱ngi̱ri̱ muswaru, nsoni̱ zi̱mbu̱mbi̱ri̱ mei̱so.
69.8: Ndi nka mu̱genyi̱ hali banyaruganda bange, munyamahanga hali baana ba mmaama.
69.9: Bihika binene bya nnyu̱mba gyamu bi̱mmaari̱ mwozo, bi̱lu̱mo bya bantu bi̱baku̱ku̱lu̱ma nagya babba ni̱baku̱ndu̱ma.
69.10: B̯unkunga kandi nkasiiba, nakyo ki̱i̱ra ki̱lu̱mo.
69.11: B̯undwala nsensede, bantu batandika nkunseka b̯u̱seki̱.
69.12: Bab̯wo beicaara ha mulyangu gwa rub̯uga banseka b̯u̱seki̱, ndi kyembu kya batami̱i̱ru̱.
69.13: Ai̱ Mukama , bei̱tu̱ gya nsaba weewe, mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa kisa kyamu, hab̯wa ngonzi zaamu zamaani, ai̱ Ruhanga onzi̱remwo mu ngonzi zaamu zinene, onzi̱remwo na kujuna kwamu kwa biribiri.
69.14: Ncungura kuruga mu cogodo, otandeka nkabbuta, njuna bab̯wo bannobi̱ri̱, onjune na kuruga mu meezi̱ ga ndi̱ha.
69.15: Otaleka bijanga kunkuuta, nkabbu̱ti̱ra mu meezi̱ rundi nkamerwa cogodo.
69.16: Ai̱ Mukama , nzi̱ramwo, hab̯wa b̯urungi b̯wa ngonzi zaamu zinene, hab̯wa kisa kyamu kinene nzegwa.
69.17: Otabi̱sa mei̱so gaamu hali muheereza waamu, nzi̱ramwo b̯wangu kubba ndi mu b̯ujune.
69.18: Weesu̱ma heehi̱ nagya onjune, ncungura hab̯wa banyanzigwa bange.
69.19: Weegi̱ri̱ ku̱lu̱mwa kwange, na muswaru gwange kandi kugaywa kundimwo, banyanzigwa bange bensei̱ obeegi̱ri̱.
69.20: Bi̱lu̱mo bi̱nzi̱ti̱ri̱ mutima, bi̱nti̱gi̱ri̱ ntali na maani, ntoleerye akungiira kisa, bei̱tu̱ atakabbeho, na naaku̱mpu̱mu̱u̱lya ntakamuwone.
69.21: B̯unyaali nzala bampeeri̱ bidyo bikwisana nka b̯utwa, nyoota b̯u̱gyankweti̱, bampeeri̱ vi̱i̱no gilulu gyogyo nnywe.
69.22: Leka magenyi̱ gaab̯u gafooke nka mutegu, na b̯u̱si̱nge b̯ubali nab̯wo b̯u̱bafookere mukorogo.
69.23: Leka mei̱so gaab̯u geijale aleke batawona, kandi magulu gaab̯u geicale nigakankana.
69.24: Obakwatirwe ki̱ni̱ga kyamu, leka b̯usungu b̯wamu b̯ukwaka b̯ubadweho.
69.25: B̯wicalu b̯wab̯u gabbe makandi, hatabbaho noomwei̱ akwicala mu heema zaab̯u.
69.26: Kubba bahi̱gani̱za yogwo gi̱waafu̱bi̱i̱ri̱, ni̱bateerya kukuuta bab̯wo booru̱mi̱i̱rye.
69.27: Bateerye kifubiro ha kifubiro, kandi otabaganyira.
69.28: Leka basusurwe mu kitabbu kya boomi, leka batabalirwa hamwei̱ na ba mananu.
69.29: Ndimu kuwonawona kandi mu b̯u̱ru̱mi̱, ai̱ Ruhanga, leka kujuna kwamu kundindenge!
69.30: Nkwi̱za kuhaariiza Ruhanga na kyembu, nkwi̱za kumuha ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa na ku̱mu̱si̱i̱ma.
69.31: Kiki ki̱kwi̱za kusemeera Mukama kukira kumuhongera nte, rundi kumuhongera nnumi giwa mahembe na bi̱nompo.
69.32: Bab̯u̱ndaaru̱ b̯ubaliwona ki̱kyo balisemereerwa, nywe batoolya Ruhanga, leke mitima myenyu̱ mi̱rwemwo.
69.33: Hab̯wakubba Mukama yeegwa bali mu b̯wetaagu, kandi ti̱yeebeera bantu baamwe bali banyankomo.
69.34: Leka iguru na nsi bi̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze, mataka na binyakulimwo byensei̱.
69.35: Kubba Ruhanga alijuna Sayu̱u̱ni̱ kandi abi̱mbe mbuga za mu Yu̱da, bantu balicalamwo kandi balugweterwe,
69.36: beizukulu ba baheereza baamwe balilugweterwa, na bab̯wo bendya ibara lyamwe, boobo bali̱lwicalamwo.

70.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga wanguha oncungura, ai̱ Mukama wanguha onjune.
70.2: Leka baku̱toolya ku̱nzi̱ta bakwatwe nsoni̱ kandi bahugutane, bakwendya mpwerekeere bemuke na muswaru.
70.3: Leka beicala nibamponereerya nibambweranga nti, “Ee, koowonewone,” bemuke na muswaru!
70.4: Bensei̱ baku̱toolya, bajaguze kandi basemererwe muli weewe, leka bab̯wo bendya kujunwa kwamu, beicalenge nibakoba yati, “Ruhanga wamaani!”
70.5: Bei̱tu̱ gya ndi munaku kandi mu b̯wetaagu, ai̱ Ruhanga i̱za b̯wangu hali gya, weewe Mu̱ju̱ni̱ kandi mu̱cu̱ngu̱ri̱ wange, ai̱ Mukama , otakereerwa.

71.1: Ai̱ Mukama mu weewe, hooho nzi̱ru̱ki̱i̱ri̱, otandeka nkaswara.
71.2: Onjune kandi oncungure hab̯wa mananu gaamu, ntegera mapokopo gaamu, onjune!
71.3: Mbeera lubbaali lwa kwebi̱si̱ramwo, ha nkusobora kugyendanga, hu̱lu̱kya kiragiro kya kunjuna, bba lubbaali lwange kandi lugo lwange.
71.4: Ai̱ Ruhanga wange, ncungura kuruga mu mikono mya nkori̱ za bibii, oncungure kuruga mu mikono mya bantu babiibi na badulu ba bbuuru.
71.5: Hab̯wakubba Mukama weewe ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwange, hanteeka b̯u̱si̱gi̱ki̱ro kuruga mu b̯uto b̯wange.
71.6: B̯womi b̯wange b̯wensei̱ b̯wehomeereeri̱ weewe, ondi̱ndi̱ri̱ kuruga nyaabyali̱i̱rwe. Ndiicala ninkuhaariizanga.
71.7: Nceeri̱ kyakusungwa mu bantu banene, bei̱tu̱ weewe lugo lwange lu̱si̱gi̱ku̱.
71.8: Mu̱nwa gwange gwi̱zwi̱ri̱ bigambu bya kukuhaariiza, na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamu kiro kyensei̱.
71.9: Otalindeka b̯undibba ngu̱lu̱u̱si̱ri̱, otalinzebeera b̯undibba ntali na maani.
71.10: Kubba banyanzigwa bange bakumbaza kubii, bakora rukwe lwa ku̱nzi̱ta nibaraganira hamwei̱.
71.11: Bakoba yati, “Ruhanga amwebeereeri̱. Mu̱mu̱bi̱nge kandi mumukwate, kubba tihaloho akusobora kumujuna.”
71.12: Ai̱ Ruhanga otabba hadei na gya, ai̱ Ruhanga wange i̱za b̯wangu onjune!
71.13: Leka baku̱mpangi̱ri̱i̱rya bakwatwe nsoni̱ kandi bahwerekeere, leka bakwendya kumputaaza bahugutane kandi basware.
71.14: Bei̱tu̱ gya nyaabbanga na ku̱ni̱hi̱ra, ninkuhaariizanga b̯utalekeera.
71.15: Mu̱nwa gwange gulibazanga ha mananu gaamu, ga kujuna kwamu kiro kyensei̱, kubba b̯unene b̯wago b̯u̱nki̱i̱ri̱ kwetegereza.
71.16: Ai̱ Mukama Wab̯u̱sobozi̱, nkwi̱za kurangiira byamaani byokora, nkwi̱za kurangiira mananu gaamu weewe musa.
71.17: Ai̱ Ruhanga, kuruga mu b̯uto wange wanzegeseerye, kandi ntakarangiira ha kuhuniira kwa bya mahanu byamu.
71.18: Ai̱ Ruhanga, nab̯u̱ndi̱gu̱lu̱u̱sa nkamera mbwi̱ otalindeka, mpaka b̯udirangiira b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wamu hali mi̱hi̱hi̱ mi̱kwi̱zaho, na mi̱myo milihonderaho.
71.19: Ai̱ Ruhanga, mananu gaamu gadwa kwiguru, weewe okora bintu byamaani. Ai̱ Ruhanga naani ali nka we?
71.20: Kadi wakabba weewe ondeki̱ri̱ mbonawona kyakalasanu̱, bei̱tu̱ b̯womi b̯wange oli̱b̯wi̱ryamwo b̯uhyaka, na b̯undiraba hansi kuzumu, oli̱mpu̱lu̱kya hanzei.
71.22: Nkwi̱za kukuhaariiza ninkukuutira ki̱dongo kubba oicala mwesigwa, nku̱hi̱i̱mi̱re ninkuhaariiza na ndi̱ngi̱di̱, uwe Ruhanga mutongoole wa I̱saleeri̱.
71.23: Nkwi̱za ku̱ku̱hi̱i̱mi̱ra nkuhaariize nakusemereerwa, hab̯wakubba oncu̱ngwi̱ri̱.
71.24: Nkwi̱za kubazanga ha bya mananu gaamu b̯u̱kakeeri̱, kubba bei̱ceeri̱ kwendya kunkola kubiibi basweri̱.

72.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, ha Mukama b̯winganiza b̯wamu, na b̯unanu b̯wamu hali mwana wa mu kikaali!
72.2: Leka aramurenge bantu baamu na mananu, baseege baamu abacungure na b̯winganiza!
72.3: Leka nsahu zileeteho ku̱hwa, mu mbamba habbemwo bijuma bya mananu.
72.4: Leka alwaniire b̯winganiza b̯wa b̯anaku mu bantu baamu, kandi ocungure baana ba baseege, aswaswane bakubamigiriza.
72.5: Leka bakutekengemwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kalyoba nikakusuuka, na mu kwaka kwa mweri̱, ku̱doosya mi̱hi̱hi̱ myensei̱.
72.6: Leke b̯u̱lemi̱ b̯wamwe b̯ubbe nka ndagali̱ gi̱gwi̱ri̱ mu musiri, abbe nka meezi̱ galimwo ku̱lu̱bya itehe.
72.7: Leka mu biro bi̱byo habbeho mananu, kandi habbeho b̯u̱si̱nge ku̱doosya mweri̱ b̯ugulimalikaho.
72.8: Leka aleme kuruga ha mataka kudwa ha mataka, kandi kuruga ha Mugira Efu̱raati̱ kudwa ha mmaliiro gya nsi!
72.9: Leka bantu ba mu nsi gya ndala bamugondere, kandi banyanzigwa baamwe bei̱ze hali yo nibakwagula mwicuucu.
72.10: Leka bakama ba Tarasi̱i̱si̱ na ba mu bi̱zi̱nga, bamu̱leetere bisembu, bakama ba Sebba na Seba nabo balimuletera bya b̯u̱gu̱u̱da.
72.11: Bakama bensei̱ beetu̱lu̱ke hansi, kandi mahanga gensei̱ gamuheereze.
72.13: Aganyire baceke na bakwetaaga, bakwetaaga abajune lu̱ku̱u̱.
72.14: Abacungure kuruga mu kumigirizib̯wa na mu b̯wemi̱, kubba ibbanga lyab̯u lili lya muhendu mu mei̱so gaamwe.
72.15: Womeera biro binene! Leka bamuhe zaabbu kuruga mu Sebba. Leka bantu beicale nibamusabiranga, ni̱bamu̱si̱i̱ma b̯u̱kakeeri̱.
72.16: Leka nsi gibbe na magesa ga mpuule zinene, na nsahu zibbumbwe na bilimwa. Leka bijuma byaho bi̱nyengetere nka lebbanooni̱, leka bantu bakanye mu rub̯uga nka isubi lya mu ndimiro.
72.17: Leka ibara lyamwe liicaleho biro byensei̱, libbeho paka kudwa lyoba kumalika, aleke bantu bamwi̱zu̱kenge, nibacaali boomi.
72.18: Ahaariizwe Mukama Ruhanga wʼI̱saleeri̱, yogwo yankei akora bi̱ku̱hu̱u̱ni̱ri̱za.
72.19: Ibara lyamwe lihaariizwe biro byensei̱, aleke nsi gyensei̱ gizulemwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamwe. Ami̱i̱na kandi Ami̱i̱na.
72.20: Haha hooho kusaba kwa Dau̱di̱ mu̱tabani̱ wa Yese ku̱mali̱ki̱i̱ri̱.

73.1: Mu mananu Ruhanga ali murungi hali I̱saleeri̱, na maani maani hali banyamitima mi̱syanu̱.
73.2: Bei̱tu̱ kadooli̱ nkibbale, magulu gange gaatereb̯u̱ki̱ri̱.
73.3: Hab̯wakubba nyaakwati̱i̱rwe i̱hali̱, b̯u̱nyaaweeni̱ nkori̱ za bibii ni̱zi̱ku̱hwa.
73.4: Nahab̯waki̱kyo tibatalibana, mibiri myab̯u miicala myomi kandi mi̱nyi̱ri̱ru̱.
73.5: Tibabba na b̯ujune nka bandi, tibakwatwaho nseeri̱ za bantu bandi.
73.6: Nahab̯waki̱kyo balwala kwehaariiza nka lu̱kwanzi̱, b̯wemi̱ b̯ubabbumba nka kilwalu.
73.7: Mei̱so gabaku̱du̱mu̱ki̱ri̱ nka mudya masaju, mitima myab̯u miicala mi̱zwi̱ri̱ biteekerezu bibiibi.
73.8: Beicala nibasekereerya na kubaza bi̱ku̱zi̱nda bantu, myehaariizo myab̯u mibaha ku̱wonawonesya bantu.
73.9: Babaza bigambu bi̱ku̱lu̱ma Ruhanga mwiguru, na bikucookooza bantu mu nsi.
73.10: Kyokyo babetegeerya, nibekiriza na kwikiriza bi̱baku̱baweera.
73.11: Beicala nibakoba, “Ruhanga asobora teetei̱ kwetegereza? Kya magezi̱ kyani kili hali yogwo Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱?”
73.12: Wona zizi nkori̱ za bibii, itungu lyab̯u lyeterya b̯weteerya b̯uli kiro.
73.13: Ntakagasirwe kwicala na mutima gu̱syanu̱, na ngalu zitali na kibii kyensei̱.
73.14: Mbonawona kiro kyensei̱, nakucomerwa nincomeerwa b̯uli mwakya.
73.15: Kabbe nyaali nkobi̱ri̱ kubaza bya ha mutima gwange, nyaaku̱bbeeri̱ ntali wa mananu hali bantu baamu.
73.16: Bei̱tu̱ b̯u̱nyalengi̱ri̱ho kwetegereza bibi byensei̱, nyei̱seeni̱ nka nkujwahira b̯usa.
73.17: Ku̱doosya b̯u̱nyaagyendi̱ri̱ mu nnyu̱mba gya Ruhanga, nyetegereza mmaliriro gyab̯u.
73.18: Mananu kwo obateeri̱ ha kuterera, aleke bagwe bahwerekeere.
73.19: Kwokwo bazi̱ke mu b̯wi̱re b̯u̱dooli̱, bamalikaho cekeceke.
73.20: Nka muntu waaloota akeeb̯wa kyalooti̱ri̱, ai̱ Mukama, b̯wolibyoka olibebeera.
73.21: Mwozo gwange b̯u̱gwasali̱i̱rwe, mutima gwange niguganya.
73.22: Nyaafooki̱ri̱ mudoma, kandi atali na kwetegereza, nyaabba nka kisolo mu mei̱so gaamu.
73.23: Bei̱tu̱ nab̯wo ncaali nawe, onkwati̱ri̱i̱ri̱ mukono gwange gwab̯udyo.
73.24: Onyehembera na magezi̱ gaamu, mwomwo ontangiire kubba mu ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamu.
73.25: Naani wondi gindinayo mwiguru kutoolaho weewe? B̯undi nawe, kyani kindi ki̱nkwendya ku nsi?
73.26: Mubiri gwange na mutima gwange bisobora kulemwa, bei̱tu̱ Ruhanga yooyo maani ga mutima gwange, na mugab̯u gwange biro byensei̱.
73.27: Wona, bab̯wo bali hadei nawe, bakwi̱za ku̱zi̱ka, b̯uli atali mwesigwa okwi̱za ku̱mu̱hwerekereerya.
73.28: Bei̱tu̱ gya kirungi kwicala heehi̱ na Ruhanga, Mukama Ruhanga yooyo nteeri̱ abbe b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wange, kyokyo ndikuheera b̯u̱kei̱so b̯wa milimo myamu myensei̱.

74.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, hab̯waki otu̱gu̱mi̱reseeni̱ biro byensei̱? Hab̯waki ki̱ni̱ga kyamu kibyokera ntaama za mwi̱li̱si̱i̱ryo lyamu?
74.2: I̱zu̱ka bantu baamu ba waagu̱u̱ri̱ kadei, ki̱wacu̱ngu̱u̱ri̱ kibbe luganda lwa mugab̯u gwamu, i̱zu̱ka lusahu Sayu̱u̱ni̱ hoicalira.
74.3: Gyendira ki̱mwei̱ odwe ha makandi ga biro na biro, na ha Yeekaru gya munyanzigwa yaazi̱ki̱i̱rye kubiibi.
74.4: Banyanzigwa baamu baalu̱ki̱ri̱ mu Yeekaru, baabyokya bbendera kwolokya nka ku̱basi̱ngwi̱ri̱.
74.5: Bei̱sanengi̱ nka bakweti̱ mpasa, kutema misaali mu kibira.
74.6: Baatematemi̱ri̱ bintu biheese bya mbaahu byensei̱, ni̱bakoresya mpasa na bipanga.
74.7: Yeekaru gyamu baagi̱kolereeryeho mworo, baaswezi̱ cali baku̱rami̱i̱rya.
74.8: Baaweeragana yati, “Tubaswaswanire ki̱mwei̱,” bookeerye marami̱i̱ryo gensei̱ ga Ruhanga mu nsi gi̱gyo.
74.9: Tituli na b̯wakuwoneraho b̯wamu, tihacaalihoona mu̱ragu̱ri̱ waamu mu nsi, kandi tihaloho akusobora kutuweera hakikumaliira.
74.10: Ai̱ Ruhanga, munyanzigwa, ali̱ku̱sekereerya ku̱doosya di̱i̱? Biro byensei̱, yeicaalanga naalu̱ma ibara lyamu?
74.11: Hab̯waki otabba na kyokoori̱ho? Hu̱lu̱kya mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo obazi̱kye.
74.12: Bei̱tu̱ nab̯wo, oli Ruhanga Mukama wange, wa kadei, ojuna bantu mu nsi.
74.13: Waahu̱kani̱i̱rye itaka likooto na b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wamu, waaku̱u̱ti̱ri̱ mi̱twe mya banyanzigwa ba mwitaka.
74.14: Waaku̱u̱ti̱ri̱ mi̱twe mya kihiri, waakiha bihangwa bya mwihamba bikidye.
74.15: Weewe waaki̱ngu̱u̱ri̱ migira na mazu̱ba, migira minyakwicalanga nimiheta kadei na kadei, weewe waamyomereerye ki̱mwei̱.
74.16: Mwinsi nei̱jolo byensei̱ byamu, weewe waateeri̱ho bimuluka byensei̱ na kalyoba.
74.17: Waateeri̱ho mitaanu mya nsi, waateekaho kyanda na kibbaga.
74.18: Ai̱ Mukama i̱zu̱ka munyanzigwa nka kwakukuseka, kandi bantu badoma ku̱baku̱ku̱lu̱ma.
74.19: Otabahayo bantu baamu hali banyanzigwa baab̯u, otalyebeeranga b̯womi wa banaku baamu.
74.20: I̱zu̱ka ndagaanu gi̱waakoori̱ natwe, hab̯wakubba batemu bebi̱si̱ri̱ hensei̱, mu biikaru bya mu nti̱ti̱ ku nsi gigi.
74.21: Oteikiriza muswaru gwa bantu baamu bakuwonawona, bei̱tu̱ leka banaku na bali na byetaagu bahaariizenge ibara lyamu.
74.22: Ai̱ Ruhanga, byoka olwaniire ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamu, i̱zu̱ka badoma nka ku̱baku̱lu̱ma biro byensei̱.
74.23: Oteebeera myehu̱lo mya banyanzigwa baamu, neitoko lyab̯u lya b̯uli kiro.

75.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga tu̱ku̱ku̱si̱i̱ma, tu̱ku̱ku̱si̱i̱ma hab̯wakubba oli heehi̱ natwe, mu mu̱li̱ngo bantu baku̱tebya byamahanu byamu.
75.2: Ruhanga akukoba yati, “Ha kasu̱mi̱ koonyi̱ni̱ ka ndibba nteeri̱ho, mwomwo ndicwa musangu mu b̯winganiza.
75.3: Nsi b̯u̱gi̱zi̱ngi̱zi̱ka na byensei̱ bilimwo, gyagya ntati̱i̱rya mpagi̱ zaagyo.
75.4: Banyamyehembo mbaweera yati, ‘Mu̱leke kwehaariiza,’ na babiibi nimbaweera yati, ‘Mu̱leke kwetembya yatyo,
75.5: mu̱leke kwetembya kyakalasanu̱, kandi mu̱leke kubaza na myehaariizo yatyo.’ ”
75.6: Hab̯wakubba b̯u̱si̱ngu̱zi̱, tib̯uruga b̯uhulukalyoba rundi b̯ugwalyoba, kandi tib̯uruga mwirungu,
75.7: bei̱tu̱ Ruhanga yooyo acwamwo, abyokya omwei̱ hakyendi̱, wondi naamwi̱rya hansi.
75.8: Mu ngalu zaamwe Mukama, akweti̱ ki̱kopo, kilimwo maaci gakwihukira, gahyangye kurungi, akwi̱za ku̱tu̱li̱kaho nkuta agihe babiibi bensei̱ ba mu nsi, baalinywera ki̱mwei̱ nibamalaho na bikanja.
75.9: Bei̱tu̱ gya nyatebyanga bya Ruhanga akoori̱, nyahi̱i̱manga, nimpaariiza Ruhanga wa Yakobbo.
75.10: Myehembo mya babiibi alimitemaho, bei̱tu̱ maani ga barungi aligabyokya hakyendi̱.

76.1: Ruhanga akwegebwa mu Yu̱da, ibara lyamwe lya maani mwʼI̱saleeri̱.
76.2: B̯ulaalu b̯wamwe b̯ubba mu Yeru̱salemu̱, na b̯wicalu b̯wamwe gyogyo Sayu̱u̱ni̱.
76.3: Ku̱kwo hooho yaacwacweni̱ mbasi za maani, ngab̯u, mpirima na byaku̱lwani̱sya bya b̯ulemu.
76.4: Oli wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, wa b̯u̱sobozi̱ kukirahoona nsahu za kadei na kadei.
76.5: Balwani̱ baab̯u bamaani baabatoori̱ho minyagu myab̯u, baalaali̱iri̱ ki̱mwei̱ beebbaka. Badulu balwani̱ bensei̱, baalingi batakusobora ku̱byokya mikono.
76.6: Ai̱ Ruhanga wa Yakobbo, b̯wocoomera, mu̱ni̱i̱ni̱ wa mbaraasi na mbaraasi, byensei̱ bi̱kwa b̯u̱kwi̱.
76.7: Bei̱tu̱ we, Mukama , bensei̱ baku̱ti̱i̱nambe, B̯wokwatwa ki̱ni̱ga, naani akusobora kukwemeera mu mei̱so?
76.8: Waabazi̱i̱ri̱ mwiguru waacwa musangu, nsi gyati̱i̱ni̱ri̱ gyetekeera cei̱.
76.9: Ruhanga waabyoki̱ri̱ kucwa musangu, kujuna bakumigirizib̯wa haha ku nsi.
76.10: Mu mananu, bantu b̯ubakukwatirwa ki̱ni̱ga, ki̱teeryaho ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamu, banyakukena lu̱ku̱u̱ balikuhaariiza.
76.11: Mwerage hali Mukama Ruhanga weenyu̱, kandi mu̱doosereeryenge bi̱mweragi̱ri̱, nywensei̱ bamuli heehi̱ muleterenge bisembu, yogwo akusemeera ku̱ti̱i̱nwa.
76.12: Yogwo ab̯u̱ndaarya balemi̱ bamyehembu kandi naati̱i̱ni̱sya bakama ba maani.

77.1: Nkuutira ki̱mwei̱ mukungu hali Ruhanga, mukungira ki̱mwei̱, kandi aku̱nzegwa.
77.2: Mu b̯wi̱re b̯wange b̯wa b̯ujune, ntoolereerya Mukama, tinjwaha ku̱byokya mikono myange i̱jolo lyensei̱, kandi ti̱nkabbeeri̱ kuhumula mu mutima gwange.
77.3: B̯unteekerezaho Ruhanga, nindira, b̯uncumitiriza mwozo gwange nigusalika.
77.4: Weewe ankwata nkwihi za mei̱so, ndemwe kwebbaka, tindi na kyakubaza hab̯wa b̯ujune b̯undi nab̯wo.
77.5: Nteekereza ha biro byange bya kadei, ni̱nyi̱zu̱ka myaka myei̱nyu̱ma.
77.6: I̱jolo lyensei̱ ndimalira mu biteekerezu, b̯uncumitiriza nyeb̯u̱u̱lya yati,
77.7: “Mukama alitugumirisana kudwa di̱i̱? Tali̱i̱ra kubba na mbabazi̱?
77.8: Ngonzi zaamwe zinene za kadei na kadei, zaamali̱ki̱ri̱? Kweraga kwamwe kwa biro byensei̱ kuli hanya?
77.9: Ruhanga yeebereeri̱ kubba na mbabazi̱? Hab̯wa ki̱ni̱ga, tacaali na kisa?”
77.10: Mwomwo nyaabazi̱ri̱ ninkoba yati, “Kiki kyokyo kikira kunsaliza, nti Ruhanga, Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱, tokyakatujuna.”
77.11: Ai̱ Mukama , b̯u̱ntekereza ha byokoori̱, nyi̱zu̱ka byamahanu bi̱waakoori̱ kadei.
77.12: Nditeekereza ha milimo myamu, mutima gwange ni̱gu̱toolereerya byensei̱ bi̱waakoori̱.
77.13: Ai̱ Ruhanga, muhanda gwamu gubba gutongoole. Mbandwa kyani gikwijanjana Ruhanga weetu̱ wamaani?
77.14: Oli Ruhanga akora byamahanu, woolokeerye b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wamu mu mahanga.
77.15: Waacu̱ngu̱u̱ri̱ bantu baamu na mukono gwamu, baana ba Yakobbo na Yozefu̱.
77.16: Ai̱ Ruhanga, meezi̱ b̯u̱gaaku̱weeni̱, meezi̱ b̯u̱gaaku̱weeni̱, gaati̱i̱na, kwokwo na ndi̱ha gyakankeeni̱.
77.17: Byalu byabbwoma meezi̱, iguru lyaleeta nkuba, mbasi zaamu zaamyangasanengi̱.
77.18: Kyalu kyati̱ndi̱ri̱ mwiguru nkuba zaaserya hensei̱, nsi gyakankeeni̱ kandi gyatengeeta.
77.19: Waasaari̱ nzira mwitaka, waacwa itaka lilei, bei̱tu̱ nab̯wo tihaloho munyakuwona lugere lwamu.
77.20: Weebembeeri̱ bantu baamu nkeigana lya ntaama, nookoresya Mu̱sa nʼAlooni̱.

78.1: Nywe bantu bange, mu̱tege mapokopo mwetegeerye kwegesya kwange, mu̱ku̱nku̱mu̱le mapokopo geenyu̱ mwetegeerye bigambu byange!
78.2: Ndibazira mu ngeera, nsoboore bigambu bikuhuneeza bya kadei,
78.3: bintu bitwegwi̱ri̱ kandi byegebeerwe, bya bahaaha beetu̱ baatu̱weereeri̱.
78.4: Ti̱tu̱li̱bi̱bi̱sa baana baab̯u, bei̱tu̱ tulibiweera mu̱hi̱hi̱ gu̱kwi̱za bikorwa bya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa Mukama bi̱yaakoori̱, na b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wamwe, kandi na byamahanu bi̱yaakoori̱.
78.5: Yaateeri̱i̱ho b̯u̱kei̱so mu Yakobbo, yaaha I̱saleeri̱ biragiro, yaaragira bahaaha beetu̱, ku̱byegesya baana baab̯u,
78.6: kwokwo mu̱hi̱hi̱ gu̱kwi̱za gubyege, na baana bacaali kubyalwa. Kandi nabo baweera baana baab̯u.
78.7: Aleke beege kwesiga Ruhanga, kandi baleke kwebeera milimo mya Ruhanga, bei̱tu̱ bakwate biragiro byamwe,
78.8: aleke batalibba nka bahaaha baab̯u, banyakubba bajeemu̱ kandi banyab̯wemi̱, banyamitima miceke, banyamyozo mitali myesigwa hali Ruhanga.
78.9: Baalula lwʼEfu̱rayi̱mu̱ nab̯ubaali na b̯uta, bei̱ru̱ki̱ri̱ ha kiro kya b̯ulemu.
78.10: Batakahondere ndagaanu gya Ruhanga, baasuula kugyendera mu biragiro byamwe.
78.12: Yaakoori̱ byamahanu mu mei̱so ga bahaaha baab̯u, mu nsi gya Mi̱si̱ri̱, mu rub̯uga lwa Zohani̱.
78.13: Yaahu̱kani̱rye itaka baalirabamwo, yaafoora meezi̱ mutuumo.
78.14: B̯wi̱re b̯wa mwinsi yaabehemberengi̱ na kyalu, i̱jolo na kyererezi̱ kya mworo.
78.15: Yaati̱i̱rye lubbaali na mwirungu, lwalu̱wa meezi̱ ganene, yaabaha baanywa basambalana.
78.16: Meezi̱ yaagahangi̱ri̱ kuruga mu lubbaali, gaaheta nka migira.
78.17: Bei̱tu̱ nab̯wo baab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye baakora kibii mu mei̱so gaamwe, baajeemeeri̱ Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱ b̯ubaali mwirungu.
78.18: Baalengi̱ri̱ Ruhanga mu mitima myab̯u, na kumusaba bidyo bi̱beegombi̱ri̱
78.19: Baalu̱mi̱ri̱ Ruhanga nibakoba yati, “Ruhanga yaakusobora kutuha bidyo nituli mwirungu?
