78.20: Yaati̱i̱rye lubbaali meezi̱ gaalu̱wa gaaheta na mu migira, yaakusobora kutuha bidyo, naatugabira na nyama?”
78.21: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, Mukama b̯u̱yaakyegwi̱ri̱, yaakwati̱i̱rwe ki̱ni̱ga, yaahembaho Bei̱saleeri̱ mworo.
78.22: Hab̯wakubba baalingi batakwikiririza mu Ruhanga, kandi baalingi batakwesiga maani ga kujuna kwamwe.
78.23: Bei̱tu̱ nab̯wo yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ iguru, lyeijula nzi̱je.
78.24: Kandi yaabagumira maanu baadya, yaabaha na bidyo kuruga mwiguru.
78.25: Bantu baadi̱i̱ri̱ bidyo bya bamalayika, yaabasi̱ndi̱ki̱i̱ri̱ bidyo mu b̯unene.
78.26: Yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ mpehu gya mu b̯uhulukalyoba gihuuhe mwiguru, kandi hab̯wa b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wamwe yaaragira mpehu gya mu masi̱ri̱mu̱ka gyarugayo.
78.27: Yaasi̱ndi̱ki̱i̱ri̱ bantu baamwe bi̱nyoni̱ badye, bi̱nyoni̱ byei̱sanengi̱ musinyi gwa heitaka,
78.28: yaabi̱ragi̱i̱ri̱ byei̱ci̱ya mu ngoonyi̱ zaab̯u, na hensei̱ cali bei̱calengi̱.
78.29: Kandi baadi̱i̱ri̱ beicuta, hab̯wakubba yaabaheeri̱ ki̱bendyengi̱.
78.30: Bei̱tu̱ b̯ubaali batakei̱cu̱ti̱ri̱, bidyo nibibali mu mi̱nwa,
78.31: Ruhanga yaakwati̱i̱rwe ki̱ni̱ga, yei̱ta ba maani na basigazi ba mwʼI̱saleeri̱.
78.32: Bi̱byo nab̯ubyabba byabbeeri̱ho baab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye bakora bibii, nab̯uhaabba habberi̱ho bikuhuneeza byamwe, nab̯wo batakeikirize.
78.33: Yaakeeheerye b̯womi b̯wab̯u nka lwoya, beicala ni̱baku̱ti̱i̱na mu mitima myab̯u.
78.34: B̯u̱yaakei̱tanga bamwei̱ muli bo, bakeni̱ri̱ho ni̱beezi̱ri̱mwo ni̱baatoolya Ruhanga na mitima myab̯u myensei̱.
78.35: Bei̱zu̱ki̱ri̱ Ruhanga kuyaali lubbaali lwab̯u, yogwo Ruhanga, Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱, yaali mu̱cu̱ngu̱ri̱ waab̯u.
78.36: Bei̱tu̱ baamu̱jogi̱ri̱ na bigambu bya mi̱nwa myab̯u, baamu̱gobyagobya na b̯ulimi waab̯u.
78.37: Mitima myab̯u mitakamub̯undalire, batakesige kiragaanu kyamwe.
78.38: Hab̯wakubba abba wa mbabazi̱, yaabaganyi̱i̱ri̱ b̯ubiibi b̯wab̯u, atakabahwerekeerye, yaafu̱gengi̱ ki̱ni̱ga kyamwe, ki̱ni̱ga kyamwe atakakyolekye.
78.39: Yei̱zu̱ki̱ri̱ nka b̯ubaali nibali bantu b̯untu, nka mpehu b̯u̱gi̱i̱za nigihunga nigyakala b̯u̱tei̱ra.
78.40: Mirundi mingahi ni̱bamu̱jemeera mwirungu, kandi kangahi nibamusaliiza na mwirungu!
78.41: Baamu̱lengi̱ri̱ mirundi na mirundi, baasaliiza yogwo Ruhanga Mu̱syanu̱ wʼI̱saleeri̱.
78.42: Beebereeri̱ ki̱mwei̱ maani gaamwe, na kiro ki̱yaabacu̱ngwi̱ri̱ kuruga mu banyanzigwa baab̯u.
78.43: Batakei̱zu̱ke byamahanu bi̱yaakoori̱ mu nsi gya Mi̱si̱ri̱, na bi̱yaakoori̱ mu rub̯uga lwa Zohani̱.
78.44: Migira myab̯u yaami̱foori̱ri̱ ibbanga, aleke balemwe kunywa meezi̱.
78.45: Yaabasi̱ndi̱ki̱i̱ri̱ ki̱du̱ndu̱li̱ kya nsohera zi̱nyaku̱baru̱mba na masonsooni̱a gaanyakubaheneera nsi.
78.46: Yaaheeri̱yo bilimwa byab̯u byadib̯wa bi̱si̱i̱sa na nzi̱ge zaadya misiri myab̯u.
78.47: Yaaheneeri̱ mi̱zabbi̱bbu̱ myab̯u na ndagali̱ gya mahi̱ga na kiho, mi̱ti̱i̱ni̱ myab̯u yaami̱cwekeerye na kiho.
78.48: Yei̱ti̱ri̱ nte zaab̯u na ndagali̱ giwa mahi̱ga, neigana lya bisolo byab̯u na nkuba.
78.49: Yaabakwati̱i̱rwe ki̱ni̱ga kinene, b̯usungu na b̯ukaya b̯wamwe kibba kitebe kya bamalayika bakazi̱kya.
78.50: Atakatange ki̱ni̱ga kyamwe, habbe kubaganyira, bei̱tu̱ yaabei̱ti̱ri̱ na ki̱i̱zo.
78.51: Yei̱ta mi̱zegei̱zo myensei̱ mya Mi̱si̱ri̱, kukira maani ba mu heema za Haamu.
78.52: Mwomwo yeehembeeri̱ bantu baamwe nka mu̱li̱i̱sya kuyehembera ntaama, yaabarabya mwirungu nkeigana.
78.53: Yaabehembeeri̱ kurungi nahab̯waki̱kyo batakabbe na b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱, bei̱tu̱ itaka lyameeri̱ banyanzigwa baab̯u.
78.54: Yaabaleeti̱ri̱ mu nsi gyamwe gi̱syanu̱, ha nsahu ziyaali asi̱ngwi̱ri̱ na mukono gwamwe gwab̯udyo.
78.55: Yaabi̱ngi̱ri̱mwo mahanga, nsi gyab̯u yaagiha bʼI̱saleeri̱ nka mugab̯u gwab̯u, mu heema zaab̯u hooho yaateeri̱ maka ga nganda zʼI̱saleeri̱.
78.56: Bei̱tu̱ nab̯wo baalengi̱ri̱ Ruhanga, kandi baajeemera yogwo Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱, baatakalinde biragiro byamwe.
78.57: Baalingi bajeemu̱ nka bahaaha baab̯u kandi baatakwesigwa nka b̯uta b̯u̱bi̱nyeku̱,
78.58: Baamu̱sali̱i̱ze hab̯wa bi̱bbi̱la byab̯u, i̱hali̱ lyamu̱kweti̱ hab̯wa bi̱si̱sani̱ byab̯u bi̱baramyengi̱
78.59: Ruhanga b̯u̱yaaki̱weeni̱, yaakwati̱i̱rwe b̯usungu, yaasu̱li̱i̱ri̱ ki̱mwei̱ I̱saleeri̱.
78.60: Yeehoogi̱ri̱ kiikaru kyamwe kya Si̱i̱ro, na heema gyamwe hali yei̱calengi̱ mu bantu.
78.61: Yei̱ki̱ri̱i̱ze banyanzigwa kunyaga sandu̱u̱ko gya kiragaanu, kinyakubba kaboneru ka b̯u̱sobozi̱ na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamwe.
78.62: Yaaheeri̱yo bantu baamwe kwi̱twa mpirima, yoolokya b̯usungu hali bantu baamwe bayaakomi̱ri̱mwo.
78.63: Batabani̱ baab̯u baabei̱ti̱i̱ri̱ mu b̯ulemu, bahara baab̯u baalemwa badulu bakubaswera.
78.64: Balaami̱ baab̯u baabei̱ti̱ri̱ na mpirima na bamukaabakwere baalemwa kulira bei̱ba baab̯u.
78.65: Mwomwo Mukama yaabyoki̱ri̱ nka muruga mu b̯ulo, nka mudulu wamaani aku̱tokeseb̯wa itamiiro.
78.66: Yaabi̱ngi̱ri̱ baanyazigwa baamwe yaabeerya i̱nyu̱ma, kinyaakubaletere muswaru gwa biro na biro.
78.67: Nahab̯waki̱kyo yaaswi̱ri̱ beizukulu ba Yozefu̱, yeehala luganda lwa Efu̱rayi̱mu̱
78.68: bei̱tu̱ yaakoma luganda lwa Yu̱da, na lusahu Sayu̱u̱ni̱ luyendya.
78.69: Yaabi̱mbi̱ri̱ nnyu̱mba gyamwe yaagikora nka kiikaru kya mwiguru, yaagi̱tati̱i̱rya nka nsi gi̱yaakoori̱ gya biro byensei̱.
78.70: Yaakomi̱ri̱mwo Dau̱di̱ muheereza waamwe, namutoola mu mali̱i̱si̱i̱ryo ga ntaama.
78.71: Kuruga mu ku̱li̱i̱sya ntaama zinyakubba na b̯wana, yaamuleeti̱ri̱ kubba mu̱li̱i̱sya wa Yakobbo na bantu baamwe, na nsi gyamwe gyʼI̱saleeri̱ b̯ugwetwa b̯wamwe.
78.72: Dau̱di̱ yaabali̱si̱i̱rye na mutima gu̱syanu̱, kandi yaabehembera na mukono gwa magezi̱.

79.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, banyamahanga banyagi̱ri̱ nsi gyamu, baaheneeri̱ nnyu̱mba gyamu gi̱syanu̱, Yeru̱salemu̱ baagi̱ri̱i̱rye makandi.
79.2: Mitumbi mya baheereza baamu, bami̱heeri̱ masega, myomyo byakudya byago, mibiri mya barungi baamu, bami̱heeri̱ bisolo bya mwirungu.
79.3: Babbwomi̱ri̱ ibbanga lyab̯u nka bakubbwoma meezi̱, kwetoroora Yeru̱salemu̱ gyensei̱, kandi tihaloho na muntu wa kubaziika.
79.4: Twi̱ri̱ri̱ kintu kya ku̱lu̱mwa hali bataahi̱ batwelogoleerye, baku̱tu̱jooga nibatugaya.
79.5: Ai̱ Mukama, oliicala osali̱i̱rwe biro byensei̱? Ki̱ni̱ga kyamu ki̱lyokya nka mworo kudwa di̱i̱?
79.6: Kimalire ha mahanga gatakwegi̱ri̱, na makama gaateeta ibara lyamu!
79.7: Hab̯wakubba, googo gei̱ti̱ri̱ beizukulu ba Yakobbo, gaaswaswana na nsi gyamwe.
79.8: Otatufubira hab̯wa b̯ubiibi b̯wa bahaaha beetu̱, ganyira, i̱za b̯wangu, tituli na ku̱ni̱hi̱ra.
79.9: Ai̱ Ruhanga weetu̱ tu̱li̱nde kurungi, tu̱ju̱ne otucungure, otuganyire bibii byetu̱, aleke ibara lyamu tulihe ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
79.10: Mahanga kagatu̱b̯u̱u̱li̱i̱rye maani yati, “Ruhanga weenyu̱, ali hanya?” Gafubire twensei̱ nitukuwona, hab̯wa kubbwoma ibbanga lya baheereza baamu!
79.11: Weegwa kutaaga kwa banyankomo, leka maani gaamu gajune bab̯wo bakugyenda ku̱kwa!
79.12: Ai̱ Mukama, banyamahanga basasule mirundi musanju, hab̯wa ku̱ku̱lu̱ma ku̱baku̱lu̱mi̱ri̱.
79.13: Twe bantu baamu, ntaama za mwi̱li̱si̱i̱ryo lyamu, tu̱li̱ku̱si̱i̱ma biro na biro, tukuhaariize biro byensei̱ bi̱kwi̱za.

80.1: Weetegeerya we mu̱li̱i̱sya wʼI̱saleeri̱ weehembera Yozefu̱ nkeigana lya ntaama, oi̱cali̱i̱ri̱ ha kitebe hakati̱ wa bakeru̱u̱bbi̱, woolokya kyererezi̱ otumulikire.
80.2: Weezolokya mu nganda za Efu̱rayi̱mu̱, Bbenyami̱i̱ni̱ na Manaase, tu̱ju̱ne na maani gaamu.
80.3: Ai̱ Ruhanga, twi̱ryemwo b̯uhyaka, tu̱gi̱i̱re kisa, otujune!
80.4: Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga wa mahe, oli̱doosya hanya kukwatirwa ki̱ni̱ga kusaba kwa bantu baamu?
80.5: Waatu̱di̱i̱si̱i̱rye bidyo bya b̯ujune, waatu̱heeri̱ mali̱ga googo tu̱nywe mu b̯unene.
80.6: Hab̯wamu banyanzigwa batwicala nabo, bali mu ku̱tu̱sekeereerya kandi ni̱batu̱jooga.
80.7: Ai̱ Ruhanga wa mahe, twi̱ryemwo b̯uhyaka, tu̱gi̱i̱re kisa, otujune!
80.8: Mu Mi̱si̱ri̱ waatoori̱yo mu̱zabbi̱bbu̱, waabinga mahanga waagusimba.
80.9: Waagu̱zu̱bi̱ri̱ kwokwo guhande, makolo gaagwo geesi̱mbi̱ri̱ hansi hadei, kandi gweizula nsi.
80.10: Mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ gwabbu̱mbi̱ri̱ nsahu, bi̱jangi̱ byaho byabbumba misaali.
80.11: Bi̱jangi̱ byagwo byagaaji̱ri̱ kudwa heitaka lya Medetereni̱ani̱, na b̯usonga b̯wagwo weezali̱ri̱ ha Mugira Efu̱raati̱.
80.12: Hab̯waki waabi̱nyi̱ri̱ bi̱si̱i̱ka byagwo, okaleka b̯uli mu̱gyendi̱ yensei̱ kunokola ha byana byagwo?
80.13: Mpunu za mwirungu zi̱gu̱sambi̱ri̱, bisolo byensei̱ bilibata mu musiri bigudyeho.
80.14: Ai̱ Ruhanga wa mahe gensei̱, kooraho kintu, lingiira na mwiguru owone, ojune gugu mu̱zabbi̱bbu̱.
80.16: Baagwokeerye na mworo, baagutema gwagwa hansi. Bakahwerekeere hab̯wa mei̱so gaamu gaaki̱ni̱ga, kubawona.
80.17: Tati̱i̱rya muntu waamu gi̱i̱wakomi̱ri̱mwo, mwana wa muntu gi̱waagu̱mi̱i̱rye we wankei,
80.18: mwomwo ti̱tu̱li̱i̱ra kukurugaho, otuhe b̯womi, kwokwo twicalenge nitukuhaariiza!
80.19: Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga wa mahe, twi̱ryemwo b̯uhyaka, tu̱gi̱i̱re kisa, otujune!

81.1: Mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Ruhanga weetu̱ na kusemererwa, yooyo maani geetu̱, muhaariize Ruhanga wa Yakobbo,
81.2: Mu̱ku̱ngye kyembu, mu̱cu̱kye bi̱cekere, mu̱ku̱u̱te ndi̱ngi̱di̱ na ki̱dongo.
81.3: Mu̱ku̱u̱te bbu̱ru̱u̱zi̱ mweri̱ gu̱weneki̱ri̱, kandi gwi̱zwi̱ri̱, ha kiro kya B̯u̱genyi̱ b̯wetu̱.
81.4: Hab̯wakubba kili kiragiro mwʼI̱saleeri̱, iteeka lya Ruhanga wa Yakobbo.
81.5: Yaaki̱heeri̱ Yozefu̱, b̯u̱yaagyendi̱ri̱ ku̱ru̱mba nsi gya Mi̱si̱ri̱, haatwegwi̱ri̱ lukobo lututakukenga.
81.6: Yaakobi̱ri̱ yati, “Nyaaku̱toori̱ mugugu ha mabega, nyaakuha b̯ugabe b̯utakora b̯uhinya.
81.7: B̯uwaali mu b̯ujune wanzeti̱ri̱ nyaakujuna, nyakwi̱ri̱mwo nindi mu kiikaru kya nsita nyarabi̱i̱ri̱ mu nkuba, ha meezi̱ ga Meri̱bba nyaaku̱lengi̱ri̱.
81.8: Nywe bantu bange, mwetegeerye kulamba kwange! Ai̱ I̱saleeri̱, kabbe wanzegwi̱ri̱!
81.9: Muli nywe hatalibbamwo ruhanga ategebeerwe, otaliramya ruhanga yensei̱ munyamahanga.
81.10: Gyagya Ruhanga weenyu̱, munyakubatoola mu nsi gya Mi̱si̱ri̱, mu̱b̯u̱u̱le mi̱nwa mbadi̱i̱sye.
81.12: Nagya nkwi̱za kubaleka mu b̯wereme b̯wab̯u, bahondere kwetaaga kwab̯u.
81.13: Ai̱ bantu bange, kabbe mwanzegwengi̱, I̱saleeri̱, kabbe mwakorengi̱ bi̱nkwendya!
81.14: Nyaaku̱bi̱ngi̱ri̱ b̯wangu banyanzigwa beenyu̱, nimbafubira hab̯wa bibii byab̯u.
81.15: Bensei̱ banyakunoba Mukama , baakwi̱zi̱ri̱ nibaagula b̯wagu̱li̱, nigibba mmaliiro gyab̯u.
81.16: Bei̱tu̱ nyaaku̱ku̱di̱i̱si̱i̱rye nganu gikukira b̯urungi, nimwicuta b̯uhooki kuruga mu lubbaali.”

82.1: Ruhanga eicaara mu lukuratu lwa mwiguru hakati̱ wa baruhanga kucwa misangu,
82.2: akukoba yati, “Mu̱li̱doosya di̱i̱ nab̯utacwanga misangu mya b̯winganiza, kandi nimukalekera hahwo kusagika babiibi?
82.3: Banaku na nfu̱u̱zi̱ mubacwere mu mananu, mu̱bbenge na b̯winganiza hali baseege na ha batali na akubajunira.
82.4: Mujune baseege na bali mu b̯wetaagu, mubacungure mu mikono mya babiibi.”
82.5: Bei̱tu̱ baba bahi̱gani̱zi̱ tibali na magezi̱, bali na b̯udoma b̯unene, bakugyendera mu nti̱ti̱, mi̱si̱nge myensei̱ mya nsi mikutengeeta.
82.6: Nkukoba yati, “Muli baruhanga, nywensei̱ muli baana ba yogwo Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱.
82.7: Nka bantu mu̱kwi̱za ku̱kwa, mumalikeho nka mu̱lemi̱ yensei̱ kwa aruga ha ntebe.”
82.8: Ai̱ Ruhanga, Byoka, ocwere nsi musangu, hab̯wakubba mahanga gensei̱ gali gaamu!

83.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, oteti̱keera, ai̱ Ruhanga, otei̱ca mutima, otagira cei̱!
83.2: Wona banyanzigwa baamu nka ku̱baku̱gu̱gu̱mu̱ka, baanyakukunoba nka ku̱baku̱jemeeri̱.
83.3: Bali mu kudyamwo bantu baamu rukwe, aleke basi̱ngu̱re bab̯wo boolinda.
83.4: Bakoba yati, “Mwi̱ze tu̱hwerekereerye ki̱mwei̱ ihanga lyab̯u, ibara lyʼI̱saleeri̱ li̱syerekeere ki̱mwei̱!”
83.5: Kwokwo nibeekoba batali na kwecwamwo, bakukora rukwe ku̱ku̱lwani̱sya,
83.6: bantu bʼEdomu̱, bʼI̱si̱mai̱ri̱, ba Mowaabbu nʼAbahagali̱,
83.7: ba Gebbaali̱, bʼAmoni̱, bʼAmereki̱ ba Fi̱ri̱si̱ti̱ na banyansi ba mu Ti̱i̱ro,
83.8: nʼAsi̱i̱ri̱ya gi̱beteerani̱zeho, kwongera maani baana ba Looti̱.
83.9: Bafubire nka ku̱wakoori̱ Bami̱dyani̱, nka ku̱waakoori̱ Si̱sera na Yabbi̱ni̱ ha mugira gwa Ki̱soni̱,
83.10: baabahwerekereerye, mitumbi myab̯u myagwa hansi nka b̯use.
83.11: Balemi̱ baab̯u bakwe nka Olebbu̱ na Zeebbu̱, na bayolo baab̯u bensei̱ nka Zebba na Zaru̱mu̱na,
83.12: baanyakukoba yati, “Leka twetwalire twankei itungu, kuruga mu mali̱i̱si̱i̱ryo ga Ruhanga.”
83.13: Ai̱ Ruhanga wange, obasasaani̱e nka cuucu lya kadandi, nka bisusunga bikuhuhuulwa mpehu.
83.14: Nka mworo ku̱gu̱si̱dya kibira, nka ndimi za mworo ku̱zookya nsahu,
83.15: nawe kwokwo abahuhuule na bbuukuulu gyamu, obati̱i̱ni̱sye na kihehu kyamu!
83.16: Ai̱ Mukama, b̯u̱syo waab̯u ob̯uswaze, kwokwo baatoolye ibara lyamu.
83.17: Kabasware kandi batunture biro byensei̱, leka baborogote na kihemu.
83.18: Leka beege nti, weewe wankei weibara Mukama, oli Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱, olema nsi gyenseenya.

84.1: Ai̱ Mukama wa mahe, nnyu̱mba gyamu kagi̱semeru̱!
84.2: Mwozo gwange gwegomba kandi guruhiira zi̱gati̱ gya Mukama, mutima gwange na mubiri gwange bisanyuka ni̱bi̱hi̱i̱mi̱ra Ruhanga mwomi.
84.3: Ai̱ Mukama wa mahe, nab̯ukyakabba nti, mbaki gyetooleerya nnyu̱mba, na nsyo nigyebi̱mbi̱ra kizonza ha kyoto kyamu cali gilindira b̯wana, Mukama kandi Ruhanga wange.
84.4: Ba mu̱gi̱sa bab̯wo beicala mu nnyu̱mba gyamu, b̯uli kasu̱mi̱ ni̱bahi̱i̱ma byakukuhaariiza!
84.5: Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bali na maani garuga muliwe, ba mitima myab̯u mili na bihika kugyenda ha Lusahu Sayu̱u̱ni̱.
84.6: B̯ubabba mu kihanga kya Bbaka. Baakifoora kiikaru kya misu, ndagali̱ gya mukyanda gi̱ki̱zu̱u̱lya na mwizulo.
84.7: B̯ubabba nibakugyenda beeyongera maani, baliwona Ruhanga wa baruhanga ku̱kwo mu Sayu̱u̱ni̱.
84.8: Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga wa mahe, weegwa kusaba kwange, Ai̱ Ruhanga wa Yakobbo, ontegere mapokopo!
84.9: Ai̱ Ruhanga ha mbabazi̱ mukama, ngab̯u gyetu̱, woolokya mbabazi̱ hali yogwo gi̱i̱wakomi̱ri̱mwo!
84.10: Hab̯wakubba kiro ki̱mwei̱ mu nnyu̱mba gyamu, kikukira b̯urungi biro ru̱ku̱mi̱ mu biikaru bindi. Hakiri mba mu̱li̱ndi̱ wa mulyangu gwa nnyu̱mba, gya Ruhanga wange kukira kwicala mu maka ga babiibi.
84.11: Kubba Mukama Ruhanga abba lyoba kandi ngab̯u, atuha mu̱gi̱sa na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, birungi byensei̱ tabi̱i̱ma bab̯wo baterekereru̱.
84.12: Ai̱ Mukama wa mahe, wa mu̱gi̱sa yogwo akwesiga!

85.1: Ai̱ Mukama, oicala na mbabazi̱ na nsi gyamu, Bei̱saleeri̱ waabaahweseerye gwakandi.
85.2: Waaganyi̱i̱ri̱ b̯ubiibi b̯wa bantu baamu, waabatoolaho bibii byab̯u byensei̱.
85.4: Ai̱ Ruhanga wakujunwa kwetu̱, twi̱ryemwo b̯uhyaka, otatubihirirwa!
85.5: Olitukwatirwa ki̱ni̱ga biro byensei̱? B̯usungu b̯wamu b̯ulicalaho biro na biro?
85.6: Toli̱tu̱byokya gwa kandi, kwokwo bantu baamu bakusemereerwemwo?
85.7: Ai̱ Mukama, twolokye ngonzi zaamu zinene, otuhe kujunwa kwamu.
85.8: Kanyetegeerye Mukama Ruhanga kiyakoba, hab̯wakubba akwi̱za kubaliza bantu baamwe bya b̯u̱si̱nge, aleke batei̱ri̱ra kukora bya b̯udoma.
85.9: Mananu kwo kujunwa kwamwe kuli heehi̱ na bab̯wo bamutamwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, kandi ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyeicalanga mu nsi gyetu̱.
85.10: Ngonzi zinene na b̯wesigwa bi̱li̱romba, mananu na b̯u̱si̱nge biliramukyangana
85.11: B̯wesigwa b̯ulirugira hansi, kandi mananu garuge mwiguru.
85.12: Mukama alitugabaira birungi, kandi nsi gyetu̱ gilibba na makesa ganene.
85.13: B̯winganiza b̯uligyenda mu mei̱so ga Mukama b̯umuteekaniririze muhanda.

86.1: Ai̱ Mukama, ntegera mapokopo onzi̱remwo, hab̯wakubba ndi munaku kandi museege.
86.2: Olindenge b̯womi b̯wange, hab̯wakubba nyendya Ruhanga, juna muheereza waamu akwesiga.
86.3: Ai̱ Mukama ngiira mbabazi̱, hab̯wakubba nsiiba ninkuliriira.
86.4: Ai̱ Mukama i̱zu̱u̱lya mwozo gwa muheereza waamu na kusemererwa, hab̯wakubba weewe ginguha.
86.5: Ai̱ Mukama weewe murungi kandi mu̱ganyi̱ri̱, ogiira ngonzi zinene, bab̯wo baatula ibara lyamu.
86.6: Ai̱ Mukama, ntegera mapokopo weegwa kusaba kwange, weegwanga kizabiro kya kwesengereerya kwange.
86.7: B̯umba mu b̯ujune nkunga weewe, hab̯wakubba onzi̱ramwo.
86.8: Ai̱ Mukama, mu baruhanga tihaloho noomwei̱ akukwisana, rundi munyakukora bintu nka bi̱waakoori̱.
86.9: Ai̱ Mukama, mahanga gensei̱ gaawahangi̱ri̱, gakwi̱za ku̱ku̱ramya, kandi gaalihariiza ibara lyamu.
86.10: Hab̯wakubba oli waki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kandi okora bintu byamahanu, weewe musa oli Ruhanga.
86.11: Ai̱ Mukama, nzegesya muhanda gwamu, kwokwo ndibatire mu mananu gaamu, nzegesya kukuhereza na mutima gwange gwensei̱.
86.12: Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga wange, nku̱ku̱si̱i̱ma na mutima gwange gwensei̱, kandi nyahaariizanga ibara lyamu biro byensei̱.
86.13: Ngonzi zaamu ka zinene hali gya, wancu̱ngu̱u̱ri̱ wantoola kuzumu.
86.14: Ai̱ Ruhanga, bantu baamyepanku bambyokereeri̱, kitebe kya badulu batemu baku̱toolya ku̱nzi̱ta kandi we tibakuloho.
86.15: Ai̱ Mukama, bei̱tu̱ we, weewe Ruhanga aganyira kandi wa mbabazi̱ otabihiriirwa b̯wangu, kandi wa ngonzi zinene kandi mwesigwa.
86.16: Mpindukira kandi ongiire mbabazi̱, muheereza waamu omuhe maani gaamu kandi ojune mwana wa muzaana waamu.
86.17: Onzolokye kawoneru ka mbabazi̱ zaamu, bab̯wo banyakunnoba, bawone kandi basware, hab̯wakubba weewe Mukama, kandi wanju̱ni̱ri̱ waampu̱mu̱u̱lya.

87.1: Yaabi̱mbi̱ri̱ rub̯uga lwamwe ha lusahu lu̱syanu̱,
87.2: Mukama yendya irembu lya Sayu̱u̱ni̱, kukira mbuga zindi zensei̱ za mwʼI̱saleeri̱.
87.3: Ai̱ rub̯uga lwa Ruhanga, bintu bya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa bikukubazwaho.
87.4: “Mu mahanga ganzegi̱ri̱ hooho hali, Mi̱si̱ri̱, Bbabbu̱looni̱, Fi̱ri̱si̱ti̱, Ti̱i̱ro nʼI̱syopi̱ya, bantu bensei̱ ba mu mahanga gagwo nkwi̱za kubabala nka banyansi ba mu Yeru̱salemu̱.”
87.5: Hali Sayu̱u̱ni̱ bantu balikoba nti, “Yogo na yodi̱ hooho baabyali̱i̱rwe,” hab̯wakubba yogwo yankei eicala Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱ yooyo ali̱lu̱tati̱i̱rya.
87.6: Mukama alihandiika mabara ga bantu baamwe bensei̱, ni̱yolokya nka kubali banyansi ba mu Yeru̱salemu̱.
87.7: Bahi̱i̱mi̱ na babi̱nyi̱ bensei̱ babaza ki̱mwei̱ nibakoba yati, “Mu Sayu̱u̱ni̱ hooho hali ndugiiro gya mi̱gi̱sa myetu̱ myensei̱.”

88.1: Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga anjuna i̱jolo na mwinsi, nkunga weewe.
88.2: Otegere mapokopo kizabiro kyange, leka kusaba kwange kudwe cali oli.
88.3: Hab̯wakubba mwozo gwange gwi̱zwi̱ri̱ b̯ujune, b̯womi b̯wange b̯uli heehi̱ na kuzumu.
88.4: Nkubalirwa mu bali heehi̱ ku̱kwa, ndi muntu atali na maani.
88.5: Ndi nka muntu ati̱gi̱i̱rwe mu baku̱u̱, nkwisana nka mutumbi gu̱leeri̱ mu kituuru, ndi nka bab̯wo botakwi̱zu̱ka, kubba tokyakabajuna.
88.6: Onteeri̱ kuzumu mu ki̱i̱na kilei, mu biikaru bilei bi̱zwi̱ri̱mwo nti̱ti̱.
88.7: Ki̱ni̱ga kyamu ki̱nki̱i̱ri̱, Ombu̱mbi̱ri̱ na bijanga byamu byensei̱.
88.8: Oheeri̱ banywani bange kunyehala, onzi̱ri̱i̱rye kinugwa hali bo. Ndi mu nkomo tinkusobora kucwa,
88.9: Mei̱so gange galimwo nti̱ti̱, kubba ndi na b̯ujune. Ai̱ Mukama , nkukunga b̯uli kiro, nku̱byokeerya mikono.
88.10: Baku̱u̱ obakoorambe byamahanu? Balisobora kubyoka kukuhaariiza?
88.11: Basobora kubaza ha ngonzi zaamu zinene, nibali mu nyanga, rundi b̯wesigwa b̯wamu bab̯u̱tebeeze kuzumu?
88.12: Byamahanu byamu babyegambe mu nti̱ti̱, rundi kujunwa kwamu bakwetegerezanga mu nsi ginyakweb̯wa?
88.13: Bei̱tu̱ gya ai̱ Mukama , nkukuliriira, nkusaba b̯uli mwakya karei.
88.14: Ai̱ Mukama hab̯waki onyetoori̱ho? Hab̯waki ombi̱si̱ra mei̱so gaamu?
88.15: Kuruga mu b̯uto b̯wange ncala nimbonawona, kandi ni̱nyesu̱mi̱i̱ra ku̱kwa, nimbonawona na bifubiro byamu tindi na kikunjuna.
88.16: Ki̱ni̱ga kyamu kyamali̱ki̱i̱ri̱ho, bifubiro byamu byampwerekereerye.
88.17: Byanyelogoleerye nka mwizulo mwinsi lyensei̱, byensei̱ byanyeebbohereeri̱ ki̱mwei̱.
88.18: Waaleteeri̱ banywani bange na bataahi̱ bange kunyesalaho, hataati̱ mu̱taahi̱ wange gi̱nsi̱gali̱si̱i̱rye yooyo nti̱ti̱.

89.1: Ai̱ Mukama, nkwi̱za ku̱hi̱i̱ma ha ngonzi zaamu zinene biro byensei̱. Nyarangiiranga b̯wesigwa b̯wamu hali mi̱hi̱hi̱ myensei̱.
89.2: Hab̯wakubba ngonzi zaamu zinene, ziicalaho biro byensei̱, b̯wesigwa b̯wamu b̯uloho nkeiguru.
89.3: Weewe waakobi̱ri̱ yati, “Nyaakoori̱ ndagaanu na yogwo gi̱nyaakomi̱ri̱, nyarahi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ Dau̱di̱ muheereza wange yati,
89.4: ‘Beizukulu baamu ndibaafoora bakama biro byensei̱, kandi ndi̱bi̱mba b̯ukama b̯wamu biro byensei̱.’ ”
89.5: Ai̱ Mukama, iguru kalihaariiza byamahanu byamu na bamalayika baamu bensei̱ kabahaariiza b̯wesigwa b̯wamu.
89.6: B̯u̱b̯wo, mwiguru naani gibakusobora ku̱lengesani̱sya na Mukama? Naani mu bihangwa bya mwiguru akwisana Mukama ?
89.7: Ruhanga ati̱i̱nwa mu lukuratu lwa bamalayika, waki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kandi muzira kukira bensei̱ bali nayo?
89.8: Ai̱ Mukama , Ruhanga wa mahe, naani ali na b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯ukwijanajana nka b̯wamu? Ai̱ Mukama b̯wesigwa b̯wamu b̯uli nawe.
89.9: Weewe olema kuhuura kweitaka, bijanga b̯ubyesenga, weewe obi̱tekaani̱a.
89.10: Weewe wasonyotoori̱ Rahabbu, nka mutumbi. Wasasaani̱a banyanzigwa baamu na mukono gwamu gwamaani.
89.11: Iguru na nsi byamu, nsi na byensei̱ bigicalamwo, weewe waabi̱hangi̱ri̱.
89.12: Waahanga matemba na masi̱ri̱mu̱ka, lusahu Tabbora na Hamoni̱ zihaariiza ibara lyamu nakusemererwa.
89.13: Oli na mukono gwamaani, maani gaamu ganene hoi̱.
89.14: Mananu na b̯winganiza byobyo mu̱si̱nge gwa kitebe kyamu kya b̯ukama, ngonzi zinene na b̯wesigwa byobyo bikwehembera.
89.15: Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bantu baaku̱ramya ni̱bahi̱i̱ma byembu, Ai̱ Mukama, bab̯wo bahondera kyererezi̱ kya mei̱so gaamu,
89.16: basemererwa mwibara lyamu b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱, kandi bahaariiza b̯urungi b̯wamu.
89.17: Hab̯wakubba weewe ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya maani gaab̯u, mu ngonzi zaamu otwi̱rya basi̱ngu̱zi̱.
89.18: Hab̯wakubba ngab̯u gyetu̱ giicala Mukama yankei, Ruhanga Ati̱i̱nwa wʼI̱saleeri̱, yaatu̱heeri̱ mukama weetu̱.
89.19: Mu biro bya kadei, waabazengi̱ mu kuwonekerwa hali beesigwa baamu, noobaweera yati, “Ndeeti̱ri̱ kujuna hali yogwo wa maani, kitebe kya b̯ukama, nki̱heeri̱ yogwo gi̱nyaakomi̱ri̱ mu bantu.
89.20: Nsoroori̱mwo Dau̱di̱ muheereza wange, nyaamubbwomaho maku̱ta gange gasyanu̱.
89.21: Kwokwo mukono gwange gwicalenge na yo b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wange wamufooranga wa maani.
89.23: Ndicwacwana banyanzigwa baamwe mu mei̱so gaamwe kandi ndiguma hansi bab̯wo bamunoba.
89.24: B̯wesigwa na ngonzi zange zinene byeicaalanga hali yo, b̯uli kasu̱mi̱ nyamufooranga mu̱si̱ngu̱zi̱.
89.25: Ndi̱gali̱hya b̯ukama b̯wamwe, kurugira ki̱mwei̱ heitaka likooto kudwa ha mugira Efu̱raati̱.
89.26: Alindiriira naakoba yati, ‘Weewe Bbaabba, Ruhanga wange, lubbaali lwa kujunwa kwange.’
89.27: Ndimwi̱rya mu̱zegei̱zo wange wa b̯udulu ndimwi̱rya mukama akukira ki̱mwei̱ bakama bensei̱ ba hansi.
89.28: Nyeicalanga na ngonzi zaamu zinene biro byensei̱, kandi kuragana kwange kutalimalika.
89.29: Lubyalu lwamwe ndilwicaalyaho biro na biro, mwizukulu waamwe yeicalanga naali mukama.
89.30: Bei̱tu̱ beizukulu baamwe b̯ubalijeemera biragiro byange, nibakalemwa kuhondera mateeka gange,
89.31: b̯ubaligumirisana bya kwegesya kwange, batakwerinda biragiro byange,
89.32: b̯u̱b̯wo, mwomwo ndibafubira na lu̱gei̱ hab̯wa bibii byab̯u, kandi ndibakuuta kijunju hab̯wa b̯ubiibi b̯wab̯u.
89.33: Bei̱tu̱ ngonzi zange zinene hali Dau̱di̱ tizilimalika, habbe kumutoolaho muragu gu̱nyamu̱ragani̱si̱i̱rye.
89.34: Tindibinya ndagaanu gi̱nyakoori̱ hamwei̱ nayo, nab̯ukyakabba kuhindula kigambu ki̱nyakobi̱ri̱.
89.35: Ndahi̱i̱ri̱ murundi gu̱mwei̱ ibara lyange li̱syanu̱ kuruga hataati̱ na biro byensei̱, Dau̱di̱ tindimuweera b̯u̱gobya.
89.36: Beizukulu baamwe beicalangaho biro byensei̱, nka lyoba litamalikaho b̯ukama b̯wamwe kwokwo b̯ulicalaho.
89.37: Nka mweri̱ ku̱gu̱kwi̱za kwicalaho biro byensei̱, niguli b̯u̱kei̱so b̯wa mananu mwiguru.”
89.38: Bei̱tu̱ hataati̱, obi̱hi̱ri̱i̱rwe mutongoole waamu gi̱weekomeeri̱, omu̱ru̱gi̱ri̱ho kandi omu̱swi̱ri̱.
89.39: Ndagaanu gyamu na muheereza waamu waagi̱bi̱nyi̱ri̱, kondo gyamwe waagi̱gu̱mi̱ri̱ mu cuucu.
89.40: Obi̱nyi̱ri̱ bi̱si̱i̱ka byamwe byensei̱, ngo zaamwe ozi̱foori̱ri̱ makandi.
89.41: Bensei̱ bakurabaho bali mu kumunyaga, afooki̱ri̱ kintu kya kugaywa bataahi̱.
89.42: Waaheeri̱ banyanzigwa baamwe b̯u̱si̱ngu̱zi̱, bensei̱ waabaha kusemererwe.
89.43: Wei̱ti̱ri̱ b̯wogi wa mpirima gyamwe, otakamujune mu b̯ulemu.
89.44: Mubbeere gwa b̯ukama waagu̱mu̱tooori̱ mu ngalu, waaguma hansi kitebe kya b̯ukama b̯wamwe.
89.45: Waakeheerye biro bya b̯usigazi b̯wamwe, waamuletera muswaru.
89.46: Ai̱ Mukama, oli̱doosya hanya? Oliicala weebi̱si̱ri̱ biro byensei̱? Ki̱ni̱ga kyamu ki̱li̱dooosya hanya kwicala nikyaka nka mworo?
89.47: Ai̱ Mukama, i̱zu̱ka b̯womi wange kub̯uli b̯u̱dooli̱, hab̯waki bantu bawaahangi̱ri̱ batali na mugasu!
89.48: Muntu kyani yogwo akusobora kwomeera akalemwa ku̱kwa? Naani akusobora kwejuna maani ga kuzumu?
89.49: Mukama ngonzi zaamu zinene za kadei, mu b̯wesigwa b̯wamu zi̱i̱warahi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ Dau̱di̱ zili hanya?
89.50: Ai̱ Mukama i̱zu̱ka gya muheereza waamu kundimwo ku̱lu̱mwa, kandi nka kungumisiriza bi̱lu̱mo bya mahanga gensei̱.
89.51: Ai̱ Mukama , banyanzigwa baamu bi̱baku̱lu̱ma, bi̱baku̱jooga mutongoole waamu gi̱i̱wakomi̱ri̱mwo hensei̱ cali akugyenda.
89.52: Mukama ahaariizwenge biro byensei̱! Ami̱i̱na kandi Ami̱i̱na!

90.1: Ai̱ Mukama, oli b̯wicalu b̯wetu̱ biro na biro.
90.2: Otakahangi̱ri̱ nsahu, kandi otakahangi̱ri̱ nsi na bilimwo kuruga kadei na kadei obba Ruhanga.
90.4: Myaka ru̱ku̱mi̱ mu mei̱so gaamu miisana kiro ki̱mwei̱, mibba nka kiro kyei̱zo kinyakurabaho, rundi nka b̯wi̱re b̯wei̱jolo kuwanguha.
90.5: Obbu̱tya bantu nka mwizulo, tumalikaho b̯wangu kukira na kilooto. Tuli nkeisubi limera mwakya karei,
90.6: mwakya karei lyakya ni̱li̱nyi̱ri̱ra, joojolo lihotoka nilyoma.
90.7: Ki̱ni̱ga kyamu ki̱twi̱ta b̯wi̱ti̱, tu̱saali̱i̱rwe nu hab̯wa b̯usungu b̯wamu.
90.8: Bibiibi byetu̱ waabiteeri̱ mu mei̱so gaamu, bibiibi byensei̱ bya nsita waabi̱weeni̱.
90.9: Biro byetu̱ bikeehaho wangu hab̯wa ki̱ni̱ga kyamu, myaka myetu̱ mimalikaho wangu nka kiyayamuko.
90.10: Myaka myetu̱ miicala nsanju, b̯utubba na maani tu̱doosya kinaanei, bei̱tu̱ b̯unene b̯wamyo b̯wicala b̯ujune na kuwonawona, mimalikaho b̯wangu kandi ni̱tu̱syeraho.
90.11: Naani yeegi̱ri̱ maani ga ki̱ni̱ga kyamu? Naani yeegi̱ri̱ b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱ wa ki̱ni̱ga kyamu kikusobora kuleeta?
90.12: Twegesye kubala biro bya b̯womi b̯wetu̱, aleke tubbe na mutima gwa magezi̱.
90.13: Ai̱ Mukama , i̱ra, olitubihiriirwa ku̱doosya di̱i̱? Ganyira baheereza baamu!
90.14: B̯uli mwakya karei twi̱cu̱tyenge ngonzi zaamu zinene, kwokwo twicalenge nitujaguza kandi nitusemererwa biro byetu̱ byensei̱.
90.15: Tu̱he kusemererwa kunene, kukwijanjana na biro bi̱watu̱wonawoneseeryemwo, na myaka minene kwijanajana na mitwamaari mu b̯ujune.
90.16: Leka milimo myamu myezolokye mu baheereza baamu, na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya maani gaamu kizookere mu beizukulu baab̯u.
90.17: Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga, tu̱he mi̱gi̱sa myamu, otuhe ku̱si̱ngu̱ra mu milimo myetu̱, ee, otuhe ku̱si̱ngu̱ra milimo myetu̱.

91.1: Yogwo yensei̱ eicalira mu nnyu̱mba gya Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱, alihumulira mu mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ gwa Ruhanga wa b̯u̱sobozi̱.
91.2: Ndiweera Mukama yati, “Oli b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro kandi lugo lwange, Ruhanga wange ginyeesiga.”
91.3: Hab̯wakubba alikujuna mutegu gwensei̱, naakujuna na b̯u̱seeri̱ b̯wa kookoro.
91.4: Alikubbumba na byoza byamwe, kandi hansi wa bimpaha byamwe hooho halibba b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wamu, mananu gaamwe galikulinda.
91.5: Otali̱ti̱i̱na kabii kei̱za i̱jolo, habbe mbasi zi̱kwecu̱u̱ru̱ngya mwinsi,
91.6: rundi nseeri̱ gibiibi gi̱kei̱zi̱ra mu nti̱ti̱, rundi kuhwerekeera kwa mwihangwe.
91.7: Bantu ru̱ku̱mi̱ basobora ku̱kwera heehi̱ nawe, nku̱mi̱ na nku̱mi̱ ha mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo, bei̱tu̱ kandi we, kabii ti̱kali̱kwesu̱mi̱i̱ra.
91.8: Olyemeera noolingiira na mei̱so gaamu, noowona babiibi nka kubalifubirwa.
91.9: Nka ku̱wafoori̱ri̱ Mukama b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wamu, yogwo Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱, yooyo b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wamu,
91.10: tihaloho kabii kensei̱ kalikudwereera, b̯ujune tib̯ulikudwereera.
91.11: Kubba akwi̱za kuragira bamalayika baamwe bakulinde, bakwehemberenge mu mihanda myamu myensei̱.
91.12: Balikutegera mikono myab̯u bakukwate, aleke magulu gaamu gateekuuta kwi̱hi̱ga.
91.13: Oli̱si̱ngu̱ra ntali na hu̱lu̱hu̱ndu̱, olizigina mwana gwa ntali na mpiri.
91.14: Ruhanga naakoba yati, “Ndimujuna hab̯wakubba anzendyambe, ndimulinda kubba yeegi̱ri̱ ibara lyange.
91.15: Waalinzeta, ndi̱mwi̱ramwo, b̯walibba mu b̯ujune, ndibba nayo, ndimucungura, mutemwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
91.16: Ndimuha kwomeera naasemererwa, mwolokye kujunwa kwange.”

92.1: Kakirungi ku̱si̱i̱ma Mukama , na kuhaariiza ibara lyamu, we Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱,
92.2: kakirungi kwatula ngonzi zaamu zinene mwakya karei, na kurangiira b̯wesigwa b̯wamu i̱jolo,
92.4: Ai̱ Mukama , ompa kusemererwa hab̯wa bi̱byo byensei̱ byokoori̱, bindeetera ku̱hi̱i̱ma na masanyu.
92.5: Ai̱ Mukama ! Bintu byokora ka byamaani, biteekerezu byamu bi̱nki̱i̱ri̱ kubyetegereza.
92.6: Muntu mu̱pu̱u̱ti̱ tasobora kwega, mudoma tasobora kwetegereza.
92.7: Babiibi nab̯ubalihanda b̯wangu nkeisubi, na nkori̱ za bibii nizikakanya, balihwerekeera.
92.8: Ai̱ Mukama oli Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱ biro byenseenya.
92.9: Ai̱ Mukama , wona banyanzigwa baamu, wona nka kubalihwerekeera, nkori̱ za bibii zensei̱ ziliswaswanika.
92.10: Bei̱tu̱ gya ompeeri̱ maani nka ga mpeta, wambwomi̱ro maku̱ta ga muhendu.
92.11: Mei̱so gange gaweeni̱ ku̱si̱ngu̱rwa kwa banyanzigwa bange, mapokopo gange geegwa itoko lya kuhwerekeera kwab̯u.
92.12: Barungi balinyirira nka nsansa, kandi balifooka baamaani̱ nka mupoi gwa Lebbanooni̱.
92.13: Babateeri̱ mu nnyu̱mba gya Mukama , balihandira mu zi̱gati̱ za Ruhanga weetu̱.
92.14: Baliteeka byana na mu b̯u̱gu̱lu̱u̱su̱, nibali na rutege kandi basi̱gi̱ku̱,
92.15: kwolokya Mukama nka kwali Murungi, lubbaali lwange yogwo ateicalamwo nsobi̱ kadi gi̱mwei̱.

93.1: Mukama yooyo alema, eicala na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kinene, Mukama ali na b̯u̱sobozi̱, ab̯u̱lweri̱ nka muheeku. Yaahangi̱ri̱ nsi, tigisobora kutengeeta.
93.2: Kitebe kya b̯ukama b̯wamu kyagu̱mi̱i̱rweho kuruga kadei, weewe oloho kuruga kadei na kadei.
93.3: Ai̱ Mukama , mi̱i̱zu̱lo mya meezi̱ mi̱hu̱u̱ki̱ri̱, kwizula kwa meezi̱ ku̱ti̱nda nka nkuba, mwizulo gu̱hu̱ki̱i̱rye bijanga.
93.4: Wamaani kukira kuhuura kweitaka, wamaani hoi̱ kukira bijanga bya mataka, Mukama yogwo waahakyendi̱ waamaani!
93.5: Ai̱ Mukama , biragiro byamu bya b̯winganiza kwo, b̯unanu b̯u̱semereeri̱ nnyu̱mba gyamu, biro byensei̱.

94.1: Ai̱ Mukama , Ruhanga ofubira basobeerye, woolokya ki̱ni̱ga kyamu, obafubire!
94.2: Byoka ai̱ we ocwera nsi gyensei̱ misangu, cwera ba myehembo ku̱ki̱semereeri̱.
94.3: Ai̱ Mukama babiibi bali̱doosya di̱i̱, bali̱doosya hanya kwetembya?
94.4: Babaza bigambu bya kwehaariiza, nkori̱ za bibii ziicala ni̱zeetembya.
94.5: Ai̱ Mukama zi̱zi̱kya bantu baamu, ni̱zi̱wonawonesya bantu bawakomi̱ri̱mwo.
94.6: Bei̱ta bamukaabakwere na banyamahanga kandi ni̱bazi̱ri̱zi̱nda nfu̱u̱zi̱,
94.7: nibeweeragana yati, “ Mukama takubiwona, kandi Ruhanga wa Yakobbo bi̱byo tabifaaho.”
94.8: Mwetegereze, nywe mpwi̱si̱, badoma nywe mulikenga di̱i̱?
94.9: Yogwo munyakuhanga mapokopo ti̱yeegwa? Yogwo munyakukora mei̱so, tawona?
94.10: Yogwo afubira mahanga, takusobora kukufubira? Yogwo yeegi̱ri̱ b̯uli kintu, takusobora kwega kyolimu kukora?
94.11: Mukama yeega biteekerezu bya bantu, nka kubitali bya mugasu.
94.12: Ai̱ Mukama , kaali na mu̱gi̱sa yogwo gyohab̯ura, okamwegeesya biragiro byamu.
94.13: Aleke atunge kuhumula mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa b̯ujune, ku̱doosya babiibi b̯ubalibatemera ki̱i̱na.
94.14: Kubba Mukama talilekeera bantu baamwe, talibahemukira.
94.15: Barungi balitunga b̯winganiza, kandi ba mitima mi̱terekereru̱ balib̯uhondera.
94.16: Naani munyakwemeera nagya ku̱lwani̱sya babiibi? Naani munyakukwatagana na gya ku̱lwani̱sya nkori̱ za bibii?
94.17: Kabbenge Mukama atanju̱ni̱ri̱, nyaali heehi̱ kubba mu nsi gya baku̱u̱.
94.18: Ai̱ Mukama , b̯u̱nyateekereze nkukibbala, hooho ngonzi zaamu zinene zanju̱ni̱ri̱.
94.19: Mutima gwange b̯ugubba nigukutuntura bintu binene, nompu̱mu̱u̱lya mwozo gwange.
94.20: Balemi̱ babiibi banyakukora byeitima bakabirabya mu kiragiro, basobora kwekwata nawe?
94.21: Beekoba hamwei̱ mwa kwi̱ta bamananu, na ku̱zi̱ri̱zi̱nda bab̯wo batali na musangu.
94.22: Bei̱tu̱ Mukama yooyo kigo kyange kinyamaani, kandi Ruhanga wange yooyo lubbaali lwa b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wange.
94.23: Alibasasula hab̯wa bibii byab̯u, abahwerekereerye hab̯wa b̯ubiibi b̯wab̯u, Mukama Ruhanga weetu̱ alibatooleraho ki̱mwei̱.

95.1: Mwi̱ze tu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Mukama , tu̱ku̱ngye na kusemererwa lubbaali lwa kujunwa kwetu̱.
95.2: Tugyende mu mei̱so gaamwe naaku̱si̱i̱ma tu̱hi̱i̱me tusemererwa na byembu bya kuhaariiza!
95.3: Kubba Mukama yooyo Ruhanga wamaani, ali mukama wa maani kukiraho baruhanga bensei̱.
95.4: Ndi̱ha za nsi zensei̱ zili mu mikono myamwe, nsahu zilei zensei̱ zaamwe.
95.5: Itaka de lye, kubba yooyo yaali̱koori̱, nsi yaagi̱hangi̱ri̱ na ngalu zaamwe.
95.6: Mwi̱ze tu̱ramye tu̱b̯u̱ndeeri̱, tu̱mu̱ku̱ndi̱re malu̱ Mukama Mu̱hangi̱ weetu̱!
95.7: Kubba yooyo Ruhanga weetu̱, twe tuli bantu bei̱li̱i̱si̱i̱ryo lyamwe, kandi ntaama za mukono gwamwe. Kiro kyadeeru b̯u̱mwakeegwa iraka lyamwe,
95.8: mu̱tataati̱i̱rya mitima myenyu̱, nka bahaaha beenyu̱ ku̱bakoori̱ mu Meri̱bba na Maasa nibali mwirungu.
95.9: Bandengi̱ri̱ kandi baapi̱ma kugumisiriza kwange, nab̯ubaali baweeni̱ bi̱nyabakoleeri̱.
95.10: Nyabi̱hi̱ri̱i̱rwe bantu ba mu̱hi̱hi̱ gu̱gwo kumala myaka maku̱mi̱ ganei, nyaakoba yati, “Bali bantu bahabi̱ri̱ mitima, kandi ti̱beegi̱ri̱ mihanda myange.”
95.11: Kyokyo nyaarahi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ na ki̱ni̱ga ninkoba yati, “Tihaloho noomwe mu mu̱hi̱hi̱ gwenyu̱ alingira mu kiikaru kya b̯uhuumulo b̯wange.”

96.1: Mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Mukama kyembu kihyaka, mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Mukama nywe nsi gyensei̱!
96.2: Mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Mukama , muhaariize ibara lyamwe, mu̱bazenge ha kujunwa kwamwe b̯uli kiro.
96.3: Mu̱rangi̱i̱renge ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamwe mu mahanga, na byamahanu byamwe mu bantu benseenya!
96.4: Kubba Mukama wa maani kandi aki̱i̱rayo kuhaariizib̯wa, akusemeera ku̱ti̱i̱nwa kukiraho baruhanga bensei̱.
96.5: Hab̯wakubba baruhanga bensei̱ ba mahanga bi̱si̱sani̱ kwankei, bei̱tu̱ Mukama yooyo munyakuhanga iguru.
96.6: Ali na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa na mananu! Mu kiikaru kyamwe kitongoole, halimwo b̯u̱sobozi̱ na kusemera.
96.7: Mu̱haari̱i̱ze Mukama , nywe bantu bensei̱, mu̱haari̱i̱ze Mukama hab̯wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa na b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wamwe.
96.8: Mu̱haari̱i̱ze ibara lya Mukama lya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, muleete kihongwa Mwi̱ngi̱re mu Yeekaaru̱ gyamwe!
96.9: Mu̱ramye Mukama hab̯wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamwe kitongoole, nsi gyensei̱ mujegeje mu mei̱so gaamwe.
96.10: Muweere mahanga gensei̱ yati, “ Mukama ahaariizwe! Nsi gyensei̱ yaagi̱taati̱i̱rye tigisobora ku̱zi̱ngi̱zi̱ka, alicwera bantu bensei̱ musangu na b̯winganiza.”
96.11: Leka iguru lisemererwe, na nsi gyegonze, itaka na byensei̱ bigicalamwo, bihuure,
96.12: leka misiri na bilimwa byensei̱ byebbune! Kasi misaali myensei̱ mya mu kibira myezi̱ngi̱i̱zye na kusemererwa.
96.13: Bali̱hi̱i̱ma mu mei̱so ga Mukama , kubba akwi̱za kucwera nsi musangu, alicwera nsi mu mananu gaamwe, na bantu mu b̯wesigwa b̯wamwe.

97.1: Mukama yooyo alema, leka nsi gisemererwe, bi̱zi̱nga byensei̱ byegonze.
97.2: Bikaka na nti̱ti̱ bi̱mwelogoleerye, mananu na b̯winganiza byobyo mu̱si̱nge gwa kitebe kya b̯ukama b̯wamwe.
97.3: Mworo gugyenda mu mei̱so gaamwe, ni̱gwokya banyanzigwa baamwe bensei̱.
97.4: Kyererezi̱ kyamwe kyakira nsi gyensei̱, nsi giwona nigikankana.
97.5: Nsahu zaaga nka masaju mu mei̱so ga Mukama , mu mei̱so ga Mukama wa mu nsi gyensei̱.
97.6: Iguru lirangiira mananu gaamwe, kandi mahanga gensei̱ gawona ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamwe.
97.7: Bantu baramya bi̱si̱sani̱ bensei̱ baswarambe, beehaari̱i̱zi̱sya bi̱si̱sani̱ bi̱tagira mugasu, nywe baruhanga, mu̱ramyenge MUKAMA .
97.8: Sayu̱u̱ni̱ gyegwa kandi nigisemererwa, na bahara ba Yu̱da nibeegonza, ai̱ Mukama hab̯wa mu̱li̱ngo gwocweramwo misangu myamu.
97.9: Ai̱ Mukama , Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱, olema nsi gyensei̱, oli wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kukiraho baruhanga bandi bensei̱.
97.10: Nywe nywensei̱ bendya Mukama , mu̱nobe bibii. Alinda b̯womi b̯wa barungi baamwe, naabajuna kuruga mu mikono bya babiibi.
97.11: Kyererezi̱ kyakira bamananu, na kusemererwa ni̱kwi̱zi̱ra ba mitima mi̱terekereru̱.
97.12: Nywe bamananu mu̱semereerwe mu Mukama kandi muhaariize ibara lyamwe li̱syanu̱.

98.1: Mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Mukama kyembu kihyaka, kubba akoori̱ byamahanu! Ngalu gyamwe gya b̯udyo gi̱leeti̱ri̱ ku̱si̱ngu̱ra, mukono gwamwe gu̱teeri̱ho kujunwa.
98.2: Mukama aheeri̱ kujuna kwamwe kwegeb̯wa, yoolokeerye mananu gaamwe mu mahanga.
98.3: Ei̱zu̱ki̱ri̱ b̯wesigwa na ngonzi zaamwe zinene hali nnyu̱mba gyʼI̱saleeri̱, mmaliiro gya nsi gyensei̱ gi̱weeni̱ kujunwa kwa Ruhanga weetu̱.
98.4: Kuutira Mukama muzira gwa kusemererwa uwe nsi gyensei̱, Mu̱byokye kyembu, mu̱hi̱i̱me nimumuhariiza!
98.5: Mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Mukama , mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze neiraka lya ndi̱ngi̱di̱!
98.6: Mu̱ku̱u̱te ngwara na mubbilo, mu̱ku̱ngye mu̱semererwe mu mei̱so ga Mukama , mu̱lemi̱ weetu̱.
98.7: Leke itaka na byensei̱ binyakulimwo byaluke, nsi na bab̯wo bagicalamwo!
98.8: Leke migira mikuute mu ngalu, leke mbamba zi̱hi̱i̱mi̱re hamwei̱ na kusemererwa,
98.9: mu mei̱so ga Mukama kubba akwi̱za kucwera nsi musangu, alicwera nsi na mananu, hamwei̱ na b̯winganiza mu bantu.

99.1: Mukama yooyo alema, leka bantu bajegeje! Ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ ha kitebe kya b̯ukama hakati̱ wa bakeru̱u̱bbi̱, leka nsi gi̱zi̱ngi̱zi̱ke!
99.2: Mukama wamaani mu Sayu̱u̱ni̱, aku̱haari̱i̱zi̱b̯wa hakyendi̱ wa bantu bensei̱.
99.3: Leka bantu bensei̱ bahaariize b̯ukooto na b̯uzira b̯weibara lyamu, Yooyo mu̱syanu̱!
99.4: Mukama mu maani gaamwe yendya b̯winganiza ogu̱mi̱i̱ryeho nkoragana, waadosereerya b̯unanu, na b̯urungi mu Yakobbo.
99.5: Muhaariize Mukama Ruhanga weetu̱, mu̱rami̱i̱rye mu mei̱so ga kitebe kyamwe! Ali yooyo mu̱syanu̱!
99.6: Mu̱sa nʼAlooni̱ baalingi bamwei̱ mu balaami̱ baamwe, na Samwi̱ri̱ yaali mu bab̯wo banyakweta ibara lyamwe, beeti̱ri̱ Mukama , yaabeeramwo.
99.7: Yaabazengi̱ nabo kuraba mu nkondo gyeiguru beegwi̱ri̱ bigambu byamwe baabikwata, hamwei̱ na biragiro bi̱yaabaheeri̱.
99.8: Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga weetu̱, waaberi̱ri̱mwo kusaba kwab̯u, oli Ruhanga munyakubaganyira, naab̯u̱wafu̱u̱bi̱i̱ri̱ b̯ubiibi b̯wab̯u.
99.9: Muhaariize Mukama Ruhanga weetu̱, kandi mu̱rami̱i̱rye ha lusahu lwamwe lu̱syanu̱, kubba Ruhanga weetu̱ ali mu̱syanu̱!

100.1: Mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Mukama , nywe ba mu nsi gyensei̱ neiraka lya kusemererwa!
100.2: Mu̱heereze Mukama nakusemererwa! Mwi̱ze mu mei̱so gaamwe na ku̱hi̱i̱ma!
100.3: Mukyege nti, Mukama abba Ruhanga! Yooyo munyakutuhanga, kandi tuli baamwe, tuli bantu bei̱li̱i̱si̱i̱ryo lyamwe.
100.4: Mwi̱ngi̱re mu Yeekaaru̱ gyamwe na ku̱si̱i̱ma, na mu zi̱gati̱ gyamwe na kuhaariiza, mu̱mu̱si̱i̱me muhaariize ibara lyamwe!
100.5: Kubba Mukama murungi, ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro, na b̯wesigwa b̯wamwe hali mi̱hi̱hi̱ myensei̱.

101.1: Ai̱ Mukama , nyahi̱i̱manga ha b̯winganiza na ngonzi zaamu zinene, nyakuhaariizanga na kyembu.
101.2: Nditaho mutima kukwata muhanda gutalimwo kabii. Beiraba olindwereera di̱i̱? Ndilibata na mutima gu̱syanu̱, mu nnyu̱mba gyange.
101.3: Tinditaho mei̱so gange, hali kintu kyensei̱ kitalimwo mugasu, nnoba bikorwa bya bantu bakuhaba, tindikwatagana nabyo.
101.4: Ba mitima mibiibi baabbanga hadei nagya, tindibba na nkoragana gyensei̱ na kibii.
101.5: Yensei̱ ahesa mwi̱ra na mu nsita, ndi̱mu̱hwerekereerya. Ti̱ndi̱gu̱mi̱ri̱si̱za yensei̱, wa myehaariizo na bakwetembya.
101.6: Bantu beesigwa mu nsi, ndibakwatirwa mbabazi̱, kwokwo basobore kwicala nagya. Yogwo alibatira mu muhanda gurungi, akwi̱za kumpeereza.
101.7: Tihaloho mu̱gobya aliicaara mu nnyu̱mba gyange, tihaloho mucwa makuru alyemeera mu mei̱so gange.
101.8: B̯uli mwakya, nyahwerekereeryanga, babiibi bensei̱ beicala mu nsi, mmaleho nkori̱ za bibii, kuruga mu rub̯uga lwa Mukama

102.1: Ai̱ Mukama , weegwa kusaba kwange, kukunga kwange kukudwereere!
102.2: Otanyebi̱sangaho, mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa b̯ujune! Onzi̱remwo b̯wangu b̯unyakakusabanga!
102.3: Kubba biro byange bi̱kwi̱ru̱ka nka mwi̱ca, na maku̱ha gange gaku̱hya nka kikoomi,
102.4: Mutima gwange gu̱mali̱ki̱rwemwo maani kandi gwehi̱nyi̱ri̱ nkeisubi, ni̱nyebeera na kudya bidyo.
102.5: Hab̯wa kutaaga maani, maku̱ha gange ganku̱du̱mu̱ki̱ri̱.
102.6: Ndi nka ki̱nyoni̱ kya mwirungu, nkwisana nka hi̱i̱hya mu makandi.
102.7: Ndaala nimbona ntakwebbaka, nkulungwalungwa nka nyoni ha kasolya.
102.8: Banyanzigwa bange banjooga ku̱keesya b̯wi̱re, bankyena nibaatulanga ibara lyange,
102.9: I̱syanu̱ lyolyo ndya, mali̱ga googo nywa.
102.10: Hab̯wa ki̱ni̱ga na kusalirwa kwamu, wansengi̱ri̱ wanku̱u̱ti̱ra hansi
102.11: Biro byange bikwisana nka mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ gwa joojolo, mpotoki̱ri̱ keisubi.
102.12: Ai̱ Mukama, olilema biro byensei̱, oliicala noi̱zu̱kwa mu mi̱hi̱hi̱ myenseenya
102.13: Olibyoka okwati̱i̱rwe Sayu̱u̱ni̱ kisa, b̯ub̯u b̯wob̯wo b̯wi̱re b̯wa kuboolokya mbabazi̱, kasu̱mi̱ konyini kadoori̱.
102.14: Kubba baheereza baamu, bendya hoi̱ Sayu̱u̱ni̱, kandi nibasaliirwa hab̯wa kuhwerekeera kwalwo.
102.15: Mahanga gensei̱ gali̱ti̱i̱na ibara lya Mukama , na bakama bensei̱ ba munsi bali̱ti̱i̱na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamu.
102.16: Kubba Mukama , ali̱bi̱mbamwo Sayu̱u̱ni̱ b̯uhyaka, ni̱yeezolokya mu ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamwe.
102.17: Aliiramwona kusaba kwa banaku, kandi taligaya kusaba kwab̯u.
102.18: Leka ki̱kyo kihandiikwe hab̯wa mu̱hi̱hi̱ gu̱li̱i̱rahoona, aleke na bab̯wo bacaali kubyalwa bahaariize Mukama ,
102.19: yaali̱ngi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ kuruga mu kiikaru kyamwe ki̱syanu̱ kya mwiguru, Mukama yaawona nsi,
102.20: yeegwa kulira kwa banyankomo, yaateesu̱la banyakucwerwa gwa ku̱kwa,
102.21: aleke barangiire ibara lya Mukama mu Sayu̱u̱ni̱, kandi bamuhaariize mu Yeru̱salemu̱.
102.22: Bantu balyesorooza hamwei̱, makama gahaari̱i̱ze Mukama .
102.23: Amaari̱mwo maani mu b̯wi̱re b̯u̱dooli̱, yaakehyaho biro byange.
102.24: Nkukoba yati, “Ai̱ Ruhanga, otanzi̱ta ntakagu̱lu̱u̱si̱ri̱, myaka myamu timihinduka hali mi̱hi̱hi̱ myenseenya!”
102.25: B̯wodi̱ kadei waateeri̱ho mu̱si̱nge gwa nsi, neiguru liicala mulimo gwa ngalu zaamu.
102.26: Bi̱byo byensei̱ bilimalikaho, bei̱tu̱ we, olisigalaho, bi̱li̱gu̱lu̱u̱sa nka kilwalu, olibihindula nka lu̱goye, bimalikeho.
102.27: Bei̱tu̱ we, tohinduka, kandi olyomeera biro na biro.
102.28: Baana ba baheereza baamu baliicala mu b̯u̱si̱nge, oliwona maani ga beizukulu baab̯u.

103.1: Ai̱ mutima gwange, haariiza Mukama , na byensei̱ bili muli gya haari̱i̱ze ibara lyamwe li̱syanu̱!
103.2: Haariiza Mukama , ai̱ mutima gwange, kandi oteebeera birungi byakora.
103.3: Aganyira b̯ubiibi b̯wamu b̯wensei̱, naahoni̱a na nseeri̱ zaamu zensei̱.
103.4: Munyakucungura b̯womi b̯wamu b̯wensei̱ kuruga mu ki̱i̱na, akulwalya kondo gya mbabazi̱ na ngonzi zinene,
103.5: naakuha birungi, bi̱kwi̱ryemwo maani ga b̯uto nka ngweri̱.
103.6: Mukama akora birungi, aha b̯winganiza hali bab̯wo bamigiriziib̯we.
103.7: Yoolokeerye nkora gyamwe hali Mu̱sa, na milimo myamwe hali Bei̱saleeri̱.
103.8: Mukama eicala wambabazi̱ kandi mu̱ganyi̱ri̱, tabihirwa wangu, ngonzi zaamwe zinene tizihinduka.
103.9: Tali̱lamba njenjeera, kandi talibba na ki̱ni̱ga b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱.
103.10: Tatufubira ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha bibii byetu̱, tatubonereza nka b̯ubiibi b̯wetu̱ ku̱b̯u̱semereeri̱.
103.11: Nkeiguru kulili hakyendi̱ hoi̱ na nsi, kwokwo ngonzi zaamwe zinene ziicala hali bab̯wo bamu̱ti̱i̱na.
103.12: B̯uhulukalyoba nka kuheicala hadei na b̯ugwalyoba, kwokwo yatyo atutoolaho bibii byetu̱.
103.13: Mu̱li̱ngo bba baana aganyira baana baamwe, kwokwo na Mukama aganyira bab̯wo bamu̱ti̱i̱na.
103.14: Kubba yeegi̱ri̱ b̯uhangwa b̯wetu̱, ei̱zu̱ka nka ku̱twaru̱gi̱ri̱ mwicuucu.
103.15: B̯womi b̯wa muntu b̯uli nkeisubi, rundi byakyo bya mwirungu bikunkumuka ni̱bi̱syeraho wangu.
103.16: Mpehu gi̱bi̱ku̱u̱ta nibirugaho bitakusobora kwi̱raho gwakandi.
103.17: Bei̱tu̱ ngonzi zinene za Mukama ziicaliraho kuruga kadei na kadei, hali bab̯wo bamu̱ti̱i̱na, mananu gaamwe gadwereera beizukulu ba bantu,
103.18: na bab̯wo bei̱zu̱ka ndagaanu gyamwe, kandi nibakwata biragiro byamwe.
103.19: Mukama ateeri̱hoona kitebe gya b̯ukama b̯wamwe mwiguru, kandi akulema b̯uli kintu kyenseenya.
103.20: Muhaariize Mukama , nywe bamalayika baamwe, nywe bamaani banyakukwata kigambu kyamwe, mukab̯undalira iraka lyamwe.
103.21: Muhaariize Mukama , nywe mahe gaamwe nywensei̱, nywe baheereza baamwe bakora bi̱yendya!
103.22: Muhaariize Mukama , nywe bihangwa byensei̱, mu bikaaru byamwe byensei̱ byalemeramwo. B̯womi b̯wange, haariiza Mukama !

104.1: B̯womi b̯wange haariiza Mukama ! Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga wange oli wamaani mali̱! Oli mukooto kandi wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kwo!
104.2: Welongoleerwe kyererezi̱ nkʼolweri̱ lu̱goye, waaregi̱ri̱ iguru nka mu̱bi̱mba heema.
104.3: Obi̱mba nnyu̱mba gyamu ku meezi̱ nkoku̱gi̱bi̱mba ha lubbaali, ofoora bikaka kigaali kyamu, nooli̱bati̱ra hakyendi̱ wa mpehu nka bimpaha.
104.4: Afoora batumwa baamwe mpehu, baheereza baamwe ndimi za mworo.
104.5: Waateeri̱ nsi ha mu̱si̱nge gwagyo, aleke gi̱tali̱zi̱ngi̱zi̱ka.
104.6: Waagyelogoleerye na meezi̱, meezi̱ gaabbumba nsahu.
104.7: B̯u̱wacomeeri̱ meezi̱ gaasyereeri̱ho, b̯u̱gegwi̱ri̱ kubbwatuka kwamu gaaborogota.
104.8: Meezi̱ gaaheteeri̱ kwakyendi̱ wa nsahu, gabbwomoka mu bihanga.
104.9: Waagatereeri̱ mubaga aleke gatacwa, kandi gaatali̱i̱ra ku̱bbu̱tya nsi.
104.10: Oha misu kubbwoma meezi̱ mu migira, nigaheetera hakati̱ wa mbamba na bihanga.
104.11: Hooho bisolo bya mu kisaka binyweera, nyoota gimalika mu ndogoyi̱ za mwirungu.
104.12: Mu misaali mi̱hereeri̱ho, hooho bi̱nyoni̱ bi̱bi̱mbi̱ra bizonza byabyo nibyegonzeramwo.
104.13: Osi̱ndi̱ka meezi̱ kuruga mwiguru, nsi nigicuta byana bya mulimo gwamu.
104.14: Ohandya isubi lya bisolo kudya, na bilimwa bya bantu kuruga mwitehe.
104.15: Hooho batungira mwenge gwa mi̱zabbi̱bbu̱ gubaha kusemererwa, hamwei̱ na maku̱ta gaaku̱nyi̱ri̱i̱rya b̯u̱syo b̯wab̯u, na bidyo bikubaha maani.
104.16: Misaali mya Mukama mitunga ndagali̱ ginene, mi̱vu̱le mya Lebbanooni̱ mi̱yeeli̱mi̱i̱ri̱.
104.17: Mu misaali mi̱myo, bi̱nyoni̱ hooho bi̱bi̱mbi̱ra bizonza, manunda nigatungiramwo b̯ulaalu b̯wago.
104.18: Mparaaki ziicala mu nsahu zilei, caali hali lubbaali hooho nsengi̱ zeebi̱sa.
104.19: B̯wateeri̱hoona mweri̱ aleke gwahu̱kani̱enge kasu̱mi̱, lyoba lyegenge magwere gaalyo.
104.20: Oleetaho nti̱ti̱, b̯wi̱re b̯wei̱jolo, bisolo byensei̱ bya mu kisaka nibihulukayo.
104.21: Ntali zihuruguma nizitoolya zi̱kyagu̱mi̱sya, aleke Ruhanga azi̱di̱i̱syenge nka b̯uli kiro.
104.22: Lyoba b̯ulihuluka, zigyenda nizilaala mu b̯wingira b̯wazo.
104.23: Kasi bantu nibabyoka nibagyenda kukora milimo myab̯u, bakora ku̱doosya joojolo.
104.24: Mukama , byokoori̱ kabinene! Byensei̱ waabi̱koori̱ mu magezi̱ gaamu. Nsi gyensei̱ gi̱i̱zwi̱ri̱ bihangwa byamu.
104.25: Haloho itaka likooto kandi ligali, cali bihangwa bitakubalwa biicala, bikooto na bi̱dooli̱
104.26: Itaka li̱lyo, hooho maati̱ garabira, na bihiri bi̱waahangi̱ri̱ cali bi̱zeenyera.
104.27: Bi̱byo byensei̱ byekwata weewe, obi̱di̱isya mu b̯wi̱re b̯wonyi̱ni̱.
104.28: B̯wobiha bidyo, nibibisorooza, obiha byakudya nibidya nibiicutira ki̱mwei̱.
104.29: Woobiima, nibituntura, woobi̱toolaho rwoya, nibikwa, bi̱bbola nibiira icuucu.
104.30: Waabi̱hangi̱ri̱ na mwozo waamu, waabiha kwomeera byei̱zu̱lya nsi.
104.31: Leke ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya Mukama ki̱i̱calengeho biro byensei̱, Aleke asemereerwe mu milimo myamwe.
104.32: Alingiira nsi ni̱gi̱tengeeta, akwata ha nsahu nizitirimuka na mwi̱ca!
104.33: Ndi̱hi̱i̱mi̱ra Mukama biro bya b̯womi b̯wange b̯wensei̱. Ndi̱hi̱i̱ma nimpariiza Ruhanga wange nincaali ku nsi.
104.34: Leka biteekerezu byange byense bimusemezenge kubba nyenyumiriizira muli Mukama
104.35: Leka babiibi bamalikireho ki̱mwei̱ mu nsi, nkori̱ za bibii zitalizookeraho ki̱mwei̱. Ai̱ mutima gwange, haariiza Mukama! Haari̱i̱ze Mukama !

105.1: Mu̱si̱i̱me Mukama mukunge ibara lyamwe, mwolokye bantu bintu byakora!
105.2: Mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re nimumuhariiza, mubaze ha byamahanu byamwe byensei̱!
105.3: Mu̱semererwe hab̯wa ibara lyamwe li̱syanu̱, nywe baramya Mukama mwegonze!
105.4: Mu̱toolye Mukama hamwei̱ na maani gaamwe, mu̱mwekwate b̯utalekeera.
105.5: Mwi̱calenge ni̱mwi̱zu̱ka byamahanu byakora, na ncwa gya misangu myamwe.
105.6: Beizukulu bʼI̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ muheereza waamwe, batabani̱ ba Yakobbo gi̱yekoomeeri̱, mwi̱zu̱kenge bya mahanu byakora!
105.7: Yooyo Mukama Ruhanga weetu̱, asalira nsi gyensei̱ misangu.
105.8: Ei̱zu̱ka ndagaanu gyamwe gya biro na biro, na miragu myamwe ku̱doosya mi̱hi̱hi̱ ru̱ku̱mi̱.
105.9: Ndagaanu gi̱yaakoori̱ nʼI̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱, yaarahi̱i̱ri̱ muragu gwamwe nʼI̱saka
105.10: Ndagaanu gi̱gyo, Ruhanga yaagi̱kwati̱i̱rye Yakobbo, yaagiha Bei̱saleeri̱ kumalaho biro byensei̱,
105.11: yaakoba yati, “Ndikuha nsi gya Kanaani̱, gubbe mugab̯u gwa b̯ugwetwa b̯wamu.”
105.12: B̯atakabbeeri̱ kukanya, baali bagenyi̱ mu nsi gya Kanaani̱.
105.13: Nibazengeeranga b̯uli ihanga nibaruga mu b̯ukama b̯u̱mwei̱ nibagyenda mu bantu bandi.
105.14: Bei̱tu̱ Ruhanga atakeeki̱ri̱zenge muntu noomwei̱ ku̱bawonawonesya, hab̯wab̯u, yaacoomeerengi bakama
105.15: naakoba yati, “Mu̱takwatahoona batongoole bange, baragu̱ri̱ bange mutabakora kubii!”
105.16: B̯uyaagu̱mi̱ri̱ho nzala mu nsi, yaakeeyahoona bidyo byab̯u byensei̱,
105.17: yaatu̱mi̱ri̱ muntu mu̱mei̱so gaab̯u, mu̱nyaku̱tu̱ndwa nka mwiru, ibara lyamwe Yozefu̱.
105.18: Baamu̱bbohi̱ri̱ njegere mu magulu, baamuteera kyoma mwi̱coti̱.
105.19: Yozefu̱ yei̱ceeri̱ mu nkomo, Mukama yaamu̱pi̱ma ku̱doosereerya bigambu bi̱yaabazi̱ri̱.
105.20: Nahaahwo, hooho Mukama wa Mi̱si̱ri̱, yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ bamu̱teesye, kasi Faraaho mulema ihanga li̱lyo yaamwahuura.
105.21: Mukama yaamu̱handi̱i̱rye, yaamukwatya b̯ujunanizib̯wa b̯wensei̱ mu kikaali,
105.22: kuragira bayolo bensei̱, na kwegesya balemi̱ byamagezi̱.
105.23: Hei̱nyu̱ma, I̱saleeri̱ gyagyendi̱ri̱ Mi̱si̱ri̱, Yakobbo yeicala mu nsi gya Haamu nka munyamahanga.
105.24: Mukama yaaheeri̱ bantu baamwe kukanya, yaabaha rutege kukiraho banyanzigwa baab̯u.
105.25: Yaaheeri̱ Banyami̱si̱ri̱ kubanoba na kudyamwo rukwe baheereza baamwe.
105.26: Ruhanga yaatu̱mi̱ri̱ Mu̱sa muheereza waamwe, hamwei̱ nʼAlooni̱ gi̱yaakomirimwo.
105.27: Baakoori̱ b̯uboneru b̯wa byamahanu b̯wamwe mu Banyami̱si̱ri̱, na bikuhuniriza mu nsi gya Haamu.
105.28: Ruhanga yaabasi̱ndi̱ki̱i̱ri̱ nti̱ti̱ kandi nsi gyeragura, kubba baajeemeeri̱ biragiro byamwe baalemwa ku̱teesya bantu baamwe kugyenda.
105.29: Meezi̱ gaab̯u yaagafoori̱ri̱ ibbanga, nsu̱ zaab̯u zensei̱ zaakwa.
105.30: Masonsooni̱a gei̱zwi̱ri̱ b̯uli kicweka, na mu ki̱si̱i̱ka kya ntabbu gya mukama de gaali̱yo.
105.31: Ruhanga yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ bi̱du̱ndu̱li̱ bya nsohera, na nsinya byei̱zu̱lya nsi gyab̯u gyensei̱.
105.32: Mu kiikaru kya ndagali̱, baatu̱ngi̱ri̱ ndagali̱ gya mahi̱ga, b̯u̱serya hamwei̱ na nkuba mu nsi gyensei̱.
105.33: Yaahwerekereerye mi̱zabbi̱bbu̱ na mi̱ti̱i̱ni̱ myab̯u, yaacwacwana misaali mya nsi gyab̯u myensei̱.
105.34: Yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ nzi̱ge zei̱za, mu b̯unene zitakubalwa.
105.35: Zaahwerekereerye bi̱merwa bya munsi gyab̯u gyensei̱, b̯uli kilimwa kya mwitehe lyab̯u kyadiib̯wa.
105.36: Kasi yei̱ta b̯uli mu̱zi̱gai̱jo mu gi̱gyo nsi, na b̯uli kilimwa kyensei̱ kikubanza kuruga mu̱ndi̱mi̱ro zaab̯u.
105.37: Ruhanga b̯u̱yaatoori̱ Bei̱saleeri̱ kuruga Mi̱si̱ri̱, baatwalageeni̱ feeza na zaabbu, atakabbeho noomwei̱ mu bo munyakusiitaara.
105.38: Banyami̱si̱ri̱ baasemereerwe hab̯wa bei̱saaleeri̱ kubarugaho, kubba baati̱nwengi̱ hoi̱.
105.39: Yaababbu̱mbi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ na bikaka, yaabateraho mworo gubamulukirenge mu b̯wi̱re b̯wei̱jolo.
105.40: Baasabi̱ri̱ bidyo yaabaha maanu, yaabeecuti̱i̱rye migaati kuruga mwiguru.
105.41: Ruhanga yaati̱i̱rye lubbaali meezi̱ gaalwa, gaaheta nka mugira mu nsi gyomu.
105.42: Hab̯wakubba yei̱zu̱ki̱ri̱ muragu gwamwe gu̱syanu̱, gu̱yaaragani̱si̱i̱rye muheereza waamwe I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱.
105.43: Baasemereerwe hoi̱ Ruhanga b̯u̱yaabatoori̱ mu nsi gya Mi̱si̱ri̱, baali̱batengi̱ nibatokera hakyendi̱.
105.44: Mukama yaabaheeri̱ nsi, na b̯uli ki̱mwei̱ kya banyamahanga baali bakolereeri̱,
105.45: aleke bakwate mateeka gaamwe kandi bahondere biragiro byamwe. Haari̱i̱ze Mukama !

106.1: Mu̱haari̱i̱ze Mukama ! Mu̱si̱i̱me Mukama, kubba abba murungi, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro!
106.2: Tihalohoona akusobora kumuhaariiza kikumala, ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha bintu byamaani byakora.
106.3: Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bab̯wo balibatira mu b̯u̱terekereru̱, nibakora birungi b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱.
106.4: Ai̱ Mukama , onzi̱zu̱ke waakakwatirwanga mbabazi̱ bantu baamu, mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa kubajuna, wei̱zanga nonjuna,
106.5: aleke nsobore kuwonaho bakome baamu nibakutunga mi̱gi̱sa, kwokwo njaguze mu kusemererwa kweihanga lyamu, kandi nkuhe ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa hamwei̱ na bantu baamu.
106.6: Twakoori̱ kibii nka bahaaha beetu̱, twakora bintu bitakusemeera.
106.7: B̯ubaali Mi̱si̱ri̱, batakateho mutima, ha byamahanu bi̱wabakoleeri̱, rundi kwi̱zu̱ka ha b̯unene b̯wa ngonzi zaamu zinene, bei̱tu̱ baajeemera ha mutanda gwa Itaka Lyengu̱.
106.8: Ki̱kyo naab̯ukyabberi̱ho, yaabaju̱ni̱ri̱ hab̯wa mananu gei̱bara lyamwe, aleke bantu beege b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wa maani gaamwe.
106.9: Yaacoomeeri̱ Itaka Lyengu̱ lyebagaania, yaabambu̱la ndi̱ha nka bakulibatira heitehe lyomu.
106.10: Kwokwo yatyo yaabaju̱ni̱ri̱ kuruga mu bantu banyakubba babanobi̱ri̱, yaabacungura kuruga mu banyanzigwa baab̯u.
106.11: Meezi̱ gaabbu̱u̱ti̱i̱rye banyanzigwa baab̯u, hatakabbeho noomwei̱ munyakusigalaho.
106.12: Hei̱nyu̱ma mwomwo bei̱ki̱ri̱i̱ze miragu myamwe, kasi baahi̱i̱ma nibamuhaariiza.
106.13: Bei̱tu̱ beebereeri̱ b̯wangu b̯wangu bintu bi̱yabakoleeri̱, batakamu̱li̱ndi̱i̱re abahab̯ure.
106.14: B̯ubaali mwirungu beegombi̱ri̱ bidyo bi̱baadyengi̱ mu nsi gya Mi̱si̱ri̱, baamali̱ri̱i̱ri̱ nibakulenga Ruhanga.
106.15: Yaabaheeri̱ b̯uli kyensei̱ ki̱bendyengi̱, bei̱tu̱ hei̱nyu̱ma yaabahwerekereerya na b̯u̱seeri̱ b̯wa kabii.
106.16: B̯uli muntu mwihamba, yaakwati̱i̱rwe i̱hali̱ hab̯wa Mu̱sa, hamwei̱ nʼAlooni̱ mutongoole wa Mukama .
106.17: Nsi gyeku̱ngu̱u̱ri̱ gyamera Dasani, kandi gyabbu̱tu̱ki̱ra kitebe kya Abbi̱raamu̱.
106.18: Mworo gwabbu̱tu̱ki̱ri̱ mu ki̱kyo kitebe, gwahwerekereerya bantu babiibi benseenya.
106.19: Ha lusahu Holebbu̱ beekoleeri̱ ki̱si̱sani̱ kya nte, baaramya ki̱si̱sani̱ kya kyoma.
106.20: Baahi̱ngi̱si̱i̱rye ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya Ruhanga, baaki̱ha nte gidya isubi.
106.21: Beebeera Ruhanga Mu̱ju̱ni̱ waab̯u, munyakubakoora byamaani munsi gya Mi̱si̱ri̱.
106.22: Bintu byamahanu mu nsi gya Haamu, kandi bikuhuniriza hʼItaka Lyengu̱.
106.23: Yaali akobi̱ri̱ abahwerekereerye, kabbe ataali Mu̱sa mutongoole waamwe kubatonganeera, ku̱holya ki̱ni̱ga kyamwe kyakubahwerekereerya.
106.24: Mwomwo baagaya kwingira mu nsi gyakusemererwa, baalemwa kwikiriza miragu myamwe.
106.25: Beenghu̱ru̱nghu̱u̱ti̱i̱rye mu heema zaab̯u, bataketegeerye Mukama kyakubaweera.
106.26: Nahab̯waki̱kyo yaabyokeerye mikono myamwe naabarahirira nti ali̱bahwerekereerya mwirungu,
106.27: Kandi beizukulu baab̯u bakwere mu mahanga, basasaane mu nsi gyensei̱.
106.28: Bantu beekonyi̱ri̱ mu kuhaariiza Bbaali mu kicweka kya Peeyoori̱, baadi̱i̱ri̱ bidyo bi̱bahongerengi̱ baku̱u̱.
106.29: Baakwati̱si̱i̱rye Mukama ki̱ni̱ga hab̯wa bikorwa byab̯u, kasi yaabafubira na b̯u̱seeri̱ b̯wa kabii.
106.30: Fenehansi̱ yaabyoki̱ri̱ yaafubira nkori̱ za bibii, kasi b̯u̱seeri̱ b̯wahona.
106.31: Kiki kyamu̱leteeri̱ kweteb̯wanga munanu, mu b̯uli mu̱hi̱hi̱ gwensei̱.
106.32: Ha meezi̱ ga Meri̱bba bantu baasali̱i̱ze Mukama kabii kei̱zi̱ra Mu̱sa hab̯wab̯u,
106.33: hab̯wakubba baasali̱i̱ze mwozo gwamwe, yaakwatwa ki̱ni̱ga yaabaza bigambu bibiibi.
106.34: Batakazi̱kye bantu, nka Mukama kuyaali abaragi̱i̱ri̱ bakore,
106.35: bei̱tu̱ beekweti na banyamahanga, baahondera mirwa myensei̱ minyakukorwangayo.
106.37: Bahara na batabani̱ baab̯u, baabahongeeri̱ mizumu.
106.38: Baabbwomi̱ri̱ ibbanga litalohoona musangu, ibbanga lya baana baab̯u, libaahongerengi mbandwa za Kanaani̱, lyahenera nsi gyenseenya.
106.39: Beeheneeri̱ benkei̱ hab̯wa bikorwa byab̯u bibiibi, naab̯utesigwa kwa bikorwa byab̯u.
106.40: Ki̱ni̱ga kya Mukama kyakira hali bantu baamwe, baamutamira ki̱mwei̱.
106.41: Yaabaheeri̱yo hali banyamahanga, aleke bafugwe banyanzigwa baab̯u.
106.42: Banyanzigwa baab̯u baabaki̱i̱ri rutege, bei̱ra nka beiru mu mei̱so gaab̯u.
106.43: Mirundi minene yaabaju̱nengi̱, bei̱tu̱ bo baamali̱ri̱i̱ri̱ mu̱b̯u̱jeemu̱ hab̯wa bigyendeerwa byab̯u, bibii byab̯u byabeeri̱ri̱i̱rya hansi.
106.44: Bei̱tu̱ nab̯wo Ruhanga yaaweeni̱ b̯ujune b̯wab̯u, yeegwa kusaba kwab̯u.
106.45: Hab̯wab̯u yei̱zu̱ki̱ri̱ ndagaanu gyamwe, hab̯wa ngonzi zaamwe zinene yeezi̱ramwo.
106.47: Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga weetu̱ tu̱ju̱ne, kandi otucooke kuruga mu mahanga, tusobore ku̱si̱i̱ma ibara lyamu li̱syanu̱, kandi tujaguze nitukuhaariiza.
106.48: Ahaariizwe Mukama , Ruhanga wʼI̱saleeri̱ biro na biro. B̯uli muntu akobe, “Ami̱i̱na!” Haari̱i̱ze Mukama !

107.1: Mu̱si̱i̱me Mukama hab̯wakubba murungi, ngonzi zaamwe zinene biro byenseenya.
107.2: Leka ba Mukama yaacu̱ngu̱u̱ri̱, kwokwo bakobe yatyo, bayaatoori̱ kuruga mu mikono bya banyanzigwa.
107.3: Yaabasorozi̱ri̱ kuruga mu mahanga ga, b̯uhulukalyoba na b̯ugwalyoba, kuruga matemba na masi̱ri̱mu̱ka.
107.4: Bandi baahaabi̱i̱ri̱ mwihamba, batakawone muhanda gu̱ku̱badoosya mu rub̯uga lu̱bei̱caliramwo.
107.5: Baadi̱bi̱i̱rwe nzala baakwatwa nyoota, mitima myab̯u myaroha.
107.6: Mwomwo baakunga Mukama , yaabajuna kuruga mu b̯ujune b̯wab̯u,
107.7: yaabeebemberi̱ yaabarabya mu muhanda gu̱terekereru̱, ku̱doosya b̯u̱baakadoori̱ mu rub̯uga lwa kwicalamwo.
107.8: Leka basi̱i̱me Mukama hab̯wa ngonzi zaamwe zinene, na milimo myamwe mya mahanu mu bantu!
107.9: Hab̯wakubba ateekaani̱a yogwo wa mwozo gwa nyoota, kandi nei̱cu̱tya banyanzala.
107.10: Bandi bei̱ceeri̱ mu nti̱ti̱ na mu̱mu̱tu̱tu̱lu̱ gwa lu̱ku̱u̱, babboheerwe mu kumigirizib̯wa kwa mpi̱ngo.
107.11: Hab̯wakubba baalingi bajeemeeri̱ bigambu bya Ruhanga, baasuula kuhanuura kwa yogwo Waahakyendi̱ Hoi̱.
107.12: Yaab̯undeize mitima myab̯u kuraba mu milimo mya kukora na lu̱tege, baagwi̱ri̱ hansi batalina mu̱baju̱ni̱i̱ri̱.
107.13: Mwomwo baakunga Mukama , yaabajuna kuruga mu b̯ujune b̯wab̯u.
107.14: Yaabatoori̱ mu njegere zinyakubba zi̱babbohi̱ri̱ mikono na magulu, yaabatoola mu nkomo gya nti̱ti̱.
107.15: Leka basi̱i̱me Mukama hab̯wa ngonzi zaamwe zinene, na milimo myamwe mya mahanu mu bantu!
107.16: Hab̯wakubba acwacwana milyangu mya byoma, mi̱taahi̱mbwa naami̱temateemamwo kabiri.
107.17: Bandi baadomi̱ri̱ hab̯wa b̯u̱jeemu̱ b̯wab̯u, baawonawona hab̯wa bibii byab̯u.
107.18: Baanu̱gi̱ri̱ b̯uli kidyo, baadwa heehi̱ ku̱kwa.
107.19: Mwomwo baakunga Mukama , yaabajuna kuruga mu b̯ujune b̯wab̯u.
107.20: Yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ kigambu kyamwe kyabahoni̱a, yaabacungura kuruga mu kuhwerekeera.
107.21: Leka basi̱i̱me Mukama hab̯wa ngonzi zaamwe zinene, na milimo myamwe mya mahanu mu bantu!
107.22: Leka bagabe kihongwa kya ku̱si̱i̱ma, nibaweeranga bantu bintu bya Ruhanga byakora kuraba mu kyembu kya kusemererwa.
107.23: Bamwei̱ mu bo baagozi̱ri̱ maati̱ mwitaka, baakora bya b̯u̱su̱u̱b̯u̱zi̱ ha mataka gakooto.
107.24: Baaweeni bikorwa bya maani ga Mukama , na milimo myamwe mya mahanu mu ndi̱ha.
107.25: Hab̯wakubba yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ kihehu kyahunga, kyabyokya bijanga mwitaka.
107.26: Maati̱ gabyokengi̱ hakyendi̱ mu mwanya, ni̱gei̱ra hansi, nahahwo hooho bagozi̱ baamali̱ki̱i̱rwemwona maani.
107.27: Baakankeeni̱ baataratara nka batami̱i̱ru̱, magezi̱ gaabamali̱ki̱ri̱i̱ri̱ baalemwa kyakukora.
107.28: Mwomwo baakunga Mukama , yaabajuna kuruga mu b̯ujune b̯wab̯u.
107.30: Baasemereerwe itaka b̯u̱lyatekeeni̱, yaabadoosya cali bendyengi̱ kudwa.
107.31: Leka basi̱i̱me Mukama hab̯wa ngonzi zaamwe zinene, na milimo myamwe mya mahanu mu bantu!
107.32: Leka bamu̱ramye mu kitebe kya bantu. Kandi bamuhaariize mu i̱rombero lya bahandu̱.
107.33: Mukama aragira migira nimyoma, misu naamyemereerya ku̱hetya meezi̱.
107.34: Nsi gya mweru yaagi̱heeri̱ kubba muzu gwa kisura, hab̯wa b̯ubiibi b̯wa bantu munsi.
107.35: Afoora nsi gyomu kyeju̱ngo, ndala ngiira misu mikuheta.
107.36: Ku̱kwo hooho ei̱caalya banyanzala, ni̱beebi̱mbi̱ra rub̯uga lwa kwicalamwo.
107.37: Ku̱kwo hooho balima misiri nibasimba mi̱zabbi̱bbu̱, nibibaha kukesa kurungi.
107.38: Hab̯wa mi̱gi̱sa myamwe, yaakanyi̱si̱i̱rye lubyalu lwab̯u, magana ga nte zaab̯u geeyongera.
107.39: Muhendu gwab̯u gwakeehi̱ri̱, maani gaabamali̱ki̱i̱ri̱ hab̯wa kuwonawona na kumigirizib̯wa kuruga mu banyanzigwa baab̯u.
107.40: Mukama yaabonebonesyeerye bahandu̱ baab̯u, yaabaha kwandaara mu rwomere haatalingi na muhanda.
107.41: Bei̱tu̱ abyokya banaku naabatoola kuruga mukuwonawona, maka gaab̯u ni̱gahanda nka magana ga ntaama.
107.42: Barungi b̯u̱bawona ki̱kyo ni̱basemereerwa, Mi̱nwa mya babiibi bensei̱ ni̱myebbu̱mba.
107.43: Bamagezi̱ bensei̱ balinakutaho mutima ha bibi bigambu, aleke bateekereza ha ngonzi za Mukama zinene.

108.1: Ai̱ Ruhanga, mutima gwange guli gu̱si̱gi̱ku̱! Nku̱hi̱i̱ma byembu birungi bya kukuhaariiza na b̯womi b̯wange b̯wensei̱.
108.2: Ai̱ ki̱dongo na ndi̱ngi̱di̱ mu̱byoke, nku̱si̱si̱mu̱ka na mambya!
108.3: Ai̱ Mukama, nku̱ku̱si̱i̱ma mu bantu, nku̱ku̱hi̱i̱mi̱ra kukuhaariiza mu mahanga,
108.4: kubba ngonzi zaamu zinene kukiraho neiguru, b̯wesigwa b̯wamu b̯udwa mpaka mu bikaka.
108.5: Ai̱ Ruhanga, ohaariizwe hakyendi̱ weiguru! Leka ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamu kibbe mu nsi gyensei̱.
108.6: Cungura bawendya, obajune na mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo, kandi onzi̱remwo.
108.7: Ruhanga arageeni̱ nali mu kiikaru kyamwe ki̱syanu̱, naakoba yati, “Mu kusemererwa kunene ndi̱bagaani̱amwo Sekemu̱, kandi ngabire bantu bange kihanga kya Su̱koosi̱.
108.8: Gi̱ryadi̱, nsi gyange, Manaase de gyange, Efu̱rayi̱mu̱, kyoma kilinda mu̱twe gwange, Yu̱da, mubbeere gwa b̯ukama b̯wange.
108.9: Mowaabbu gyogyo kalaaya gyange haanabi̱ra, Edomu̱ hooho nzi̱ca nkei̱to zange, mu Fi̱ri̱si̱ti̱ hooho nyeb̯uga hab̯wa b̯u̱si̱ngu̱zi̱.”
108.10: Naani alintwala mu rub̯uga lunyamaani? Akanyebembera kugyenda mu Edomu̱?
108.11: Ai̱ Mukama, mali̱ otu̱nu̱gi̱ri̱ kwahi? Kotakwebembera mahe geetu̱?
108.12: Beiraba tu̱ju̱ne hali banyanzigwa beetu̱, kubba kujuna kwa bantu tikugasa!
108.13: Ruhanga nka kwali ha rubaju lwetu̱ tu̱ku̱si̱ngu̱ra. Yooyo akuziginiira banyanzigwa beetu̱.

109.2: hab̯wakubba babiibi na bagobya bagadwi̱ri̱ mi̱nwa, bakumbazaho bigambu bya b̯u̱gobya.
109.3: Banyeelogoleerye na bigambu bya nnobi̱. Baku̱ndwani̱sya ntali na ki̱mbakoori̱.
109.4: B̯u̱mbolokya ngonzi, bo bamparana b̯u̱harani̱, gya mbasabira b̯u̱sabi̱ri̱.
109.5: Bansasula bibiibi hab̯wa b̯urungi b̯umbakoora, nnobi̱ gyogyo bansasula hab̯wa ngonzi zi̱mboolokya.
109.6: Muteereho muntu mubiibi amugaane, kandi oragire munyanzigwa waamwe, amunyegeere.
109.7: Musangu gwamu̱si̱nganga b̯ubalimunyegeera. Leka kusaba kwamwe kubalwe nka kibii.
109.8: Leka biro byamwe bikeehe, mulimo gwamwe gutwalwe muntu wondi.
109.9: Aleke baana baamwe zibbe nfu̱u̱zi̱, na mu̱kali̱ waamwe akabbe mu̱kaamu̱kwere!
109.10: Baana baamwe bandaarenge ni̱basabi̱ri̱i̱rya, babingwe na mu makandi gaab̯u.
109.11: Leka bakumutonga bamunyage b̯uli kyalinakyo, banyamahanga batwale b̯uli bi̱yakakoori̱.
109.12: Hatabbaho noomwei̱ aku̱mwolekya mbabazi̱, rundi kufaho nfu̱u̱zi̱ zaamwe!
109.13: Beizukulu baamwe bensei̱ bazi̱ke, aleke ibara lyamwe li̱tali̱i̱zu̱kwa hali mu̱hi̱hi̱ gu̱kwi̱raho.
109.14: Leka Mukama ei̱zu̱ke kuhenera kwa bahaahaawe, kandi na kibii kya mmaawe kitaganyirwa.
109.15: Leka Mukama ei̱calenge naabi̱zu̱ka b̯uli kiro, mwomwo abasusure haha ku nsi.
109.16: Kubba yogwo muntu atakei̱zu̱ke kubba na mbabazi̱, bei̱tu̱ yaalwani̱si̱i̱rye banaku na bali mu b̯wetaagu, na bali na nganye mu mitima, yaabei̱ta.
109.17: Yaakyenengi̱ bandi, leka nayo bi̱mwi̱ri̱re, Ataakendeeryenge bandi mi̱gi̱sa, leka nayo bimubbeere.
109.18: Ti̱yeebeera kukyena nka mulwala ngoye, gu̱kamwi̱ngi̱re mu mubiri gwamwe nka meezi̱, nka maku̱ta mu maku̱ha gaamwe!
109.19: Leka mikyenu mi̱mweli̱ngi̱ze nka ngoye, kandi nka musupi gu̱yebbohesya b̯uli kiro!
109.20: Leka kibbe kifubiro kya banyanzigwa bange kuruga hali Mukama , hali bakumbazaho kubii
109.21: Bei̱tu̱ we Mukama Ruhanga wange, ndwaniira hab̯wa ibara lyamu, hab̯wa b̯urungi b̯wa ngonzi zaamu zinene, oncungure.
109.22: Hab̯wakubba ndi munaku kandi museege, nkwegwa mutima gwange gu̱hu̱u̱teeri̱.
109.23: Nsyereeri̱ho nka mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ gwa joojolo, banzahya b̯wahya nka nzi̱ge.
109.24: Malu̱ gange gaaceki̱ri̱ hab̯wa kusaba na kusiiba, mbaju zi̱nyeregi̱ri̱.
109.25: Nzi̱ri̱ri̱ kyakusekwa hali banyanzigwa bange, b̯ubambonaho ni̱bazi̱ngi̱i̱zya mi̱twe.
109.26: Ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga wange, onjune. Oncungure ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha ngonzi zaamu zinene.
109.27: Ai̱ Mukama leka beege nti gugu guli mukono gwamu, gwogwo gu̱ki̱koori̱.
109.28: Leka bankyene, bei̱tu̱ olimpa mu̱gi̱sa! B̯u̱bali̱ndu̱mba balisigala na muswaru, bei̱tu̱ gya muheereza waamu nsigale nsemereerwe!
109.29: Leka banyanzigwa bange bakwatwe nsoni̱, babbu̱mbwe nsoni̱ nka ngoye zi̱balweri̱.
109.30: Mu̱nwa gwange gu̱kwi̱za ku̱si̱i̱ma Mukama , na maani ganene, ndimuhaariiza mu lugologombo lwa bantu,
109.31: kubba atongoneera munaku, naamujuna hali bakumucwera gwa ku̱kwa.

110.1: Mukama yaaweereeri̱ mukama wange yati, “Icaara ha mukono gwange gwab̯udyo, ku̱doosya b̯undifoora banyanzigwa baamu katebe ka magulu gaamu.”
110.2: Mukama aligalihya b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wamu kuruga mu Sayu̱u̱ni̱. Olema hakati̱ wa banyanzigwa baamu.
110.3: Ha kiro ki̱kyo oli̱lwani̱sya banyanzigwa baamu, bantu baamu baalyehayo bankei batahambi̱ri̱zi̱i̱b̯we basigazi baamu bali̱i̱za hali we ha nsahu zi̱syanu̱, nibakwisana lu̱me lwa mwakya karei.
110.4: Mukama yaarahi̱i̱ri̱ kandi talyezi̱zu̱kya ki̱yaarahi̱i̱ri̱ yati, “Oli mu̱laami̱ biro na biro wa mu kika kya Meleki̱zedeki̱.”
110.5: Mukama akuli ha mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo, alicwacwana bakama bensei̱ ha kiro kyamwe kya ki̱ni̱ga.
110.6: Alicwera mahanga misangu nsi gyab̯u nagi̱zu̱u̱lyamwo mitumbi. Ali̱si̱ngu̱ra bakama bensei̱ ba mu nsi.
110.7: Mukama b̯walibba mu muhanda, ali̱nywa meezi̱ ha mugira, kandi abyoke asi̱ngu̱re malemu na malemu.

111.1: Haari̱i̱ze Mukama ! Nkwi̱za kuhaariiza Mukama na mutima gwange gwensei̱, ndi̱si̱i̱ma Mukama , nindi hakati̱ wa barungi, mu kitebe kya bantu baamwe.
111.2: Milimo mya Mukama mya maani! Bab̯wo bensei̱ bamisemereerwa, boobo bamyetegereza.
111.3: Milimo myamwe mi̱zwi̱ri̱ b̯u̱handu̱ na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, mananu gaamwe geicalaho biro byensei̱.
111.4: Milimo myamwe yaami̱foori̱ri̱ myakwizukwanga, Mukama wa mbabazi̱ kandi mu̱ganyi̱ri̱.
111.5: Agabira bidyo bab̯wo bamu̱ti̱i̱na, ndagaanu gyamwe agiteekaho mutima biro byenseenya.
111.6: Bantu baamwe yaabolokeerye b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wa milimo myamwe, b̯u̱yaabaheeri̱ nsi za mahanga gandi kubba b̯ugwete b̯wab̯u.
111.7: Milimo myamwe myensei̱, yaami̱koori̱ mu b̯wesigwa na mu b̯winganiza, biragiro byamwe byensei̱, byakwesigwa,
111.8: byatebeerweho hab̯wa biro byensei̱, byahebeerwe mu b̯wesigwa na mu b̯u̱terekereru̱.
111.9: Bantu baamwe yaabacu̱ngwi̱ri̱, yaakora nabo ndagaanu gya biro na biro. Ibara lyamwe li̱syanu̱ kandi li̱ku̱ti̱i̱nwa!
111.10: Ndugiiro gya magezi̱ gili mu ku̱ti̱i̱na Mukama . Bab̯wo bensei̱ bakora yatyo, batunga kwetegereza kunene. Kuhaariizwa kwamwe kwa biro byensei̱!

112.1: Haari̱i̱ze Mukama ! Ali na mu̱gi̱sa yogwo ati̱i̱na Mukama , asemereerwa hoi̱ mu biragiro byamwe.
112.2: Beizukulu baamwe baabbanga ba maani mu nsi, lubyalu lwa murungi lwaheeb̯wanga mu̱gi̱sa.
112.3: Itungu na b̯u̱gu̱u̱da byeicaalanga mu nnyu̱mba gyamwe, b̯urungi b̯wamwe tib̯umalika.
112.4: Kyererezi̱ kimulikira baterekereru̱ bali mu nti̱ti̱, na yogwo ali na mbabazi̱, kisa na mananu.
112.5: Ali na mu̱gi̱sa ahora na b̯wenda, kandi akora byab̯u̱su̱u̱b̯u̱zi̱ b̯wamwe mu b̯u̱terekereru̱.
112.6: Hab̯wakubba murungi tazi̱ngi̱zi̱ka, biro byensei̱ beicalanga ni̱bamwi̱zu̱ka.
112.7: Tati̱i̱na makuru gabiibi, mutima gwamwe gwicala gwesi̱mbu̱, yeesiga Mukama .
112.8: Tati̱i̱na kandi mutima gwamwe gwicala gu̱si̱gu̱ku̱, ku̱doosya waawona banyanzigwa baamwe basi̱ngi̱i̱rwe.
112.9: Agabira banaku na b̯wenda, b̯urungi b̯wamwe tib̯umalika b̯wa biro na biro, aheeb̯wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa hab̯wa maani gaamwe.
112.10: Mubiibi b̯wawona yatyo, akwatwa ki̱ni̱ga, anena nsaya zaamwe naasyeraho, kwegomba kwa yogwo muntu mubiibi ku̱li̱zi̱ka.

113.1: Haari̱i̱ze Mukama ! Haari̱i̱ze, ai̱ baheereza ba Mukama , muhaariize ibara lya Mukama
113.2: Ibara lya Mukama balihaariize, hataati̱, na biro byensei̱!
113.3: Ibara lya Mukama lihaariizib̯we kalyoba nikakuhuluka ku̱doosya nikaku̱gwa!
113.4: Mukama alema mahanga gensei̱, na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamwe kili hakyendi̱ hoi̱ weiguru!
113.5: Tihaloho akwisana Mukama Ruhanga weetu̱, ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ hakyendi̱ hoi̱,
113.6: alingiira hadei naawona iguru na nsi.
113.7: Abyokya munaku namutoola mwicuucu, museege namutoola mwi̱syanu̱,
113.8: nabeicaarya hamwei̱ na bayolo, na bayolo ba bantu baamwe.
113.9: Mu̱kali̱ ngumba amuha ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa mu maka gaamwe, naamufoora Mma baana wa masanyu. Haari̱i̱ze Mukama !

114.1: Bei̱saleeri̱ b̯u̱baaru̱gi̱ri̱ Mi̱si̱ri̱, nnyu̱mba gya Yakobbo gyaruga mu bantu ba lukobo lundi,
114.2: Yu̱da yaabba nnyu̱mba gya Mukama gi̱syanu̱, I̱saleeri̱ yaafooka b̯ukama b̯wamwe.
114.3: Itaka b̯u̱lyaweeni̱ lyei̱ru̱ka, Mugira Yorodaani gwei̱ra i̱nyu̱ma.
114.4: Nsahu zaagu̱su̱ki̱ri̱ nka mpaya, b̯usahu nka b̯wana b̯wa ntaama.
114.5: Kyani kyakwirukiirye, we itaka? Ai̱ Mugira Yorodaani, hab̯waki wei̱ri̱ri̱ i̱nyu̱ma?
114.6: Ai̱ nsahu nywe, kyani kyabagu̱su̱kagu̱su̱kyengi̱ nka mpaya? Ai̱ b̯usahu ni̱mu̱gu̱su̱ka nka b̯wana b̯wa ntaama?
114.7: We nsi, jegemeera mu mei̱so ga Mukama, mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga wa Yakobbo,
114.8: munyakufoora lubbaali i̱zu̱ba, mahi̱ga gaahinduka misu mya meezi̱.

115.1: Ai̱ Mukama twetwe kwahi, twetwe kwahi, bei̱tu̱ ibara lyamu lyolyo litunge ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, hab̯wa ngonzi zinene na b̯wesigwa b̯wamu!
115.2: Hab̯waki mahanga gakoba nti, “Ruhanga waab̯u ali hanya?”
115.3: Ruhanga weetu̱ ali mwiguru, akora byensei̱ nka kuyenderye.
115.4: Bi̱si̱sani̱ byab̯u bi̱baramya bib̯umbe kuruga mu feeza na zaabbu, bikorwa b̯ukorwa mikono mya bantu.
115.5: Bili na mi̱nwa, bei̱tu̱ tibibaza, bili na mei̱so, bei̱tu̱ tibiwona.
115.6: Bili na mapokopo, bei̱tu̱ ti̱byegwa, bili na nni̱ndo, bei̱tu̱ tibikaga.
115.7: Bili na ngalu, bei̱tu̱ tibikwata kintu, magulu gaabyo tigalibata, mu mimiro myabyo tihaloho iraka lihulukamwo.
115.8: Bab̯wo babikora nabo kwokwo beisana, na bab̯wo bensei̱ babyesiga kwokwo bali.
115.9: Ai̱ I̱saleeri̱, mwesiga Mukama ! Yooyo mu̱ju̱ni̱ kandi ngab̯u gyenyu̱.
115.10: Ai̱ we nnyu̱mba gya Alooni̱ mwesige Mukama ! Yooyo mu̱ju̱ni̱ kandi ngab̯u gyenyu̱.
115.11: Nywe batamwo Mukama ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, mumwesige Mukama ! Yooyo mu̱ju̱ni̱ kandi ngab̯u gyenyu̱.
115.12: Mukama aku̱twi̱zu̱ka kandi alituha mu̱gi̱sa, aliha nnyu̱mba gyʼI̱saleeri̱ mu̱gi̱sa, aliha nnyu̱mba gya Alooni̱ mu̱gi̱sa,
115.13: bab̯wo batamwo Mukama ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, Mukama alibaha mu̱gi̱sa, atasoroori̱mwo bato na bahandu̱.
115.14: Mukama akuhe baana, na beizukulu baamu abahe baana!
115.15: Mukama munyakuhanga iguru na nsi, abahe mu̱gi̱sa!
115.16: Iguru lya Mukama yankei bei̱tu̱ nsi yaagi̱heeri̱ bantu.
115.17: Baku̱u̱ tibahaariiza Mukama , nab̯ubakubba bab̯wo bagyenda mu nsi gya baku̱u̱.
115.18: Bei̱tu̱ tu̱kwi̱za kuhaariiza Mukama , hataati̱ na biro byensei̱. Haari̱i̱ze Mukama !

116.1: Nyendya Mukama , hab̯wakubba yeegwi̱ri̱ iraka lyange na kwesengereerya kwange.
116.2: Hab̯wakubba yantegeeri̱ ipokopo, b̯undibba nicaali mwomi nkwi̱za kumusabanga.
116.3: Nyaaboheerwe miguha mya lu̱ku̱u̱, kandi b̯u̱ru̱mi̱ b̯wa kuzumu b̯wakwata, nyawonawona na b̯ujune na kusaalirwa.
116.4: Mwomwo nyaaku̱ngi̱ri̱ ibara lya Mukama ninkoba yati, “Ai̱ Mukama , nku̱kwesengereerya, ncungura!”
116.5: Mukama wa mbabazi̱ kandi wa munanu, Ruhanga weetu̱ wa kisa.
116.6: Mukama alinda bab̯u̱ndaaru̱, kabii b̯u̱kanzi̱zi̱i̱ri̱, yanju̱ni̱ri̱.
116.7: Ai̱ mwozo gwange, huumula, hab̯wa birungi bya Mukama aku̱koleeri̱.
116.8: Ai̱ Mukama, weewe ohoneerye b̯womi b̯wange lu̱ku̱u̱, mei̱so gange kulira mali̱ga, magulu gange kukiibbala,
116.9: aleke ndibatirenge mu mei̱so ga Mukama , mu nsi gya boomi.
116.10: Nyei̱ki̱ri̱ri̱i̱ze muliwe, ninkoba yati, “Ndi mu b̯ujune b̯unene hoi̱,”
116.11: kambe nyaabazi̱ri̱ mu b̯utagyendeera ninkoba yati, “Tihaloho mwesigwa.”
116.12: Hab̯wa birungi byankoleeri̱, kikyani gya kindiha Mukama ?
116.13: Ndikuha vi̱i̱no nka kihongwa hab̯wa kujunwa kwange, kandi ndyeta ibara lya Mukama .
116.14: Ndi̱doosereerya bi̱byo bi̱nyamu̱ragani̱si̱i̱rye, mu mei̱so ga bantu baamwe bensei̱.
116.15: Kya muhendu mu mei̱so ga Mukama , bantu barungi b̯u̱bakwa.
116.16: Ai̱ Mukama, ndi muheereza waamu, nka mmaama kuyaali muheereza waamu. Osu̱u̱mu̱rwi̱ri̱ kuruga mu njegere
116.17: Ndikuhongera kyonzira kya ku̱ku̱si̱i̱ma, kandi ndyeta ibara lya Mukama .
116.18: Ndi̱doosereerya miragu myange hali Mukama, mu mei̱so ga bantu baamwe bensei̱,
116.19: mu zi̱gati̱ gya nnyu̱mba gya Mukama , hakati̱ na hakati̱, gyamu, ai̱ Yeru̱salemu̱. Haari̱i̱ze Mukama !

117.1: Mu̱haari̱i̱ze Mukama , nywe mahanga gensei̱! Mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze nywe bantu nywensei̱!
117.2: Kubba ngonzi zaamwe hali twe zinene, na mananu gaamwe ga biro na biro. Mu̱haari̱i̱ze Mukama!

118.1: Mu̱si̱i̱me Mukama , kubba abba murungi, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro!
118.2: Leka Bei̱saleeri̱ bakunge nibakoba, “Ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro”
118.3: Leka ba nnyu̱mba gyʼAlooni̱ bakunge nibakoba, “Ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro”
118.4: Leka bab̯wo bati̱i̱na Mukama bakunge nibakoba, “Ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro.”
118.5: B̯unyaali nindi mu b̯ujune, nyaaku̱ngi̱ri̱ Mukama , yanzi̱ramwo, yampa b̯u̱si̱nge.
118.6: Mukama abba wange, ti̱ndi̱ti̱i̱na, muntu b̯untu alinkora kyani?
118.7: Mukama ali harubaju lwange nka mu̱ju̱ni̱ wange, nkwi̱za ku̱si̱ngu̱ra banyanzigwa bange bensei̱.
118.8: Kirungi kwi̱ru̱ki̱ra hali Mukama , kukira kwesiga muntu.
118.9: Kirungi kwi̱ru̱ki̱ra hali Mukama , kukira kwesiga balemi̱.
118.10: Mahanga gensei̱ b̯u̱gangoti̱ri̱, mwibara lya Mukama nyagacwacweni̱!
118.11: Gangotangoti̱ri̱ mbaju zensei̱, mwibara lya Mukama nyagacwacweni̱!
118.12: Gangoti̱ri̱ nka b̯uhooki, gaasyeraho b̯wangu nka mworo gweisubi lya kyanda, mwibara lya Mukama nyagacwacweni̱!
118.13: Gansi̱ndi̱ki̱ri̱, heehi̱ kunguma b̯u̱gu̱mi̱, bei̱tu̱ Mukama yanju̱ni̱ri̱.
118.14: Mukama yooyo maani gange, kandi kyembu kyange, kandi yooyo kujunwa kwange.
118.15: Mu heema za barungi habbamwo byembu bya kusemererwa na bya ku̱si̱ngu̱ra bikukoba yati, “Mukono gwa Mukama gwab̯udyo gu̱koori̱ byamaani,
118.16: mukono gwa Mukama gwab̯udyo guhaariizwe, mukono gwa Mukama gwab̯udyo gu̱koori̱ byamaani!”
118.17: Ti̱ndi̱kwa, bei̱tu̱ ndyomeera, aleke ndangiire bya Mukama akoori̱.
118.18: Mukama anfu̱bi̱i̱ri̱ namaani, bei̱tu̱ tandeki̱ri̱ nkwe.
118.19: Munkingulire malembu ga barungi, nzingire nsi̱i̱me Mukama .
118.20: Lili irembu lya Mukama , barungi boobo balirabamwo.
118.21: Nku̱ku̱si̱i̱ma hab̯wakubba weegwi̱ri̱ kusaba kwange, wanjuna.
118.22: I̱hi̱ga lya babi̱mbi̱ li̱baaswi̱ri̱, lyolyo li̱fooki̱ri̱ lya mugasu lya ha nsonda.
118.23: Kiki kyokyo kya Mukama ki̱yaakoori̱, kandi kili kintu kyamahanu mu mei̱so geetu̱.
118.24: Kiro kiki kyokyo Mukama ateeri̱ho, leka tusemererwe kandi tujaguze.
118.25: Ai̱ Mukama , tukukusaba tu̱ju̱ne! Ai̱ Mukama , tukukusaba, tu̱he ku̱si̱ngu̱ra!
118.26: Ali na mu̱gi̱sa yogwo akwi̱za mwibara lya Mukama, tu̱basabi̱i̱ri̱ mu̱gi̱sa kuruga mu nnyu̱mba gya Mukama ,
118.27: Mukama ali Ruhanga, kandi atu̱heeri̱ kyererezi̱ kyamwe ki̱tu̱mu̱lu̱ki̱i̱ri̱. Mu̱kwate bihongwa mukumbe mugyende heihembe lya kyoto!
118.28: Oli Ruhanga wange, nkwi̱za ku̱ku̱si̱i̱manga, oli Ruhanga wange, ndikuhariiza.
118.29: Mu̱si̱i̱me Mukama , kubba abba murungi, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro!

119.1: Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bab̯wo balibatira mu biragiro bya Mukama , batakora bibiibi.
119.2: Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bab̯wo bakwata bigambu byamwe, bamu̱toolya na mitima myab̯u myensei̱.
119.3: Bab̯wo batakora kibii, bei̱tu̱ nibalibatira mu mihanda myamwe.
119.4: Weewe waatu̱ragi̱i̱ri̱ kukwatira ki̱mwei̱ ndagiiro zaamu.
119.5: Nkusaba mihanda myange misobore kuhondera mateeka gaamu biro na biro.
119.6: B̯u̱b̯wo mwomwo ntaliswara, biteekerezu byange byabbanga ha biragiro byamu.
119.7: B̯undyega micwere myamu mirungi, nkwi̱za kukuhaariizanga na mutima gu̱syanu̱.
119.8: Nkwi̱za kulinda mateeka gaamu, Ai̱ Mukama , otandekeera ki̱mwei̱. Beesi̱
119.9: Haloho mu̱li̱ngo gwa musigazi akusobora kwicala nali mu b̯u̱doori̱? Akusobora nka kigambu kyamu kukikoba.
119.10: Na mutima gwange gwensei̱ nkwi̱za ku̱ku̱toolyanga, otalindeka kwandaara nkaruga ha biragiro byamu.
119.11: Nyateeri̱ kigambu kyamu mu mutima aleke ntalikora kibii mu mei̱so gaamu.
119.12: Ai̱ Mukama , ohaariizib̯we, onzegesyenge mateeka gaamu!
119.13: Ndangiira micwere myamu myensei̱ mya mu mu̱nwa gwamu.
119.14: B̯u̱kei̱so b̯wamu b̯umpa kusemererwa kukira b̯u̱gu̱u̱da b̯wensei̱.
119.15: Biteekerezu byange bi̱kwi̱za kwicalanga mu ndagiiro zaamu, na mei̱so gange ku mihanda myamu.
119.16: Mateeka gaamu gampa kusemererwa, tindigumisirana kigambu kyamu. Gi̱mero
119.17: Nkolera birungi gya muheereza waamu, kwokwo nsobore kwomeera na kuhondera kigambu kyamu.
119.18: Mmbuula mei̱so, aleke mbone byamahanu bya mu biragiro byamu.
119.19: Ndi mu̱goonyi̱ haha ku nsi, otambi̱sanga biragiro byamu!
119.20: Mwozo gwange gwegomba micwere myamu b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱.
119.21: Ocoomera banyamyehembu, bakyeneerwe, batahondera biragiro byamu.
119.22: Ntoolaho bi̱lu̱mo na mugayo gwab̯u, kubba bigambu byamu biicala mu mutima gwange.
119.23: Balemi̱ nab̯ubakora nkwe za ku̱ndwani̱sya, gya muheereza waamu nkwi̱za kuteekerezanga ha mateeka gaamu.
119.24: Bigambu byamu bindeetera isanyu, kandi bimpa magezi̱. Daleesi̱
119.25: Mutima gwange gwicala mu cuucu, mmpa b̯womi ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ku kigambu kyamu!
119.26: B̯u̱nyakwolokeerye mihanda myange, wanzi̱ri̱ri̱mwo, nzegesya mateeka gaamu!
119.27: Ompenge kwetegereza ndagiiro zaamu, aleke nteekerezenge ha milimo myamu mya mahanu.
119.28: Ndi na kusalirwa kunene mu mutima gwange hab̯wa b̯ujune b̯undi nab̯wo, ntati̱i̱rya ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha kigambu kyamu.
119.29: Ontoolemwo ngesu za b̯u̱gobya, mu mbabazi̱ zaamu onzegesye biragiro byamu!
119.30: Ncwi̱ri̱mwo kubba mwesigwa, mei̱so gange ngateeri̱ hali micwere myamu.
119.31: Ai̱ Mukama , nyeesiga bigambu byamu, otandeka kuswara.
119.32: Nyetegeki̱ri̱ kukora ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha biragiro byamu, wakagali̱hya kwetegereza kwange. Hehi̱
119.33: Ai̱ Mukama , nzegesya mateeka gaamu, aleke nsobore kugahondera biro byensei̱.
119.34: Mmpa kwetegereza aleke nkwatenge biragiro byamu, mbihonderenge na mutima gwange gwensei̱.
119.35: Onyebembere mu muhanda gwa biragiro byamu, kubba bimpa kusemererwa.
119.36: Terekereerya mutima gwange mu kuhondera bigambu byamu, hatali byange nyankei.
119.37: Toola mei̱so gange kulingiira bintu bitali na mugasu, ompe kwomeera mu kigambu kyamu.
119.38: Odosereerye muragu gwamu hali muheereza waamu, aleke bakutemwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
119.39: Ntoolahoona bi̱byo bi̱lu̱mo bi̱nsaagi̱ri̱, hab̯wakubba micwere myamu mirungi.
119.40: Wona, nkakunyendya ndagiiro zaamu, ompenge maani mu mananu gaamu. Waawu̱
119.41: Ai̱ Mukama , leka ngonzi zaamu zinene na kujunwa kwamu, bi̱i̱zenge caali ndi nka muragu gwamu kumili,
119.42: mwomwo ndisobora kwi̱ramwo bab̯wo bandu̱ma, kubba nyesiga kigambu kyamu.
119.43: Onterekereerye kubazanga mananu b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱, hab̯wakubba ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwange kuli mu micwere myamu.
119.44: Nkwi̱za kukwata biragiro byamu ntakulekeera, biro byensei̱.
119.45: Kandi nkwi̱za kulibatiranga hagali, hab̯wakubba mpondera ndagiiro zaamu.
119.46: Nkwi̱za kurangiranga bigambu byamu mu mei̱so ga bakama, ntaku̱ti̱i̱na kuswara,
119.47: kubba kusemererwa kwange kuruga mu biragiro byamu, bi̱nyendya.
119.48: Nditamwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa biragiro byamu bi̱nyendya, kandi nteekerezenge ha mateeka gaamu. Zayi̱ni̱
119.49: I̱zu̱ka kigambu ki̱waadagani̱si̱rye, gya muheereza waamu, kimpa ku̱ni̱hi̱ra.
119.50: B̯umba mu kuwonawona, muragu gwamu gwogwo gu̱mpu̱u̱mu̱u̱lya.
119.51: Babiibi batati̱i̱na Ruhanga beicala nibasekereerya, bei̱tu̱ gya tinkaruganga ha biragiro byamu.
119.52: Ai̱ Mukama , b̯unteekereza ha micwere myamu mya kadei na kadei, bimpa maani.
119.53: B̯umbona babiibi batakuhondera biragiro byamu, nyeegwa ni̱nku̱hya b̯u̱hi̱ na ki̱ni̱ga.
119.54: Mateeka gaamu googo byembu byange mu ngoonyi̱ gyange.
119.55: Ai̱ Mukama , kantekereza heibara lyamu b̯wi̱re b̯wei̱jolo, ninkwata biragiro byamu.
119.56: Mu kukwata ndagiiro zaamu, hooho ntungira kusemererwa. Heesi̱
119.57: Mukama yooyo mugab̯u gwange, nyeheeri̱yo kukwatanga bigambu byamu.
119.58: Nkukwesegereerya na mutima gwange gwensei̱, ongiira mbabazi̱, ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha muragu gwamu.
119.59: B̯u̱ntekereza ha mihanda myange, nzi̱ra nimpondera bigambu byamu.
119.60: Ntakwesi̱tasi̱ta, aleke nkwate biragiro byamu b̯wangu b̯wangu.
119.61: Babiibi nab̯ubatega miguha, tindyebeera biragiro byamu.
119.62: Mbyoka i̱jolo itumbi kukuhaariiza, hab̯wa micwere myamu mirungi.
119.63: Nnywana bab̯wo baku̱ti̱i̱na, bab̯wo bakwata ndagiiro zaamu.
119.64: Ai̱ Mukama , nsi gyensei̱ gi̱i̱zwi̱ri̱ ngonzi zaamu zinene, nzegesya mateeka gaamu! Teesi̱
119.65: Ai̱ Mukama , onkori̱ kurungi gya muheereza waamu, ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra mu kigambu kyamu.
119.66: Nzegesya ncwamwo, magezi̱ na kwetegereza kurungi, hab̯wakubba nzikiririza mu biragiro byamu.
119.67: B̯uwaali otakanfu̱u̱bi̱ri̱ nyaahabengi̱, bei̱tu̱ hataati̱, mmpondera kigambu kyamu.
119.68: Oli murungi kandi okora birungi, nzegesya mateeka gaamu!
119.69: Bamyehembu banteeri̱ho bigambu bya b̯u̱gobya, bei̱tu̱ gya nkwata ndagiiro zaamu na mutima gwange gwensei̱.
119.70: Mitima myab̯u timilimwo kakwetegereza, bei̱tu̱ nsanyu̱ki̱ra mu biragiro byamu.
119.71: B̯u̱wanfu̱u̱bi̱ri̱ kyabbeeri̱ kirungi, hab̯wakubba kyampeeri̱ kwega mateeka gaamu.
119.72: Biragiro byamu bya muhendu, kukira nku̱mi̱ na nku̱mi̱ za zaabbu na feeza. Yoodi̱
