119.73: Mikono myamu myambumba b̯u̱mbi̱ri̱ kandi myampangi̱ri̱, mpa kwetegereza nsobore kwega biragiro byamu.
119.74: Bab̯wo bakutamwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, b̯ubalimbona balijaguza, hab̯wakubba ndi naku̱ni̱hi̱ra mu kigambu kyamu.
119.75: Ai̱ Mukama , nkyegi̱ri̱ nti micwere myamu mibba myamananu, kandi nti onfu̱bi̱i̱ri̱ mu b̯u̱doori̱.
119.76: Leka ngonzi zaamu zinene zimbudab̯ude, ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha muragu gwamu hali muheereza waamu.
119.77: Ongiire mbabazi̱ aleke kimpe kwomeera, kubba biragiro byamu byobyo binsemeza.
119.78: Leka banyamyehembo baswarenge, hab̯wa kumpangiira ntali na ki̱nkoori̱, bei̱tu̱ gya nkwi̱za kwicala nintekerezanga ha ndagiiro zaamu.
119.79: Leka bab̯wo bakutamwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa bei̱ze hali gya, aleke basobore kwega bigambu byamu!
119.80: Leka mutima gwange gubbe gwa mananu hali mateeka gaamu, aleke ntaswara! Kaafu̱
119.81: Mutima gwange gwegomba kujunwa kwamu, ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwange kuli mu kigambu kyamu.
119.82: Mei̱so gange gajwahi̱ri̱ naakulindiira muragu gwamu, nku̱b̯u̱u̱lya “Olinjuna di̱i̱?”
119.83: Nfoki̱ri̱ nka kisahu kya maaci ki̱badengeteerye mu mwi̱ca, bei̱tu̱ tindyebeera mateeka gaamu.
119.84: Gya muheereza waamu, ndigumisiriza kudwa di̱i̱? Olibacwera di̱i̱ bakumparana?
119.85: Bantu ba myehembo bandi̱mi̱i̱ri̱ bi̱i̱na ngwemwo, tibomeera ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha kiragiro kyamu.
119.86: Biragiro byamu byensei̱ bibba byabiribiri, bakumparanira b̯usa, njuna!
119.87: Kadooli̱ bantoole mu nsi, bei̱tu̱ ntakaruge hali ndagiiro zaamu.
119.88: Mu ngonzi zaamu zinene njuna, b̯u̱b̯wo mwomwo ndilinda bigambu byamu. Lamedi̱
119.89: Ai̱ Mukama , biro byensei̱ kigambu kyamu, kiicala kinyamaani mwiguru.
119.90: B̯wesigwa b̯wamu tib̯ulihinduka biro na biro, nka ku̱waakahangi̱ri̱ nsi kwokwo giicala.
119.91: Bintu byensei̱ ku̱doosya na kiro kiki, bili nka ku̱waakacwi̱ri̱mwo, hab̯wakubba byensei̱ biheereza weewe.
119.92: Kakubba ntahonderengi̱ biragiro byamu, nnaku zaku̱nzi̱ti̱ri̱.
119.93: Tindyebeere ndagiiro zaamu biro byensei̱, hab̯wakubba bindeetera b̯womi.
119.94: Ndi waamu, njuna, hab̯wakubba mpondera ndagiiro zaamu,
119.95: Babiibi nab̯ubandaliira kunswaswana, bei̱tu̱ gya mutima gwange gwicala ha bigambu byamu.
119.96: Birungi byensei̱ bili na habisambiira, bei̱tu̱ kiragiro kyamu kiicala hensei̱. Meemu̱
119.97: Kanyegomba biragiro byamu, ka byobyo nteekerezaho kiro kyensei̱
119.98: Kiragiro kyamu kimpa magezi̱ gakukira ga banyanzigwa bange, kubba b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱ gabba nagya.
119.99: Beegesa bange bensei̱ mbansi̱nga kwetegereza, kubba bigambu byamu byobyo nteekerezaho.
119.100: Kwetegereza kundi na kwo kukira kwa bagu̱lu̱u̱su̱, hab̯wakubba nkwata ndagiiro zaamu.
119.101: Nyeehala kukwata muhanda gubiibi, aleke mpondere kigambu kyamu.
119.102: Timpugukahuguka kuruga ha micwere myamu, kubba weewe obi̱nzegesya.
119.103: Bigambu byamu ka binola, mali̱ kwo bi̱nwereerya mu kanwa kange kukira na b̯uhooki!
119.104: Kwetegereza kwange kuruga mu ndagiiro zaamu, kyokyo nnobera muhanda gwensei̱ gwa b̯u̱gobya. Nuuni
119.105: Kigambu kyamu gili taara hali magulu gange, kandi kyererezi̱ hali muhanda gwange.
119.106: Ndahi̱i̱ri̱ kandi nindagana, kukwata micwere myamu mya mananu.
119.107: Ai̱ Mukama , kambwenaweeni̱, mpa b̯womi ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha kigambu kyamu.
119.108: Ai̱ Mukama , ikiriza nkuhe bihongwa byange bya kukuhaariiza, kandi nzegesya micwere myamu.
119.109: Biro byensei̱ nab̯unyakabba ni̱nku̱hi̱gwa, ntindyebeera biragiro byamu.
119.110: Nkori̱ za bibii zintegi̱ri̱ mutegu bei̱tu̱ ndagiiro zaamu tizikandugangaho.
119.111: Bigambu byamu byobyo mugab̯u gwange biro byensei̱, byobyo ku̱si̱i̱ma kwa mutima gwange.
119.112: Biro byensei̱ ku̱doosya ha mmaliiro, mutima gwange gwakwatanga mateeka gaamu. Sameki̱
119.113: Nnoba bantu bateesigwa, bei̱tu̱ nyeegomba kiragiro kyamu.
119.114: Weewe b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wange, kandi ngab̯u gyange ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwange kwicala mu kigambu kyamu
119.115: Nywe nkori̱ za bibii, mundeke, mundeke nkwate biragiro bya Ruhanga wange.
119.116: Nnsagikanga, ai̱ Mukama , nka muragu gwamu kugukoba, mwomwo ndyomeera, kandi ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwange kutalimpemura.
119.117: Nnsagikanga, aleke ncungurwe, kandi nkwatenge mateeka gaamu biro byensei̱.
119.118: Ocoomera bensei̱ bahaba kuruga ha mateeka gaamu, kubba magezi̱ gaab̯u gabagobya b̯u̱gobya.
119.119: Babiibi bensei̱ ba mu nsi, obawona nka bisasiro, kyokyo nyegombira bigambu byamu.
119.120: Hab̯wa ku̱ku̱ti̱i̱na mubiri gwange gwegwa nigukukankana, hab̯wa micwere myamu. Ayi̱ni̱
119.121: Nkoori̱ kya b̯winganiza kandi kya mananu, otandeka mu mikono mya banyanzigwa.
119.122: Weeraga hab̯wa b̯urungi b̯wa muheereza waamu otekirizanga banyamyehembo kunjooga.
119.123: Kanjwahi̱ri̱ kukanula mei̱so kulindiira kujunwa kwamu na kulindiira bi̱weeragi̱ri̱ bya b̯wesige b̯wamu.
119.124: Gya muheereza waamu, nkolera ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha ngonzi zaamu zinene, onzegesye mateeka gaamu.
119.125: Gya muheereza waamu, mpa kwetegereza, mwa kwega bigambu byamu.
119.126: Ai̱ Mukama kaka kooko kei̱re kakukora, hab̯wakubba babi̱nyi̱ri̱ ndagiiro gyamu.
119.127: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, nyeegomba biragiro byamu kukirahoona zaabbu gi̱sengeeje.
119.128: Bei̱tu̱ ntwala ndagiiro zaamu zensei̱ kubba zi̱doori̱, kandi nnoba mihanda myensei̱ mya b̯u̱gobya. Pe
119.129: Bigambu byamu byamahanu, kyokyo mutima gwange gubihondera.
119.130: Asoma bigambu byamu atunga kyererezi̱, kileetera ntwarwa kwetegereza.
119.131: Mu kwegomba biragiro byamu, mu̱nwa gwange gu̱dokere b̯u̱dokeri̱ kubibaza.
119.132: Nnzi̱rahoona, ongiire mbabazi̱, nka kwokoranga bab̯wo beegomba ibara lyamu.
119.133: Onterekereeryenge magulu ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha muragu gwamu, aleke ntalifugwa kibii.
119.134: Ncungura hali bab̯wo baku̱mbonawonesya, aleke mpondere ndagiiro zaamu.
119.135: Omulikire gya muheereza waamu, onzegesye mateeka gaamu.
119.136: Ndira b̯u̱li̱ri̱ mali̱ga hab̯wa bantu batahondera biragiro byamu. Ti̱zaade
119.137: Ai̱ Mukama , kooli murungi, na micwere myamu mibba mi̱terekereru̱.
119.138: Bigambu bi̱waaragi̱i̱ri̱ bibba byamananu, bibba byakwesigira ki̱mwei̱.
119.139: Ndi na ki̱ni̱ga kinene, hab̯wa banyanzigwa bange kwebeera bigambu byamu.
119.140: Muragu gwamu gwa mananu mali̱, kyokyo gya muheereza waamu ngwegomba.
119.141: Kambe ntali wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kandi akugaywa, bei̱tu̱ nab̯wo tindyeb̯wa ndagiiro zaamu.
119.142: B̯urungi b̯wamu b̯wa biro byensei̱, kandi biragiro byamu bya mananu.
119.143: Kambe na b̯ujune na kutuntura, bei̱tu̱ biragiro byamu bindeetera kusemererwa.
119.144: Bigambu byamu biicala bya mananu biro byensei̱, mpa kwetegereza mwa kwomeera. Koofu̱
119.145: Ai̱ Mukama , nkukweta na mutima gwange gwensei̱ nzi̱ramwo! Nkwi̱za kukwata mateeka gaamu.
119.146: Nkukuliriira, njuna, aleke nkwate bigambu byamu.
119.147: Mbyoka mambya atakasari ninkweta onjune, ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwange kuli mu bigambu byamu.
119.148: I̱jolo lyensei̱ ndaala ntebbaki̱ri̱, nintekereze ha muragu gwamu.
119.149: Ai̱ Mukama , hab̯wa ngonzi zaamu zinene weegwa iraka lyange, ompe b̯womi ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha b̯winganiza b̯wamu.
119.150: B̯ab̯wo banyankwe kabanyesegereerye heehi̱ na bigyendeerwa bibiibi, biragiro byamu tibabihondera.
119.151: Ai̱ Mukama , kaweewe omba heehi̱, biragiro byamu byensei̱ byamananu.
119.152: Kuruga kadei na kadei ninyeega bigambu byamu, nka kubiicala bya biro na biro. Reesi̱
119.153: Wona kuwonawona kwange oncungure, kubba tindyebeera biragiro byamu.
119.154: Ntonganiira oncungure, mpa b̯womi ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha muragu gwamu.
119.155: Babiibi tibalijunwa, hab̯wakubba tibahondera mateeka gaamu.
119.156: Ai̱ Mukama , mbabazi̱ zaamu ka za maani, mpa b̯womi ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha micwere myamu.
119.157: Banyanzigwa bakumparana banene, bei̱tu̱ tindiruga hali bigambu byamu.
119.158: B̯umbona bantu batakwikiririzamwo ntammwa b̯utamwa, hab̯wakubba tibahondera kigambu kyamu.
119.159: Ai̱ Mukama , wona nka kunyegomba ndagiiro zaamu, mpa b̯womi hab̯wa ngonzi zaamu zinene.
119.160: Bigambu byamu byensei̱ gabba mananu, na micwere myamu mirungi mya biro na biro. Si̱i̱ni̱
119.161: Balemi̱ bamparanira b̯usa, bei̱tu̱ mutima gwange gu̱ti̱i̱na bigambu byamu.
119.162: Kansanyukira kigambu kyamu, nka muntu agu̱mbwi̱ri̱ kyeitungu kinyamaani.
119.163: Kantamwa b̯u̱gobya, bei̱tu̱ kandi nyeegomba biragiro byamu.
119.164: Nkuhaariiza mirundi musanju b̯uli kiro, hab̯wa micwere myamu mya mananu.
119.165: Bab̯wo beegomba kiragiro kyamu babba na b̯u̱si̱nge b̯unene hoi̱, tihaloho kikusobora kubaleetera kukiibbala.
119.166: Ai̱ Mukama , ndi na ku̱ni̱hi̱ra mu kujunwa kwamu, Nnkora biragiro byamu.
119.167: Mutima gwange guhondera bigambu byamu, kubba mbyegombera ki̱mwei̱.
119.168: Mmpondera ndagiiro zaamu na bigambu byamu, hab̯wakubba mihanda myange myensei̱ omyegi̱ri̱. Taawu̱
119.169: Ai̱ Mukama, leka kusaba kwange kukudwereere, ompe kwetegereza ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ku kigambu kyamu.
119.170: Leka kwesengereerya kwange kukudwereere, ncungura ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha muragu gwamu.
119.171: Kanwa kange kaakuhaarizanga, hab̯wakubba onzegesya mateeka gaamu.
119.172: Kalimi kange kahi̱i̱manga kigambu kyamu, kubba biragiro byamu byensei̱ bya mananu.
119.173: Leka mukono gwamu gwetegeke kunjuna, hab̯wakubba nsi̱i̱ma ndagiiro zaamu.
119.174: Ai̱ Mukama nyeegomba kujunwa kwamu, kandi biragiro byamu byobyo bimpa masanyu.
119.175: Leka mutima gwange gwomeerenge, kandi gukuhaariizenge, leka micwere myamu minjunenge.
119.176: Mpabi̱ri̱ nka ntaama gi̱syereeri̱, ntoolya gya muheereza waamu, kubba tinyeebeera biragiro byamu.

120.1: Mu b̯ujune b̯wange nyaaku̱ngi̱ri̱ Mukama , yanzi̱ramwo.
120.2: Ai̱ Mukama , ncungura hali babaza b̯u̱gobya, kandi bakacwa makuru.
120.3: We ngobya we, olikolwa kyani? Mucwa makuru we, olidweb̯waho kyani?
120.4: Olifubirwa mbasi gya mu̱lwani̱, olihembwaho makala ga mworo.
120.5: Kamboneweeni̱ gya b̯u̱nyagonyeeri̱ mu Meseki̱, nyei̱cala mu heema gya Kedara!
120.6: Kasu̱mi̱ kanene kamaari ninkwicala na batendya b̯u̱si̱nge.
120.7: Nyendya b̯u̱si̱nge, bei̱tu̱ b̯ubaza nibatara b̯ulemu.

121.1: Mei̱so gange gali̱ngi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ ha lusahu. Kujunwa kwange kuruga hanya?
121.2: Kujunwa kwange kuruga hali Mukama , munyakuhanga iguru na nsi.
121.4: Mu mananu, yogwo alinda I̱saleeri̱ tahongera kandi tiyeebbaka.
121.5: Mukama yooyo akulinda, Mukama yooyo mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ ha mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo.
121.6: Lyoba tilili kuhutaaza mwinsi kadi gubbe mweri̱ i̱jolo.
121.7: Mukama yaakulindanga hali bibiibi byensei̱ yaalinda b̯womi b̯wamu.
121.8: Mukama yaalindanga magyendere gaamu na mei̱ri̱re gaamu, kuruga hataati̱ na biro byensei̱.

122.1: Nyaasemereerwe b̯u̱bambwereeri̱ yati, “Tugyende mu nnyu̱mba gya Mukama !”
122.2: Ai̱ Yeru̱salemu̱, magulu geetu̱ gemereeri̱ mwirembu lyamu!
122.3: Yeru̱salemu̱ lwolwo rub̯uga lu̱nyaku̱bi̱mbwa hamwei̱ lunyamaani.
122.4: Hali nganda zigyenda hakyendi̱, nganda za Mukama , nka ku kyateebeerweho hali I̱saleeri̱ kuhaariiza ibara lya Mukama .
122.5: Ku̱kwo hooho baateeri̱ bitebe bya kucwera Bei̱saleeri̱ misangu, mu b̯ukama b̯wa Dau̱di̱.
122.6: Musabire Yeru̱salemu̱ gitunge b̯u̱si̱nge, “Baabbanga na mu̱gi̱sa baakwendya!
122.7: B̯u̱si̱nge b̯wabbanga mu bi̱si̱i̱ka byamu, na byakwerinda mu biikaru byamu bya maani.”
122.8: Hab̯wa bantu na banywani bange, ndiweera Yeru̱salemu̱ yati, “B̯u̱si̱nge b̯ubbe na nywe!”
122.9: Hab̯wa nnyu̱mba gya Mukama Ruhanga weetu̱, nkukusabira mu̱gi̱sa.

123.1: Hali weewe, mei̱so gange hooho gali̱ngi̱li̱ri̱i̱ri̱, weewe ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ kitebekya b̯ukama mwiguru!
123.2: Nka mei̱so ga baheereza, ku̱gali̱ngi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ ngalu za Mukama waab̯u, nka mei̱so ga muzaana kugeicala gali̱ngi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ ngalu za mukama waamwe, kwokwo mei̱so geetu̱ galingiira Mukama weetu̱ Ruhanga, ku̱doosya yaakatukwatirwa mbabazi̱.
123.3: Ai̱ Mukama , tu̱gi̱i̱re mbabazi̱, tu̱gi̱i̱re mbabazi̱ hab̯wakubba batu̱cookoi̱ze hoi̱.
123.4: B̯ujune b̯unene b̯utuli nab̯wo hab̯wa ku̱du̱u̱li̱ra kwa bagu̱u̱da, na mugayo gwa banyamyehembu.

124.1: Kabbengi̱ ataali Mukama yooyo kubba ha rubaju lwetu̱, leka I̱saleeri̱ hataati̱ gibaze,
124.2: “Kabbengi̱ Mukama ataali ha rubaju lwetu̱, banyanzigwa b̯u̱batu̱ru̱mbi̱ri̱,
124.3: bakatu̱zi̱ki̱i̱rye, hab̯wa ki̱ni̱ga kyab̯u kinene hali twe.
124.4: Mwomwo mwizulo gwakutumaari twensei̱, hab̯wa meezi̱ kutumera,
124.6: Mukama ahaariizwe, atatu̱heeri̱yo, mu meino ga banyanzigwa.
124.7: Tu̱keni̱ri̱ nka nnyoni̱, gi̱tesu̱ki̱ri̱ mu mutegu gwa mu̱hi̱gi̱, mutegu gu̱kadu̱ki̱i̱ri̱ twahona!
124.8: Kujunwa kwetu̱ kuruga mwibara lya Mukama , munyakuhanga iguru na nsi.

125.1: Bab̯wo beesiga Mukama , beisana lusahu Sayu̱u̱ni̱, lu̱tazi̱ngi̱zi̱ka bei̱tu̱ lwicalaho biro na biro.
125.2: Nsahu nka ku̱zelogoleerye Yeru̱salemu̱, kwokwo Mukama yeelogoleeryanga bantu baamwe, kuruga hataati̱ na biro na biro.
125.3: Babiibi tibalilema nsi gya barungi, b̯ubali balema, na barungi, balyezagya nibakukora bibiibi.
125.4: Ai̱ Mukama , kolera barungi birungi, na bab̯wo bali beesigwa mu mitima myab̯u.
125.5: Bei̱tu̱ bahabi̱ri̱ mu mihanda mibiibi, Mukama ali̱bazi̱kya hamwe na nkori̱ za bibiibi, B̯u̱si̱nge b̯ubbe mwʼI̱saleeri̱.

126.1: Mukama b̯u̱yaacu̱ngwi̱ri̱ banyansi ba mu Sayu̱u̱ni̱ kuruga mu b̯unyagwa, twei̱sanengi̱ nka bakuloota.
126.2: Twasemererwe hoi̱, twahi̱i̱ma byembu neisanyu linene, mwomwo banyamahanga bakoba yati, “ Mukama abakoleeri̱ byamaani.”
126.4: Ai̱ Mukama , tu̱he mu̱gi̱sa, nka ndagali̱ b̯ugiirya meezi̱ mu migira myomi̱ri̱.
126.6: Aligyenda naalira yeetweki̱ri̱ nsigo gya kusimba, ali̱i̱ra kwamu̱gi̱ na kusemererwa, yeetweki̱ri̱ byakesi̱ri̱.

127.1: Mukama , waatabi̱mba nnyu̱mba, baku̱gi̱bi̱mba bagadira b̯usa. Mukama waatalinda rub̯uga, bali̱ndi̱ balindira b̯usa.
127.2: Mugadira b̯usa ku̱zi̱ndu̱ka karei, kulaala itumbi, ku̱tu̱u̱ya kukoora bidyo, bei̱tu̱ Mukama bakwendya abaha bibakwetaaga baleeri̱.
127.3: Mu mananu baana kili kisembu kuruga hali Mukama , baana gili mpeera kuruga hali Mukama .
127.4: Nka mbasi mu ngalu za mu̱lwani̱, bali baana ba muntu abyala mu b̯usigazi b̯wamwe.
127.5: Ali na mu̱gi̱sa, wa nsahu gye gi̱i̱zwi̱ri̱ mbasi, talikwatwa nsoni̱ kwemeera mwirembu, nab̯wali̱ru̱mbwa banyanzigwa baamwe.

128.1: Ali na mu̱gi̱sa atamwo Mukama ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, akora bya Mukama bi̱yendya!
128.2: Olidya ha bijuma bya ntu̱u̱yo zaamu, olibba wa mu̱gi̱sa kandi oli̱si̱ngu̱ra.
128.3: Mu̱kali̱ waamu alibba nka mu̱zabbi̱bbu̱ guwa byana mu nnyu̱mba gyamu, nka mu̱zayi̱tu̱u̱ni̱ gu̱sogi̱ri̱ kwokwo baana baamu balibba ba maani ha meeza gyamu.
128.4: Mu mananu kwokwo aliheeb̯wa mu̱gi̱sa, yogwo atamwo Mukama ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
128.5: Mukama akuhenge mu̱gi̱sa mu Sayu̱u̱ni̱, woomeeranga kuwona mi̱gi̱sa mya Yeru̱salemu̱.
128.6: Woomeeranga kuwona baana ba baana baamu, b̯u̱si̱nge b̯ubbe hali I̱saleeri̱!

129.1: “Kuruga mu b̯uto b̯wange bambonab̯woneserye hoi̱,” leka I̱saleeri̱ gibaze yati,
129.2: “Bambonawoneseerye hoi̱ kuruga mu b̯uto b̯wange, bei̱tu̱ batakansi̱ngu̱re.
129.3: Baasari̱ bihote ha mugongo gwange, kandi bagufoora nka musiri gubali̱mi̱ri̱mwo.”
129.4: Mukama murungi, asaari̱ miguha mya babiibi, yancungura.
129.5: Leka bensei̱ banyakunoba Sayu̱u̱ni̱, basingurwe kandi basware!
129.6: Leka beisane nka mutala gwa ha kasolya ka nnyu̱mba, gu̱hotoka gu̱takahandi̱ri̱,
129.7: mwi̱hi̱ra gu̱gwo mutala tasobora kugukwata mu ngalu, habbe kugubboha mutwaru,
129.8: kandi na bakurabaho tibasobora kukoba, “Mu̱gi̱sa gwa Mukama gubbe nawe. Tukukusabira mu̱gi̱sa mwibara lya Mukama !”

130.1: Ai̱ Mukama , nka kundi mu b̯ujune b̯unene, nku̱kwesengereerye.
130.2: Ai̱ Mukama , weegwa iraka lyange! Ontegere mapokopo gaamu geetegerye iraka lyange ninkukusaba!
130.3: Ai̱ Mukama , obbe waahondekerengi̱ bibii byetu̱, naani yaakasobora kwemeera mu mei̱so gaamu?
130.4: Bei̱tu̱ weewe otuganyira mwa kukutangamwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
130.5: Ncala nindindiira Mukama , mutima gwange gwamulindiiranga, na kigambu kyamwe nkukyesiga,
130.6: mutima gwange gwalindiranga Mukama , nka mu̱li̱ndi̱ kwalinda b̯wi̱re kukya, na kukirahoona mu̱li̱ndi̱ kwalinda b̯wi̱re kukya.
130.7: Ai̱ I̱saleeri̱, weesiganga Mukama ! Hab̯wakubba Mukama abba wa ngonzi zinene, naakucungura kwamwe kubba kwa biribiri.
130.8: Kandi alicungura Bei̱saleeri̱, abatoolehoona bibii byab̯u byensei̱.

131.1: Ai̱ MUKAMA , mutima gwange tigugira myesungo, na mei̱so gange tigagira myehembu, Ti̱nyeetembatembya rundi kwesengasenga.
131.2: Bei̱tu̱ mwozo gwange gu̱teekanu̱ kandi gu̱holu̱, nka mwana ateekei̱ni̱ heibiiri lya mmaawe, nteekei̱ni̱ nka mwana gi̱bacu̱kwi̱ri̱.
131.3: We, I̱saleeri̱, kuruga hataati̱ na biro byensei̱, obbenge na ku̱ni̱hi̱ra mu Mukama.

132.1: Ai̱ Mukama , otalyebeera byensei̱ bya Dau̱di̱ bi̱yaawonaweeni̱,
132.2: nka ku̱yeeragi̱ri̱ hali Mukama yaarahira hali Ruhanga Waamaani wa Yakobbo naakoba yati,
132.3: “Tindigyenda mu nnyu̱mba gyange habbe kulaala mu kitabbu kyange,
132.4: tindyebbaka, habbe kuta b̯ulo mu mei̱so,
132.5: ku̱doosya b̯unditungira Mukama kiikaru, hali Waamaani wa Yakobbo aliicaara.”
132.6: Twegwi̱ri̱ho ku Sandu̱u̱ko gya ndagaanu mu Efu̱raati̱, twagyagi̱i̱rye mu misiri mya Yaara.
132.7: Twakoba yati, “Katugyenda mu kiikaru kyamwe hali eicala, tu̱ramye hansi wa katebe ka magulu gaamwe!”
132.8: Ai̱ Mukama , i̱za cali ohuumulira, uwe na Sandu̱u̱ko gya Ndagaanu, kaboneru ka maani gaamu.
132.9: Leka balaami̱ baamu balwalenge mananu, na beesigwa baamu baami̱i̱ryenge kusemererwa.
132.10: Hab̯wa muheereza waamu Dau̱di̱, otalisuula mutongoole waamu.
132.11: Mukama yaarahi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ Dau̱di̱ kirahiro kya mananu kyatalihindula, naakoba yati: “Omwei̱ ha baana baamu boonyi̱ni̱ ndimuta ha kitebe kyamu kya b̯ukama.
132.12: Batabani̱ baamu b̯ubalilinda ndagaanu gyange na bigambu byange bindibeegeesya, na batabani̱ baab̯u de baliicaara ha kitebe kyamu biro byensei̱.”
132.13: Hab̯wakubba Mukama yeekomeeri̱mwo Sayu̱u̱ni̱, yaagyegombira ki̱mwei̱ kugiicalamwo,
132.14: “Kiki kyokyo kiikaru kinyahuumulirangamwo biro byensei̱, hab̯wakubba nkyendeerye, hooho nyeicalanga.
132.15: Ndi̱kanyi̱sya bilimwa byakyo, banaku baayo ndibaha kwicuta.
132.16: Balaami̱ baayo nyabalwalyanga kujunwa, beesigwa baayo bahi̱i̱manga nibakusemererwa na mi̱zi̱ra.
132.17: B̯ukama b̯wa Dau̱di̱ ndib̯ufoora wamaani, mutongoole wange abbe nka taara.
132.18: Banyanzigwa baamwe ndi̱bakwati̱sya nsoni̱, bei̱tu̱ b̯ukama b̯wamwe b̯weicalanga na mu̱gi̱sa, nib̯ugaliha.”

133.1: Muwone, kakirungi kandi kyakusemererwa bantu ba Ruhanga b̯ubeicala mu b̯u̱mwei̱!
133.2: Kiisana maku̱ta ga muhendu gunene gababbwomi̱ri̱ ha mu̱twe, nigakasorodoka ha mu̱leju̱, ha mu̱leju̱ gwa Alooni̱, nigasorodoka ha ki̱togi̱ kya kilwalu kyamwe!
133.3: Kiisana lu̱me lwa Hamoni̱, lu̱gwi̱ri̱ ha lusahu Sayu̱u̱ni̱! Ku̱kwo hooho Mukama aragani̱si̱i̱rye kugaba mu̱gi̱sa gwa b̯womi, b̯womi b̯wa biro byensei̱.

134.1: Mwi̱ze, muhaariize Mukama, nywe nywensei̱ baheereza baamwe, bamuheereza i̱jolo mu nnyu̱mba gya Mukama !
134.2: Mu̱byokye mikono myenyu̱ ha kiikaru ki̱syanu̱, muhaariize Mukama.
134.3: Mukama munyakuhanga iguru na nsi, akuhe mu̱gi̱sa kuruga Sayu̱u̱ni̱!

135.1: Haari̱i̱ze Mukama ! Haari̱i̱ze ibara lya Mukama , mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze nywe baheereza ba Mukama ,
135.2: nywe bab̯wo beemeera mu nnyu̱mba gya Mukama , mu zi̱gati̱ gya nnyu̱mba gya Ruhanga weetu̱!
135.3: Haari̱i̱ze Mukama , kubba Mukama abba murungi, mu̱ku̱gi̱ze ibara lyamwe, hab̯wakubba wa mbabazi̱!
135.4: Mukama yeekomeeri̱ yankei Yakobbo, I̱saleeri̱ abbe waamwe yankei.
135.5: Kiki nkyegi̱ri̱ nti, Mukama wamaani, kandi nti Mukama weetu̱ akira baruhanga bensei̱.
135.6: B̯uli kyensei̱ kya Mukama ki̱yendya kukora mwiguru na ha nsi akikora b̯u̱kori̱, mwitaka na mu ndi̱ha.
135.7: Yooyo aragira bikaka biruge ha mmaliriro gya nsi. Yooyo aha nkuba kubbwatuka mu ndagali̱ kandi yooyo aleeta mpehu kuruga mwibiikiro lyamwe.
135.8: Yooyo yei̱ti̱ri̱ mi̱zegei̱zo mya Mi̱si̱ri̱, myensei̱ mya bantu na bisolo,
135.9: muli weewe, Mi̱si̱ri̱, hooho yaasi̱ndi̱ki̱ri̱ b̯uwoneru na byamahanu, naakufubira Faraaho na baheereza baamwe.
135.10: Yaazi̱ki̱i̱rye mahanga ganene, yei̱ta bakama bamaani nka,
135.11: Si̱honi̱, mukama wʼAbamooli̱, Ogi̱, mukama wa Bbasaani̱, na bakama bensei̱ ba Kanaani̱,
135.12: yaahayo nsi gyab̯u nka mugab̯u, yaagi̱heeri̱yo nka mugab̯u hali bantu baamwe Bei̱saleeri̱.
135.13: Ibara lyamu, ai̱ Mukama, lya biro na biro kaku̱u̱mi̱i̱re kaamu, ai̱ Mukama, kabbangaho biro na biro.
135.14: Kubba Mukama alitoolaho bantu baamwe musangu, kandi baheereza baamwe alibagiira mbabazi̱.
135.15: Bi̱si̱sani̱ bya mahanga bi̱baramya bib̯umbe kuruga mu feeza na zaabbu, bikorwa b̯ukorwa mikono mya bantu.
135.16: Bili na mi̱nwa, bei̱tu̱ tibibaza, bili na mei̱so, bei̱tu̱ tibiwona.
135.17: Bili na mapokopo, bei̱tu̱ ti̱byegwa, habbe kubba na rwoya mu mi̱nwa myab̯u.
135.18: Bab̯wo babikora nabo kwokwo beisana, na bab̯wo bensei̱ babyesiga kwokwo bali.
135.19: Nywe ba nnyu̱mba gyʼI̱saleeri̱, mu̱haari̱i̱ze Mukama ! Nywe ba nnyu̱mba gyʼAlooni̱, mu̱haari̱i̱ze Mukama !
135.20: Nywe ba nnyu̱mba gya Leevi̱, mu̱haari̱i̱ze Mukama ! Nywe batamwo Mukama ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, mu̱haari̱i̱ze Mukama !
135.21: Mukama ahaariizwe mu Sayu̱u̱ni̱, yogwo eicala mu Yeru̱salemu̱! Haari̱i̱ze Mukama .

136.1: Mu̱si̱i̱me Mukama , kubba murungi, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro.
136.2: Mu̱si̱i̱me Ruhanga wa baruhanga, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro.
136.3: Mu̱si̱i̱me Mukama wa bakama, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro.
136.4: Yooyo yankei akora byamaani, bikuhuniriza, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.5: hab̯wa magezi̱ gaamwe yaakoori̱ iguru, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.6: munyakutandaaza nsi ku meezi̱, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.7: yooyo yaakoori̱ bimuluka bya mwiguru byamaani, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.8: lyoba lilemenge mwinsi, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.9: mweri̱ na nzota bilemenge b̯wi̱re b̯wei̱jolo, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro.
136.10: Ruhanga yogwo mu̱nyakwi̱ta mi̱zegei̱zo mya Mi̱si̱ri̱, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.11: yaatoori̱ Bei̱saleeri̱ hakati̱ gya Mi̱si̱ri̱, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.12: na ngalu gya maani na mukono gwa b̯u̱sobozi̱, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.13: yooyo mu̱nyaku̱bagani̱amwo habiri Itaka Lyengu̱, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.14: yaarabi̱i̱rye Bei̱saleeri̱ hakati̱ weitaka, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.15: bei̱tu̱ yaazi̱ki̱i̱rye Faraaho na mahe gaamwe mwʼItaka Lyengu̱, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.16: yooyo munyakwebembera bantu baamwe yaabarabya mwirungu, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro.
136.17: Yaatematemi̱ri̱ bakama ba b̯u̱sobozi̱, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.18: yei̱ta bakama ba maani hoi̱, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.19: Si̱honi̱, mukama wa Bamooli̱, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.20: na Ogi̱, mukama wa Bbasaani̱, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.21: nsi gyab̯u yaagi̱gabi̱ri̱ nka mugab̯u, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.22: mugab̯u hali muheereza waamwe, I̱saleeri̱, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro.
136.23: Yooyo mu̱nyaku̱twi̱zu̱ka mu b̯uceke b̯wetu̱, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.24: yaatujuna hali banyanzigwa beetu̱, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro,
136.25: yooyo aha bi̱hangi̱rwe byensei̱ bili na b̯womi bidyo, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro.
136.26: Mu̱si̱i̱me Ruhanga wa mwiguru, kubba ngonzi zaamwe zinene za biro na biro!

137.1: Ha migira mya Bbabbu̱looni̱, twecali̱i̱ri̱ hansi twalira, b̯u̱twezu̱ki̱ri̱ Sayu̱u̱ni̱.
137.2: Ha misaali myayo, hooho twabbani̱ki̱ri̱ ndi̱ngi̱di̱ zeetu̱.
137.3: Kubba banyagi̱ banyakututwala mu b̯unyagwa baatu̱weereeri̱ ku̱hi̱i̱ma, baturagira ku̱bahi̱i̱mi̱ra byembu byabaha kusemererwa, bakoba yati, “Mu̱tu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re ki̱mwei̱ ha byembu bya Sayu̱u̱ni̱!”
137.4: Tu̱hi̱i̱ma teetei̱ kyembu kya Mukama mu nsi gitali gyetu̱?
137.5: B̯undikwebeera, ai̱ Yeru̱salemu̱, mukono gwange gwab̯udyo gwalimalanga!
137.6: Lulimi lwange lwalemerenga ha b̯unkudankuda, b̯u̱ntali̱kwi̱zu̱ka, b̯u̱ntali̱si̱i̱ma Yeru̱salemu̱ na kusemererwa kukukiirayo ki̱mwei̱!
137.7: Ai̱ Mukama , i̱zu̱ka bantu bʼEdomu̱ ha kiro kya Yeru̱salemu̱ gyanyagi̱i̱rwe, nka kubalu̱kengi̱ nibakoba, “Bbotola, Bbotola, bbotolera ki̱mwei̱ ku̱doosya ha mu̱si̱nge!”
137.8: Ai̱ Bbabbu̱looni̱, oli̱zi̱ka ye! Kayeesi̱i̱mi̱ri̱ yogwo alikusasula kwijanjana na ki̱kyo ki̱watu̱koori̱!
137.9: Kayeesi̱i̱mi̱ri̱ alitwala nkerembe zaamu akazikenya ha lubbaali!

138.1: Ai̱ Mukama , nku̱ku̱si̱i̱ma na mutima gwange gwensei̱, ninkukuhaariiza mu mei̱so ga mbandwa.
138.2: Hab̯wa ngonzi zaamu zinene na hab̯wa b̯wesigwa b̯wamu, ni̱nku̱ramya mu Yeekaru gyamu gi̱syanu̱, ni̱nku̱si̱i̱ma hab̯wa ibara lyamu, kubba otu̱mbi̱i̱rye ibara lyamu na bigambu byamu kukira bintu byensei̱.
138.3: B̯u̱nyaku̱ku̱ngi̱ri̱ wanzi̱ri̱ri̱mwo, wampa maani wantati̱i̱rya mutima.
138.4: Ai̱ Mukama , bakama ba mu nsi bensei̱ baakuhaariizanga, kubba beegwi̱ri̱ bigambu byamu.
138.5: Baku̱hi̱i̱mi̱ranga hab̯wa bikorwa bya Mukama , hab̯wakubba ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya Mukama kinene.
138.6: Mukama nab̯uyaabba nali mwiguru, awooneera bab̯u̱ndaaru̱, bei̱tu̱ banyamyehembu abeega nibali hadei.
138.7: Nab̯unyaabba ngoteerwe b̯ujune kunu na kunu, weewe olinda b̯womi b̯wange, gorora mukono gwamu, okwate ki̱ni̱ga kya banyanzigwa bange, mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo gunjune.
138.8: Mukama ali̱doosereerya ki̱kyo ki̱yantegekeeri̱, ngonzi zaamu zinene, ai̱ Mukama, za biro na biro. Otaligumirisana mulimo gwa ngalu zaamu.

139.1: Ai̱ Mukama , wangezeseerye hoi̱ kandi onzegi̱ri̱!
139.2: Weegi̱ri̱ mabyokere gange na malaalire, weeteegereza biteekerezu byange nincaali hadei.
139.3: Weewe owoneera magyendere gange na meeri̱re gange, bikorwa byange byensei̱ obyegeeri̱ ki̱mwei̱.
139.4: Nab̯umba ntakabazi̱ri̱, ai̱ Mukama , byensei̱ binkugyenda kubaza, obba obyegi̱ri̱.
139.5: Onyeelogoleerya i̱nyu̱ma na mu mei̱so, kandi ontaho mukono gwamu gwa mu̱gi̱sa.
139.7: Ndigyenda hanya mwa ku̱kwebi̱saho? Rundi ndi̱i̱ru̱ka hanya hali otali?
139.8: Nab̯undintemba mwiguru, na ku̱kwo oli̱yo! Nab̯undilaala ha ntabbu kyange kuzimu, na ku̱kwo oli̱yo!
139.9: Nab̯u̱ndi̱du̱du̱u̱ka nkagyenda b̯uhulukalyoba, habbe kwicaara hadei mu biikaru bya b̯ugwalyoba,
139.10: na ku̱kwo olinyebembera, na mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo olinsagika.
139.11: Kakubba nkoba yati, “Nti̱ti̱ kagimbumbe, na kyererezi̱ ki̱nyelogoleerye kifooke i̱jolo,”
139.12: bei̱tu̱ nab̯wo nti̱ti̱ tigibba nti̱ti̱ hali we, hali we i̱jolo lyaka nka mwinsi, hab̯wakubba kyererezi̱ na nti̱ti̱ kyokyo ki̱mwei̱ hali we.
139.13: Bicweka byange byensei̱ bya mu nda weewe waabi̱koori̱, wambu̱mbahu̱mbi̱ri̱ nindi mu nda gya mmaama.
139.14: Nkukuhaariiza kubba nyaahangi̱rwe mu ngeru gi̱ku̱ti̱i̱ni̱sya kandi gikuhuniriza. Milimo myamu myamahanu hoi̱, ki̱kyo nkyegeeri̱ ki̱mwei̱ kurungi.
139.15: Nginga za maku̱ha gange zensei̱ ozeegi̱ri̱, nka kunyab̯umba b̯u̱mbi̱i̱rwe mu nsita, nyakorwa kuruga mwitehe mu magezi̱ ganene.
139.16: Mei̱so gaamu gambweni̱ ntakahangi̱i̱rwe, nka ku̱byahandi̱i̱ki̱i̱rwe mu kitabbu kyamu, ki̱mwei̱ ha ki̱mwei̱, na biro bi̱byo bi̱bakampangi̱ri̱mwo b̯ubyali bi̱takabbeeri̱ho.
139.17: Ai̱ Ruhanga, biteekerezu byamu kabyamuhendu hali gya! Ku̱bi̱gei̱ta hamwei̱ kabinene maani!
139.18: Kakubba mbibala, bikukira musinyi b̯unene. Biro byensei̱ b̯u̱nsi̱si̱mu̱ka mba nincaali nawe.
139.19: Ai̱ Ruhanga, kyakunsemeera okei̱tanga nkori̱ za bibii! Nywe bakabbwoma ibbanga, nimukandugaho.
139.20: Bantu bakakubazaho kubiibi, ibara lyamu balibazaho bibiibi bisa!
139.21: Ai̱ Mukama , tikyokyo nnoba bantu bakunoba, kandi nsuulira ki̱mwei̱ bab̯wo baku̱jeemera?
139.22: Kyokyo mbanobera ki̱mwei̱, mbatwala kubba banyanzigwa bange.
139.23: Ai̱ Ruhanga, nnkebera, weege mutima gwange! Nngezesya, weege biteekerezu byange!
139.24: Weeteegereza b̯unyakabba nindi mu nsobi̱ gyensei̱, nnyebembera ondoosye mu muhanda gwa biro na biro.

140.1: Ai̱ Mukama , njuna hali bantu babiibi, ondindenge hali bantu beetagu̱,
140.2: banyamitima miteekerereza mu kukora bibiibi, na kutab̯ura bantu.
140.3: Bigambu byab̯u biisana b̯umala wa mpiri, mi̱nwa myab̯u mi̱zwi̱ri̱ b̯utwa nka b̯wa wu̱lu̱b̯u̱ndu̱.
140.4: Ai̱ Mukama , ndinda hali maani ga babiibi, na hali bantu beetagu̱, bategeki̱ri̱ kuntega magulu.
140.5: Bab̯wo banyamyehembu bantegi̱ri̱ mutegu, banzwi̱ri̱ kitimba kyab̯u, bantegi̱ri̱ b̯u̱hya ha muhanda gwa ha rubaju.
140.6: Ai̱ Mukama , nkukoba yati, “Weewe Ruhanga wange.” Weegwanga, ai̱ Mukama , kulira kwange!
140.7: Ai̱ Mukama , Mukama wange, weewe maani ga kujunwa kwange, ombumba mu̱twe ha kiro kya b̯ulemu.
140.8: Bantu babiibi, ai̱ Mukama , otalibaha bi̱bakwendya, bibiibi bibakutegeka bitalibba byamugasu, ni̱baketembatebya.
140.9: Leka banyanzigwa bange batali̱nsi̱ngu̱ra, bibakubaza ni̱banti̱i̱ni̱si̱ri̱i̱rya byabbanga hali bo.
140.10: Makala gakwokya gaabbanga ha mi̱twe myab̯u, baagumwanga mu mworo, baagoromokanga mu ki̱i̱na kibatalirugamwo.
140.11: Bacwa makuru baalemwanga b̯wicalu, kabii kaahi̱i̱ganga bab̯wo beetagu̱.
140.12: Mukama , nkyegi̱ri̱ nti ojuna banaku, kandi alwaniira baseege.
140.13: Mu mananu beesigwa baahaariizanga ibara lyamu, na barungi beicalanga hali oli.

141.1: Ai̱ Mukama , ndimukukunga, nzanguhiira! B̯unyakankwetanga, weegwanga iraka lyange!
141.2: Leka kusaba kwange kubbenge nka ku̱wu̱nya kwa mugaaju hali we, mikono myange ni̱mi̱byokya hakyendi̱, myabbanga nka kyonzira kyei̱jolo!
141.3: Ai̱ Mukama , linda kanwa kange, owoneere kalimi kange.
141.4: Otalindeka kukora kibii kyensei̱, otalimpa kwicala mu kukora bibiibi na nkori̱ za bibii, kandi ondindenge b̯utadya bi̱nolu̱ byab̯u!
141.5: Leka murungi waamu anfubirenga kandi ancoomerenge na mbabazi̱, bei̱tu̱ kuhab̯urwa kwa babiibi tindikwikiriza, hab̯wakubba kwokwo kusaba kwange hali bikorwa byab̯u bibiibi.
141.6: Mwomwo baalyega nti kigambu kyange kibba kya mananu, b̯ubalikakasuka balemi̱ baab̯u hansi wa kihanga.
141.7: Balibaza nibakoba, nka mu̱li̱mi̱ kwati̱ri̱mu̱ra itehe, kwokwo na maku̱ha gaab̯u galisasaana ha mu̱nwa gwa kituuru.
141.8: Bei̱tu̱ mei̱so gange gali̱ngi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ weewe, ai̱ Mukama Ruhanga, muli we hooho nzi̱ru̱ki̱ra, otalindeka ntali na mu̱li̱ndi̱!
141.9: Njuna ontoole mu mitegu mi̱bantegi̱ri̱, na mu b̯u̱hya b̯wa nkori̱ za bibii!
141.10: Babiibi kabagwenge mu bitimba byab̯u bankei, bei̱tu̱ gya ningirooba b̯u̱roobi̱.

142.1: Nnkunga Mukama neiraka lyange, neiraka lyange nyesengereerya Mukama angiriire mbabazi̱.
142.2: Bi̱byo byensei̱ binsaaliza, nyabimwolokyanga, nyamuweeranga b̯ujune b̯wange.
142.3: Mwozo gwange b̯ugwakalemereerwanga, weewe weegi̱ri̱ kindikora! Muhanda gunkarabamwo, gubbamwo mutegu gu̱bategi̱ri̱.
142.4: B̯umagamaga ku rubaju lwange lwa b̯udyo, timbonaho noomwei̱ wa kunjuna, tihacaaloho b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wensei̱, tihaloho akunfaho.
142.5: Ai̱ Mukama , weewe ginkunga, ninkoba yati, “Weewe b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wange, weewe mugab̯u gwange mu b̯womi b̯wa nsi.”
142.6: Weegwanga kukunga kwange, hab̯wakubba ntabatabeeni̱ hoi̱! Njuna hali bab̯wo baku̱mpi̱i̱ga, hab̯wakubba bakunkira maani!
142.7: Ntoola mu nkomo, aleke nsi̱i̱me ibara lyamu! Barungi balinyeecookaho, hab̯wa birungi byolinkolera.

143.1: Ai̱ Mukama , weegwa kusaba kwange, nnyetegeerya, nku̱kwesengereerya! Onzi̱rengemwo hab̯wakubba obba wamananu kandi mwesigwa.
143.2: Otacweranga muheereza waamu musangu, kubba tihaloho murungi mu mei̱so gaamu.
143.3: Hab̯wa munyanzigwa kumpiigahiiga, anzi̱gazi̱gi̱ni̱ri̱ hansi, anteeri̱ kubba mu nti̱ti̱ nka bab̯wo banyaku̱kwa kadei.
143.4: Kyokyo mwozo gwange gutali na ku̱ni̱hi̱ra, na mutima gwange gu̱ku̱ti̱i̱ni̱ hoi̱.
143.5: Nkei̱zu̱ka biro bya kadei, nkateekereza ha bintu byensei̱ bi̱waakoori̱, nkawona milimo myamu,
143.6: mbyokya mikono myange hali we. Hab̯wamu, nyeegwa mutima nigukudokera nkeitehe lya ndala kulidokera meezi̱.
143.7: Ai̱ Mukama , wanguha ku̱nzi̱ramwo! Mwozo gwange tigucalimwo isanyu! Otanzi̱ti̱ra li̱i̱so lyamu, nkeisana bab̯wo basi̱ri̱mu̱ka kuzimu.
143.8: B̯uli mwakya, onzegesyenge ha ngonzi zaamu zinene, hab̯wakubba weewe ginyeesiga. Ompe kwetegereza muhanda gunyarabangamwo, nahab̯waki̱kyo ninkuhongera mutima gwange.
143.9: Njuna, ai̱ Mukama , hali banyanzigwa bange! Nzi̱ru̱ki̱ri̱ hali we kwebi̱sa.
143.10: Onzegesya kukora bi̱wendya, hab̯wakubba weewe Ruhanga wange! Leka Mwozo waamu murungi anyebemberenge heetendeku̱.
143.11: Ai̱ Mukama , hab̯wa ibara lyamu, olindenge b̯womi b̯wange! Hab̯wa b̯urungi b̯wamu, onjune b̯ujune ha mutima!
143.12: Kandi mu ngonzi zaamu zinene, olihwerekereerya banyanzigwa bange, noozi̱kya bantu bensei̱ bantu̱ntwi̱ze mutima, hab̯wakubba ndi muheereza waamu.

144.1: Ahaariizwe Mukama , lubbaali lwange, antendeka mu byakulwana na mu byab̯ulemu,
144.2: anzolokeerya ngonzi zinene kandi lugo lwange, b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wange kandi ancungura, ngab̯u gyange, hali nzi̱ru̱ki̱ra, afuga mahanga gali hansi gyange.
144.3: Ai̱ Mukama , kikuha kutaho muntu mutima, rundi kikuha kumuteekerezaho, kyokyo kyani?
144.4: Muntu eisana rwoya, biro byamwe biisana mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ guteicalaho.
144.5: Ai̱ Mukama, i̱namya iguru lyamu osi̱ri̱mu̱ke hansi, kwata ku nsahu zi̱tu̱u̱ke mwi̱ca!
144.6: Osi̱ndi̱ke nkuba, orarangye banyanzigwa, lasa mbasi gyamu gibabinge.
144.7: Weemeera mwiguru odambule mukono gwamu onsahule kandi njuna, ontoole mu meezi̱ ganene ga mu ndi̱ha, na mu ngalu za banyamahanga,
144.8: banyami̱nwa mikabaza b̯u̱gobya kandi bakarahira bya b̯u̱gobya babyokeerye mikono myab̯u mya b̯udyo.
144.9: Ai̱ Ruhanga, nkwi̱za ku̱ku̱hi̱i̱mi̱ra kyembu kihyaka, ninkukuutira ki̱dongo kya hu̱u̱zi̱ i̱ku̱mi̱,
144.10: weewe oha bakama ku̱si̱ngu̱ra, ojuna Dau̱di̱ muheereza waamu mpirima gya ku̱mwi̱ta.
144.11: Nsahula kandi oncungure kuruga mu ngalu za banyamahanga, banyami̱nwa mikabaza b̯u̱gobya na bakarahira b̯u̱gobya babyokeerye mikono myab̯u mya b̯udyo.
144.12: Batabani̱ beetu̱ mu b̯usigazi b̯wab̯u kababbenge nka bimera bi̱handu̱, bahara beetu̱ kababbenge nka mpagi̱ za ku nsonda zi̱sali̱i̱rwe ku̱bi̱mba kikaali.
144.13: Bideeru byetu̱ byeizulanga nibibooga bilimwa bya mi̱li̱ngo myensei̱, ntaama zeetu̱ kazibyalenge byana nku̱mi̱ na b̯usiriira mu mali̱i̱si̱i̱ryo geetu̱.
144.14: Nte zeetu̱ zaabyalanga nnyana, zaabyalanga zi̱taki̱ki̱ri̱ rundi kutorooga, ngu̱u̱do zeetu̱ zaabbanga zitalimwo kizabiro.
144.15: Bali na mu̱gi̱sa baliheeb̯wa mi̱gi̱sa nka mi̱myo! Bali na mu̱gi̱sa ba Ruhanga waab̯u ali Mukama !

145.1: Ai̱ Mukama, nditumbula weewe Ruhanga wange, ndihaariiza ibara lyamu biro na biro.
145.2: B̯ukyeb̯ukye nkwi̱za ku̱ku̱si̱i̱manga nimpaariizanga ibara lyamu biro na biro.
145.3: Ahaariizwe hoi̱, Mukama waamaani, b̯u̱handu̱ b̯wamwe ti̱b̯wetegerezib̯we.
145.4: Mu̱hi̱hi̱ gu̱mwei̱ ha gundi baahaariizanga bi̱waakoori̱, ni̱batebya bikorwa byamu bya maani.
145.5: Hab̯wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kinene kya b̯u̱handu̱ b̯wamu, na hab̯wa milimo myamu myamahanu, nyabi̱teekerezangaho.
145.6: Baatebyanga bikorwa byamu bikuhuniriza bya maani, nagya nyabazanga ha b̯u̱handu̱ b̯wamu.
145.7: Baasasani̱anga kaku̱u̱mi̱i̱re ka b̯urungi b̯wamu, ni̱bahi̱i̱manga na maani ha mananu gaamu.
145.8: Mukama eicala mu̱ganyi̱ri̱ kandi wambabazi̱, tabihirwa wangu, ngonzi zaamwe zinene tizihinduka.
145.9: Mukama abba murungi hali bensei̱, na mbabazi̱ zaamwe zili hensei̱ ha bihangwa byamwe.
145.10: Ai̱ Mukama , byensei̱ bi̱waahangi̱ri̱ byaku̱si̱i̱manga, na bantu baamu beesigwa bensei̱ baakuhaariizanga!
145.11: Baabazanga ha ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya b̯ukama b̯wamu, ni̱banyu̱mya ha maani gaamu,
145.12: mwa ku̱manyi̱sya bantu bensei̱ bikorwa byamu bya maani na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya b̯ukama b̯wamu kya maani.
145.13: B̯ukama b̯wamu b̯wa biro na biro, na b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wamu b̯wa biro byensei̱. [ Mukama abba wamananu mu bigambu byamwe byensei̱ kandi wambabazi̱ hali bintu byensei̱ bi̱yaahangi̱ri̱.]
145.14: Mukama asagika bensei̱ bagwa hansi, abyokya bab̯wo bensei̱ bahi̱nyi̱rwe hansi.
145.15: Mei̱so ga bi̱hangi̱rwe byensei̱ gali̱ngi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ weewe, obiha bidyo mu b̯u̱su̱mi̱ b̯wabyo.
145.16: Ob̯u̱u̱la ngalu zaamu, noi̱cu̱tya b̯uli kintu kikali na b̯womi.
145.17: Mukama abba wamananu mu mihanda myamwe myensei̱, kandi wangonzi hali bintu byensei̱ bi̱yaakoori̱.
145.18: Mukama abba heehi̱ hali bensei̱ bamukunga, hali bab̯wo bensei̱ bamukunga mu mananu.
145.19: Bab̯wo bensei̱ bamutamwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, abaha bibakwetaaga, yeegwa kusaba kwab̯u na bajuna.
145.20: Mukama alinda bensei̱ bamwolokya ngonzi, bei̱tu̱ babiibi bensei̱, ali̱bazi̱kya.
145.21: Mu̱nwa gwange gwahaariizanga Mukama, binyakuhangwa byensei̱ kabihaariizenge ibara lyamwe li̱ti̱i̱nwa biro na biro.

146.1: Haari̱i̱ze Mukama ! Ai̱ mutima gwange, haariiza Mukama !
146.2: Biro byensei̱ bya b̯womi b̯wange nkwi̱za kukuhaariizanga Mukama, nkwi̱za ku̱hi̱i̱mi̱ranga Ruhanga wange nincali mwomi.
146.3: Otalyesiga balemi̱, habbe kwesiga muntu b̯untu, atali na kyalikujuna.
146.4: Lwoya lwamwe b̯ulumurugamwo, ei̱rayo mwitehe, ha kiro ki̱kyo kyonyi̱ni̱ byabba ategeki̱ri̱ bibba bi̱mali̱ki̱ri̱.
146.5: Yeesi̱i̱me yogwo wa Ruhanga wa Yakobbo alijuna, wa ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwamwe kuli mu Mukama Ruhanga waamwe,
146.6: munyakuhanga iguru na nsi, itaka na bintu byensei̱ biicalamwo, yooyo eicala mwesigwa biro byensei̱,
146.7: yooyo alwaniira b̯ugabe b̯wa baceke kandi agabira baseege bidyo. Mukama ateesula banyankomo,
146.8: Mukama eijula mei̱so ga bei̱jalu̱. Mukama abyokya bensei̱ bahi̱nyi̱rwe hansi, Mukama yendya barungi.
146.9: Mukama alinda banyamahanga, awooneera bamukaabakwere na nfu̱u̱zi̱, bei̱tu̱ muhanda gwa babiibi agu̱zi̱ki̱i̱rya ki̱mwei̱.
146.10: Mukama Ruhanga waamu, ai̱ Sayu̱u̱ni̱, alema biro na biro mi̱hi̱hi̱ myensei̱. Haari̱i̱ze Mukama!

147.1: Haari̱i̱ze Mukama ! Kubba kirungi kuhaariiza Ruhanga weetu̱, kubba wambabazi̱, kandi ki̱doori̱ b̯u̱dwi̱ kumuhaariiza.
147.2: Mukama ali̱mu̱ku̱bi̱mba Yeru̱salemu̱, acookacoori̱ Bei̱saleeri̱ banyakusaasaana.
147.3: Ahoni̱a banyamitima mya b̯ujune, naajanjaba bihote byab̯u.
147.4: Nzota za mu mwanya, yooyo azibala, b̯uli gi̱mwei̱ agyeta neibara.
147.5: Mukama weetu̱ wa maani hoi̱, kandi wa b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯unene, na kwetegereza kwamwe tikulengwa.
147.6: Mukama abyokya bab̯u̱ndaaru̱, bei̱tu̱ babiibi abei̱calya hansi.
147.7: Mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Mukama ni̱mu̱mu̱si̱i̱ma, mu̱mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Ruhanga weetu̱ kyembu kirungi na ndi̱ngi̱di̱!
147.8: Yooyo abbu̱mba iguru na bikaka, ategeka ndagali̱ hab̯wa nsi, amerya b̯usubi ha nsahu.
147.9: Aha bisolo bidyo byabyo, na byana bya nnyoni̱ bikulira.
147.10: Kwesi̱i̱ma kwamwe kwicala kwahi mu maani ga mbaraasi, habbe mu maani ga mahe,
147.11: bei̱tu̱ Mukama yeegondesya bab̯wo bamu̱ti̱i̱na, bab̯wo bali na ku̱ni̱hi̱ra mu ngonzi zaamwe zinene.
147.12: Haari̱i̱ze Mukama , ai̱ Yeru̱salemu̱! Ai̱ Sayu̱u̱ni̱, Ruhanga waamu ahaariizib̯we!
147.13: Kubba yooyo atati̱i̱rya byoma bya malembo gaamu, kandi aha bantu baamu mu̱gi̱sa.
147.14: Ataho b̯u̱si̱nge ha mitaanu myamu, kandi abei̱cu̱tya na nganu girungi ki̱mwei̱.
147.15: Atuma kiragiro kyamwe mu nsi, kigambu kyamwe nikikorwa b̯wangu.
147.16: Asi̱ndi̱ka ndagali̱ gya mahi̱ga nka muguma byoza bya ntaama, asaasaani̱a kiho nka mu̱tu̱ku̱u̱la i̱syanu̱.
147.17: Aguma ndagali̱ gya mahi̱ga nka mpulungu, naani akusobora ku̱lwani̱sya b̯wi̱nyamu̱ b̯wamwe?
147.18: Aragira kigambu kyamwe kwagya mahi̱ga ga ndagali̱, nigaaga, ata mpehu kuhunga, meezi̱ nigataraaka.
147.19: Yaatula naaweera Yakobbo kigambu kyamwe, naateeraho I̱saleeri̱ mateeka gayaasomesya.
147.20: Takagakooranga yatyo mahanga gandi, ti̱geegi̱ri̱ biragiro byamwe. Haari̱i̱ze Mukama !

148.1: Haari̱i̱ze Mukama . Haari̱i̱ze Mukama , nywe ba mwiguru mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze mu biikaru bya hakyendi̱!
148.2: Bamalayika baamwe nywensei̱, mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze, mahe gaamwe genseenya ga mwiguru, mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze!
148.3: Lyoba na mweri̱, mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze, nywe nzota zikwangasana, mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze!
148.4: Mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze, we iguru wa heiguru, nawe, meezi̱ oli hakyendi̱ weiguru!
148.5: Byensei̱ kabihaariize ibara lya Mukama ! Hab̯wakubba yooyo yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ byahangwa na kuhangwa.
148.6: Hab̯wa kiragiro kyamwe yaabi̱teeri̱ho mu biikaru byabyo biro na biro yaabiteeraho mitaanu mitasobora kuhinduka.
148.7: Haari̱i̱ze Mukama , nywe ba mu nsi, mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze nywe bisolo bya mu meezi̱ na ndi̱ha zeitaka,
148.8: mworo na ndagali̱ gya mahi̱ga, mukamu gwa meezi̱ na kiho, na bbuukuulu ahondera bigambu bya Mukama .
148.9: Nywe nsahu na mbamba, misaali mya bijuma na mitumba myensei̱,
148.10: bisolo na nte zensei̱, byesikiira na bi̱nyoni̱ bi̱du̱du̱u̱ka, mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze!
148.11: Bakama ba nsi na bantu bensei̱, bahandu̱ na balemi̱ bensei̱ ba hansi,
148.12: basigazi na bahala, badulu bahandu̱ na baana, mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze!
148.13: Bintu byensei̱ kabihaariize ibara lya Mukama , kubba ibara lyamwe lisa lyolyo litumbukenge, ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamwe kibbe hakyendi̱ wa nsi neiguru.
148.14: Mukama alinda ihanga lyamwe na maani, ihanga lyamwe lyesigwa, I̱saleeri̱, limuhaariize, ihanga liicala heehi̱ nayo. Haari̱i̱ze Mukama !

149.1: Haari̱i̱ze Mukama ! Mu̱hi̱i̱mi̱re Mukama kyembu kihyaka, mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze hamwei̱ na kitebe kya bantu baamwe bensei̱ barungi.
149.2: Leka I̱saleeri̱ asanyukire Mu̱hangi̱ waamwe, leka bantu ba Sayu̱u̱ni̱ basemererwe hab̯wa mukama waab̯u!
149.3: Leka bacekece nibahaariiza ibara lyamwe, Leka bahi̱i̱me nibahaariiza na bi̱cekere na ndi̱ngi̱di̱!
149.4: Hab̯wakubba Mukama yeesu̱gu̱sya bantu baamwe, bab̯wo bab̯u̱ndaaru̱ alibalwalya kujunwa.
149.5: Leka beesigwa ba Ruhanga basanyukire mu ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, Leka bahi̱i̱me na kusemererwa nibali mu ntabbu zaab̯u.
149.6: Leka kukugiza kwa maani hoi̱ kwa Ruhanga kuruge mu mi̱nwa myab̯u, na mpirima mu mukono myab̯u,
149.7: kuhoora nzi̱go gya mahanga, na kufubira bantu,
149.8: kubboha bakama ba gagwo mahanga njegere, na balemi̱ baago na mpi̱ngo,
149.9: ku̱doosereerye kiragiro kya ncwamwo gya musangu! Kiki kyokyo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya beesigwa ba Ruhanga bensei̱. Haari̱i̱ze Mukama !

150.1: Haari̱i̱ze Mukama ! Haari̱i̱ze Ruhanga mu nnyu̱mba gyamwe, Mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze mwiguru lyamwe linyamaani!
150.2: Mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze hab̯wa bikorwa byamwe binyamaani, Mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha b̯u̱handu̱ b̯wamwe b̯wa maani!
150.3: Mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze na maraka ga ngwara, Mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze na ki̱dongo na ndi̱ngi̱di̱!
150.4: Mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze na bi̱cekere nimukucekeca! Mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze nimukuuta bi̱dongo na ndere!
150.5: Mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze na nsansi zikulira hoi̱! Mu̱mu̱haari̱i̱ze na nsansi zi̱ku̱segenya hoi̱!
150.6: Bintu byensei̱ bili na rwoya bihaariize Mukama ! Haari̱i̱ze Mukama !

1.1: Zizi zoozo Ngeera za Sulumaani, mu̱tabani̱ wa Dau̱di̱, mukama wʼI̱saleeri̱,
1.2: ziha bantu kubba na magezi̱ na ngesu, naakwetegereza bigambu bya magezi̱,
1.3: zeegesya kwetegereza ngesu na bikorwa birungi, bikorwa bi̱ku̱si̱i̱mwa na b̯winganiza.
1.4: Ziha ntwarwa kubba na magezi̱, basigazi na bahala kwetegereza.
1.5: Ali na magezi̱ na kwetegereza, yeetegeerye zizi ngeera, ateeryeho kwega na kulambwa,
1.6: yeetegereze makuru gaazo, bigambu na bi̱koi̱kyo bya magezi̱.
1.7: Ndugiiro gya kwetegereza gili mu ku̱ti̱i̱na Mukama , bei̱tu̱ badoma bagaya magezi̱ na kuhab̯urwa. Kulamba hali Nkori̱ za Bibii
1.8: Mwana wange, weetegeeryanga kulamba kwa bbaawu, kandi otaligumirisana bigambu bya mmaawu.
1.9: Byabbanga nka kondo gya mbabazi̱ ha mu̱twe gwamu, kandi lu̱kwanzi̱ mwi̱coti̱ lyamu.
1.10: Mwana wange, nkori̱ za bibii zaakakwohyanga, otabetegeeryanga.
1.11: B̯ubakakuweeranga, “I̱za tugyende hamwei̱, tulaaliire gi̱tweta, tu̱gwere muceke atali na nsonga,
1.12: tubagoromore nibacaali boomi mu nnyanga, bensei̱, nka bantu bagwi̱ri̱ mu ki̱i̱na,
1.13: tu̱kwi̱za kutunga bintu bya muhendu, twi̱zu̱lye manyu̱mba geetu̱ na bintu bi̱tu̱nyagi̱ri̱,
1.14: i̱za, otwekonyeho, tu̱kwi̱za twensei̱ kubagana bi̱byo bi̱tu̱nyagi̱ri̱.”
1.15: Mwana wange, otaligyenda nabo, otalita kigulu kyamu mu mihanda myab̯u,
1.16: kubba magulu gaab̯u ganguha kukora bibii, gei̱ru̱ka kubbwoma ibbanga.
1.17: Tikigasa kutega mutegu, nnyoni̱ gyokutega nikikuwona.
1.18: Bei̱tu̱ bantu nka bab̯wo bagwa mu mitegu myab̯u bankei, ni̱bei̱twa nkwe zaab̯u bankei.
1.19: Kwokwo yatyo banyagi̱ ba sente babba, sente zi̱banyagi̱ri̱, zibamalaho b̯womi. Wamagezi̱ Akwamiira mu Ngu̱u̱do
1.20: Wamagezi̱ akukungira mu ngu̱u̱do, akwami̱i̱rya hasyanu̱ mu kabbaari.
1.21: Akwetera bantu mu katali, akuweera beecooki̱ri̱ heirembu lya rub̯uga:
1.22: “Nywe ntwarwa, mu̱lyendya b̯udoma kudwa di̱i̱? Nywe bagayi̱ na badoma muliicala nimusuula kwetegereza kudwa di̱i̱?
1.23: I̱ze mwetegeerye kulamba kwange, aleke mbaweere bya ha mutima gwange, nkwi̱za ku̱bolokeerya bi̱nyeegesya.
1.25: mugaya b̯u̱gayi̱ bigambu byange, ti̱mwegwa binkubalamba.
1.27: nnaku b̯u̱zi̱li̱bei̱zi̱ra nka bbuukuulu, kabii b̯ukalibasenga nka kihehu, b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱ na b̯ujune b̯ub̯ulibakwata.
1.28: Mwomwo bali̱nyesengereerya, bei̱tu̱ ti̱ndi̱bei̱ramwo, nab̯u̱bali̱ntoolya, tibalinzagya,
1.29: hab̯wakubba baaswi̱ri̱ kwetegereza, baacwamwo b̯u̱tati̱i̱na Mukama .
1.30: Hab̯wakubba batakeikirize kulamba kwange baagaya na bigambu byange,
1.31: kwokwo baliwonawona hab̯wa ngesu zaab̯u, nibadwa ha kutamwa bikorwa byab̯u.
1.32: Kubba b̯u̱teegwa b̯u̱kwi̱za kwi̱ta basi̱ru̱si̱ru̱, na b̯utafaayo nib̯umalaho badoma,
1.33: bei̱tu̱ b̯uli anyeetegeerya yeicalanga mu b̯u̱si̱nge, atali na kyaku̱ti̱i̱na na b̯ujune.”

2.1: Mwana wange, b̯wolikaikiriza bigambu byange, okata biragiro byange mu mutima gwamu,
2.2: okatega ipokopo lyamu hali bigambu bya magezi̱ okata mutima gwamu kubyetegereza,
2.3: kwokwo b̯wolikasaba magezi̱ okakunga nakukunga mwa kwetegereza,
2.4: b̯woli̱kagatoolya nka feeza okagaheega nka byamuhendu,
2.5: mwomwo olyetegereza kutamwo Mukama ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, noogumbura magezi̱ ga Ruhanga.
2.6: Kubba Mukama agaba magezi̱, mu mu̱nwa gwamwe harugamwo magezi̱ na kwetegereza.
2.7: Abiikira barungi magezi̱, eicala ngab̯u gya batali na kakuu,
2.8: alinda bakakora ha byab̯winganiza naawoneera mihanda mya barungi.
2.9: Mwomwo olyetegereza birungi na b̯winganiza, na byosemereeri̱ kukora,
2.10: hab̯wakubba olifooka mu̱gezi̱, kwetegereza na kusemererwa bi̱li̱i̱za mu mwozo gwamu.
2.11: Kwegyendereza kwakuwoneeranga, kwetegereza kwakulinda,
2.12: nikukujuna mihanda mibiibi, na badulu bakalu̱ma bigambu bibiibi,
2.13: baleki̱ri̱ mihanda mya mananu bakulibatira mu nti̱ti̱,
2.14: banyu̱mi̱rwa kukora kubiibi, nibeegonza mu bibii bitali na mu̱twe na magulu,
2.15: boobo bakora bi̱kyamu̱, banyangesu zibiibi.
2.16: Kwokwo galikujuna mu̱kali̱ mubiibi, hali malaaya wa bigambu bi̱heheeru̱,
2.17: atali mwesigwa hali i̱ba, munyakusuula bi̱yaarahi̱i̱ri̱ mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga,
2.18: kubba nnyu̱mba gyamwe gitwala mu ku̱zi̱ka, muhanda gwamwe kuzumu.
2.19: Bensei̱ bamub̯ungira ti̱bei̱ra, habbe kwi̱ra mu muhanda gwa b̯womi.
2.20: Nahab̯waki̱kyo ohonderenge muhanda gwa barungi, aleke woomeere mu mananu.
2.21: Hab̯wakubba barungi baliicala mu nsi, na batali na kamogo balyomeera.
2.22: Bei̱tu̱ babiibi, Ruhanga alibamalaho mu nsi, na bateegwa alibatemaho.

3.1: Mwana wange, otalyebeera bigambu bi̱nku̱kwegeesya, bei̱tu̱ mutima gwamu gu̱kwi̱zu̱kyenge bi̱nyaaku̱ragi̱i̱ri̱,
3.2: hab̯wakubba bilikuha kwomeera myaka minene, nibikuleetera b̯u̱si̱nge na b̯u̱gu̱u̱da.
3.3: Ngonzi na b̯wesige bitalikurugaho, waabilwalanga mwi̱coti̱ lyamu, waabihandiikanga ha mutima gwamu.
3.4: Mwomwo oli̱si̱i̱mwa nooheeb̯wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga na bantu.
3.5: Weesiganga Mukama na mutima gwamu gwensei̱, otalyesiga magezi̱ gaamu wankei,
3.6: oikirizenge akwehembere hensei̱, ali̱terekereerya malibatire gaamu.
3.7: Otetwalanga kubba mu̱gezi̱, bei̱tu̱ oti̱i̱nenge Mukama , kandi osuulenge kukora bibii.
3.8: Ki̱kyo kyokyo kilibba mu̱bazi̱ hali b̯womi b̯wamu nikikumalaho b̯u̱ru̱mi̱.
3.9: Waatangamwo Mukama ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa noomuha heitungo lyamu, kandi omuhenge makesa ga bilimwa byakubanza.
3.10: Woolikabikora, oli̱zu̱u̱lya bideeru, nibisaaga na kusaaga, noi̱zu̱u̱lya byese byamu bya vi̱i̱no ha mu̱nwa.
3.11: Mwana wange, otagayanga kulamba kwa Mukama , otalimujwaha yaakakuhab̯uranga.
3.12: Hab̯wakubba Mukama ahab̯ura gi̱yendya, nka mu̱byeru̱ kwahab̯ura mwana gi̱yendya.
3.13: Ali na mu̱gi̱sa yogwo aheeb̯wa magezi̱, na yogwo ali na kwetegereza.
3.14: Kubba mugasu gwago gukira feeza magoba gaago gakira ga zaabbu.
3.15: Magezi̱ gakira mahi̱ga ga muhendu. Tihaloho kyokusobora ku̱galengeseni̱a nakyo.
3.16: Galeeta kwomeera ha rubaju lu̱mwei̱, ha lundi nigaleeta b̯u̱gu̱u̱da na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
3.17: B̯womi b̯ulimwo kusemererwa b̯uruga hali magezi̱, mikoore myago myensei̱ mya b̯u̱si̱nge.
3.18: Gei̱sana musaali gwa b̯womi hali bab̯wo baagekwata, yogwo yensei̱ agakwatira ki̱mwei̱ abba na mu̱gi̱sa.
3.19: Mukama , yaahangi̱ri̱ nsi kuraba mu magezi̱, kuraba mu kwetegereza yaahanga iguru.
3.20: Kuraba mu kukenga yaateeri̱ho meezi̱ gakwahukana, na bikaka biguma ndagali̱.
3.21: Mwana wange, magezi̱ na kwetegereza bitalikurugaho, obitenge biicale mu mutima gwamu.
3.22: Bi̱kwi̱za kukuha b̯womi nibibba kyakulwala mwi̱coti̱.
3.23: Mwomwo oliicala mu nsi otali̱naku̱ti̱i̱na, kigulu kyamu tikilikibbala.
3.24: B̯wolilalanga kuhuumulaho, otali̱ti̱i̱nanga, b̯ulo b̯wamu b̯wakunoleranga.
3.25: Otati̱i̱nanga bigwa bi̱taragi̱ri̱ habbe kadi kuhwerekeera kwa babiibi.
3.26: Kubba Mukama alikulinda, talikuleka ku̱gwa mu mutegu.
3.27: Otalituubiranga bantu bali mu b̯wetaagu, kakubba obba nokusobora kubibaha.
3.28: Otaliweera mu̱taahi̱ nti, “Gyenda, wei̱ra mwakya,” b̯u̱b̯wo kandi nooli nakyo.
3.29: Otalidyamwo rukwe mu̱taahi̱, hab̯wakubba eikiririza mu kwicaranwa.
3.30: Otalizongoba na mwi̱ra waamu hataloho b̯ulyo, b̯u̱b̯wo hataloho kibiibi ki̱baku̱koori̱.
3.31: Otalikwatirwa i̱hali̱ bantu banyagi̱ habbe kuhondera mihanda myab̯u.
3.32: Kubba Mukama anoba nkori̱ za bibii bei̱tu̱ barungi abatamwo b̯wesige.
3.33: Akyena maka ga babiibi, ga barungi, agaha mu̱gi̱sa.
3.34: Asekereerya bantu beehaariiza, bei̱tu̱ agiira mbabazi̱ bab̯u̱ndaaru̱.
3.35: Ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kitumbula bagezi̱ bei̱tu̱ b̯udoma b̯uleeta muswaru.

4.1: Baana bange, mwetegeeryenge kulamba kwa bbaaweenyu̱, muteho mutima aleke mubbe na kwetegereza,
4.2: hab̯wakubba ndimukubaha magezi̱, mutalekanga kwegesya kwange.
4.3: Nincaali na bbaabba nka musigazi muto, nindi mwana nyaki̱mwei̱ wa mmaama, mugonze,
4.4: bbaabba yanzegeseerye yambwera, “Kwatiranga ki̱mwei̱ bigambu byange, okwatenge biragiro byange, mwomwo olyomeera,
4.5: Tunga magezi̱, obbe na kwetegereza, otalibyebeera, otalibirugaho.
4.6: Otaligagumirisana, galikulinda, waagolokyanga ngonzi, galikuha b̯u̱si̱nge.
4.7: Ki̱handu̱, tunga magezi̱, nab̯wotalibba na kintu, obbenge na kwetegereza.
4.8: Wendyanga magezi̱ galikufoora wa maani, b̯woligab̯umbatira gali̱ku̱tu̱ngi̱sya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
4.9: Galikulwalya kondo gya byakyo, galikuha ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.”
4.10: Weegwa mwana wange, ikiriza binkukuweera, obite mu mutima, mwomwo olyomeera.
4.11: Nkwegeseerye bintu bya magezi̱, nkwolokeerye mihanda mya mananu.
4.12: Tihaloho kilyekiika mu muhanda gwamu b̯wolibba nookwi̱ru̱ka, toli̱ki̱i̱bbala.
4.13: Kwatira ki̱mwei̱ bi̱bakwegeseerye, otalibileka, waabilindanga, kubba byobyo b̯womi b̯wamu.
4.14: Otagyenda mu muhanda gwa babiibi, habbe kuhunguuka hali nkori̱ za bibii.
4.15: Gu̱gwo muhanda, ogwehalenge, okwatenge gwamu, niweegyendera.
4.16: Babiibi tibalaala batakoori̱ kibii, tibeebbaka ku̱doosya bahu̱tei̱ze muntu.
4.17: Kubba banolerwa bidyo bya b̯ubiibi, na maaci ga b̯u̱nyagi̱.
4.18: Bei̱tu̱ muhanda gwa barungi gwisana kyererezi̱ kya mambya, ki̱syani̱a ku̱doosya b̯u̱kereeri̱ ki̱mwei̱.
4.19: Muhanda gwa babiibi gwisana nti̱ti̱ gyeitumbi, b̯ubakiibbala, tibeega ki̱baki̱i̱bbali̱i̱rye.
4.20: Mwana wange, taho mwozo gwamu ha bigambu binkukuweera, otege ipokopo weegwe ngeera zange.
4.21: Otalibyebeera, oicalenge noobi̱i̱zu̱ka, obitenge ha mutima gwamu,
4.22: kubba babigumbura bibaha b̯womi, ni̱bi̱honi̱a mubiri.
4.23: Weegyenderezanga bi̱byo byokuteekereza, kubba byobyo ndugiiro gya b̯womi.
4.24: Weehalanga lu̱nyu̱mi̱yo lu̱ku̱habi̱sya, otabazanga bigambu bibiibi.
4.26: Teekerezanga, otakakoori̱ kyokwendya kukora, mwomwo byokukora bilidwereera.
4.27: Weehala bibii, olibatirenge harungi, otalihuguka b̯umoso rundi ha gwab̯udyo.

5.1: Mwana wange, taho mutima ha magezi̱ gange, otege ipokopo lyamu weetegeerye kwetegereza kwange,
5.2: aleke weege kubba mwegyenderezi̱, niweegyendereza bigambu byokubaza.
5.3: Kubba mu̱nwa gwa mu̱kali̱ mwenzi̱ gu̱toonya b̯uhooki, na bigambu byamwe biheheera nka maku̱ta,
5.4: bei̱tu̱ hei̱nyu̱ma aluluha nka ndulu, asala nka mpirima, giwa b̯wogi b̯ubiri.
5.5: Magulu gaamwe gatwala mu ku̱zi̱ka, mihanda myamwe mi̱si̱ri̱mu̱ra kuzumu.
5.6: Eicala kwahi mu muhanda gwa b̯womi, yenjeera, atali na ki̱yeegi̱ri̱.
5.7: Kale nu baana bange, mu̱nzegwe, mutaliruga hali bigambu binkubaweera.
5.8: Mu̱kali̱ yogwo mu̱mwehalenge, na mulyangu gwamwe mu̱tali̱gwesu̱maho,
5.9: b̯umutamwehale, byakwekamba kwenyu̱ bilitwalwa bandi, mu̱li̱kwera mu ngalu za batemu.
5.10: Banyamahanga balitwala itungu lyenyu̱, kwekamba kwenyu̱ ni̱ku̱gu̱u̱dahaarya bandi!
5.11: Hooli̱kwera olibba nookutaaga, waanu̱ki̱ri̱ kudwereera ki̱mwei̱ kwi̱ku̱ha.
5.12: Olikoba yati, “Wona nka ku̱nnyaaswi̱ri̱ kulambwa! Wona mutima gwange nka ku̱gwagayi̱ri̱ kuhab̯urwa!
5.13: Ntakeegwe beegesa bange ntakateho mutima kukwata bi̱bambwerenge.
5.14: Nnyeezagi̱i̱rye mu kabii kanyamaani mu mei̱so ga bantu ba Ruhanga.”
5.15: Mu̱kali̱ waamu abba nkei̱zu̱ba lya meezi̱ gei̱cu̱mi̱, Weewe wankei onywenge meezi̱ gei̱zu̱ba lyamu, weewe wankei onywenge gakukulukuta.
5.16: Hab̯waki misu myamu mikulukuutira hensei̱, na meezi̱ gaamu gahetera mu ngu̱u̱do?
5.17: I̱zu̱ba lyamu lili lyamu wankei, tilili lyakunywa na bandi.
5.18: Mukama alihe mu̱gi̱sa, weegonzenge na mu̱kali̱ wa mu b̯usigazi b̯wamu,
5.19: murungi nka mparaaki, wa mbabazi̱ nka mu̱nsi̱hi̱, salaka gyamwe gyaku̱hu̱u̱mu̱lyanga biro byensei̱.
5.20: Mwana wange, mu̱kali̱ mwenzi̱, weegombi̱ri̱ waaki? Hab̯waki ob̯u̱mbati̱ri̱ mu̱kali̱ atali waamu?
5.21: Kubba Mukama , awona byensei̱ byokora, yeekebeeja b̯uli muhanda gwa muntu.
5.22: Muntu akwatwa bibiibi byamwe, kandi abbohwa miguha mya bibii byamwe.
5.23: B̯uteerinda b̯u̱kwi̱za ku̱mwi̱ti̱sya, hab̯wa b̯udoma b̯wamaani akwi̱za kuhwerekeera.

6.1: Mwana wange, b̯wolitaho musimbo hab̯wa wondi, rundi okabba mwema wa mwi̱zei̱zi̱,
6.2: olibba okwati̱i̱rwe kweraga kwamu, weebbohi̱ri̱ na kanwa kaamu.
6.3: Kale nu mwana wange, hondera magezi̱ gankukuha, weejune, hab̯wakubba oli mu ngalu zaamwe. Gyenda weehombokereerye, omwesengereerye!
6.5: Weejuna, nka mparaaki gi̱teesu̱ki̱ri̱i̱ri̱ mu̱hi̱gi̱, nka ki̱nyoni̱ ki̱teesu̱ki̱ri̱ ha mutegu.
6.6: Wonera hali nkakabi, we mugarei, weetegereza nka kuzikora, obbe mu̱gezi̱!
6.7: Tizigira mwebemberi̱, habbe mu̱keberi̱, rundi mu̱lemi̱,
6.8: bei̱tu̱ zeebiikira byetaagu byazo ha makesa, nizisorooza bidyo mu kyanda.
6.9: Ee bei̱tu̱, wee mugarei, olilaala kudwa di̱i̱? Oli̱si̱si̱mu̱ka mu b̯ulo di̱i̱? B̯wolikoba yati,
6.10: “Kandaaleho kadooli̱, kandindeho kadooli̱, kammpu̱u̱mu̱u̱lyeho mikono kadooli̱,”
6.11: mwomwo nnaku zi̱li̱kwi̱zi̱ra nka mwi̱bi̱, ni̱zi̱ku̱ru̱mba nka mutemu.
6.12: Muntu mugwagwa kandi mubiibi eicala naagobyagobya,
6.13: ku̱mi̱gami̱gi̱ri̱i̱rya mei̱so, ku̱zi̱gazi̱gi̱i̱zya magulu, na ngalu mwa kwebbumbiira.
6.14: Mutima gwamwe guteekereza mu b̯ubii, naaku̱cu̱u̱ki̱ri̱i̱rya bantu.
6.15: Kyokyo ali̱ru̱mb̯wa bizib̯u atakwega, mu kasu̱mi̱ kadooli̱ alibba acwacwani̱ki̱ri̱.
6.16: Haloho bintu mukaaga Mukama bi̱yaanobi̱ri̱, bili nka musanju byamuziro:
6.17: mei̱so ga marara, kalimi ka b̯u̱gobya, ngalu gibbwoma ibbanga,
6.18: mutima guteekerereza mu nkwe, magulu ganguha kukora kibii,
6.19: mu̱kei̱so abaza byab̯u̱gobya, na mutab̯ura makaa. Kwehala Mu̱kali̱ Mwenzi̱
6.20: Mwana wange, weegwanga bbaawu byakukuragira, ohonderenge maawu bi̱yaakwegeserye.
6.21: Bigambu byab̯u obitenge mu mutima gwamu, obibbohenge mwi̱coti̱ lyamu.
6.22: Byakwehemberanga mu kulibata kwamu, byakulindanga weebbaki̱ri̱, byakulambanga osi̱si̱mu̱ki̱ri̱.
6.23: Kubba biragiro byab̯u, taara, kwegesya kwab̯u, kyererezi̱, na bibahab̯ura, muhanda gwa b̯womi.
6.24: Obikwatenge bilikujuna mu̱kali̱ mubiibi, na b̯ugambu b̯wa mu̱kali̱ mwenzi̱.
6.25: Otalimwegomba b̯urungi b̯wa mubiri, atali̱ku̱du̱u̱pa na mei̱so gaakulelembuka.
6.26: Kubba malaaya atoolya ki̱yaagu̱li̱sya kayaadya, bei̱tu̱ mulaala mukaa wondi abba yeeheeri̱yo ku̱kwa.
6.27: Naani yaab̯u̱mbati̱ri̱ mworo mu salaka, ngoye zaamwe zaalema kuhya?
6.28: Naani yaali̱beeti̱ ha makala gakwokya, magulu gaamwe gaalema kuhya?
6.29: Kwokwo abba yatyo mulaala mukaa wondi, yensei̱ akumweha alifubirwa.
6.30: Mwi̱bi̱ yaakuganywirwa, kubba nzala gyogyo gi̱mwi̱bi̱sya.
6.31: Bei̱tu̱ b̯wakwatwa, ali̱ha mirundi musanju, nab̯ukimalaho itungu lyamwe lyensei̱.
6.32: Mudulu mwenzi̱, abba atali na magezi̱, abba naakwezi̱ta yankei.
6.33: Bihuta na muswaru biicala mpeera gyamwe, Kihemu kyamwe tikilimalika.
6.34: Hab̯wa mei̱ha i̱ba mu̱kali̱ alikwatwa b̯usungu, naahoora nzi̱go atali na kisa.
6.35: Talikiriza b̯u̱li̱hi̱ b̯wensei̱, nab̯u̱bali̱teeryaho b̯u̱li̱hi̱, tib̯ulimalaho b̯usungu.

7.1: Mwana wange, kwatanga bigambu byange otalyebeera biragiro byange.
7.2: Obikwatenge mwa kwomeera, nka mboni̱ gya li̱i̱so olindenge bi̱nkwegesya,
7.3: obyebbohenge ha ngalu zaamu, obihandiike ha mutima gwamu.
7.4: Oweerenge magezi̱, “Weewe nyakeetu̱,” weetanga kwetegereza mwijuwo,
7.5: bilikujuna mukaa wondi, na yogwo mwohya.
7.6: Haloho kiro ki̱nyeemereeri̱ ku di̱ri̱sa nyaalingiira hanzei,
7.7: nyaaweeni̱ho basigazi, ntwarwa, nyeetegerezamwo omwei̱, atakabbe na magezi̱,
7.8: naakulibalibata heigemero lya ngu̱u̱do, heehi̱ na nnyu̱mba gya mu̱kali̱, naakugyenda wu yogwo mu̱kali̱
7.9: joojolo, kaswekusweku, b̯wi̱re nib̯ukubbumba, mu kati̱ti̱.
7.10: Wona mu̱kali̱ ku̱yaamu̱tangi̱ri̱i̱ri̱, alweri̱ nka malaaya, ku̱mwohya.
7.12: nka hati̱, omwegwera ku ru̱gu̱u̱do, ha katali, naakutegatega.)
7.13: B̯u̱yaakaweeni̱ musigazi, amub̯umbatira amunwegera, amu̱ku̱ndu̱li̱ra mei̱so amuweera:
7.14: “Mmpongi̱ri̱yo deeru kyonzira kya b̯u̱si̱nge, nyaadoosereerya bi̱byo bi̱nyeeragi̱ri̱,
7.15: kyokyo nnzi̱ri̱ kukutangiira, nceeri̱ ni̱nku̱toolya, nkwagi̱i̱rye!
7.16: Ntabbu gyange ngyali̱ri̱ho suuka zirungi, ziwa rangi̱, zi̱nyi̱ri̱ru̱ za Mi̱si̱ri̱.
7.17: Ngi̱fu̱hi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ maku̱ta gaku̱wu̱nya kurungi, b̯ubbaani, migaaju na bi̱b̯u̱nya bindi.
7.18: I̱za twegonze i̱jolo lyensei̱, twolokyengane ngonzi.
7.20: yaatwalageeni̱ sente zinene, akwi̱ra i̱nyu̱ma lya sabbi̱i̱ti̱ ibiri.”
7.22: Nahaahwo musigazi yaamuhondere, nka nnumi gikutwalwa mwibagiro, nka mu̱nsi̱hi̱ gu̱sambi̱ri̱ mutegu,
7.23: ku̱doosya gu̱tu̱ti̱i̱rwe nigukakwa, nka ki̱nyoni̱ ki̱ku̱zeenyera mu mutegu, ti̱yeegi̱ri̱ kwakugyenda ku̱kwa.
7.24: Kale nu baana bange, mu̱nyeetegeerye, mu̱kwate bigambu binkubaweera.
7.25: Mu̱kali̱ yogwo atalibahugura mitima, mutalihondera mihanda myamwe,
7.26: hab̯wakubba eti̱si̱i̱rye badulu banene, tibasobora kubabalwa.
7.27: Nnyu̱mba gyamwe gi̱si̱ru̱mu̱ra kuzumu, cali hali bi̱si̱i̱ka bya Lu̱ku̱u̱.

8.1: Mwegwe, wamagezi̱ kwalimukukoba! Muhondere, Mwetegerezi̱ byalimu kwami̱i̱rya!
8.2: Hakyendi̱ ha rubamba ha ngu̱u̱do, ha masangananzira hooho yeemereeri̱.
8.3: Heirembu mu mei̱so ga rub̯uga ha rubaju lwa mulyangu, akukoba yati,
8.4: “Nywe bantu nywe, bandimukuweera, nywe baana ba bantu banku̱pompogeerya.
8.5: Nywe ntwarwa, mwecwerengemwo, nywe badomadoma, mwetegereze.
8.6: Mwegwe mbaweere bya mugasu, bigambu bimbaza biicala birungi.
8.7: Kubba kalimi kange kabaza mananu, mu̱nwa gwange guzira b̯u̱gobya.
8.8: Mbaza bigambu bya mananu bisa, bitalimwo b̯u̱gobya, habbe kwehinduhindula.
8.9: Hali mwetegerezi̱ byensei̱ bimubbeera mananu, bi̱si̱i̱mwa b̯u̱si̱i̱mwa ali na magezi̱.
8.10: Mwegombe bi̱babeegeseerye kukira feeza, na magezi̱ kukira zaabbu gi̱sengejeerwe,
8.11: hab̯wakubba magezi̱ gakira mahi̱ga ga muhendu, tihaloho kigeerenga.
8.12: “Gya Magezi̱, nsisana nkeicala na Mweri̱ndi̱, nyeetegeri̱i̱ze nyaatunga kucwamwo.
8.13: Ku̱ti̱i̱na Mukama kwokwo kunoba kibii, nnoba myepanku na kwetembatembya, ngesu zibiibi na mbaza gibiibi.
8.14: Gyagya mpab̯ura kandi mpanulira kurungi, mba na kwetegereza na maani.
8.15: Nntaho bakama nibafuga, balemi̱ nibataho biragiro birungi.
8.16: Bahandu̱ bafuga hab̯wange, babbe balemi̱ na baramu̱ri̱ ba mu nsi.
8.17: Aku̱nzolokya ngonzi nagya mwolokya ngonzi, yogwo aku̱ntoolya alinzagya.
8.18: B̯u̱gu̱u̱da na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa byange, gya ngaba mi̱gi̱sa neitungu litamalika.
8.19: Bintu bingaba bikira zaabbu b̯urungi, bikiira ki̱mwei̱ na feeza gi̱sengeeje.
8.20: Bikorwa byange biicala hasyanu̱, ngyendera mu mananu,
8.21: bakunzendya mbaha itungu, ni̱beezu̱u̱lya bideeru byab̯u.
8.22: “ Mukama yampangi̱ri̱ atakahangi̱ri̱ nsi, mu bi̱yaahangi̱ri̱ kadei gyagya abanza.
8.23: Mu biro bya kadei, nyaabu̱mbi̱i̱rwe, mu kubanza, nsi gi̱takabbeeri̱ho.
8.26: nsi gi̱takahangi̱i̱rwe na misiri myaho, habbe kadi cuucu gya mu nsi.
8.27: Kannyaaloho, b̯uyaali nakutaho iguru, b̯u̱yaateeri̱ho mitaanu myeitaka,
8.28: b̯uyaali nakubamba bikaka hakyendi̱, b̯u̱yaatati̱i̱rye misu mya kuzumu,
8.29: b̯uyaali nakutaho mitaanu myeitaka, aleke meezi̱ gasambire hayaagaragi̱i̱ri̱, nab̯u̱yaateeri̱ho mi̱si̱nge mya nsi.
8.30: Nnyaali mu̱ku̱gu̱ ha rubaju lwamwe, yei̱calengi̱ asemererwe hab̯wange, na gya ninsemererwa hab̯wamwe.
8.31: Ndyegonza mu nsi gyange, ninsemererwa na bantu baamwo.
8.32: “Kale nu hataati̱, baana bange mu̱nzegwe! Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bahondera kuhab̯urwa kwange.
8.34: Ali na mu̱gi̱sa anzegwa, eicala ali̱ngi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ irembu lyange, ali̱ndi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ mulyangu gwange.
8.35: Kubba abba nagya abba na b̯womi, Mukama amugiira mbabazi̱
8.36: bei̱tu̱ atali nagya yeeru̱mya yankei, bensei̱ bannoba babba ni̱bakwendya ku̱kwa.”

9.1: Wamagezi̱ abi̱mbi̱ri̱ nnyu̱mba gyamwe, yaagiteera mpagi̱ musanju.
9.2: Ei̱ti̱ri̱ kisolo kyamwe ahyangi̱i̱rye maaci gaamwe yaati̱mba na kiihuru.
9.3: Atu̱mi̱ri̱ bazaana baamwe, beete bantu mu bicweka binyamaani mu rub̯uga.
9.4: “Akali ntwarwa, ei̱ze haha!” Mpwi̱se amu̱weereeri̱ yati,
9.5: “I̱za, odye bidyo bi̱nti̱mbi̱ri̱, onywe maaci gampyagi̱i̱rye.
9.6: Mu̱leke b̯udoma aleke mwomeere, Libata na bakwetegereza.”
9.7: Acoomera mu̱gayi̱, yeesyomera bi̱lu̱mo, ahab̯ura mubiibi, yeeleetera bihuta.
9.8: Otahab̯uranga mu̱gayi̱, kubba alikunoba. Ahab̯ura mu̱gezi̱, b̯ufooka b̯u̱nywani̱.
9.9: B̯wolamba mu̱gezi̱, eicala na wa magezi̱, kwegesya murungi, ateeryaho ha ki̱yeegi̱ri̱.
9.10: Ndugiiro gya magezi̱ gili mu ku̱ti̱i̱na Mukama , kwega Mu̱syanu̱ Akiira Ki̱mwei̱, kubba kwetegereza.
9.11: Kubba na magezi̱ ki̱teeryaho biro bya kwomeera, ki̱teerya na b̯unene b̯wa myaka mya b̯womi.
9.12: B̯wobba na magezi̱ obba weegasi̱i̱ri̱, b̯wogagaya ni̱weeru̱mya wankei.
9.13: Mu̱kali̱ mudoma eicala naatokatooka, tagira ngesu, tali na ki̱yeegi̱ri̱.
9.14: Eicaara ha mulyagu gwamwe, ha ntebe mu kiikaru, hakyendi̱ mu rub̯uga,
9.15: niyeetanga bakurabaho, bali mu mihanda myab̯u nti,
9.16: “Ntwarwa gyensei̱ gi̱i̱ze haha.” Aweera mpwi̱se yati,
9.17: “Meezi̱ gei̱be googo gamala nnyoota, na bidyo bibadya mu nsita, byobyo binola!”
9.18: Bei̱tu̱ bo badulu tibeega nti, hali̱yo b̯uzire, bagenyi̱ baamwe beicala kuzumu.

10.1: Ngeera za Sulumaani: Mwana mu̱gezi̱ aha bbaawe kusemererwa, bei̱tu̱ mudoma ali̱rya mmaawe.
10.2: Itungu lya b̯u̱gobya tiligasa, bei̱tu̱ mananu gahoni̱a lu̱ku̱u̱.
10.3: Mukama taleka barungi kudiib̯wa nzala bei̱tu̱ babiibi tibali na kyalibaha.
10.4: Ngalu gya mugarei gileeta nnaku bei̱tu̱ gya mwekambi̱ b̯u̱gu̱u̱da.
10.5: Mwana mu̱gezi̱ akesa mu kyanda, bei̱tu̱ mwolo, aleeta muswaru ha makesa.
10.6: Barungi baheeb̯wa mu̱gi̱sa, bei̱tu̱ kanwa ka mubiibi kabbumbiira b̯wemi̱.
10.7: Murungi bamwi̱zu̱ki̱ra mi̱gi̱sa myamwe, bei̱tu̱ ibara lya mubiibi li̱zi̱ka b̯u̱zi̱ki̱.
10.8: Mutima gwa magezi̱ gukwata bi̱bagu̱ragi̱i̱ri̱, bei̱tu̱ ku̱logozona kwa mudoma kulimalika.
10.9: Alibatira mu mananu, abba na b̯u̱si̱nge, bei̱tu̱ akwebi̱si̱i̱ra azooka b̯u̱zooki̱.
10.10: Mwi̱ta li̱i̱so mwa kubbumba mananu, aleeta b̯ujune, na aku̱logozona bya b̯udoma ali̱zi̱ka.
10.11: Kanwa ka murungi keisana musu gwa b̯womi, bei̱tu̱ ka mubiibi kabbumbiira b̯wemi̱.
10.12: Nnobi̱ zileeta izongobo, bei̱tu̱ ngonzi zibbumba bibiibi byensei̱.
10.13: Bigambu bya mu̱kengeb̯u̱ bibbamwo magezi̱, bei̱tu̱ mpwi̱se awonawona na mubbeere.
10.14: Kideeru kya bagezi̱, kwegeseb̯wa kwab̯u, bei̱tu̱ kanwa ka mudoma kaleeta kuhwerekeera.
10.15: Itungu lya mu̱gu̱u̱da lili nka rub̯uga lwamwe lunyamaani, bei̱tu̱ banaku bahwerekeera mu b̯usege b̯wab̯u.
10.16: Mpeera gya bikorwa birungi, b̯womi, bei̱tu̱ babiibi bagoboora mu kukora bibii.
10.17: Akwata bi̱baamu̱ragi̱i̱ri̱, abba mu muhanda gwa b̯womi, bei̱tu̱ akugaya kulamba, mu̱habya.
10.18: Ali na nzi̱ngo mu mutima, tabaza mananu, mudoma akora gwa kulibatya rugambu.
10.19: Mu bigambu binene, kibiibi tikilemwamwo, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gezi̱ yeerinda kalimi kaamwe.
10.20: Bigambu bya murungi feeza, bei̱tu̱ mutima gwa mubiibi tigugasa.
10.21: Bigambu bya murungi bigasira banene, bei̱tu̱ badoma bei̱twa b̯utakenga.
10.22: Mu̱gi̱sa gwa Mukama guleeta itungu, tigubbaho b̯ujune b̯wensei̱.
10.23: Mazeenyi̱zeenyi̱ mudoma yeezagya naakukora kibii, bei̱tu̱ akwetegereza anyu̱mi̱rwa kukora bya magezi̱.
10.24: Kya mubiibi akwehala, kilimudwaho, na barungi bibeegomba, byabaheeb̯wanga.
10.25: B̯ujune b̯wisana kihehu, kikuuta babiibi, bei̱tu̱ barungi beicalaho biro byensei̱.
10.26: Mugarei asaaliza mu̱mu̱tu̱mi̱, nka ndwa wa musinyi kub̯ulumira, rundi nka mwi̱ca kugusiiha mei̱so.
10.27: Mu ku̱ti̱i̱na Mukama heicalamwo kwomeera, bei̱tu̱ mubiibi agira biro bi̱dooli̱.
10.28: Ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kuleetera barungi kusemererwa, bei̱tu̱ babiibi balindiira bibataliwonaho.
10.29: Mukama yooyo b̯wi̱ru̱ki̱ro b̯wa barungi, bei̱tu̱ nkori̱ za bibii, ali̱zi̱hwerekeerya.
10.30: Tihaloho alidemula barungi, bei̱tu̱ babiibi tibeicala mu nsi.
10.31: Kanwa ka mu̱gezi̱ kabaza bya magezi̱, bei̱tu̱ kalimi ka mubiibi balikasala.
10.32: Barungi babaza bigambu bikwikirizib̯wa, bei̱tu̱ mu̱nwa gubiibi gu̱hu̱lu̱kya bikusaaliza.

11.1: Mukama anoba bi̱pi̱myo bi̱tadoori̱, bei̱tu̱ asi̱i̱ma bi̱doori̱.
11.2: Hei̱nyu̱ma wa myepanku, hei̱zaho nsoni̱, bei̱tu̱ mu kub̯undaara halimwo magezi̱.
11.3: Bananu Beega mu̱li̱ngo gwa kukora bi̱doori̱, bei̱tu̱ bateesigwa, balihwerekeera.
11.4: Itungu tililimugasa ha kiro kya kumucwera musangu, bei̱tu̱ b̯urungi b̯wa mutima b̯ulimujuna lu̱ku̱u̱.
11.5: Muntu murungi yeega mu̱li̱ngo gwa kukora bi̱dooori̱, bei̱tu̱ mubiibi yeeletera ku̱zi̱ka.
11.6: Barungi bajunwa hab̯wa kukora mananu, bei̱tu̱ bateesigwa balikwatirwa mu bibeegomba.
11.7: Mubiibi akwa na byeni̱hi̱zo byamwe, na bi̱yani̱hi̱rengi̱ kutunga ni̱bi̱syera.
11.8: B̯unanu wa muntu b̯umujuna bizib̯u, bei̱tu̱ ni̱bi̱i̱ri̱ra babiibi.
11.9: Kanwa kaateegi̱ri̱ Ruhanga kahwerekeereerya bataahi̱, bei̱tu̱ kwetegereza kwa barungi kubajunambe.
11.10: Mi̱gi̱sa mya barungi mi̱bi̱mba rub̯uga, ku̱kwa kwa babiibi kuleeta kusemererwa.
11.11: Barungi baleetera rub̯uga kuhanda, bei̱tu̱ bya babiibi babaza biluletera kuhwerekeera.
11.12: Mugaya bei̱ra abba mudoma, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gezi̱ yeerinda kalimi kaamwe.
11.13: Warugambu yensei̱ alu̱mbu̱u̱la nsita, bei̱tu̱ mwesigwa agibbumbirambe.
11.14: Ihanga b̯ulitabba na mwebemberi̱ mu̱gezi̱ lihwerekeerambe, bei̱tu̱ hali bakuhab̯ura banene habbaho b̯u̱si̱nge.
11.15: Yemerera munyamahanga abba nakweletera bizub̯u, bei̱tu̱ asuula kumuha b̯wema abba na b̯u̱si̱nge.
11.16: Mu̱kali̱ wa mbabazi̱ aheeb̯wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, bei̱tu̱ badulu batemu batunga itungu lisa.
11.17: Mudulu wa mbabazi̱, asagirwa mbabazi̱ zaamwe, bei̱tu̱ babiibi beeleetera bizub̯u.
11.18: Itungu lya mubiibi tilicalaho, bei̱tu̱ akora birungi atunga bi̱mu̱semereeri̱.
11.19: Akwatira ki̱mwei̱ kukora bi̱doori̱ alyomeera, bei̱tu̱ aku̱toolya b̯ubiibi ali̱zi̱ka.
11.20: Mukama anoba bateekereza bibiibi, bei̱tu̱ yendya bakora birungi.
11.21: Mu mananu babiibi balifubirwa, bei̱tu̱ barungi, kabii tikalibadwaho.
11.22: Ndengeeti̱ gitali na ngesu, giisana mpi̱ta gya zaabbu mu nni̱ndo gya mpunu.
11.23: Barungi bibeegomba bibaleetera birungi, bei̱tu̱ bya babiibi bani̱hi̱ra bibarugirwamwo kubakwatirwa ki̱ni̱ga.
11.24: Haloho agaba na b̯wenda naateeryaho b̯u̱teerya itungu lyamwe, wondi naanakuhara hab̯wa b̯wi̱mi̱ b̯wamwe.
11.25: Ali mwenda ali̱gu̱du̱hara, na akonyera bantu yoodede alikonyerwa.
11.26: Abi̱sa bidyo bi̱bakwendya kugula, bamubaza kubiibi, bei̱tu̱ atundira habakubyetagira aheeb̯wa mu̱gi̱sa.
11.27: Atoolya birungi yaagya birungi, bei̱tu̱ b̯ubiibi b̯wi̱zi̱ra aku̱b̯u̱toolya.
11.28: Yeesiga b̯u̱gu̱u̱da b̯wamwe alikunkumuka nka bikoora bi̱hotoku̱, bei̱tu̱ barungi balyomeera nka bikoora bibisi.
11.29: Atuntuza maka gaamwe, tali na kyalitunga, kandi mudoma afugwa mu̱gezi̱ biro byensei̱.
11.30: B̯urungi b̯uleeta b̯womi, mu̱gezi̱ asika mitima mya bantu.
11.31: Barungi bakabba na mpeera gyab̯u mumu mu nsi, na nkori̱ za bibii zi̱kwi̱za kufubirwa!

12.1: Yendya kwega, anywana magezi̱, bei̱tu̱ anoba kuhab̯urwa abba mudoma.
12.2: Mukama asi̱i̱ma barungi, bei̱tu̱ anoba bakora bya b̯u̱jeemu̱.
12.3: B̯ubiibi tib̯uleeta b̯u̱si̱nge, bei̱tu̱ murungi abba mu̱si̱gi̱ku̱.
12.4: Mu̱kali̱ mwegyenderezi̱ aheesya i̱ba ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, bei̱tu̱ mu̱hemu̱ri̱ eisana kookoro mu maku̱ha gaamwe.
12.5: Biteekerezu bya barungi byolokya b̯winganiza, bei̱tu̱ kuhab̯ura kwa babiibi b̯ubba b̯u̱gobya
12.6: Babiibi babaza bya b̯wi̱ti̱, bei̱tu̱ kubaza kwa barungi kujuna bantu.
12.7: Babiibi bahwerekeera ni̱basyeraho, bei̱tu̱ nnyu̱mba gya barungi gilyomeera.
12.8: Ali na magezi̱ asi̱i̱mwambe, bei̱tu̱ wa biteekerezu bibiibi agayuwambe
12.9: Kirungi kub̯undaara nooli na kyoli nakyo, kukira kwehaariiza otali na kyakudya.
12.10: Muntu murungi mutima agumaara ha bisolo byamwe, bei̱tu̱ mubiibi tabba na mbabazi̱ nabyo.
12.11: Akwekamba kulima abba na bidyo binene, bei̱tu̱ ei̱ru̱kya bitakugasa abba mudoma.
12.12: Babiibi tibabba na b̯u̱si̱gi̱ki̱ro, bei̱tu̱ barungi babba basi̱gi̱ku̱ nka ikolo lya musaali.
12.13: Kanwa kabiibi kabonebonesya mukamako, bei̱tu̱ murungi akena kabii.
12.14: Bigambu birungi bi̱si̱i̱mwa na birungi, bikorwa birungi biheeb̯wa mpeera gyabyo.
12.15: Mudoma ateekereza b̯uli byakora bibba bi̱doori̱, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gezi̱ yeetegeerya bibakumuhab̯ura.
12.16: Ki̱ni̱ga kya mudoma ti̱kyebi̱sa, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gezi̱ baalu̱ma nagaya b̯u̱gayi̱.
12.17: Mu̱kei̱so wa mazima aleetaho b̯winganiza, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gobya abaza b̯u̱gobya.
12.18: Bigambu bya b̯ugwagwa bi̱tu̱u̱ta nka mpirima, bei̱tu̱ kalimi ka mu̱gezi̱ kaleeta kuhona.
12.19: B̯u̱gobya b̯wicalaho b̯wi̱re b̯u̱dooli̱, bei̱tu̱ mazima biro na biro.
12.20: Nkori̱ za bibii zitekereza mu kukora bibiibi, bei̱tu̱ bateekereza birungi babba na kusemererwa.
12.21: Murungi talidweb̯waho kabii, bei̱tu̱ babiibi beicala nibawonawona.
12.22: Mukama annoba babaza b̯u̱gobya, kyonkei asi̱i̱ma bananu.
12.23: Mu̱gezi̱ ti̱yolokya kwetegereza kwamwe, bei̱tu̱ mudoma ararangya b̯udoma b̯wamwe.
12.24: Kwekamba kufoora bantu kubba beebemberi̱, b̯ugarei nib̯ubaha kubba beiru.
12.25: Kwelalikiira kuleetera muntu b̯ujune, bei̱tu̱ bigambu birungi bimuha kusemererwa.
12.26: Murungi aterekereerya bei̱ra baamwe, bei̱tu̱ mubiibi abahabya b̯u̱habya.
12.27: Mwolo alemwa kadi ku̱ti̱mba byamwe, bei̱tu̱ mwekambi̱ atunga b̯inene.
12.28: Muhanda gwa bananu gutwala mu b̯womi, hatali mu lu̱ku̱u̱.

13.1: Mwana mu̱gezi̱ yeegwa bbaawe byakumulamba, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gayi̱ ti̱yeegwa.
13.2: Murungi byabaza bi̱mu̱heesya birungi, bei̱tu̱ kwegomba kwa mubiibi b̯wicala b̯ulemu.
13.3: Akwerinda kalimi alinda b̯womi b̯wamwe, bei̱tu̱ muhonyola mu̱nwa yeeleetera kabii.
13.4: Bantu bagarei bendya bintu kandi tibabitunga, bei̱tu̱ bakukora na maani batunga byensei̱ bi̱bakwendya.
13.5: Muntu murungi anoba b̯u̱gobya, bei̱tu̱ babiibi bakora bikuhemura kandi bikuswaza.
13.6: B̯urungi b̯ulinda mwinganiza, bei̱tu̱ kibii ki̱hwerekereerya babiibi.
13.7: Haloho yeefoora mu̱gu̱u̱da naali munaku, na yeefoora munaku naali mu̱gu̱u̱da.
13.8: Mu̱gu̱u̱da acungurwa itungu lyamwe, bei̱tu̱ tihabbaho aku̱ti̱i̱ni̱sya munaku.
13.9: Barungi beisana taara gikwaka ni̱gi̱syani̱a bei̱tu̱ babiibi beisana taara gi̱ku̱lu̱mi̱i̱ra.
13.10: Myehembu mileeta b̯ujune, bei̱tu̱ eikiriza kuhab̯urwa abba mu̱gezi̱.
13.11: Itungu lya b̯wangu b̯wangu limalika b̯wangu, bei̱tu̱ li̱i̱za mpula lyeteeryaho b̯weteerya.
13.12: Ku̱ni̱hi̱ra mu kitaabbeho ki̱hi̱mbi̱sya mutima, bei̱tu̱ kutunga kyokwendya gubba musaali gwa b̯womi.
13.13: Atalambwa yeeleetera b̯ujune, bei̱tu̱ ahondera biragiro, aheeb̯wa mpeera.
13.14: Kwegesya kwa bagezi̱, gubba musu gwa b̯womi, gukutanga ku̱gwa mu mitegu mya lu̱ku̱u̱.
13.15: Kwetegereza kuleeta mbabazi̱, bei̱tu̱ butetegereza b̯utwala mu kuhwerekeera.
13.16: Mu̱gezi̱, akoresya kwetegereza bei̱tu̱ mudoma eicala naahaariiza b̯udoma b̯wamwe.
13.17: Mukwenda ateesigwa aleeta b̯ujune, bei̱tu̱ akwesigwa, aleeta b̯u̱si̱nge.
13.18: Agaya kuhab̯urwa, yeegimbira nnaku na muswaru, bei̱tu̱ eikiriza kulambwa aheeb̯wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
13.19: Kutunga kiwegombanga kikuha kusemererwa, bei̱tu̱ kyamuziro badoma b̯utahenera.
13.20: Alibata na bagezi̱, nayo abba mu̱gezi̱, kyonkei b̯wolinywana badoma oli wakuwona nnaku.
13.21: Kabii kagyenda na babiibi, bei̱tu̱ akora birungi aheeb̯wa mu̱gi̱sa.
13.22: Murungi ati̱ga itungu libagwetera na beezukulu, bei̱tu̱ lya mubiibi lidiib̯wa bamananu.
13.23: Kisambu kya munaku kyerya binene, bei̱tu̱ nibinyagwa banyamaani.
13.24: Atakwata mubbeere kuhab̯ura mwanawe abba amu̱nobi̱ri̱, kyonkei aku̱mwendya ataho mutima kumuhab̯ura.
13.25: Barungi babba nabibakudya nibeicuta, bei̱tu̱ babiibi beicala nibalira nzala.

14.1: Mu̱kali̱ mu̱gezi̱ ani̱hi̱ri̱i̱rya maka gaamwe, bei̱tu̱ mu̱kali̱ mudoma agahenera hab̯wa b̯udoma.
14.2: Akora birungi ati̱i̱na Mukama , bei̱tu̱ nkori̱ gya bibii gimugaya b̯u̱gayi̱.
14.3: Kalimi ka mudoma kamuha kukuutwa mubbeere, bei̱tu̱ bagezi̱ babaza bibajuna.
14.4: Nte zi̱li̱mi̱ ha zitali, bideeru bibba bisa, bei̱tu̱ bidyo byera binene hali zinyamaani zili.
14.5: Mu̱kei̱so munanu abaza mananu, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gobya abaza b̯u̱gobya.
14.6: Mu̱gayi̱ b̯watoolya magezi̱ tagaagya, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gezi̱ yeetegereza b̯wangu hoi̱
14.8: Magezi̱ ga akwetegereza gamuhab̯ura byakukora, bei̱tu̱ b̯udoma b̯u̱habya b̯u̱habya.
14.9: Mudoma b̯waguma musangu agaya b̯u̱gayi̱, bei̱tu̱ murungi asaba kuganyirwa.
14.10: B̯uli Muntu yeega b̯ujune b̯wamwe yankei, kandi tihaloho yeega kusemererwa kwa mutima gwa wondi.
14.11: Nnyu̱mba gya babiibi giliswaswanika, bei̱tu̱ gya murungi gilyomeera.
14.12: Haloho muhanda gu̱zooka gurungi mu mei̱so ga muntu, bei̱tu̱ gumaliira nigutwala mu lu̱ku̱u̱.
14.13: Na munseku mutima gusobora kutuntura, kandi kusemererwa b̯ukumalika hei̱zaho b̯ujune.
14.14: Babiibi balitunga mpeera gi̱basemereeri̱, bei̱tu̱ murungi aliheeb̯wa gikwisana na bikorwa byamwe.
14.15: Mudoma eikiriza kibakamu̱weereeri̱, kyonkei mu̱gezi̱ abanza kwetegereza hakugyenda.
14.16: Mu̱gezi̱ yeegyendereza niyeehala kukora bibii, bei̱tu̱ mudoma akora nsobi̱ mu b̯utegyendereza.
14.17: Waki̱ni̱ga kya b̯wangu akora byab̯udoma, bantu banoba muntu wa b̯u̱gobya.
14.18: Mudoma atunga bi̱semereeri̱ b̯udoma, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gezi̱ aheeb̯wa mpeera gya kwetegereza.
14.19: Babiibi bali̱ku̱ndi̱ra barungi malu̱, nabatali na mananu nabo baku̱ndi̱re bamananu.
14.20: Munaku annob̯wa na bataahi̱, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gu̱u̱da abba na banywani banene.
14.21: Mugaya bei̱ra abba mubiibi, bei̱tu̱ mwenda hali banaku abba na mu̱gi̱sa.
14.22: Bantu bategeka kukora bibii babba bahabi̱ri̱, bei̱tu̱ bo beetegekera kukora kurungi beicala mu ngonzi na mananu.
14.23: B̯uli akukora na maani atunga magoba, bei̱tu̱ kwicalira ngambu kuleeta nnaku.
14.24: Kondo gya mu̱gezi̱ libba itungu, bei̱tu̱ b̯udoma b̯uleeta b̯udoma.
14.25: Mu̱kei̱so wa mananu ajunira b̯womi, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gobya abba mu̱di̱raseni̱.
14.26: Atamwo Mukama ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa abba mu̱si̱gi̱ku̱, na baana baamwe balibba nahaakwi̱ru̱ki̱ra.
14.27: Ku̱ti̱i̱na Mukama , gwogwo musu gwa b̯womi, kijuna muntu mitegu mya lu̱ku̱u̱.
14.28: Ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya mukama bakiwonera hali b̯unene wa bantu bakulema, bei̱tu̱ tikyegeb̯wa nakufuga badooli̱.
14.29: Mukwata mpula abba nakwetegereza kunene, bei̱tu̱ wa ki̱ni̱ga kya b̯wangu yoolokya b̯udoma.
14.30: Ateekeeni̱ mutima abba na mubiri gwomi, bei̱tu̱ i̱hali̱ lidya maku̱ha nka kookoro.
14.31: Awonesya munaku agaya munyakumuhanga, bei̱tu̱ akwatirwa museege kisa atamwo Ruhanga ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
14.32: Mubiibi ei̱twa kibii kyamwe, bei̱tu̱ murungi nawaakwa abba na haakwi̱ru̱ki̱ra.
14.33: Mukwetegereza habbamwo magezi̱, bei̱tu̱ mudoma tagagira.
14.34: B̯unanu b̯uha ihanga ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, bei̱tu̱ kibii kileetera bantu bensei̱ muswaru.
14.35: Mwiru akora birungi asi̱i̱mwa mukama waamwe, bei̱tu̱ afubira akukora bikuswaza.

15.1: Kalimi kaheheeru̱ kamalaho ki̱ni̱ga, bei̱tu̱ bigambu bi̱kakaaru̱ bi̱ki̱teeryaho b̯u̱teerya.
15.2: Kalimi ka mu̱gezi̱ kaleeta kwetegereza, bei̱tu̱ kanwa ka mudoma kahu̱lu̱kya byab̯udoma.
15.3: Mukama awona hensei̱, eicala naawona barungi na babiibi.
15.4: Kalimi karungi kaleeta b̯womi, bei̱tu̱ b̯u̱gobya b̯ucwa ntima.
15.5: Mudoma agaya kulamba kwa bbaawe, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gezi̱ eikiriza bi̱bamu̱lambi̱ri̱.
15.6: Maka ga barungi gabbamu itungu linene, bei̱tu̱ mpeera gya babiibi gileeta b̯ujune.
15.7: Kalimi ka mu̱gezi̱ kasasaani̱a kwetegereza, bei̱tu̱ biteekerezu bya mudoma tibibbamwo karungi kensei̱.
15.8: Mukama anoba bihongwa bya babiibi, bei̱tu̱ asi̱i̱ma kusaba kwa barungi.
15.9: Mukama anoba bikorwa bya babiibi, bei̱tu̱ yendya bya barungi.
15.10: Wolikora bibiibi olifubirwa hoi̱, woolisuula kuhab̯urwa, oli̱kwa.
15.11: Mukama haawonera bali kuzumu, na bili mu mutima gwa muntu abyegi̱ri̱
15.12: Mu̱gayi̱ anoba kulambwa, nahab̯waki̱kyo yeehala bagezi̱.
15.13: Kusemererwa bakuwonera ha b̯u̱syo wa muntu, bei̱tu̱ mutima gu̱zi̱ngalu̱ gubba na nganye.
15.14: Mu̱gezi̱ yendya kwega, bei̱tu̱ mudoma anyu̱mi̱rwa bya b̯udoma.
15.15: Munaku eicala naagadagada, bei̱tu̱ bantu bali na kusemererwa beicala nibeegonza.
15.16: Hakiri obba munaku aku̱ti̱i̱na Mukama , kukira kubba mu̱gu̱u̱da otali na b̯u̱si̱nge.
15.17: Hakiri ondya i̱ji̱ri̱ hali ngonzi zili, kukira kudya nnyama hei̱zwi̱ri̱ nnobi̱.
15.18: Wa ki̱ni̱ga kya b̯wangu, atab̯ura b̯ulemu, Bei̱tu̱ mukwata mpula alu̱mi̱ri̱i̱rya izongobo.
15.19: Muhanda gwa mugarei gubbumbwa mahwa, bei̱tu̱ gwa munanu gubba gu̱terekereru̱.
15.20: Mwana mu̱gezi̱ aleetera bbaawe kusemererwa, bei̱tu̱ mudoma agaya bya maawe.
15.21: Ntwarwa gi̱nyu̱mi̱rwa b̯udoma, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gezi̱ akora bi̱doori̱.
15.22: Hatali muhe wa magezi̱ ntegeka zisobambe, bei̱tu̱ b̯u̱hei̱zaho bahab̯u̱ri̱ banene niziterekeera.
15.23: Kigambu ki̱i̱zi̱ra mu b̯wi̱re b̯wonyi̱ni̱, kileetera muntu kusemererwa.
15.24: Bagezi̱ bakwata muhanda gukutwala mu b̯womi, hatali gukutwala kuzumu.
15.25: Mukama azi̱kya makaa gehembahemba, bei̱tu̱ alinda bya bamukaabakwere.
15.26: Mukama annoba biteekerezu bibiibi, bei̱tu̱ asemereerwa mu bigambu birungi.
15.27: Wa mururu gwa bintu bya b̯u̱nyagi̱ aleetera makaa gaamwe b̯ujune, bei̱tu̱ anoba kwegu̱li̱ri̱i̱rya alyomeera.
15.28: Barungi babanza nibateekereza batakei̱ri̱ri̱mwo, bei̱tu̱ babiibi babaza ki̱kei̱zi̱ri̱.
15.29: Bantu barungi b̯ubasaba Mukama ni̱yeegwa, bei̱tu̱ babiibi ababba hadei.
15.30: B̯u̱syo b̯wa kamwenyumwenyu b̯uleeta kusemererwa, na makuru garungi galeeta b̯womi.
15.31: Muntu eikiriza kulambwa, abalwa mu ba magezi̱.
15.32: Yogwo atalambwa yeefereza binene, bei̱tu̱ alambwa yeyongera kukenga.
15.33: Ku̱ti̱i̱na Mukama kyegesya magezi̱, na kub̯undaara kuleeta ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.

16.1: Muntu ategeka kyakukora, bei̱tu̱ Mukama yooyo acwamwo kukyabba.
16.2: Bantu basobora kuteekereza bibakukora birungi, kyonkei bigyendeerwa byaho bi̱pi̱mwa Mukama .
16.3: B̯uli kyokukora ki̱kwatyenge Mukama , mwomwo byotegeki̱ri̱ bidwereere.
16.4: B̯uli Mukama kyakora abba na nsonga, na mubiibi amu̱tegekeeri̱ kiro kya ku̱zi̱ka.
16.5: Mukama anoba beehaariiza, mu mananu tibalilemwa kufubirwa.
16.6: Yensei̱ akwendya Mukama kandi akamwesiga, amuganyira bibii byamwe, na ku̱ti̱i̱na Mukama kwokwo kutoola muntu mu kibii.
16.7: Akora bi̱ku̱si̱i̱imwa Mukama , na banyanzigwa baamwe bei̱ra nibamunywana.
16.8: Hakiri otunga bi̱dooli̱ mu b̯urungi, kukira binene bya ngu̱zi̱.
16.9: Muntu ategeka ha kugyenda, bei̱tu̱ Mukama yooyo amuhab̯ura muhanda.
16.10: Ruhanga aterekereerya mutima gwa mukama, akusemeera kubbanga wab̯winganiza.
16.11: Mukama yendya ki̱pi̱myo na ndengu zi̱doori̱, byab̯u̱gu̱li̱ byensei̱ biruga hali yo.
16.12: Bakama banoba nkori̱ za bibii, kubba b̯u̱lemi̱ b̯urungi b̯uleetwa b̯winganiza.
16.13: Mukama anyu̱mi̱rwa kwegwa akubaza mananu, asi̱i̱ma abaza bi̱doori̱.
16.14: Hali mukama azi̱ngali̱i̱ri̱ asobora nakwi̱ta bei̱tu̱ mu̱gezi̱, amu̱holya b̯u̱holya.
16.15: Kamwenyu ka mukama kaleeta b̯womi, kandi mbabazi̱ zaamwe zisana ndagali̱ gya kibbaga.
16.16: Kubba na magezi̱ na kwetegereza, kikukira kubba na feeza na zaabbu.
16.17: Murungi yeehala kukora kubiibi, kandi akora niyegyendereza, alinda b̯womi b̯wamwe.
16.18: Kwetembya kuleeta kuhwerekeera, kandi myehaariizo mirugamwo ku̱gwa.
16.19: Hakiri oicala munaku ali na mbabazi̱, kukira kwehemba na mugab̯u gwa b̯u̱nyagi̱.
16.20: Akuta mutima gwamwe ha kwegeseb̯wa ali̱si̱ngu̱ra, naakwesiga Mukama aliheeb̯wa mu̱gi̱sa.
16.21: Ali na magezi̱ bamweta mwetegerezi̱, abaza na mbabazi̱, asikiriza bantu.
16.22: Magezi̱ hali ali na kwetegereza, musu gwa b̯womi, bei̱tu̱ kwegesya mudoma ogadira b̯usa.
16.23: Ali na magezi̱ abaza bya magezi̱, bigambu byamwe bisikiriza bantu ku̱byegwa.
