16.24: Bigambu bya mbabazi̱ bi̱nwereerya nka b̯uhooki, bisemeera mwozo kandi bi̱tati̱i̱rya mubiri.
16.25: Haloho muhanda gu̱zooka gurungi mu mei̱so ga muntu, bei̱tu̱ gumaliira nigutwala mu lu̱ku̱u̱.
16.26: Ali na kyakwetaaga akikoleerambe, nzala gyegesya kukora.
16.27: Mubiibi atoolya bayatab̯ura, bigambu byamwe bibba nka mworo.
16.28: Mucwamakuru aleeta izongobo, na muhesa bantu yaahu̱kani̱a banywani.
16.29: Mu̱habi̱ ahabya bei̱ra, naabatwala mu ku̱zi̱ka.
16.30: Ami̱gami̱gi̱ri̱i̱rya mei̱so abba naakutegeka b̯ubii, amyola mu̱nwa abba na kibiibi kyakukora.
16.31: Mbwi̱ zibba nka kondo gya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, giheeb̯wa bantu bananu.
16.32: Ali na kugumisiriza abba muzira kukira waamaani, afuga mutima gwamwe akira ahamba rub̯uga lwensei̱.
16.33: Bantu basobora ku̱cu̱hya nsoro kuwona kyarugamwo, bei̱tu̱ Mukama yooyo acwamwo.

17.1: Kudya ki̱dooli̱ okabba na b̯u̱si̱nge, kikukira nnyu̱mba gilimwo kwegonza neizongobo.
17.2: Mwiru mwekambi̱, alema mwana mugwagwa, kandi agweterwa bintu nkomwei̱ hali baana ba mu nnyu̱mba.
17.3: Feeza na zaabbu bi̱pi̱mwa mworo, bei̱tu̱ Mukama api̱ma biteekerezu bya mitima.
17.4: Nkori̱ gya bibii gyetegeerya rugambu lwa babiibi, mu̱gobya ahondera b̯u̱gobya.
17.5: Adu̱u̱li̱ra munaku abba naakugaya munyakumuhanga, anyu̱mi̱rwa b̯ujune b̯wa wondi takena kufubirwa.
17.6: Bagu̱lu̱u̱su̱ benyumiriza mu beizukulu baab̯u na baana nibenyumiriza mu babyeru̱ baab̯u.
17.7: Kubaza bya magezi̱ tikigasira mudoma, naakubaza b̯u̱gobya ti̱ki̱semereeri̱ mu̱lemi̱.
17.8: Bantu bateekerereza mu̱kwegu̱li̱ri̱i̱rya bawona byensei̱ nibikusoboka, bagu̱mya nti, kwegu̱li̱ri̱i̱rya kukora nka lu̱gi̱sa.
17.9: Atoolya kunywana aganyira bamu̱sobereerye, bei̱tu̱ eicala naabaza nsobi̱ ei̱ta mukagu.
17.10: Mu̱gezi̱ baamulamba lu̱mwei̱ naakenga, bei̱tu̱ mudoma naab̯ubakuuta njunju ki̱ku̱mi̱ tahab̯uka.
17.11: Muntu mubiibi eicala natekereza b̯wemi̱ b̯usa, akwatwa batumwa batali na mbabazi̱ nayo.
17.12: Hakiri orombya ntali gi̱basengereeri̱ b̯wana b̯wagyo, kukira ku̱rombya mudoma akukora byab̯udoma.
17.13: B̯wokora kubiibi muntu akukukoora birungi, bizib̯u tibilimalika mwamu.
17.14: Kutara b̯ulemu kiisana kwijuura mu̱hwi̱ gwa meezi̱, kale nu b̯wehale izongobo li̱takatandi̱ki̱ri̱.
17.15: Kufubira atali na musangu nookaganyira mubiibi, byensei̱ bya muziro hali Mukama .
17.16: Sente za mudoma asasula kusoma tizili na kizimugasira, hab̯wa b̯utetegereza b̯wamwe.
17.17: Mukagu gubba mukagu b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱, kandi baluganda beelinda b̯wi̱re b̯wa b̯ujune.
17.18: B̯udoma b̯ukutuma kusasula ibanza lya wondi, na kuhayo b̯wema hab̯wa mu̱taahi̱.
17.19: Akwendya b̯ubii atoolya wakuzongoba nayo, atoolya myehembu yeeletera b̯ujune.
17.20: Ateekereza mu kukora kubiibi tatunga mu̱gi̱sa, kalimi kabaza b̯u̱gobya keicala mu b̯ujune.
17.21: Mwana mudoma akwati̱sya babyeru̱ b̯ujune, kandi tibalibba na kusemererwa kwensei̱.
17.22: Kwicala osemereerwe guli mu̱bazi̱ gu̱ku̱honi̱a, bei̱tu̱ kandi kuzingala kwanu̱kya wanu̱kya.
17.23: Mu̱ramu̱ri̱ mubiibi eikiriza ngu̱zi̱ mu kyebi̱si̱i̱re, aleke atasala musangu mu b̯winganiza.
17.24: Mu̱gezi̱ ategeka bya magezi̱, bei̱tu̱ mudoma akwata kiki na ki̱di̱.
17.25: Mwana mudoma asaliiza bbaawe, kandi ali̱rya mmaawe.
17.26: Ti̱ki̱doori̱ ku̱li̱hi̱sya atali na musangu, na kukuuta bakora birungi.
17.27: Mu̱gezi̱ abaza bi̱dooli̱, naakwetegereza akwata mpula.
17.28: Mudoma b̯u̱yetekeera bamweta mu̱gezi̱, b̯wabbumba mu̱nwa azooka nka ali na kwetegereza.

18.1: Yeehala bei̱ra abba nakwetooleerya byamwe yankei, abba naakusuula bintu bi̱doori̱.
18.2: Mudoma ti̱yendya kwetegereza bei̱tu̱ anyu̱mi̱rwa kuhanuulira bandi.
18.3: Akora bibiibi yeeleetera mugayo, muswaru guleeta kihemu.
18.4: Bigambu birungi mu muntu meezi̱ ga mu ndi̱ha, musu gwa magezi̱ gukulukuta nka mugira.
18.5: Ti̱ki̱doori̱ kuganyira mubiibi, rundi kufubira atali na musangu.
18.6: Bigambu bya mudoma bileeta mpaka, naakuhonyola mu̱nwa kumuleetera kukuutwa.
18.7: Mu̱nwa gwa mudoma gwogwo gu̱mu̱zi̱kya bigambu byabaza bimubboha nka mutegu.
18.8: Makuru gacwe ganolira akugegwa nka bidyo bi̱nolu̱ kubiicala mu nda.
18.9: Mukora mulimo na b̯ugarei, na mu̱gu̱heneri̱ tibahukana.
18.10: Mukama eicala lugo lunyamaani, hali barungi baamwe bei̱ru̱ki̱ra kutunga b̯u̱si̱nge.
18.11: Itungu lya mu̱gu̱u̱da lili nka rub̯uga lwamwe lunyamaani, lili nka ki̱si̱i̱ka kilei kyelogoleerye rub̯uga.
18.12: Kwehaariiza kuleeta ku̱zi̱ka, ab̯undaara atunga ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
18.13: Kwi̱ramu bigambu byotakabbeeri̱ kwetegeerya, kibba kya b̯udoma kandi kyamuswaru.
18.14: Mutima gutatiro gwi̱ryamwo baseeri̱ maani, bei̱tu̱ hali gutali na ku̱ni̱hi̱ra kubba kwahi.
18.15: Bagezi̱ beicala beetegeki̱ri̱ kwega, Mapokopo gaab̯u geicala gab̯uule mwa kutangiira magezi̱.
18.16: Kisembu kya muntu kimuteerahoona muhanda hali bakama, kandi nikimwicaarya na bafura.
18.17: Abanza kubaza mu mei̱so ga mu̱ramu̱ri̱ azooka nka wa mananu, ku̱doosya munyegeerwa waaketongonaho.
18.18: Karu̱ru̱ kamala mpaka, kandi kuramura ntaru za maani.
18.19: Weenyu̱ gyozi̱ngali̱i̱rye talikwikiriza kwingira mwamwe, mpaka zi̱tab̯wi̱ri̱ banywani zaahu̱kani̱a bantu nka irembu li̱ki̱ngi̱i̱rwe byoma.
18.20: Bigambu bya muntu biicuutya nda gyamwe, mu mu̱nwa gwamwe harugamu bikumugasira
18.21: Maani ga lu̱ku̱u̱ na b̯womi gali mu lulimi, nahab̯waki̱kyo b̯uli muntu yegyendereze bigambu byakubaza.
18.22: Yaagya mu̱kali̱ wa kuswera abba yaagi̱i̱rye kintu kirungi, kubba abba na mu̱gi̱sa gwa Mukama .
18.23: Bigambu bya munaku byolokya mbabazi̱, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gu̱u̱da abaza na nkabbu.
18.24: Haloho mukagu gwa kasu̱mi̱ b̯u̱su̱mi̱, bei̱tu̱ aku̱nyweni̱ biribiri akukiira na mwijuwo.

19.1: Munaku agyendera ha mananu, akira mu̱gobya mudoma.
19.2: Kili kibiibi kubba na bihika bitalimwo kwetegereza, naakora naapapa tamaliira.
19.3: Muntu b̯wafafaanika hab̯wa b̯udoma b̯wamwe, atandika kwekwati̱ri̱i̱rya na Mukama .
19.4: Mu̱gu̱u̱da atunga mikagu minene, bei̱tu̱ mya munaku mimalika b̯u̱mali̱ki̱.
19.5: Agaba b̯u̱kei̱so wa b̯u̱gobya afubirwa b̯ufubirwa, abaza b̯u̱gobya talikena.
19.6: Banene batoolya kunywana benda, b̯uli muntu yendya yogwo agaba.
19.7: Munaku onnob̯wa baamwe, Babbe banywanwe, nab̯wabeerya heehi̱, badahira b̯u̱dahi̱ri̱.
19.8: Ali na magezi̱ abba atu̱ngi̱ri̱ kwegonza, Ali na kwetegereza agumbura birungi.
19.9: Agaba b̯u̱kei̱so wa b̯u̱gobya afubirwa b̯ufubirwa, abaza b̯u̱gobya ali̱zi̱ka.
19.10: Badoma tibakusemeera kwicala mu kwegonza, na beiru tibakusemeera kufuga bantu ba maani.
19.11: Ali na kwetegereza yeegyendereza kukwatwa ki̱ni̱ga, mu kunuga bibiibi, atungiramwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
19.12: Mukama b̯wakwatwa ki̱ni̱ga ahuruguma nka ntali, mbabazi̱ zaamwe zisana lu̱me lu̱gwereeri̱ heisubi.
19.13: Mwana mudoma aleetera bbaawe nnaku, mu̱kali̱ weizongobo eisana nka b̯utuntu ku mabbaati.
19.14: Nnyu̱mba neitungu babigwetera b̯u̱gweteri̱, bei̱tu̱ mu̱kali̱ mwetegerezi̱ kisembu kuruga hali Mukama .
19.15: Muntu mugarei yeebbaka herere, eicala atakukora aliicala mu nzala.
19.16: Akwata biragiro bya Ruhanga alinda b̯womi b̯wamwe, bei̱tu̱ agaya mihanda myamwe ali̱kwa.
19.17: Agabira banaku eisana ahoori̱ Mukama , Mukama alimusasula birungi.
19.18: Hab̯ura mwana nihacaaloho ku̱ni̱hi̱ra, kitali ki̱kyo okubba noku̱mu̱zi̱kya.
19.19: Waaki̱ni̱ga kinene yei̱li̱hi̱ra kifubiro kyamwe, b̯womujuna gukubanza b̯undi de olimujuna.
19.20: Weegwanga bibakukulamba, oikirizenge kuhab̯urwa, kwokwo olitunga magezi̱.
19.21: Muntu nab̯wategeka binene byakukora, bei̱tu̱ kwendya kwa Mukama kwokwo kudwereera.
19.22: Bantu bendya ali na ngonzi na b̯wesige, hakiri obba munaku otabbeeri̱ mu̱gobya.
19.23: Kutamwo Mukama ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kuleeta kwomeera, akimuha tadweb̯waho kabii kensei̱.
19.24: Mugarei waakolya itongi mu nnyeni̱, alemwa galita mu mu̱nwa.
19.25: Fubira mu̱gayi̱, na ntwarwa gitunge kyakwega, b̯wohab̯ura mu̱gezi̱ ateeryaho ha kwetegereza kwamwe.
19.26: Mwana awonesya bbaawe, kandi akabinga mmaawe aleeta kijumu na muswaru.
19.27: Mwana wange, b̯wosuula kulambwa, ogumirisana na biwaali wegi̱ri̱.
19.28: Mu̱kei̱so mu̱gobya anoba b̯winganiza, mu̱nwa gubiibi gu̱hu̱lu̱kya bibiibi.
19.29: Mu̱gayi̱ bamu̱fu̱bi̱rab̯u̱fu̱bi̱ri̱, akora bya b̯udoma akuutwab̯ukuutwa.

20.1: Maaci gatogolokira baganywi̱, bagatamiira bafooka badoma.
20.2: Mukama waakwatwa ki̱ni̱ga ahuruguma nka ntali, amuzingaalya yeeleetera lu̱ku̱u̱.
20.3: Kwehala kukuuta mpaka kya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, yendya kuzongoba abba mudoma.
20.4: Mugarei mu kibbaga, atoolya kya kukesa mu kyanda atakukiwonaho.
20.5: Mutima gwa muntu gwisana ndi̱ha, mwetegerezi̱ agutoolamwo biteekerezu.
20.6: Banene bazooka nka ba mbabazi̱, ti̱kyangu̱hi̱ri̱ kwagya mwesigwa.
20.7: Murungi agyendera mu b̯winganiza, mu̱gi̱sa gwamwe guhondera baana baamwe.
20.8: Mukama weicaara kusala misangu, ali̱ngani̱a kirungi na kibiibi.
20.9: Naani akusobora kukoba nti, “Mutima gwange gu̱syanu̱, tindi na kibii kindi kyensei̱”?
20.10: Mukama , anoba bakoresya ndengu na bi̱pi̱myo bya b̯u̱gobya.
20.11: Bikorwa bya muto, byolokya kyani kyali, okusobora kwetegereza yaabba nali murungi rundi mubiibi.
20.12: Mapokopo geegwa na mei̱so gawona, byensei̱ Mukama yooyo yaabi̱hangi̱ri̱.
20.13: Alaala atakumala eicala mu nnaku, abyoka naakora abba na bidyo binene.
20.14: Mu̱gu̱li̱ aramura naakoba, “Oku̱syera, oku̱syera,” b̯wamala kugula agyenda niyeehariiza kwakomi̱ri̱ b̯u̱komi̱.
20.15: Kyamugasu hoi̱ kubba na kwetegereza, kukira kubba na zaabbu na mahi̱ga ga muhendu.
20.16: B̯wema b̯wa ategebeerwe, b̯uli na kusembwa musimbo, asagika munyamahanga alinakumusasulira.
20.17: Mudya byab̯u̱gobya bimunolira hoi̱, hei̱nyu̱ma bimufokira nka musinyi mu mu̱nwa.
20.18: Kyotoleerya magezi̱ mwa ku̱si̱ngu̱ra, lwani̱sya otunge akukulamba.
20.19: Mucwa makuru talinda nsita, weehalenge wa ndimi ibiri.
20.20: Mu̱lu̱ma bbaawe rundi maawe, ali̱kwa nka taara gi̱lu̱mi̱ra mu nti̱ti̱.
20.21: Itungu li̱i̱za b̯wangu, hei̱nyu̱ma tilibba na mugasu.
20.22: Leka kukoba, “Nkwi̱za kumusasula kibii nkyankoori̱!” Bi̱kwatye Mukama , akwi̱za kukucungura.
20.23: Mukama annoba bi̱pi̱myo bya b̯u̱gobya, ndengu zibiibi tazendya.
20.24: Mukama yooyo ategeka malibatire ga muntu, muntu ki akusobora kwetegereza muhanda gwa b̯womi b̯wamwe?
20.25: Otalikwatwa mutegu gwa ku̱rangu̱hi̱ri̱i̱rya kweraga hali Mukama , hei̱nyu̱ma okezu̱zu̱kya!
20.26: Mukama ali na magezi̱ ali̱ngani̱a muntu mubiibi, naamufubira atakumuganyira.
20.27: Mwozo gwa muntu gwisana taara gya Mukama , gimuluka nsita za mu mutima.
20.28: Ngonzi na b̯wesigwa bilinda mukama, b̯u̱lemi̱ b̯wamwe b̯wemeera ku b̯urungi b̯wamwe.
20.29: Maani ga basigazi googo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyab̯u, b̯urungi b̯wa bagu̱lu̱u̱su̱ b̯wicala mu mbwi̱ zaab̯u.
20.30: Bihuta bya njunju bigorora ngesu zibiibi, kukuutwa kujanjaba mutima.

21.1: Mukama afuga mu̱lemi̱ nka meezi̱ ga mugira, aguragira guheete haakendeerye.
21.2: Kyensei̱ kya muntu akora akyeta kirungi, bei̱tu̱ Mukama api̱ma mutima.
21.3: Mukama yendya akora birungi na byab̯winganiza, kukira kumuhongera.
21.4: Bantu babiibi bafugwa myehembo na myepanku, byensei̱ bibyala kibii.
21.5: Kutegeka na kwekamba kurugamwo byamugasu, bei̱tu̱ yangu̱hi̱ri̱i̱rya kukora afooka munaku.
21.6: Itungu lya b̯u̱gobya li̱tu̱u̱ka nka mwi̱ca, litwala bantu mu ku̱zi̱ka.
21.7: Mubiibi ei̱twa bikorwa byamwe, hab̯wakubba azira kukora birungi.
21.8: Ngesu za babiibi tiziterekeera, bei̱tu̱ barungi bagyendera hasyanu̱.
21.9: Hakiri oicala mu ki̱si̱i̱si̱ra, kukira kwicala mu nnyu̱mba gi̱mwei̱ na mu̱kali̱ weizongobo.
21.10: Babiibi beicala ni̱banyu̱mi̱rwa kukora bibiibi, tibali na gibakwatirwa kisa.
21.11: Mu̱gayi̱ wafubirwa ntwarwa nigimwegiraho, Mu̱gezi̱ b̯wahab̯urwa niyetegereza.
21.12: Ruhanga eicala murungi yeegi̱ri̱ bya mu maka ga gabiibi, kandi alibafubira.
21.13: Muntu yensei̱ asuula kwegwa kutaaga kwa munaku, nayodede alitaaga atali naaku̱mwi̱ramwo.
21.15: Bantu barungi basemereerwa bintu b̯ubikorwa mu b̯winganiza, bei̱tu̱ babiibi babaleetera b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱.
21.16: Akweti̱ gutalimwo ka b̯untu, alyezagya nali mu kitebe kya baku̱u̱.
21.17: Eicala mu kwegonza alinakuhara, anolerwa maaci na bi̱syeke tali̱gu̱dahara.
21.18: Babiibi bagweb̯waho b̯ujune b̯ubabba ni̱bakwendeerya barungi.
21.19: Hakiri oicala mwihamba, kukira kubba na mu̱kali̱ weizongobo kandi wa ki̱ni̱ga.
21.20: Muntu wa magezi̱ abba neitungu na bintu bya muhendu, bei̱tu̱ badoma nsimbi zaab̯u bazimala nibacakazitunga b̯u̱tu̱ngi̱.
21.21: Yogwo afaaho kukora birungi na bya mbabazi̱, alitunga b̯womi b̯urungi, hamwei̱ na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
21.22: Muntu wa magezi̱ asi̱ngu̱ra rub̯uga lwa ba maani, naabinya kigo kyalwo kibesiganga.
21.23: Muntu yeegyendereza mu bigambu byabaza, yeejuna yenkei kuruga mu kabii.
21.24: Mu̱gayi̱ lyolyo ibara lya muntu yeetembatembya, kandi wa myebbuno yooyo akukora bintu na myepanku.
21.25: Mugarei ei̱twa kwegomba kwamwe, hab̯wakubba ti̱yendya kukora.
21.26: Muntu mubiibi abba na mururu gwakutunga bintu binene b̯uli kiro, bei̱tu̱ muntu murungi eicala nagaba.
21.27: Mukama ti̱yendya kihongwa kya muntu mubiibi, kukira maani b̯ukileetwa na kigyendeerwa kitali kirungi.
21.28: Kei̱so wa b̯u̱gobya ali̱zi̱ka, bei̱tu̱ wa mazima, balyetegeerya bigambu byakubaza.
21.29: Muntu mubiibi yeetwala kubba murungi, bei̱tu̱ kandi murungi yeegyendereza mihanda myamwe.
21.30: Tihaloho magezi̱, kwetegereza, rundi kyakulamba kya muntu, kukusobora ku̱si̱ngu̱ra Mukama .
21.31: Muntu naasobora kutekaniza mbaraasi zaaku̱lwani̱sya b̯ulemu, bei̱tu̱ b̯u̱si̱ngu̱zi̱ b̯uruga hali Mukama .

22.1: Ibara lirungi balyendya kukira itungu, ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kikira kubba na feeza rundi zaabbu
22.2: Mu̱gu̱u̱da na munaku bali na habarombi̱ra, bensei̱ Mukama yooyo yaabahangi̱ri̱.
22.3: Akwetegereza awona kabii ni̱kakwi̱za niyebbala, bei̱tu̱ ntwarwa gyecoberab̯wecoberi̱ nigiwonawona nakyo.
22.4: Mu kub̯undaara, na ku̱ti̱i̱na Mukama heicalamwo mpeera gya b̯u̱gu̱u̱da, ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, na kwomeera.
22.5: Muhanda gwa babiibi gwicalamwo mahwa na mitegu, mweri̱ndenge mumyehale.
22.6: Weegesya mwana ngesu zaakusemeera kwicala nazo, nab̯walibba ahandi̱ri̱ atalizeebeera.
22.7: Ali neitungu afuga munaku, mwehori̱ akoora mu̱mu̱hori̱.
22.8: Asiga gitalimwo b̯winganiza, akesa mi̱hi̱to, na b̯ubiibi b̯wamwe b̯ulimumalika.
22.9: Kya mu̱gi̱sa kubba mwenda, hab̯wakubba mwenda abagana bidyo byamwe na banaku.
22.10: Abinga wa migayo abba abi̱ngi̱ri̱ ntaru, izongobo na bi̱lu̱mo bi̱kwi̱za kumalika.
22.11: Yendya mutima gu̱syanu̱, naakubaza na mbabazi̱, yooyo mukama gyanywana.
22.12: Li̱i̱so lya Mukama li̱tolereerya mananu, kyokyo anuga b̯u̱nu̱gi̱ bigambu bya bagobya.
22.13: Mugarei akuweera, “Ntali gili hanzei, gi̱i̱za ku̱nzi̱ti̱ra mu ngu̱u̱do.”
22.14: Kanwa ka mu̱kali̱ mwenzi̱ b̯u̱hya, akyeneerwe Mukama , ali̱b̯u̱gwamwo.
22.15: Kyab̯uhangwa mwana muto kukora byab̯udoma, bei̱tu̱ kakubba afubirwa atungamwo kakwetegereza.
22.16: Awonawonesya banaku mwa kugudahara, na agabira bagu̱u̱da bintu, bensei̱ balinakuhara. Bigambu bya Magezi̱
22.17: B̯wegwanga bigambu bya magezi̱, otenge mutima ha bi̱nyeegesya,
22.18: hab̯wakubba kirungi b̯woli̱bi̱zu̱u̱ka, okabyatulanga na kanwa kaamu.
22.19: Nkwendya wesige Mukama , kyokyo mbi̱ku̱wereeri̱ kiro kiki,
22.20: Nku̱handi̱ki̱i̱ri̱ bigambu birungi maku̱mi̱ gasatu, bikuhab̯ure kandi bikuhe kwetegereza.
22.21: Bi̱kwegesye mananu na b̯wesigwa, mwomwo oliweera banyakubikutuma byotoori̱mwo. Kyakubanza
22.22: Otalinyaga munaku hab̯wakubba talinaho, kandi otali̱wonawonesya museege mwicwero lya musangu,
22.23: hab̯wakubba Mukama alibatongoniira, naanyaga bakubanyaga. Kya kabiri
22.24: Otalinywana muntu akwatwa ki̱ni̱ga, habbe ku̱di̱da na wa b̯usungu b̯wa b̯wangu,
22.25: aleke oteega mize myamwe, okagwa mu kabii. Kyakasatu
22.26: Otalibba omwei̱ hali bab̯wo beehayo nibeeraga, rundi nibeemeera mabanza ga bandi,
22.27: b̯wolikalemwa kusasula, ntabbu gyamu gyolalira gyogyo balitwala. Kyakanei
22.28: Otali̱segu̱li̱i̱rya mubaga gwa kadei na kadei, gwa bahaaha baamu baateeri̱ho. Kyakataanu
22.29: Akora mulimo gwamwe kurungi yeetonera na bakama, teicaara na bantu ba b̯uli kiro.

23.1: B̯wolibbanga oi̱cali̱i̱ri̱ kudya na mu̱lemi̱, weekengerenge byaku̱segereerye.
23.3: Otalitubira bidyo byaku̱ti̱mbi̱i̱ri̱, tiweega gwakubba mutegu. Kyamusanju
23.4: Mu̱leke kwejwahya naaku̱toolya itungu, mu̱bbe na magezi̱ mwemige.
23.5: Obba noocakalitaho li̱i̱so ni̱li̱syera nka rundi si li̱meeri̱ bimpaha lyadu̱ndu̱u̱ka mu mwanya nka wambooli̱. Kubaza kwa munaanei
23.6: Otadyanga bidyo bya mupu, habbe kwegomba bi̱nolu̱ byamwe,
23.7: hab̯wakubba eicala nabaliira muhendu gu̱yabi̱gu̱u̱ri̱, akuweera, “Dya kandi onywe,” bei̱tu̱ ataku̱ki̱manyi̱sya.
23.8: Okwi̱za kubitunaka bi̱waadi̱i̱ri̱, na bigambu byakwenolereerya byolibba obazi̱ri̱ bilibba byab̯usa. Kubaza kwa mwenda
23.9: Otali̱bazi̱ri̱ryanga mudoma, kubba byamagezi̱ byomuweera akwi̱za kubigaya. Kubaza kwei̱ku̱mi̱
23.10: Otali̱segu̱li̱i̱rya nsaru gya kadei na kadei otalyezi̱ri̱i̱rya itehe lya nfu̱u̱zi̱.
23.11: Hab̯wakubba mu̱bacu̱ngu̱ri̱ wamaani, akwi̱za kubalwaniira, atongane nanywe. Kubaza kwei̱ku̱mi̱ na gi̱mwei̱
23.12: Taho mutima gwamu ha kuhondera kulambwa, naakuteganga mapokopo kwegwa bigambu bya kwetegereza. Kubaza kwei̱ku̱mi̱ neibiri
23.13: Otalyehu̱u̱kya kuhab̯ura mwana waamu, kumukuuta na kajunju tikisobora ku̱mwi̱ta.
23.14: Hab̯wakubba kumufubira ki̱i̱za kumujuna lu̱ku̱u̱. Kubaza kwei̱ku̱mi̱ neisatu
23.15: Mwana wanga, wolikabba na magezi̱ nagya ndisemererwa.
23.16: B̯u̱ndikwegwa nookubaza bigambu bya magezi̱, ndyesi̱i̱ma mu mutima gwange. Kubaza kwei̱ku̱mi̱ neine
23.17: Otakwatirwa itima babiibi, gyenda mu mei̱so naakutamwo Mukama ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
23.18: Hab̯wakubba olitungiramwo mpeera, kyaku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwamu kiliiza. Kubaza kwei̱ku̱mi̱ neitaanu
23.19: Mwana wange, weetegeerya kandi obbe wa magezi̱, taho mutima kukora birungi.
23.20: Weehalanga ku̱di̱da na batami̱i̱ru̱, rundi batubira nyama,
23.21: hab̯wakubba mu̱tami̱i̱ru̱ na mu̱tu̱u̱b̯u̱ bakwi̱za kuseega, nibadwa ha kulwala nsensende. Kubaza kwei̱ku̱mi̱ na mukaaga
23.22: Weegwanga bbaawu, munyakukubyala, ogonderenge maawu nab̯wali̱gu̱lu̱u̱sa.
23.23: Mananu, magezi̱, ngesu na kwetegereza bya mugasu kubitunga, otalibifeerwa.
23.24: Mudulu wa mwana murungi alisemererwa, munyakubyala mwana mu̱gezi̱ yeesi̱i̱me.
23.25: Bbaawu na mmaawu beesi̱i̱me, mu̱kali̱ yogwo munyakukubyala asemererwenge. Kubaza kwei̱ku̱mi̱ na musanju
23.26: Mwana wange taho mutima gwamu ha bigambu byange, ohondere ngesu zange.
23.27: Mu̱kali̱ mu̱b̯u̱ngi̱ kandi mwenzi̱, eisana b̯u̱hya.
23.28: Atega badulu nka banyagi̱, nabongera b̯utabba beesigwa. Kubaza kwei̱ku̱mi̱ na munaanei
23.29: Banaani beicala nibazongoba? Mpaka zikuutwa banaani? Bihote bili na banaani? Kulwanagana kuli na naani? Mpaka zili na naani? Bihote bitakuhona bili na naani? Mei̱so gengu̱ gali na naani?
23.30: Boobo bab̯wo beicaara ha maaci batakurugaho, nibanywa gaga na gadi̱.
23.31: Maaci na rangi̱ zaago gatakwohyanga, gatakusikirizanga namu giraasi oganywe.
23.32: Hei̱nyu̱ma gukuluma nka mpiri, nigakutematema nka b̯umala b̯wa hu̱lu̱hu̱ndu̱.
23.33: Mei̱so gaamu galiwona masana, mutima gwamu nigutekereza kiki na ki̱di̱.
23.34: Olyezegwa nkoleeri̱ hakati̱ weitaka, nka nkwokusulebera mu b̯wati̱ b̯ukukuutwa kihehu.
23.35: Olikoba yati, “Banku̱u̱ti̱ri̱, b̯u̱ku̱u̱ti̱, bei̱tu̱ tindina hampu̱teeri̱, banti̱ndagi̱ri̱ b̯u̱ti̱ndagi̱ ntakwega!” B̯wi̱re b̯wakya di̱i̱? Ndinakutungayo maaci gandi.

24.1: Otalikwatirwa i̱hali̱ nkori̱ za bibii, kadi habbe kubanywana,
24.2: hab̯wakubba beicala nibatab̯ukatab̯uka, kubaza kwab̯u kuhutaaza bandi. Kyamaku̱mi̱ gabiri
24.4: Mu kukenga bi̱si̱i̱ka bya nnyu̱mba bizula na bikwatu bya mugasu bya muhendu kandi birungi. Kubaza kwa maku̱mi̱ gabiri na gi̱mwei̱
24.5: Muntu mu̱gezi̱ akira wamaani, mwetegerezi̱ yeyongera kubba munyamaani,
24.6: hab̯wakubba kulwana b̯ulemu ki̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra ha ntegeka za magezi̱, ku̱b̯u̱si̱nga, bakub̯uhanulira balinakubba banene. Kyamaku̱mi̱ gabiri neibiri
24.7: Bigambu bya muntu mu̱gezi̱ tibigasira mudoma, talinakyabaza hali bakuhanuura byamugasu. Kubaza kwa maku̱mi̱ gabiri neisatu
24.8: Yensei̱ eicala naatekereza kukora bibiibi, bamweta mu̱gezi̱gezi̱.
24.9: Kuhab̯urwa kwa mudoma kibba kibii, na mu̱gayi̱ abba muziro hali bantu. Kubaza kwa maku̱mi̱ gabiri neine
24.10: Kabii b̯u̱kei̱za ni̱kakaku̱su̱lu̱ngani̱a, mananu kwo obba muceke. Kubaza kwa maku̱mi̱ gabiri neitaanu
24.11: Waacunguranga bantu bakutwalwa kwi̱twa, waajuniranga bakweti̱ gukubagoromora.
24.12: Osobora kukoba, “Ntakakyege!” Bei̱tu̱ yogwo asengeeja biteekerezu yeega bili mu mutima. Yogwo akulinda akyegi̱ri̱, alikusasula naasi̱gi̱ki̱ra ha milimo mi̱wakoori̱. Kyamaku̱mi̱ gabiri na mukaaga
24.13: Mwana wange, dyanga b̯uhooki b̯ubba b̯urungi, manyondo gaab̯wo ganolira ki̱mwei̱.
24.14: Okyege nti, magezi̱ nka b̯uhooki ganolira mutima gwamu, kakubba ogaagya olibba kurungi, naku̱ni̱hi̱ra kwamu tikulimalika. Kubaza kwa maku̱mi̱ gabiri na musanju
24.15: Otabba mubiibi aramagira murungi, weehalenge ku̱ru̱mba nnyu̱mba gyamwe,
24.16: kubba nab̯wagwa mirundi musanju asigala naabyoka, bei̱tu̱ babiibi nibaswaswanika nibamaliraho ki̱mwei̱. Kyamaku̱mi̱ gabiri na munaanei
24.17: Oteeb̯uganga munyanzigwa waamu yaakagweb̯wangaho kabii, otamu̱sekereeryanga b̯uyaakagwanga hansi.
24.18: Kubba wolibikora, Mukama alikuzingalira, naalekaho kumufubira. Kubaza kwa maku̱mi̱ gabiri na mwenda
24.19: Otatuntuliranga bantu babiibi, habbe kukwatirwa i̱hali̱ nkori̱ za bibii,
24.20: kubba mubiibi talitunga birungi, ali̱lu̱ma b̯u̱lu̱mi̱ nka taara. Kubaza kwa maku̱mi̱ gasatu
24.21: Mwana wange, ti̱i̱nanga Mukama na mu̱lemi̱, kandi otadi̱danga na bantu bajeemu̱.
24.22: Babiri bab̯wo basobora kubahwerekereerya hahwo b̯uloho b̯uloho haloho yeegi̱ri̱ b̯ujune b̯ulileetwa bab̯wo babiri? Bigambu bindi bya magezi̱
24.23: Bibi nabyo bili bigambu bya magezi̱. Muze gwa kusemba rubaju lu̱mwi̱ tigubba gurungi.
24.24: Aweera mubiibi nti, “Toli na musangu,” bantu balimukyena kandi balimunoba.
24.25: Baramu̱ri̱ bafubira nkori̱ za bibii, baliheeb̯wa mu̱gi̱sa.
24.26: Akuweera mananu, abba akwolokeeye mukagu gwa biribiri.
24.27: Banza otegeke misiri omisimbe, kasi obi̱mbe nnyu̱mba.
24.28: Otarumirizanga mu̱taahi̱ atali na nsonga, otabazanga b̯u̱gobya.
24.29: Otakobanga nti, “Kyankoori̱ nagya ndikimukora, ndikimusasula ki̱i̱yankoori̱.”
24.30: Nyaarabi̱ri̱ mu ndimiro gya mugarei, mu musiri gwa mi̱zabbi̱bbu̱ gwa ntwarwa.
24.31: Gwali gwi̱zwi̱ri̱ mahwa, gu̱ju̱mbi̱ri̱ neirungu, na lugo lwagwo lwa mahi̱ga lu̱gwi̱ri̱.
24.33: “Kandaaleho kadooli̱, kandindeho kadooli̱, kammpu̱u̱mu̱u̱lyeho mikono kadooli̱.”
24.34: Mwomwo nnaku zi̱li̱kwi̱zi̱ra nka mwi̱bi̱, ni̱zi̱ku̱ru̱mba nka mutemu.

25.1: Kandi zizi nazo zili ngeera za Sulumaani, badulu ba Mukama Heezeki̱ya wa Yu̱da zi̱bakoporoori̱.
25.2: Ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya Ruhanga kulinda nsita kya bakama kubba ku̱hu̱lu̱kya makuru.
25.3: Iguru nka kulibba hakyendi̱ na nsi nka kugiicala gilei, kwokwo de otasobora kwetegereza mitima mya bakama.
25.4: Kakubba bantu batoola b̯u̱rofu̱ mu feeza kugifoora gyei̱cu̱mi̱, baheesa byoma bakusobora kukoramwo bintu birungi.
25.5: Toolaho bantu babiibi mu mei̱so ga mukama, na b̯u̱lemi̱ b̯wamwe b̯ulyegeb̯wa kubba b̯wa b̯unanu.
25.6: Lekanga kwetwala mu mei̱so hali mukama ali, rundi kwemeera mu kiikaru cali bantu ba bi̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa bali,
25.7: hakiri bakuweera yati, “Weesu̱ma oicaare haha,” kukira kukuswazira mu babi̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa. Nooli na byoweeni̱ na mei̱so gaamu
25.8: otanguhanga kunyegeera nsonga gyensei̱ mu mbuga gya mateeka olikola teetei̱ hakumaliira, kakubba harugayo muntu aku̱ku̱honereerya weewe kubba mu̱nsobi̱?
25.9: Wakabbanga na nsonga na mwi̱ra waamu, mugimalenge nywenkei mu nsita gi̱takabbeeri̱ kwetegerezeb̯we mu bandi.
25.10: Kakubba mutamala nsonga zi̱zo, bantu banene bakwi̱za kukwega nka muntu atagira nsita, kandi tolyejuna ki̱kyo kihemu.
25.11: Kigambu ki̱zi̱i̱ri̱ mu kasu̱mi̱ kaakyo, kiisana zaabbu mu lukimba lwa feeza.
25.12: Kuhab̯ura kwa muntu wa magezi̱ aweera yogwo yeetege kwegwa, kibba kyamugasu kukira bikwatu bikore kuruga mu zaabbu.
25.13: Mukwenda mwesigwa ahu̱u̱mu̱u̱lya mu̱mu̱tu̱mi̱, nka meezi̱ geenyamu̱ gaakunywa b̯u̱gahu̱u̱mu̱u̱lya baganywi̱ mu b̯wi̱re wa lyoba.
25.14: Aragani̱sya bisembu byataku̱doosereerya, abba nka byalu na mpehu bitaguma ndagali̱.
25.15: Kugumisiriza ku̱sonasooni̱a mu̱lemi̱, kandi kalimi kaheheeru̱ kooko korobya muntu.
25.16: B̯wolibba na b̯uhooki, dya b̯wokusobora, otali̱i̱za kudya kyakalaseeni̱ okamaliira ob̯u̱tu̱naki̱ri̱.
25.17: Otab̯ungiranga mwi̱ra waamu mirundi minene, akamaliira akweganyi̱ri̱ kandi aku̱nobi̱ri̱.
25.18: Kuhangiira mwi̱ra waamwe, kiisana ku̱mu̱lwani̱sya okweti̱ mubbeere, mpirima, rundi mbasi.
25.19: Kwesiga muntu atakuloho mu b̯wi̱re wa b̯uzib̯u, kiisana nka ku̱di̱sya liino li̱seeri̱ rundi nka wa kihote ha kigulu.
25.20: Ku̱hi̱i̱mi̱ra kyembu kirungi muntu ali na b̯ujune, kiisana nka kumusomola ngoye mu b̯wi̱re b̯wi̱nyamu̱, rundi nka kumubbwomira mu̱kwa mu kihote.
25.21: Munyanzigwa waamu nzala b̯ugyamudyanga omuhenge bidyo, nyoota b̯ugyamukwatanga omuhenge meezi̱ ga kunywa.
25.22: Mu kukora yatyo olibba nookumuleetera kuswara, omu̱hembeeri̱ mworo ku mu̱twe, kandi we Mukama alikusasula.
25.23: Nka mpehu ziruga mu mukono gumoso zileeta ndagali̱, kwokwo de kalimi kahesa kaleeta ki̱ni̱ga.
25.24: Hakiri oicala mu ki̱si̱i̱si̱ra, kukira kwicala mu nnyu̱mba gi̱mwei̱ na mu̱kali̱ weizongobo.
25.25: Kwegwa makuru garungi garu̱gi̱ri̱ hadei, kili nka kunywa meezi̱ gei̱nyamu̱ kumala nnyoota.
25.26: Muntu murungi watwalwa bikorwa bya mubiibi, abba nka misu rundi nka i̱zu̱ba li̱ku̱hu̱lu̱kya meezi̱ gatomboku̱.
25.27: Nka kukitecala kirungi kudya b̯uhooki b̯unene, kwokwo de ki̱tasemeeri̱ kwetoleerya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamu wenkei.
25.28: Muntu aterinda, eisana nka rub̯uga lunyakwingirirwa lutali na bi̱si̱i̱ka byakwerinda.

26.1: Nka byalu ku̱bi̱tetagi̱sya mu kyanda, rundi ndagali̱ mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa kukesa, kwokwo ki̱tetagi̱sya kuha mudoma ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
26.2: Nka mantanta akwelongoolya atakwi̱cya, kwokwo na mukyenu gutaakwate muntu gutagira b̯u̱si̱gi̱ki̱ro.
26.3: Mbooko zikuuta mbaraasi, nkobba nizibboha mi̱nwa mya ndogoyi̱, mubbeere gukuuta mugongo gwa mudoma.
26.4: Mudoma otali̱mwi̱ramwo mu mu̱li̱ngo gwa b̯udoma, aleke nawe otalibba nka yo.
26.5: Bei̱tu̱ nookwi̱ramwo badoma, bolookye nka kubali basu̱ru̱, kwokwo baleke kwezeta ba magezi̱.
26.6: Kutuma mudoma b̯ukwenda, obba wetemi̱ri̱ ntege, kandi weeteeri̱ mu kabii.
26.7: Nka magulu ga mulima kugeicala nigasuleeba, na lugeera lubacwera mudoma tulubba namugasu.
26.8: Kuha mudoma ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa oisana nka kubbohira i̱hi̱ga ku kimancuuru.
26.9: Lugeera lwa badoma bacwa, kiisana nka mu̱tami̱i̱ru̱ kwezokola ihwa mu ngalu.
26.10: Muntu akoresya mudoma milimo rundi muntu gyakagi̱i̱rye, eisana nka mulasa mbasi atabali̱ri̱i̱ri̱.
26.11: Mudoma ei̱ri̱ra kukora byab̯udoma, eisana nka mbwene gi̱i̱ri̱ra bituna byagyo.
26.12: Waaweeni̱ho muntu akwezeta wa magezi̱? Bantu bani̱hi̱ramwo birungi mu kukira yo.
26.13: Mugarei akuweera, “Ntali gili hanzei mu muhanda! Ntali gili mu ngu̱u̱do!”
26.14: Nka mulyangu kugwicala nigwehinduhindulira ha pata zaagwo, kwokwo de mugarei eicala niyehinduhindula mu ntabbu gyamwe.
26.15: Mugarei waakolya itongi mu nnyeni̱, li̱mu̱jwahya kulita mu mu̱nwa.
26.16: Mugarei yeezeta mu̱gezi̱ kukira bantu musanju bei̱ramu nakwegyendereza.
26.17: Muntu yeezi̱ngi̱i̱rya mu mpaka zitakumukwataho, eisana nka muntu akukwata mapokopo ga mbwene gyateegi̱ri̱.
26.18: Eisana nka muntu mugweraru, aku̱hu̱ngu̱u̱lya mworo naalasa na b̯uta,
26.19: yooyo muntu agobya mwi̱ra, naakoba nyakali kusandaara b̯u̱sandaari̱.
26.20: Nkwi̱ hazitali mworo gu̱lu̱mambe, na mu̱hesi̱ hatali tihabbaho izongobo.
26.21: Muntu abyokereerya izongobo aleeta kulwana, nka nkwi̱, rundi makala gakwaka gatakumalikira.
26.22: Makuru gacwe ganolira akugegwa nka bidyo bi̱nolu̱ kubiicala mu nda.
26.23: Bantu babaza birungi nibakutekereza kukora bibiibi, beisana kyese ki̱si̱i̱gi̱rwe feeza.
26.24: Muntu wa nnobi̱, agobyagobya bantu na bigambu byamwe, kandi b̯u̱gobya ab̯u̱bi̱sa mu mutima gwamwe.
26.25: Nab̯walibazanga birungi teetei̱, otalimwikiriza, kubba ali na bibiibi musanju byabi̱i̱ki̱ri̱ mu mutima gwamwe.
26.26: Nnobi̱ gyamwe gisobora kwebi̱sa hab̯wa bu̱gobya, bei̱tu̱ b̯ubiibi b̯wamwe b̯ulizooka hasyanu̱ mu bantu beicala nabo.
26.27: Muntu alilima b̯u̱hya, ali̱b̯u̱gwamwo, kandi muntu abi̱ri̱ngi̱tya i̱hi̱ga yooyo li̱mwi̱ri̱ra.
26.28: Kalimi kab̯u̱gobya kanoba gi̱kagobeerye, kandi kunweneeka kuleeta kuhwerekeera.

27.1: Otepanki̱sya byokugyenda kukora mwakya, kubba ti̱wegi̱ri̱ kikugyenda kubbaho mu kiro.
27.2: Leka bantu bandi boobo bakuhaariize, kukira we wenkei kwehaariiza.
27.3: Mahi̱ga na musinyi biicala byozoho, bei̱tu̱ ki̱ni̱ga kya mudoma, kikira bi̱byo byensei̱.
27.4: Muntu wa ki̱ni̱ga abba mubiibi, bei̱tu̱ wei̱hali̱ akiraho.
27.5: Kirungi kucomera mu rwatu, kukira kwolokya ngonzi mu̱kyebi̱si̱i̱re.
27.6: Kulamba kwa munywani kubba kwa mananu, bei̱tu̱ ku̱ramu̱kya kwa munyanzigwa b̯ubba b̯u̱gobya.
27.7: Mwi̱cu̱tu̱ yooyo akoba b̯uhooki tib̯ukunola, bei̱tu̱ ali nzala, na kilulu akyeta ki̱nolu̱.
27.8: Muntu aleka makaa gaamwe akazaahira handi, abba nka nnyoni̱ gi̱ti̱gi̱ri̱ kizonza kyagyo.
27.9: Maku̱ta gaku̱b̯u̱nyo kurungi gasemaza mutima, na mukagu gurungi guleetwa kuhanuura kurungi.
27.10: Otalyebeera munywanwo, rundi munywani wa bbaawu, kandi otalib̯ungiiranga weenyu̱ nooli mu bizib̯u, mu̱taahi̱, akira munyaruganda akuli hadei.
27.11: Mwana wange bbanga mu̱gezi̱, osemeze mutima gwange, kwokwo ntunge kyakwi̱ramwo akumbihiza.
27.12: Akwetegereza awona kabii ni̱kakwi̱za niyebbala, bei̱tu̱ ntwarwa gyecoberab̯wecoberi̱ nigiwonawona nakyo.
27.13: B̯wema b̯wa ategebeerwe, b̯uli na kusembwa musimbo, asagika munyamahanga alinakumusasulira.
27.14: Kakubba muntu akeera ku̱ramu̱kya mu̱taahi̱ neitoko, kiwonwa nka mukyeno.
27.15: Mu̱kali̱ weizongobo, eisana nka ndagali̱ gikutuntula gitakwamuka.
27.16: Kumugaana kuzongoba oisana okutanga mpehu, rundi kukwata maku̱ta mu ngalu.
27.17: Kyoma nka kukiteekera kyoma, kwokwo de muntu ateekera mwi̱ra.
27.18: Woroora musaali okwi̱za kugudyaho byana, linda mukama waamu akwi̱za ku̱ku̱si̱i̱ma.
27.19: Nka muntu kuyeewona mu meezi̱, kwokwo de mutima gwamwe gwolokya kiki kyali.
27.20: Kuzumu nka kukutadweb̯wa baku̱u̱, kwokwo de mei̱so ga muntu gatajwaha kuwona.
27.21: Feeza na zaabbu bi̱pi̱mwa mworo, bei̱tu̱ muntu api̱mwa bikumuhaariiza.
27.22: Mudoma nowomukuuta heehi̱ ku̱mwi̱ta b̯wi̱ti̱, b̯udoma waamwe tib̯umumalikamwo.
27.23: Weega kulinda kurungi ntaama na mbu̱li̱ zaamu, kandi oteeho mutima ku nte zaamu.
27.24: Kubba itungu tilyomeeraho biro na biro, na kondo giicalaho biro byensei̱?
27.25: Isubi b̯ulyoma, hameraho lindi, na lya ku lusahu balisala nibalisoorozera bisolo.
27.26: Okusobora kutunda ntaama na mbu̱li̱, kugula itehe na bilwalu.
27.27: Okwi̱za kubba na mate ga mbu̱li̱ oganywe na mu̱gi̱ gwamu, kandi bahala bakori̱ baamu baganywe gababi̱mbe mibiri.

28.1: Babiibi bei̱ru̱ka kadi hataloho akubabinga, bei̱tu̱ bananu babba basi̱gi̱ku̱ nka ntali.
28.2: Ihanga b̯ulibba li̱jeemu̱ libba na balemi̱ banene, bei̱tu̱ hali mu̱lemi̱ mu̱gezi̱ kandi akwetegereza, liicala li̱tekanu̱.
28.3: Mu̱lemi̱ mubiibi abonebonesya banaku, abba nka ndagali̱ gya kihehu, gikahenera bilimwa.
28.4: Agaya biragiro, ahaariiza babiibi, bei̱tu̱ abikwata abalwani̱syambe.
28.5: Babiibi tibeega b̯winganiza, bei̱tu̱ bahondera Mukama bab̯wetegereziira ki̱mwei̱.
28.6: Kirungi kubba munaku nokulibatira mu b̯u̱terekereru̱, kukira kubba mu̱gu̱u̱da mu̱b̯u̱bbaamu̱.
28.7: Mwana akwata biragiro, abba na magezi̱, bei̱tu̱ anywana na bamururu aswaza bbaawe.
28.8: Ku̱kanyi̱a itungu nooraba mukutolaho bantu magoba ganene, lilimaliira mu nsahu gya mwenda.
28.9: Muntu b̯wagaya biragiro bya Ruhanga, kusaba kwamwe Ruhanga talikwegwa.
28.10: Yensei̱ ahabi̱sya barungi, alyeguma mu mutegu gwamwe, bei̱tu̱ batali na kabii baligweterwa birungi.
28.11: Mu̱gu̱u̱da asobora kwewona nka mu̱gezi̱, bei̱tu̱ munaku akwetegereza awona bi̱doori̱.
28.12: Muntu murungi waalema, bantu baasemererwambe, bei̱tu̱ mubiibi b̯ubamuhandya, bantu bei̱ru̱ka kwebi̱sa.
28.13: Abbumbiira bibii byamwe talitunga mu̱gi̱sa, bei̱tu̱ abyatula akabileka alitunga mbabazi̱.
28.14: Mukama aha mu̱gi̱sa yensei̱ ati̱i̱na kukora kibiibi, bei̱tu̱ atati̱i̱na aligwa mu kabii.
28.15: Mu̱lemi̱ mubiibi abonebonesya banaku, eisana ntali gikuhuruguma, rundi musege gu̱ku̱hi̱i̱ga kya kudya.
28.16: Mu̱lemi̱ atali na magezi̱ ahutaaza bantu bayebembera, bei̱tu̱ asuula bya b̯u̱nyagi̱ alyomeera.
28.17: Muntu waabba nakujunaanwa hab̯wa b̯wi̱ti̱, mwamulekanga eicale naparaara, hatabbaho muntu yensei̱ akumujuna
28.18: Akora birungi yooyo alijunwa, bei̱tu̱ ateesigwa ali̱zi̱ka b̯wangu.
28.19: Akwekamba kulima abba na bidyo binene, bei̱tu̱ ei̱ru̱kya bitakugasa anakuhara ki̱mwei̱.
28.20: Mwesigwa alitunga mi̱gi̱sa mitakubalwa, bei̱tu̱ wa mururu gweitungu alifubirwa.
28.21: Kusoroora mu bantu kiicala kibiibi, bei̱tu̱ hab̯wa ngu̱zi̱ gi̱dooli̱, muntu amaliira asoobeerye.
28.22: Mupu eicala ni̱yendya ku̱gu̱du̱hara, bei̱tu̱ atakwega nti nnaku gyogyo gi̱mu̱li̱ndi̱ri̱i̱ri̱.
28.23: Kuhab̯ura kwa mananu ku̱si̱i̱mwa, kukira kalimi kakuhaariiza.
28.24: Yogwo ei̱ba babyeru̱ baamwe akateekereza tasobeerye, abba mwi̱bi̱ nyakabara.
28.25: Waamururu yooyo aleeta mpaka, bei̱tu̱ yeesiga Mukama ali̱gu̱du̱hara.
28.26: Yeesiga nteekereza gyamwe yankei abba mudoma, bei̱tu̱ alibatira mu magezi̱ alibba kurungi.
28.27: Agabira banaku talibba na b̯wetaagu, bei̱tu̱ abei̱ti̱ira li̱i̱so alitunga mikyenu.
28.28: Babiibi b̯u̱bei̱za mu b̯u̱lemi̱ bantu ni̱bebi̱sa, bei̱tu̱ b̯ubahwerekera barungi nibabyoka.

29.1: Muntu walihanwa mirundi minene, akalemwa kwetegereza, alihwerekeera cekeceke.
29.2: Bantu barungi b̯ubabba ha b̯u̱lemi̱, habbaho kusemererwa, bei̱tu̱ balemi̱ babiibi baleeta kwenghu̱ru̱nghu̱u̱tya.
29.3: Yendya magezi̱ aleetera bbaawe kusemererwa, bei̱tu̱ yeekwata benzi̱ amalaho itungu lyamwe.
29.4: Mukama waalema na b̯winganiza nsi nigiterekeera, bei̱tu̱ yendya byakwegula abba amaari̱ kugitemula.
29.5: Muntu ahaariiza mwi̱ra, abba nakwetega magulu.
29.6: Muntu mubiibi akwatwa kibii kyamwe, bei̱tu̱ murungi eicala naahi̱i̱ma na kusemererwa.
29.7: Murungi yegi̱ri̱ banaku bi̱basemereeri̱ kutunga bei̱tu̱ mubiibi tabyega.
29.8: Bagayi̱ batab̯ura rub̯uga, bei̱tu̱ bagezi̱ baleeta b̯u̱si̱nge.
29.9: Mu̱gezi̱ watongona na mudoma, mudoma akwatwa ki̱ni̱ga kandi naaseka, bei̱tu̱ nab̯wo tihabbaho b̯u̱si̱nge.
29.10: Bei̱ti̱ banoba muntu murungi, kandi ni̱bendya ku̱mwi̱ta.
29.11: Mudoma yolookeerya ki̱mwei̱ ki̱ni̱ga kyamwe, bei̱tu̱ mu̱gezi̱ yeerinda naaki̱holereerya b̯u̱holya.
29.12: Mu̱lemi̱ b̯u̱yetegeerya b̯u̱gobya, bayolo baamwe bensei̱ babba babiibi.
29.13: Munaku na yogwo amuwonawonesya, bali na habarombi̱ra, bensei̱ Mukama yooyo abaha kwetegereza mananu.
29.14: Kakubba mukama asala musangu gwa b̯ulyo hali banaku, b̯u̱lemi̱ b̯wamwe b̯ukusobora kwomeera.
29.15: Kibboko na kuhab̯urwa bileeta magezi̱, bei̱tu̱ mwana gi̱balekereeri̱ aswaza mmaawe
29.16: Bantu babiibi b̯ubalema, bibii nibyeyongera, bei̱tu̱ barungi baliwona ku̱zi̱ka kwab̯u.
29.17: Wegesyanga mwana waamu ali̱ku̱hu̱mu̱u̱lya, kandi alikuha kusemererwa.
29.18: Ihanga b̯ulitebemberwa Ruhanga tiliterekeera, wa mu̱gi̱sa yeerinda biragiro.
29.19: Bigambu bisa tibisobora kulamba mwiru, kubba nab̯uyetegereza tasobora kutaho mutima.
29.20: Mudoma bamu̱ni̱hi̱ramwo birungi kukira yangu̱hi̱ri̱i̱rya kubaza.
29.21: Kakubba odedya mu̱kori̱ kuruga mu b̯uto, alikufookera kizib̯u.
29.22: Wa ki̱ni̱ga abyokya izongobo, azingala b̯wangu akora bibiibi binene.
29.23: Myehembu mileeta kuswara, bei̱tu̱ mweb̯u̱ndaazi̱ aheeb̯wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
29.24: Akwatagana na mwi̱bi̱, annoba b̯womi, b̯ubamurahirisya mwicwero lya musangu, talinakyeramwo.
29.25: Ku̱ti̱i̱na muntu kubba kwetega mutegu, bei̱tu̱ yeesiga Mukama alitunga b̯u̱si̱nge.
29.26: Bantu banene bendya kwenolya hali balemi̱, bei̱tu̱ Mukama yooyo aleetaho b̯winganiza.
29.27: Muntu murungi anoba mubiibi, na mubiibi naanoba murungi.

30.1: Kuku kwokwo kubaza na kuwonekerwa kwʼAgu̱ru̱ mu̱tabani̱ wa Yaake. Muntu alimukuliriira Ruhanga nti, Njwahi̱ri̱!
30.2: Mananu ndi mudoma, kandi tindi na magezi̱.
30.3: Tinkatunganga magezi̱ rundi kwetegereza kwa Mutongoole
30.4: Naani yaatembi̱ri̱ mwiguru akei̱ra akasi̱ri̱mu̱ka? Naani yaasorozi̱ri̱ mpehu akagikwatira mu ngalu? Naani yaakazi̱ngi̱ranga meezi̱ mu ngoye zaamwe? Naani yaakeganga nkangu gya nsi? Ibara lyamwe naani? Kandi lya mwana waamwe naani? Mbwera wakabba weegi̱ri̱!
30.5: B̯uli kigambu kya Ruhanga kibba kya mananu, yooyo ngab̯u gya bab̯wo beebi̱si̱ra muli yo.
30.6: Otali̱teeryangaho ku bigambu byamwe, akwi̱za kukucoomera akwete mu̱gobya.
30.7: Ruhanga wange, ntakakwi̱ri̱ nkukusaba ompe bintu bibiri:
30.8: Nfoora wamananu. Otandeka nkabba munaku, rundi mu̱gu̱u̱da hoi̱, ongabire bikummala.
30.9: Kakubba mba na binene, nsobora kukwebeera nkakoba yati, “ Mukama yooyo naani? Tinkumwetaaga,” aleke ntalibba munaku nkei̱ba, nkaswaza ibara lyamu, ai̱ Ruhanga wange.
30.10: Otalibazanga kubiibi mu̱kori̱ hali mukama waamwe, alikukyena nowonawona.
30.11: Haloho bantu bakyena babbaawaawu, kandi batendeerya karungi bamaawaawu.
30.12: Haloho beewona nka barungi mu mei̱so gaab̯u, batalinaho, kandi babiibi nibalemwa kwezi̱ramwo bibii byab̯u.
30.13: Haloho bantu beetwala kubba bahakyendi̱ hoi̱, nibeetwala kubba nibakukira b̯uli muntu.
30.14: Haloho bantu ba meino gaab̯u geicala nka mpirima, na nsaya zaab̯u zibba nka nsone, kuhutaaza banaku na bali mub̯wetaagu.
30.15: Mundidi guli na bahara babiri, beicala nibasaba yati, “Mpa! Mpa!” Heicalaho bintu bisatu biteicuta, binei bitakoba, “Ki̱ndoori̱,” byobyo:
30.16: Kuzumu, nda gya mu̱kali̱ mugumba, nsi giicala nigirakiira meezi̱, na mworo tigukoba “Ki̱ndoori̱!”
30.17: Muntu atetegeerya bbaawe akagaya na mmaawe, mei̱so gaamwe galisomwa bi̱nyoni̱, adiib̯we masega.
30.18: Heicalaho bintu bisatu bimpuneeza hoi̱, binei bintetegereza:
30.19: mu̱li̱ngo gwa wambooli̱ adu̱ndu̱u̱ki̱ra mu mwanya, mu̱li̱ngo gwa mpiri girabira ku lubbaali, mu̱li̱ngo gwa b̯wati̱ b̯ulibatira mwitaka, mu̱li̱ngo mudulu ali̱gi̱ramu muhala.
30.20: Gigi gyogyo nkora gya mu̱kali̱ mwenzi̱: adya niyesusura mu̱nwa, naakoba, “Tindi na kibiibi ki̱nkoori̱.”
30.21: Haloho bintu bisatu bi̱zi̱ngi̱i̱zya nsi, binei bigitasobora kugumisiriza,
30.22: mwiru kufooka mukama, mudoma kubba na bidyo bikumala,
30.23: mu̱kali̱ wa bikorwa bibiibi kutungwa, muzana kugweterwa makaa ga mu̱go waamwe.
30.24: Bintu binei biicala bi̱dooli̱ ku nsi, bei̱tu̱ bya magezi̱ ganene:
30.25: Nkakabi ziicala b̯u̱si̱i̱sa b̯u̱dooli̱, bei̱tu̱ weebikira bidyo bya kudya mu b̯wi̱re wa kyanda.
30.26: Nsengi̱ giicala na maani gadooli̱, bei̱tu̱ gyebi̱mbi̱ra b̯wicalu mu lubbaali.
30.27: Nzi̱ge tizigira mwebemberi̱, bei̱tu̱ zilibatira mu lukaara.
30.28: Garagara mwangu kumukwatira mu ngalu, bei̱tu̱ omwagya mu kikaali.
30.29: Haloho bintu bisatu bilibata nibyegonza, binei b̯ubibba nibikulibata bihambiriza kubiwonaho byobyo bibi:
30.30: ntali kisolo kikirayo maani, tihaloho kintu ki̱gi̱ti̱ni̱si̱ri̱i̱rya,
30.31: mpanga, mpaaya gya mbu̱li̱, na mukama wei̱he lyetoroori̱.
30.32: B̯wobba oi̱ceeri̱ nookora bya b̯udoma, kandi notegeka kukora b̯ubiibi, weerinda kalimi kaamu.
30.33: Wocunda mate harugamwo maku̱ta ga nte. Wokuuta muntu nni̱ndo harugamu ibbanga. Wotabbula ki̱ni̱ga, ogwa mu kabii.

31.1: Bigambu bya Mukama Lameeri̱, mmaawe bi̱yaamwegeseerye.
31.2: Kikyani kyolimukukora? Kikyani kyolimukukora mwana wa mu nda gyange? Kikyani kyolimukukora mwana wa kirahiro kyange?
31.3: Otamalira maani gaamu hali bakali̱, bahwerekeereerya na bakama.
31.4: Lameeri̱, weetegeerya. Ki̱doori̱ kwahi bakama kunywanga maaci, rundi balemi̱ kunywa binyweb̯wa bilulu.
31.5: Kugunywa kukuha kwebeera b̯ujunanizib̯wa b̯wamu, na ku̱wonawonesya baseege.
31.6: Maaci ganyweb̯wa bali heehi̱ ku̱kwa, na yogwo ali na b̯ujune b̯unene.
31.7: Leka bagunywe bebeere nnaku zaab̯u, kandi bataliriira kwi̱zu̱ka kuwonawona kwab̯u.
31.8: Baliziriranga bab̯wo batali na b̯ubalizo, olwaniriirenge bab̯wo batali na akubakonyera.
31.9: Bazanga bya kulwaniira b̯winganiza, nolwaniira b̯ugabe b̯wa baseege na bali mu b̯wetaagu. Kuhaariiza Mu̱kali̱ Murungi
31.10: Mu̱kali̱ wa ngesu zirungi naani asobora ku̱mwagya? Muhendu gwamwe gukira gwa mahi̱ga ga muhendu gunene.
31.12: Yogwo mu̱kali̱ mu b̯womi b̯wamwe b̯wensei̱, akolera i̱baawe birungi kandi tamutwala kubiibi.
31.13: Atoolya byoza bya ntaama na pamba yaamikoramwo ngoye na kusemererwa.
31.14: Ali nka b̯wati̱ wa basu̱b̯u̱ri̱ kandi aleeta bidyo byamwe kuruga hadei.
31.15: Abyoka b̯u̱takakeeri̱, naategekera ba mu nnyu̱mba gyamwe bya kudya, kandi ni̱yolookeerya bahala bakori̱ baamwe kyakukora.
31.16: B̯u̱yaagya musiri, agugula, naakoresya nsimbi zaamwe yankei naagusimbamwo mi̱zabbi̱bbu̱.
31.17: Yeekamba kukora na maani kandi na mikono myamwe miicala minyamaani ku b̯ujunanizib̯wa b̯wamwe.
31.18: Yeetegereza mugasu gwa bintu bya kukora, naacwamwo kukora i̱jolo acu̱mu̱ki̱ri̱ taara gyamwe.
31.19: Yongosa mahu̱u̱zi̱ gaamwe yankei na lukamwona ngoye.
31.20: Abba na kisa mu ku̱konyera baseege, na bali mu b̯wetaagu.
31.21: Kadi b̯wi̱re b̯wi̱nyami̱ri̱, tati̱i̱na hab̯wakubba ba mu nnyu̱mba gyamwe abalwalya ngoye zi̱tagatu̱.
31.22: Yeekolera suuka kandi nalwala ngoye zi̱di̱ zi̱ku̱nyi̱ri̱ra na zi̱ku̱serya.
31.23: I̱baawe aheeb̯wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa mu rub̯uga, na mu bataahi̱ baamwe.
31.24: Mu̱kali̱ yogwo asu̱nga ngoye na miheeko, naazi̱tu̱ndu̱sya basu̱b̯u̱ri̱.
31.25: Abba wa maani kandi wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa ataku̱ti̱i̱na ki̱kwi̱za kubbaho.
31.26: Abaza bya magezi̱, Yeegesya na mbabazi̱.
31.27: Alingiira ba mu nnyu̱mba gyamwe, kandi tadya byatakolereeri̱.
31.28: Baana baamwe bamweta wa mu̱gi̱sa, kandi i̱ba eicala naamu̱haari̱i̱za.
31.29: Bakali̱ banene barungi, bei̱tu̱ we okira bensei̱.
31.30: Kwegomba mubiri gwa mu̱kali̱ ku̱gobya b̯u̱gobya, bei̱tu̱ mu̱kali̱ aku̱ti̱i̱na Mukama Ruhanga ali̱si̱i̱mwa.
31.31: Mumuhe byakolereeri̱, kandi milimo myamwe mi̱mu̱haari̱i̱zi̱sye mu bantu banene.

1.1: Kiro ki̱mwei̱, Mukama yaaweereeri̱ Yona mu̱tabani̱ wʼAmitaayi
1.2: yati, “Byokya ogyende mu lu̱lwo rub̯uga lukooto lwetwa Ni̱neeva, orangire bantu baamwona nti, ‘Ncwi̱ri̱mwo ku̱bahwerekereerya, kubba nyeetegeri̱i̱ze nka kubali na bibiibi binene.’ ”
1.3: Bei̱tu̱ yo Yona, yaabyokeerye yaakwata muhanda gundi gwa kwi̱ru̱ki̱ra Tarasi̱i̱si̱, aleke aruge hali Mukama; yaasi̱ri̱mu̱ka Yopa, hayaagi̱i̱rye b̯wati̱ b̯ukooto bukugyenda Tarasi̱i̱si̱. Yaasasula sente zaa b̯wati̱ kumutwala, yaabutemba, agyende Tarasi̱i̱si̱ na banyakubbamwona, aruge hali Mukama. Mukama Nafubira Yona
1.4: Bei̱tu̱ b̯ubaali nibakugyenda, Mukama yaaleeti̱ri̱ bbuukuulu munene hoi̱ mwitaka; haabbamu bijanga byakalasanu̱ b̯ukooto, binyakubba nibili heehi̱ kwata b̯wati̱.
1.5: Ki̱kyo, kyati̱ni̱si̱i̱rye hoi̱ bakori̱ ba mu b̯wati̱. B̯uli omwei̱ yaatandika kwesengereerya kihala kya kwamwabu kibajune kizubu kibaalingimu; baaguma migugu minyakubba mu b̯wati̱, mwitaka, aleke b̯wati̱ buhuhe. Bei̱tu̱ Yona yo, yaali amaari̱ ku̱si̱ri̱mu̱ka kwansi mu b̯wati̱, aleeri̱ kandi yeebbaki̱i̱ri̱ ki̱mwei̱.
1.6: Mwomwo mu̱handu̱ wa b̯wati̱ yaamugyendera yaamu̱bu̱u̱lya, “We, osobora teetei̱ kwebbaka? Byoka olaame hali kihala kya kwamwenyu̱, kisobora ku̱twetegeerya, aleke tutahwerekeera.”
1.7: Kasi bakori̱ baaweerangana, “Tu̱cu̱u̱hye, aleke twege mu twe muntu atu̱gu̱mi̱ri̱ mu kizubu kiki.” Baacu̱u̱hya, baagya nali Yona.
1.8: Mwomwo baamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya, “Tu̱weere, naani aleteereerye kiki kizubu? Okora mulimo ki? Oruga hai? Oruga mwihanga ki? Oli muki?”
1.9: Yona yaabei̱ramu yati, “Ndi Mu̱hebbu̱rana, ndamya Mukama, Ruhanga wa mwiguru, munyakuhanga nsi neitaka.”
1.10: Yona yeeyongera kubaweera, “Nkwi̱ru̱ka kuruga hali Mukama.” Habwaki̱kyo, badulu baati̱i̱ni̱ri̱ hoi̱ hoi̱, kandi baamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya, “Kiki kyani kyokoori̱?”
1.11: B̯u̱b̯wonu, bbuukuulu na bijanga, byeyongerengi̱-bweyongeri̱. Habwaki̱kyo, bakori̱ baabu̱u̱lya Yona, “Kyani twe, kitwakukola, kyaleetera i̱taka kwema?”
1.12: Yona yaabei̱ramu yati, “Mu̱nsenge mungume mwitaka; li̱kwi̱za kwema. Kubba nyeegi̱ri̱ yogo bbuukuulu hamwenya na bijanga, bi̱i̱zi̱ri̱ hab̯wa nsobi̱ gyange.”
1.13: Bei̱tu̱ bo, baalwani̱si̱i̱rye kugoza magyenda ku mutanda. Kyonkei, batakasobore hab̯wakubba bbuukuulu na bijanga byeyongerengi̱-bweyongeri̱ kwakalasani̱a.
1.14: Habwaki̱kyo, bakori̱ beesengereerye Mukama nibakoba yati, “Beiraba Mukama, otatwi̱ta hab̯wa yogo mudulu; kandi otatujunaana hab̯wa ku̱mwi̱ti̱ra b̯usa, hab̯wakubba we Mukama weewe oki̱koori̱ nka ku̱wendeerye.”
1.15: Mwomwo baasenga Yona, baamuguma mwitaka; lyema.
1.16: Kiki kyabaleeteeri̱ ku̱ti̱i̱na hoi̱ Mukama, na kumusaara kyonzira, kandi, beeragani̱sya kumukooranga.
1.17: Bu̱baagu̱mi̱ri̱ Yona mwitaka, Mukama yaasi̱ndi̱ki̱ri̱ nsu̱ gikooto gyamumera. Yona yaamaari̱ mu nda gya nsu̱, minsi misatu na majolo gasatu.

2.1: Yona b̯uyaali mu nda gya nsu̱, yaasabi̱ri̱ Mukama Ruhanga waamwe
2.2: nakoba yati, “Bunyaali mu kizubu kyange, nyaataagi̱i̱ri̱ Mukama, kandi yankoonyera. Hakati̱ wa ki̱i̱na kya rufu, nyaalu̱ki̱ri̱ ninkusaba onkoonyere, waanyeetegeerya.
2.3: Wanju̱gu̱nyi̱ri̱ hakati̱ weitaka, mali̱, mu ndiha gyeitaka, mu̱hwi̱ gwa meezi̱ gwanyeelogoleerya, na bijanga byamu byensei̱, byandaba hakyendi̱.
2.4: Kandi nyaateekeri̱i̱ze, ‘Mbi̱ngi̱i̱rwe kuruga mu mei̱so gaamu; mali̱, ndi̱bu̱ni̱a mbone Yeekaru, Nyu̱mba gyamu gi̱tongoole.’
2.5: Meezi̱ gaanyeelogoleerye, heehi̱ ku̱nzi̱ta; ndiha gyamereeri̱ ki̱mwei̱, na bisubi bya mwitaka byanyeelyobi̱ri̱ ku mu̱twe.
2.6: Nyaagi̱zi̱i̱ri̱ nyaadwa hansi wa nsau zaa mwitaka, mu nsi gya baku̱u̱ ha nzi̱je zaagyo zanki̱ngi̱reeni̱ biro na biro. Bei̱tu̱ we Mukama Ruhanga wange, waaju̱ni̱ri̱ b̯womi bwange nobutoola mu ki̱i̱na.
2.7: Bunyaali nindi heehi̱ kukaba, nyei̱zu̱ki̱ri̱ we Mukama, kandi nawe, weegwa kusaba kwange, noli mu Yeekaru, Nyu̱mba gyamu gi̱tongoole.
2.8: Babwo bahaamiira ku̱ramya bi̱si̱sani̱ bitali na mugasu, beefeereza mbabazi̱ zaaku̱bbeeri̱ zaab̯u.
2.9: Bei̱tu̱ gya, nkwi̱za kukuhongera kyonzira ni̱nku̱ku̱hi̱i̱mi̱ra kyembu kya ku̱ku̱si̱i̱ma. Nkwi̱za kukora kiki ki̱nyeeragani̱si̱i̱rye, kujunwa kuruga hali Mukama.”
2.10: Mwomwo Mukama yaaragi̱ra nsu̱, gyatunaka Yona ku mutanda.

3.1: Mukama yaabu̱ni̱a yaaweera Yona,
3.2: “Byokya ogyende mu rub̯uga lukooto lwa Ni̱neeva, orangire bantu baamwona, b̯ukwenda bunkuheeri.”
3.3: Mwomwo Yona yaakora nka Mukama kuyaali amu̱weereeri̱, yaagyenda Ni̱neeva. Ni̱neeva, lwali rub̯uga lukooto, lukutwala biro bisatu kululibata okalurabamu.
3.4: Yona yeingira mu rub̯uga hab̯wa kiro ki̱mwei̱, narangiranga bantu baamwona yati, “Hasi̱geeri̱yo biro maku̱mi̱ ganei, rub̯uga lwa Ni̱neeva luhwerekerezebwe.”
3.5: Bantu baa Ni̱neeva bei̱ki̱ri̱i̱ze b̯ukwenda bu̱ru̱gi̱ri̱ hali Ruhanga; baarangiira kisiibo. Bantu bensei̱, kurugiira ki̱mwei̱ hali mu̱handu̱ waab̯u kudwera ki̱mwei̱ hali akusembayo, baalwala maku̱ti̱ya, kwolokya nti baali ni̱bakwezi̱ramwo.
3.6: B̯ukwenda b̯ub̯u bu̱bwadwerereeri̱ mukama wa Ni̱neeva, yaabyoki̱ri̱ yaaruga ha ntebe gyamwe gya b̯ukama; yaasomolamwo bilwalu byamwe bya b̯ukama, yaalwala maku̱ti̱ya, kandi yeicaara mwi̱syanu̱.
3.7: Mukama yaarangiira kiragiro mu Ni̱neeva gyensei̱: “Kiki kyokyo kiragiro kyange, gya mukama hamwenya na bahandu̱ bampondera, kinkuragira: “Hatabbaho muntu yensei̱, rundi kisolo, kudya kantu kensei̱. Nabugyabba nte, rundi mbu̱li̱, gitadya kandi gitanywa kantu kensei̱.
3.8: Bei̱tu̱ b̯uli muntu, akuragirwa kulwala maku̱ti̱ya; kandi na b̯uli kisolo baki̱lwalye maku̱ti̱ya. B̯uli muntu akuteekwa kwesengereerya Ruhanga na maani hoi̱; kandi akuragirwa kuleka bikorwa byamwe bibiibi na bu̱kabbu̱ru̱ b̯wamwe.
3.9: Naani yeegi̱ri̱? Ruhanga asobora kuhindula ncwamu gyamwe, natugiira mbabazi̱, naleka kukwatwa ki̱ni̱ga, nabula ku̱tu̱hwerekereerya.”
3.10: Ruhanga b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ bi̱baakoori̱, kandi beezi̱ri̱ri̱mwo bikorwa byab̯u bibiibi, yaabakwatirwa mbabazi̱ yaabula kubafubira nka kuyaali akobi̱ri̱.

4.1: Ruhanga butafubira bantu baa Ni̱neeva, kyasaali̱i̱ze hoi̱ Yona, yaakwatwa ki̱ni̱ga.
4.2: Yaasaba nakuuduumira Mukama, nakoba yati, “Tikyokyo nyaakobi̱ri̱ nincakali mu nsi gya kwamwetu̱? Kiki kyokyo kinyakubba ki̱mpeeri̱ kwi̱ru̱ki̱ra Tarasi̱i̱si̱. Nyeegi̱ri̱ nka kwoli Ruhanga alumirwa bantu kandi nobagiira mbabazi̱; ataranguha kukwatwa ki̱ni̱ga kandi ei̱zwi̱ri̱ ngonzi, aleka kuleeta kabii.
4.3: Nku̱kwesengereerya Mukama, leka nkwe; kubba gya ku̱kwa, kikunkiira kubba mwomi.”
4.4: Mwomwo Mukama yaamu̱bu̱u̱lya, “Kikudwa we kukwatwa ki̱ni̱ga?”
4.5: Yona yo, yaaruga mu rub̯uga lu̱lwo, yaagyenda buhuluka lyoba wa lwo, yeicaara. Ku̱kwo, Yona yeebi̱mbi̱i̱ri̱yo kasi̱i̱si̱ra, yeicaara mu mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ gwako ali̱ndi̱ri̱ kuwona kyani kyabbaho ha rub̯uga lwa Ni̱neeva.
4.6: Mukama Ruhanga, yaateereeri̱ho Yona kimera kikulanda. Kyahanda kyadwa hakyendi̱ waamwe kumuleetera mu̱tu̱ntu̱lu̱ ku mu̱twe gwamwe, aleke yeezegwe nali kurungi. Mwomwo Yona yaasemereerwa hoi̱ hab̯wa kimera ki̱kyo.
4.7: Bei̱tu̱ mwakya gunyakuhonderaho, Ruhanga yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ ki̱si̱i̱sa kyadya kimera ki̱kyo, ku̱doosya bu̱kyomi̱ri̱.
4.8: Lyoba bu̱lyasu̱u̱ki̱ri̱, Ruhanga yaaragi̱ra mpehu gihyo gya buhuluka lyoba gihunge magyenda hali Yona. Lyoba lyokya Yona ku mu̱twe, ku̱doosya bu̱yaagwerekereeri̱ kandi yeesabira ku̱kwa, nakoba yati, “Gya kubba mwomi, hakiri nkwa.”
4.9: Mwomwo Ruhanga yaab̯u̱u̱lya Yona, “Mali̱, kikudwa we kuzingala, hab̯wa ki̱kyo kimera kwoma?” Yona yei̱ramu, “Mali̱ kikudwa gya kuzingala. Ki̱ni̱ga ki̱nzakalaseeni̱, nyaakendya kadi nkwe.”
4.10: Mwomwo Mukama yaakoba, “Okurumirirwa kimera kwoma, we kyotakolereeri̱, kandi kyotasi̱mbi̱ri̱, kinyakuhanda mu kiro ki̱mwei̱ kandi kyahwerekeera mu kiro ki̱mwei̱.
4.11: Bei̱tu̱ gya, hab̯waki ntarumirirwa kuhwerekeera kwa rub̯uga lwa Ni̱neeva lulimwo baana batali na ki̱beegi̱ri̱, bakukira ha mitwaru i̱ku̱mi̱ na mibiri hamwenya na bisolo binene?” Jonah Illustration captions Yona yaagi̱i̱rye b̯wati̱ b̯ukooto bukugyenda Tarasi̱i̱si̱ (1:3) Ruhanga, yaateereeri̱ho Yona kimera kikulanda (4:6) “Gya kubba mwomi, hakiri nkwa.” (4:8)

1.1: B̯ubyalwa b̯wa Yesu̱ Ku̱ri̱si̱to, wa mulula lwa Mukama Dau̱di̱, kandi wa mulula lwʼI̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱, b̯walingi yati:
1.2: I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ yaabyeri̱ I̱saka, I̱saka yaabyala Yakobbo, Yakobbo yaabyala Yu̱da na bei̱ra baamwe.
1.3: Yu̱da yaabyeri̱ Pereezi̱ na Zeera, maawaab̯u naali Tamali̱, Pereezi̱ yaabyala Hezi̱rooni̱, Hezi̱rooni̱ yaabyala Ramu.
1.4: Ramu yaabyeri̱ Aminadaabbu, Aminadaabbu yaabyala Nahasooni̱, Nahasooni̱ yaabyala Salu̱mooni̱.
1.5: Salu̱mooni̱ yaabyeri̱ Bbowaazi, maa yogo Bbowaazi naali Rahabbu̱, Bbowaazi yaabyeri̱ Obbeedi̱, maa Obbeedi̱ naali Ru̱u̱si̱, Obbeedi̱ yaabyeri̱ Yese,
1.6: Yese yaabyala Dau̱di̱, mukama. Dau̱di̱ yaabyeri̱ Sulumaani, na yogwo mu̱kali̱ munyakubba muka U̱ri̱ya.
1.7: Sulumaani yaabyala Rehobbowaamu, Rehobbowaamu yaabyala Abbi̱ya, Abbi̱ya yaabyala Asa.
1.8: Asa yaabyeri̱ Yehosafaati, Yehosafaati yaabyala Yolaamu, Yolaamu yaabyala U̱zi̱ya.
1.9: U̱zi̱ya yaabyeri̱ Yosaamu, Yosaamu yaabyala Ahaazi̱, Ahaazi̱ yaabyala Heezeki̱ya.
1.10: Heezeki̱ya yaabyeri̱ Manaase, Manaase yaabyala Amoni̱, Amoni̱ yaabyala Yosi̱ya.
1.11: Yosi̱ya yaabyeri̱ Yekoni̱ya na bei̱ra baamwe, mu biro bi̱baanyagi̱i̱rwemwo kutwalwa Bbabbu̱looni̱.
1.12: B̯u̱baamaari̱ kutwalwa Bbabbu̱looni̱, Yekoni̱ya yaabyeri̱ Salatyeri̱, Salatyeri̱ yaabyala Zeru̱bbabbeeri̱.
1.13: Zeru̱bbabbeeri̱ yaabyeri̱ Abbi̱yu̱u̱di̱, Abbi̱yu̱u̱di̱ yaabyala Eri̱yaki̱mu̱, Eri̱yaki̱mu̱ yaabyala Azoori̱.
1.14: Azoori̱ yaabyeri̱ Zadoki̱, Zadoki̱ yaabyala Aki̱i̱mu̱, Aki̱i̱mu̱ yaabyala Eli̱yu̱di̱.
1.15: Eli̱yu̱di̱ yaabyeri̱ Eryeza, Eryeza yaabyala Mataani̱, Mataani̱ yaabyala Yakobbo.
1.16: Yakobbo yogwo, yooyo munyakubyala Yozefu̱ i̱ba Mali̱ya, Mali̱ya munyakubyala Yesu̱, Yesu̱ yogwo yeetwa Ku̱ri̱si̱to.
1.17: Nahab̯waki̱kyo kuruga hali I̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱ kudwa hali Mukama Dau̱di̱, haalingiho mi̱hi̱hi̱ mya beizukulu i̱ku̱mi̱ na minei; na kuruga hali Mukama Dau̱di̱ kudwa ha Banyei̱saleeri̱ kutwalwa Bbabbu̱looni̱, nahoodede haalingiho mi̱hi̱hi̱ i̱ku̱mi̱ na minei. Kandi de, na kuruga ha kutwalwa Bbabbu̱looni̱ kudwa ha kubyalwa kwa Ku̱ri̱si̱to, naho haalingiho mi̱hi̱hi̱ i̱ku̱mi̱ na minei. Kubyalwa kwa Yesu̱ Ku̱ri̱si̱to (Lu̱u̱ka 2:1-7)
1.18: Bigambu bya kubyalwa kwa Yesu̱ Ku̱ri̱si̱to byalingi yati: Maawe Mali̱ya, b̯uyaali atakamu̱byeri̱, naali ali̱ndi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ kugab̯uka wu Yozefu̱, kandi b̯u̱b̯wo de, atakawonangaho ku mudulu, kyazooki̱ri̱ nti yaalingi naali na nda hab̯wa Mwozo Mu̱syanu̱.
1.19: Hab̯wakubba Yozefu̱, munyakubba naakugyenda kumugab̯ura, yaali mudulu akubalwa kubba naaku̱si̱i̱mwa mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga, yaacwi̱ri̱mwo kuleka Mali̱ya mu ki̱cei̱cei̱, mwa b̯utahemura Mali̱ya.
1.20: B̯uyaali naacaateekereza bi̱byo, malayika wa Mukama Ruhanga yaamu̱wonekeeri̱ mu kilooto naakoba, “Yozefu̱, mwizukulu wa Dau̱di̱, otati̱i̱na kugab̯ura Mali̱ya kubba mu̱kali̱ waamu, hab̯wakubba nda gyali nagyo, gili hab̯wa Mwozo Mu̱syanu̱.
1.21: Alibyala mwana wa b̯udulu, kandi olina kumweta ibara Yesu̱, hab̯wakubba yooyo alijuna bantu baamwe kifubiro kya bibii byab̯u.”
1.22: B̯u̱b̯wo nu, bi̱byo byensei̱ byabbeeri̱ho, aleke bi̱doosereerye bigambu bya Mukama bi̱yaakobi̱ri̱ kuraba mu mu̱ragu̱ri̱ waamwe nti:
1.23: “Muhala atakawonangaho ku mudulu alibba na nda, abyale mwana wa b̯udulu, kandi balimweta ibara Manweri̱.” Makuru gaalyo: “Ruhanga ali natwe.”
1.24: Yozefu̱ b̯u̱yaasi̱si̱mu̱ki̱ri̱, yaakora kya malayika wa Mukama Ruhanga ki̱yaamu̱weereeri̱ kukora, yaagab̯ura Mali̱ya;
1.25: bei̱tu̱ kandi, atakateerane nayo, atakabyeri̱ yogwo mwana wa b̯udulu. Yozefu̱ yeeti̱ri̱ yogwo mwana ibara, Yesu̱.

2.1: Yesu̱ b̯u̱yaabyali̱i̱rwe mu rub̯uga Bbeterehemu̱ lwa mu kicweka kyetwa B̯uyudaaya, Herodi̱ naali mukama, badulu banyamagezi̱ baaru̱gi̱ri̱ b̯uhulukalyoba, bei̱za mu rub̯uga Yeru̱salemu̱,
2.2: baab̯u̱u̱lya yati: “Mwana akugyenda kubba Mukama wa Bayudaaya, abyali̱i̱rwe hanya? Twaweeni̱ luzota lu̱kwolokya nka kwabyali̱i̱rwe, niluhuluka kuruga b̯uhulukalyoba; kandi hataati̱, twi̱zi̱ri̱ ku̱mu̱ramya.”
2.3: Mukama Herodi̱ b̯u̱yeegwi̱ri̱ bigambu bya bab̯wo badulu bi̱baabazi̱ri̱, yeelalikiira hoi̱; na bantu banene ba mu Yeru̱salemu̱, nabo beelalikiira nka yo.
2.4: Mwomwo yeeta bahandu̱ ba balaami̱ bensei̱ na beegesa ba biragiro, yaabab̯u̱u̱lya bamuweere ha Ku̱ri̱si̱to yaali naakugyenda kubyalirwa.
2.5: Baamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo nibakoba, “Mu rub̯uga Bbeterehemu̱ lwa B̯uyudaaya; kubba mu Binyakuhandiikwa, mu̱ragu̱ri̱ wa Ruhanga kwokwo yaakobi̱ri̱:
2.6: “ ‘Nywe bantu ba Bbeterehemu̱ gya B̯uyudaaya muli lu̱mwei̱ ha mbuga zi̱handu̱ hoi̱ za B̯uyudaaya, hab̯wakubba omwei̱ muli nywe yooyo alibba mu̱lemi̱, alilema bantu bange Bei̱saleeri̱.’ ”
2.7: Mwomwo Herodi̱ yeeta bab̯wo badulu bei̱ze mu nsita bamuwone; b̯u̱bei̱zi̱ri̱, yaabab̯u̱u̱lya bamu̱manyi̱sye kasu̱mi̱ koonyi̱ni̱ kabaawoneerimwo lu̱lwo luzota.
2.8: B̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubaza nabo, yaabatuma Bbeterehemu̱ naakoba, “Mu̱gyende mu̱toolye hoi̱ mwana yogwo, b̯umwakamwagya, mwi̱ze mu̱mmanyi̱sye, aleke nagya de ngyende mmu̱ramye.”
2.9: -10 B̯u̱baamaari̱ kwegwa bya mukama bi̱yaabaragi̱i̱ri̱, baagyenda. B̯ubaali nibakugyenda, baaweeni̱ luzota lu̱di̱ lubaali baweeni̱, nagwa b̯uhulukalyoba. B̯u̱baalu̱weeni̱, baasemererwa hoi̱; lwabeebembera ku̱doosya b̯u̱lwemereeri̱ hali yogwo Mwana yaalingi.
2.11: B̯u̱bei̱ngi̱i̱ri̱ mu nnyu̱mba, baaweeni̱ yogwo Mwana na maawe Mali̱ya, baaku̱nda malu̱ beetu̱lu̱ka, baaramya Mwana. B̯u̱baamaari̱ ku̱mu̱ramya, baahula nsahu zaab̯u za bisembu bya zaabbu, bya b̯ubbaani, na bya bintu bi̱ku̱wu̱nya kurungi byetwa migaaju, baabimuha.
2.12: Ruhanga b̯u̱yaahab̯wi̱ri̱ bab̯wo badulu mu kilooto, batei̱ra hali Herodi̱, baatwali̱i̱rwe muhanda gundi ni̱baku̱ku̱bayo mwihanga lyab̯u. Kwezi̱ba Kwi̱ru̱ki̱ra Mi̱si̱ri̱
2.13: Banyamagezi̱ b̯u̱baamaari̱ kugyenda, malayika wa Mukama Ruhanga yaawonekera Yozefu̱ mu kilooto, naakoba, “Byoka, otwale mwana na maawe, mwezi̱be mwi̱ru̱ki̱re mwihanga lya Mi̱si̱ri̱, mwi̱caleyo ku̱doosya b̯undikuweera; hab̯wakubba Herodi̱ akugyenda ku̱toolya mwana yogwo mwa ku̱mwi̱ta.”
2.14: Mwomwo Yozefu̱ yaabyoka i̱jolo lyolyo lyonyini, yaatwala mwana na maa mwana mwihanga lya Mi̱si̱ri̱.
2.15: Bei̱ceeri̱yo ku̱doosya Herodi̱ b̯u̱yaakwi̱ri̱; aleke hei̱nyu̱ma, kuruga kwab̯u mu Mi̱si̱ri̱ habaagyendi̱ri̱, ku̱doosereerye bigambu bya Mukama Ruhanga biyaali aheeri̱ mu̱ragu̱ri̱ waamwe Hoseya, bikukoba nti: “Nyeeti̱ri̱ mwana wange aruge Mi̱si̱ri̱.” Kwi̱twa kwa baana Batali na Musangu
2.16: Herodi̱ b̯u̱yeetegeri̱i̱ze badulu banyamagezi̱ nka kubaali baamu̱gobeerye, yaakwati̱i̱rwe ki̱ni̱ga kinene hoi̱. Ki̱yaakoori̱, yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ bei̱ta baana ba b̯udulu bensei̱, banyakubba nibali mu rub̯uga Bbeterehemu̱ na mu byaru bi̱hereeri̱ho, bab̯wo banyakubba nibali na myaka mibiri kwi̱ra ha nsi. Yo kuragira bei̱te baana ba myaka mi̱myo, yaasi̱gi̱ki̱i̱ri̱ ha kasu̱mi̱ ka banyamagezi̱, kabaamu̱wereeri̱ baawoneeri̱ho luzota.
2.17: Mu mu̱li̱ngo gugu, kya Herodi̱ kwi̱ta bab̯wo baana, kyadoosereerye bigambu bya mu̱ragu̱ri̱ wa Ruhanga Yeremi̱ya, bi̱yaaragwi̱ri̱ naakoba,
2.18: “Haabbeeri̱ho iraka mu rub̯uga Rama, iraka li̱lyo kyali kizabiro, Lakeeri̱ yaali kuliriira baana baamwe, atakwendya baamu̱hu̱u̱mu̱u̱lye, hab̯wakubba bakwi̱ri̱ bamali̱ki̱ri̱ho.” Kwi̱ra Kwab̯u mu Nazareeti̱
2.19: Herodi̱ b̯u̱yaakwi̱ri̱, malayika wa Mukama Ruhanga yaawonekera Yozefu̱ mu kilooto naali Mi̱si̱ri̱,
2.20: naakoba, “Byoka, otwale mwana na maawe, mwi̱re mu nsi gyʼI̱saleeri̱; hab̯wakubba bab̯wo banyaku̱toolyanga kwi̱ta yogwo mwana Yesu̱, bakwi̱ri̱.”
2.21: Nahab̯waki̱kyo Yozefu̱ yaabyoki̱ri̱, yaatwala mwana na maawe, baaku̱bayo mu nsi gyʼI̱saleeri̱.
2.22: Bei̱tu̱ Yozefu̱ yaati̱i̱ni̱ri kwi̱ra mwisaza lya B̯uyudaaya hab̯wakubba yaalingi yeegwi̱ri̱ nti Akileewo yaali naakulema mu kiikaru kya bbaawe Herodi̱. Ruhanga amaari̱ kuhab̯ura Yozefu̱ mu kilooto, Yozefu̱ yaaru̱gi̱ri̱yo yaagyenda mwisaza lya Galilaaya.
2.23: Yaagyendi̱ri̱ yeicala mu rub̯uga lwetwa Nazareeti̱, aleke kigambu kya baragu̱ri̱ ba Ruhanga ki̱baaragwi̱ri̱ hali Ku̱ri̱si̱to ki̱dwereere, ki̱kyo kikoba nti: “Alyetwa Mu̱nazareeti̱.”

3.1: Hei̱nyu̱ma gya kasu̱mi̱ kanene, hei̱zi̱ri̱ mudulu gi̱beetengi̱ Yohaana Mu̱bati̱zi̱, yaatandika ku̱tebeerya bantu mwirungu lya B̯uyudaaya,
3.2: naakoba, “Mwezi̱remwo bibiibi byenyu̱, hab̯wakubba b̯ukama b̯wa mwiguru b̯uli heehi̱ kudwa.”
3.3: Yohaana Mu̱bati̱zi̱ yooyo wa mu̱ragu̱ri̱ wa Ruhanga I̱saaya gi̱yaakobi̱ri̱ho yati: “Iraka lya yogwo akwamiira mwirungu naakoba, ‘Mu̱teekani̱ze muhanda gwa Mukama, mu̱terekereerye b̯uhanda b̯wamwe.’ ”
3.4: Yohaana yogwo yaalwalengi̱ kilwalu kikore kuruga mu byoza bya ngamira, naalwala muheeku gwa kikuta mu mancwendu. Bidyo byamwe byali nzi̱ge na b̯uhooki b̯wa mwirungu.
3.5: Bantu baaru̱gengi̱ Yeru̱salemu̱ na mu bicweka bi̱si̱geeri̱ho bya B̯uyudaaya gyensei̱, na mu bicweka bi̱hereeri̱ mugira gwa Yorodaani, ni̱bei̱za hali yo.
3.6: Baatu̱lengi̱ bibii byab̯u, nibabatizib̯wa mu mugira gwa Yorodaani.
3.7: Bei̱tu̱ Yohaana b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ Bafalisaayo na Basadukaayo banene ni̱bakwi̱za kubatizib̯wa, yaabaweera, “Nywe baana ba mpiri! Naani abahab̯wi̱ri̱ kwi̱ru̱ka ki̱ni̱ga kya Ruhanga, ki̱kyo kikugyenda kwi̱za?
3.8: Mu̱kore bintu bi̱kwolokya nti, mwezi̱ri̱ri̱mwo ngesu zeenyu̱ zibiibi.
3.9: Kandi mu̱leke kwehaariiza nimuteekereza nti, ‘Tuli kurungi, hab̯wakubba tuli beizukulu bʼI̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱.’ Nkubaweera, Ruhanga akusobora kuhindula mahi̱ga gaga, naagafoora beizukulu bʼI̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱.
3.10: Kandi ateeri̱ mpasa gyamwe heikolo lya musaali; musaali gwensei̱ gutakwana byana birungi, gu̱kwi̱za kutemwa gukasukwe mu mworo.
3.11: “Gya nkubabatiza na meezi̱, kwolokya nti mwezi̱ri̱ri̱mwo bibii byenyu̱; bei̱tu̱ yogwo akwi̱za kwei̱nyu̱ma lyange, akunkira mu kubba na b̯u̱sobozi̱, tinkusemeera kumukwatira nkei̱to zaamwe. Yogwo akwi̱za, alibabatiza na Mwozo Mu̱syanu̱ na mworo.
3.12: Akweti̱ lugali lwamwe, asobore kuhuuhuula b̯u̱roi̱. Akwi̱za kusorooza b̯u̱roi̱ b̯wamwe, naab̯ubiika mu kideeru, bei̱tu̱ bisusunga akwi̱za ku̱byokya na mworo gutamalikaho.” Yohaana Naabatiza Yesu̱ (Mari̱ko 1:9-11; Lu̱u̱ka 3:21-22)
3.13: Yesu̱ yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ Galilaaya, yaagyenda mu mugira gwa Yorodaani, aleke Yohaana amubatize.
3.14: Bei̱tu̱ Yohaana yendeerye kumusuulukiira, yaaweera Yesu̱, “Weewe okusemeera kumbatiza; hati̱ kandi, oi̱zi̱ri̱ hali gya?”
3.15: Bei̱tu̱ Yesu̱ yaamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Hataati̱, we ikiriza kwokwo kibbe, aleke tu̱doosereerye bintu byensei̱ bya Ruhanga byaku̱twendeerya.” Mwomwo Yohaana, yeikiriza kubatiza Yesu̱.
3.16: Yesu̱ b̯u̱yaakamaari̱ kubatizib̯wa, yaaruga mu meezi̱. Mu kasu̱mi̱ kakwo iguru lyaki̱ngu̱li̱i̱rwe, yaawona Mwozo wa Ruhanga naaku̱si̱ri̱mu̱ka nka kolome, yaamwi̱cyaho.
3.17: Mwomwo iraka lyaruga mwiguru nilikoba, “Yogwo yooyo Mwana wange gi̱nyendya, yooyo ampa kusemererwa mu mutima gwange.”

4.1: Hei̱nyu̱ma, Mwozo Mu̱syanu̱ yeebembeeri̱ Yesu̱ yaamutwala mwirungu, kwoheb̯wa Sitaani.
4.2: B̯u̱yaamaari̱ biro maku̱mi̱ ganei mwinsi nei̱jolo atakudya kantu kensei̱, nzala gyamudya.
4.3: Sitaani yaamwi̱zi̱i̱ri̱, yaamwohya naakoba, “Waakabba nooli Mwana wa Ruhanga, ragira mahi̱ga gaga, gafooke bidyo.”
4.4: Yesu̱ yaamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Kyahandi̱i̱ki̱i̱rwe, “ ‘Muntu tiyoomeera hab̯wa bidyo bisa, bei̱tu̱ yoomeera hab̯wa b̯uli kigambu kiruga mu mu̱nwa gwa Ruhanga.’ ”
4.5: Mwomwo Sitaani yaamutwala mu rub̯uga lu̱syanu̱, yaamuta kwakyendi̱ ha kasolya ka Yeekaru,
4.6: yaamuweera, “Waakabba nooli Mwana wa Ruhanga, gu̱su̱ka, weezi̱cye hansi; kubba Binyakuhandiikwa bikoba, “ ‘Ruhanga akwi̱za kuragira bamalayika baamwe bakulinde.’ Kandi, ‘Balikutegera mikono myab̯u bakukwate, aleke magulu gaamu gateekuuta kwi̱hi̱ga.’ ”
4.7: Yesu̱ yaamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Kandi de kyahandi̱i̱ki̱i̱rwe nti, ‘Otalilenga Mukama Ruhanga waamu.’ ”
4.8: Sitaani yaab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye yaamutwala ha lusahu lulei hoi̱, yaamwolokya b̯ukama b̯wa mu nsi gyensei̱ na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyab̯wo.
4.9: Yaamuweera: “Nkwi̱za kukuha bibi byensei̱, b̯u̱waakaku̱nda malu̱ okandamya.”
4.10: Yesu̱ yaamwi̱ramwo naakoba, “Ndugaho Sitaani! Kubba kyahandi̱i̱ki̱i̱rwe nti, ‘Oramyenge Mukama Ruhanga waamu, kandi yooyo yankei oheerezenge.’ ”
4.11: Mwomwo Sitaani yaamurugaho, bamalayika bei̱za baamuheereza. Yesu̱ Naatandika Mulimo gwamwe mu Galilaaya (Mari̱ko 1:14-15; Lu̱u̱ka 4:14-15)
4.12: Yesu̱ b̯u̱yeegwi̱ri̱ nti Yohaana Mu̱bati̱zi̱ ateebeerwe mu nkomo, yeemu̱ki̱ri̱ mwisaza lya Galilaaya.
4.13: Hei̱nyu̱ma gya kuruga Nazareeti̱, Yesu̱ yaagyendi̱ri̱ yeicala Kaperenau̱mu̱, rub̯uga lunyakubba niluli ha mutanda gweitaka lyetwa Galilaaya, mu kicweka ki̱kyo kya nganda ibiri, lwa Zabbu̱looni̱ na Nafutaali.
4.14: Yaagyendi̱ri̱yo aleke kya mu̱ragu̱ri̱ wa Ruhanga I̱saaya ki̱yaabazi̱ri̱ ki̱dwereere, ki̱kyo kikoba,
4.15: “Bantu bakwicala mu kicweka kya Zabbu̱looni̱ na mu kya Nafutaali, bab̯wo bali heehi̱ neitaka lya Galilaaya, nagwa b̯ugwalyoba b̯wa mugira gwa Yorodaani, mu nsi gya Galilaaya hali Banyamahanga banene beicala,
4.16: bab̯wo bantu banyakubba nibali mu nti̱ti̱, kyererezi̱ kinene ki̱basu̱u̱ki̱i̱ri̱. Na bab̯wo banyakwicalanga mu nsi gya kifubiro kya ku̱kwa, mambya wakubajuna asaari̱ hab̯wab̯u.”
4.17: Kuruga mu kasu̱mi̱ kakwo, Yesu̱ yaatandi̱ki̱ri̱ ku̱tebya naakoba, “Mwezi̱remwo, hab̯wakubba b̯ukama b̯wa mwiguru b̯uli heehi̱ kudwa.” Yesu̱ Naakoma Beegeseb̯wa Baamwe ba Kubanza (Mari̱ko 1:16-20; Lu̱u̱ka 5:1-11)
4.18: Yesu̱ b̯uyaali naakuraba ha mutanda gweitaka lya Galilaaya, yaaweeni̱ Si̱mooni̱ yeetwa Peeteru hamwenya nʼAndereya waab̯u, nibakuguma bitimba mu meezi̱, hab̯wakubba baalingi balobi̱,
4.19: kasi mwomwo yaabaweera: “Mwi̱ze mu̱mpondere, nkwi̱za kubafoora balobi̱ bakuloba bantu.”
4.21: B̯u̱yaagyendi̱ri̱ mu mei̱so kadooli̱, yaaweeni̱ baab̯u na baab̯u bandi babiri, Yakobbo mu̱tabani̱ wa Zebbedaayo na waab̯u Yohaana, nibali mu b̯wati̱ hamwei̱ na bbaawaab̯u Zebbedaayo, ni̱baku̱ni̱hi̱ri̱i̱rya bitimba byab̯u. Naboodede Yesu̱ yaabeeta.
4.22: Nahaahwo, baati̱gi̱ri̱ b̯wati̱ b̯wab̯u na bbaawaab̯u, baahondera Yesu̱. Yesu̱ Ni̱yeegesya kandi Naahoni̱a Baseeri̱ (Lu̱u̱ka 6:17-19)
4.23: Yesu̱ yaali̱beeti̱li̱beeti̱ mu Galilaaya gyensei̱, ni̱yeegesyanga mu marombero gaab̯u, naatebyanga Makuru Garungi ga b̯ukama b̯wa Ruhanga, kandi naahoni̱a b̯uli nseeri̱ na kudiib̯wa kwensei̱ kwa bantu.
4.24: Makuru gakumukwatanaho, gaasaaseeni̱ mu kicweka kya Si̱ri̱ya gyensei̱, bantu baamuleetera baseeri̱ bensei̱ banyakubba bakwati̱i̱rwe nseeri̱ na b̯u̱ru̱mi̱ b̯utali b̯u̱mwei̱, banyakubba na mizumu, banyakugwanga nsimbu, na bazi̱ngamu̱; yaabahoni̱a.
4.25: Bitebe bya bantu banene byamu̱honderengi̱, bi̱byo binyakuruga mu Galilaaya, na mu li̱lyo isaza lya Mbuga I̱ku̱mi̱, na mu Yeru̱salemu̱, na mu B̯uyudaaya, na nseeri̱ gya Yorodaani.

5.1: Yesu̱ b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ bantu banene hoi̱ nibakumuhondera, yaatembi̱ri̱ ha lusahu, yeicaara ha nsi, mwomwo beegeseb̯wa baamwe bei̱za cali yaali,
5.2: yaatandika ku̱beegesya naakoba:
5.3: “Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bab̯wo beezegwa nibali baseege mu myozo myab̯u, hab̯wakubba b̯ukama b̯wa mwiguru b̯wab̯u.
5.4: Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bab̯wo bali na nganye, hab̯wakubba Ruhanga ali̱bahu̱u̱mu̱u̱lya.
5.5: Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bab̯wo bab̯u̱ndaaru̱, hab̯wakubba baligweterwa nsi.
5.6: Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bab̯wo bali na nzala na nyoota gya kubalwa kubba basemereeri̱ mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga, hab̯wakubba alibaha bikubamala.
5.7: Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bab̯wo bali na mbabazi̱, hab̯wakubba Ruhanga alibakwatiirwa mbabazi̱.
5.8: Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bab̯wo ba mitima mi̱syanu̱, hab̯wakubba baliwona Ruhanga.
5.9: Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bab̯wo bateeraniza bantu mu b̯u̱si̱nge, hab̯wakubba balyetwa baana ba Ruhanga.
5.10: Bali na mu̱gi̱sa bab̯wo bahiiganizib̯wa hab̯wa kukora bintu birungi mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga, hab̯wakubba b̯ukama b̯wa mwiguru b̯wab̯u.
5.11: “Muli na mu̱gi̱sa bantu b̯u̱babalu̱ma, b̯ubabahiiganiza kandi b̯ubabahangiira bintu byensei̱ bibiibi hab̯wange.
5.12: Mu̱semererwenge, hab̯wakubba mpeera gyenyu̱ gili ginene mwiguru; kubba, kwokwo baahi̱i̱gani̱i̱ze yatyo baragu̱ri̱ ba Ruhanga banyakubanza. Kyererezi̱ na Muzu gwa Nsi (Mari̱ko 9:50; Lu̱u̱ka 14:34-35)
5.13: “Nywe muli muzu gwa nsi. Bei̱tu̱ kakubba muzu gumalikwamwo b̯ululu b̯wagwo, tosobora ku̱b̯wi̱ryamwo. Gu̱gwo muzu gubba gutali na mugasu ha kintu kyensei̱, kutoolahoona gubba gwa ku̱kasu̱ka-b̯u̱kasu̱ki̱ bantu nibaguziginazigana.
5.14: “Nywe muli kyererezi̱ kya nsi, ki̱kyo kikwisana nka rub̯uga lu̱bi̱mbi̱i̱rwe ha lusahu, rub̯uga lutasobora kwebi̱sa.
5.15: Tihaloho muntu yensei̱ akolereerya taara naagibbumba na lukimba, bei̱tu̱ agita ha kikondo kyagyo, aleke gimulukire bantu bensei̱ bali mu nnyu̱mba.
5.16: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, mu̱leke kyererezi̱ kyenyu̱ kimulukire bantu, aleke basobore kuwona bikorwa byenyu̱ birungi, bahaariize Bbaaweenyu̱ wa mwiguru. Kudwereera kwa Biragiro byensei̱
5.17: “Mutateekereza nti, nyei̱zi̱ri̱ kutoolaho biragiro na Binyakuhandiikwa bya baragu̱ri̱; ntakei̱ze kubitoolaho, bei̱tu̱ nyei̱zi̱ri̱ ku̱bi̱doosereerya.
5.18: Mu mananu nkubaweera nti, iguru na nsi bi̱takamali̱ki̱ri̱ho, tihaloho kadi kacweka kadooli̱ ka nyuguta kalirugaho, rundi kadi kacweka kaagyo kaliruga ha biragiro ku̱doosya byensei̱ b̯ubilidwereera.
5.19: Nahab̯waki̱kyo yogwo yensei̱ alibinya kiragiro kyensei̱ kikusembayo b̯u̱dooli̱, akeegesya na bandi kubinya biragiro bya Ruhanga, yogwo muntu alibba na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa ki̱dooli̱ mu b̯ukama b̯wa mwiguru; bei̱tu̱ kandi, yogwo yensei̱ alikwata bi̱byo biragiro akabyegesya bandi kubikora, alibba na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kinene mu b̯ukama b̯wa mwiguru.
5.20: Nahab̯waki̱kyo nkubaweera nti tihaloho muntu yensei̱ muli nywe alingira mu b̯ukama b̯wa mwiguru kutoolahoona yogwo akuhondera biragiro bya Ruhanga ku̱bi̱ki̱ryaho Bafalisaayo na beegesa ba biragiro. Kwegesya ha Ki̱ni̱ga (Lu̱u̱ka 12:57-59)
5.21: “Mwegwi̱ri̱ nka ku̱baakobi̱ri̱ nti, ‘Otali̱i̱ta; yogwo yensei̱ ei̱ta, ali wa kuteeb̯waho musangu.’
5.22: Bei̱tu̱ gya nkubaweera, yogwo yensei̱ akwatirwa ki̱ni̱ga mwi̱ra waamwe aliteeb̯waho musangu; yogwo yensei̱ alu̱ma mwi̱ra waamwe, alitwalwa mu Lukuratu Lu̱handu̱; kandi yogwo yensei̱ yeeta mwi̱ra waamwe, ‘We mudoma we!’ Yogwo muntu akukoba yatyo aligumwa-b̯ugumwa mu mworo gwa Geehena.
5.23: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, b̯wolibbanga nookuhayo kisembu kyamu ha kyoto kyeihongo kya Mukama Ruhanga, okei̱zu̱ka kintu kyensei̱ kya mwi̱ra waamu kyakukujunaana,
5.24: oi̱cyenge kisembu kyamu mu mei̱so ga kyoto, noobanza noogyenda hali mwi̱ra waamu ku̱mwezi̱ri̱ramwo, kasi noi̱rayo kutwala kisembu kyamu ha kyoto.
5.25: “Mwetegerezanganenge mu b̯wangu, na muntu ali na nsonga nawe, yogwo ali mu kukutwala mwicweru lya misangu atakaku̱dooseeryeyo. Kitali ki̱kyo akumaliira aku̱heeri̱yo hali mu̱cwi̱ wa misangu, kasi na mu̱cwi̱ yogwo naakuhayo hali musurukali, kasi musurukali naakuta mu nkomo.
5.26: Mu mananu nkukuweera, toliruga mu nkomo kutoolahoona osaswi̱ri̱ b̯u̱li̱hi̱ b̯wensei̱. Kwegesya ha Kwegomba Kubiibi
5.28: Bei̱tu̱ gya nkubaweera nti, yogwo yensei̱ awona mu̱kali̱ akamwegomba, b̯u̱b̯wo yogwo muntu mu mutima gwamwe abba akoori̱ b̯wenzi̱ na yogwo mu̱kali̱.
5.29: Li̱i̱so lyamu lya mukono gwab̯udyo kakubba libba nilikukuha kukora kibii, olitoolemwo olikasuke; hakiri ofeerwa ki̱mwei̱ ha bicweka bya mubiri gwamu, kukira mubiri gwamu gwensei̱ kugyenda mu mworo gwa Geehena.
5.30: Kandi mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo kakubba gubba nigukukuha kukora kibii, gutemeho ogukasuke; hakiri ofeerwa ki̱mwei̱ ha bicweka bya mubiri gwamu, kukira mubiri gwamu gwensei̱ kugyenda mu Geehena. Kwegesya ha bya Maka na B̯wenzi̱ (Matayo 19:9; Mari̱ko 10:11-12; Lu̱u̱ka 16:18)
5.31: “Baakobi̱ri̱ nti, ‘Yogwo yensei̱ alibinga mu̱kali̱ waamwe, amuhe bbaruha gya kwahukana nayo.’
5.32: Bei̱tu̱ gya nkubaweera nti, mudulu yensei̱ abinga mu̱kali̱ waamwe, kutoolaho gana yogwo mu̱kali̱ naali akoori̱ b̯wenzi̱, yogwo mudulu abba naakuha yogwo mu̱kali̱ kukora b̯wenzi̱. Kandi na mudulu yensei̱ aswera mu̱kali̱ ei̱ti̱ri̱ nnyu̱mba, yogwo mudulu nayo abba akoori̱ b̯wenzi̱. Kwegesya ha Kurahira
5.33: “Mwegwi̱ri̱ bahaaha beenyu̱ ba kadei nka ku̱baabaweereeri̱ nti, ‘Otalirahirira b̯usa ibara lya Mukama, bei̱tu̱ ki̱kyo ki̱waaragani̱syanga kumukoora, oki̱doosereeryenge!’
5.34: Bei̱tu̱ nkubaweera: Mutarahiranga kadi kadooli̱, rundi kurahira iguru, hab̯wakubba lyolyo ntebe gya b̯ukama b̯wa Ruhanga;
5.35: rundi kurahira nsi, hab̯wakubba kooko katebe ka magulu gaamwe; rundi Yeru̱salemu̱, kubba lwolwo rub̯uga lwa Mukama mu̱handu̱.
5.36: Kandi mutarahiranga ni̱mu̱hayo mi̱twe myenyu̱, hab̯wakubba timukusobora kuhindula kadi lutumbu lu̱mwei̱ lwa mi̱twe myenyu̱ kubba lu̱bbwi̱, rundi kubba lwi̱ragu̱ru̱.
5.37: Nahab̯waki̱kyo leka kigambu kyamu ‘Kwokwo’ kiicalenge nikili ‘Kwokwo,’ rundi ‘Kwahi,’ kiicalenge nikili ‘Kwahi.’ Kubaza bigambu bikukira hali bi̱byo byabbanga bi̱ru̱gi̱ri̱ hali Sitaani. Kwegesya ha Kuhoora Nzi̱go (Lu̱u̱ka 6:29-30)
5.38: “Mwegwi̱ri̱ ha bigambu bya kuhoora nzi̱go nti, ‘B̯u̱li̱hi̱ b̯wa kuhutaaza muntu li̱i̱so, b̯wabbanga li̱i̱so; na b̯u̱li̱hi̱ b̯wa kubinya muntu liino, b̯wabbanga liino.’
5.39: Bei̱tu̱ gya nkukoba, mutalihoora nzi̱go. Muntu yaakakupaalanga heitama lya mukono gwab̯udyo, muhinduurenge na lindi.
5.40: Muntu yensei̱ alikutwala mu balemi̱ na kigyendeerwa kya kukunyaga saati gyamu, omulekerenge na kooti̱.
5.41: Kakubba habbaho muntu akukuhambiriza ku̱mwetwekera bintu hab̯wa lugyendu lwa ki̱lomi̱ta gi̱mwei̱, omwetwekerenge kumala ki̱lomi̱ta ibiri.
5.42: Muntu yensei̱ yaakakusabanga kintu, okimuhenge; kandi yogwo yensei̱ yei̱zanga kukwehoraho, otalimusuulukiiranga. Kwegesya ha kwendya Banyanzigwa (Lu̱u̱ka 6:27-28, 32-36)
5.43: “Mwegwi̱ri̱ nka ku̱baakobi̱ri̱ nti, ‘Wendyanga mwi̱ra waamu, onobenge munyanzigwa waamu.’
5.44: Bei̱tu̱ gya nkubaweera, mwendyenge banyanzigwa beenyu̱! Musabirenge bab̯wo bensei̱ babahiiga,
5.45: aleke mubbe baana ba Bbaaweenyu̱ ali mwiguru. Hab̯wakubba barungi na babiibi benseenya, Ruhanga abaha kalyoba; kandi, bantu bakora bintu bi̱doori̱ na bab̯wo bakora bi̱tadoori̱, abaha ndagali̱ atakubasoroora.
5.46: Mwakabba mwendya bab̯wo basa babendya, mulitunga mpeera ki? Na basorooza musolo, tikwokwo bakora yatyo?
5.47: Mwakabba mu̱ramu̱kya bei̱ra beenyu̱ basa, bo bandi mu̱ku̱baki̱ri̱sya ki? Na Banyamahanga, tikwokwo bakora yatyo?
5.48: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, mu̱bbe basyanu̱ nka Bbaaweenyu̱ wa mwiguru kwali Mu̱syanu̱.

6.1: “Mwegyenderezenge b̯utakora bikorwa birungi mu mei̱so ga bantu, nimukugyendeera babawone. Kakubba mukola yatyo, Bbaaweenyu̱ wa mwiguru talibaha mpeera.
6.2: “Nahab̯waki̱kyo, b̯uwaakagabiranga museege, otakirangiiranga nka bagobya kubakora mu marombero gaab̯u na mu mihanda, aleke bantu babahaariize. Mu mananu nkubaweera nti, bab̯wo bensei̱ bakuhaariizwa bamaari̱ kadei kutunga mpeera gyab̯u.
6.3: Bei̱tu̱ b̯uwakagabiranga museege, leka mukono gwamu gwab̯umoso guteega bya mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo gu̱koori̱,
6.4: aleke kugaba kwamu kubbenge kwa nsita; kandi Bbaawu yogwo wa mwiguru, awona bintu bikorwa mu nsita, alikuha mpeera. Kwegesya ha Kusaba (Lu̱u̱ka 11:2-4)
6.5: “B̯umwakabbanga nimukusaba Ruhanga, mutakoranga nka bantu bagobya kubakora; kubba bo, bendya kusaba beemereeri̱ mu marombero gaab̯u na mu masangananzira, aleke bantu babawone. Mu mananu nkubaweera nti, bab̯wo bensei̱ bakwendya babawone, bamaari̱ kadei kutunga mpeera gyab̯u.
6.6: Bei̱tu̱ b̯uwaakabbanga nookusaba, oi̱ngi̱renge mu ki̱si̱i̱ka kyamu, niweekingirana, aleke osobore kusaba hali Bbaawu yogwo atawonwaho; kandi yo yogwo, awona bya mu nsita alikuha bi̱byo byomu̱sabi̱ri̱.
6.7: Kandi, b̯umwakabbanga nimukusaba, mu̱leke kusabanga ndanda nka Banyamahanga kubakora, nibakuteekereza nti, Ruhanga akwi̱za kubeegwa hab̯wa bigambu byab̯u binene bi̱basabi̱ri̱.
6.8: Mu̱leke kubba nka bo, kubba yogwo Bbaaweenyu̱ wa mwiguru yeegi̱ri̱ bi̱byo bimukwetaaga nab̯umubba mu̱takabi̱mu̱sabi̱ri̱.
6.9: “Nahab̯waki̱kyo mu̱sabenge yati: “ ‘Bbaaweetu̱ wa mwiguru, ibara lyamu liheeb̯we ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa,
6.10: b̯ukama b̯wamu b̯wi̱ze, bi̱wendya bikorwe mu nsi nka kubikorwa mwiguru.
6.11: Otuhe hataati̱ bidyo byetu̱ bya b̯uli kiro;
6.12: Otuganyire bibii byetu̱, nka twe kutuganyira bantu batukora kubiibi;
6.13: Otatuleka nitukooheb̯wa, bei̱tu̱ otujune hali Mubii.’
6.14: Kubba b̯umuliganyira bantu babasobereerye, nanywe Bbaaweenyu̱ wa mwiguru alibaganyira;
6.15: bei̱tu̱ b̯umutalibaganyira nsobi̱ zaab̯u, nanywe Bbaaweenyu̱ talibaganyira bibii byenyu̱. Kwegesya ha Kusiiba
6.16: “B̯umwakabbanga nimukusiiba, mutoolokyanga b̯u̱syo b̯wa b̯ujune, nka bantu bagobya kubeekora aleke boolokye bantu nka kubakusiiba. Mu mananu nkubaweera nti, bab̯wo bensei̱ baku̱toolya babawone, bamaari̱ kadei kusasulwa mpeera gyab̯u gyensei̱ kuraba mukuwonwa bantu.
6.17: Bei̱tu̱ nywe, b̯umwakabbanga nimukusiiba, munaabenge b̯u̱syo, ni̱mwesi̱i̱ga na maku̱ta,
6.18: aleke bantu batabalengeranga nka kumukusiiba; bei̱tu̱ Bbaaweenyu̱ yogwo atawonwaho, yooyo yankei yeegenge; kandi Bbaaweenyu̱ yogwo awona bya mu nsita, alibaha mpeera. Itungu lya Mwiguru (Lu̱u̱ka 12:33-34)
6.19: “Mutalyebiikira itungu mumu mu nsi, cali likusobora kudiib̯wa maginyo na matali, na hali bei̱bi̱ bakusobora kubinya ni̱bakei̱ba.
6.20: Bei̱tu̱ mwebi̱i̱ki̱renge itungu lya mwiguru, cali maginyo na matali gatakusobora kuhenera, kandi na cali bei̱bi̱ batakusobora kubinya ni̱bakei̱ba.
6.21: Hab̯wakubba, cali itungu lyamu lili, hooho mutima gwamu gwicala. Taara gya Mubiri (Lu̱u̱ka 11:34-36)
6.22: “Li̱i̱so lya muntu lyolyo taara gya mubiri. Mei̱so gaamu b̯ugabba nigakuhweza kurungi, mubiri gwamu gwensei̱ gubba na kyererezi̱;
6.23: bei̱tu̱, muntu b̯wabba na li̱i̱so litakuhweza, b̯u̱b̯wo yogwo muntu abba mu nti̱ti̱. Hati̱ b̯u̱b̯wo nti̱ti̱ gi̱gyo gibba nigikwijana hanya! Kwesiga Ruhanga Kikukira Kwesiga Itungu (Lu̱u̱ka 16:13; 12:22-31)
6.24: “Tihaloho muntu akusobora kuheereza bakama babiri; rundi alinoba omwei̱ ni̱yendya wondi, rundi alyegwa omwei̱ naagaya wondi. Timusobora kukoora Ruhanga, kandi nimukakoora itungu.
6.25: “Ki̱kyo kyokyo kikumpa kubaweera nti, muteelalikiira b̯womi b̯wenyu̱, kikyani kimwadya, rundi kikyani kimwanywa; rundi hali bikukwatagana na kimwalwalya mibiri myenyu̱. B̯womi tib̯uli b̯wa muhendu kukira bidyo, na mubiri gwa muhendu hoi̱ kukira byakulwala?
6.26: Mu̱wonere hali bi̱nyoni̱ bya mu mwanya; tibisiga, tibikesa, kandi tibibiika bidyo mu bideeru, bei̱tu̱ Bbaaweenyu̱ wa mwiguru abi̱di̱i̱syanbe. Nywe, timuli ba muhendu hoi̱ mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga kukira bi̱byo bi̱nyoni̱?
6.27: Naani muli nywe, hab̯wa kwelalikiira, akusobora ku̱teeryaho kadi saaha gi̱mwei̱, ha b̯womi b̯wamwe?
6.28: “Hab̯waki mwelalikiiranga byakulwala? Mu̱wonere ha byakyo bya mu kisaka nka kubihanda, tibikora kandi tibyongosa.
6.29: Bei̱tu̱ nkubaweera nti, kadi mukama Sulumaani mu ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamwe kyensei̱, atakalwalenge kwijanjana kadi kibbe ki̱mwei̱ ha bi̱byo byakyo.
6.30: Ruhanga yaabba alwalya yatyo isubi lya mu kisaka, li̱lyo liloho hataati̱ mwakya ni̱li̱kwi̱za kukasukwa mu kikoomi, ali̱ki̱ryaho kwahi mali̱ ku̱lwalya nywe bali na kwikiriza ku̱dooli̱?
6.31: Nahab̯waki̱kyo mu̱leke kwelalikiira nti, ‘Twadya kyani?’ Rundi ‘Twanywa kyani?’ Rundi ‘Twalwala kyani?’
6.32: Hab̯wakubba na Banyamahanga, bintu nka bi̱byo, byobyo beicala bateeri̱ho mitima. Bei̱tu̱ Bbaaweenyu̱ wa mwiguru akyegi̱ri̱ nka kumukubyetaaga byenseenya.
6.33: Bei̱tu̱, mu̱banze mu̱toolye b̯ukama b̯wamwe; kandi mu̱bbe baku̱si̱i̱mwa mu mei̱so gaamwe, na bintu bindi byensei̱ bi̱kwi̱za kubaheeb̯wa.
6.34: “Nahab̯waki̱kyo, mu̱leke kwelalikiira bya mwakya; kubba kiro kya mwakya kyefaaho kyankei. Mu̱leke b̯uli kiro kibbe na b̯ujune b̯wakyo.”

7.2: hab̯wakubba nka kumucwera bandi, nanywe kwokwo balibacwera; na ki̱pi̱mi̱syo ki̱mu̱koresya hali bandi, nanywe kyokyo bali̱bacweresya.
7.3: Hab̯waki owonanga kantu kali mu li̱i̱so lya mwi̱ra waamu, bei̱tu̱ otakusobora kuwona kali mu li̱i̱so lyamu?
7.4: Kandi, osobora teetei̱ kuweera mwi̱ra waamu nti, ‘Kankutoole kantu kaku̱gwi̱ri̱ mu li̱i̱so,’ kandi b̯u̱b̯wo nawe, b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱ oi̱ceeri̱ noli na kintu mu lyamu?
7.5: We ngobya we, banza weetoole ki̱kyo kili mu li̱i̱so lyamu, mwomwo osobore kuhweza na kutoola kakwo kali mu li̱i̱so lya mwi̱ra waamu.
7.6: “Mutahanga mbwene kintu kyensei̱ ki̱syanu̱, kubba zi̱kwi̱za kubeehindukiira zi̱balwani̱sye; kandi mutagumiranga mpunu bintu byenyu̱ bya muhendu, kubba zi̱kwi̱za kubisambasamba.” Mu̱sabenge, Mu̱toolyenge, Mwerangenge (Lu̱u̱ka 11:9-13)
7.7: “Mu̱sabenge Ruhanga bintu bimukwetaaga, alibibaha; mu̱mu̱toolyenge, mulimwagya; mwerangenge, alibakingulira.
7.8: Hab̯wakubba, yogwo yensei̱ asaba Ruhanga, aheeb̯wambe; yogwo amutoolya alimwagya; na yogwo amweyanjulira alimukingulira.
7.9: Mu̱byeru̱ ki muli nywe, kakubba mwana waamu akusaba mugaati waakumuhamwo i̱hi̱ga?
7.10: Rundi kakubba akusaba nsu̱, waakumuhamwo mpiri?
7.11: Kale nu, nywe babiibi mwakabba nimukusobora kwega kuha baana beenyu̱ bisembu birungi, Bbaaweenyu̱ wa mwiguru tali̱ki̱ryaho hoi̱ kuha bab̯wo bamusaba!
7.12: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, mu̱koorenge bandi bi̱byo bi̱mwakwendeerye nabo babakoore; Kubba ki̱kyo kyokyo biragiro na baragu̱ri̱ ki̱beegesya.” Irembu Li̱fu̱ndu̱ (Lu̱u̱ka 13:24)
7.13: “Murabe mu mulyangu gu̱fu̱ndu̱, kubba mulyangu gugali na muhanda gugali, bitwala bantu mu ku̱zi̱ka, kandi bab̯wo barabamwo babba banene.
7.14: Bei̱tu̱ irembu likutwala mu b̯womi, liicala li̱fu̱ndu̱ na muhanda gukutwala mu b̯womi, gutatiro kugurabamwo, na bantu bagurabamwo badooli̱.” Musaali Baguwonera ha Byana (Lu̱u̱ka 6:43-44)
7.15: “Mweri̱nde baragu̱ri̱ ba b̯u̱gobya, bei̱za hali nywe balweri̱ nibakwisana nka ntaama, kandi b̯u̱b̯wo mu mitima myab̯u nibali nka misege mili hab̯wa kwi̱ta.
7.16: Mulibawonera ha bikorwa byab̯u. Byana bya mu̱yembe bakusobora kubinokola ha mutiti? Rundi byana bya mucungwa bakusobora kubinokola ha mu̱kalasu̱ma?
7.17: Mu ngeru gyogyo gi̱mwei̱ musaali gurungi gwana byana birungi; kandi musaali gubiibi gwana byana bibiibi.
7.18: Musaali gurungi tigusobora kwana byana bibiibi, kandi musaali gubiibi tigusobora kwana byana birungi.
7.19: Musaali gwensei̱ gutakusobora kwana byana birungi, bagutema nibagukasuka mu mworo.
7.20: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, bab̯wo baragu̱ri̱ ba b̯u̱gobya mulibawonera ha bikorwa byab̯u.” Bigambu Bibaze Bisagikwa Bikorwa (Lu̱u̱ka 13:25-27)
7.21: “Tibali bantu bensei̱ bakoba, ‘Mukama wange, Mukama wange,’ balingira mu b̯ukama b̯wa mwiguru; bei̱tu̱ yogwo akora bya Bbaabba ali mwiguru bi̱yendya.
7.22: Banene ha kiro kya kucwerwa musangu balinzeta nibakoba, ‘Mukama wange, Mukama wange, tu̱takatebyenge mwibara lyamu? Tutakabingenge mizumu mwibara lyamu? Tutakakorenge byamahanu binene mwibara lyamu?’
7.23: B̯u̱b̯wo hooho ndibaweereeraho nti, ‘Ti̱mbeegi̱ri̱. Mu̱ndu̱geho nywe nkori̱ za bibii.’ ” Ku̱bi̱mba ha Mu̱si̱nge gutatiro (Lu̱u̱ka 6:47-49)
7.24: “Nahab̯waki̱kyo yogwo yensei̱ yeegwa bi̱byo bigambu byange, kandi akabita mu nkora, abba nka muntu mu̱gezi̱ munyakuhondera bi̱baamu̱weereeri̱ yaabi̱mba nnyu̱mba gyamwe ha lubbaali.
7.25: Ndagali̱ b̯u̱gyagwi̱ri̱, meezi̱ gaahuuka, kihehu kyahunga; nnyu̱mba gi̱gyo gitakagwe, hab̯wakubba gyali gi̱bi̱mbi̱i̱rwe ha lubbaali.
7.26: Bei̱tu̱ yogwo yensei̱ yeegwa bi̱byo bigambu byange, akab̯ula kubita mu nkora, abba nka muntu mudoma mu̱nyaku̱bi̱mba nnyu̱mba ha musinyi.
7.27: Ndagali̱ b̯u̱gyagwi̱ri̱, mwizulo gwei̱za, na kihehu kyahunga nnyu̱mba gi̱gyo gyagwi̱ri̱, gyacwacwanikira ki̱mwei̱!”
7.28: Yesu̱ b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubaza bi̱byo bigambu, bantu banene hoi̱ baahu̱ni̱ri̱i̱ri̱ hoi̱ mu̱li̱ngo gu̱yeegeseeryengi̱mwo,
