B̯u̱mwei̱ ha b̯u̱b̯wo b̯usigo b̯weri̱ri̱ b̯warugwamwo bilimwa binyakukanya mirundi makumi gasatu, b̯undi b̯waru̱gi̱rwemwo bilimwa binyakukanya mirundi nkaaga, rundi mirundi ki̱ku̱mi̱.”
4.9: Mwomwo yaabaweera, “Yogwo ali na mapokopo gakwegwa, yeegwe.” Kigyendeerwa kya zi̱zo Ngeera (Matayo 13:10-17; Lu̱u̱ka 8:9-10)
4.10: Hei̱nyu̱ma, Yesu̱ b̯uyaali yankei hamwei̱ na bakwenda baamwe i̱ku̱mi̱ na babiri na bantu bandi, baamu̱b̯u̱u̱li̱i̱rye ha bintu bikukwatagana na ngeera zi̱zo zi̱yeegesyengi̱.
4.11: Yaabei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Nywe mwaheebeerwe kwetegereza nsita za b̯ukama b̯wa Ruhanga. Bei̱tu̱ bab̯wo batanzikiririzamwo, bintu byensei̱ baabyegwanga kuraba mu ngeera
4.12: aleke, “ ‘beicalenge nibawona, batakuhweza; beicalenge ni̱beegwa, bataku̱hwi̱tu̱ka; baaku̱bbeeri̱ nibahinduka nibaganyirwa!’ ” Yesu̱ Naasoboora Lugeera lwa Mu̱si̱gi̱ (Matayo 13:18-23; Lu̱u̱ka 8:11-15)
4.13: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaabab̯u̱u̱lya, “Timuli na kimukwetegereza ha lugeera lulu? Hati̱, zi̱zo ngeera zindi mulizeetegereza teetei̱?
4.14: Mu̱si̱gi̱ ali yogwo muntu asiga kigambu kya Ruhanga.
4.15: B̯usigo b̯u̱nyaku̱gwa ha muhanda b̯uli nka bab̯wo bantu beegwa kigambu, bei̱tu̱ babba nibacakamala ku̱kyegwa Sitaani nei̱za naakibasahulaho.
4.16: Bantu bandi bali nka b̯usigo b̯u̱nyaku̱gwa heitehe lya ha lubbaali. Bab̯wo beegwa kigambu nibakitangiira na kusemererwa.
4.17: Bei̱tu̱ hab̯wakubba kigambu kibba ki̱tabei̱ngi̱i̱ri̱ kikumala, b̯wi̱re b̯wa b̯ujune rundi ku̱ru̱mbwa hab̯wa kigambu b̯ub̯udwa, nibagwa wangu.
4.18: B̯u̱b̯wo b̯usigo b̯undi b̯u̱nyaku̱gwa mu mahwa b̯uli nka bantu beegwa kigambu,
4.19: bei̱tu̱ kandi b̯u̱hei̱za kutuntulira byetaagu bya b̯womi, kutwalwa b̯u̱gu̱u̱da b̯wa nsi, na mei̱ro ga kutunga bintu bikwahukana, bi̱byo bintu bimaliira ni̱bi̱tolya kigambu muli bo.
4.20: B̯u̱b̯wo b̯usigo b̯u̱nyaku̱gwa heitehe lirungi b̯uli nka bab̯wo bantu beegwa ki̱kyo kigambu nibakitangiira. Hei̱nyu̱ma, bab̯wo bantu babba nka b̯usigo, b̯uta byana binene mu maku̱mi̱ gasatu, rundi nkaaga, rundi na mirundi ki̱ku̱mi̱ kukira ha b̯usigo b̯unyakusigwa.” Lugeera lwa Kyererezi̱ (Lu̱u̱ka 8:16-18)
4.21: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaabaweera, “Muntu yaakei̱ngi̱i̱rya taara mu nnyu̱mba naagibbumba na lukimba rundi naagita mu b̯u̱lu̱ngu̱? Rundi, tagita ha kikondo kyagyo?
4.22: Hab̯wakubba tihalohoona kintu kyensei̱ ki̱bi̱se, kitalizooka hasyanu̱, na kintu kyensei̱ kya nsita kibatalyega.
4.23: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, yogwo yensei̱ ali na mapokopo gakwegwa, yeegwe!”
4.24: Kandi yaab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye yaabaweera, “Mwetegereze kurungi bi̱byo bintu bi̱mu̱kwegwa! Ki̱pi̱mi̱syo ki̱mu̱koresya hali bandi, nanywe kyokyo bali̱koresya kubacwera, kandi na kukiraho.
4.25: Yogwo yensei̱ alinaho, bali̱mu̱teeryaho; bei̱tu̱ yogwo atalinaho, na bi̱byo byali nabyo, balibimutoolaho.” Lugeera lwa B̯usigo B̯unyakumera
4.26: Yesu̱ yaab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye yaabaweera, “B̯ukama b̯wa Ruhanga b̯uli nka mu̱li̱mi̱ munyakusimba b̯usigo b̯wamwe mwitehe.
4.27: Hei̱nyu̱ma yaagyenda mu mei̱so na kukora bintu byamwe bindi nka b̯uli kiro. Hab̯wa kasu̱mi̱ kadooli̱, b̯u̱b̯wo b̯usigo b̯wameeri̱ b̯wahanda. Bei̱tu̱ yogwo mudulu atakeege b̯u̱b̯wo b̯usigo nka ku̱b̯wameeri̱ kandi nka ku̱b̯wahandi̱ri̱.
4.28: Itehe lyankei lyolyo liha b̯usigo kumera, kuhanda nakwera. B̯usigo b̯ubanza ni̱b̯u̱hu̱lu̱ki̱ri̱i̱rya, hei̱nyu̱ma nib̯uta b̯usonga, kasi hei̱nyu̱ma ni̱b̯wakya mwa kwera.
4.29: Kandi bi̱byo byana bya b̯u̱b̯wo b̯usigo b̯ub̯yera, mukama musiri akwata kyaku̱kesesya naakesa, hab̯wakubba kasu̱mi̱ ka kukesa kabba kadoori̱.” Lugeera lwa Kasigo ka Karadaali (Matayo 13:31-32; Lu̱u̱ka 13:18-19)
4.30: Yesu̱ yaab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye yaabaweera, “Kintu kyani ki̱twalengesani̱a nakyo b̯ukama b̯wa Ruhanga, rundi lugeera kyani lu̱twakoresya kub̯usobooraho?
4.31: B̯ukama b̯u̱b̯wo b̯wisana kasigo ka karadaali, kantu kadooli̱ hoi̱ ka muntu asimba mwitehe.
4.32: Bei̱tu̱ kasigo kakwo, nab̯ukaabba kooko kakirayo mu b̯u̱dooli̱, b̯ubakasimba, karugwamwo kimera kikukirayo b̯ukooto, mu bimera bilimwa mu misiri, nikibba na bi̱jangi̱ binene, ha bi̱nyoni̱ bi̱bi̱mba bizonza byabyo.”
4.33: Mu ngeru gyogyo gi̱mwei̱ gya kubazira mu ngeera, Yesu̱ yaabaweereeri̱ bigambu byensei̱ bibaali nibakusobora kwetegereza.
4.34: Atakabaweerenge kintu kyensei̱ atakoreseerye ngeera. Kyonkei b̯uyaakabanga kwantandu na beegeseb̯wa baamwe, yaabasoboorengi̱ bintu byensei̱ bikukwatagana na ngeera zi̱zo. Yesu̱ Niyaamula Ndagali̱ Giwakihehu (Matayo 8:23-27; Lu̱u̱ka 8:22-25)
4.35: Kiro ki̱kyo, b̯wi̱re b̯wa joojolo b̯u̱b̯wadoori̱, Yesu̱ yaaweereeri̱ beegeseb̯wa baamwe, “Twambu̱ke tugyende nseeri̱ gyeitaka.”
4.36: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, baati̱gi̱ri̱ho hahwo bantu banene hoi̱. Beegeseb̯wa baamwe bab̯wo baamu̱twali̱i̱ri̱ mu b̯wati̱ b̯wob̯wo nka kuyaakalingi. Haalingiho na maati̱ gandi ganyakugyendagyenda nabo.
4.37: Bei̱tu̱, hei̱zi̱ri̱ho kihehu kinyamaani hoi̱, bijanga byatandika kukuuta b̯wati̱, b̯u̱b̯wo b̯wati̱ b̯watandika kwizula meezi̱.
4.38: B̯u̱b̯wo nu, Yesu̱ yaalingi yeebbaki̱ri̱ kandi yeesagwi̱ri̱ kisagu na ha mutaku gwa b̯wati̱. Mwomwo beegeseb̯wa baamwe baamu̱byokya nibakoba, “Mwegesa, okufaayo kwahi, meezi̱ ku̱twi̱ta?”
4.39: Yaabyoki̱ri̱ yaacoomera kihehu kandi yaaweera bijanga, “Weeti̱keera cei̱! Weema!” Ki̱kyo kihehu kyamaari̱ galekaho kuhunga, neitaka lyateeka cee.
4.40: Mwomwo yaabaweera, “Hab̯waki mu̱ku̱ti̱i̱na hoi̱ yatyo? Na hati̱ timukanzikiririzangamwo?”
4.41: Baakwati̱i̱rwe b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱ b̯unene, baab̯u̱u̱lyangana, “Yogo kandi ali muntu wa kageru kyani? Mpehu na bijanga de bi̱ku̱mwegwa!”

5.1: Kihehu b̯u̱kyemi̱ri̱, Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe bambu̱ki̱ri̱ i̱taka baagyenda mu nsi gya Bageraseeni̱.
5.2: Yesu̱ b̯u̱yaani̱i̱nu̱ki̱ri̱ mu b̯wati̱, mudulu munyakubba na muzumu yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ mu bituuru, yei̱za hali Yesu̱.
5.3: Yogwo mudulu yei̱calengi̱ mu bituuru. Haali hataloho muntu yensei̱ munyakubba naacakasobora kwicala amu̱bbohi̱ri̱, kadi nikuli kumubboha na lu̱jegere.
5.4: Kubba mirundi minene baamu̱bbohengi̱ mikono na magulu, bei̱tu̱ njegere zi̱baamu̱bbohesyengi̱ mikono yaazi̱kadu̱lengi̱ kandi de naabinya byoma bi̱baabbengi̱ bamu̱bboheseerye magulu. Haali hataloho muntu yensei̱ munyakubba naali na maani ga kumusobora.
5.5: B̯wi̱re b̯wei̱jolo rundi b̯wa mwinsi, yaabbengi̱ mu bituuru na mu mbamba naakwaluka kandi naakwesalasala na mahi̱ga.
5.6: Yogwo mudulu b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ Yesu̱ naacaali hadei ho, yei̱ru̱ka, yaagyenda hali Yesu̱; yaaku̱nda malu̱ mu mei̱so gaamwe.
5.7: Yaaluka naakoba, “Okuntura kyani Yesu̱, Mwana wa Ruhanga wa hakyendi̱ hoi̱? Rahira mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga nti okugyenda kwahi ku̱mbonawonesya!”
5.8: Yogwo mudulu yaabazi̱ri̱ yatyo kubba Yesu̱ yaali amu̱weereeri̱, “We muzumu, ruga muli yogo mudulu!”
5.9: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaab̯u̱u̱lya muzumu gunyakubba mu yogwo mudulu, “Ibara lyamu, weewe naani?” Gwamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo nigukoba, “Ibara lyange gyagya I̱he, kubba tuli banene.”
5.10: Muzumu gwesengereerye Yesu̱ mirundi na mirundi atagubinga mu ki̱kyo kiikaru.
5.11: Heehi̱ nahaahwo, ku rubamba haalingiho igana lya mpunu likooto nizikudya.
5.12: Mizumu myataagi̱i̱ri̱ Yesu̱ nimikoba, “Tu̱si̱ndi̱ke mu mpunu.”
5.13: Yesu̱ yaami̱i̱ki̱ri̱i̱za. Mizumu myaruga mu mudulu, myeingira mwigana lya mpunu. B̯u̱myazi̱ngi̱i̱ri̱mwo, mpunu zensei̱ hamwei̱ zinyakudwanga nka nku̱mi̱ ibiri, zaaju̱mbu̱tu̱ki̱ri̱ zaasi̱ri̱mu̱ka niziraba ha rubamba lunyakubba lwesi̱mbi̱ri̱, zaagwa mwitaka, meezi̱ gaazi̱i̱ta.
5.14: Bab̯wo banyakubba ni̱baku̱zi̱li̱i̱sya, b̯u̱baaweeni̱ bintu binyakubbaho, bei̱ru̱ki̱ri̱ baagyenda baabiweera bantu banyakubba nibali mu rub̯uga na mu byaru. Bantu babaaweereeri̱, baagyendi̱ri̱ kuwona kintu ki̱bbeeri̱ho.
5.15: B̯u̱baadoori̱ hali Yesu̱, baagi̱i̱rye mudulu yogwo munyakubba aru̱gi̱i̱rwemwo i̱he lya mizumu, ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ hahwo, bamu̱lwali̱i̱rye, kandi na mu̱twe gwamwe nigukukora kurungi; baati̱i̱na.
5.16: Bab̯wo banyakuwona bintu binyakubbaho, baaweereeri̱ bantu banyakwi̱za bintu binyakukorwa hali mudulu munyakubba na mizumu kandi de baabaza na ha bigambu bikukwatagana na mpunu.
5.17: Kasi bantu ba mu kicweka ki̱kyo, beesengereerya Yesu̱ aruge mu kicweka kyab̯u.
5.18: Yesu̱ b̯uyaali naakutemba mu b̯wati̱, mudulu munyakurugwamwo mizumu yaamu̱taagi̱i̱ri̱ amwikirize agyende hamwei̱ nayo.
5.19: Bei̱tu̱ Yesu̱, atakamwikirize. Yaaweereeri̱ yogwo mudulu, “Weemuka odwe hali bantu baakwamwenyu̱, obaweere kintu ki̱handu̱ kya Mukama kyaku̱koleeri̱ na mbabazi̱ zaaku̱gi̱ri̱i̱ri̱.”
5.20: Nahab̯waki̱kyo mudulu yaagyendi̱ri̱, yaaraba mu Mbuga I̱ku̱mi̱ zensei̱ naaweeranga bantu baaho kintu ki̱handu̱ kya Yesu̱ kyamu̱koleeri̱. Bantu bensei̱ baahu̱ni̱ri̱i̱ri̱ hoi̱. Muhara wa Yai̱ro na Mu̱kali̱ Mu̱seeri̱
5.21: Murundi gundi, Yesu̱ yaatembi̱ri̱ b̯wati̱ yambuka i̱taka Galilaaya. Mwomwo yeemeera ha mutanda, bantu banene baamwecookaho.
5.22: Mwomwo omwei̱ ha bahandu̱ bei̱rombero gi̱beetengi̱ Yai̱ro, b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ Yesu̱, yei̱zi̱ri̱ yaaku̱nda malu̱ mu mei̱so gaamwe.
5.23: Yaataagira Yesu̱ naakoba, “Muhara wange ali mu kukabiira. Beiraba i̱za omuteho ngalu aleke ahone, yoomeere.”
5.24: Nahab̯waki̱kyo Yesu̱ yaabyoki̱ri̱ yaagyenda nayo. B̯uyaali naakugyenda, yaagyendagyendi̱ri̱ na bantu banene ni̱bamu̱hi̱gahi̱ga.
5.25: Mu bab̯wo bantu haalingimwo mu̱kali̱ munyakubba amaari̱ myaka i̱ku̱mi̱ na mibiri ahi̱mbi̱ri̱ keejwi̱so.
5.26: Yaali ajanjabi̱i̱rwe badakitaali banene, akoreseerye itungu lyamwe lyensei̱ mu kujanjab̯wa. Bei̱tu̱ kandi mu kiikaru kya kubba kurungi, mbeera gya b̯u̱seeri̱ gyahandengi̱-b̯u̱handi̱.
5.27: Yogwo mu̱kali̱ b̯u̱yeegwi̱ri̱ bigambu bi̱baabazengi̱ho Yesu̱, yei̱zi̱ri̱ i̱nyu̱ma lya Yesu̱ yaaraba mu bantu banene yaadwa yaakwata ha kilwalu kyamwe,
5.28: hab̯wakubba yaateekeri̱i̱ze, “Wakawona nka kwata-b̯u̱kwati̱ ha kilwalu kyamwe, nkuhona.”
5.29: B̯u̱yaakamu̱kweti̱ho, nahaahwo b̯ulohob̯uloho keejwi̱so kayaalingi ahi̱mbi̱ri̱, keemeera, yeezegwa mu mubiri gwamwe ahoni̱ri̱ gi̱gyo nseeri̱.
5.30: Nahaahwo Yesu̱ yeetegeri̱i̱ze nti haloho maani ganyakumurugamwo. Ki̱yaakoori̱ yaahi̱ndu̱ki̱ri̱ hali kitebe kya bantu banyakumuhonderanga, yaab̯u̱u̱lya, “Naani akweti̱ ha bilwalu byange?”
5.31: Beegeseb̯wa baamwe baamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo nibamuweera, “Okuwona bantu nka ku̱bakwi̱zwi̱ri̱ho, hati̱ b̯u̱b̯wo de noob̯u̱u̱lya nti, ‘Naani ankweti̱ho?’ ”
5.32: Bei̱tu̱ yo Yesu̱ yei̱ceeri̱ naatolereerya aleke awone muntu munyakumukwataho.
5.33: Hab̯wa yogwo mu̱kali̱ kubba naakwega kintu kinyakubba ki̱mu̱bbeeri̱ho, yei̱zi̱ri̱ yaaku̱nda malu̱ mu mei̱so ga Yesu̱, kasi mwomwo na b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱ b̯unene, yaamuweera mananu gensei̱, nka ku̱yaamu̱kweti̱ho na kinyakumubbaho.
5.34: Yesu̱ yaamuweera, “Muhara wange kwikiriza kwamu ku̱ku̱honeerye. Gyenda na b̯u̱si̱nge kandi ohonere ki̱mwei̱ gi̱gyo nseeri̱.”
5.35: Yesu̱ b̯uyaali naacakabaza, hei̱zi̱ri̱ho badulu banyakuruga mu nnyu̱mba gya Yai̱ro mu̱handu̱ wei̱rombero, baabikira Yai̱ro nibakoba, “Muhara waamu akwi̱ri̱; hataati̱ ki̱kwetaagi̱sya kwahi ku̱gadya Mwegesa.”
5.36: Bigambu bya badulu bab̯wo bi̱baabazi̱ri̱, Yesu̱ atakabiteho mutima. Ki̱yaakoori̱, yaaweereeri̱ mu̱handu̱ wei̱rombero, “Leka ku̱ti̱i̱na, ikiririza muli gya.”
5.37: Yesu̱ atakeikirize muntu yensei̱ kugyenda nayo, kutoolaho gana Peeteru, Yakobbo, hamwei̱ na Yohaana waab̯u Yakobbo yogwo.
5.38: B̯u̱baadoori̱ mu maka ga yogwo mu̱handu̱ wei̱rombero, Yesu̱ yaawona bantu bahu̱gu̱teeni̱, kandi nibali mu kizabiro kinyamaani.
5.39: Yei̱ngi̱i̱ri̱ mu nnyu̱mba yaabaweera, “Kizabiro na kuhugutana ku̱kwo kwensei̱ kwaki? Yogwo mwana akwi̱ri̱ kwahi, yeebbaki̱ri̱-b̯webbaki̱.”
5.40: Bei̱tu̱ bab̯wo bantu baamu̱seki̱ri̱-b̯u̱seki̱. Bantu bensei̱ banyakubba mu nnyu̱mba hali rufa hayaali, Yesu̱ yaabahu̱lu̱ki̱i̱rye hanzei, yeingira mu nnyu̱mba hali rufa na bbaa rufa, maa rufa, hamwei̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe bayaalingi nabo yaagyenda nabo bensei̱ hali rufa yaalingi.
5.41: Yesu̱ yaakweti̱ mukono gwa rufa, yaamuweera, “Tali̱ta ku̱u̱mi̱!” (Makuru gaakyo nti, “We muhala we, nkukuweera, byoka!”).
5.42: Nahaahwo b̯ulohob̯uloho, yogwo muhala yeemereeri̱, yaalibatalibata (yaalingi wa myaka i̱ku̱mi̱ na mibiri). Kiki kintu kyahu̱ni̱ri̱i̱ze hoi̱ bantu.
5.43: Yesu̱ yaabagaani̱i̱ri̱ ki̱mwei̱ kuweera muntu yensei̱ kintu kinyakubbaho, kandi yaabaweera bahe yogwo muhala kyakudya.

6.1: Yesu̱ yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ wu Yai̱ro yaagyenda mu rub̯uga lwa kwamwab̯u, hamwenya na beegeseb̯wa baamwe.
6.2: Kiro kya Sabbaato b̯u̱kyadoori̱, yaatandika kwegesya mwi̱rombero. Bantu banene banyaku̱mwegwa baahu̱ni̱ri̱i̱ri̱ hoi̱. Beeb̯u̱u̱lya, “Yogo muntu, magezi̱ gaga yaagatoori̱ hanya? Magezi̱ kyani gaga gayaaheebeerwe gakumuha kukora byamahanu!
6.3: Yogo tali yooyo mu̱heesi̱? Tiyooyo mu̱tabani̱ wa Mali̱ya, waab̯u ba Yakobbo, Yooze, Yu̱da na Si̱mooni̱? Banyakaab̯u tiboobo beicala haha natwe?” Baakwati̱i̱rwe ki̱ni̱ga kinene hoi̱, baasuula kumwikiririzamwo.
6.4: Yesu̱ yaabaweera, “Mu̱ragu̱ri̱ wa Ruhanga aheeb̯wa ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa handi hensei̱ kutoolaho mu rub̯uga lwa kwamwab̯u, mu beiju baamwe na mu mu̱gi̱ gwamwe.”
6.5: Mu rub̯uga lwa kwamwab̯u lu̱lwo, Yesu̱ yaali atakusobora ku̱koorayoona byamahanu, kutoolaho gana kuta ngalu zaamwe hali baseeri̱ badooli̱ naabahoni̱a.
6.6: Kandi yaahu̱ni̱ri̱i̱ri̱ hoi̱ hab̯wa bantu ba mu rub̯uga lu̱lwo kubba batali na kwikiriza. Yesu̱ Naatuma Beegeseb̯wa I̱ku̱mi̱ na Babiri Yesu̱ yaagyendi̱ri̱ ni̱yeegesyanga mu byaru, naaruganga mu kyaru ki̱mwei̱ naagyenda mu kindi.
6.7: Yeeti̱ri̱ Bakwenda baamwe i̱ku̱mi̱ na babiri, yaabatuma bagyende babiri babiri ku̱tebeerya bantu; kandi yaabaha b̯u̱sobozi̱ ha mizumu.
6.8: Mu kubatuma, yaabaragi̱i̱ri̱ naakoba, “Mutatwalanga kintu kyensei̱ kutoolaho gana mubbeere. Mutatwalanga bidyo, nsahu, rundi sente mu nsahu za miheeku myenyu̱.
6.9: Mulwalenge nkei̱to bei̱tu̱ mutatwalanga kilwalu kya kabiri.
6.10: B̯umwakeingiranga mu nnyu̱mba, mwi̱calenge mu nnyu̱mba gi̱gyo gya muntu abatangi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ ku̱doosya b̯umwakaruganga mu rub̯uga lu̱lwo.
6.11: Hamwagyendanga b̯uhataabbengemwo muntu akubatangiira, rundi akwetegeerya bigambu bimukubaza, mukunkumulenge icuucu lili ha magulu geenyu̱, nimukurugayo, nib̯uli b̯u̱kei̱so b̯wa kubasalira musangu.”
6.12: Beegeseb̯wa bab̯wo baagyendi̱ri̱ baatebya nti bantu bakuteekwa kwezi̱ramwo bibii byab̯u.
6.13: Baabi̱ngi̱ri̱ mizumu minene, baasi̱i̱ga baseeri̱ banene maku̱ta, baabahoni̱a. Yohaana Mu̱bati̱zi̱ Nibamusalaho Mu̱twe
6.14: Mukama Herodi̱ yeegwi̱ri̱ bintu bya Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe bi̱baakorengi̱, kubba ibara lya Yesu̱ lyali lyegebeerwe hoi̱. Bantu bamwei̱ baabazengi̱ hali Yesu̱ nibakoba, “Yohaana Mu̱bati̱zi̱ ahi̱mbooki̱ri̱ kuruga mu baku̱u̱, kyokyo kikumuha kubba na maani gaakukora byamahanu.”
6.15: Bandi baakobengi̱, “Ali Eri̱ya.” Bandi bo kandi baakobengi̱ nti, “Ali mu̱ragu̱ri̱ wa Ruhanga, nka omwei̱ ha baragu̱ri̱ ba Ruhanga ba kadei.”
6.16: Bei̱tu̱ Herodi̱ b̯u̱yeegwi̱ri̱ bi̱byo, yaakoba, “Yogwo ali Yohaana, mudulu gi̱nyaasaari̱ho mu̱twe, yooyo ahi̱mbooki̱ri̱ kuruga mu baku̱u̱!”
6.17: Kubba Herodi̱ yo yankei, yaali aragi̱i̱ri̱ bakwate Yohaana. B̯u̱baamu̱kweti̱, yaaragira baamubboha kandi baamuta mu nkomo. Yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ baakora ki̱kyo, hab̯wakubba yo Herodi̱ yaali mu b̯u̱tadoori̱ atu̱ngi̱ri̱ muramu waamwe gi̱beetengi̱ Herodi̱yaasi̱, munyakubba naali muka waab̯u gi̱beetengi̱ Fi̱li̱po.
6.18: Yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ bakwate Yohaana kubba Yohaana yaali ei̱ceeri̱ naaweeranga Herodi̱, “Ki̱doori̱ kwahi we kutunga muka weenyu̱.”
6.19: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, Herodi̱yaasi̱ yei̱ceeri̱ na nzi̱go na Yohaana, ni̱yendya ei̱te Yohaana. Bei̱tu̱ kandi atakasobore,
6.20: hab̯wakubba Herodi̱ yaati̱i̱nengi̱ Yohaana kandi yaamu̱lwani̱ri̱rengi̱, amwegi̱ri̱ kubba naali mudulu murungi wa mutima gu̱syanu̱. Herodi̱ yendyengi̱ kwetegeerya bigambu bya Yohaana, nab̯ukyakabba nti b̯u̱yaakamwegwanga naakubaza, yaabbengi̱ na kusoberwa, atakwega rundi ahondere bigambu byamwe rundi atabi̱hondera.
6.21: Hei̱nyu̱ma gya kasu̱mi̱, mu̱gi̱sa gwa Herodi̱yaasi̱ gu̱yendyengi̱ gwadoori̱ yati: Ha kiro kya kwi̱zu̱ka kubyalwa kwa Mukama Herodi̱, Herodi̱ yaateekani̱i̱ze B̯u̱genyi̱. B̯u̱b̯wo B̯u̱genyi̱ yaab̯uteekani̱ri̱i̱ze bahandu̱ bayaahanu̱u̱rengi̱ nabo, bahandu̱ ba basurukali na bantu bahandu̱ ba Galilaaya.
6.22: Muhara wa Herodi̱yaasi̱ b̯u̱yei̱ngi̱i̱ri̱ ha b̯u̱b̯wo b̯u̱genyi̱ hab̯walingi, yaadengu̱di̱ri̱ mugongo mu mei̱so ga bagenyi̱, yaasemeza hoi̱ Herodi̱ na bagenyi̱ bayaali yeeti̱ri̱ kudya kiihuru kya b̯u̱genyi̱. Mwomwo mukama yaaweera muhala munyakudenguda mugongo, “Nsaba kintu kyenseenya kyokwendya; nkwi̱za kukikuha.”
6.23: Yaaragani̱si̱i̱rye yogwo muhala ateeri̱ho na kurahira nti, “Nkwi̱za kukuha kintu kyenseenya kiwakansaba, kudwera ki̱mwei̱ ha ki̱mwei̱ kya kabiri kya b̯ukama b̯wange.”
6.24: Muhala yaahu̱lu̱ki̱ri̱mwo yaagyenda yaab̯u̱u̱lya maawe, “Nsabe kyani?” Maawe yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Saba bakuhe mu̱twe gwa Yohaana Mu̱bati̱zi̱.”
6.25: Nahaahwo muhala yei̱ngi̱i̱ri̱mwo b̯wangu, yaadwa yaasaba mukama naakoba: “Nkwendya ompe mu̱twe gwa Yohaana Mu̱bati̱zi̱ ha sahaani hataati̱.”
6.26: Mukama b̯u̱yeegwi̱ri̱ kya muhala ki̱yaamu̱sabi̱ri̱, yaasaalirwa. Bei̱tu̱ kandi hab̯wa kurahira kuyaali arahi̱i̱ri̱ mu mei̱so ga bagenyi̱ baamwe, yaali atakusobora kusuula kukora kintu kya muhala ki̱yaasabi̱ri̱.
6.27: Nahab̯waki̱kyo yaakoleeri̱ho yaaragira mudulu agyende atemehoona Yohaana mu̱twe aguleete. Mudulu yaagyendi̱ri̱ mu nkomo, yaatemaho Yohaana mu̱twe,
6.28: yei̱ra nagwo agu̱teeri̱ ha sahaani, yaaguha muhala, muhala yaagutwalira maawe.
6.29: Beegeseb̯wa ba Yohaana b̯u̱beegwi̱ri̱ binyakubbaho, bei̱zi̱ri̱ baatwala mutumbi gwa Yohaana, baaguziika mu kituuru. Yesu̱ Naadi̱i̱sya Badulu Nku̱mi̱ Itaanu
6.30: Bakwenda bei̱ri̱ri̱ bei̱za hali Yesu̱, baamuweera bintu byenseenya bibaali bakoori̱ na bi̱byo bibaali beegeseerye.
6.31: Kwega bantu baalingi banene banyakwi̱zanga nibagyenda, Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe batakatu̱ngenge kadi b̯wi̱re b̯wa kudya. Ki̱yaakoori̱ yaabaweera, “Turuge haha tugyende mu kiikaru kitwabbamwo twankei aleke mutungeho kaanya ka kuhuumula.”
6.32: Nahab̯waki̱kyo baagyendi̱ri̱ kwantandu bankei, na b̯wati̱.
6.33: Bei̱tu̱ bantu banene banyakubawona ni̱baku̱byokya baabalengeeri̱. Bab̯wo bantu bei̱ru̱ki̱ri̱ kuruga mu mbuga zinene, baaraba hanzei na magulu, baabanza Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe kudwa habaagyendengi̱.
6.34: B̯u̱yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ mu b̯wati̱, akawona kitebe kikooto kya bantu, yaabasaasira, hab̯wakubba yaaweeni̱ nibali nka ntaama zitali na mu̱li̱i̱sya. Nahab̯waki̱kyo yaatandi̱ki̱ri̱ ku̱beegesya bintu binene.
6.35: B̯wi̱re b̯u̱b̯wagyendi̱ri̱ beegeseb̯wa baamwe bei̱zi̱ri̱ hali yo, baamuweera, “Haha tuli mwihamba, kandi na b̯wi̱re b̯u̱gyendi̱ri̱.
6.36: Raga bantu bagyende aleke bagyende mu biikaru bi̱hereeri̱ho na mu byaru basobore kugula kintu kibaadya.”
6.37: Yesu̱ yaabei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Nywe mu̱bahe kintu kyakudya.” Mwomwo baamuweera, “Ki̱kyo kyaku̱badi̱i̱sya ki̱kwetaagi̱sya b̯unene b̯wa sente za musaara gwa muntu gwatunga naali akoori̱ kumala myeri̱ munaanei!” Kandi baamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya, “Hati̱ b̯u̱b̯wo, okwendya tugyende tu̱hu̱lu̱kye sente zi̱zo zensei̱ kugula migaati myaku̱badi̱i̱sya?”
6.38: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaabab̯u̱u̱lya, “Muli na migaati mingahi? Mu̱gyende muwone.” B̯u̱baamaari̱ kumiwona, baamwi̱ramwo nibakoba, “Mili mitaanu na nsu̱ ibiri.”
6.39: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaabaweera, baweere bantu beicaare hansi mu b̯usubi b̯ubisi.
6.40: Nahab̯waki̱kyo bantu bei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ mu b̯unene b̯wa bantu ki̱ku̱mi̱ ki̱ku̱mi̱ na bandi gataanu gataanu.
6.41: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaakwata migaati mitaanu na nsu̱ ibiri, yaalingiira kwakyendi̱, yaasi̱i̱ma Ruhanga, yaasabbula mi̱myo migaati. Mwomwo yaamiha beegeseb̯wa baamwe bami̱segeerye bantu. Na nsu̱ ibiri nazo yaazi̱gabi̱i̱ri̱ bantu bensei̱.
6.43: Kasi mwomwo beegeseb̯wa baakoma b̯ucwekacweka b̯wa migaati na nsu̱ b̯unyakusigala b̯u̱tadi̱i̱bi̱i̱rwe, b̯wei̱zu̱u̱lya nkimba i̱ku̱mi̱ neibiri.
6.44: Muhendu gwa bantu banyakudya baalingi badulu nku̱mi̱ itaanu. Yesu̱ Naalibatira ha Meezi̱
6.45: Nahaahwo, Yesu̱ yaaragi̱i̱ri̱ beegeseb̯wa baamwe batembe b̯wati̱, bagyende nseeri̱ Bbeti̱sai̱da bamwehembeeri̱, yo asigale naaraga bitebe bya bantu bagyende.
6.47: B̯wi̱re b̯wa joojolo, b̯wati̱ b̯walingi hakati̱ mwitaka, yo naali yankei ha mutanda.
6.48: Yaaweeni̱ beegeseb̯wa baamwe nibakutalibana hoi̱ kugoza kubba baagozengi̱ nibakutemba mpehu ginene. Mu b̯wi̱re b̯wei̱jolo ha nkoko gyakubanza gikookomera, Yesu̱ yaagyendi̱ri̱ hali beegeseb̯wa baamwe naakulibatira ha meezi̱. Yaali naali heehi̱ kubarabaho.
6.49: Bei̱tu̱ b̯u̱baamu̱weeni̱ naakulibatira ha meezi̱, baateekereza ali muzumu. Baalu̱ki̱ri̱,
6.50: kubba bensei̱ baamu̱weeni̱ kandi baati̱i̱na hoi̱. Nahaahwo yaabazi̱ri̱ nabo yaabaweera, “Mu̱tati̱i̱re! Ndi gyagya, mu̱tati̱i̱na.”
6.51: Mwomwo yaatemba mu b̯wati̱ b̯ubaalingimwo, mpehu gyema. Baahu̱ni̱ri̱i̱ri̱ hoi̱,
6.52: kubba baalingi bateetegeri̱i̱ze bintu bikukwatagana na kukanya kwa migaati; kubba mitima myab̯u myalingi mitatiro.
6.53: Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe, b̯u̱baamaari̱ kwambuka i̱taka, baadwa ha mutanda guli heehi̱ na rub̯uga Genesareeti̱, baaguma nnanga gya b̯wati̱.
6.54: B̯u̱baani̱i̱nu̱ki̱ri̱ mu b̯wati̱, nahaahwo b̯ulohob̯uloho, bantu baalengera Yesu̱.
6.55: Bei̱ru̱ki̱ri̱ mu kicweka ki̱kyo kyensei̱, beetweka baseeri̱ ha mikeeka nibabatwalanga ha baakeegwengi̱ Yesu̱ agyendi̱ri̱.
6.56: Kandi b̯uli hayaakagyendengi̱, mu byaru, mu mbuga rundi hadei kwokwo, baatengi̱ baseeri̱ mu b̯utali. Baamu̱taagi̱rengi̱ abeikirize bakwate kadi ha mukugiro gwa kilwalu kyamwe, kandi bab̯wo benseenya banyakugukwataho, baahoni̱ri̱ nseeri̱ zaab̯u.

7.1: Bafalisaayo na beegesa ba biragiro bamwei̱ banyakubba baru̱gi̱ri̱ Yeru̱salemu̱ bei̱zi̱ri̱ beecooka hali Yesu̱.
7.2: Baaweeni̱ nti bamwei̱ ha beegeseb̯wa baamwe baali nibakudya bidyo batadoosereerye murwa gwa kunaaba ngalu, makuru gaakyo nti baali batanaabi̱ri̱ ngalu mu mu̱li̱ngo gwa Bafalisaayo gu̱baaragi̱rengi̱ bantu bazinaabe.
7.3: (Kubba Bafalisaayo na Bayudaaya bandi bensei̱, tibadya batabanzi̱ri̱ kunaaba ngalu mu mu̱li̱ngo gwa murwa gwa bahaaha baab̯u.
7.4: B̯ubaruga mu katali, tibadya batanaabi̱ri̱. Kandi bahondera na mirwa mindi minene nka mya ku̱naabya bi̱kopo, byese, na mabbinika.)
7.5: Nahab̯waki̱kyo Bafalisaayo na beegesa ba biragiro baab̯u̱u̱li̱i̱rye Yesu̱, “Hab̯waki beegeseb̯wa baamu batahonderanga murwa gwa bahaaha beetu̱ gwa kunaaba ngalu, nibadya batanaabi̱ri̱ ngalu?”
7.6: Yesu̱ yaabei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naabaweera, “I̱saaya yaadooseerye kuragura hali nywe ngobya nywe, nka ku̱kyahandi̱i̱ki̱i̱rwe, “ ‘Baba bantu babaza-b̯u̱bazi̱ kwolokya nti bakuntamwo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa, bei̱tu̱ mu biteekerezu byab̯u tibantaho mutima.
7.7: Bandami̱i̱rya b̯usa, nzegesya gyab̯u gihondera biragiro binyakuteeb̯waho bantu b̯untu.’
7.8: Mu̱ru̱gi̱ri̱ ha biragiro bya Ruhanga, muli mukuhondera mirwa mya bantu.”
7.9: Yesu̱ yaagyendi̱ri̱ mu mei̱so na kubaweera: “Nywe muli na magezi̱ ga kuta kwantandu biragiro bya Ruhanga mwa kuhondera mirwa myenyu̱!
7.10: Kubba Mu̱sa yaakobi̱ri̱, ‘Oti̱i̱nenge bbaawu na maawu,’ kandi, ‘Yogwo yensei̱ akyena bbaawe rundi maawe, akusemeera kwi̱twanga.’
7.11: Bei̱tu̱ kandi nywe mu̱kwegesyanga nti kakubba muntu abba na kintu kyenseenya kyakusobora kuha bbaawe rundi maawe, naakaweera bbaawe rundi maawe, ‘Kintu kinyaakabba nku̱heeri̱, kili Korubbaani’ (makuru gaakyo nti, ki̱kyo kintu kili kisembu kya kuha Ruhanga),
7.12: b̯u̱b̯wo mubba mutacakamwikiriza kuha bbaawe rundi maawe b̯u̱sagi̱ki̱.
7.13: Mu ngeru gi̱gyo mubba ni̱mu̱ku̱di̱bya biragiro bya Ruhanga aleke mu̱doosereerye bya bahaaha beenyu̱ bi̱baabeegeseerye. Kandi mukora bintu bindi binene nka bibi.”
7.14: Yesu̱ yaab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye yeeta bantu banene bei̱ze hali yo. B̯u̱bei̱zi̱ri̱ yaabaweera, “Nywenseenya mu̱nzegwe kandi mwetegereze kiki.
7.15: Tihaloho kintu kibba hanzei wa muntu kisobora kugyenda mu yo nikikamuhenera mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga. Gana kintu kiruga mu muntu, kyokyo kimuhenera. [
7.16: Yogwo yensei̱ ali na mapokopo gakwegwa, yeegwe.]”
7.17: B̯u̱yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ mu kitebe ki̱kyo kya bantu banene ei̱ngi̱i̱ri̱ mu nnyu̱mba, beegeseb̯wa baamwe baamu̱b̯u̱u̱li̱i̱rye bigambu bikukwatagana na lugeera lu̱lwo.
7.18: Yesu̱ yaabab̯u̱u̱lya, “Mucakali kwetegereza? Ti̱mu̱kyegi̱ri̱ nti kintu kiruga hanzei wa muntu tikisobora kumuhenera?
7.19: Kubba kibba ki̱tagyendi̱ri̱ mu mutima, bei̱tu̱ kibba ki̱gyendi̱ri̱ mu nda gyamwe, kasi ki̱hu̱lu̱ki̱ri̱ mu mubiri gwamwe.” (B̯u̱yaabazi̱ri̱ yati, Yesu̱ yoolokeerye nti bidyo byenseenya bikwikirizib̯wa mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga.)
7.20: Yesu̱ yaagyendi̱ri̱ mu mei̱so na kubaza yaakoba, “Kintu kiruga mu muntu kyokyo kimuhenera.
7.21: Kubba mu mitima mya bantu, hooho haruga biteekerezu bibiibi, b̯wenzi̱ b̯wa bahuuru, b̯wi̱bi̱, b̯wi̱ti̱, b̯wenzi̱ b̯wa baswerangeeni̱,
7.22: mururu, itima, b̯u̱gobya, rwanju, i̱hali̱, kuhangiira, kwehaariiza, na b̯udoma.
7.23: Bibii bi̱byo byenseenya biruga munda mu muntu, kandi byobyo bimuhenera.” Kwikiriza kwa Mu̱kali̱ Munyamahanga
7.24: Yesu̱ yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ mu ki̱kyo kiikaru yaagyenda mu kicweka kya rub̯uga lwa Ti̱i̱ro. Yei̱ngi̱i̱ri̱ mu nnyu̱mba, atakwendya muntu yensei̱ yeege nka kwei̱ngi̱i̱ri̱mwo, bei̱tu̱ kandi yaali atakusobora kwebi̱sa.
7.25: Mu̱kali̱ munyakubba na muhara waamwe aru̱mbi̱i̱rwe muzumu, b̯u̱yaakeegwi̱ri̱ nti Yesu̱ alimwo, yei̱zi̱ri̱ hali yo yaaku̱nda malu̱.
7.26: Mu̱kali̱ yogwo yaalingi Muyonaani, munyakubyalwa mu Foi̱ni̱ki̱ya gyeihanga lya Si̱ri̱ya. Yaataagi̱i̱ri̱ Yesu̱ abinge muzumu guruge mu muhara waamwe.
7.27: Yesu̱ yaaweereeri̱ mu̱kali̱ yogwo, “Banza oleke baana badye bidyo byenseenya bi̱bakwendya, kubba ki̱doori̱ kwahi kutoola bidyo bya baana, okabiha mbwene.”
7.28: Mu̱kali̱ yogwo yaamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Mukama wange, ki̱kyo kili kwokwo; bei̱tu̱ kandi na mbwene nazo, zidya ha b̯udyodyo b̯ugwa kuruga ha meeza gya baana.”
7.29: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaamuweera, “Ku̱si̱gi̱ki̱ra nka kwoi̱ri̱ri̱mwo yatyo, okusobora kugyenda; muhara waamu muzumu gu̱mu̱ru̱gi̱ri̱ho.”
7.30: Mu̱kali̱ yeemu̱ki̱ri̱ yaagya mwana waamwe aleeri̱ ha kitabbu, muzumu gu̱mu̱ru̱gi̱ri̱ho. Mwi̱jalu̱ wa Mapokopo na Mu̱nwa Naahona
7.31: Yesu̱ yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ mu kicweka kya rub̯uga lwa Ti̱i̱ro yaaraba mu nsi gya Si̱dooni̱ yaasi̱ri̱mu̱ka kwi̱taka lya Galilaaya yaadwa na mu kicweka kyei̱saza lya Mbuga I̱ku̱mi̱.
7.32: Ku̱kwo hooho bantu bandi baamu̱leeteeri̱ mudulu mwi̱jalu̱ mapokopo munyakubba de ei̱jeeri̱ mu̱nwa atakusobora kubaza. Bab̯wo bantu baamu̱taagi̱i̱ri̱ ateho yogwo mudulu ngalu amu̱honi̱e.
7.33: Yesu̱ yaatoori̱ yogwo mudulu mu kitebe kya bantu, yaamwi̱rya kwantandu, yaata nzala zaamwe mu mapokopo ga yogwo mudulu. Hei̱nyu̱ma gya kukora ki̱kyo, yaatwi̱ri̱ matwantwe ha nzala zaamwe, yaakwata ha lulimi lwa yogwo mudulu.
7.34: Yaali̱ngi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ kwakyendi̱ mu mwanya, yaahumula nei̱cya mutima naakoba, “Efata” (kigambu ki̱manyi̱sya nti, “Ijuluka!”).
7.35: Mapokopo ga yogwo mudulu gei̱ju̱lu̱ki̱ri̱, na lulimi lwamwe lwahuka, yaatandika kubaza kurungi.
7.36: Yesu̱ yaabaragi̱i̱ri̱ bataweera muntu yensei̱ kintu ki̱yaakoori̱ hali yogwo mudulu. Bei̱tu̱ b̯u̱yaagyendengi̱ mu mei̱so na kubagaana batakibaza, mwomwo baagyendengi̱ mu mei̱so na kukibazaho.
7.37: Bantu baahu̱ni̱ri̱i̱ri̱ hoi̱ baakoba, “Bintu byenseenya abi̱koori̱ kurungi, asoboresya bei̱jalu̱ ba mapokopo kwegwa na bei̱jalu̱ ba minwa kubaza.”

8.1: Mu biro bi̱byo bantu bandi banene hoi̱ beecooki̱ri̱ hamwei̱. Nka kubaalingi batali na kyakudya, Yesu̱ yeeti̱ri̱ beegeseb̯wa baamwe yaabaweera,
8.2: “Nkwegwa ninkusaasira hoi̱ baba bantu, hab̯wakubba bei̱ceeri̱ nagya haha kumala biro bisatu, kandi tibali na kyakudya kyensei̱.
8.3: Kakubba mbaraga nibakeemuka nzala, bakwi̱za kulemwa maani ga kulibata nibagwa nsazi mu muhanda, hab̯wakubba bamwei̱ muli bo baru̱gi̱ri̱ hadei.”
8.4: Beegeseb̯wa baamwe baamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo ni̱bamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya, “Bidyo bikusobora ku̱di̱i̱sya bab̯wo bantu, kunu mwirungu, muntu akusobora kubitoola hanya?”
8.5: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaab̯u̱u̱lya beegeseb̯wa baamwe, “Muli na migaati mingahi?” Baamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo nibakoba, “Musanju.”
8.6: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaaweera bantu bensei̱ beicaare hansi. B̯u̱yaakweti̱ migaati mi̱myo musanju, yaasi̱i̱ma Ruhanga, yaamisabbasabbulamwo, yaamiha beegeseb̯wa baamwe bamigabire bantu, nabo baamibagabira.
8.7: Beegeseb̯wa ba Yesu̱, de baalingi na b̯u̱su̱ b̯u̱dooli̱. Nab̯wo Yesu̱ yaab̯u̱si̱i̱mi̱i̱ri̱ Ruhanga, yaaweera beegeseb̯wa baamwe bab̯ugabire bantu, baab̯ugaba.
8.8: Bantu baadi̱i̱ri̱, beicuta. Hei̱nyu̱ma gya kudya, beegeseb̯wa bakomakomi̱ri̱ b̯udyodyo b̯wa migaati b̯u̱nyaku̱doosya nkimba musanju.
8.9: Mu bab̯wo bantu ba Yesu̱ bayaadi̱i̱si̱i̱rye, haalingimwo badulu nka nku̱mi̱ inei. Yesu̱ b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kubaraga,
8.10: yaatemba b̯wati̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe, yaagyenda mu kicweka kya Dalu̱manu̱ta. Bafalisaayo Nibasaba Kyamahanu
8.11: Bafalisaayo bei̱zi̱ri̱ baatandika ku̱b̯u̱u̱li̱sani̱a Yesu̱. Mwaku̱mu̱pi̱ma, baamu̱sabi̱ri̱ akore kawoneru kakuruga mwiguru.
8.12: Yaahu̱u̱mwi̱ri̱ nei̱cya mutima, yaakoba, “Hab̯waki bantu ba mu̱hi̱hi̱ gugu bakusaba kawoneru ka kyamahanu? Mu mananu nkubaweera, tihaloho kawoneru ka kyamahanu kalibaheeb̯wa.”
8.13: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaabarugaho, yei̱ra mu b̯wati̱, yambuka yaagyenda nseeri̱ gyeitaka. Bafalisaayo na Herodi̱ Nibeisana B̯u̱mya
8.14: Beegeseb̯wa ba Yesu̱ baali beebereeri̱ kuleetagana migaati, kutoolaho gana mugaati gu̱mwei̱ gubaalingi nagwo mu b̯wati̱.
8.15: Yesu̱ yaabapompogeerya naakoba, “Mwegyendereze hoi̱, mwi̱cale nimwerinda nzegesya gya b̯u̱gobya gya Bafalisaayo na Herodi̱ gili nka b̯u̱mya.”
8.16: Mwomwo baatandika kubaza bankei na bankei ha kigambu kya b̯u̱mya kiyaali abazi̱ri̱ho nibakobanga nti, “Abazi̱ri̱ yatyo, kubba tituli na migaati.”
8.17: Yesu̱ b̯u̱yeetegeri̱i̱ze biteekerezo byab̯u, yaabab̯u̱u̱lya, “Hab̯waki mukubaza ha b̯utabba na migaati? Na hataati̱ ti̱mu̱kabbeeri̱ kuwona rundi kwetegereza? Mitima myenyu̱ mili na kintu ki̱mi̱heeri̱ kutatiira?
8.18: Nab̯umuli na mei̱so, mukuwona kwahi? Nab̯umuli na mapokopo, mukwegwa kwahi? Kandi de, mu̱kwi̱zu̱ka kwahi?
8.19: B̯u̱nyaadi̱i̱si̱i̱rye bantu nku̱mi̱ itaanu migaati mitaanu, nkimba zingahi zi̱i̱zu̱lu̱ b̯udyodyo zi̱mwakomakomi̱ri̱?” Beegeseb̯wa baamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo nibakoba, “I̱ku̱mi̱ neibiri.”
8.20: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaab̯u̱u̱lya beegeseb̯wa baamwe naakoba, “Rundiki b̯u̱nyaasabbwi̱ri̱ migaati musanju nyaadi̱i̱sya bantu nku̱mi̱ inei, nkimba zingahi zi̱i̱zu̱lu̱ b̯udyodyo zi̱mwakomakomi̱ri̱?” Baamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo nibakoba, “Musanju.”
8.21: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaabaweera, “Nahati̱ mucaali kwetegereza?” Mudulu Mwi̱jalu̱ Mei̱so mu Bbeti̱sai̱da Naahona
8.22: Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe bei̱zi̱ri̱ mu kyaru kya Bbeti̱sai̱da. Haabbaho bantu banyakuleeta mudulu mwi̱jalu̱ mei̱so nibataagira Yesu̱ amukwateho amu̱honi̱e.
8.23: Yesu̱ yaakweti̱ mukono gwa yogwo mudulu mwi̱jalu̱ wa mei̱so, yaamu̱hu̱lu̱kya mu kyaru ki̱kyo. Yesu̱ b̯u̱yaatwi̱ri̱ matwantwe ha mei̱so ga mudulu yogwo, naakamutaho na ngalu ze, yaab̯u̱u̱lya yogwo mudulu, “Oli na kintu kyenseenya kyokuwona?”
8.24: Yogwo mudulu yaali̱ngi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ kwakyendi̱ yaakoba, “Nkuwona bantu; bei̱tu̱ bakwisana misaali mikulibatalibata.”
8.25: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaata ngalu zaamwe ha mei̱so ga yogwo mudulu. Kasi mei̱so gaamwe geijuluka, gei̱raho gaatandika kuwona, kandi bintu byenseenya yaabiwonera ki̱mwei̱ kurungi.
8.26: Mu kumuraga yeemuke, Yesu̱ yaaweereeri̱ yogwo mudulu, “Otagyenda munda wa kyaru.” Peeteru Niyaatula Yesu̱ nka kwali Ku̱ri̱si̱to (Mari̱ko 16:13-20; Lu̱u̱ka 9:18-21)
8.27: Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe baaru̱gi̱ri̱ Galilaaya baagyenda mu byaru bi̱hereeri̱ rub̯uga lwa Kai̱saali̱ya Fi̱li̱pi̱. B̯ubaali nibakugyenda, Yesu̱ yaab̯u̱u̱lya beegeseb̯wa baamwe, “Bantu banzeta naani?”
8.28: Baamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo nibakoba, “Bantu bamwei̱ bakweta Yohaana Mu̱bati̱zi̱; bandi nibakweta Eri̱ya; kasi kandi bandi, bo nibakweta omwei̱ ha baragu̱ri̱ ba Ruhanga.”
8.29: Yesu̱ yaabab̯u̱u̱lya, “Bei̱tu̱ kandi nywe, munzeta naani?” Peeteru yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “We oli Ku̱ri̱si̱to, wa Ruhanga gi̱yaakobi̱ri̱ kutuma.”
8.30: Yesu̱ yaabapompogeerye naabaweera bataweeraho muntu wondi yensei̱ bigambu bikukwatagana nayo. Yesu̱ Naabaza ha Ku̱kwa Kwamwe
8.31: Yesu̱ yaatandi̱ki̱ri̱ kwegesya beegeseb̯wa baamwe naabaweera nti Mwana wa Muntu akuteekwa kuraba mu kuwonawona kunene bahandu̱ ba Bayudaaya na bahandu̱ ba balaami̱ hamwenya na Beegesa ba biragiro, bamusuule. Kandi, akwi̱za kwi̱twa, kasi hei̱nyu̱ma gya biro bisatu ahimbooke.
8.32: Bi̱byo bigambu Yesu̱ yaabi̱bazi̱i̱ri̱ hasyanu̱. Mwomwo Peeteru yaatwala Yesu̱ kwantandu, yaatandika kumucoomera.
8.33: Bei̱tu̱ Yesu̱ b̯u̱yaahi̱ndu̱ki̱ri̱ naakawona beegeseb̯wa baamwe, yaacoomeeri̱ Peeteru naakoba, “Ndugaho Sitaani! Biteekerezu byamu bikuruga kwahi hali Ruhanga, bili bya b̯untu.”
8.34: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yeeta kitebe kya bantu hamwei̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe yaabaweera: “Muntu yensei̱ akwendya kumpondera, yeelekesye bya mutima gwamwe bi̱gu̱kwendya, yeetweke musalaba gwamwe, ampondere.
8.35: Kubba yogwo yensei̱ akwendya kujuna b̯womi b̯wamwe, alib̯ufeerwa; bei̱tu̱ yogwo yensei̱ alifeerwa b̯womi b̯wamwe hab̯wange na hab̯wa Makuru Garungi, alib̯ujuna.
8.36: Kikyani kya muntu kyaligasirwa, kutunga b̯u̱gu̱u̱da b̯wa nsi gyensei̱ bei̱tu̱ kandi naakafeerwa b̯womi b̯wamwe? Kyahi!
8.37: Rundi, kikyani kya muntu kyakusobora ku̱hayo mwa kucungura b̯womi b̯wamwe? Kyahi!
8.38: Yogwo yensei̱ akukwatwa nsoni̱ hab̯wange, kandi na hab̯wa bigambu byange mu mu̱hi̱hi̱ gugu gwa bantu batakwesigwa kandi bali nkori̱ za bibii, na Mwana wa Muntu alimukwatirwa nsoni̱ b̯wali̱i̱zi̱ra mu ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kya Bbaawe, na bamalayika baku̱si̱i̱mwa mu mei̱so ga Ruhanga nibakumuherekeera.”

9.1: Yesu̱ yaagyendi̱ri̱ mu mei̱so na kukoba, “Mu mananu nkubaweera nti, bamwei̱ muli nywe beemereeri̱ haha, timuliwonaho lu̱ku̱u̱, mu̱takabbeeri̱ kuwona b̯ukama b̯wa Ruhanga ni̱b̯wi̱za na maani.” Yesu̱ Naahinduka Naali ha Lusahu (Matayo 17:1-13; Lu̱u̱ka 9:28-36)
9.2: Hei̱nyu̱ma gya biro mukaaga, Yesu̱ yaatweri̱ Peeteru, Yakobbo na Yohaana yaatemba nabo kwakyendi̱ ha lusahu, baabbayo bankei. B̯ubaali nibali kwakyendi̱ wa lusahu, Yesu̱ yaahinduka mu nzooka gyamwe.
9.3: Ngoye zaamwe zaahi̱ndu̱ki̱ri̱ zaasyana tei̱tei̱tei̱; kwega ku̱zaasyeni̱, tihaloho muntu mu nsi gyensei̱ akusobora ku̱zi̱syani̱a kudwa ha zaadoori̱.
9.4: Nahaahwo haamaari̱ gazookaho bantu babiri, Eri̱ya na Mu̱sa, banyakubba nibakubaza na Yesu̱.
9.5: Peeteru b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ bi̱byo bintu binyakubbaho, yaaweera Yesu̱, “Mwegesa kili kirungi twenseenya kubba haha, leka tu̱bi̱mbe b̯u̱si̱i̱si̱ra b̯usatu, kamwei̱ kaamu, kamwei̱ ka Mu̱sa, kamwei̱ kʼEri̱ya.”
9.6: Peeteru yaalingi atakwega ki̱kyo ki̱yaabazengi̱, hab̯wakubba bensei̱ baalingi na b̯u̱ti̱i̱ni̱ b̯unene.
9.7: B̯ubaali nibali hahwo kikaka kyei̱zi̱ri̱ kyababbumba, iraka lyaruga mu ki̱kyo kikaka nilikoba: “Yogo yoyo Mwana wange, gi̱nyendya, mu̱mwegwenge!”
9.8: Kikaka b̯u̱kyaru̱gi̱ri̱ho, baamagamaga batakei̱re kuwona muntu wondi yensei̱ kutoolaho Yesu̱ musa.
9.9: B̯ubaali ni̱baku̱si̱ri̱mu̱ka kuruga ha lusahu, yaabapompogeerya bataweeraho muntu yensei̱ kintu ki̱baweeni̱ ku̱doosya Mwana wa Muntu b̯walihimbooka kuruga mu baku̱u̱.
9.10: Ki̱kyo baaki̱bi̱i̱ki̱ri̱ nka nsita gyab̯u; kyonkei beicala ni̱bab̯u̱u̱lyangana, “Yogo mudulu b̯wakukoba kuhimbooka kuruga mu baku̱u̱, aku̱manyi̱sya ki?”
9.11: Kasi mwomwo baamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya, “Hab̯waki beegesa ba biragiro bakoba nti Eri̱ya yooyo alina kubanza kwi̱za?”
9.12: Yesu̱ yaabei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Mu mananu, Eri̱ya yoyo alina kubanza kwi̱za aterekereerye bintu byensei̱. Bei̱tu̱ na Binyakuhandiikwa bikoba nti, Mwana wa Muntu akuteekwa kuwonawona hoi̱ na bantu bamusuule.
9.13: Kandi nkubaweera: Eri̱ya, yei̱zi̱ri̱ kadei na bantu baamu̱koori̱ bintu byensei̱ bi̱beendeerye kumukola nka ku̱kyamu̱handi̱i̱ki̱i̱rweho.” Yesu̱ Naahoni̱a Musigazi Akwati̱i̱rwe Muzumu (Matayo 17:14-21; Lu̱u̱ka 9:37-43)
9.14: Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe basatu, b̯u̱bei̱ri̱ri̱ kuruga ha lusahu, baagi̱i̱rye kitebe kya bantu banene hoi̱ na beegesa ba biragiro kyelogoleerye beegeseb̯wa baamwe bandi ni̱baku̱baku̱u̱ti̱sya mpaka.
9.15: Bantu bensei̱ b̯u̱baakaweeni̱ Yesu̱, baahu̱ni̱ri̱i̱ri̱ hoi̱ baatandika kwi̱ru̱ka ni̱bei̱zanga hali Yesu̱ ku̱mu̱ramu̱kya.
9.16: B̯u̱yeegwi̱ri̱ ngeru bakubaza yaabab̯u̱u̱lya, “Kikyani ki̱ku̱baku̱u̱ti̱sya mpaka?”
9.17: Mudulu omwei̱ mu bab̯wo bantu yaamwi̱ramwo naakoba, “Mwegesa, nku̱leeteeri̱ mwana wange atembeerwe muzumu kandi gu̱mwi̱jeeri̱ mu̱nwa,
9.18: b̯uli b̯watembwa gu̱gwo muzumu, gumuguma hansi, naatandika ku̱lwa i̱hu̱lo mu mu̱nwa, naanena meino kandi naakangabala. +Nyaamu̱leeteeri̱ beegeseb̯wa baamu bei̱tu̱ baalemeerwe kugumubingamwo.”
9.19: Yesu̱ yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba: “Nywe bantu ba mu̱hi̱hi̱ gugu, bateikiririza mu Ruhanga ndiicala nanywe ku̱doosya di̱? Mu̱leete yogwo mwana haha hali gya.”
9.20: Mwomwo baaleeta yogwo mwana hali Yesu̱. Muzumu b̯u̱gwakaweeni̱ Yesu̱, gwatandika kumuniga, gwamuguma hansi, yaatandika kweb̯u̱lu̱ngu̱la naahuluka i̱hu̱lo mu mu̱nwa.
9.21: Yesu̱ yaab̯u̱u̱lya bbaa mwana naakoba, “Amaari̱ kasu̱mi̱ ki naali mu mbeera gi̱gyo?” Yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Ei̱ceeri̱ na b̯u̱b̯wo b̯u̱seeri̱ kuruga mu b̯uto b̯wamwe.
9.22: Ei̱ceeri̱ naagwanga mu mworo rundi mu meezi̱, bei̱tu̱ waakabba nookusobora, tu̱gi̱i̱re mbabazi̱ omu̱honi̱e.”
9.23: Yesu̱ yaamuweera, “Leka kukoba nti nyaakabba ninkusobora. Hab̯wakubba hali muntu ali na kwikiriza b̯uli kintu kikusoboka.”
9.24: Nahaahwo bbaa mwana yaakoba, “Nkwikiriza; njuna b̯uteikiriza b̯wange!”
9.25: Yesu̱ b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ kitebe kya bantu ni̱ki̱kwi̱za kuwona kintu kiloho, yaacoomeeri̱ gu̱gwo muzumu naakoba, “We muzumu gukugaana yogwo mwana kubaza nakwegwa, nkukuragira, mu̱ru̱gemwo kandi otali̱mwi̱ramwo murundi gundi.”
9.26: Yesu̱ b̯u̱yaamaari̱ kucoomera gu̱gwo muzumu, mwana yaatandika kweb̯u̱lu̱ngu̱la, muzumu gwaluka na maani, gwamurugamwo, yeisana nka mu̱ku̱u̱. Bantu baabazi̱ri̱ nibakoba, “Akwi̱ri̱!”
9.27: Bei̱tu̱ Yesu̱ yaamu̱kweti̱ ha mukono, yaamu̱byokya, yeemeera.
9.28: Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe b̯u̱baaku̱bi̱ri̱yo bei̱ngi̱i̱ri̱ mu nnyu̱mba, beegeseb̯wa baamwe baamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya na mu nsita, “Hab̯waki twe muzumu gu̱gwo gwatu̱lemi̱ri̱ kugubinga?”
9.29: Yaabei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Muzumu nka gu̱gwo timusobora kugubinga mu̱tarabi̱ri̱ mu kusaba.” Yesu̱ Naabaza ha Ku̱kwa Kwamwe Murundi Gwakabiri
9.30: B̯u̱baaru̱gi̱ri̱ hahwo, baagyenda baaraba mu kicweka kya Galilaaya. Habaagyendi̱ri̱, Yesu̱ atakendye bantu beegeyo,
9.31: hab̯wakubba yaalingi naakwegesya beegeseb̯wa baamwe. B̯uyaalingi naaku̱beegesya yaabaweera, “Mwana wa Muntu akugyenda kuheeb̯wayo mu mikono mya banyanzigwa. Bakwi̱za ku̱mwi̱ta, kasi hei̱nyu̱ma gya biro bisatu ahimbooke.”
9.32: Bo beegeseb̯wa baamwe batakamwetegereze b̯u̱yaabaweereeri̱ ki̱kyo kigambu; kandi de, baati̱i̱ni̱ri̱ na ku̱mu̱b̯u̱u̱lya ha ki̱kyo kigambu. Naani Ali na Ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa Kikukira? (Matayo 18:1-5; Lu̱u̱ka 9:46-48)
9.33: B̯u̱baaru̱gi̱ri̱ ku̱kwo bei̱za Kaperenau̱mu̱. B̯ubaalingi mu nnyu̱mba, Yesu̱ yaabab̯u̱u̱lya, “Mwi̱ceeri̱ nimukuuta mpaka zaaki mu muhanda?”
9.34: Bei̱tu̱ batakamwi̱remwo hab̯wakubba b̯ubaalingi mu muhanda ni̱bakwi̱za baalingi kukuuta mpaka za naani akukirayo ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
9.35: B̯u̱yei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ hansi, yeeta beegeseb̯wa baamwe i̱ku̱mi̱ na babiri yaabaweera, “Muntu yensei̱ akwendya kubba wa hakyendi̱, alina kweb̯undaaza, yeetwale kubba wa hansi kandi muheereza wa b̯uli muntu.”
9.36: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaasenga mwana muto mu ngalu zaamwe yaamwemereerya mu mei̱so gaab̯u, yaabaweera,
9.37: “Muntu yensei̱ atangiira mwana muto nka yogo mwibara lyange b̯u̱b̯wo abba antangi̱ri̱i̱ri̱. Kandi yogwo yensei̱ antangiira, abba atatangi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ gya nyankei bei̱tu̱ na yogwo munyakuntuma.” Ataku̱tu̱hakani̱sya Abba ha Rubaju Lwetu̱ (Lu̱u̱ka 9:49-50)
9.38: Mwomwo Yohaana yaaweera Yesu̱, “Mwegesa, twaweeni̱ muntu naakubinga mizumu mwibara lyamu, twamugaana, hab̯wakubba atakabbe omwei̱ hali twe.”
9.39: Yesu̱ yaamuweera, “Mutamugaana, hab̯wakubba tihaloho muntu akusobora kukora kyamahanu mwibara lyange, kandi hei̱nyu̱ma akambazaho kubiibi,
9.40: kubba yogwo yensei̱ atakwahukana natwe ali ha rubaju lwetu̱.”
9.41: Kandi nkubaweera mu mananu nti, yogwo yensei̱ alibaha ki̱kopo kya meezi̱ ga kunywa mwibara lyange hab̯wakubba mukumpondera, alitunga mpeera. Kulamba kwa Maani ha Kibii (Matayo 18:6-9; Lu̱u̱ka 17:1-2)
9.42: Yogwo yensei̱ aliha omwei̱ mu bab̯wo bakunzikiririzamwo, bali nka baana bato hali gya, kukora kibii, hakiri atunga kifubiro kya kumuguma mwitaka bamu̱bbohi̱ri̱ lumengu mwi̱coti̱
9.43: Mukono gwamu b̯ugulikuha kukora kibii, ogutemeho ogugume hadei. Kili kirungi kugyenda mu b̯womi b̯utamalikaho na mukono gu̱mwei̱ kukira kubba na mikono mibiri okagyenda mu Geehena cali heicala mworo gu̱talu̱ma. [
9.44: Ku̱kwo hooho heicala maginyo gatakwa, kandi na mworo gu̱talu̱ma.]
9.45: Kandi na kigulu kyamu kyakabba nikikukuha kukora kibii, okitemeho. Kili kirungi kugyenda mu b̯womi b̯utamalikaho nooli na kigulu ki̱mwei̱ kukira kubba na magulu gabiri, okagyenda mu Geehena, [
9.46: ku̱kwo cali maginyo gatakwa, kandi na mworo gu̱talu̱ma.]
9.47: Na li̱i̱so lyamu lyakabba nilikukuha kukora kibii, litoolemwo. Kili kirungi kugyenda mu b̯ukama b̯wa Ruhanga nooli na li̱i̱so li̱mwei̱ kukira kubba na mei̱so gabiri okagumwa mu Geehena,
9.48: kicweka cali “ ‘heicala maginyo gatakwa, kandi na mworo gu̱talu̱ma.’
9.49: B̯uli muntu akwi̱za kusemezeb̯wa kuraba mu mworo, nka bidyo kubabilungamwo muzu aleke binole.
9.50: “Muzu kili kintu kya mugasu, bei̱tu̱ kakubba gumalikwamwo b̯ululu b̯wagwo, tosobora ku̱b̯wi̱ryamwo. Nahab̯waki̱kyo, nzicala gyenyu̱ giicale nigili girungi nka muzu kugubba gwa mugasu, mwicaranwe na b̯u̱si̱nge.”

10.1: Yesu̱ b̯u̱yaaru̱gi̱ri̱ hahwo, yaagyenda mwisaza lya B̯uyudaaya hei̱nyu̱ma yambuka yaagyenda nseeri̱ gya mugira Yorodaani. Bantu banene bei̱zi̱ri̱ hali yo, kandi nka nkora gyamwe kugyalingi yaabeegesya.
10.2: Bamwei̱ ha Bafalisaayo baagyendeeri̱ Yesu̱, baamutega ni̱bamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya, “Mu biragiro byetu̱, kiikirizib̯wambe kubinga mu̱kali̱?”
10.4: Baamwi̱ramwo nibakoba, “Mu̱sa yei̱ki̱ri̱i̱ze mudulu kuhandiikira mu̱kali̱ bbaruha gya kwahukana nayo na kumubinga nomubinga.”
10.5: Yesu̱ yaabei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Hab̯wa mitima myenyu̱ kubba mitatiro mitakwikiriza kyokyo Mu̱sa yaabaheereeri̱ kiragiro ki̱kyo.
10.6: Bei̱tu̱ mu kubanza kuruga ha kuhangwa kwa nsi, ‘Ruhanga yaabahangi̱ri̱ mudulu na mu̱kali̱.’
10.7: ‘Nahab̯waki̱kyo, mudulu yaalekanga bbaawe na mmaawe niyeekwata na mu̱kali̱ waamwe,
10.8: kandi bab̯wo bantu babiri nibafooka mubiri gu̱mwei̱.’ Hati̱ bab̯wo bantu babiri balifooka mubiri gu̱mwei̱.
10.9: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, kintu kya Ruhanga ateerani̱i̱ze hatalibbaho muntu yensei̱ aku̱kyahu̱kani̱a.”
10.10: B̯u̱bei̱ngi̱i̱ri̱ mu nnyu̱mba murundi gundi, beegeseb̯wa baamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya ha gi̱gyo nsonga gya kubinga mu̱kali̱.
10.11: Yaabei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Yogwo yensei̱ akubinga mu̱kali̱ waamwe, akaswera wondi akubba naakukora b̯wenzi̱ nayo.
10.12: Kandi na mu̱kali̱ kakubba ei̱ta nnyu̱mba, akatungwa mudulu wondi, nayo akubba naakukora b̯wenzi̱.” Yesu̱ na Baana Bato (Matayo 19:13-15; Lu̱u̱ka 18:15-17)
10.13: Bantu baaleeti̱ri̱ baana bato hali Yesu̱ abakwateho; bei̱tu̱ beegeseb̯wa ba Yesu̱, baacoomeeri̱ bab̯wo bantu.
10.14: Yesu̱ b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ nibakubagaana, yaasaalirwa, mwomwo yaaweera beegeseb̯wa baamwe, “Mu̱leke baana bato bei̱ze hali gya, mutabagaana, hab̯wakubba b̯ukama b̯wa Ruhanga b̯uli b̯wa bab̯wo bantu baali nka baba baana bato.
10.15: Mu mananu nkubaweera nti, muntu yensei̱ atalitangiira b̯ukama b̯wa Ruhanga nka mwana muto, talib̯wingiramwo.”
10.16: Mwomwo yaasenga bab̯wo baana, yaabataho ngalu kandi yaabasabira. Musigazi Mu̱gu̱u̱da (Matayo 19:16-30; Lu̱u̱ka 18:18-30)
10.17: Yesu̱ b̯uyaali naakugyenda ku̱byokya, hei̱zi̱ri̱ musigazi omwei̱ yaaku̱nda malu̱ mu mei̱so gaamwe, yaamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya, “Mwegesa murungi, kikyani kinyaakora kugweterwa b̯womi b̯wa biro na biro?”
10.18: Yesu̱ yaamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Hab̯waki okunzeta murungi? Tihaloho muntu yensei̱ murungi kutoolahoona Ruhanga musa.
10.19: Biragiro bya Ruhanga obyegi̱ri̱: ‘Otali̱i̱ta, otalikora b̯wenzi̱, otali̱i̱ba, otalihangiira, otali̱gobya mwi̱ra waamu kandi oti̱i̱nenge bbaawu na maawu.’ ”
10.20: Yogwo musigazi yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Mwegesa, bi̱byo byensei̱ nceeri̱ nimbihonderanga kurugira ki̱mwei̱ mu b̯uto b̯wange.”
10.21: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaamulingiira, yeegwa amwendeerye. Kasi mwomwo yaamuweera, “Okub̯urwaho kintu ki̱mwei̱. Gyenda otunde b̯uli kintu kyeitungu lyamu, sente zaarugamwo ozigabire banaku, mwomwo olitunga itungu lya mwiguru. Hei̱nyu̱ma oi̱ze ompondere.”
10.22: Musigazi yogwo b̯u̱yeegwi̱ri̱ bi̱byo bigambu, yaagyendi̱ri̱ asaali̱i̱rwe hoi̱ hab̯wakubba yaalingi neitungu linene hoi̱.
10.23: Yesu̱ yaamagamagi̱ri̱ mu beegeseb̯wa baamwe yaabaweera, “Kakili kitatiro mu̱gu̱u̱da kwingira mu b̯ukama b̯wa Ruhanga!”
10.24: Beegeseb̯wa bab̯wo, bi̱byo bigambu byabaheeri̱ kuhuniira hoi̱, bei̱tu̱ Yesu̱ yaab̯u̱ni̱a yaabaweera, “Baana bange, kakili kitatiro mu̱gu̱u̱da kwingira mu b̯ukama b̯wa Ruhanga!
10.25: Mu mananu, kikuranguha ngamira kuraba mu kahuru ka nkinzo, kukira mu̱gu̱u̱da kwingira mu b̯ukama b̯wa Ruhanga.”
10.26: Ki̱kyo de kyaheeri̱ beegeseb̯wa ba Yesu̱ kuhuniira hoi̱, baaweerangana, “Kyakabba nikili yatyo, naani akusobora kujunwa?”
10.27: Yesu̱ yaabali̱ngi̱ri̱i̱ri̱, yaabaweera, “Hali bantu, kiki tikikusoboka; bei̱tu̱ hali Ruhanga, byensei̱ bisobokambe.”
10.28: Kasi Peeteru yaamuweera, “Twe twati̱gi̱ri̱ b̯uli ki̱mwei̱, twakuhondera!”
10.29: Yesu̱ yaamwi̱ramwo naakoba, “Mu mananu nkubaweera nti, yogwo yensei̱ mu̱nyaku̱ti̱ga maka gaamwe, rundi baab̯u, rundi banyakaab̯u, rundi maawe, rundi bbaawe, rundi baana, rundi misiri myamwe hab̯wange na hab̯wa Makuru Garungi,
10.30: akwi̱za kutunga bintu binene mirundi ki̱ku̱mi̱ ku̱teerya hali bi̱byo byali nabyo mu b̯u̱su̱mi̱ b̯ub̯u: maka, baab̯u, banyakaab̯u, bamaawe, baana na misiri hamwenya na kuwonawona, kandi mu b̯u̱su̱mi̱ b̯u̱kwi̱za, alitunga b̯womi b̯utamalikaho.
10.31: Bei̱tu̱ banene bali ba kubanza balibba ba kumaliira, kandi ba kumaliira balibba ba kubanza.” Yesu̱ Naabaza ha Ku̱kwa Kwamwe Murundi Gwakasatu (Matayo 20:17-19; Lu̱u̱ka 18:31-34)
10.32: B̯u̱baaru̱gi̱ri̱ hahwo, Yesu̱ hamwenya na beegeseb̯wa baamwe baali nibakugyenda Yeru̱salemu̱, abeehembeeri̱. B̯ubaali nibakugyenda, beegeseb̯wa baalingi bahu̱ni̱ri̱i̱ri̱ kandi na bab̯wo banyakubahonderanga beelali̱ki̱ri̱i̱ri̱. Murundi gundi de yei̱ri̱i̱rye beegeseb̯wa baamwe i̱ku̱mi̱ na babiri kwantandu, yaabaweera kintu kikugyenda kumubbaho.
10.33: Yaabaweereeri̱, “Tulimukugyenda Yeru̱salemu̱, Mwana wa Muntu bakwi̱za ku̱mu̱hayo hali bahandu̱ ba balaami̱ na beegesa ba biragiro. Bakwi̱za kumusalira musangu gwa ku̱kwa, bamu̱heyo hali Banyamahanga.
10.34: Banyamahanga bab̯wo bakwi̱za ku̱mu̱jooga, bamu̱twere matwantwe, bamujwate, na ku̱mwi̱ta bamwi̱te. Bei̱tu̱ hei̱nyu̱ma gya biro bisatu, alihimbooka.” Yesu̱ Ni̱yeegesya ha Kuheereza Bandi (Matayo 20:20-28)
10.35: Mwomwo batabani̱ ba Zebbedaayo babiri Yohaana na Yakobbo bei̱za hali Yesu̱ baamuweera, “Mwegesa tuli na kintu kitukukusaba otukolere.”
10.37: Baamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo nibakoba, “Tu̱kwendya otutungire biikaru mu b̯ukama b̯wamu: omwei̱ eicaare ha mukono gwamu gwab̯udyo na wondi ha mukono gwamu gwab̯umoso mu ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kyamu.”
10.38: Yesu̱ yaabei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Ti̱mwegi̱ri̱ kintu kimukusaba. Nywe mwakusobora kwemeera mbeera gya kuwonawona ginkugyenda kurabamwo na nkwa ginkugyenda ku̱kweramwo?”
10.39: Bo baamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo nibakoba, “Tukusobora.” Yesu̱ yaabaweera, “Kale, kuwonawona kunkugyenda kurabamwo nywedede mu̱kwi̱za kukurabamwo, kandi nka gya de kunkugyenda ku̱kwa, nanywe mu̱li̱kwa.
10.40: Bei̱tu̱ kintu kya kwicaara ha mukono gwange gwab̯udyo rundi gwab̯umoso, ki̱kyo tikili kyange kucwamwo. Bi̱byo biikaru biicala bya bab̯wo babaabi̱teekani̱ri̱i̱ze.”
10.41: Beegeseb̯wa bandi i̱ku̱mi̱ b̯u̱beegwi̱ri̱ bi̱byo bigambu, baazingalira bab̯wo bei̱ra baab̯u babiri, Yakobbo na Yohaana.
10.42: Mwomwo, Yesu̱ yaabeeta bensei̱ yaabaweera, “Mu̱kyegi̱ri̱ nti bab̯wo beegebeerwe nka balemi̱ ba Banyamahanga, mu kulema kwab̯u bamigiriza bantu babakulema, kandi bahandu̱ bab̯wo boolokya b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯unene hoi̱ hali bo.
10.43: Bei̱tu̱ ti̱ki̱semereeri̱ kubba yatyo mu̱li̱ nywe. Yogwo yensei̱ akwendya kubba mu̱handu̱ mu̱li̱ nywe akusemeera kubba muheereza weenyu̱,
10.44: yogwo yensei̱ akwendya kubba wa kubanza muli nywe, akusemeera kubba muheereza wa bensei̱.
10.45: Mwana wa Muntu nayo atakei̱ze bamuheereze, bei̱tu̱ yei̱zi̱ri̱ kuheereza bandi, na kuhayo b̯womi b̯wamwe kucungura banene.” Batumaayo Neijuluka Mei̱so (Matayo 20:29-34; Lu̱u̱ka 18:35-43)
10.46: Lu̱lwo lugyendu lwadooseerye Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe mu rub̯uga lwa Yeri̱ko. B̯ubaalingi ni̱baku̱ru̱gayo nibakugyenda Yeru̱salemu̱, bei̱zi̱ri̱ na kitebe kya bantu banene kinyakubahonderanga. Ha rubaju lwa gu̱gwo muhanda, haalingiho mwi̱jalu̱ wa mei̱so gi̱beetengi̱ Batumaayo munyakubba mu̱tabani̱ wa Timaayo. Yaali ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ naaku̱sabi̱ri̱i̱rya bantu banyakubba nibakurabaho.
10.47: Yogwo mudulu b̯u̱yeegwi̱ri̱ nti Yesu̱ wa Nazareeti̱ yooyo akurabaho, yaatandika kwaluka naakoba, “Yesu̱ mwizukulu wa Dau̱di̱ ngiira mbabazi̱!”
10.48: Kitebe kya bantu banyakubba nibali na Yesu̱, baamu̱coomeeri̱ baamuweera yeeti̱keere, bei̱tu̱ yo yaalu̱ki̱ri̱ ki̱mwei̱ naakobanga, “Mwizukulu wa Dau̱di̱ ngiira mbabazi̱!”
10.49: Yesu̱ yeemeera yaaweera bantu, “Mu̱mwete ei̱ze,” Bantu beeta yogwo mwi̱jalu̱ wa mei̱so nibakoba, “Huumura, byoka oi̱ze! Yesu̱ akukweta.”
10.50: Batumaayo yaabyoki̱ri̱ b̯wangu, yaakasuka ku̱di̱ kilwalu kyamwe kiyaali yeegu̱mi̱ri̱ho, yei̱za hali Yesu̱.
10.51: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya, “Okwendya nkukolere kyani?” Mudulu yei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Mwegesa, nkwendya mbone.”
10.52: Kasi mwomwo Yesu̱ yaamuweera, “Weegyendera, kwikiriza kwamu ku̱ku̱honeerye.” Nahaahwo b̯ulohob̯uloho yaahoni̱ri̱ mei̱so, yaatandika kuhondera Yesu̱ mu gu̱gwo muhanda.

11.1: Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe b̯ubaali heehi̱ kudwa mu rub̯uga lwa Yeru̱salemu̱, bei̱zi̱ri̱ badwereera mu rub̯uga Bbesi̱faagi̱ na lwa Bbesani̱ya, heehi̱ na Lusahu lwa Mi̱zayi̱tu̱u̱ni̱. B̯u̱baadoori̱ hahwo, Yesu̱ yaatu̱mi̱ri̱ babiri ha beegeseb̯wa baamwe
11.2: na bigambu bibi, “Mu̱gyende mu kyaru kibali mu mei̱so. B̯umwakabba ni̱mu̱cakadwayo mu̱kwi̱za kwagya mwana gwa ndogoyi̱ gu̱takani̱i̱nwangaho muntu, niguli gubbohe. Mugwahule, mugundeetere.
11.3: B̯uhaakabbaho muntu yensei̱ aku̱bab̯u̱u̱lya, ‘Mukwahula gwaki?’ mumuweere, ‘Mukama weetu̱ aku̱gwendya kandi akwi̱za ku̱gwi̱rya mu b̯wangu.’ ”
11.4: Beegeseb̯wa bab̯wo baagyendi̱ri̱ baagya mwana gwa ndogoyi̱ niguli gubbohe heirembu heehi̱ na muhanda, baagwahula.
11.5: Bab̯wo banyakubba beemereeri̱ heehi̱ hahwo baabab̯u̱u̱lya, “Hab̯waki mukugwahula?”
11.6: Bo baabei̱ri̱ri̱mwo nka Yesu̱ kuyaalingi abaweereeri̱, na bab̯wo bantu boodede baabaleka, baagutwala.
11.7: Beegeseb̯wa bab̯wo b̯u̱baagu̱leeteeri̱ Yesu̱, baagwali̱ri̱ho ngoye zaab̯u ha mugongo, yaagwicaaraho.
11.8: Bantu banene baali̱ri̱ ngoye zaab̯u mu muhanda, na bandi baabinya bi̱jangi̱ bya misaali kuruga mu misiri, baabita mu muhanda mwa kumuha ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
11.9: Bab̯wo banyakubba mu mei̱so na bab̯wo banyakubba i̱nyu̱ma lya Yesu̱, baalu̱ki̱rengi̱ kwakyendi̱ nibakoba, “Hozaana, Hozaana!” “Ali wa mu̱gi̱sa yogwo akwi̱za mwibara lya Mukama!”
11.10: “B̯uli b̯wa mu̱gi̱sa b̯ukama b̯wa haaha weetu̱ Dau̱di̱ b̯ukugyenda ku̱twi̱zamwo!” “Hozaana kwakyendi̱ mwiguru!”
11.11: Yesu̱ b̯u̱yei̱ngi̱i̱ri̱ mu Yeru̱salemu̱, yaagyendi̱ri̱ mu Yeekaru Nnyu̱mba gya Ruhanga, yaamagamaga kuwona b̯uli ki̱mwei̱ nka kukyalingi. Bei̱tu̱ hab̯wa b̯wi̱re kusweka, yaacwi̱ri̱mwo yei̱rayo Bbesani̱ya na beegeseb̯wa baamwe i̱ku̱mi̱ na babiri. Yesu̱ Naakyena Musaali Gutakwana (Matayo 21:18-19)
11.12: Mwakya gwaho, b̯ubaalingi nibakuruga Bbesani̱ya, Yesu̱ yeezegwa nzala nigikumudya.
11.13: B̯u̱yeesegeeryeho mu mei̱so, yaaleebi̱ri̱ musaali gubeeta mu̱ti̱i̱ni̱ na hadei, yeesu̱ma kuwona yaakabba naakusobora kugutungaho kyana kyakudya. Bei̱tu̱ b̯u̱yaagu̱doori̱ho, atakaagyeho kyana kyensei̱ kutoolaho bikoora bisa, hab̯wakubba b̯u̱su̱mi̱ b̯wa kwana byana b̯walingi b̯u̱takadoori̱.
11.14: Mwomwo yaaguweera, “Kuruga na hataati̱ muntu yensei̱ atali̱i̱ra kukudyaho kyana.” B̯u̱yaabazi̱ri̱ bi̱byo bigambu, beegeseb̯wa baamwe baabyegwa. Yesu̱ Naali mu Yeekaru Nnyu̱mba gya Ruhanga (Matayo 21:12-17; Lu̱u̱ka 19:45-48; Yohaana 2:13-22)
11.15: Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe b̯u̱baadoori̱ Yeru̱salemu̱, yei̱ngi̱i̱ri̱ mu Yeekaru, yaatandika kubingamwo bantu banyakubba nibakutunda kandi nibakugula bintu. Yaaju̱u̱mu̱ki̱ri̱ meeza za bantu banyakubba ni̱baku̱hi̱ngi̱sya sente na ntebe za bab̯wo banyakubba nibakutunda makolome.
11.16: Kandi atakeikirize muntu yensei̱ kurabya bintu mu zi̱gati̱ gya Yeekaru.
11.17: Kandi b̯uyaali naaku̱beegesya, yaabab̯u̱u̱lya, “Kitakahandiikwe nti, ‘Nnyu̱mba gyange gyetwanga nnyu̱mba gya kusabiramwo gya mahanga gensei̱’? Bei̱tu̱ nywe mu̱gi̱foori̱ kiikaru kya banyagi̱.”
11.18: Bahandu̱ ba balaami̱ na beegesa ba biragiro b̯u̱beegwi̱ri̱ Yesu̱ abazi̱ri̱ yatyo, baatandika ku̱toolya mu̱li̱ngo gwa ku̱mwi̱ta. Bei̱tu̱ baamu̱ti̱i̱ni̱ri̱ hab̯wa nzegesya gyamwe ginyakuhunirizanga bantu.
11.19: B̯wi̱re b̯u̱b̯wasweki̱ri̱, Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe baaruga mu rub̯uga lu̱lwo, baagyenda. Kwegera ha Mu̱ti̱i̱ni̱ (Matayo 21:20-22)
11.20: Beegeseb̯wa baamwe b̯ubaali nibakurabaho mwakya gwaho, baaweeni̱ mu̱ti̱i̱ni̱ gwa Yesu̱ guyaalingi akyeni̱ri̱ gwomi̱ri̱ kuruga ha bi̱jangi̱ kudwa ha makolo.
11.21: Hahwo hooho Peeteru yei̱zu̱ki̱i̱ri̱ Yesu̱ nka kuyaalingi akyeni̱ri̱ gu̱gwo mu̱ti̱i̱ni̱. Mwomwo yaakoba, “Mwegesa wona! Gu̱gwo mu̱ti̱i̱ni̱ gu̱waakyeni̱ri̱, gwomi̱ri̱!”
11.23: Mu mananu nkubaweera kakubba muntu aweera lulu lusahu, ‘Ruga haha, ogyende wegume mwitaka,’ atali na bicwocwo mu mutima gwamwe, bei̱tu̱ naakwikiriza nti kintu kyabazi̱ri̱ kikugyenda kukorwa, ki̱kyo kintu kilimukolerwa.
11.24: Nahab̯waki̱kyo nkubaweera, ki̱kyo kyensei̱ kimwasabanga, mwi̱ki̱ri̱zenge nti mu̱kwi̱za kukiheeb̯wa, kandi mwakitunganga.
11.25: B̯umwabbanga nimukusaba, nimukabba na kigambu kyensei̱ kimukujunaana muntu yensei̱, mumuganyirenge, aleke Bbaaweenyu̱ wa mwiguru abaganyire bibii byenyu̱. [
11.26: Bei̱tu̱ b̯umutalimuganyira, nanywede bbaaweenyu̱ wa mwiguru talibaganyira bibii byenyu̱.]” Ki̱b̯u̱u̱lyo ha B̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wa Yesu̱ (Matayo 21:23-27; Lu̱u̱ka 20:1-8)
11.27: Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe bei̱ri̱ri̱ Yeru̱salemu̱. Yesu̱ b̯uyaali naakulibatalibata mu zi̱gati̱ gya Yeekaru, bahandu̱ ba balaami̱ ba Ruhanga, beegesa ba biragiro na bahandu̱ ba Bayudaaya bei̱zi̱ri̱ hali yo.
11.28: Mwomwo baamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya, “B̯u̱sobozi̱ kyani b̯ukukuha kukora bibi bintu byensei̱? Kandi naani yaaku̱heeri̱ b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯wa kukora bi̱byo?”
11.29: Yesu̱ yaabei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Nagya kambab̯u̱u̱lye kiki: mwakanzi̱ramwo, nagya nkwi̱za kubaweera b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯umpa kukora bibi bintu.
11.30: Mu̱mbwere, b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯unyakuha Yohaana kubatiza, b̯waru̱gi̱ri̱ hanya? Ruhanga wa mwiguru yooyo yaab̯u̱mu̱heeri̱ rundi bantu?”
11.31: Mwomwo baatandika kubaza bankei na bankei nibakoba, “Twakakoba nti, ‘Ruhanga yooyo yaab̯u̱mu̱heeri̱,’ akwi̱za ku̱tu̱b̯u̱u̱lya, ‘Hab̯waki mu̱taamwi̱ki̱ri̱i̱ze?’
11.32: Bei̱tu̱ b̯utwakakoba, ‘Bantu boobo bab̯u̱mu̱heeri̱,’ ki̱kyo ki̱ku̱tu̱ti̱i̱ni̱sya hab̯wakubba bantu bensei̱ beicala bananu̱ku̱ nti, Yohaana yaali kwo mu̱ragu̱ri̱ wa Ruhanga.”
11.33: Kasi mwomwo baamwi̱ramwo nibakoba, “Ti̱twegi̱ri̱.” Na Yesu̱ yaabaweera, “Gyadede ti̱nkwi̱za kubaweera cali nyaatoori̱ b̯u̱sobozi̱ b̯umpa kukora bibi bintu.”

12.1: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaatandika kubaza nabo mu ngeera naakoba, “Haalingiho mudulu munyakulima musiri gwamwe yaagusimbamwo mi̱zabbi̱bbu̱, yaata lugo lu̱gwelogoolye, yaatamwo inyunkiro lya maaci ga vi̱i̱no. Yaabi̱mbi̱ri̱mwo nnyu̱mba gya mu̱li̱ndi̱. Kasi mwomwo yaahayo gu̱gwo musiri hali bapangi̱sya, yo yaagyenda kub̯unga mu nsi gindi.
12.2: Kei̱re ka kunokola mi̱zabbi̱bbu̱ b̯u̱kaadoori̱, yaatuma muheereza waamwe hali bapangi̱sya bab̯wo bamuhe mugab̯u gwamwe gwa mi̱myo mi̱zabbi̱bbu̱.
12.3: Bei̱tu̱ bo, baakweti̱ yogwo muheereza, baamukuuta, baamubinga mbura kantu kabamu̱heeri̱.
12.4: Mukama musiri yaabatu̱mi̱i̱ri̱ muheereza waamwe wondi. Yogwo yo, baamu̱ku̱u̱ti̱ri̱ lubbali, baamukora bintu bikuswaza.
12.5: Yaab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye yaabatumira muheereza waamwe wondi, yogwo yo, baamwi̱ti̱ri̱. Yaabasi̱ndi̱ki̱i̱ri̱ na bandi banene; bamwei̱ muli bo baabakuuta, bandi baabei̱ta.
12.6: “Yaali asi̱gali̱i̱rye muntu omwei̱ wa kutuma, mu̱tabani̱ waamwe, gi̱yendyengi̱. Yooyo gi̱yaasi̱ndi̱ki̱ri̱ ha kumaliira naateekereza nti, ‘Mwana wange bakwi̱za ku̱mu̱ti̱i̱na.’
12.7: “Bei̱tu̱ bapangi̱sya bab̯wo b̯u̱baamu̱weeni̱ baaweeragana, ‘Yogo ali mugwete. Leka tu̱mwi̱te aleke tutwale itungu lyamwe!’
12.8: Nahab̯waki̱kyo baakweti̱ yogwo mu̱tabani̱, baamwi̱ta, baamukasuka hanzei wa musiri.”
12.9: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaabab̯u̱u̱lya, “Mukuteekereza, bab̯wo bapangi̱sya, mukama musiri alibakola ki?” Akwi̱za kwi̱ta bab̯wo bapangi̱sya kandi na musiri gwamwe aguhe bapangi̱sya bandi.
12.10: Timukasomanga Binyakuhandiikwa bikoba, “ ‘I̱hi̱ga lya babi̱mbi̱ li̱baaswi̱ri̱ lyolyo li̱fooki̱ri̱ lya mugasu, lya ha nsonda;
12.11: Kiki kyokyo kya Mukama ki̱yaakoori̱, kandi kili kintu kyamahanu mu mei̱so geetu̱.’ ”
12.12: B̯u̱yaabazi̱ri̱ yatyo beegesa ba biragiro beetegereza nti boobo bayaalingi naakubazaho na mu ngeera, baatoolya mu̱li̱ngo gwa kumukwata. Bei̱tu̱ baati̱i̱ni̱ri̱ bantu, baab̯ula kumukwata, bamurugaho baagyenda. Bikukwatagana na Kusasula Musolo (Matayo 22:15-22; Lu̱u̱ka 20:20-26)
12.13: Bafalisaayo hamwei̱ na bab̯wo ba kitebe kya Herodi̱ baagyendi̱ri̱ baaromba, baateekaniza ngeru baatega Yesu̱. Baamu̱tu̱mi̱i̱ri̱ bantu baab̯u aleke bagyende bamutege mu bigambu bye.
12.14: Baamu̱gyendeeri̱ baadwa baamuweera, “Mwegesa, twegi̱ri̱ obba muntu wa mananu kandi bantu bensei̱ obei̱janjani̱ambe kandi ofaaho kwahi bi̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa bya bantu bei̱tu̱ weegesya na mananu bi̱byo bya Ruhanga bi̱yendya bantu baamwe bakore. Tu̱weere, ki̱doori̱ kusasula musolo hali Kaisaali rundi ki̱doori̱ kwahi?”
12.15: Bei̱tu̱ Yesu̱ b̯u̱yeetegeri̱i̱ze b̯u̱gobya b̯wab̯u, yaabab̯u̱u̱lya, “Hab̯waki mukulengaho kuntega? Mu̱nzolokye di̱naari̱ aleke ngiwone.”
12.16: Baamuleeteeri̱ ki̱polo ki̱kyo, mwomwo yaabab̯u̱u̱lya, “Ki̱si̱sani̱ na mabara bili ha kipolo kiki, bya naani?” Baamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo nibakoba, “Bya Kaisaali.”
12.17: Kasi mwomwo nayo yaabaweera, “Bintu bya Kaisaali, mu̱bi̱henge Kaisaali; na bya Ruhanga, mu̱bi̱henge Ruhanga.” Badulu bab̯wo baaru̱gi̱ri̱ho bahu̱ni̱ri̱i̱ri̱ hab̯wa bigambu bya Yesu̱ bi̱yaabei̱ri̱ri̱mwo. Bikukwatagana na Kuhimbooka Kwa Baku̱u̱ (Matayo 22:23-33; Lu̱u̱ka 20:27-40)
12.18: Basadukaayo, bo bei̱ki̱ri̱zengi̱ nti baku̱u̱ bahimbooka kwahi. Bab̯wo Basadukaayo bei̱zi̱ri̱ hali Yesu̱ baamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya,
12.19: “Mwegesa, Mu̱sa yaatu̱handi̱i̱ki̱i̱ri̱ kiragiro kikukoba yati, ‘Kakubba mudulu afeerwa waab̯u, mu̱kwi̱ akati̱ga mu̱kali̱ batabyeri̱ baana, yogwo waab̯u asi̱geeri̱ho, alina kutunga mukaa muziro waab̯u, babyale nayo baana, bab̯wo baana babalwenge kubba baana ba muziro.’
12.20: Haalingiho badulu musanju, baab̯u na baab̯u. Wakubanza yaatu̱ngi̱ri̱ mu̱kali̱, yogwo mudulu yaakwa atabyeri̱.
12.21: Waab̯u waakabiri yaatu̱ngi̱ri̱ yogwo mu̱kaamu̱kwere, na yogwo waab̯u wakabiri yaakwa atabyeri̱. Wakasatu nayo yaatunga yogwo mu̱kali̱, yoodede yaakwa atabyeri̱.
12.22: Bensei̱ baab̯u na baab̯u musanju baamu̱tu̱ngi̱ri̱, baakwa batabyeri̱. Hakumaliira kwa byensei̱ na mu̱kali̱ nayo yaakwa.
12.23: Tu̱weere, ha kiro kya kuhimbooka, yogwo mu̱kali̱ alibba mukaa naani, kubba benseenya baamu̱tu̱ngi̱ri̱ho?”
12.24: Yesu̱ yaabei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Mu̱habi̱ri̱ hab̯wa b̯uteetegereza Binyakuhandiikwa na maani ga Ruhanga.
12.25: Hab̯wakubba ha kiro kya kuhimbooka, tihalibbaho kutunga rundi kutungwa. Bantu bensei̱ balibba nka bamalayika ba mwiguru.
12.26: Ha bikukwatagana na kuhimbooka kwa baku̱u̱, timukasomanga mu kitabbu kya Mu̱sa, hali kisaka kinyakubbamwo mworo kandi kyo kitakuhya, cali Ruhanga yaaweereeri̱ Mu̱sa nti, ‘Gyagya Ruhanga wʼI̱bbu̱rahi̱mu̱, Ruhanga wʼI̱saka, kandi Ruhanga wa Yakobbo?’
12.27: Eicala kwahi Ruhanga wa baku̱u̱, bei̱tu̱ eicala Ruhanga wa boomi. Nywe Basadukaayo mu̱habi̱ri̱ hoi̱.” Kiragiro Kikirayo B̯u̱handu̱ (Matayo 22:34-40; Lu̱u̱ka 10:25-28)
12.28: Omwei̱ ha beegesa ba biragiro yaalingi yeemereeri̱ naakwetegeerya nka kubaali nibakukuuta mpaka. B̯u̱yeegwi̱ri̱ Yesu̱ nkakwabei̱ri̱ri̱mwo kurungi, yaamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya naakoba, “Mu biragiro byensei̱, kiragiro kyani kikirayo?”
12.29: Yesu̱ yaamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Kiragiro ki̱handu̱ mu byensei̱ kyokyo kiki, ‘Weegwa, we I̱saleeri̱! Mukama Ruhanga weetu̱, yooyo yankei Mukama.
12.30: Wendyanga Mukama Ruhanga waamu na mutima gwamu gwensei̱, na mwozo gwamu gwensei̱, na magezi̱ gaamu gensei̱, hamwei̱ na maani gaamu gensei̱.’
12.31: Kandi kya kabiri kyokyo kiki, ‘Wendyanga mwi̱ra waamu nka we ku̱weezendya wankei. Tihaloho kiragiro kyensei̱ kikukira biragiro bibi.’ ”
12.32: Mwomwo yogwo mwegesa wa biragiro yaakoba, “Ki̱kyo kili kwokwo. Oku̱doosya b̯wokukoba nti Ruhanga ali omwei̱ kandi tihaloho wondi yensei̱ kutoolahoona yo yankei.
12.33: Kwendya Ruhanga na mutima gwamu gwensei̱, na magezi̱ gaamu gensei̱ na maani gaamu gensei̱, nakwendyanga mwi̱ra waamu nka ku̱weezendya wankei kili ki̱handu̱ kukira kuhonga bihongwa byokebeerwe na kuhayo bisembu byensei̱ bi̱tu̱hayo.”
12.34: Yesu̱ b̯u̱yeegwi̱ri̱ ngeru yogwo mudulu ei̱ri̱ri̱mwo kurungi, yaamuweera, “Toli hadei na b̯ukama b̯wa Ruhanga.” Kuruga na hahwo, hatakabbeho muntu wondi yensei̱, mu̱nyaku̱geryaho ku̱mu̱b̯u̱u̱lya ki̱b̯u̱u̱lyo kindi kyensei̱. Bikukwatagana na Ku̱ri̱si̱to na Mukama Dau̱di̱ (Matayo 22:41-46; Lu̱u̱ka 20:41-44)
12.35: Yesu̱ b̯uyaalingi naakwegesya mu zi̱gati̱ gya Yeekaru, yaab̯u̱u̱li̱i̱rye bantu banyakubbaho, “Ki̱i̱zi̱ri̱ teetei̱ beegesa ba biragiro kukoba nti Ku̱ri̱si̱to ali mwana wa Dau̱di̱?
12.36: Dau̱di̱ yo yankei hab̯wa maani ga Mwozo Mu̱syanu̱ yaakobi̱ri̱, “ ‘Mukama yaaweereeri̱ Mukama wange yati, “Icaara ha mukono gwange gwab̯udyo ku̱doosya b̯undifoora banyanzigwa baamu katebe ka magulu gaamu.” ’
12.37: Dau̱di̱ yaakabba yaamweti̱ri̱ Mukama waamwe, asobora teetei̱ kubba mwizukulu wa Dau̱di̱?” Kitebe kya bantu banyakubbaho baamwetegeerye na bihika.
12.38: Yesu̱ mu kwegesya kwamwe yaabaweereeri̱, “Mweri̱nde beegesa ba biragiro bab̯wo bendya kulibata mu mihanda balweri̱ bilwalu bya muhendu kandi ni̱bendya bantu babaramu̱kye mu b̯utali,
12.39: bendya kwicaara mu ntebe za bi̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa mu marombero na ha magenyi̱.
12.40: Banyaga manyu̱mba ga bamu̱kaabakwere kandi nibasaba ndanda aleke bantu babawone. Bo bab̯wo balifubirwa kukira bandi.” Kisembu kya Mu̱kaamu̱kwere Munaku Ki̱yaagabi̱ri̱ (Lu̱u̱ka 21:1-4)
12.41: Yesu̱ yei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ heehi̱ neibiikiro lya sente lya mu Yeekaru kandi yaawona nibata bisembu mu ibiikiro li̱lyo. Bagu̱u̱da banene bateeri̱mwo sente zinene.
12.42: B̯uyaali hahwo hei̱zi̱ri̱ mu̱kaamu̱kwere munaku yaatamwo bi̱polo bya sente bibiri bikwijanjana si̱ri̱ngi̱ ki̱ku̱mi̱.
12.43: Yesu̱ b̯u̱yaamu̱weeni̱ yeeta beegeseb̯wa baamwe yaabaweera, “Mu mananu nkubaweera nti, yogwo mu̱kaamu̱kwere munaku ateeri̱mwo kisembu kinene kukira bantu bensei̱.
12.44: Hab̯wakubba bab̯wo bensei̱ bateeri̱mwo sente zi̱saagi̱ri̱ ha b̯u̱gu̱u̱da b̯wab̯u, bei̱tu̱ yo yogwo mu̱kali̱ mu b̯unaku b̯wamwe ateeri̱mwo sente zensei̱ ziyaakali nazo mu b̯womi b̯wamwe.”

13.1: Yesu̱ b̯uyaalingi naakuruga mu Yeekaru, omwei̱ ha beegeseb̯wa baamwe yaamuweera, “Mwegesa, wona gagwo manyu̱mba na mahi̱ga ganyaku̱gabi̱mba. Kagali garungi!”
13.2: Yesu̱ yaamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Gagwo manyu̱mba togaweeni̱ na b̯ukooto b̯wago? Tihaloho i̱hi̱ga li̱kwi̱za kusigala li̱i̱cali̱i̱ri̱ ha li̱i̱ra, b̯uli i̱hi̱ga baliliguma hansi.”
13.3: Yesu̱ b̯uyaalingi ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ ha Lusahu lwa Mi̱zayi̱tu̱u̱ni̱, lunyakubba lu̱li̱ngi̱ri̱i̱ri̱ Yeekaru, Peeteru, Yakobbo, Yohaana, nʼAndereya, bei̱zi̱ri̱ baamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya na mu nsita nibakoba,
13.4: “Tu̱weere, bibi bintu bilibbaho di̱? Kandi, kawoneru kyani kakwi̱za kubbaho kwolokya nka kubili heehi̱ kudwereera.”
13.5: Yesu̱ yaabei̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba “Mwegyendereze, muntu yensei̱ atalibagobya.
13.6: Bantu banene bali̱i̱za mwibara lyange nibakoba nti, ‘Gyagya Ku̱ri̱si̱to,’ kandi bali̱gobya banene.
13.7: B̯u̱mu̱lyegwa nihaloho malemu na ngambu zikukwatagana na gagwo malemu, mu̱tali̱ti̱i̱na. Hab̯wakubba bintu nka bi̱byo, bili na kubanza kubbaho. Bei̱tu̱ kandi kumalika kwa nsi kulibba ku̱takabbeeri̱ kudwa.
13.8: Mahanga galibyokeerangana ku̱lwani̱syangana, kandi na b̯ukama b̯u̱mwei̱ b̯ulibyoka ku̱lwani̱sya b̯ukama b̯undi. Halibbaho mi̱si̱ki̱ mu biikaru bikwahukana kandi nihagwa nzala. Bi̱byo bintu bilibba ntandiko gya kuwonawona.
13.9: “Mulina kwerinda, hab̯wakubba banyanzigwa balibatwala mu balemi̱ nibabajwata njunju mu marombero. Mu̱kwi̱za kutwalwa kutongana mu mei̱so ga balemi̱ bahandu̱ na mu mei̱so ga bakama hab̯wange, nimumpeera b̯u̱kei̱so hali bo.
13.10: Kandi gaga Makuru Garungi galina kubanza kurangiirwa mu mahanga gensei̱ kumalika kwa nsi ku̱takabeeri̱ kudwa.
13.11: B̯ubalibakwata nibakabaleeta mu mei̱so ga bacwi̱ ba misangu mutalituntuura bi̱byo bimulibaza. Mwabazanga ki̱kyo kili ha mitima myenyu̱, hab̯wakubba timuli nywenywe balibba nimukubaza, bei̱tu̱ Mwozo wa Ruhanga, yogwo ali muli nywe.
13.12: “Muntu alihayo waab̯u bamwi̱te na bbaa muntu nayo alihayo mwana waamwe bamwi̱te. Kandi baana balibyokeera babyeru̱ baab̯u ni̱babei̱ti̱sya.
13.13: Bantu bensei̱ balibanoba hab̯wange, bei̱tu̱ yogwo yensei̱ aligumisiriza ku̱doosya ha kumaliira, yooyo alijunwa.” Kasu̱mi̱ ka Kuwonawona (Matayo 24:15-28; Lu̱u̱ka 21:20-24)
13.14: Yesu̱ yaagyendi̱ri̱ mu mei̱so na kubaweera, “B̯umulikawona Yeekaru nigilimwo ‘kinugwa kibiibi hoi̱’ kitakusemeera kubba mu Yeekaru (Yogwo yensei̱ asoma bibi bigambu alina kwetegereza ki̱bi̱ku̱manyi̱sya!) Bab̯wo bensei̱ balibba mu B̯uyudaaya bei̱ru̱ke bagyende mu nsahu.
13.15: Yogwo yensei̱ alibba ha kasolya ka nnyu̱mba gyamwe, atali̱geryaho ku̱ni̱i̱nu̱ka rundi kugyenda mu nnyu̱mba kutoolayo kintu kyensei̱.
13.16: Yogwo yensei̱ alibba mu ndimiro atali̱geryaho kwemuka kwamu̱gi̱ mwa kutoolayo kyakulwala.
13.17: Mu biro bi̱byo bya kumalika kwa nsi, bakali̱ balibba na nda, na bakali̱ balibba ni̱bakwonkya, kabalibba na b̯ujune b̯unene hoi̱ mu kwi̱ru̱ka!
13.18: Mu̱sabe Ruhanga aleke kasu̱mi̱ keenyu̱ ka kwi̱ru̱ka katalibba mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa b̯wi̱nyamu̱.
13.19: Hab̯wakubba, biro bi̱byo bilibba biro bya b̯ujune b̯unene hoi̱, b̯ujune b̯utakabbangaho kuruga Ruhanga naahanga nsi, kandi b̯utalibbaho murundi gundi.
13.20: Mukama Ruhanga abbenge ataakeeheeryeho biro bi̱byo, tihaloho muntu yensei̱ yaaku̱ju̱ni̱i̱rwe, bei̱tu̱ hab̯wa bantu baamwe bayaakomi̱ri̱mwo, yaakeeheeryeho biro bi̱byo.
13.21: Mu biro bi̱byo muntu yensei̱ b̯walibaweera, ‘Wone Ku̱ri̱si̱to ngogo haha!’ Rundi, ‘Wone yo ngodi̱!’ Mutalimwikiririzamwo.
13.22: Hab̯wakubba bantu bakwezeta Ku̱ri̱si̱to na baragu̱ri̱ ba b̯u̱gobya baali̱i̱za, kandi balikora bintu bikuhuniriza hoi̱ na byamahanu, mwa ku̱habi̱sya bab̯wo ba Ruhanga bayaakomi̱ri̱mwo, kakubba kibba nikikusoboka.
13.23: Nahab̯waki̱kyo, mwi̱cale nimwerinda kubba bi̱byo byensei̱ mbi̱baweereeri̱ b̯u̱su̱mi̱ b̯wabyo b̯u̱takadoori̱.
13.24: “Bei̱tu̱ hei̱nyu̱ma gya biro bi̱byo bya kuwonawona, “ ‘kalyoba kalihinduka keiragure, kandi na mweri̱ tigulisuuka;
13.25: nzota za mu mwanya ziligwa hansi, na bi̱byo binyamaani biicala mu mwanya hakyendi̱ bali̱bi̱zi̱ngi̱zya.’
13.26: “Ha b̯wi̱re b̯u̱b̯wo bantu baliwona Mwana wa Muntu nei̱zi̱ra mu bikaka na maani ganene hoi̱ na ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa.
13.27: Kandi, alituma bamalayika baamwe bagyende kucooka bab̯wo ba Ruhanga bayaakomi̱ri̱mwo kubba baamwe, kuruga mu nsonda inei za nsi, na kuruga rubaju lu̱mwei̱ lweiguru kudwa ha lundi.
13.28: “Hati̱ nu mu̱bbe na kimwegera ha musaali mu̱ti̱i̱ni̱. Gwo kasita bi̱jangi̱ na bikoora byagwo bisekesera, b̯u̱b̯wo mwega-b̯wegi̱ nti kyanda kili heehi̱ kutandika.
13.29: Mu mu̱li̱ngo gwogwo gu̱mwei̱ b̯umuliwona bibi bintu nibikubbaho, mu̱lyega-b̯wegi̱ nti b̯wi̱re b̯wa Mwana wa Muntu kwi̱ra b̯uli heehi̱ kudwa.
13.30: Mu mananu nkubaweera nti, bantu ba mu̱hi̱hi̱ gugu tibalimalikaho, bi̱byo byensei̱ bi̱takabbeeri̱ho.
13.31: Iguru na nsi bilimalikaho, bei̱tu̱ bigambu byange tibilimalikaho.” Kiro na Saaha Ti̱byegebeerwe (Matayo 24:36-44)
13.32: Yaab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye yaabaweera, “Tihaloho muntu yeegi̱ri̱ kiro rundi saaha bya kwi̱ra kwa Mwana wa Muntu, kadi babbe bamalayika ba mwiguru, kadi abbe gya Mwana wa Muntu, bei̱tu̱ Bbaabba Ruhanga yooyo musa abyegi̱ri̱.
13.33: Nahab̯waki̱kyo mwi̱cale mwetegeki̱ri̱ kandi nimwerinda! Kubba ti̱mwegi̱ri̱ kiro na saaha.
13.34: Kili nka mudulu munyakuteekaniza lugyendu lwamwe kugyenda mu nsi gindi. Bei̱tu̱ b̯uyaali atakagyendi̱ri̱, yeeti̱ri̱ baheereza baamwe, b̯uli muheereza yaamuha mulimo guyaakora, kasi yo yaagyenda. Omwei̱ ha baheereza bab̯wo yaamu̱ti̱gi̱i̱ri̱ mulimo gwa kulinda nnyu̱mba, yaamuweera eicale naawona.
13.35: “Nahab̯waki̱kyo mwi̱cale nimuwona hab̯wakubba ti̱mwegi̱ri̱ b̯wi̱re b̯wa mukama nnyu̱mba b̯wali̱i̱ri̱ramwo. Asobora kwi̱ra b̯wi̱re b̯wa joojolo, rundi mwitumbi, rundi ha nkoko zikookoomera, rundi nib̯ukukya.
13.37: Kiki b̯unkukiweera nywe b̯u̱b̯wo nkubba nki̱weereeri̱ b̯uli muntu nti: Mwi̱cale nimuwona.”

14.1: Mu kasu̱mi̱ kakwo, haalingi nihakub̯urayo biro bibiri kudwa ha kiro kya kujaguza B̯u̱genyi̱ b̯wa Kurab̯waho na b̯wa Migaati Mitalimwo B̯u̱mya. Kandi b̯u̱b̯wo bahandu̱ ba balaami̱ na beegesa ba biragiro baalingi ni̱baku̱tolereerya mu̱li̱ngo gwa kukwata Yesu̱ na ku̱mwi̱ta bantu bateegi̱ri̱.
14.2: Bei̱tu̱ kandi baabazi̱ri̱ nibakoba, “Tutakora kintu kya kumukwata mu bibi biro bya B̯u̱genyi̱, hab̯wakubba kisobora kuleetaho kajagaaru mu bantu.”
14.3: Yesu̱ b̯uyaali mu kyaru kya Bbesani̱ya, ha kiihuru kibaali bamu̱segereerye, wu mudulu munyakubba yeegebeerwe nka Si̱mooni̱ wa bihaga, hei̱zi̱ri̱ mu̱kali̱ munyakubba na cu̱pa gya maku̱ta ga muhendu gakuboya kurungi, ganyakubba gakoleerwe kuruga mu bintu bya muhendu. Yogwo mu̱kali̱ yaahwi̱ri̱ gi̱gyo cu̱pa, yaabbwomera Yesu̱ gagwo maku̱ta ha mu̱twe.
14.4: Bamwei̱ mu bantu banyakubbaho baabazi̱ri̱ nibali bazi̱ngalu̱ nibakoba, “Gagwo maku̱ta gakwi̱ri̱ ki?
14.5: Gaakabbenge gatu̱ndi̱i̱rwe, gaakarugwamwo sente zikukira mpeera gya muntu gyakolera mwaka gwensei̱; zi̱zo sente niziheeb̯wa bantu banaku.” Baakorokoti̱ri̱ yogwo mu̱kali̱, nibamuweera bigambu bi̱kwolokya nka kubaali basaali̱i̱rwe hoi̱.
14.6: Yesu̱ yaabaweera, “Mu̱mu̱leke, mu̱ku̱mu̱gadi̱i̱rya kyani? Ankoleeri̱ kintu kirungi hoi̱.
14.7: Mu̱kwi̱za kwicalanga na bantu baseege biro byensei̱, nimubasagikanga b̯wi̱re b̯wensei̱ hamwakendeeryanga. Bei̱tu̱ ti̱mu̱kwi̱za kwicala nagya biro byensei̱.
14.8: Yogo mu̱kali̱ akoori̱ kintu kyakusobora kukora. Asi̱i̱gi̱ri̱ mubiri gwange gagwo maku̱ta gakuboya kuguteekaniriza kuziikwa.
14.9: Mu mananu nkubaweera nti, hensei̱ mu gigi nsi habali̱tebeerya gaga Makuru Garungi, na yogwo mu̱kali̱ kintu kyakoori̱ kikukwatagana na gagwo maku̱ta, bakwi̱za ku̱ki̱mwi̱zu̱ki̱rangaho.”
14.10: Mwomwo Yu̱da I̱sakalyota, omwei̱ hali beegeseb̯wa i̱ku̱mi̱ na babiri, yaagyenda kudiirisana Yesu̱ hali bahandu̱ ba balaami̱.
14.11: Bab̯wo bahandu̱ ba balaami̱ baasemereerwe hoi̱ kwegwa bi̱byo bigambu, baaragani̱sya kuha Yu̱da sente. Mwomwo Yu̱da yaatandika ku̱toolereerya muhanda gurungi gwa ku̱hayo Yesu̱ mu ngalu za banyanzigwa. Yesu̱ Naategeka B̯u̱genyi̱ b̯wa Kwi̱zu̱ka Kurab̯waho
14.12: Ha kiro kyakubanza kya B̯u̱genyi̱ b̯wa Migaati Mitalimwo B̯u̱mya, ki̱baahongerengi̱mwo mwana gwa ntaama gwa kwi̱zu̱ka Kurab̯waho, beegeseb̯wa ba Yesu̱ bei̱zi̱ri̱ hali yo baamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya, “Kiikaru kyani kyokwendya tu̱ni̱hi̱ri̱i̱rye hatwadiira kiihuru kya B̯u̱genyi̱ b̯wa Kurab̯waho?”
14.13: Nahab̯waki̱kyo Yesu̱ yaatu̱mi̱ri̱ beegeseb̯wa baamwe babiri, yaabaweera, “Mu̱gyende mu rub̯uga, mu̱kwi̱za ku̱romba mudulu yeetweki̱ri̱ kyese kya meezi̱. Mumuhondere,
14.14: nnyu̱mba giyaakeingiramwo, muweere mukamaagyo nti, ‘Mwegesa aku̱b̯u̱u̱lya: Ki̱si̱i̱ka kyani kya bagenyi̱ kinyaadiiramwo na beegeseb̯wa bange kiihuru kya B̯u̱genyi̱ b̯wa Kurab̯waho?’
14.15: Yogwo mukama nnyu̱mba akwi̱za kubaragiira ki̱si̱i̱ka kikooto, ki̱ni̱hi̱ri̱i̱rye kurungi, cali mu̱kwi̱za kuteekaniriza hali twabba.”
14.16: Beegeseb̯wa bab̯wo baagyendi̱ri̱ mu lu̱lwo rub̯uga baagya bintu byensei̱ nibili nka Yesu̱ ku̱yaabi̱baweereeri̱, mwomwo baategeka kiihuru kya B̯u̱genyi̱ b̯wa Kurab̯waho.
14.17: Mu b̯wi̱re b̯wa kaswekusweku, Yesu̱ yei̱zi̱ri̱ yaadwa na beegeseb̯wa baamwe i̱ku̱mi̱ na babiri.
14.18: B̯ubaali nibali ha kiihuru, yaabaweera, “Mu mananu nkubaweera nti, omwei̱ muli nywe akwi̱za kundiirisana, yooyo yogwo alimukudya nagya.”
14.19: Beegeseb̯wa bab̯wo baasaali̱i̱rwe hoi̱, mwomwo omwei̱ omwei̱ baaweera Yesu̱, “Mu mananu, tali gya!”
14.20: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaabei̱ramwo naabaweera, “Ali omwei̱ hali nywe i̱ku̱mi̱ na babiri, yogwo alimukukolya hamwei̱ nagya mu sahaani gi̱mwei̱.
14.21: Mwana wa Muntu akwi̱za ku̱kwa nka Binyakuhandiikwa kubimubazaho. Bei̱tu̱ alikiwona yogwo alidirisana Mwana wa Muntu! Hakiri yogwo muntu abbenge ataabyali̱i̱rwe.”
14.22: Hei̱nyu̱ma, b̯ubaalingi nibali ha kiihuru, Yesu̱ yaakweti̱ mugaati, yaasi̱i̱ma kandi yaagusabbasabbulamwo, yaaguha beegeseb̯wa baamwe, naakoba, “Mu̱kwate mudye; gugu gwogwo mubiri gwange.”
14.23: Mwomwo yaakwata ki̱kopo kya vi̱i̱no, b̯u̱yaamaari̱ ku̱si̱i̱ma Ruhanga yaakibaha, bensei̱ baanywaho.
14.24: Yaabaweera, “Lili lyolyo ibbanga lyange lya ndagaanu gya Ruhanga, lilibbwomoka hab̯wa banene.
14.25: Mu mananu nkubaweera nti, ti̱ndi̱b̯u̱ni̱a kunywa ha kyakunywa kya byana bya mi̱zabbi̱bbu̱ ku̱doosya kiro ki̱kyo, b̯u̱ndi̱i̱ra kukinywa b̯uhyaka mu b̯ukama b̯wa Ruhanga.”
14.26: B̯u̱baakahi̱i̱mi̱ri̱ kyembu kya kuhaariiza Ruhanga, baahuluka baagyenda ha Lusahu lwa Mi̱zayi̱tu̱u̱ni̱. Yesu̱ Naabaza Peeteru nka Kwalimwegaana
14.27: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaabaweera, “Nywe nywensei̱, mukugyenda kundugaho, hab̯wa bintu bi̱kwi̱za kubbaho. Kubba kyahandi̱i̱ki̱i̱rwe nti: “ ‘Ndikuuta mu̱li̱i̱sya, neigana lya ntaama litarange.’
14.28: Bei̱tu̱ b̯undikahimbooka, nkwi̱za kubabanza kugyenda Galilaaya.”
14.29: Mwomwo Peeteru yaakoba, “Bantu bensei̱ nab̯ubaakurugaho, gya ti̱nkwi̱za kukurugaho.”
14.30: Yesu̱ yaamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Mu mananu nkukuweera nti, kiro kyadeeru i̱jolo lyoli, nkoko gi̱takakookoomi̱ri̱ murundi gwakabiri, okwi̱za kubba onyeegeeni̱ mirundi misatu.”
14.31: Bei̱tu̱ Peeteru yaahaami̱ri̱i̱ri̱ kukoba, “Nab̯ukyakabba ni̱ki̱kwetaagi̱sya ku̱kwa nawe, ti̱nkwi̱za kukwegaana.” Na beegeseb̯wa bandi bensei̱ kwokwo baakobi̱ri̱ yatyo. Yesu̱ Ni̱yeesengereerya Ruhanga mu Getesemaane
14.32: Hei̱nyu̱ma, Yesu̱ na beegeseb̯wa baamwe baagyendi̱ri̱ mu kiikaru kibeeta Getesemaane, mwomwo Yesu̱ yaabaweera, “Mwi̱caarenge haha, nagya kambenge ninsaba Ruhanga.”
14.33: Hali yaagyendi̱ri̱ kusaba yaatwalageeni̱ Peeteru, Yakobbo na Yohaana; mwomwo yaatandika kwegwa mutima gwamwe niguli na b̯ujune b̯unene hoi̱.
14.34: Kasi mwomwo yaabaweera, “Nkwegwa mutima gwange niguli na b̯ujune b̯unene hoi̱ b̯waku̱nzi̱ta-b̯wi̱ti̱. Mwi̱cale haha muteebbaka.”
14.35: Bei̱tu̱ b̯u̱yaakagyendi̱ri̱ mu mei̱soho kadooli̱, yaata b̯u̱syo b̯wamwe hansi yaasaba naakoba, b̯ukyakabba nikikusoboka, amutooleho kuwonawona kuyaali naakugyenda kurabamwo.
14.36: Yaasabi̱ri̱ naakoba, “Bbaabba, tihaloho kitasoboka hali we. Ntoolaho ki̱kopo kiki kya kuwonawona. Kitabba nka ku̱nkwendya, bei̱tu̱ nka kwokwendya kibbe.”
14.37: Kasi mwomwo yei̱ra hali beegeseb̯wa baamwe, yaabaagya beebbaki̱ri̱. Mwomwo yaaweera Peeteru, “Si̱mooni̱, weebbaki̱ri̱? Timukusobora kadi kumala saaha gi̱mwei̱ nimukuwona?
14.38: Mu̱leke kwebbaka kandi mu̱sabe Ruhanga aleke mutagwa mu kwoheb̯wa. Myozo myenyu̱ mi̱kwendya kukora kintu ki̱semereeri̱, bei̱tu̱ kandi mibiri myenyu̱ miceke.”
14.39: Yesu̱ yaab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye yaagyenda kusaba, yaasaba naakoresya bigambu byobyo bi̱mwei̱.
14.40: B̯u̱yei̱ri̱ri̱ hali bo murundi gundi, yaabaagi̱i̱rye beebbaki̱ri̱, hab̯wakubba b̯ulo b̯wali nib̯uli nabo kubi. Batakabbe na kyaku̱mwi̱ramwo.
14.41: B̯u̱yei̱ri̱ri̱ hali bo murundi gwakasatu, yaabab̯u̱u̱lya, “Nahati̱ mu̱cakeebbaki̱ri̱ mbe, muhuumule? Mwebbaki̱ri̱ kikumala! Kasu̱mi̱ kange kadoori̱. Mu̱wone nka kubakudiirisana Mwana wa Muntu ku̱mu̱hayo mu ngalu za nkori̱ za bibii.
14.42: Mu̱byoke tugyende! Mundyamwo rukwe yo ngogo ei̱zi̱ri̱!” Yesu̱ Naakwatwa
14.43: Yesu̱ b̯uyaali naacakabaza-b̯u̱bazi̱ bi̱byo bigambu, Yu̱da, omwei̱ hali bab̯wo beegeseb̯wa baamwe i̱ku̱mi̱ na babiri, yaadwa haahwo hali Yesu̱. Yei̱zi̱ri̱ hamwei̱ na kitebe kya bantu banene banyakubba na nsone na mibbeere. Bab̯wo bantu baalingi batu̱mi̱i̱rwe bahandu̱ ba balaami̱, beegesa ba biragiro na bahandu̱ ba Bayudaaya.
14.44: B̯u̱b̯wo yogwo munyakudyamwo Yesu̱ rukwe yaalingi abategekeeri̱ kawoneru kayaakora kubaragiira Yesu̱. Yaabategekeeri̱ naakoba, “Yogwo mudulu ginyaakagwa mu salaka, akubba naali yooyo yoogwo. Mumukwate, mumutwale, mumulindire ki̱mwei̱.”
14.45: Nahaahwo b̯ulohob̯uloho Yu̱da yei̱zi̱ri̱ yaagyendera ki̱mwei̱ hali Yesu̱ yaamweta naakoba, “Mwegesa!” Mwomwo yaamugwa mu salaka.
14.46: Kasi mwomwo bab̯wo badulu bakwata Yesu̱.
14.47: Omwei̱ hali bab̯wo beegeseb̯wa banyakubba beemereeri̱ heehi̱ na Yesu̱ yaasi̱ki̱ri̱ nsone yaatema muheereza wa mu̱laami̱ mu̱handu̱, yaamukadulaho ipokopo.
14.48: Mwomwo Yesu̱ yaabaweera, “Mumale mwi̱ze na mpirima na mibbeere kunkwata, ndi muhyekera?
14.49: Mbanga nincala nanywe biro byensei̱ ni̱nyeegesya mu zi̱gati̱ gya Yeekaru, mutakankwate. Bei̱tu̱ byo Binyakuhandiikwa bili na kudwereera.”
14.50: Mwomwo beegeseb̯wa baamwe bensei̱ baamurugaho bei̱ru̱ka.
14.51: Haalingiho musigazi omwei̱ munyaakugyendanga naahondera Yesu̱, yogwo musigazi yaali atali na lu̱goye lwalweri̱ kutoolahoona suuka giyaalingi yeebbohi̱ri̱ gisa. B̯u̱baamu̱kweti̱,
14.52: yaateesu̱ki̱ri̱ yei̱ru̱ka munyiŋinyi, yaati̱ga lu̱goye lwamwe. Yesu̱ Naali mu Mei̱so ga Lukuratu
14.53: Bab̯wo badulu banyakukwata Yesu̱ baamu̱tweri̱ hali mu̱laami̱ mu̱handu̱. Mwomwo bahandu̱ ba balaami̱, bahandu̱ ba Bayudaaya na beegesa ba biragiro beecooka hamwei̱.
14.54: B̯u̱b̯wo Peeteru yaagyendi̱ri̱ naahonderanga Yesu̱ na hadeiho kudwereera ki̱mwei̱ mu zi̱gati̱ gya yogwo mu̱laami̱ mu̱handu̱. Yaadoori̱ yeicaara na bab̯wo bali̱ndi̱, yaatandika kwota mworo nabo.
14.55: Ha b̯wi̱re b̯u̱b̯wo bab̯wo bahandu̱ ba balaami̱ hamwei̱ na Lukuratu Lu̱handu̱ lwa Bayudaaya lwensei̱ baalingi ni̱baku̱toolereerya b̯u̱kei̱so b̯wa kujunaana Yesu̱ aleke basobore kumusalira kifubiro kya ku̱kwa. Bei̱tu̱ batakasobore kutunga b̯u̱kei̱so b̯wensei̱.
14.56: Bantu banene baaheeri̱yo b̯u̱kei̱so b̯wa b̯u̱gobya, kyonkei bigambu byab̯u bitakabazenge kintu ki̱mwei̱.
14.57: Kasi mwomwo haaru̱gayo bantu bamwei̱ beemeera baabaza bigambu bikujunaana Yesu̱ bya b̯u̱gobya nti,
14.58: “Twamwegwi̱ri̱ naakukoba, ‘Nkwi̱za ku̱zi̱kya gigi Yeekaru, gi̱nyaku̱bi̱mbwa bantu b̯untu, nzi̱re mbi̱mbe gindi mu biro bisatu, gitakusobora ku̱bi̱mbwa muntu.’ ”
14.59: Bei̱tu̱ nab̯wo b̯u̱kei̱so b̯wa bab̯wo bantu b̯utakasobore kubba nib̯ukubaza kintu ki̱mwei̱.
14.60: Kasi mwomwo mu̱laami̱ mu̱handu̱ yeemeera mu mei̱so ga bantu, yaab̯u̱u̱lya Yesu̱, “Toli na kyakwi̱ramwo hali b̯u̱b̯wo b̯u̱kei̱so b̯wa bab̯wo badulu bakukurumiriza nab̯wo?”
14.61: Bei̱tu̱ Yesu̱ atakamwi̱remwo kintu kyensei̱. Yogwo mu̱laami̱ mu̱handu̱ yaab̯u̱ni̱a yaamu̱b̯u̱u̱lya, “Weewe Ku̱ri̱si̱to, Mutongoole wa Ruhanga, Mwana wa Yogwo Ahaariizib̯wa?”
14.62: Yesu̱ yaamwi̱ri̱ri̱mwo naakoba, “Ndi yooyo. Kandi mu̱kwi̱za kuwona Mwana wa Muntu ei̱cali̱i̱ri̱ ha mukono gwab̯udyo mu kiikaru kya ki̱ti̱i̱ni̱sa kinene kya Ruhanga wa Maani, kandi naali ha bikaka naakwi̱ra ha nsi kuruga mwiguru.”
14.63: Mwomwo mu̱laami̱ mu̱handu̱ yaatemula bilwalu byamwe, yaabab̯u̱u̱lya, “Tukwetaaga bakei̱so bandi baaki?
14.64: Nywenseenya mwegwi̱ri̱ nka kwalu̱mi̱ri̱ Ruhanga. Mukukoba teetei̱?” Bantu bensei̱ baamu̱sali̱i̱ri̱ musangu nibakoba akusemeera kwi̱twa.
14.65: Kasi mwomwo bantu bamwei̱ bamu̱twera matwantwe, baamubbumba mei̱so na lu̱goye, baamukuuta ntomi̱ kandi baamuweera, “Ragura!” Hei̱nyu̱ma bali̱ndi̱ baamutwala baamukuuta. Peeteru Niyeegaana Yesu̱
14.66: Peeteru b̯uyaalingi kwansi mu zi̱gati̱ gya Yeekaru, omwei̱ hali bazaana ba mu̱laami̱ mu̱handu̱ yei̱zi̱ri̱ cali Peeteru yaali.
14.67: Yogwo muzaana b̯u̱yaaweeni̱ Peeteru, yaamu̱li̱ngi̱i̱ra hitihiti. Mwomwo yaamuweera, “Nawe de, waalingi na yogwo Yesu̱, Mu̱nazareeti̱.”
14.68: Bei̱tu̱ Peeteru yeegeeni̱ naakoba, “Bi̱byo bintu byokubaza ti̱mbyegi̱ri̱ kandi tinkubyetegereza.” Mwomwo yaalibata yaahuluka hanzei nagwa ha mulyangu gweirembu.
14.69: Yogwo muzaana b̯u̱yaakab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye kuwona Peeteru, yaaweera bab̯wo bantu banyakubba nibakusunga, “Yogo mudulu ali omwei̱ ha beegeseb̯wa ba Yesu̱.”
14.70: Peeteru yaab̯u̱ni̱i̱rye yeegaana. Hei̱nyu̱ma gya b̯wi̱re b̯u̱dooli̱, bab̯wo bantu banyakubba beemereeri̱ hahwo heehi̱ baabazi̱ri̱ nibamuweera “Mu mananu, oli omwei̱ hali bo, kubba oli Mugalilaaya!”
14.71: Mwomwo Peeteru yaatandika kubarahirira naakoba, “Yogwo mudulu, gya ti̱mwegi̱ri̱, nyaakabba ni̱nku̱gobya kintu kindi kibiibi kimbeho!”
14.72: Nahaahwo b̯ulohob̯uloho, nkoko gyakookomi̱ri̱ murundi gwakabiri. Mwomwo Peeteru yei̱zu̱ka nka Yesu̱ kuyaalingi amu̱weereeri̱, “Nkoko gi̱takakookoomi̱ri̱ mirundi mibiri, okwi̱za kubba onyeegeeni̱ mirundi misatu.” Hei̱nyu̱ma Peeteru yeegwi̱ri̱ mutima gwamwe niguli na b̯ujune b̯unene hoi̱, yaalira.

15.1: Ha kiro kinyakuhonderaho b̯wi̱re b̯wa mwakya karei hoi̱, bahandu̱ ba balaami̱, bahandu̱ ba Bayudaaya, beegesa ba biragiro, na bantu bensei̱ ba Lukuratu Lu̱handu̱ lwa Bayudaaya, baahanwi̱ri̱ baacwamwo kyakukora. Baabbohi̱ri̱ Yesu̱, baamwehembeerya, baamu̱hayo hali Pi̱laato, munyakubba naali weisaza.
15.2: Mwomwo Pi̱laato yaab̯u̱u̱lya Yesu̱, “Weewe mukama wa Bayudaaya?” Yesu̱ yaamwi̱ramwo naakoba, “Kwokwo, kili nka kwokobi̱ri̱.”
